Shea approved this proposal. Currently, the Dark Moon’s Flame Legion had been selecting personnel and making a series of preparations. They would probably officially set off within 3 days.

“I see. Then someone needs to play the role of Aguile at some point.” Roman’s eyes twitched and said, “Why not let me do that? I have been helping my aunty to train people all day. I can go out to catch a breath since I’m worn out.”

Sir Leader and the dead duck dragon looked at each other, and they showed suspicion at the same time. Master Roman was mad when he saw their reactions.

“Is it because you noticed there are many widows after a large number of people were killed in the war of the Blue Lava Estate?” Chen Rui directly exposed a widow fetishist with a question.

Paglio also added incisively, “He is not worn out; he is lustful.”

“Hehe, look at what you said.” Roman just smirked maliciously. As he saw Zola’s gaze looking here, he knew that Ms. Fairy Dragon’s senses were extremely keen, so he instantly changed to a righteous and awe-inspiring face, ” You 2 dirty minded guys, am I Roman. Belphegor like that?”

Chen Rui and Paglio asked in unison, “Isn’t it?”

Roman saw Zola whisper a few words to Delia. When Delia left the “Governance Association’s”

small circle of discussion and came toward him, he secretly felt things were not going well. He quickly added, “I just want to help the leader and also try the power of this artifact!”

“What is there to help?” Delia’s voice sounded.

Roman knew that Delia must have heard Ms. Fairy Dragon’s “slander talk” just now. He was afraid that things would get worse if he explained it, so he immediately glanced at his 2 bad friends.

Chen Rui showed his partner’s trump card, pretending to be dazed and directly ignoring Roman’s gaze signalling for help.

“Let me explain it.” Paglio spoke with a sense of duty, making Roman almost moved to tears. “It’s like this, Chen Rui and I decided to go to the Blue Lava Estate together. As for this guy… he just said he would stay willingly to train the Dark Demon with you.”

In an instant, Master Roman’s gaze became quite interesting. Master Poison Dragon directly ignored Roman’s dejected gaze and grinned. Who asked you to reveal the ideal life of a human… dragon with your big mouth last time?

Besides, Little Betty has strictly controlled me recently. I have long wanted to go out and breathe!

All three of them were equally pitiful😥…

chapters.title: Chapter 413 - Dispatch! Peacekeeping Force Going Toward The Blue Lava Estate
chapters.body:
Chapter 413 - Dispatch! Peacekeeping Force Going Toward The Blue Lava Estate

After the victory at the Town Leith, the Dark Moon, which had been low-key in the military, finally made a big move.

They sent troops south to the Blue Lava Estate.

If in the war of lords, the Red Spirit Lord Josh still had a high-sounding reason for the death of his “heir” Joseph, then the Blue Lava Estate, which jointly sent troops, was unjustifiably taking advantage of the Dark Moon’s misfortune.

When the Lord of Midnight Sun wanted to behead the Blue Lava Estate Lord Titan in rage, it was Shea’s father Grimm Crown Prince who spared no effort to save his life. As a result, Titan appeared to show favor to the 2 generations of Lord Grimm and Lord Shea, but he secretly smuggled the Dark Moon’s population and resources. The fact he sent troops together with the Red Spirit Estate this time obviously showed that he was an ungrateful wretch who returned kindness with ingratitude.

However, the Dark Moon did not send troops to the Blue Lava Estate for revenge, but because Chandler, the son of the former Blue Lava Estate Lord Titan and was currently the temporary lord, recently sent a letter to the Dark Moon Princess Royal Shea requesting help.

The letter claimed that Blue Lava Estate was now encountering huge difficulties. The capital had not returned even a white crystal coin of the fundraising money. The people were facing the threat of famine, and there was a rebel like Sumen who caused trouble. Therefore, he begged Princess Shea to send troops to support and provide some financial assistance.

Chandler’s letter also specifically mentioned that even if Blue Lava Estate had offended the Dark Moon, the blood of 100,000 people plus the death of the former lord of the Blue Lava Estate Titan was enough to compensate for the misdeed. He asked Princess Shea to help the Blue Lava Estate to tide over this difficult situation for the sake of the people. The Blue Lava Estate would listen to the command of the Dark Moon.

This was already a hint of surrender. If the Blue Lava Estate, one of the 4 largest estates, surrendered to the Dark Moon, the impact would definitely exceed the combination of those small and medium estates.

Princess Royal Shea considered for a long time and finally decided to send troops to help the Blue Lava Estate. Before that, the Dark Moon had repeatedly supported and helped the small estates nearby. In addition to the letter from Chandler, so the Dark Moon’s move did not cause special restlessness in the surrounding area.

The Dark Moon dispatched an elite force of the garrison guard this time, which was now renamed as the Flame Legion. The legion leader, Athena, personally commanded a total of 10,000 troops. Financial Officer Chen Rui was also on the list. He was temporarily taking the role of military adviser. His main task was to help the Blue Lava Estate reforming its economy and business.

To be on the safe side, Shea also sent the current deputy leader of the Red Blood Legion, the Cloak Gang leader, Aguile, to accompany the army in order to further ensure the safety of important personnel including Financial Officer Chen Rui.

The identity of Aguile had always been mysterious. It was said that no one had seen his true face. He once played a vital role in Joseph’s downfall. He showed extraordinary wisdom. In the battle of Town Leith wilderness. The mysterious cloak man who defeated the Red Spirit Lord Josh and killed the capital envoy, Rus, was likely to be the leader of the Cloak Gang.

Whether it was in terms of civil or military, the Dark Moon could be considered as sending all their elites. They were resolute in assisting the Blue Lava Estate.

When the elites of the Flame Legion, which was nicknamed the “Peacekeeping Force” by Chen Rui, was passing through Town Yankou, Athena did not order a detour or advance quickly. Instead, she ordered the army to station there. The elites of the legion showed considerable vigilance and even nervousness regarding this mysterious death site where 100,000 Blue Lava Army was buried. They were on guard for a night. Although the white fog was ghastly at night and there were horrible beasts howling from time to time, fortunately, no changes occurred. The army embarked on a journey again the next day.

These elite troops were once trained by eliminating bandits in the nearby small estate, then after the courage training this time, so their experience and tacit understanding had improved. Of course, Athena chose to stay in Town Yankou not only to train the courage of the army, it was mostly due to Guradam.

Chen Rui brought a lot of equipment to arm Guradam’s undead army this time. Many of them were even excellent grade equipment. When the corpse necromancer saw this batch of equipment, his eyes flashed with huge surprises. The undead army was used for crowd tactics and cannon fodder in the ordinary battle concept. There had never been a concept like an elite armed force. This was certainly due to Guradam’s new undead army, but it was mostly because his master placed importance in him, or it should be called respect.

In particular, the foundation of this “respect” was even established after that dragon had recovered to the terrifying power of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord back then. Although Chen Rui did not say this clearly, the corpse necromancer, who was at the peak of the Demon Emperor, had clearly sensed the breath from the poison dragon that made him tremble. No, he seems to be more terrifying than he was 2000 years ago!

The 100,000 army of the Blue Lava Estate had all been transformed into undead. Among them, Mallorca of the early stage of Demon Emperor was also made into the strongest elite terror knight. As for the Blue Lava Estate Lord Titan at the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor, something went wrong during the transformation. However, thanks to the improved vampire creating secrets provided by Sulfur, Titan was transformed into a vampire.

Guradam admired Sulfur’s talent a lot, so he was determined to accept him as a servant. Unfortunately, he had already signed a master-follower contract with Chen Rui and could not sign with a second person. He proposed to let Chen Rui accept Sulfur as a servant. After Chen Rui upgraded to five-star evolution, his spiritual link also upgraded. The equality link had increased from 4 slots to 5. Currently, there was only Paglio.

The number of subordinate contracts had increased from 12 to 15. Guradam and Samuel signed the master-subordinate contract; 7 people, imp Slee, Dodo, Tim, Royce and 2 others, as well as Celine signed the master-servant contract. Now that Sulfur had been added, there were 10 people. There were still 5 vacant slots. As for the puppets, there were still 2 slots. There were Kanita and Snowden now. In a sense, the roles of these 2 were a bit duplicated, but there was no need to change for the time being.

The spiritual link not only provided a detailed diagram of the contract, but it also had a link enhancement function. Chen Rui was now a five-star Star Lord, so enhancement was available. It was divided into 2 types: star level enhancement and battle enhancement.

Star level enhancement was permanent. Just 1 star enhancement required 100,000 faith crystals, while battle enhancement was temporary, and it cost 100 faith crystals for each usage.

In the current Super System, the population of the blue planet was still too small, and the growth of the faith crystal was slow. In addition, the Pillar of Faith automatically grew 1 crystal every day. There were only a little more than 300 crystals in total.

Chen Rui had always wanted to experiment with the strongest [Royal Star Transformation] combat skill, but his faith was not as high as aura, so he couldn’t convert certain materials to obtain it. He could only go with the flow. At present, he wanted to save the crystals to 1,000 before trying this link enhancement function again.

The undead army was fully equipped with weapons. The ordinary cannon fodder skeletons were naturally equipped with low-grade equipment while the elite troops were equipped with high-grade equipment, many of which were magic equipment. For instance, the newly developed skeletal archers were all armed with a magic bow; the skeletal magicians had magic bracelets that increased the magic power and quickly restored the spirit power; the skeletal cavalry and the skeletal war horses used light armor and vests that accelerate and enhance defense; the terror knight equipment, had reached excellent grade; the elite terror knight, Mallorca, and elite vampire, Titan, were even equipped with armor and weapons of quasi-legendary grade.

Facing the undead legion equipped with the powerful weapons, Guradam was extremely excited. The promise of the master is not a lie indeed. These equipment is no different from the standard army. Chen Rui gave the corpse necromancer a quasi-legendary grade cloak and a legendary grade magic wand with 2 supplementary excellent grade magic accessories. The combination of equipment was very knowledgeable. Although the magic accessories were only excellent grade, they could let the corpse necromancer stabilize his magic and maximize the power of the overall equipment, greatly increasing Guradam’s spirit power and dark magic power.

The traditional undead magician used spirit power to control the army, while Guradam used a self-created secret technique similar to the soul chain. He could greatly increase the number of controls, but the technique was also inseparable from the foundation of spirit power. With Chen Rui’s gifts of equipment now, in addition to the increase in his own magical power, his ability to control the undead army had also greatly strengthened. He immediately expressed his gratitude with genuine sincerity and admiration.

The army went through Town Yankou and came all the way to Town Soto, the southernmost part of the Dark Moon. A new line of defense had now deployed there. Athena greeted the defenders guarding Town Soto before leading the 10,000 legion elites to continue moving south. They entered the Blue Lava Estate boundary majestically.

The northernmost barrier of the Blue Lava Estate was Town Pesa. A scout reported: Town Pesa is ready for battle. All magic shields are activated.

Compared with the well-equipped Flame Legion, the defenders of Town Pesa could only be described as shabby. Many of them didn’t even have armor or weapons. They were only holding simple weapons or even farm tools. Obviously, most of them were not regular soldiers.

After the war of lords, most of the Blue Lava Estate’s elites were dead. Moreover, the temporary lord, Chandler, was incompetent. He extorted taxes ruthlessly which caused internal turmoil and the loss of morale in the people.

Town Pesa’s military payment had been in arrears for 2 months. The soldiers ran away. This important place that usually placed heavy troops was now less than one-tenth of the regular force. Even if the magic circles were still effective, it was just not much stronger than a muddy wall when facing the tens of thousands of elites from the Dark Moon.

The townspeople with farming tools spontaneously came to participate in the defense under the leadership of the mayor, Old Ryanne. Since the Blue Lava Estate ungratefully invaded the Dark Moon, it was reasonable that the Dark Moon’s elites came to retaliate now. With the Dark Moon’s ruthless means of destroying the 100,000 army, once the town was breached, perhaps all the townspeople would be slaughtered.

The woman and the child were trying to migrate. As the “enemy army” came too quickly, they must first buy time. Most demons were brave and relentless. Since they were going to die anyway, it was better to fight against the enemy for their wife and children.

Looking at the hostile soldiers and civilians of Town Pesa, Athena who was riding on a horseback frowned. With the power of the Flame Legion, it was not difficult to wipe out Town Pesa. However, the dispatch of troops this time was not for the so-called colonization and killing. Instead, it was to “help”.

If this first stop was not handled properly, more difficulties and even unnecessary losses might be encountered later.

The well-trained and well-armed Dark Moon Army caused great pressure on the defenders and residents of Town Pesa. Terrifying concerns and fear enveloped everyone’s heart. As a resident holding a bow trembled, an arrow shot out immediately and fell in front of the Flame Legion.

Although he missed the shot, it was already an evident provocation. The Flame Legion’s elites showed a strong fighting spirit and geared up. They were ready to attack once they heard the order of the legion leader, Athena.

“Wait a minute!” Chen Rui’s voice sounded in time.

Was Chen Rui trying to convince them to surrender? This would be good if they were going to take over the Blue Lava Estate in the future…

chapters.title: Chapter 414 - Poison Scheme And “Old Friend”
chapters.body:
Chapter 414 - Poison Scheme And “Old Friend”

Unexpectedly, Chen Rui’s first sentence was not to stop the battle but to instigate. “The Dark Moon’s strongest blade, the elites of the Flame Legion, answer me, can you easily destroy the defense and wipe out this town in front of you?”

“Yes!” The neat and loud voice revealed strong determination. The high morale and intangible pressure made the soldiers and civilians of Town Pesa even tenser. No one doubted that the enemy would be able to completely crush their pitiful defense with just one charge.

“If you are facing an enemy, our legion commander, Athena, will immediately order the entire army to charge, turning the enemy into powder instantly! However, the brave and decisive commander didn’t make such an order. Despite the fact that this estate ungratefully invaded our estate not long ago to slaughter and plunder our relatives and properties, the fault lies only with their ruler, not the innocent soldiers and civilians in front of you! The invaders have paid the price of blood. We are the strongest army of the Dark Moon. In the future, we will be the strongest army of the Demon Realm. We don’t need to slaughter and kill the innocent to prove our courage!”

Was the voice of the human amplified through some kind of magic item? It was so powerful that it seemed to remind the people of the brave man who rushed to the Red Spirit Army first back then. “Tell me, What is the purpose that Princess Royal Highness sent her strongest Flame Legion to the Blue Lava Estate?”

“To help the Blue Lava Estate!” Under the leadership of Athena, tens and thousands of people shouted out simultaneously.

Chen Rui nodded in satisfaction. He rode the horse a few steps forward and shouted to the guards of Town Pesa, “Soldiers and civilians of Town Pesa, I’m Financial Officer Chen Rui of the Dark Moon. First of all, I would like to salute your courage to defend your homeland. However, we came to the Blue Lava Estate today not to invade your home, let alone to retaliate and kill, but for peace and friendship! Our Princess Royal Shea received an urgent letter to call for help from Chandler, the representative lord of the Blue Lava Estate. Considering that the people of the Blue Lava Estate are in dire suffering, she put aside the previous misdeeds and sent us to help out! We will help the Blue Lava Estate quell the rebellion as well as restore the economy and prosperity. Please remove the magic circle and keep aside your hostility. We will never harm any soldier or civilian.”

The soldiers and civilians of Town Pesa looked at each other. I seem to have heard Chen Rui’s name before. He seems to be an important person for the flourishing development of the Dark Moon. He is even a human.

What this human said just now is right. With such a huge disparity between the strengths of the 2 sides, it is indeed impossible to resist. In this case, the other party can completely crush our poor defensive force. Why would he bother to say so much?

No one wanted to die. Hearing that there was hope of survival, many people turned their gaze to Mayor Ryanne. Old Ryanne was a dark elf who was more than 300 years old. He was very prestigious in the town.

After learning that the Dark Moon Army had arrived, the garrison captain, who was in charge of the military, fled quickly. Ryanne was the one who mobilized the townspeople to participate in the defense in order to buy time for their wives and children to escape.

Although Old Ryanne was getting older, it didn’t mean that he was not afraid of death. On the contrary, the older people were more afraid of the final moment, but the dark elf cautiously asked loudly, “I’m Mayor Ryanne. Sir, you said that you are entrusted by sir lord to help the Blue Lava Estate settle the chaos, but why did we not receive the order from sir lord?”

“Mayor Ryanne, do you think that given the chaotic situation of the Blue Lava Estate currently, the order can arrive on time?” Chen Rui shook his head and said, “Your sir lord has encountered difficult troubles himself, otherwise he will not lower himself to ask for help from the neighbor whom he had just attacked recently.”

The dark elf mayor contemplated for a while and didn’t respond— Removing the magic circle would be tantamount to giving up resistance completely. In case the opponent turns hostile, this terrifying army can kill everyone unscrupulously, but if I don’t remove the magic circle, I am like defying the lord’s order. The other party can still kill without scruples, at most I’m just adding a little resistance. The problem is that the women and children have not escaped far…

Chen Rui saw that the other party remained silent, so he added, “We are here with a sincere friendship regardless of previous feud. We don’t want to see unnecessary bloodshed and conflict. To prove this, I will enter alone now when you withdraw from the magic circle.”

This already means taking the initiative to be a hostage. With the Dark Moon Army holding a good chance of winning, this human financial officer actually made such an “unwise” and risky move? Could it be that Lord Chandler really asked them for help?

Chen Rui’s reputation has gradually spread in the Fallen Angel Empire now. Although this human is not powerful, he is the most trusted financial officer of Princess Shea of the Dark Moon and the lover of the Flame Legion leader, Athena!

Many Flame Legion soldiers were looking at the legion leader Athena. Although the opponent is weak, the sir financial officer’s action is too risky. 100,000 Blue Lava Estate soldiers died in the Dark Moon. Who can guarantee what those guys who show strong hostility will do? However, the legion leader, Athena’s expression is firm and steady. She didn’t intend to stop her lover.

When Old Ryanne saw Chen Rui riding on his horse to come alone, he immediately asked the soldiers to remove the magic circle.

Chen Rui entered the checkpoint and looked at the soldiers and civilians who were still surprised and doubtful. He said, “Everyone, from your faces, I see fear, panic, and a trace of hidden hatred. An undue war between us has produced undue hatred. This hatred may be unforgettable for a while, but because the dead have already died, so the living should live better. This time, by the order of the Lord of Midnight Sun’s descendant, Princess Royal Shea’s order, to come and help the Blue Lava Estate with the sincerity of resolving hatred. We will help the Blue Lava Estate out of chaos and famine and restore its former stability and prosperity, just like how we helped other estates.”

These words touched many people, and Old Ryanne finally nodded and said, “Sir took the risk to come here alone is enough to prove everything.

When the soldiers and townspeople of Town Pesa heard this, they put down their weapons one after another, and then the checkpoint opened. The Dark Moon Army successfully entered Town Pesa. What reassured Old Ryanne and the townspeople was that this army did not burn, kill or loot as expected, but rather, they chose a suitable location to station with great discipline without causing any harassment to the townspeople. Instead, under the legion leader, Athena’s leadership, they donated a portion of food to help some townspeople who were particularly poor.

Not only did they not inflict not the slightest harm on the people, they also provided help righteously. Even the Blue Lava Estate’s own army could not do it.

Only then did Old Ryanne completely let his guards down. He praised, “They are worthy of being the strongest elite soldier of the empire!”

In fact, this kind of discipline was produced by strict training, rewards and punishments. There was once when a deputy leader was unable to control his male hormones during a military deployment to support a small estate. Under partly forceful conditions, he mated with a dark goblin woman from the estate. As a result, when the incident came to light, the deputy leader was beheaded by the military judge in front of the entire army.

(According to an unreliable gossip, the body of the deputy leader was buried by the dark goblin woman)

After several incidents of killing one to warn the rest, coupled with hard training and indoctrination, the military’s discipline had significantly improved. These elites was able to truly comply with the order.

“Mayor Ryanne is being courteous.” Chen Rui thought for a while and said, “In fact, our Princess Royal Highness only received a letter of help from the confidant sent by Lord Chandler. If it weren’t for the secret method mark which was unique to Abbas Family, she would even think that it was fabricated. We just heard that there were a lot of weird incidents in Town Lupin, and the Azure Legion deputy leader Sumen rebelled. We don’t know the specific details. Please tell us anything, mayor.”

Old Ryanne thought for a while and said, “Town Lupin is at the southernmost part of Blue Lava Estate. After passing Town Lupin, the south is the Dead Sea. It is far away from us here. I don’t know the specific news. I just heard that many townspeople have disappeared and the sir lord has also ordered to close down the Town Lupin. No one is allowed to go out. As for General Sumen’s affairs, it seems that there is another secret. At present, Azure Legion only has a name, and it has almost disband. There are soldiers here who escaped from there. It is said that General Sumen has an important family member in Town Lupin. The so-called rebellion is probably related to this…”

Chen Rui asked Old Ryanne a few more questions, and the answers he got were similar to those of the Dark Demon’s intel, but from the conversations between Old Ryanne and some townspeople, Titan’s exorbitant taxes and taxes were already quite serious initially when he was in office. Chandler’s excessive levy was even more miserable now. In order to quell the dissatisfaction in the estate, Chandler enacted a rather cruel punishment. He intended to use bloody methods to consolidate the prestige and status of his temporary lord position.

However, this method seemed to have a counter-effect to some extent. Judging from the reaction of the townspeople and Sumen’s departure from the Azure Legion, Sumen chose not only to escape from the legion, but it was a real rebellion. There would probably be more people being affected.

While Old Ryanne was talking with Chen Rui, a soldier suddenly came to report that a large number of poisoned people suddenly appeared in the town. Their bodies were black and swollen, and they were unconscious. Some Dark Moon soldiers were like that too. Probably someone poisoned the nearby water source.

There were rumors that someone in the Dark Moon Army wanted to poison everyone in the town silently. At present, many townspeople who didn’t know the truth had surrounded the barrack.

Old Ryanne and Chen Rui were both taken aback. They hurriedly walked out and saw a large crowd of people surrounded outside. Under the instigation of some people with ulterior motives, the townspeople were shouting that the Dark Moon people should get out of the Blue Lava Estate.

“Quiet everyone!” Old Ryanne yelled loudly. The prestige of the old mayor dark elf calmed the noisy clamour.

“If the Dark Moon army really wants to destroy us, they don’t need to poison us! Even their own soldiers are poisoned!” Old Ryanne exclaimed. In fact, he was considering more for Town Pesa’s sake. If the Dark Moon really turned hostile and attacked because of this, the townspeople would be the one who suffer.

Seeing the one after another soldiers who were similarly poisoned being carried out, the townspeople kept quiet. No one would do such a stupid scheme that would even kill their most elite soldiers.

“Who knows if this is a conspiracy? Maybe even the old mayor was bribed by them! Before they came, this kind of thing had never happened in the town!” A voice sounded. With this lead, many people also yelled.

“Huaimi!” The old mayor still had sharp vision despite his age. He saw the guy who took the lead and said angrily, “You damn scum! When your old father brought you to the town, he was about to starve to death. Who saved you and let you, the ungrateful one, live till now? Now you actually frame me and say that I am bribed by someone?”

In an instant, all eyes fell on the dark elf named Huaimi. That guy couldn’t speak for a while. Paglio’s voice resounded in Chen Rui’s ear, “This dark elf’s waist exudes that kind of poison breath. It should be the remaining poison. He probably wants to poison it again.”

After Chen Rui said a few words to Old Ryanne, he was furious. He rushed forward, separated the crowd, and grabbed Huaimi, “It turns out that you are the one who put the poison!”

Huaimi was taken aback, “Nonsense, how do you…”

Before he finished speaking, Old Ryanne grabbed his belt and immediately grabbed a bag, “What is this?”

Huaimi’s gloomy face turned pale all of a sudden. He stuttered and couldn’t speak.

Old Ryanne had ruled the town for many years, so he naturally had his own prestige and means. He shouted, “Would you like me to feed this to you now?”

Huaimi knelt down, “Sir Mayor, spare me! It was a guy in black who made me do it! He said it was to seek revenge for the soldiers who died in the Dark Moon…”

Athena made a prompt decision and immediately ordered, “Flame Legion, immediately block the entrance and exit of the town. No one is allowed to enter or leave!”

As Old Ryanne was eager to prove Town Pesa’s innocence, he hurriedly asked, “What does that guy look like?”

At this moment, Paglio’s figure wearing a cloak appeared ghostly in front of his eyes. Paglio’s 2 fingers quickly caught the sharp crossbow bolt that appeared behind Huaimi’s forehead.

Huaimi realized that he had a close call around the edge of life and death; even cold sweat came out on his forehead.

Everyone was taken aback. Almost at the same time, Paglio’s figure disappeared again, then a black figure was dropped to the ground.

The dark elf, Huaimi, who was in a panic, immediately jumped up. He pointed at the black figure and shouted, “It’s him! He bribed… threatened me to put the poison!”

Old Ryanne saw an unfamiliar face with a fierce look in his eyes, but he could not move. He seemed to have lost the ability to resist.

“This matter is already very clear. Someone used scheme to frame the Dark Moon Army in order to provoke the friendly relationship between us,” Chen Rui took the opportunity to say loudly, “Please rest assured that we have the best military doctor with the army, I am also proficient in poison. We will definitely help the poisoned townspeople to detoxify the poison!”

Chen Rui’s proficiency in poison was naturally a guise. It was definitely not a problem to detoxify this kind of poison with Paglio around.

At this moment, the townspeople exclaimed. The real culprit’s eyes, ears, mouth and nose were shining silver light simultaneously, and his whole person exploded. However, before the power of this explosion could spread, an intangible force field had controlled it, so it could not pose a threat to the surrounding townspeople at all.

After the power was exhausted, the intangible force field disappeared, leaving only his limbs which turned into powder scattered on the ground. The person who made the move was Paglio who was posing as “Aguile”.

Chen Rui’s eyes narrowed slightly. This kind of self-destruction is quite familiar. It seems that I will probably encounter an “old friend” on this trip to the Blue Lava Estate.

Old friend? Was it someone of the elder families that served the Obsidian?

chapters.title: Chapter 415 - [Mind Leading]
chapters.body:
Chapter 415 - [Mind Leading]

The poison commotion in Town Pesa gradually subsided. About 2 days later, the poisoned soldiers and townspeople recovered to normal. During this period, Chen Rui deliberately dispatched manpower to cooperate with the Dark Demon members lurking in various places to promote the Dark Moon Army’s help to the Blue Lava Estate using Town Pesa as an “example”.

The Dark Moon Army’s actions in Town Pesa were soon publicized. Facts had proved that the success of the “first stop” was also very obvious. There was basically not much resistance in the subsequent places that they passed. On the contrary, the Dark Moon Army’s discipline and assistance were praised. Although it was not to the extent of “opening gates to welcome the invaders”, coupled with the good reputation, the powerful force, and the help of Ryanne, the news that the Dark Moon Army came to help Blue Lava Estate in the most difficult time were spread everywhere in the estate. The original hatred had also diluted a lot.

The hatred of war was mostly brought by the ruling class that wanted profit, so it should not be endured by ordinary soldiers or civilians.

Furthermore, ‘the strong one is honored and the winner takes all’ had always been the rule of the Demon Realm. There were countless examples of the defeated who chose to serve and be loyal to the winner. Those who were unwilling to give in could only withdraw from the stage or be eliminated directly.

The journey of the Dark Moon army was not very fast as the purpose was to “build momentum”. Now almost all people in the estate knew that the Dark Moon came due to Lord Chandler’s request for help. They had provided a lot of help for the Blue Lava Estate. Even the person who secretly controlled Chandler couldn’t “refute” for a while.

Finally, the Dark Moon Flame Legion came to the center of the Blue Lava Estate, Blue Lava City.

The strange thing was that the Blue Lava City did not close the city gates or wait for them as expected. Instead, the city gates opened wide, making a gesture of ‘do as you wish’.

Sheriff Varit and Financial Officer Mousse of the Blue Lava Estate led the leaders of the various forces to represent the “representative lord,” Chandler, to express a warm welcome and cordial greeting to the Dark Moon Flame Legion.

The Blue Lava Estate and the Dark Moon were both 1 of the 4 major estates. Varit, Mousse, Chen Rui and Athena were all equal in position, so it was not rude for them to represent Chandler to welcome them.

“Sirs, the sir lord originally wanted to welcome you in person, but he couldn’t come because he is unwell recently. Please forgive me, sirs.” Financial Officer Mousse was a little thin lich. He said with a smile on his face.

He found out very clearly this time that 3 leaders of the Dark Moon came, namely Flame Legion legion leader, Sheriff Athena, Red Blood Legion deputy leader Aguile, and Financial Officer Chen Rui.

Chen Rui spoke up “Sir Mousse is too polite, how dare we have the sir lord to welcome us personally. May I know if there is a suitable place outside the city for the army to station?”

“Outside the city? Your soldiers are guests from afar, so please station in the barrack inside the city. Since the deputy legion leader of Azure Legion, Sumen, rebelled, the barrack of Azure Legion has become an empty camp. It can be put to good use now. I have sent someone there to clean it. In a while, there will be a large number of resources to treat the brave soldiers in your legion.

Chen Rui and Athena looked at each other, “Thank you very much then. By the way, I have been learning pharmacy from Master Aldas of the Dark Moon; I’m quite proficient in it now. Athena, you stay in the barrack to settle the army, I will visit sir lord with Sir Aguile now.” Chen Rui did not use a tone of negotiation or request, but a direct decision-making attitude, “This…”

Mousse hesitated for a moment. Sheriff Varit who was at the side snorted coldly. As he was about to speak, he was stopped by Mousse’s gaze. The lich financial officer smiled and said, “Master Aldas is a potion master who is famous throughout the empire. If the capital’s potioneer competition is not postponed, it is very likely that he would have become the strongest master in the entire Demon Realm. Since Sir Chen Rui got his true teachings, you should also be at the master level, but we have invited several potion masters, and none of them can cure the sir lord. Since sir came from afar and is so enthusiastic, it is difficult to reject your kindness. Then I’ll have to trouble sir.”

Since he couldn’t refuse anyway, he might as well use this to compliment Chen Rui. It seemed that Mousse was really good at socializing.

Chen Rui nodded, and he whispered a few words to Athena before walking toward the lord’s residence with Mousse and the others. Paglio, who was disguised as Aguile, naturally followed right behind him.

On the way, Chen Rui asked somewhat intentionally, “What is going on with General Sumen of Azure Legion? We heard a lot of rumors along the way, but we never knew the true story of the incident.”

Mousse explained, “Sumen disobeyed the sir lord’s order and fled with the soldiers without authorization. He has been removed from the Azure Legion. Now the whole estate is searching for the traitor.”

Before Chen Rui spoke, Varit said coldly, “General Sumen is not a traitor!”

“Varit, you…” Mousse exasperated, “For whatever reason, defying sir lord is a rebellion! Sir lord has officially announced this.”

Varit snorted and didn’t speak again.

The lord’s mansion was heavily guarded. After Mousse expressed his intentions, the guards went in to report. After a while, they walked out and gestured to the Dark Moon guests to enter.

Mousse, Varit and several family representatives led Chen Rui into the lord’s mansion.

In the lobby, Chen Rui met Chandler, the “representative lord” of the Blue Lava Estate who had not been officially appointed by the capital.

Chandler was Titan’s only son and also the undoubted heir to the lord. He looked about 20 years old, but the lord’s face was very pale. His body leaning on the throne was a little weak, and his eyes were dull. With 2 deep bags under his eyes and a haggard face, it seemed that, as Mousse said, he was not mildly ill.

Chen Rui and Paglio bowed slightly, “The Dark Moon’s Financial Officer Chen Rui and Red Blood Legion deputy leader, Aguile, greets sir lord.”

“Chen Rui, I seem to have heard of this name. Are you from… the Dark Moon?” Chandler’s words were obviously weak. He asked again as if he recalled something, “However, the Blue Lava Estate and the Dark Moon had an unpleasant experience only recently. I’m not sure why you 2 came to the Blue Lava Estate?”

Chen Rui frowned slightly; Mousse hurriedly stepped forward and said, “Didn’t sir lord write to Princess Shea of the Dark Moon for help? The Flame Legion of the Dark Moon has arrived at the Blue Lava City now.”

“Has the Dark Moon Army’s elites arrived at the Blue Lava Estate?” The mist in Chandler’s eyes suddenly turned into a panic, “Quick! Call Sumen to face the enemy!”

“Sir lord, you have forgotten again that you have declared General Sumen a traitor, and he is currently on the run.” Mousse looked at Chen Rui and Paglio, “Sir Chen Rui and the troops are sent to help us put down the rebellion.”

“Ask the Dark Moon Army to put down the rebellion?” Chandler looked puzzled, “Why can’t I remember?”

Mousse sighed and said to Chen Rui, “Sir Chen Rui, the lord accidentally got sick a while ago. As you can see, when the illness is serious, he can’t remember many things. We invited many potion masters to come and cure him but to no avail. I don’t know if sir has a way?”

Chen Rui had already noticed that Chandler had a problem indeed. He was silent at that moment. If it is only a minor injury, the grand master-level medicine from the exchange center is enough to deal with it, but I’m afraid Chandler’s illness is not curable with common medicine.

At this time, Sheriff Varit said, “Sir Chen Rui, you said that the Dark Moon received a letter of help from sir lord, but with sir lord’s current status, the authenticity of this matter is still open to question. I hope you can show corresponding evidence in order to avoid unnecessary misunderstandings.”

As soon as this sentence was uttered, the gaze of several family representatives turned to Chen Rui. Since Chen Rui saw Chandler’s state, he was already prepared in his mind. He took out a letter without rushing, ” This letter was sent to the Dark Moon by Lord Chandler’s confidant ,Graham, at that time. It also has the bloodline mark unique to the Abbas Family.”

When Varit took the letter and looked at it, he revealed a look of doubt. Several family representatives also gathered around to carefully look at the content and bloodline mark of the letter, and they nodded secretly.

Graham was one of Chandler’s confidants. Many people had disappeared some time ago, and Graham was one of them. In fact, this person was already dead, and he was discovered by the Dark Demon members before he died. Chen Rui deliberately used this name, coupled with that unique bloodline mark, everyone did not doubt it.

In fact, Chen Rui got Titan, who had become a vampire under Guradam’s control, to personally cast the bloodline mark when he passed through Town Yankou just in case. Now it really came in handy.

In Chandler’s current state, this letter was enough to fake the genuine. Even after Chandler regained his consciousness, he probably didn’t remember whether he had written this letter.

Mousse approached Chandler and said, “Sir lord, it seems that you have truly forgotten. Hurry up and ask the Dark Moon’s Flame Legion to quickly put down Sumen’s rebellion so that they can return to the Dark Moon as soon as possible.”

These words made Chandler’s vision gradually blur, and he said mechanically, “Yes, my father and I greatly favored Sumen, but he actually committed a rebellion. The Dark Moon Army, please quickly kill that rebel so that the Blue Lava Estate’s peace can be restored as soon as possible.”

“That lich is using [Mind Leading], a dark magic that is almost lost. He should also have a mutated magic talent, which can manipulate the other party’s words and deeds without the constraints of time and space. Unless the lich takes the initiative to remove the spell or is killed, otherwise the controller’s subject can’t get rid of the control.” Paglio’s subtle voice sounded in Chen Rui’s ear.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, and he nodded slightly. In the [Analytical Eyes], Mousse’s comprehensive strength was D (C+). He was a Higher Demon on the surface, but he was actually a peak stage Demon King, which was more powerful than the C-level strength of Sheriff Varit. Chen Rui had long been suspicious. After Paglio reminded him, he immediately understood.

Chen Rui took a few steps deliberately, and he suddenly said, “I know! I might have a way to recover Lord Chandler back to normal!”

Mousse’s eyelids twitched slightly, “Sir Chen Rui, I don’t know what you can do, but in any case, it is better to be cautious. Sir lord has a noble status. No mistake should be allowed. Furthermore, we have invited several potion masters…”

“It is because you only hire a potion master. If you hire a dark magic master, you may be aware of something.” Chen Rui’s words made Mousse’s facial expression greatly changed, “We, humans, did a lot of research on dark magic that opposes light magic. Although my power is weak, I can still recognize this kind of dark magic trick. As far as I know, this kind of magic seems to be very mysterious, only a master-level… uh, it should be Demon King level magicians and above can cast it. Isn’t it? Sir Mousse? Or should I call you dark magic master?”

As soon as these words came out, Sheriff Varit and the representatives of several families changed their facial expressions and turned their eyes to the thin Mousse.

Was Mousse one of the Bloodfall? Or he just wanted to rule the estate for himself?

chapters.title: Chapter 416 - Treasure Map
chapters.body:
Chapter 416 - Treasure Map

Chapter 416: Treasure Map

“You… don’t talk nonsense!” Mousse showed a panicked look, “I think you, the Dark Moon, coming to the Blue Lava Estate is obviously ill-intentioned. Now you still want to use this kind of malicious instigation and framing!”

Paglio stood in front of Chen Rui with a protective look, and the human financial officer became even more calm, “Sir Mousse, your attitudes are too different before and after, right? Didn’t you express infinite gratitude on the arrival of the Dark Moon Army previously? Besides, I’m just speculating based on my own knowledge. If you are innocent, why are you so nervous?”

“No wonder the potion masters are helpless!” Sheriff Varit said, “If it weren’t for Sir Chen Rui’s reminder, we haven’t thought about this yet! It seems that we have always underestimated you, Mousse!”

Varit speaking up meant that he had agreed with the “outsider”, Chen Rui’s speculation. Several family representatives showed suspicion.

“Guard!” Varit shouted, “Bring Mousse down, this is related to the safety of sir lord’s life!”

The guards rushed in, but they surrounded Varit and the others.

“The entire lord’s mansion is under my control. None of you can get out today.” Mousse gradually recovered his composure, “I just didn’t expect that my secret technique would be seen through by an unthreatening human. It seems that some plans need to be changed.”

Varit said angrily, “It turns out that you really have been controlling sir lord! Is it your trick to force General Sumen away?”

“Just worry about yourself, Varit. Haven’t you felt it yet?” Mousse gave a spooky smile, “Your power should be declining rapidly. This kind of poison combines the power of dark magic, it is hard for even the Demon Emperor level powerhouse to resist it. Soon, you will all become trash with no resistance power, and then I will manipulate this damn human and let him bury all the soldiers he brought with poison!”

“Who are you? Why do you want to control Lord Chandler?” Chen Rui had received the Super System’s prompt. Naturally, this mere toxin had no effect on him, not to mention Paglio, but Varit and the others had shown an uncomfortable expression.

Mousse grinned and said, “After you die, maybe I will tell your corpse the answer.”

“No. I need to know now.” As soon as Chen Rui finished speaking, Paglio waved his hand, and the surrounding guards fell to the ground like dominoes. At the same time, Mousse felt that his body was tight, and he was unable to move. The grin on his thin face suddenly solidified.

Mousse was shocked. It is impossible to resist this terrifying force at all! Could it be that “Aguile’s” power is beyond what I imagined? Why is he not affected by the poison? Even that human too. Do they have any secret treasure?

“Tell me the answer and dispel the [Mind Leading], then I can spare your life.” From the beginning to the end, Paglio didn’t say a word, Chen Rui was in charge of the “narration”.

“My answer is… I won’t let you, ants, jeopardize my master’s plan…” Silver light shone from Mousse’s 7 orifices at the same time. Before he finished talking, he had already exploded in the midst of his blur voice.

Paglio frowned and launched the power to control the scope of the explosion again. It was not the first time he encountered this type of explosion.

Chen Rui also fell into contemplation. Mousse’s self-destruction is to prevent more secrets from being divulged. It seems that the force is not just planning to control the Blue Lava Estate . So what is the real purpose?

When Mousse died, the poison of the dark power began to fade. Varit and the others gradually recovered. Not only that, the blurry vision of Lord Chandler on the throne also began to become clear.

Varit hurriedly came to Chandler’s side, “Sir lord!”

Chandler responded strenuously, “Varit?”

“It’s me, sir lord!” When Varit noticed that Chandler’s gaze had obviously changed, his stern face showed a pleasant surprise. It seems that Chandler should be controlled by the [Mind Leading], the almost lost dark magic, as the human said. Its effectiveness will disappear with the death of the caster.

After getting rid of the [Mind Leading], Chandler was obviously not in good condition. Especially during the period of “being controlled”, many memories were vague. The forged letter of help had naturally become a confusion, even Chandler couldn’t tell the truth from the lie. But just in case, Chen Rui still found an excuse to ask for the letter back, so as not to reveal the flaw.

When Chandler heard that the Dark Moon’s 10,000 elite troops were stationed at the barrack in the Blue Lava Estate, he couldn’t help showing vigilance and asked, “Where’s General Sumen?”

“General Sumen…” Varit sighed. He approached Chandler’s ear and whispered.

“General Sumen fled from Azure Legion? I declared him as a traitor and ordered the entire estate to hunt him down?” Chandler was very shocked when he heard Varit’s report. As the elites of the Blue Lava Estate were dead in the Dark Moon battle, including Azure Legion’s leader, Nader, and Double-headed Dragon Legion’s leader, Mallorca, Sumen was the only and most important military figure that he could rely on. I actually get rid of such “support” myself!

“Immediately issue my order to pardon General Sumen for his rebellion and call him back to the Blue Lava Estate!”

Varit hesitated, “Sir lord… According to the latest report, General Sumen has gone to Town Lupin where the disappearance occurred, and his whereabouts are unknown…”

Chandler looked at Chen Rui who looked contemplative. He had an idea and said, “Sir Chen Rui, Sir Aguile, I’m thankful to the Dark Moon for putting aside the previous feud and helping us at the most difficult time of Blue Lava Estate. I would like to ask the two sirs to help one thing now…Town Lupin has successive disappearances, can the Dark Moon help to investigate and help me bring General Sumen back safely?”

Chen Rui thought for a moment and replied, “We came to Blue Lava Estate as Princess Royal’s response to the sir lord’s request to help settle the rebellion. Since General Sumen is not a rebel, but he was framed by others, it would be inconvenient for us to intervene in this matter…”

Chandler frowned and said, “To be honest, the Blue Lava Estate can be described as turbulent now. Due to the mistake of the former lord which caused the army to be greatly reduced and the capital’s fundraising money has not been returned, especially during the period when I was controlled by the traitor, Mousse, my perverse actions had caused morale drop and widespread famines. It is really beyond my power. Please help me, sirs.”

“Since it’s turbulent, why not find a strong force to rely on?” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “According to the sir lord’s promise to Princess Shea, since the Dark Moon has helped the Blue Lava Estate this time, should sir lord also express some sincerity?”

“I really don’t have much impression of that letter.” Chandler gritted his teeth, “However, as long as Princess Shea can keep my lord position as well as the prosperity and stability of the Blue Lava Estate, I will definitely surrender to Royal Highness!”

Chen Rui nodded slightly and secretly held the recording stone. At least I have received Chandler’s verbal promise. As long as the Dark Moon really uses this opportunity to control the economic and military lifeline of the Blue Lava Estate, there is no concern of Chandler reneging by that time.

“Let’s do this, both of you and Athena, the legion leader whom I haven’t met yet, have come from afar. In order to thank the 3 sirs for your kindness and help, I will give each of you a treasure. 3 of you can go pick any item in my treasure house.” Chandler said again with a painful expression when he saw that Chen Rui was still indifferent.

Before Chen Rui agreed yet, “Aguile”, who was wearing a cloak on the side, spoke first, “Alright!”

This dead duck dragon, he didn’t even act cool when he heard that there is a treasure. Chen Rui glanced at this guy with contempt. Even if Chen Rui couldn’t see Paglio’s true face now, he could still imagine his eyes were gleaming under the mask.

In fact, Town Lupin was very likely to be related to the Bloodfall scheme. Chen Rui already wanted to go there initially, but the reason why he refused it just now was to gain more benefits by retreating.

Chen Rui rejected Chandler’s invitation to a banquet. He only accepted the supplies to console the army. Of course, he also accepted the 3 treasures. In fact, even if he refused, the dead duck dragon would ask for them again.

Although the Blue Lava Estate’s current economic and financial situation was distressed, Chandler’s treasure house was not shabby. Many of them were great stuff which Chandler inherited from his dead father, Titan. In addition to treasures, it was said that this guy also took over his father’s women.

Paglio actually had a very high standard. If it was back then, he wouldn’t even take a look at many items in the treasure house, but his previous wealth had been shared to a “greedy human”, and “the horrifying madwoman wife of the human” also took part of it. Plus the high-quality treasures that he used to “honor” Little Betty previously, the dead duck dragon was already pretty tight (self-assumed)- No matter how little the value is, it is still treasure.

As for the huge wealth from the capital, the “greedy human” said that he had another purpose for it, so he couldn’t share it temporarily. It’s good in this way too, lest Betty discovers it. This can be my private money in the future.

Although Little Betty has controlled me tightly; even my treasure is shared (it seems to be exclusive to Little Betty), but as a dignified married man, if I don’t have a small vault around me, it will be truly shameful!

Under Chen Rui’s repeated hints, Master Poison Dragon reluctantly focused on the overall situation and gave the 3 opportunities to the “cunning human” with a high-profile look. In fact, he had made corresponding marks on the treasures. He was probably planning to “visit” this place again in a while.

Chen Rui saw a piece of rare magic material, yuan tortoise stone, which was lacking in crafting the Mystic Jade Armor. His eyes lit up. With this piece of yuan tortoise stone and the rest of the collected materials, I can make 1 Mystic Jade Armor!

Unfortunately, there was only 1 piece after searching the treasure house. Chen Rui had no choice but to choose another superb magic material. When he was about to pick the third one, he suddenly found an old box and opened it. It was a torn leather scroll, and the pattern was very familiar.

The accompanying steward at the side quickly introduced, “This is a treasure map for a secret treasure somewhere. It has a long history and has been in the treasury for nearly 1,000 years, but unfortunately it is incomplete.”

Chen Rui’s mind was moved. He kept the treasure map: I didn’t expect there would be accidental gains. I found the fragment of that treasure map here!

After Dodo gave the first map fragment in the black rainforest, he had subsequently gotten 2 copies from Kanita and Town Moling’s trade fair. With this one, only the last part was missing.

I remember the goblin at the trade fair once said that this treasure map records the location of the Dead Sea’s treasure. The treasure is the legacy of the Dark Dragon Emperor who was famous throughout the Demon Realm hundreds of thousands of years ago. There are countless treasures and artifacts in it.

Dead Sea is at the southernmost part of Town Lupin. I don’t know if this statement is true or false. However, I am really busy now. I have no time to explore the illusory legend. Besides, there is still a missing piece of the treasure map. Let me think about it when I have collected all of them.

On the wall of the Blue Lava Estate, the haggard Lord Chandler watched the Dark Moon Army go south, and he looked at the cold-faced Sheriff Varit next to him. They suddenly revealed a strange smile.

🤔🤔🤔🤔Were they pretending to be controlled, so they wouldn’t be suspected of having ill-intentions by the Dark Moon?

chapters.title: Chapter 417 - Vicious! A Scheme Within A Scheme
chapters.body:
Chapter 417 - Vicious! A Scheme Within A Scheme

The army marched quickly for 3 days and finally arrived at Town Lupin.

Town Lupin was one of the largest towns in the Blue Lava Estate. It was the size of a medium-sized city in Chen Rui’s other world. In the suburbs outside the town, the Dark Moon Army encountered an army, that was sealing off the Town Lupin, with a total of about 3,000 people.

These troops were originally ordered by Lord Chandler to seal off the Town Lupin where the strange disappearances occurred. They even set up magic circles, which should be instructed when Mousse was controlling.

The army had received Chandler’s latest order to cooperate with the Dark Moon Army to investigate the secrets of Town Lupin.

The commander of the army was called Aglas, a Great Demon at the early stage of the Demon King power. Facing the Dark Moon Army and the overwhelming breath faintly emanating from Athena, he seemed considerably tense.

Chen Rui asked, “What happened to Town Lupin?”

Aglas quickly replied, “It’s like this. The residents of Town Lupin have inexplicably been involved in various fights and bloodsheds a while ago. Soon afterwards, it was said that a huge bottomless pit which exuded a strange black gas appeared in the middle of the town. When the body of the person was wrapped in the black gas, they would wither quickly. In the end, there was only a pile of white bones left. Some people try to fill the pit or go down to explore, but those who explored never returned, including the Demon Emperor powerhouse, Sotsen, who lived in seclusion in the town. The black gas of that pit will take the lives of some residents every day. Many people fled out of the town because of this, but sir lord claimed that these people were infected with incurable poison. If they escape, they will spread to the entire estate, so he ordered us to block all exits and prohibit anyone from entering or exiting. Some residents tried to escape before or asked us for help, but we were forced by sir lord’s order and refused these people’s demands. Since then, no one escaped…”

A bottomless pit that exudes black gas that devours people? What does the Bloodfall scheme have to do with this? Chen Rui thought for a while and asked, “I got news from Lord Chandler that General Sumen came here?”

“Yes,” Aglas nodded. “General Sumen came here 5 days ago. He brought about 1,000 people. He insisted on entering Town Lupin, and I couldn’t change his mind. Instead, hundreds of soldiers followed the general and went in with him.”

Chen Rui thought for a while. It seems that Sumen has a high prestige in the army. Even though his “rebel” reputation is well-known and Town Lupin is obviously a dangerous place, many people are still willing to follow suit.

“But… the general hasn’t returned yet. I sent a few soldiers to investigate, but they did not return as well.”

Chen Rui frowned, thought for a moment, and said to Athena, “There is indeed a problem in this town. The situation is unknown now, and it is likely to contain a huge threat. I suggest that the army should not act rashly. It is better to investigate first before deciding the next step.”

Athena spoke, “That’s right, I’ll lead a team to go investigate.”

“No!” Chen Rui shook his head, “You’re the legion leader who is the core and soul of the entire army. You can’t simply take risks, and there will also probably be unexpected situations here. Someone must preside over the overall situation. Let us stay. Just let… Sir Aguile go.”

The poison dragon in the cloak and Athena looked at each other and immediately understood what Chen Rui meant. “Aguile” who was deliberately mentioned in this sentence was Chen Rui himself. Of course, the poison dragon would not be idle; he would follow secretly. One went openly and another hid in te dark to thoroughly explore the secrets within.

As for Athena outside the town, it was relatively safe. She had the strength of the Great Demon King and the Flame Legion elites, so it shouldn’t be a major problem.

Athena knew that Chen Rui’s power was far better than her, and there was no room to waste time at this time. She didn’t say much, but gave him a reminding look- Be careful.

Soon, “Aguile” left the barrack where the Flame Legion was stationed, and the “human financial officer” took a rest in Athena’s tent due to “physical discomfort”.

Chen Rui walked toward the town step by step via the entrance. As he didn’t know what danger was ahead, his speed was not very fast. Paglio followed behind him silently from a distance. Even the [Analytical Eyes] couldn’t detect him, but Chen Rui could clearly sense the existence of his equal link partner through the “spiritual link”.

The whole town was very large, but they still couldn’t see a living person or even a living thing up till now. They just occasionally saw a few piles of bones in the ground, giving people a sense of lifelessness everywhere. It was as though they came to Town Yankou where Guradam made the undead.

Could it be like Town Yankou last time where an undead magician is messing around? But these skeletons are abandoned in place. It is unlike an undead magician’s work; it is more like some kind of terrifying monster that devours life.

Chen Rui frowned as he continued walking. The closer he looked, the more corpses he saw with various postures. The ghastly white mist drifting around was creepy.

Chen Rui deliberately walked into a few rooms to have a look, and he found that there were also many corpses in the room. It seemed that that terrifying “thing” did not spare any life in any corner.

Is it some kind of monster created by Bloodfall? Chen Rui frowned even more thinking of the terrible experiment in Crystal Valley and Mystic Valley.

The interference of elements here was very strong. Items such as magic map and magic compass couldn’t be used. Chen Rui could only rely on a simple hand-drawn map provided by Aglas to proceed cautiously all the way.

The strange thing is that when Sumen broke in a few days ago, he brought in about 1,500 people, and some of them were cavalry, but no relevant corpses could be seen along the way. Where did they go?

Chen Rui walked around a few times, bypassed a river, and gradually approached the center of Town Lupin where the mysterious pit was located.

From afar, Chen Rui saw dozens of bizarre spires in the mist. When he got closer, he discovered that these buildings like bone towers were actually made of piles of bones!

Not only that, there were maroon strange patterns on the ground which should be painted by blood. Skulls were used to decorate in many places, which made it very strange.

Chen Rui’s heart trembled slightly. The largest town in the Blue Lava Estate is equivalent to the number of lives in a medium-sized city. Are all of them…

What’s even more hateful is that under the control of Mousse, the army is actually dispatched to block the way out, cruelly ruining the last hope of all innocent townspeople.

Although Chen Rui was not an eminent monk or saint who was compassionate and benevolent, facing such a gruesome scene, rage surged in his heart suddenly. Bloodfall! Damn it!

Just when Chen Rui stepped into the range of those patterns, the lump of maroon suddenly emitted a faint light, and a puff of black smoke emerged from the bone tower and wrapped toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui wanted to try the attributes of the black smoke. He did not dodge or launch any protection skills. Instead, he let the black smoke wrap around his body. Sure enough, the Super System gave a hint that the poison was converted. After a long time, a pulling force came, and Chen Rui withdrew the power around his body. He let the force control his body like a dead person. He felt his mind being drowsy as he was “dragged” to another place.

This was an empty area surrounded by several bone towers. There was black smoke wafting around, and he couldn’t see things in the distance. The poison conversion data in the Super System kept changing. This was obviously a poisonous environment.

Chen Rui accidentally saw a large group of people. To be precise, a group of unconscious people, but they were not skeletons or corpses.

Judging from the clothing, they should be soldiers in the army. After counting the number, there were about 1,000 people and over 100 horses. These people were probably the army brought in by General Sumen. Judging from the effect, the black smoke should not be fatal. It was just to render someone unconscious.

Why are the flesh and blood of the corpses seen on the road completely devoured, but these soldiers and I are treated differently? Chen Rui thought of what Aglas said- “The black gas of that pit will take the lives of some residents every day.”

That’s right, that should be the case, the pit requires lives in phase. In other words, life will be swallowed every once in a while, so these soldiers, including myself, are currently “stocked food.”

Chen Rui didn’t want to wait for the monsters to come. Besides, there were nearly 2,000 lives (including war horses). He immediately took out a bottle of detoxification potion and tried to detoxify a soldier beside him.

However, the grand master-level detoxification potion of the exchange center actually only made the soldier a little awake. Chen Rui’s eyes fell on the black smoke that was permeating everywhere. With a thought, God-Eating Mask, one of the 7 artifacts, appeared on his face. He activated the additional skill [God Eater] that was obtained by cracking the artifact.

As soon as the skill was activated, the surrounding black smoke rushed toward Chen Rui’s head. The mask was like a whale sucking water. It had swallowed all the black smoke in the nearby hundreds of meters in the blink of an eye.

The artifact’s power was indeed not trivial. This [God Eater] skill could swallow all spirit power, magic and soul attacks. The only drawback was that it could only be used once every 7 days.

After the black smoke disappeared, the several bone towers that had been condensed by some force seemed to have lost their support; they collapsed one after another.

Perhaps due to an illusion, when the bone towers collapsed, Chen Rui seemed to feel a vengeful emotion rushing toward him. However, the God-Eating Mask was immune to attacks from souls, so Chen Rui, who was still wearing a mask, was not affected at all.

After the black smoke’s unconscious effects subsided, the surrounding soldiers began to regain consciousness. They didn’t seem to have any serious problems. However, because they had been in a coma for a few days without eating, their physical condition appeared relatively weak.

“Who is General Sumen?” Chen Rui asked aloud while distributing recovery potions and detoxification potions to the nearby soldiers.

A voice sounded, “I’m Sumen, did you save us?”

Chen Rui’s current cloak was very eye-catching among the soldiers, and his distribution of potions had attracted Sumen’s attention since the beginning.

Sumen was a Great Demon of the early stage of the Great Demon King. He was tall and wore red armor. Although his physical condition was not good, his eyes still looked sharp. Chen Rui walked forward and handed Sumen a bunch of recovery potions.

“General, I’m Aguile, the deputy legion leader of the Dark Moon’s Red Blood Legion. I was entrusted by Lord Chandler to lead the army to investigate the mysterious incident in Town Lupin as well as to bring the general back safely.”

“Lord Chandler?” Sumen’ss hand, which was raising the recovery potion, stopped suddenly, and his gaze was gradually sharp.

“The general may have misunderstood something. Lord Chandler has been controlled by Financial Officer Mousse with [Mind Leading]. That was why he issued some unintentional orders including declaring the general as a traitor. Now that Mouse is dead, Lord Chandler is back to normal again. He commissioned us, the Dark Moon Army, to come here this time.”

“Before I came here, I also heard some news about the Dark Moon’s help, but how do you prove that you are from the Dark Moon legion?” Even after hearing the news that Chandler was controlled, the hostility in Sumen’s gaze did not reduce. Instead, he was a little more skeptical.

“With the current situation, I don’t seem to need to prove anything,” Chen Rui said while continuing to distribute the bottles of potions. “Moreover, the Flame Legion leader, Athena, and the tens and thousands elite team are now stationed just outside the town.”

“Athena!” Sumen was startled, and he finally tilted his head to drink the potion. His face suddenly became more rosy, and his spirit began to improve a lot. He shouted to the side, “Sandro, Kache, you 2 take 10 personal guards to help this sir quickly distribute the recovery potion.”

With the help of the well-trained personal guards, the speed dispensing the recovery potions suddenly accelerated. However, Chen Rui’s facial expression changed suddenly when Sumen said something.

“I don’t know the purpose of that so-called lord entrusting you to come here, but I just want to tell you that the real Lord Chandler is dead!”

“What?” Chen Rui couldn’t help blurting out. This news is really shocking!

“I found Sir Chandler in the secret room of the lord’s mansion by accident. That’s when I realized that the lord outside was actually fake! Sir Chandler was on the verge of death. Before he died, he asked me to think about the overall situation and go to Town Lupin in secret without attracting attention. I need to first find his young son, Tagow, who is secretly fostered here, then announce the truth and try to support Tagow to become the lord.”

Having said this, Sumen squeezed his fists, “I don’t know if it was because the fake lord noticed me, he actually sent people to block the exit and tried to capture me. Fortunately, I saw the opportunity earlier and fled with a group of loyal subordinates. We were hiding here and there along the way to avoid being caught, and we finally came to Town Lupin. I didn’t expect that Town Lupin actually turned into a dead town under some strange force! I’m afraid Sir Chandler’s youngest son, Young Master Tagow, is…”

Chen Rui finally understood why Sumen would leave Azure Legion silently and detour all the way to Town Lupin. Thinking of the previous performances of Mousse, Chandler and Varit in the Blue Lava City, he suddenly realized it: What a good and realistic play! They actually even sacrificed Mousse. It turns out that it is actually a scheme within a scheme!

I even pride myself on being a little clever usually, and now I have actually fallen into such a scheme! The person who controls everything behind the scene back must be terribly intelligent!

No, not only a scheme, but a vicious scheme! Chen Rui reacted instantly, Since “Chandler” tried his best to trick the Dark Moon Army into here, then this terrifying place must have the terrifying power to bury everyone!

So “Chandler” was really putting up a show… What could be the terrifying force lying in this town?

chapters.title: Chapter 418 - Enemy Appeared! The Dark Elementals
chapters.body:
Chapter 418 - Enemy Appeared! The Dark Elementals

Chapter 418: Enemy Appeared! The Dark Elementals

Chen Rui immediately said after having the realization, “General Sumen! It is not suitable to stay here for a long time, let’s leave immediately!”

“But Young Master Tagow…”

“With the situation of this dead town, no one can survive. Moreover, for every second we stay here, the danger will further increase. Do you want these loyal soldiers to be buried for your pitiful foolish loyalty?” When Chen Rui yelled, many soldiers showed hostility, but the object of hostility was Chen Rui. They really deserved to be the most loyal soldiers who would go through life and death together with their general.

Sumen noticed the soldiers’ expressions. He sighed and finally decided, “Okay! Everyone line up in 3 rows and leave here immediately!”

As the black smoke had dispersed and there was no interference power for the time being, Chen Rui’s magic map resumed its effectiveness. The team was actually in the center of the town. It seemed that the pit was nearby, but he didn’t want to take more risk at this time. Athena and Flame Legion were still outside the town. Judging from the current situation, even outside the town was not necessarily safe!

During the transfer, the ground suddenly began to shake as if something was about to break through the ground.

The magic map was once again strongly disturbed and lost its function. Fortunately, Chen Rui had made corresponding marks on the physical map to be on the safe side, so he quickly led Sumen’s army out of the town.

However, those bizarre bone towers began to emit strange power. Although the God-Eating Mask swallowed the power of several bone towers, the power of the artifact was not infinite. He only absorbed the strange power within hundreds of meters just now, but dozens of bone towers were releasing the strange power at the same time now. It coveredalmost a radius of hundreds of kilometers.

The entire sky was shrouded in dim smoke, and the light of the 2 moons could not pass through. The visibility was reduced by 10 times. It was almost impossible to see the direction, and the poison began to spread gradually again.

Fortunately, everyone took the grand master-level recovery potion and detoxification potion in a sober state, so they were able to sustain it for a while. However, the terrain seemed to have changed in the dark; they were lost in a certain kind of maze.

Chen Rui knew that the bone towers were the key. 3 light balls appeared in his hand and flew toward the nearest bone tower. However, the bone tower that was easily disintegrated under the power of the God-Eating Mask was stronger than he expected. [Aurora Shot]’s impact could only shake it slightly and several skeletons fell off, but it did not hurt the root.

Perhaps it was the shock of [Aurora Shot] that caught Paglio’s attention. Chen Rui finally sensed the existence of the poison dragon from the spiritual link. Chen Rui immediately activated his territory power and screamed loudly.

The group of bone towers combined the souls and blood of countless creatures, so the power was very unusual. It could block and disturb the audiovisual signal. Even Paglio couldn’t completely crack it for a while, but Chen Rui’s territory power, that integrated a trace of the power of “rule”, was extraordinary. It straightforwardly penetrated the strange force of the bone towers.

Paglio suddenly sensed it, and quickly approached this direction. Chen Rui only saw the bone towers in front of him collapsed suddenly, and Paglio’s figure had appeared in the air.

Even [Aurora Shot] couldn’t destroy the bone towers, but under the power of Paglio’s peak stage of the Demon Overlord, the towers collapsed completely with just one blow; this was the gap in power difference.

The poison dragon threw a punch in the air again, and the bone tower in front collapsed again. A path suddenly appeared in the misty land enveloped by the black smoke. At this moment, the ground trembled more severely. Paglio seemed to feel something. His face became solemn, and he shouted, “Go all the way to the north now. I will help you clear the way. Rush out of the town as soon as possible and reunite with Athena!”

As soon as he finished speaking, he disappeared in the air. Judging from the detection of Chen Rui’s spiritual link, Paglio should be rushing to the central pit which was the source of the entire strange power.

Paglio’s strength had been restored, and he was not afraid of poison. Even if there was any danger, it should be no problem for him to retreat unless there was a Demi-God powerhouse. Chen Rui made a resolute decision and led Sumen as well as his soldiers toward the exit at full speed.

The black smoke in the air became more and more intense. No one knew how far it could spread. Even the exit path that appeared because of the destruction of the bone towers was quickly closing. Chen Rui suddenly stopped, and he shouted in shock, “Everyone, don’t go yet!”

Now that the black smoke was about to close off the road, it was an urgent situation where they needed to leave immediately, but Sumen was not a reckless person. Knowing that the man in the cloak who came to save them would not say so for no reason at this time, he immediately waved his hand and the soldiers stopped.

“There are enemies! Get ready to fight!” Chen Rui shouted again, and Sumen immediately ordered the soldiers to change the rows into a phalanx. They were ready to deal with the enemies that appeared.

The dense display in the [Analytical Eyes] made Chen Rui frown deeply. It was not because of the number of the opponent, but—

Race: Dark Elemental.

Attribute: Dark Attribute.

He had previously speculated that the cause of the mysterious event might be the undead magicians, but he did not expect that it was actually dark elemental!

Elementals were the products of self-consciousness formed by the condensed essence of the element’s power in nature. Most of them appear in the natural world where the power of the elements was relatively concentrated. Like Chen Rui’s friends, earth elementals, they lived in the underground world of Mountain Xilang.

Elementals did not have lifespan. They were created in the process of condensing elements, and they would die out in the balance of nature. Most of them had the special ability to manipulate the corresponding magic. Due to the different personalities of the elements, they had different abilities. The earth elementals moved at a slower speed, but they had amazing defensive power; wind elementals could fly extremely swiftly; the dark elemental in front of him was relatively balanced in terms of attack and defense. Its attack could apply a debuff, and the advanced dark elemental could also launch powerful dark magic.

The dark elementals were human figures shrouded in black smoke with maroon lights reflecting their vague facial features. Their speed was much faster than the earth elementals. They had appeared nearby in a blink of an eye.

Judging from the data of the [Analytical Eyes], the number that was detected was at least thousands, and the strength was generally around D, which was Higher Demon. There were a small number of C-ranks among them. With this overall strength, let alone the soldiers of the Blue Lava Estate, even the Flame Legion elite soldiers of the Dark Moon were not their opponents. Furthermore, the C-level strength and the D-level strength were not the most powerful ones in this batch of dark elementals!

Without waiting for him to think about it, the dark elementals had come close. When Chen Rui shouted, a faint light appeared in his hand. He had activated [Aura Blade]. As he swayed his arm, several dark elementals that were within six meters around him were cut into half at the same time. They fell to the ground and slowly turned into smoke, leaving only a pile of ash-like debris on the ground.

Strangely, Chen Rui’s palm, which launched [Aura Blade], seemed to be stained with some black breath which slowly penetrated in.

Chen Rui didn’t pay too much attention to it. The [Aura Blade]’s sharp qi was slashing everywhere. Coupled with [Aurora Shot] whistling everywhere, he was invincible for a while.

These dark elemental strengths could only be considered low compared to him, but they surrounded from all directions, and the soldiers were not opponents at all. Under Sumen’s loud command, they barely maintained the defense line; the number of casualties increased rapidly.

To make matters worse, the eyes of the soldiers who killed the dark elementals gradually glowed strangely, then their entire eyes became jet black. It was somewhat similar to the Leviathan Royal Family when they launched [The Eye of Incubus]. Strangely, these soldiers had greatly increased their strength, and they had become crazy as they began to kill their own companions.
