Perhaps due to the psychological effect, Raizen just sat there ordinarily, but he gave Chen Rui, who was faraway among the spectators, a faint deterrent feeling.

Several princes were sitting on both sides of Raizen; all of whom looked extraordinary. The front left and right were Aleus and Edmund. Teris was among them in the last seat on the lower right.

This reminded Chen Rui of the battle of the 9 princes in the Kangxi period of the Qing Dynasty. It was just that Raizen, who possessed powerful force, was more deterrent. It depended on how these princes stood out in the competition.

In the training field, 2 wisps of strange mist halos entangled. The two figures collided and separated quickly. The surrounding ground trembled slightly, but there were only slight cracks. It seemed that the training field far exceeded the Dark Moon’s standard whether in terms of materials or the protection of the magic circles. Even the battle of the Demon Emperor-level territory power couldn’t cause large-scale damage on it.

The 2 were Adelaide and Bubowa who were competing for the third general.

To be precise, this was already the second battle. The first battle was commanding army while the second was for personal combat power. The companding army’s competing method also surprised Chen Rui a little. They were actually competing with the battle ball.

In the end, Bubowa Team of mutated Great Demon defeated the Adelaide Royal Family Team by 3:1.

Strictly speaking, the Bloody Empire’s battle ball standard was fairly average, and their techniques were rough, but it was worth noting that the Bloody Empire players were quite strong and high-spirited. The powerful pressure other than the battle ball skills was lacking in the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire’s teams. The Bloody Empire Army was known as the most powerful army among the 3 empires which was evident from this.

Judging from the hot scenes of the audience in the training field, the popularity of the battle ball in the Bloody Empire was even higher than expectation. The Bloody Empire had also opened up several large professional battle ball fields. The venues for the competition were very up to standard. It seemed that they put a lot of effort in it. As for the battle ball, it could only be purchased from the Dark Moon at a high price.

When Chen Rui was thinking about whether to open a battle ball merchandise store in the Bloody Empire, the initial stalemate in the field had changed. Bubowa’s [Flame Territory] power was drastically reduced, and Adelaide’s body was emitting tons of black silk which wrapped up Bubowa.

Adelaide had already lost to Bubowa in the previous war game, so he must not be defeated again in this round. His own strength alone was slightly better, and he also carried the bloodline talent [Light of Sin] and [Dark Mastery] of the Mammon Royal Family, so he was determined to win.

[Light of Sin] was a talent that weakened the opponents. It could even restrain the [War Puppet] of the Asmodeus Royal Family to a certain extent. In the territory created from this talent power, Bubowa’s power had been firmly suppressed. He was unable to reverse the situation.

After all, the royal family had a natural advantage in combat. Not only they had unlimited potential, but they also had various bloodline talents. Compared with these, the rest of the demons did suffer many disadvantages.

Chen Rui’s mind moved slightly. With his eyesight, he could see that although Bubowa’s strength was inferior, he would not be defeated so quickly. He must have another plan.

Sure enough, with Adelaide’s winning ticket in hand, a crackling sound suddenly sounded. The black silks in the sky were on fire. The flames were blazing in the black cluster, and a dazzling figure was rushing toward Adelaide like lightning. When Adelaide felt the intense crisis, he shouted and a lot of black light was launched from his fist at Bubowa.

Bubowa suddenly disappeared and appeared behind his enemy as he passed through Adelaide. In the blink of an eye, all the halos disappeared at the same time, leaving only 2 figures standing in place blankly.

Adelaide slowly turned around and looked at Bubowa coldly. With a shake of his body, there were explosion sounds. His blood splashed, but he stood still and said in a deep voice, “I didn’t expect that you can actually find the exact flaw of my territory. You actually didn’t hesitate to burn your vitality to fight for a blow when you act defeated. Unfortunately, there is 1 thing you still miscalculated, that is, I have awakened the [Immortal Body].”

[Immortal] Body was one of the 3 bloodline talents of the Mammon Royal Family. It was said that one could be immortal when the highest level was achieved. Of course, it might be an exaggeration, otherwise the Mammon Royal Family would be full of immortal monsters. However, the Immortal Body could greatly enhance endurance and recovery ability, and it granted resistance to ordinary curses or poison. This was publicly recognized. It could be said to be a very practical bloodline talent, but compared to [Dark Mastery] and [Light of Sin], the awakening of this talent was much more difficult.

Blood began to flow out of Bubowa’s seven orifices. He felt a strong sense of enfeeblement, and his body shook. He tried his best to hold on and not fall down. Burning one’s vitality was not a joke. He knew that his strength was weaker than Adelaide, so he made a desperate move by surprise. Unfortunately, he didn’t foresee that the opponent had awakened the [Immortal Body], and he couldn’t knock Adelaide down with a single blow.

“I lost.” Bubowa gave up and uttered 2 words arduously. In fact, he had tried his best.

At present, the 2 sides had won 1 round each, so it was a tie, and there was no third round. It was up to Raizen to judge. For a while, the training field was quiet, and almost everyone’s eyes fell on the supreme emperor.

“In the face of absolute strength, no matter how clever the plan is, it is only futile.” Raizen’s faint voice sounded through the audience. “In the third general battle this time, Adelaide won.”

The most important thing for an empire’s general was not personal force, but the means to lead and control the army during the war. Generally, the generals were the core of controlling the overall situation in wars. They would not simply charge themselves. They had specialized skills. It was difficult to find a reliable candidate who was proficient in strategy and was extremely powerful. Therefore, under normal circumstances, the generals of the 3 great empires of the Demon Realm were not particularly outstanding in terms of their personal strength. They were all between the peak stage of the Demon Emperor and the early stage of the Demon Overlord.

Raizen the Great had now chosen Adelaide, who had stronger personal power and weaker in military strategy and commanding army. Although it did not seem very reasonable, everyone present, including Bubowa himself, did not feel that there was anything “unreasonable” because this was Raizen the Great’s decision.

This was the powerhouse.

Bubowa sighed and smiled bitterly. In fact, he had already guessed the result after losing to Adelaide. Not only because of the emperor’s consistent style of advocating power, but more importantly, Adelaide was the royal family of the Bloody Empire. He was destined to have advantages in some aspects that a mutated Great Demon like him couldn’t match.

Among the 3 generals of the empire, First General Gustav pledged allegiance to the Samael Royal Family, while Second General Meister was more mysterious. His usual whereabouts were kept secret. Others would do the work of conveying orders and training troops. Unless it was a special expedition, he would not show up. It was said that apart from Raizen the Great, no one had seen this person’s true face before.

It was naturally more appropriate that their own Mammon Royal Family held this third general position. Unless Bubowa could win 2 rounds in a row without dispute in front of everyone, the general position was basically beyond reach for him.

Bubowa was disappointed in his heart, but what he worried most was another thing- Adelaide is a relatively calculative man. Today, I almost let him return with defeat. In the future, I’m afraid my days in the Bloodwave Legion under the third general will only be tough.

At this moment, a gentle voice from Raizen’s side sounded, “Father, Sir Bubowa, who is proficient in military strategy and commanding army, left a deep impression. General Gustav’s Rage Flame Legion is missing exactly 1 military strategist, I want to recommend him to serve. I wonder if father can approve it?”

The person who spoke was Young Prince Teris. As Bubowa was worried that Adelaide would mess with him when Adelaide became the third general, he was extremely willing when he heard that he could go to the Rage Flame Legion of First General Gustav in order to avoid Adelaide, but he dared not to show it.

Second Prince Edmund frowned and said, “Father, Bubowa has been in the Bloodwave Legion for many years and knows everything about legion affairs and personnel. Now that Adelaide is new to the office, he is not familiar with Bloodwave Legion. I think it is better for Bubowa to continue to stay in the Bloodwave to assist Adelaide.”

The Bloodwave Legion was one of the 3 legions and also a military force under the direct jurisdiction of Edmund. Although First General Gustav was not affiliated with the Great Prince Aleus, Gustav was close to Teris, which also represented the closeness to Aleus. Edmund couldn’t just watch the talents like Bubowa went to the “hostile” forces.

Edmund’s words made Bubowa look bitter. Although he was considered an important figure in the military, he couldn’t control his fate at this moment.

Raizen ignored Edmund, but glanced at his youngest son. A strange light flashed across his eyes as he said calmly, “Teris, you have already broken through to the Demon Emperor?”

As soon as these words came out, many audiences turned their attention to Teris. The genius prince who has been wandering in the Great Demon King stage finally broke through the bottleneck. In this way, the weakest prince has also reached the Demon Emperor level.

Several princes looked at Teris with a little more vigilant or unkind gaze. This extremely clever brother in other aspects is limited in training talent. He had been stuck in the Great Demon King realm for many years, but now he broke through silently to reach the Demon Emperor realm. It seems that we need to be more careful in the future.

Only Aleus and Edmund were concerned by it. Teris’ training talent was publicly known. After so long, he had just arrived at the Demon Emperor realm. It was far from the Demon Overlord level, so in this respect, he wasn’t a threat.

Especially Aleus, who had the same mother as Teris, had a very good relationship. If Teris got stronger, it also meant that his assistance was greater; it was favorable to him.

Hearing the news, Chen Rui’s eyes narrowed slightly. Teris advanced at this time? Doesn’t it seems too much of a “coincident”?

Gustav; “Bridget”; The Water Elemental King’s words, “someone who needs dark power to break through the bottleneck”; Teris’ advancement to the Demon Emperor… These keywords were getting clearer in his mind.

When many coincidences come together, they are not necessarily true coincidences.

Teris still kept a calm smile as he bowed calmly and said, “Yes, father really has great insight. I just came back from outside some time ago, and I haven’t had the time to tell father.”

“Very good,” Raizen nodded slightly, “Then, I will grant your request.”

Judging from Raizen’s tone, he agreed to this “irrelevant” request because Teris had reached the Demon Emperor stage. However, Edmund did not dare to express the slightest objection because once Raizen decided something, he would never change it.

Bubowa secretly breathed a sigh of relief, showing gratefulness to Teris.

At this time, the most important backbone of the Bloodwave Legion switched to the Rage Flame Legion. This weakened Edmund and strengthened Aleus. Several princes seemed envious of Aleus for having such a brilliant younger brother. Even if these brothers combined, it would be difficult for them to be his opponent.

Chen Rui was thinking about a question. When Azgalor came to the Dark Moon to win me over, he made a statement in the name of the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce in the Bloody Empire. He also said that the Great Prince Aleus is behind the Red Leaf Chamber of Commerce. Does this mean the mysterious leader of “Bloodfall” is the Bloody Empire’s Great Prince Aleus?

Chen Rui immediately rejected this hypothesis. Although Aleus has reached the Demon Overlord level, he is far below Azgalor and Manu at the peak stage realm. Furthermore, there are also unruly members like the crystal dragon Jacob. It is impossible to suppress these people by solely relying on the power of Aleus. The one who can suppress these peak stage of the Demon Overlord powerhouses…

Chen Rui’s eyes turned to the throne in the distance. Could it be…

If it is “him.” Some doubts can be explained, but there are more new doubts. Chen Rui felt a headache for a while. At this time, Great Prince Aleus had officially announced Adelaide as the new third general of the Empire, the Bloodwave Legion’s leader. Raizen personally awarded Adelaide the corresponding medal and saber.

Second Prince Edmund also announced afterward that the Bloody Empire’s trade fair, which was in preparation for a long time, would officially start in 2 days.

Perhaps due to the influence of the Dark Moon auction and trade fair, the Bloody Empire and Dark Shadow Empire held auctions at the same time. The Bloody Empire’s trade fair was about to begin.

Chen Rui heard Tess talked about this trade fair. The scale seemed to be quite large. It just so happened he could take this opportunity to inquire about Mountain Seckred and Fertile Yuan Soil.

Another “convenient” auction for Chen Rui to collect items?

chapters.title: Chapter 436 - Light And Dark! Demon Overlord Girl In The Special Trade Fair
chapters.body:
Chapter 436 - Light And Dark! Demon Overlord Girl In The Special Trade Fair

Chapter 436: Light and Dark! Demon Overlord Girl in the Special Trade Fair

2 days later, the Bloody Empire trade fair was held as scheduled.

Chen Rui used a pseudonym and became a vendor in the trade fair. However, this trade fair was a bit special. It gathered all independent small stalls. It was said that they sell very rare and special items. Only special guests could visit this trade fair.

It took Tess a lot of effort to find out the news. Chen Rui originally wanted to take this opportunity to find Fertile Yuan Soil and some materials for making artifacts. Naturally, he would not miss this good opportunity. It was just that Tess’ current ability was not enough to allow him to join the list of special guests, so Chen Rui wisely chose to become a vendor.

Despite the help of Tess, it was not an easy task to enter this store. You must have unique rare goods. Chen Rui took out some gadgets that he made in the Rainbow Valley previously. These gadgets’ material or value was not very high, but the characteristics of this store were not just looking at high value. The most important thing was they should be “special”. The more distinctive and weird, the better it was. In the end, Chen Rui’s gadgets finally passed the “review” and he successfully “settled in” the store.

Before the fair started, all the merchants in this store were intensively lectured. The content of the lecture was about some special rules of the store. One matter was emphasized. At a certain period of time, a distinguished female customer would come to this store. Everyone must show a good spirit of hospitality. No matter what item the customer liked, it must be sold to her. The price should be average, not too high or too low.

If the female customer successfully purchased a certain product, the vendor would receive a reward which was 5 times the price of the product afterwards. If the customer was satisfied, the vendor would receive 10 times the reward afterwards!

There were a small number of people who had participated in the Bloody Empire capital’s similar trade fairs in the past. It was said that there were also such special rules at that time, and they also cashed out 10 times the rewards afterwards, so the reliability was beyond doubt.

The female guest was probably a very noble and first-rate royal family member. Chen Rui was a little curious about this, but he was just curious and did not pay too much attention to it. His attention at the moment was on the goods of those vendors, and he really found some of the materials needed by the artifact and some rare good items. Unfortunately, he did not see his biggest goal, Fertile Yuan Soil, nor did he get any information about Mountain Seckred and related news from these people.

As a fellow seller, Chen Rui had reached an agreement with those selected merchants. If no customer bought those materials and goods in the end, they could exchange the goods they need with each other or sell them to him at a suitable price. However, they still prefer to sell at a price because those “commodities” of Chen Rui were too weird. It was hard to invoke the interest of other merchants.

In contrast to the lively atmosphere outside, the buying and selling of the special store began silently in a separate venue. The merchants in the store were effectively isolated by cleverly designed spaces. They were well-organized and had spacious passages. The merchants and products were clear at a glance, and the place did not seem crowded at all.

According to the rules, the sellers in the special stores were not allowed to shout at the customer. There was a sign in front of each stall listing their goods and prices. They could only speak when those customers were interested in certain goods and inquired about that. Once the rules were violated, they would be expelled from the trade fair.

The number of guests here was not particularly large. From the perspective of clothing or conversation, most of them had extraordinary identities. They were very generous and rarely bargain. In just 1 hour, several businessmen made a lot of money and smiled.

Unlike those sellers who had gained a lot, the weird goods on Chen Rui’s stall were rarely inquired. Even the old goblin who sold strange demonic beasts next to him had just sold 2 little guys, but Chen Rui hadn’t got a good start.

The old goblin glanced at him to show off, then he carefully checked the magical cage, lest there be any problems and let the wealthy babies slipped away.

At this moment, a lady appeared in the special store. She walked lightly and wore a white short-sleeved dress with silver trim. She was fair-skinned and well-proportioned. She had light blue hair in two buns, and her face was covered with a veil. He couldn’t see her mouth and nose which added a bit of mystery. Judging from her smart and bright eyes, she should be a beauty with outstanding appearance.

This lady appeared during this time period, and she was very similar to the distinguished female customer described in the previous assembly. In an instant, almost all the merchants were high-spirited. They were eager for this “goddess of wealth” to patronize their own stall. If there were not strict regulations, perhaps someone had already started to approach her to sell goods.

Chen Rui also caught a glimpse of the lady from a distance and felt indifferent. Chen Rui didn’t come for the money this time. Moreover, he only needed to take out a part of his property now to buy the entire trade fair. Why would he be bothered about the mere reward money?

As for what this beauty looked like, he was even more uninterested. Even if she was extremely beautiful, it didn’t matter to him— The few beautiful tigresses [1] in my house always fight against each other, and sometimes there are small competitions and conflicts. They are enough to make me headache. It is better to cherish life and stay away from beauty.

(Note: This “beauty” did not include the heroine + the demon girl + the dragon girl + the female boss + the hidden role empress)

The lady seemed to be very curious about everything. She looked around. She picked up a commodity from time to time, but she then put it down again in the ardent gaze of the stall owner. She was about to walk toward Chen Rui’s direction.

Perhaps it was because the other vendors were too diligent while Chen Rui appeared cold, the lady’s gaze glanced at the Great Demon disguised by Chen Rui and turned to the pile of weird things in front of him. Her gaze moved suddenly, and she didn’t look at the rest of the stalls. She walked straight toward Chen Rui.

The vendors at the side regretted it. If I had known earlier, I’d pretend to be indifferent like that cunning Great Demon. Right, it is the old saying passed down from ancient demons, called… being unconventional!

The lady picked up a simple countdown timer made by Chen Rui using ancient runes. After looking at it for a while, she picked up another wristband that automatically glows according to time and asked, “Did you make this yourself?”

The voice seemed to be a young girl. It was soft and sweet. Chen Rui did not speak, but nodded instead.

The old goblin on the side was so jealous that his eyes were about to pop out. Although this “goddess of wealth” has seen a lot of things along the way, she doesn’t say a word, but she actually spoke to this damn Great Demon! This means that she may be very interested in this guy’s goods and may even buy this guy’s goods!

The old goblin was not the only jealous one but also the surrounding vendors. However, no one knew the horror in Chen Rui’s heart. At this moment, he was forcibly suppressing the fluctuations in his mood because if he was not careful, he would be noticed by the other party.

Race: Greed Royal Family.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: C+(S)

Physique: C-(S-); Strength: C(S-); Spirit: C(S); Agility: C(S)

[Analysis]: Dark attribute, light attribute.

It’s a Demon Overlord powerhouse again, and she is also a female from the Mammon Royal Family!

From the first 7 empires of the Demon Realm to the 3 remaining empires, the Bloody Empire, Dark Shadow Empire, and the Fallen Angel Empire were able to stand in the Demon Realm for so many years without falling apart, they must have their own trump cards, which were the Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord-level powerhouses. Obsidian sent out 2 Demon Overlord-level assassins at the Dark Moon auction last time. No wonder even a powerful organization like Bloodfall could only make moves in secret using conspiracy and schemes to subvert the regime instead of conquering with direct force.

Among the powerhouses of the Bloody Empire, apart from the Demon Realm’s strongest Raizen the Great himself, Chen Rui had already met First General Gustav (Bridget), the 2 princes Aleus and Edmund, plus this mysterious lady were already 5 people. Nobody knew how much more terrifying powerhouse was hidden.

Originally in the Dark Moon Estate, which was suppressed by the capital, the highest one whom Chen Rui saw was Shea’s Great Demon King (Had advanced to Demon Emperor now). With the growth of his knowledge and the improvement of his own level, the number of powerhouses he started to see was getting more. When he himself became a “high level” powerhouse and hoped to rise to the next level, the peak stage powerhouses that he could only look up to in the past no longer became unattainable.

Having said that, if the Demon Overlord in front of him was really a young girl, those “old” Demon Emperors and Demon Overlords could only step aside.

What made it unbelievable for Chen Rui was that in addition to the inherent dark attribute of the Mammon Royal Family, this lady actually had the light attribute!

The Demon Realm is the world where the dark elements are most active. The dark elements’ nemesis, light elements will be suppressed to a very low level here. The combat power of humans who train light element magic such as Samuel and Nero will naturally drop a lot. Of course, it is also somewhat better training to a certain extent.

However, this lady from the Greed Royal Family actually has a light attribute that is incompatible with the dark attribute. What does it mean? Mutated?

If the Super System didn’t show her identity as the Demon Realm’s Royal Family, Chen Rui would still think that she was a human female who entered the Demon Realm.

The lady didn’t notice Chen Rui’s abnormality, or she didn’t pay attention to him at all. Instead, she picked up the little things one by one while nodding her head, “Wow! Although the highest is only 2 yuan, these creations are so interesting! You! Where did you learn it?”

When Chen Rui heard these words, he was shocked again. This “2 yuan” was not like a 2 yuan (a real life currency) convenience store or so, but the level of ancient runes used in the gadgets. The lady saw through it at a glance. I didn’t expect that besides Zola, there is such a strange lady proficient in ancient runes in the Demon Realm!

Chen Rui thought about it, and he immediately made up a story, “This was taught to me by an old man in the village when I was a child. It is profoundly mysterious, but unfortunately he has disappeared. I have spent a lot of effort over the years to reach this level…”

“For 2 yuan, you are already pretty good…” The lady said, and she asked curiously, “What is that old man like?”

“I don’t quite remember. He seems to be wearing a black headscarf with a white beard. He has no name, and people call him White Beard. I vaguely remember that he mentioned Mountain Seckred before leaving. I don’t know if he wanted to go to that place. Later, I kept looking for the old man and Mountain Seckred, but unfortunately I couldn’t find his whereabouts.”

This White Beard was a borrowed image of a well-known manga character that Chen Rui had seen before. He almost said the 4 emperors, haki and so on, but he shut his mouth in time.

“Mountain Seckred?” The lady’s eyes flashed slightly, then she shook her head, “There is no White Beard there, you don’t have to waste your effort.”

Chen Rui was just having a quick thought just now. He just asked tentatively with the mentality of trying. He never thought he really “got” on the whereabouts of Mountain Seckred. His heartbeat accelerated a little and blurted out, “Miss knows about Mountain Seckred?”

The lady seemed to notice that she had made an indiscreet remark. She hurriedly covered her mouth and shook her head, obviously telling people that she knows. She seemed more and more like a cute and naive innocent girl. She did not match the terrifying power of the Demon Overlord level at all.

Chen Rui asked around the bush several times, but he still had no results. With a shift in his mind, he turned the topic to ancient runes, “This noble lady, you seem to know this kind of magic runes? May I ask the lady for some advice?”

The girl just shook her head and was anxious after being asked. She turned around to leave. How could Chen Rui give up this important source of information, “Miss, wait a minute, I have a new and unique special item here. I bet you have never seen it before.”

This sentence made the girl stop. When she looked back, Chen Rui had a strange object about the size of 2 palms in his hand. It seemed to be a flat square crystal rock with a smooth and flat appearance. It showed a mysterious luster.

The girl turned around and asked curiously, “What new item is this?”

“This is an extremely mysterious magic item. It contains boundless wisdom and philosophy. It tells us a fun game that the mistakes made will accumulate while the successes gained will disappear.”

Chen Rui had a deep look of a philosopher, but it was a waste of expression. The girl didn’t hear the other words except 2 words, “fun game”, which she heard clearly. Her eyes sparkled suddenly.

The so-called “the mysterious item containing this boundless philosophy” was actually the Tetris game made by Chen Rui using runes and mechanics. At the beginning of the Rainbow Valley’s unmemorable career as a handyman + chef + experiment subject + deputy valley master, this temporary “game console” accompanied him through rounds of difficult days. He finally overcame the difficulties and ushered in the pleasant sexual life with the beautiful valley master.

This version was already an improved game console. Unfortunately, the ancient runes were too complicated and they could only imitate this small and simple game. Otherwise, Chen Rui would like to start an online game company. He could take advantage of the free methods of copying from another world to be an unscrupulous game dealer in the Demon Realm.

“This is the moving button , this is the rotation button. A horizontal row can be eliminated like this…”

“The one next to it is the next shape that will appear, and that number is my highest record…”

“There will be extra points for those who have eliminated 2 or more rows consecutively…”

The girl leaned over and watched him play for a while. Her eyes were already flashing little stars, “Can you let me try…”

Therefore, under the guidance of Chen Rui, the girl started an in-depth discussion with “philosophy”; she couldn’t stop playing it. Unknowingly, 2 hours later, the girl still held the crystal stone slab whole-heartedly without the intention to leave at all. The eyes of the vendors around him were almost red.

“Ms. Tiffany, I still need to do business. Why don’t…” Chen Rui had already asked the girl’s name during the chat, but it was limited to this. Tiffany was obviously obsessed with the game now, so she couldn’t hear any more words.

“Press the red mark above!”

Tiffany subconsciously pressed the mark, and the game was paused. She seemed to recover her mind and said embarrassingly, “Sorry, Simon. I like this magic item very much. How much do you sell for?”

Simon was the pseudonym used by Chen Rui. During the conversation, he had already tentatively discovered that this girl was a gentle and reasonable type, so she would not likely rely on her royal identity and Demon Overlord-level strength to grab it. If it was Zola, perhaps this game console had long been surnamed “My”.

“This is the one and only most precious souvenir that White Beard left me. It is not for sale…” Seeing Tiffany’s disappointed eyes, Chen Rui seized the opportunity to say, “However, White Beard once said that he wants to find something called Fertile Yuan Soil. If Ms. Tiffany can give me Fertile Yuan Soil, I’m willing to exchange it with this most precious souvenir.”

“Fertile Yuan Soil!” Tiffany seemed a little surprised, then she shook her head. Nonetheless, she stared at the “game console” and was reluctant to look away.

In fact, Chen Rui’s remarks had loopholes. At first, he only remembered that White Beard mentioned Mountain Seckred, but now there was another Fertile Yuan Soil. However, Tiffany was obviously not the kind of deep-scheming person, and she was attracted by the game console, so she didn’t pay much attention. However, no matter how Chen Rui tempted her, the girl still refused to confide any matters regarding Mountain Seckred and Fertile Yuan Soil.

Chen Rui knew that the other party had Demon Overlord level strength after all, so he could not go overboard. He sighed on the spot, “Meeting Ms. Tiffany today is also a rare opportunity, so I’ll give this precious game crystal board to the lady as a gift between friends.”

“Thank you, Simon!” Tiffany was overjoyed. She took it as if it was a treasure. When she saw Chen Rui shaking his head and sighing, she felt guilty in her heart, “I’m sorry, I really can’t tell you some matters, that Fertile Yuan Soil… I remember there should be records in the database of the capital’s Mechanic Association. If you have the opportunity, you can go and take a look. However, that kind of thing is really not what you can contact. I am leaving now, I hope we will have the opportunity to meet again next time. To express my gratitude to you for this precious gift, uh… I will buy everything in your stall.”

Chen Rui did not reject Tiffany’s kindness because he was now a “vendor”.

No matter what, I finally have some hints. Seems like I need to go to the Mechanic Association.

[1] Tigresses refer to fierce women.

Was Tifanny the master of the Mountain Sekred…

chapters.title: Chapter 437 - Deadly “Reward”
chapters.body:
Chapter 437 - Deadly “Reward”

Chapter 437: Deadly “Reward”

The trade fair’s day one was over. Chen Rui’s stall was the most enviable one. Not to mention he flirted for a few hours, the mysterious lady even bought everything in his stall in the end. The guy actually dressed up as a customer while leisurely wandering around in the trade fair, and he bought many things.

Despite spending a lot of money, everyone knew that this “Simon” was obviously the only stall in the entire fair that satisfied the distinguished lady. Furthermore, it was not an average satisfaction. It seemed that he would get the 10 times reward. No matter what, this guy still made a huge profit today.

In fact, money was really unimportant for Chen Rui. The real gain this time was that he got valuable clues about Fertile Yuan Soil and bought many rare things including artifact materials. It was considered a worthwhile trip.

Sure enough, Chen Rui left the fair with a guard by noon under everyone’s envious gazes.

The guard escorted Chen Rui out of the bustling trade fair all the way to the outskirts of the western city. Chen Rui was a little surprised. Why should the reward be cashed in such a place?

When he came to a remote hut, there was a thin and strange man with a cold complexion. He waved his hand at the guard, and the guard left after saluting.

“My name is Mentila, and I’m the leader of the secret intelligence department of the capital. The secret intelligence department is the secret legion responsible for the safety of the capital. From now on, I will ask 1 question and you will give 1 answer. If there is any fraud or omission. Don’t think of getting out of here alive.”

The secret intelligence department? Chen Rui thought about it. It should be an Intelligence Department with the same nature as Dark Demon. It seems that the 10 times reward this time is really a “surprise”.

“Sir, isn’t there a 10 times reward? I…”

“Didn’t I say, I ask 1 question and you give 1 answer?” Mentila suddenly exuded a Demon King-level aura which caused Chen Rui, the small “Intermediate Demon”, to stand unsteadily. He was also very cooperative to make it seemed like he almost fell to the ground.

Mentila looked at the effect of his aura with satisfaction and said, “What did you sell to that lady?”

Chen Rui replied timidly, “Those are some gadgets I made by myself. I used the magic circles to bring some entertainment effects. They have no special effect.”

“I know your crappy things that are worthless. What I’m asking now is the item that the young lady is obsessed with.”

“That’s called the Tetris crystal board. It’s a magic item that I have collected for many years which was left behind by an elder. Unfortunately, there is only one.”

“Tetris crystal board? Are you sure there is only one? Can you make the same thing?” Mentila narrowed his eyes, “If you can make a similar item, in addition to the 10 times reward, you will get unimaginable wealth.”

Chen Rui’s eyes seemed to glow, but he shook his head regretfully, “That is the only precious item. I have tried it many times, but I can’t imitate it. Otherwise, I will display it and sell it to Ms. Tiffany.”

“Very well, then it’s useless to keep you.” A murderous intent flashed past Mentila’s eyes. What “Simon” explained is basically the same as the intel I got from the store, so there should be no problem.

Chen Rui had long felt that this guy had killing intent. From the time he revealed that he was a secret intelligence part leader in the beginning, he probably had no intention of letting “Simon” leave alive, but he still felt strange about the motive of killing him. He pretended to be very shocked and stepped back step by step, “Why? Didn’t you say I can get 10 times the reward for satisfying that lady?”

“Originally, you should have a reward, but because you dared to recklessly get close to the young lady, you have offended the taboo of a sir. Just knowing her name is enough to die 100 times! But! You have only 1 life. I will torture you 100 times until you die.” Mentila was full of murderous aura as he said in a gloomy tone, “Not only you, but everyone related to you will be exterminated!”

As soon as he finished speaking, he felt his head tightened. A hand had already clasped his skull like iron claws. Mentila was shocked. He instinctively felt that this terrifying hand could completely shatter his head with just a little effort. His Demon King-level strength was unable to resist at all!

“Who is the so-called sir? I give you 10 seconds to answer. If you want your head to explode, you can try to remain silent.” The cold voice of the other party sounded. Mentila never expected that this weak vendor actually transformed into a powerhouse with terrifying power. That kind of unbridled aura alone was enough to make him crawl on the ground. This person… is a Great Demon King? No! He’s not just a Great Demon King!

“Who are you!” Mentila’s heart tightened suddenly.

“There are still 5 seconds.” Chen Rui added a little force, and Mentila felt that the blood in his brain seemed to have accelerated dozens of times to the point of almost bursting, but he gritted to bite something off. His complexion quickly turned green and his gaze began to lose focus.

Chen Rui knew that something was wrong. When he let go, Mentila’s body softened and fell to the ground. His iron-green face had turned gray with green blood flowing out of the corner of his mouth. Apparently, he committed suicide by taking poison.

It seemed that this Mentila was really a member of the Bloody Empire’s secret Intelligence department. He was determined and resolute; he even committed suicide without any hesitation in order not to reveal the intel. However, Mentila’s “killing all related people” shocked Chen Rui. I entered the special trade fair through Tess. In this way, Tess is in danger!

As soon as he thought of this, the figure in the hut disappeared instantly.

Chen Rui disguised his face and sprinted all the way to Tess’ hotel in the southern suburbs. Before reaching the southern suburbs, he saw the skyrocketing fire and smoke from that direction. A bad omen suddenly surged in his heart, and he quickly accelerated.

However, he was still a step too late. When Chen Rui arrived at Tess’ hotel, the fire was nearing its end and was extinguished by nearby residents. The entire hotel was burnt down. Among them, several bodies that had not been completely charred were retrieved. Tess’ appearance was vaguely visible in the corpse of a succubus.

Although Tess was not very powerful, as the head of Dark Demon in the Bloody Empire, intelligence and resilience were the best choices. Chen Rui could be sure that she was killed first before being set on fire. Not only Tess, even a few guests in the hotel suffered. Perhaps due to the fact that the southern suburbs were remotely located, or the guards responsible for the capital’s public security had all devoted their energy to the trade fair, they only came when the fire was about to be completely put out.

The cause of this incident should not be the exposure of Tess and Dark Demon’s power, but “some powerful man” made this killing move out of some jealousy or other considerations because Simon, whom Chen Rui disguised as, was too close with the girl called Tiffany. Chen Rui had no idea of his identity. He is actually so vicious. Not only myself, he didn’t even spare Tess, who appeared to be just a “distant relative”, and even the innocent travelers!

There was a strong anger and killing intent in Chen Rui’s heart. I didn’t expect Tess will be involved in this way. Although Tess died, the Bloody Empire still has Dark Demon members. I must thoroughly investigate this matter. Regardless who is behind this, I have to make the other party pay the price!

With a shift of mind, Chen Rui returned to the western suburbs as quickly as possible. At this time, the Mentila’s corpse in the hut was still lying on the ground. Judging from the surrounding traces, no one had been here. Obviously, it was a breeze for Mentila to kill “Simon”. There was no need to arrange more manpower.

Chen Rui put away Mentila’s body, then he used [Camouflage] to transform into his appearance, and he walked out majestically.

The vendor “Simon” must disappear so as not to cause too much suspicion. As for the secret intelligence department where Mentila was located, it should be the most secret intel organization in the Bloody Empire. Judging from the decisiveness of Mentila’s immediate suicide, it should be very difficult to get in. Therefore, “Mentila” must “disappear” for a period of time after the damn vendor Simon was dealt with, and his corpse might come in handy when necessary.

The urgent task now was to gather the remaining Dark Demon members first. Before Isabella was formally appointed as the new person in charge, he needed to maintain the continuity of the intel at the Bloody Empire side. He also needed to focus on investigating the related intel of Tiffany and the sir.

The next day, a man wearing a mechanic attire appeared in front of the Mechanic Association Building in the Bloody Empire.

The Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association was much larger than the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire. President Nate was known as the top mechanical master of the Demon Realm, but this place seemed relatively deserted today because the Mechanic Association had a dedicated store at the trade fair to sell equipment and materials to the outside world. The business was very good, so most of the manpower was invested there.

“Fill out this form, then pay the assessment fee of 100 black crystal coins, and you can go to the assessment center on the fourth floor to participate in the assessment and certification.”

“100 black crystal coins?” Chen Rui was startled. I used only 50 black crystal coins for the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association assessment. How come the price here is twice as expensive when it is also an ordinary mechanic’s assessment?

“You’re from another place right?” The registrant raised his head and looked at him a few times. He said annoyingly, “We, the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association, have the top mechanic master in the Demon Realm, and our mechanic is also the best in the same level. The mechanics that you successfully certified in the Bloody Empire and in other empires are basically 2 different grades. Whether these 100 black crystal coins are worthy, think about it yourself.”

There is even a brand effect? Chen Rui secretly chuckled. If you really want to compare it, that Nate may not be the real top mechanic in the Demon Realm. He just makes use of the rule of the masters contest to win by trick. In terms of metal proficiency alone, Master Anderson of the Dark Shadow Empire is better than Nate. Besides, Nate still has some shameful matters.

Despite thinking that way, he still happily took out the black crystal coins, “I see. I have been studying with my teacher in the remote estate. Then my teacher died, so I came for the capital assessment. I don’t understand these rules. Sorry, thanks for explaining, sir.”

The registrant saw the extra 20 black crystal coins and Chen Rui’s deep smile. He glanced around carefully, and put it away calmly. His impression for the apprentice from another place suddenly increased by a lot in his heart.

“Richard, you are a smart person.” The registrant glanced over the name on the form and said with a smile, “There are several masters on the fourth floor who are qualified for the certification examination. You can choose the corresponding master according to your most proficiency, then the chances of passing the test are much higher. For example, Office 7’s Master Olastan is good at metal proficiency and likes fire element magic materials; Office 4’s Master Turia is good at leather proficiency and likes strong liquor…”

Under Chen Rui’s small bribery, the registrant confided all the likes and temperaments of the association masters. At the end, he specially reminded, “By the way, you better not go to Office 13, which is Sir President Nate’s secret disciple, Sir Horford. Samael. This sir is a genius mechanic master who is proficient in metal and leather, and is also the most hopeful genius mechanic master to inherit the president. When Master Nate goes for closed-door experimenting, Sir Horford’s has always been handling the association matters temporarily. However, Sir Horford has a weird temperament and is not easy to get along with. If you are not confident, don’t set yourself for failure.”

Horford? Chen Rui immediately thought of the duo-specialized master whom he defeated in the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic contest. It seemed that he actually used his real name. He probably wanted to become famous in that mechanical contest. Unfortunately, he encountered the evildoer Chen Rui and miserably became a supporting character instead.

Not only that, after Chen Rui entered the Crystal Valley as a spy, he also encountered Horford. When there was chaos in the Crystal Valley later, Chen Rui also destroyed the Mystic Valley by scheme. Horford went missing. Unexpectedly, he did not die and returned to the Dark Shadow Empire.

Chen Rui could be sure that Horford and the Bloodfall were absolutely related, and the Bloody Empire’s First General Gustav (Bridget) was the current patriarch of the Samael Royal Family. Horford was likely to be an important member of the Bloodfall organization.

However, Chen Rui did not rush to decide to investigate Horford. He sneaked into the Mechanic Association this time for more important matter.

“By the way, sir, my teacher said before his death that there are countless precious mechanics classics and materials in the Mechanic Association. I have always been eager for this. May I browse through and read them?”

“The classics and materials here are the richest among the 3 empires, and there is a dedicated Book Collection Hall,” The registrant said proudly. “However, the Book Collection Hall has strict authority restrictions. Only mechanics that are certified by the empire’s association can enter. The higher the level, the higher the contribution points and permissions required.”

The registrant who received the bribe was very enthusiastic and introduced in detail. He even helped Chen Rui to make plans, “For newcomers, contribution points are more difficult to accumulate. Moreover, some levels are only accessible to master level. If you are not there yet, it is also a shortcut to get a master as a teacher. However, even if the master’s contribution points may not be able to review to core-level information, you need to get special permission from Sir President Nate.”

Chen Rui nodded. The rules of the Bloody Empire Book Collection Hall are similar to the ancient magic towers of the Dark Shadow Empire. At the moment, it is better to pass the mechanics test first.

He bade farewell to the “enthusiastic” registrant and went straight to the assessment center on the fourth floor.

Tiffany vs Zola 🤔, who is greater in terms of magic?

chapters.title: Chapter 438 - Magic Eyes! The Demon Realm’S Strongest Talent
chapters.body:
Chapter 438 - Magic Eyes! The Demon Realm’S Strongest Talent

Chapter 438: Magic Eyes! The Demon Realm’s Strongest Talent

In the Office 4 of the assessment center, the Great Demon Master Turia with a red nose suspiciously looked at the Great Demon apprentice in front of him who handed in a newly made magic leather wristband.

The technique used by this apprentice could be described as a mess; it seriously violated the conventions, but he had produced a high grade wristband abruptly, reaching the mechanic qualification threshold.

It was like playing basketball. Some people’s shooting posture or hands were so strange as though it was out of the world. They could be as awkward as they were, but they could still get points.

Seeing Chen Rui sweating profusely, Master Turia took a sip of the purple berry wine offered by the apprentice. He finally nodded and stamped his own seal on the certification, “Although your production process is messy, the technique is very proficient. You can make this high-grade magic wristband successfully in the end, so I’ll give you a mechanic qualification.”

“Thank you, master.” Chen Rui nodded hastily. He knew his ability well. The sweating was definitely not fake. Chen Rui was obviously at a master level. He had to make an apprentice-level item under the eyes of a master, it was not an easy task indeed.

He also deliberately chose this wine-lover Master Turia due to his own considerations. After all, Horford had contested against him in the Dark Shadow Empire’s mechanic contest. Even if he used this method to cover up, there was no guarantee that the flaws would not be revealed. According to the previous “enthusiastic” registrant, Master Turia was not a harsh person, and he was the most friendly one. As expected, he indeed successfully passed the assessment this time.

“If you don’t correct your technique and some basics, I’m afraid that you will stop at mechanic in this life.” Master Turia rubbed his nose, “If you really want to make progress on the path of mechanic, you must correct many things.”

“Understood, thank you, master. I will try my best to read the study materials during this time. I hope master will give me some advices at that time.” Chen Rui bowed respectfully. This master’s standard is good. Even though he drinks, he is not confused. Judging from this advice, he is more responsible than I imagined.

“En, you can go to the Book Collection Hall to read more basic books. As for advice… if I am free, I can consider it.” Master Turia shook the bottle in his hand, meaning that whether he was free depended on its appearance. Chen Rui smiled knowingly and left.

After obtaining the mechanic certification, Chen Rui came to the previous assessment registration office again. The registrant was called Anracca. When he saw Chen Rui got the certificate that passed Master Turia’s assessment, he quickly and enthusiastically took him to the warehouse to receive the mechanic badge and robe. Chen Rui couldn’t help but to give him some benefits. This made Anracca smile as he took Chen Rui to the Book Collection Hall.

The Book Collection Hall was a very large building. Since the capital was currently bustling with the trade fair, there were not many people, but the management was still strict. Each floor had a separate administrator and a complicated magic circle.

Chen Rui could enter the first floor. As long as you were a mechanic, you could read it freely, but there was a certain time limit. The maximum was 5 hours a day, and the books couldn’t be borrowed. Each book had a corresponding magic logo. If one took it away without permission, the book could be detected even if it was in space equipment. There was also all-round monitoring which was considered a very “modern” facility.

Anracca was very familiar with the first-level administrator. Under his relationship, Chen Rui could read twice as long each time. It was also very convenient.

Chen Rui entered the first floor. It felt like a library from his previous life. There were many rooms for different categories, but they were actually a large space upon walking in. In addition to books on basic knowledge, there were also various mechanics’ experiences and information. This includes a large number of recognized formulas and all kinds of things which seemed to be mixed.

Chen Rui opened [Deep Analysis] and started browsing at an astonishing speed. He only speedily browsed each of the books with a glance. Before long, he had browsed nearly half of the book collection in this room.

Chen Rui felt someone’s gaze fixed on him. When he looked back, he saw a girl wearing glasses and also a mechanic robe looking at him in surprise. This girl was somewhat pretty. The wide robe she wore vaguely showed her curvy figure. She was not tall, but very plump.

“Miss? Anything?”

When the girl came back to her senses, her face blushed, “My name is Beluan, are you reading a book?”

This girl was a mutated Great Demon, and her strength was an Intermediate Demon which was very ordinary.

“As you can see, I’m not reading a book, but flipping a book.” Chen Rui knew that he might be too eye-catching, then he made an excuse jokingly, “My name is Richard, I just went to participate in the mechanic certification, but Master Turia said he will only officially let me pass if I go through all the books here.”

“Are you sure it is Master Turia? Why is he making life difficult for you?” The girl seemed even more surprised.

Chen Rui showed a pitiful appearance, “It may be because the master was drunk, but I can only do it, otherwise the robe I just got will be taken back. Ms. Beluan, please don’t tell others, otherwise I will be doomed!”

Beluan’s face blushed again, but it was because of anger this time, “How can my father do this! I will go to him and seek justice for you now!”

Father? This is the daughter of Master Turia? Chen Rui didn’t expect to mess this up, and he quickly changed his words, “It turns out that Master Turia is your father. I was joking just now! Master is really lenient when dealing with people. The entire Mechanic Association knows this. It’s just that when I was certifying, the master said that my foundation was not very strong and he gave me some suggestions, so I came here to find some information so as to improve my skills.”

“It turns out to be a joke, you are really…” Beluan heaved a sigh of relief, “You still passed the test with my father despite your weak foundation. You must have spent a lot of money on alcohol, but although my father loves alcohol, he doesn’t talk nonsense. Why not I recommend a few basic books to you?”

Sure enough, the daughter knew her father well, but Chen Rui’s real mechanic level was not lower than that of Master Turia. Of course, he would not really look for any information. It was the enthusiasm of Ms. Beluan that gave him a good impression. With a shift of thought, he said, “Thank you, miss. I have found those basic learning materials. To tell you the truth, in fact, my biggest purpose in coming to the Book Collection Hall is… my teacher. Before his death, he seems to have never forgotten some information that seems to be related to Mountain Seckred and Fertile Yuan Soil, so I want to find them. It can be regarded as fulfilling my teacher’s last wish… This is a little secret of mine. Please don’t tell others.”

“Mountain Seckred? Fertile Yuan Soil?” Beluan seemed thoughtful, “I have never heard of them. No wonder you flip through the book like that. Sorry, I didn’t intend to learn your secret, but you flipped it too fast, it is inevitable that you will miss it. Let me help you.”

Beluan came to a book, but she did not open the book. She just put her hand on it, and released it after a moment, then she touched another book. She was faster than the [Deep Analysis] reading. It was Chen Rui’s turn to be surprised this time, “Ms. Beluan, this is…”

Beluan smiled slightly, “It’s just some mutated talent; it’s quite useless.”

Chen Rui didn’t think this was a useless talent. She can sense the contents of the book by just touching the cover of the book. It also has a function similar to a quick search engine, which “filters” related information at a very fast speed. It is actually a very practical talent.

Just like that, one person flipped while another sensed and several hours passed before they knew it. With both of their extraordinary speed and method, they almost went through all the rooms on the first floor, but unfortunately there was no desired result.

At first, Beluan was a little worried about Chen Rui’s quick flipping. However, when Chen Rui casually said a certain word on a certain page and line, Beluan was shocked and finally realized that this “Richard” had a similar mutated talent like herself. She could not help being a little more friendly.

“Beluan, what are you looking for?” A man’s voice sounded.

Beluan frowned, “It’s nothing. I’m just helping this newly promoted mechanic, Richard, to find some basic things.”

The man was a Higher Demon of the Mammon Royal Family. He looked decent, but his hideous gaze made people feel uncomfortable, “I booked a seat at Purple Grass Restaurant. Shall we go there to eat at noon? They launched a new hot pot recently.”

Beluan immediately refused, “Sorry, Aebew, I have promised my father to accompany him to eat.”

“What about at night?”

“I’m not free either.”

“What about tomorrow?”

“I have appointments tomorrow and the day after tomorrow.”

Obviously, Beluan didn’t like this Aebew. Aebew had to give up angrily. When he set his gaze on Chen Rui, he suddenly became cold and stern, “Newcomer, if you want to stay here, be smart. Rubbish like you can’t just find an excuse to approach Beluan!”

“Please remain polite! If there is nothing else, I will continue to help Richard to find information. This is my father’s order!” Beluan’s expression of disgust was obvious as she pulled Chen Rui toward the other room. Aebew’s gaze turned to Beluan’s hand that was holding Chen Rui, and his gaze became even sinister.

Of course, Chen Rui would not take this kind of ant to heart, but Aebew was really lousy. He even threatened me in front of Beluan. No wonder Beluan hates this person so much.

“I’m sorry,” Beluan loosened Chen Rui’s arm. “Aebew is Master Nate’s nephew. He is calculative and sinister. This incident… may cause you to be affected by some bad effects. I’m really sorry.”

“You used Master Turia as an excuse just now because you wanted to protect me.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Don’t worry, I won’t stay here for long. I’m here mainly to fulfill my teacher’s last wish. I will leave when the time comes. He has no threat to me.”

Beluan nodded, “It’s just that we have searched all the way, but we haven’t found the information you want…”

Chen Rui thought of the registrant Anracca’s introduction of the Book Collection Hall level. A new idea came to mind and said, “Ms. Beluan, I don’t know if I can ask a favor from you…”

After listening to Chen Rui’s request, Beluan looked surprised, “Do you want to become an apprentice of my father ?”

“It’s just a registered apprentice. I hope I can follow Master Turia to the second and third floors to check the information. After I find the information here, I will leave the Bloody Empire and go to my teacher’s grave to fulfill his wish. Miss, you must do me this favor. I’m willing to pay whatever reward or price.”

The excuse of “teacher’s last wish” made Beluan a little more sympathetic and admired Chen Rui, but she still seemed troubled, “Although my father likes to drink, you can’t become his student without real talents. He has only accepted 2 apprentices so far, and you just barely passed the mechanic test, I’m afraid…”

Chen Rui was trying to make an impossible request so that Beluan would help him to search the upper levels, but Beluan said, “Unless you have a very special skill. Otherwise, even if you have my help, my father will not agree.”

“Special skill?” Chen Rui thought, “I seem to have it which is this.”

Beluan saw Chen Rui pointing his eyes. She was slightly surprised, then she shook her head again, “Although your memory talent is a bit special, but…”

“This is not only a memory talent.” Chen Rui laughed, “Although my poor mechanic is not worth mentioning in the eyes of miss or even a high status person like the master, the mutated talent of this pair of magic eyes can be said to be unique in the Demon Realm. For example, the bracelet on the left wrist of the lady can increase the movement speed by 20% and increase the magic casting speed by 22%. It should be… Uh, legendary grade equipment, right?”

“Excellent grade.” Beluan corrected Chen Rui’s “mistake”, but she looked surprised. Apart from the common sense grade judgment error, the specific attributes of the equipment are actually very accurate!

Chen Rui smiled with ridicule, “Yes, it’s an excellent grade. I remembered it wrongly… Oh, in terms of the material… I can recognize very few things except star sand, mystic magic sand, and red shell jade. There are 7 more which I don’t recognize.”

This was naturally Chen Rui’s deliberate deception. If he wanted to, he could easily say all the materials. This was the powerful power of [Analytical Eyes]’s [Appraisal].

If Beluan was surprised just now, she was shocked now. I made this magic bracelet myself, so I know all the materials in it. I used exactly 10 kinds of materials. I didn’t think that Richard could actually identify them. The star sand, mystic magic sand, and red shell jade are accurate. If he isn’t limited by vision, he can definitely identify the other materials. What kind of mutated talent is that pair of magic eyes? They are actually so powerful!

When Beluan heard Chen Rui’s claim that his talent “is unique in the Demon Realm” previously, she frowned at the impetuousness of this newbie whom she had a good impression of. It seemed that this “unique” was well-deserved now!

If he can master more knowledge, then this kind of talent must be able to unleash a stronger effect! This alone is enough to make him an official apprentice of my father!

“Miss?”

Seeing Chen Rui shaking his hand in front of her, Beluan recovered from the daze. She was blushing as she nodded, “I didn’t expect your talent to be so great! I will take you to find my father now!”

Nonono, not another girl…

chapters.title: Chapter 439 - Chapter 439: Teacher And Competition
chapters.body:
Chapter 439 - Chapter 439: Teacher And Competition

Chapter 439: Teacher and Competition

In Office 4 of the assessment center, Master Turia frowned as he looked at the strange apprentice who appeared in front of him again. Oh yeah, he should be a mechanic now. I was the one who let him pass the assessment just now.

I have a little impression of this guy. His mechanic skills are messy and just barely pass. Uh… but his wine is not bad.

The question is why is my daughter, Beluan, with this guy?

At this time, Beluan walked toward Turia and whispered a few words. Before his daughter finished speaking, Master Turia’s nose became even redder. He activated his Great Demon’s talent to appear in front of Chen Rui instantly. He grabbed Chen Rui’s robe, “You damn liar. What method did you use to actually deceive my precious daughter in such a short time…”

In Turia’s impression, her daughter was a prudent and assertive girl. She would never recommend someone to me easily, and she knew exactly how bad was the level of the recommended guy in front of him. He could imagine that he must have used some special means.

Is it seduction? This time is too short! And this guy’s appearance is not very good…

Due to the effect of the alcohol, Master Turia was about to ask furiously when he heard an angry voice from his precious daughter, “Father! Can you let me finish my words?”

Seeing her daughter’s flushing face who seemed to be really angry, Turia quickly let go of his grasp and gave Chen Rui a threatening look, “Brat, don’t you think of running away! You’ll see how I will settle you later!”

Chen Rui was speechless for a while being spat by Turia’s alcohol fumes. Beluan dragged Master Turia to the side and said a few more words. Turia’s eyes suddenly brightened and his drunkenness became much sober. He came to Chen Rui and carefully scanned Chen Rui.

Chen Rui had some goosebumps while being scanned. Then Master Turia took out a cloak, “Tell me the attributes and materials of this equipment.”

Chen Rui quickly said the answer, “It increases movement speed by 32%, reduces magic damage by 20%. It used 11 materials. I only know striped ratfish and silver shell powder, but I don’t know what the main material is. The attribute should be able to automatically recover a certain degree of damage. This equipment should be considered as quasi-legendary grade right?

“What ‘considered’! It is!” Turia was surprised and delighted when he heard that the attributes and the number of materials were accurate. He couldn’t help but scolded, “The main material is magic cicada wing line! Your teacher is such a bastard! He didn’t even teach you this basic material knowledge!”

“Master! Although I really want to get your advice, please don’t insult my dead teacher! Otherwise… otherwise I would rather give up asking Ms. Beluan!” Chen Rui looked angry. He knew that once this ability was shown, Turia would never let him go. Generally speaking, equipment appraisal required special equipment and master level eyesight to accurately determine various attributes, not to mention the more difficult material appraisal.

“Good! Very good!” Turia was not angry, but he rejoiced instead. He is able to possess such an outstanding talent, and his morality does not seem to be bad. At least, he is very grateful to his deceased teacher. He is indeed a good candidate to be my apprentice. As long as this Richard can master more knowledge of materials, even if his mechanics stay in this bad state, he can still at least become a master-level equipment appraiser. He is even very likely to be the best appraisal master in the entire Mechanic Association and the Demon Realm in the future!

To be a teacher of the best appraisal master… Turia’s eyes lit up, “From now on, you are my apprentice! I will declare to the association now!”

“Declare to the association? Father, are you planning to accept a formal apprentice?” Beluan showed a pleasant surprise. “Yes, let’s gather Trus and Roger in a moment, and we will have a meal together.” Turia walked out happily, then he suddenly turned around, “Uh… Richard, remember to prepare the wine to honor the teacher!”

Before Chen Rui could speak, Turia had walked out of the office.

Beluan happily held Chen Rui and left, “Great! Richard, Trus and Roger are the other 2 students of the teacher. Let’s go and meet them.”

Wait! Why do these people make decisions directly without asking my opinion? Actually, I just want to be a registered apprentice so that I can go to the library to check some information… Chen Rui secretly smiled bitterly, but things seemed to go smoother than he expected. Right, Student Richard?

Soon, the news of Master Turia’s acceptance of a new official apprentice spread. Master Turia’s vision has always been very high, and he is very strict in accepting apprentices. Even if President Nate once recommended his nephew, Aebew, to be his apprentice, he did not accept it. He actually has a new apprentice now. I heard that he is just a rookie mechanic who has just passed the certification assessment?

For a while, there were a lot of discussions in the Mechanic Association. Some believed that Richard was talented and intelligent, and he was appreciated by Master Turia during the assessment, so he was accepted as an apprentice. Others believed that Richard had plotted this to be acquainted with Master Turia’s daughter, Beluan long ago. He finally achieved his goal triumphantly. This guess was not groundless because more than 1 person saw Richard and Beluan staying on the first floor of the library for a long time.

All in all, this guy named Richard was definitely an enviable lucky guy who could be Master Turia’s apprentice. The most jealous person was Aebew who had been pursuing Beluan without success.

Chen Rui turned a blind eye to these rumors. His biggest goal was the information in the higher-level of the Book Collection Hall. It was just that Master Turia valued Chen Rui very much. He was more about cultivating the “foundation” of Chen Rui. Chen Rui didn’t know whether to smile or cry at this. However, his mechanic knowledgewere very proficient due to the Super System. Although his foundation was complemented in time through self-study, it was not quite strong, after all. He could be considered to be re-consolidating his foundation now.

However, in front of Master Turia, Chen Rui certainly could not show his true level. He only showed his amazing memory. As for his comprehension, he still showed horrible performance. Master Turia was often furious as he was impatient to see improvement. For the two, this was undoubtedly a very agonizing thing.

With the help of Beluan, Master Turia finally agreed to take Chen Rui to the second floor of the Book Collection Hall to take a look. Just in case, Chen Rui had an agreement with Beluan to keep secrets about Mountain Seckred and Fertile Yuan Soil so as not to cause unnecessary trouble. During this period, Chen Rui also mentioned these 2 things or related issues casually in front of Master Turia, but Turia did not have a special reaction. Perhaps, he did not know about it. Fortunately, he could finally explore the second level now.

Turia also brought Chen Rui to the second floor due to his own considerations. This disciple’s talent is very strong. Perhaps because he stayed in a small remote place for a long time and encountered a half-qualified first teacher, so he has not been able to get enlightenment. It’s really hard to change in a rush. It’s better to let him slowly feel and improve under the influence of this great environment.

To be precise, I need to increase his reading volume now. Regardless of whether he understands it or not, get him to remember it first now. One day he will be able to grasp the true essence of mechanic independently. Taking a step back, just the accumulation of knowledge from that kind of material books can make the function of the “magic eyes” more accurate and complete. Turia was quite dedicated to nurturing his apprentice.

Masters could bring their disciples into the second floor of the Book Collection Hall to browse for free while ordinary mechanics needed to spend contribution points. As for the third floor, even masters needed to spend a lot of contribution points.

The second level had fewer books and materials than the first level, but the content was relatively more formal, incisive and advanced. Chen Rui was still flipping through every book he came across at high speed. Although this bizarre sight had attracted the attention of many mechanics, with Master Turia by his side, most of those people thought it was a “special task” arranged by him, so they did not step forward to ask. They watched him for a while and didn’t pay too much attention after that. After all, they were spending contribution points to be here.

“Turia, this is your new disciple?” A cold voice sounded. It turned out to be a woman in a black robe who was wearing glasses. Her face was pretty, and she was tall and thin. However, her face was cold, as if everyone owed her millions of black crystal coins.

Chen Rui glanced at the master level badge on the woman’s chest, then he looked at the girl who followed behind her. She was actually Beluan. Beluan once mentioned that in addition to leather, she had a higher talent of proficiency in accessories, so she worshipped another master of the Bloody Empire Mechanic Association, Mavinna, as her teacher.

The registrant Anracca was good friends with Chen Rui now. The self-proclaimed “enthusiast”, who claimed to be the association’s know-it-all, had revealed a lot of gossip news. Mavinna, a veteran master of accessories, was well-known for her cold face and weird temper. She was one of the most difficult people to deal with.

When Turia saw Mavinna, he quickly got up from his seat and smirked, “It turns out to be Master Mavinna .Richard, come here and meet Master Mavinna.”

Chen Rui walked up and bowed to Mavinna, “Master Mavinna.”

Mavinna ignored Chen Rui. Her gaze turned to the wine bottle in Turia’s hand, and she frowned in disgust, “The smell of wine on you seems to be getting heavier!”

For some reason, Turia, who was usually carefree, seemed timid in front of Mavinna. He said with guilt, “This is the Dark Shadow Empire’s specialty purple berry wine brought by Richard…”

Mavinna glared at Chen Rui and snorted. Just as she was about to speak, another eccentric voice sounded, “I see. No wonder Master Turia will accept an apprentice. It turns out that you have accepted his wine.”

This voice made Turia’s face suddenly become cold, “Juliet, how I accept my apprentice is my business. Who are you to give pointers?”

The situation seemed to become more interesting. Chen Rui had heard of this Juliet. He was also a senior master in the association who specialized in metal proficiency. Judging from the gossip of the enthusiast, Juliet was interested in Master Mavinna, but unfortunately she wasn’t interested at all. Perhaps due to Beluan, the cold-faced lady seemed to show special attention to the Alcoholic Turia.

There was no room for 2 tigers in one mountain unless one was male and another was female. There was obviously one more male tiger now. Between the 2 males with normal orientation, they naturally were deadly opponents who fought with each other.

“It really doesn’t matter to me how you accept apprentices, but as you know, I also accepted an apprentice, Aucklo, recently. There should be some competition between young people to make progress. Why not let them compete and learn from each other. Well, if I lose, I will give you 5,000 contribution points… Oh, I almost forgot, it seems that you only have a little more than 1,000 contribution points left as you have been drinking in the past few years. Poor fellow… How about you only need to pay 1,000 points if you lose. I let you take advantage of me. How about that?”

Juliet’s words were full of sarcasm. He intended to belittle Turia in front of everyone, especially Mavinna. Turia was so angry that his nose became redder, but he knew that Aucklo was a genius who had been praised by President Nate. “Richard” could not compare to him at all. It seemed that he could only swallow the bitter pill.

“Why? Are you so timid that you dare not even to compete?”

Juliet was still aggressive. Beluan squeezed her fists angrily when seeing her father being humiliated like that. Her face flushed, but even she was not Aucklo’s opponent, let alone “Richard”.

At this time, Chen Rui suddenly said, “By the way, teacher, didn’t you say you want to take me to the third floor of the Book Collection Hall? Someone just happened to give us the contribution points now!”

Earning contribution points was not easy even for a master. Turia promised to bring Chen Rui up to check out the third floor for a few days after some time. It seemed that he was willing to sacrifice for this apprentice. Chen Rui was not a person who didn’t know how to differentiate the good from the bad. He still knew the principle of gratitude to “repay more than received”. Since Juliet had offered his points now, he could just borrow it to win Turia’s favor.

Turia was taken aback as his newly-accepted disciple continued to say, “Then Master Ju [1], I have only become a disciple for a short time, so my teacher only taught me a little equipment appraisal. Do you dare to compete with this? Sorry, I came from a village and I am not eloquent. Please forgive me, master.”

In fact, if Chen Rui demonstrated his true abilities, he would definitely humiliate Aucklo and even Juliet himself. He was only limited by his current identity. However, the talent of his “magic eyes” alone was enough to teach them a lesson.

“Hmph! If your teacher has the guts, let us see your newly-learned appraisal technique!” Juliet sensed this bold little mechanic’s rude attitude seemed intentional. He is a villager indeed. He has never heard of Aucklo’s name.

Aucklo is an uprising metal and accessory duo-specialized mechanic genius. He has a very unique understanding of materials. Appraisal is originally one of his strengths. This little mechanic who doesn’t know the world suggested to compete in appraisal, he is really digging his own grave.

The eyes of the father and daughter of Turia were bright at the same time. I never expected that “Richard” actually has this kind of quick-witted means. All of a sudden, he dragged the competition to the only aspect that he is best at. With remarkable magic eyes talent, we will surely earn 5,000 contribution points.

Turia was not a fool. He rolled his eyes and pretended to blame Chen Rui with a look, then looking at Mavinna again. He gritted his teeth, “Who has no guts! Bring it on!”

“Okay! Master Mavinna and everyone present today are witnesses of this competition!” Juliet was overjoyed, but he didn’t know that he had dug a hole for himself, and he was going in step by step.

[1] Ju is the same pronunciation as pig in Chinese.

Hmm… they didn’t know this “Richard” would disappear again once he achieved his objective…

chapters.title: Chapter 440 - Chapter 440: Victory! Nate’S Request
chapters.body:
Chapter 440 - Chapter 440: Victory! Nate’S Request

Chapter 440: Victory! Nate’s Request

Aucklo was a young Mammon Royal Family in his thirties. Although he showed considerable modesty in front of the 3 masters, his gaze toward Chen Rui’s eyes revealed unconcealed arrogance and contempt.

Aucklo did have a reason to be arrogant. He was young, duo-specialized, and from the royal family. His future was limitless. Of course, there were a lot of duo-specialized mechanics, but the duo-specialized mechanic masters were very rare throughout the Demon Realm. A word difference, but a huge difference. Besides the trio-specialized genius, Master Arthur, who shocked the Demon Realm, the famous duo-specialized were only the top mechanic master Nate and Horford, who appeared after that.

President Nate of the Bloody Empire Mechanic Association once said, “If Aucklo can continue to work hard and achieve great breakthroughs in duo-specialized, then his future achievements will definitely be higher than me.” Although this sentence was suspected to create momentum for the royal genius, Aucklo had never failed after competing with mechanics of the same level for many times. His talent was beyond doubt.

This reading hall was already full of mechanics. Although they needed to spend contribution points to be here, they might not be able to see this kind of competition between the genius and the “lucky guy” even if they had contribution points. Therefore, most people put down the book in their hands and consciously acted as an audience.

“Now, any mechanic present, please come up with any piece of equipment as an item for the test!” As soon as Juliet said it, many mechanics rushed to come up with their own proud works as they wanted to show their works to the 3 masters in order to attract more attention. Among them, there were also some people who bootlicked Juliet and Aucklo.

Juliet randomly selected 1 weapon, 1 armor, and 1 accessory. He placed them in the center of the table.

“Well, Aucklo, Richard, you can start now. There are no restrictions on tools or methods. The person who can identify the attributes of these equipment the fastest and most accurately is the winner.”

The noisy surroundings suddenly calmed down not only to avoid disturbing the 2 of them in the competition, but it was also a good opportunity for observation and learning for mechanics. However, almost no one was optimistic about the “lucky guy” Chen Rui.
