Chen Rui had been thinking about this explanation for a long time. He hoped to fool Isabella, but she was not an ordinary woman. She was so savvy that she was almost on par with Teris. She once exposed his fundraising scam when he was pretending to be “Charles”. She was also the first “rival” to see through Chen Rui’s layout.

This time, can I really fool her?

Isabella asked casually, “Oh? The grand master inheritance? So 2 consecutive teleports… is your life-saving skill?”

Chen Rui suddenly thought that “Charles” had revealed the skills of [Double Teleportations] in the death match with Broc. His heart was tense, but he could no longer deny. He had to change the topic again, “Yes. When I accompanied Princess Shea to visit the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, the inheritance mutated again. I had to go to the Bloody Empire to find something special to…”

Isabella was the master of the Dark Demon. Chen Rui used the power of the Dark Demon many times in the Bloody Empire. Besides, the person in charge, Tess, also sacrificed because of him. It was impossible that Isabella didn’t know some of his actions in the Bloody Empire, so he simply admitted the fact in order to avoid further doubts.

“The mechanic skills inherited from the grand master? Are you sure it’s just mechanical skills and not pharmaceutics?”

Isabella’s curious questioning made Chen Rui’s heart raced wildly. It seemed that Isabella had already suspected his most worrying problem. He nodded quickly, “Yes, it’s just… mechanic skills.”

“No wonder you went to the Mechanic Association of the Bloody Empire. The so-called inheritance should require mechanical materials.” Isabella showed a thoughtful look, but there was a dagger in her hand. She played with it slowly. It was the “Searing Shadow” given by Chen Rui for her to assassinate Broc back then. Taking it out at this time seemed to have profound meaning.

“Why don’t you go to the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association? With the relationship between the Dark Moon and the Dark Shadow Empire, even the rarest materials are easier to obtain than the Bloody Empire. Perhaps… you have hidden scruples of going to the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association?”

Chen Rui had already secreted broken cold sweat behind her. This woman’s thinking is too quick, and her sentence is to the point. If this goes on, I’m afraid that the identity of the trio-specialized genius mechanic master will be exposed. Therefore, he had to change the topic, “It’s not that I don’t want to go to the Dark Shadow Empire, but this item is only available in the Bloody Empire. It’s called… Fertile Yuan Soil.”

“Sorry, I have no intention of spying on your secrets. I’m a layman for mechanic skills. I will believe whatever you say.” Ms. Yini’s words made Chen Rui complain secretly. Isn’t this spying on secrets?

“This time you really did a wonderful job. You even pulled down the top master of the Demon Realm, Nate. As for Fonsaq or something, it should be your secret. I don’t want to ask more.” Isabella gently stroked the sharp back of the Searing Shadow. “You went to the core of the enemy country alone, disrupted the enemy’s interior with tricks, beheaded the enemy’s generals, and finally escaped by faking death. I seem to have seen this kind of strategy in another person before.”

Chen Rui’s heart was already throbbing violently. He quickly explained, “I only used tricks to get revenge for a friend. As for General Adelaide, he died in a fight of the several princes. I don’t have such ability.”

Isabella said unhurriedly, “Oh, then I’ve mistaken… but everyone has their own habits or styles. No matter how the form changes, the things in the bones are hard to change, right?”

Chen Rui shuddered in fright. He seemed to think of something suddenly. He slapped his forehead, “By the way, I have an appointment with a little princess today. I want to take her to a place. She should be looking for me everywhere now. If you have no other questions, I…”

This sentence was not a lie. Chen Rui initially promised the little loli to take her out for a “trip” today. This “trip” was actually going to the underground world of Mountain Xilang and passing the Fertile Yuan Soil to the Earth Elemental King.

Fertile Yuan Soil had the ability to automatically recover. The powerful Ms. Black Dragon bit a mouthful of it as a seasoning last time. It had completely recovered now, so it was time to go to the Earth Palace of the Earth Elementals.

“Do you like flower?”

Before he finished speaking, Isabella asked casually while looking straight into Chen Rui’s eyes with her beautiful blue eyes.

This sentence seemed to have multiple meanings, Chen Rui looked away with a guilty conscience, “These questions seem to have nothing to do with the ‘future development of the Dark Demon’, right?

Isabella said coldly, “Of course it is related because these issues are very important to me, the controller of the Dark Demon. This will directly affect the future trends and development of the entire Dark Demon. Now, I want to listen to your answer.”

Is this a threat?

Chen Rui inexplicably thought of his “threat” to Shea that day: The retribution comes so fast.

“Not… bad.” Chen Rui replied blankly. This flower is… Devil’s Snare? Snow Dallet?

“You seem to have been in a coma for a long time. Since Roman is here and there is a powerhouse like Paglio who has a close relationship with you, why do you need the Fountain of Resurrection to dispel my evil voodoo?” Isabella’s question once again showed a large-scale leap thinking. She went back to the original topic.

Chen Rui was taken aback. Isabella had directly admitted that she used the evil voodoo’s poison scheme back then. At that time, they were just serving their own masters. However, the dispel of evil voodoo was indeed a big loophole. With Chen Rui’s previous trust in Paglio and Roman, this seemed unexplainable.

The sir financial officer’s forehead was sweating. Isabella is really something. She’s not a woman who can be fooled easily. Is it really necessary to expose everything?

At this moment, a Dark Demon member knocked on the door. He walked in and handed Isabella a note, then he stepped back. Isabella looked at the note and waved her hand. The note flew to Chen Rui lightly, “It seems that your little princess Royal Highness seems to have encountered a little trouble. You should solve it by yourself. Today, our conversation will stop here.”

Chen Rui took a glance at the note, and he left as if he was spared his life.

After escaping hurriedly from Ms. Yini’s sight, Chen Rui felt that his back drenched in sweat. He was not sure how much secret Isabella had guessed, but it was certain that she had already guessed a lot, especially her suspicion of “Charles”.

As the saying goes, the bystander sees it clearly. Chen Rui recalled what he did. Indeed, as Isabella said, there were some relatively fixed styles. This was also out of his habit. Basically everyone was like this. Fortunately, Isabella was the only one who knew the secrets, otherwise many matters might be exposed.

Isabella’s disgust, vain, and conspiracy toward Charles in the beginning evolved to sacrificing her life for him in the end. It would be false to say that he didn’t understand the affection. Especially at the last moment, the phrase “I would rather have met you back then” was enough to clarify many matters.

It was just that Isabella was on the verge of death at that time. Perhaps it was just an instinctive response to seeking something to rely on when she was fearful at the verge of death. He was not sure what Isabella’s state of mind was after her “resurrection”.

He was already in a terrible fix when dealing with the 3 madams: The heroine, the little maid, and the female scientists as well as the quasi-madam, the Princess Royal Highness. It was not easy to enjoy the bliss of a harmonious harem. Furthermore, he had Her Majesty empress in the faraway empire whom he was determined to marry…

Although the ideal of otaku was to build a huge harem, there was often a big gap between reality and ideals. The more the better was definitely not suitable for his current harem construction ideas. If I can reinforce the existing scale, then safely add the top beauty in the future, I am already satisfied. I really don’t want to write any delusional journey of hunting beauty.

As for the aunty of someone, Ms. Yini, the Devil’s Snare flower… Haih, I better stay away from her for now.

At this moment, in front of the Dark Demon’s window upstairs, Ms. Yini squeezed the dagger in her hand while looking at the back of the human hurriedly leaving. She blurted a word out of her silver teeth, “Liar!”

She knew… What was waiting ahead of him? A dagger or an embrace?

chapters.title: Chapter 464 - Let’S Go! Young Girl
chapters.body:
Chapter 464 - Let’S Go! Young Girl

There was a sentence written on the note that Isabella passed to Chen Rui, “Little Princess Alice and the Cloak Gang’s Master Xingxing is having a conflict in the Cloak Magic Shop.”

The last time Chen Rui accompanied Shea on an envoy to the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, he initially agreed to go shopping with the little loli, but he “disappeared” for nearly 3 months before he fulfilled his promise. During his time in the Bloody Empire, the aggrieved little loli complained countlessly to her best friend. She let out all of her “sorrowfulness”. As a result, Athena made this trip under the dual effect of sympathy and friendship. Shea also contributed to it. After all, the little loli was her beloved sister.

When the little loli heard that she could “travel” with Chen Rui to Mountain Xilang for several days, she put aside the pitiful appearance of the usual days and became very excited. It’s about time to leave now. Why suddenly something happened?

Master Xingxing was now the president of the Dark Moon’s Mechanic Association and the founder of the Demon Realm’s improved water supply system. His importance to the Dark Moon was self-evident while Alice was the little princess of the Dark Moon and she also represented the lord. This kind of conflict would naturally cause a very bad impact. Maybe it would also cause the Master Xingxing to leave in rage where it would only benefit the Dark Moon’s enemies.

Chen Rui came to the Cloak Magic Shop at the fastest speed. He saw a lot of people in front of him. He squeezed in and saw that it was indeed the little loli and Master Xingxing. There were 3 people in front of Master Xingxing. They were the 3 people in the backyard of the Cloak Gang: Ms. Sasa and Master Skye’s 2 daughters, Alian and Eve.

Alice said quickly when she saw Chen Rui , “Chen Rui, good that you are here. I want to buy this dark elf girl’s magic item, but she refuses to sell it to me. Even if the Cloak Magic Shop is very famous, it is still not comparable to our Princess Retail Store. Don’t you know that customers are the priority when doing business?”

Chen Rui listened to the little loli angrily speaking while looking at a cube held tightly in Alian’s hand. He suddenly understood. It was a music Rubik’s cube that he made when he was studying jewelry items with Master Xingxing previously. It could produce various music when rotating. When he gave it to Alian at the time, Alian loved this music Rubik’s cube very much. She had always regarded it as her most beloved treasure. Maybe the little loli liked it in the magic shop today, so she wanted to get it.

The Demon Realm was a world with a strong concept of ranking. After all, the little loli was the princess of the Dark Moon. Her weird temperament gave everyone in the Dark Moon a headache. Although she had restrained a lot now, it was impossible to say that she had no arrogant habit of the superior. Although neither Alian nor Eve was good at arguing, Ms. Sasa was capable of it. She had developed a sharp mouth after years of wandering at the bottom of the society with his father. Master Xingxing was even more dismissive of the people with status and power, hence the conflict.

However, the little loli didn’t let the guards who accompanied her forcibly snatch the music Rubik’s cube, so the contradiction was far from irreconcilable.

This was originally a trivial matter, but if it was not handled well, it might cause more serious consequences. Chen Rui looked at Master Xingxing who was sneering and the outrageous Ms. Sasa, then he looked at the aggrieved Alian and Eve who was comforting her. He finally turned his gaze to the annoyed little loli. “Chen Rui, help me get the music box, okay?” The little loli leaned in and whispered, “It’s my sister’s birthday early next month. I wanted to give it to my sister as a gift.” Then only Chen Rui realized the reason why Alice insisted on buying the music Rubik’s cube. After thinking about it, he said, “Little princess, do you remember the stories that I told you? The villains who forcibly deprive others of their beloved things just for his own benefit. For instance, a shameless lord not only robbed another lord’s territory, but he also forced the lord’s wife to serve him often, and he finally poisoned the poor lord. That shameless bastard’s name is called…”

“Zhao Kuangyi!” The little loli had raised her fist with a look of deep disgust and hatred.

Chen Rui nodded, “That poor lord… Uh, what is his name?”

“Is it Li Yu?” A surprised voice sounded. It was actually Eve. Although the 2 voices were not very loud, the dark elf family had a very keen sense of hearing. Compared with the “toy”, the older Eve liked stories more. Hearing this impressive story, she couldn’t help but interject.

“Have you heard of this story before?” The little loli was taken aback. She frowned and looked at Chen Rui again.

Chen Rui just remembered that he seemed to have told this story to Alian and Eve before. He quickly explained, “These stories are far-reaching. Many people have heard it before.”

The little loli nodded. She asked Eve, unwilling to give in, “Have you heard of Chinese Paladin?”

This was the little loli’s favorite story which was based on the first edition plot of the classic game, The Legend of Sword and Fairy, in Chen Rui’s mind.

Before Eve spoke, Alian interjected, “It’s the story of the combination of the Moon Worshipping Lord and the water demonic beasts, then Ling Er and the water demonic beasts died together?”

“You have also heard of this…” Alice was stunned. Suddenly her eyes rolled, “I have heard of 3 endings, and the demonic beasts round is just 1 of them.”

“There are 3 endings?” As loyal fans of Chinese Paladin, Eve and Alian asked in unison. They looked expectant.

Ms. Sasa, who was also a fan, also interjected, “Is it a lie?”

“I swear by the name of the Lucifer Royal Family, it’s definitely not a lie!” the little loli said angrily, “Have you heard of the Demon War of the 3 Empires and the Journey to the West: Havoc in Heaven?”

“I’ve only heard 3 episodes of the Demon War of the 3 Empires.” Alian asked curiously, “How many have you heard?”

The little loli finally found something to brag about, and she smiled proudly, “The complete version!”

Alian’s eyes lit up, “So amazing?”

Ms. Sasa also came over, “Quickly tell us about what happened to that top demon general, Lü Bu, and the top beauty, Diao Chan…”

The Demon War of the 3 Empires was adapted from the Romance of the 3 Kingdoms. It was the story Chen Rui told Alice and Athena when he first crossovered. Due to time issues, Alian and the others only listened to a part of it.

In the blink of an eye, several girls who were ready to fight just now suddenly had a chattering discussion. Ms. Sasa, who had the most radical attitude, was the most eager to discuss. It was rare for Alice to encounter these people of the same age who disregard her princess status and have common topics, so she also seemed happy. They suddenly forget the unhappiness just now.

Chen Rui smiled bitterly and shook his head. He said to Master Xingxing, “It seems that this is just a small misunderstanding between the girls, isn’t it? Master?”

Master Xingxing didn’t even know that the sheriff in front of him was the mechanic genius that he and his friend, Skye, valued most. He had never dared to offend the officials and nobles, but this incident was obviously just a small misunderstanding as the other party said, so the dark master goblin simply nodded. Even though he still didn’t speak, his face finally looked eased.

The people around dispersed after they saw that there was no show to watch.

“Okay, little princess, we still have something to do today, so we must go first. We can discuss with your new friends when we find an opportunity next time.” Chen Rui interjected. Actually, he didn’t want Alice to reveal more stories that would cause Alian, Eve and the others to go back to the source and cause unnecessary trouble. He was scared by Ms. Yini previously.

The little loli finally recovered her mind. When she thought of today’s most important “trip”, she quickly stopped the topic.

“That… Princess Alice, can you tell us next time?” It was Alian who spoke.

Alice’s gaze flicked across Alian’s flat chest, and she suddenly lit up, “Definitely! When I come back from outside this time, we can often play together!”

Alian and Eve looked at each other joyfully; Ms. Sasa also said happily, “We can play beast battle chess together. I still have a lot of magic items!”

“En en!” Alice’s big purple eyes brightened, and she nodded repeatedly.

Alian hesitated for a moment and touched the music Rubik’s cube in her hand. She finally gritted her teeth and handed it over, “This…”

Alice shook her head, “Brother Chen Rui was right just now. I can’t ask for my friend’s favorite things. My sister wouldn’t want such gifts. I will find better birthday gifts.

When Alice finished speaking, she waved goodbye to her 3 new friends. She held Chen Rui and left the magic shop to return to the palace.

There was a wyvern in the outer courtyard of the palace. It was the mount to go to Mountain Xilang this time.

Alice was not in a hurry to leave. She said with a face of claiming credit for herself, “I was reasonable just now, right? Shouldn’t I be rewarded?”

“Not bad.” Chen Rui smiled and nodded. He patted the little loli’s head. Alice showed a delighted appearance. She looked around and there was no one. Her spring-like fingers pointed toward her cheek. It was a signal for him to kiss her as a “reward.”

This the little loli is getting bolder and bolder. This is the palace that is under your sister’s watch!

Besides, isn’t there a 3-year agreement? There are still more than 2 years…

Chen Rui had no choice but to use the fake daze method of the fairy dragon. He pretended not to see it. Alice’s original face was only a little blush, but now it was really flushed: I offered myself, yet this unromantic guy is actually pretending to be dazed!

Alice refused to give in. She forced her face in front of Chen Rui. The girl’s unique fragrance penetrated into his nostrils. Chen Rui inexplicably remembered the scene of the first kiss after being knocked by the stick. His heartbeat was a little fast. In the blink of an eye, almost 2 years have passed. This little girl is a little taller, and she is almost 15 years old. The size of the chest that she has always cared about is actually a bit beginning to take shape, but the little loli is mostly surrounded by the so-called “big breasts aliens”. That is why she is so persistent in pursuing the “breast enhancement secrets.”

For those who had a special hobby of “young love”, the little loli was indeed an excellent and delicious meal. Unfortunately, Chen Rui’s eyes, she was more of just a cute little sister with an eccentric spirit. He immediately tilted his head to the other side again, but the little loli’s face appeared in front of him again in an instant. She still maintained that kind of “waiting” posture. I don’t know what “secret technique” she used.

Chen Rui had no choice but to speak, “Little princess, stop making trouble. Don’t you want to travel?”

Alice’s mouth suddenly pursed, “Am I so unattractive? If it’s my sister, I’m afraid you already… Hmph Hmph. Don’t think that I don’t know, you two…”

Chen Rui was very surprised. Only Athena and the other women knew the secrets between me and Shea. When the two of us had a secret rendezvous, it was mostly in that secret small room. I even used my power to carefully inspect the surrounding and found no third person during the intimacy at the council hall. Does the little loli really have any special powers?

Seeing Chen Rui’s look, the little loli confirmed the suspicion in her heart even more. Her mouth pouted even more. In fact, she only witnessed Shea and Chen Rui walking out of the inner courtyard of the palace late at night by chance, but Shea’s mental outlook had changed drastically recently. Especially the closest Alice, who could clearly feel more changes that her sister hid under her appearance. Shea even occasionally smiled. This change was undoubtedly delightful. The little loli was also happy for her sister, but when she thought that this huge change might be related to Chen Rui, she felt a very strange uncomfortable feeling.

At this moment, a familiar voice sounded, “Alice, are you going to leave?”

“Sister!” Alice recovered from the daze. Her face was hot. Fortunately, sister did not notice it just now…

Shea walked over. Although it was her habitual indifferent expression, her gaze flowed with warmth as she touched Alice’s head, “Be careful on the road.”

Alice felt the warmth from her sister’s palm. It was a different warmth from Chen Rui’s touch just now, but it also made her feel comfortable and at ease. Perhaps they were both a warm relationship as well. “Chen Rui, take good care of Alice. You must make her happy.” Shea looked at Chen Rui. The feelings between the 2 of them now could be understood by the gazes of each other. Chen Rui faintly saw a threat that only he would understand in the eyes of the female boss. It should be related to Alice.

I’m innocent! I really don’t have any other thoughts about the little loli. At most, I have an intent on the little loli’s sister.······

When the little loli heard the word “happy”, she lowered his head, and her eyes were red suddenly.

Chen Rui couldn’t kiss or have other affectionate behaviors to the female boss in front of Alice, so he nodded his head respectfully, “Don’t worry. Alice, let’s go.”

Alice bit her lip lightly. She sat on the wyvern with Chen Rui, and she suddenly said, “Sister, can we be together forever?”

When Shea looked at her sister’s gleaming eyes, the coldness on her face finally melted. The corners of her mouth lifted to gently form a tender smile, “Forever and ever.”

“En!” Alice’s eyes were glittering. She instantly seemed refreshed. A powerful aura burst out, and she returned to the high-spirited little loli as before. She pointed toward the sky with her arms akimbo, “Then… let’s go, Decepticons!”

Under Chen Rui’s communication, the wyvern flashed its wings in coordination and soared into the sky.

It’s gonna be a long wait for the little loli…

chapters.title: Chapter 465 - The Little Loli’S Night Ambush With A Stick
chapters.body:
Chapter 465 - The Little Loli’S Night Ambush With A Stick

Unlike the “honeymoon trip” in Alice’s imagination, this journey was relatively rushing. It was high-speed flying where even speaking was difficult. However, for the little loli who had always envied Athena and others, she was already satisfied to go out with Chen Rui.

This Demon King wyvern was fast. It set off at noon and arrived in the black rainforest in the evening. The black rainforest had become the secret base of the wyvern legion.

In fact, Chen Rui brought the entire wyvern tribe from the Silent Night Wetland. He had been through life and death with them. In the eyes of the wyverns headed by the Wyvern King Galen, Chen Rui was the only person who could truly be trusted. Especially now this friend’s strength had reached the level that the wyverns could look up to. It was no exaggeration to say that with Chen Rui’s order, the wyverns would immediately launch fatal attacks to even the so-called wyvern knights who were with them day and night.

Alice was very interested in the wyvern previously, but after several flying experiences, her excitement gradually faded. This time she was unwilling to enter the base to rest, but proposed to camp in the jungle.

Chen Rui had to agree. After a picnic meal, he took out the magic tent and chose a hillside as a place to sleep on.

“Wow! This tent is amazing! It’s so big inside and has everything!”

“I can also see the outside clearly like it’s transparent. From the outside… Eh, I can’t see the inside?”

“This ground is so comfortable.”

Chen Rui surprisingly looked at the little loli as she hugged the pillow and rolled on the carpet like a roller, “Alice, what are you doing?”

“I am practicing.” The little loli rolled again, and she returned to the soft bedding.

“Practice?” Alice hugged the big pillow; her little face blushed. It was either because of the exercise or shyness, “Uhmm… roll the sheets.” [1]

Roll the sheets? Chen Rui’s forehead was cold and sweaty. He found that he could not keep up with the little loli’s wild thinking, “Stop playing, have a good rest now. I will help you keep watch outside.”

The little loli’s big eyes widened a little round, “Are you not sleeping here?”

Sleeping here? Rolling the sheets with you?

If Athena or Shea knows this, I’m afraid that my ability to roll the sheets will be abolished…

The most important thing is that my feeling for the little loli is more like a little sister. I really have no inappropriate intent in that regard.

Chen Rui immediately shook his head, “Of course, this is the jungle. There are demonic beasts. There must be someone to keep watch at night. Okay, it’s getting late. Go to bed. We will leave early tomorrow morning and try to arrive at Mountain Xilang at noon the day after tomorrow.”

Chen Rui didn’t give Alice a chance to say more. After speaking, he got up and left the magic tent. He chose a big stone, laid a blanket on the ground, and pretended to fall asleep on the stone.

The little loli pouted her little red mouth as she stared at the unromantic guy outside the tent with big eyes and dissatisfaction. No, if he is really that dumb, why would Athena and Kia like him? Also, sister seems…

(Is it because of the size of my breasts or because he doesn’t like me at all?)

The little loli, who was very depressed, hugged the pillow and turned over and over again. This was not called rolling the sheets, it was tossing around on the sheets, unable to sleep

The moonlight was getting darker. Chen Rui closed his eyes lightly. His senses spread all over. Every movement within 100 meters was under his control.

I remember that when I went to Mountain Xilang with Athena, I also camped here. At that time, we encountered the beast swarm and devil fruit. We also ran into the ghost dragon that Dodo disguised as. At that time, I seem to be holding Athena’s hand for the first time. Then we went to Mountain Xilang, and a series of unforgettable events happened. The biggest gain is to find the woman I love most.

During the reminiscence, he suddenly heard the sound of movement. It was actually coming from the direction of the tent. The magic tent was originally soundproof, but a figure had sneaked out of the tent now.

Even if Chen Rui closed his eyes and didn’t use the [Analytical Eyes], he also knew the person who was approaching him by tip-toeing.

His eyes opened slightly, and he saw the thin figure wearing a skirt under the moonlight slowly approaching. She seemed to be holding a stick in her hand: No way!

Chen Rui was familiar with this stick. This scene seemed to happen in the Blue Lake…

This trick again?

His cold sweat broke out all of a sudden.

The little loli held the stun stick that was probably from Old Gauss while carefully approaching Chen Rui who was “asleep” on the rock. Chen Rui could already hear her nervous breathing clearly.

The little loli came to Chen Rui, and she seemed to hesitate. She finally lifted the stick slowly. Chen Rui suddenly turned over. The little loli fled and drilled into the tent at an unconventional speed like a frightened bird.

Chen Rui shook his head secretly. He did not want to embarrass the little loli, so he continued to pretend to be asleep. However, the magic tent could see the outside scene. Perhaps because the target did not “wake up”, after a while, a small head appeared from the tent again. She carefully observed for a while, and she slowly crawled out.

Are you done? Chen Rui’s body was already covered with waterfall-like sweat.

Although he could really pretend to be dizzy like last time, then let the little loli “molest” him, but his inability to control it would cause more serious consequences. Besides, it was not ideal to continue like this.

Once again, when the stick was lifted high, Chen Rui suddenly sneezed and “woke up” unexpectedly. He looked at the little loli who suddenly bounced back with her hands behind her back, “Alice, why are you still not sleeping?”

“That…” Alice didn’t expect Chen Rui to be “awakened” by an irritating sneeze at the critical moment. Her stun stick operation was almost exposed, so she was stuttering, seemingly nervous.

The little loli had secretly kept the stick behind her back into the space bracelet. Then she had an idea, “I… can’t sleep. I want to accompany you to keep watch!”

Chen Rui yawned, “There are no 2 people keeping watch. Go to bed.”

“I really can’t sleep,” Alice walked over and sat down beside him.

It seemed that the little loli really insisted on staying here. If she couldn’t do it secretly, she did it openly instead.

Chen Rui asked helplessly, “Then, my little princess Royal Highness, how can you fall asleep?”

This title made the little loli’s eyes brighten, “Well… Uh, I remember that my sister would tell me a story every night before going to bed when I was young. I heard that my mother did the same to her when she was a child, but unfortunately, my mother died very early. I don’t remember what she looked like. Later, my sister never told me any more stories.”

This “later” should refer to Shea being forced by his father, Crown Prince Grimm, to be the successor of the lord. Chen Rui looked at the little loli with a sad expression and sighed, “Your sister is actually not easy.”

“I know…” Alice nodded. She glanced at Chen Rui secretly. “Do you like Athena or Kia more? Or… sister’s type?”

“Uh…” Chen Rui knew that the little loli had guessed some of his relationship with Shea. Faced with this kind of profound problem that could easily cause contradictions, he had no choice but to say, “All are good… You’re still young, you will understand later.”

“I’m not young anymore. I’m almost 15 years old!” The little loli said unrelentlessly. She suddenly thought that he seemed to have said before that he likes older girls. “Um, I will grow up eventually. Our agreement still has 2 years, 2 months and 8 days to go!”

Chen Rui was a little ashamed. It turns out that this girl has been counting down accurately.

The little loli rubbed the fringe of her skirt. She plucked up her courage to ask, “Uhm… You haven’t answered yet, which type do you like best? I can learn…”

“Fool, 2 years is a long way to go. Why do you think so much now?” Chen Rui smiled slightly when he saw the little loli’s dissatisfied expression, “What’s more, in my heart, Alice is Alice. You are unique. You don’t need to imitate others. In other words, my favorite Alice is herself.”

“Just be myself?” The little loli thought she had misheard, and she asked in a daze.

Chen Rui nodded, “I should add on. Just be yourself relaxedly and happily without deliberately imitating anyone.

“Really?” The little loli’s eyes had little stars, and she slowly stood up. She blushed when she suddenly thought of a key question. She asked again, “Even if my breasts are not as comparable to Athena and others… you like them too?”

This breast size… seems to have nothing to do with liking a person or not. However, judging from Athena, Kia, Zola and Shea, the breast sizes belonged to the “great” type… It seemed like in little loli’s mind, this assumption was not groundless.

Chen Rui wiped his sweat again, but he nodded solemnly, “Well, but we still need to wait for 2 years…”

Before Chen Rui finished speaking, the little loli had already jumped on his body. He was kissed hard on his cheek forcefully. After the kiss, the little loli rapidly jumped down with the agility power that was completely incompetent with her Intermediate Demon level. She said in a spirited expression, “Alright, now you are casted by my magic seal! If you dare to flirt around outside, I will cut your roots of right and wrong [2]! Oh, brother, what is the root of right and wrong?” Chen Rui immediately rolled his eyes: That sentence is obviously directly copied from a line of an adult novel. She is still asking for a noun explanation!

“Okay, stop making trouble. We have to hurry up tomorrow morning, so let’s cover this blanket well. I will tell you a little story before going to bed. You must have a good night’s sleep.”

“En.” The little loli obediently sat down leaning on him, “It should be a nice story.”

“Did you see the stars in the sky? Between the stars, there are many stories…” Chen Rui began to describe some constellations. Although the stars of the Demon Realm were very different from those seen on the earth, Alice still listened enthusiastically as if that kind of constellation really existed.

At the beginning, the little loli still interjected to ask questions from time to time, but then her voice became smaller and smaller. Her breathing became longer and even, and her whole body slowly leaned on Chen Rui’s leg.

Her long eyelashes gently closed down, covering her beautiful eyes. The sleeping girl’s young and beautiful face showed a serene smile which looked very peaceful under the purple moonlight.

While gently stroking her silky long golden hair, Chen Rui slowly closed his eyes.

[1] Roll the sheets means sleeping with someone intimately.

[2] Roots of right and wrong refers to mutilation.

By the way, where the hell was Dodo? How long did he need to complete the mutation?

chapters.title: Chapter 466 - Gift
chapters.body:
Chapter 466 - Gift

After about a day and a half, the 2 finally arrived at Mountain Xilang. After experiencing the night ambush , Alice did not add to the chaos. There seemed to be a little more tacit understanding between the 2.

After Alice learned some little secrets that “only the closest and trustworthy people could know”, such as some “special abilities” that Chen Rui possessed through the “grand master inheritance”, she seemed quite excited.

In fact, Alice would know these “secrets” sooner or later because of her cleverness and the gradual increase in experience. Chen Rui took advantage of the situation to ask her to keep secret about the “stories” and other aspects. The little loli naturally nodded.

Nowadays, Mountain Xilang had undergone considerable changes. The original defense forces of the West Road had been expanded to the Dark Moon’s third legion, Moon Shadow Legion. With the efforts of Legion Leader Tim, the scale and strength had faintly caught up with the other 2 legions, Red Blood and Flame Light.

The Moon Shadow Legion successfully built a large-scale military fortress in Mountain Walan. They also opened up and built a new town named Town Walan. Although there were not many residents, this town was the must pass road of the businessmen from the Dark Shadow Empire to Dark Moon City. Coupled with the “magic dust” land improvement and the construction of “direct roads”, the population growth and the town’s development speed were quite gratifying.

In terms of individual strength, Tim, who was average in training qualifications, advanced to the Demon King level under the effect of the black potions and devil fruit. He was considered to have the basic qualifications of a legion leader.

The fastest improvement was Tim’s wife, Lysa, who had reached the intermediate stage of the Great Demon King. The overall strength of the Medusa tribe had also risen to a new level with the help of the devil fruits. They were also equipped with the most sophisticated weapons and armor. Chen Rui was naturally not stingy toward his own subordinates. The medusa tribe had become the strongest bow army in the Dark Moon. It was enough to become the demon of the magician legion on the battlefield.

“This is medusa?” The little loli, who followed Chen Rui into the fortress secretly, looked at several medusa elites led by Lysa in surprise. She hid behind Chen Rui with some timidity, but her eyes flashed with curiosity.

“Princess Alice, don’t worry. This is my wife, Lysa, the matriarch of the medusa tribe.” Tim was the heir of the Dark Moon’s Saiful Family. He was naturally an old acquaintance of the little loli.

“Little princess Royal Highness.” Lysa saluted Alice. Her Demon Realm language had a snake-like “hiss” sound, but it was still understandable. Under the current training, the medusas had basically mastered the language to communicate with normal demons. The real reason for Lysa’s salute to Alice was not only because of Alice’s princess status, but more importantly, she was brought by the “master”, and their relationship seemed to be very close.

“Hello.” Alice stepped out with Chen Rui’s encouragement. She saluted back. After some talking, she became more courageous. Lysa knew that Chen Rui and Tim had something to discuss, so she found an excuse to bring the little loli out of the room.

Tim immediately began to report to Chen Rui, “Master, the molochs, geodragons and wildbeests that were secretly purchased from the Dark Shadow Empire have already begun training. The cavalry brigade has begun to take shape. In terms of ordnance, all the weapons and armors are in place. We are preparing to transport them to the Warlock Fortress. Also, Tieke is a real ordnance genius. He is now the Chief Ordnance Technician of the Moon Shadow Legion. He has modified the handheld crossbow to launch 6 consecutive times. The magic crossbow carriage is also developed successfully. It can fire poisonous explosive crossbows. Although its lethality is inferior to that of the Magic Crystal Cannon, its mobility, firing frequency and production difficulty are far superior to that of the Magic Crystal Cannon. It is now in mass production…”

Chen Rui didn’t expect that minotaur Tieke, whom he rescued nonchalantly, could reach such an altitude. He nodded approvingly, “The weapons and armors are not urgent. After the magic crossbow carriages and even crossbows are manufactured, we’ll transport them to the Warlock Fortress together. However, this batch of ordnance is of great importance. You need to pass by the Red Spirit Estate, the capital and the White Feather Estate along the way. You must pay attention to safety and make no mistakes.”

“I understand, master.” Tim asked again, “Excuse me for overstepping the rules. Master’s purpose of coming to Mountain Xilang this time, is it to go to the Earth Realm of the Earth Elementals?”

“Yes, the most important purpose of my trip this time is to meet the Earth Elemental King.”

Tim smiled slightly, “Master, I happen to have something to report to you. I was instructed by the Earth Elemental King to use the Fountain of Vitality of the earth elemental’s Earth Realm as the base point to send magicians to secretly build a water element teleportation portal under the Walan Fortress that can reach the Earth Palace with the fastest speed. If there is any emergency in the future, we can directly seek asylum from the earth elemental.”

“Teleportation portal?” Chen Rui showed a knowing look. At the beginning, he asked the Earth Elemental King to take care of Tim and the medusa tribe. It seemed that the Earth Elemental King attached great importance to this. He even opened the Earth Realm to outsiders. This way, he didn’t have to enter from the underground of Xilang Mine to go to the Earth Palace. He could also reach the Earth Realm directly from Walan Fortress without hurrying for a few days.

“Very well. Get Alice here, I will take her to the Earth Palace now.”

“You are going with the little princess?” Tim was a little surprised, but he didn’t ask much. The person who can go to the Earth Palace with the master must be quite close to him. Previously it was Athena, then Kia, and now the little princess Alice.

It seems that the relationship between master and the Dark Moon’s little princess Royal Highness is by no means simple. Master is really amazing. He can even win over such an eccentric little princess Royal Highness…

If Tim knew that the “master” actually won over the elder sister of the “little princess Royal Highness”, who was the boss of the Dark Moon, Iceberg Princess Royal Shea, he would be extremely in awe.

In fact, Alice had heard Athena selectively talked about adventures in the underground world long ago. This included medusas, taurens and earth elementals.

Alice had seen the taurens in the Blue Lake Mountain Range. This time she specifically asked Chen Rui to take her to see medusas and earth elementals again. Considering the behavior of the little loli after the night ambush and Shea deliberately instructed him to make her sister happy when they left, Chen Rui finally agreed to her request.

In general, the little loli was not a loose mouth. When he pretended to be unconscious previously, she kept the secret very well.

“Sister Lysa, let me tell you, Tim used to have a dozen girlfriends.” Chen Rui heard Alice’s voice. “I remember there was an arrogant Sona. I mixed some spicy powder into her lipstick. As a result, hehe…”

“Good job, little princess Royal Highness” Lysa rolled her eyes at Tim. “Don’t you agree? A lover of a dozen women… Sir Tim?”

Since Tim’s interesting past was revealed by Alice, he could only smile apologetically. Chen Rui shrugged: It seems that this blackhearted little loli only has a tighter mouth at certain times…

After the interlude, Tim led Chen Rui and Alice to a basement. There was a large-scale pool and a mirror-like empty door. When Tim used the magic stone to activate the teleportation, the empty door suddenly became wave-like blue which appeared to be rippling. Chen Rui took Alice’s hand and walked in. There was a cool feeling. Their figures twisted for a while, and they disappeared.

After the feeling of teleportation disappeared, the two figures appeared in a scene shining with various lights. It was the Earth Realm of the earth elementals. In front of it was a fountain. The teleportation portal was two-way. An earth elemental was designated to guard on this side. When he saw Chen Rui, he saluted him respectfully. At the same time, a guard went to King’s Chamber to report to King Moore.

The little loli held Chen Rui’s hand. She looked in amazement at this strange underground world as well as those strong elementals whose facial features were very vague, and their body seemed to be made of rocks.

“Chen Rui, my friend, we meet again.” A figure emerged from the ground in front of him. It was the Earth Elemental King Moore, and Alice was taken aback.

“Moore, my friend.” Chen Rui bowed slightly, “This is Alice, the little princess of the Dark Moon Estate, my…”

“Fiancee.” The little loli suddenly intervened boldly. She generously saluted Moore under Chen Rui’s stunned gaze, “Alice. Lucifer, my pleasure to meet Your Highness.”

When did you become my fiancée? This little loli is too good at taking advantage of it! In front of the Earth Elemental King, she actually…

Moore’s voice sounded, “Princess Alice, since you are Chen Rui’s fiancée, then you are the closest friend of the earth elementals. On behalf of all earth elementals, I would like to extend my highest respect and warmest welcome to you.”

Alice saw Chen Rui had an unsightly expression, and she quickly said, “Thank you for the hospitality of Your Highness. I think you two should have something important to talk about. Then, please allow me to visit this amazing Earth Realm.”

The little loli really has abundant experiences. She speaks politely and shows the royal family’s demeanor. At least, this superficial disguise is very successful, but her identity of the “fiancee”…

“Of course” Moore nodded, “Tag, take Princess Alice around for a walk.”

Tag was an earth elemental elite. He had mastered the Demon Realm language now, so he immediately led Alice away.

Moore smiled slightly, “A beautiful girl who is very understanding, isn’t she? My friend.”

Chen Rui replied vaguely, and he rolled his eyes secretly: Perhaps understanding is one of the hidden attributes of the little loli, but just now… she was definitely blackhearted!

A stone with a lightly colored light appeared in Chen Rui’s hand, “I’m here today to give you the most important gift, Moore.”

“Fertile Yuan Soil!” When Chen Rui took out the stone, Moore’s eyes glowed with ecstasy, “You actually found it!”

“Now it’s yours, my friend.”

Moore took Fertile Yuan Soil with both hands, then he raised it high. His rock-steady hand actually trembled with excitement. In the hands of the Earth Elemental King, the Fertile Yuan Soil suddenly emitted a dazzling strong light. The entire Earth Realm was covered with a layer of color. All the earth elementals’ bodies had a faint fluorescent light.

In Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes], the data of the Earth Elemental King began to change. His Comprehensive Strength Assessment changed from S to S+. The rest of the earth elementals’ strength breath was also changing.

No doubt, Fertile Yuan Soil had its maximum value for the earth elementals. If it fell into the hands of those like Ms. Black Dragon, it would only be a jewel in the dust.

Chen Rui was taken aback and said with joy, “Great! You reached the peak stage of the Demon Overlord so soon!”

“Your vision is really admirable. In fact, I am just restoring my lost power. I can further improve and stabilize.” There was an uncontrollable joy in Moore’s voice, “3 months! In just 3 months time, I will fully unleash the power of Fertile Yuan Soil, and my strength will be completely stabilized. The entire earth elemental group will undergo a real qualitative change. There will also be Demon Emperor-level earth elementals in the future.”

Chen Rui nodded and suddenly thought of something, “Moore, I have a small request, can you give me some Fertile Yuan Soil. It is one of the necessary materials for an important weapon.”

Fertile Yuan Soil was an indispensable material for the artifact “Secret Shadow”. Previously, Chen Rui didn’t dare to do as he wished like Ms. Black Dragon because he was afraid it would affect Moore’s recovery. He just brought it up in front of Moore now.

“My friend, your frankness and sincerity touched me. This is originally the treasure you brought.” Moore exclaimed with emotion and extracted a portion of little light on his hand, “This is part of the original Fertile Yuan Soil. It has been activated by my soil element’s power. It can revive wilting plants as well as double the growth rate and yield of crops. As long as you leave half of it, it can slowly regenerate every time. Take this little gift as a return for the precious gift you gave me.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, and he quickly took it over. He felt that the breath of the soil in his hand was completely different from its previous origin. He was secretly surprised. It could bring plants back to life and continue to regenerate. It was indeed a desirable treasure. The feature of doubling the yield should be able to be used in the Galaxy Garden to double the aura flower and aura fruit inside. After retrieving the earth elemental heart, the Galaxy Garden once again welcomed the “tailor-made” treasure.

Obviously, only the Earth Elemental King could activate and separate the origin of Fertile Yuan Soil. If Chen Rui swallowed Fertile Yuan Soil in the first place, he would not get this special effect of the origin.

“Besides, there is another gift for your fiancée.” Moore looked at the little loli who was coming here. A black and white crystal appeared in his hand. It seemed to contain powerful energy.

“This is the power transferred to me after Glorfin exploded himself back then. It should have been left on him by a formidable enemy. This power is the light and dark power of the Lucifer Royal Family. The power of the caster was the most powerful peak stage of the Demon Overlord I have ever seen. He has even faintly approached the Demon Supremo level. This power of light and darkness has always limited my strength. Even after his death, it still existed stubbornly. Finally, I got rid of it with the power of Fertile Yuan Soil and refined it into crystals. If the power of this crystal is completely absorbed, the [Heart of Light and Dark] of the Lucifer Royal Family can be mutated. Even her entire strength can be directly elevated. Even those who have no such talent of awakening can still awaken their talent because of it, but unfortunately, it can only be used once.”

As Moore said so, he handed the crystal to the surprised Alice. Just now, he had deliberately made Alice hear him clearly, “Please accept this gift, Chen Rui’s fiancee, the earth elemental’s forever friend.”

Alice was stunned as if she thought of something. She accepted the light and dark crystal like it was a rare treasure. She even forgot to thank him. She showed a pleasant surprise, “I finally found the best gift for my sister!”

Chen Rui was stunned. The Demon Realm advocated power most. Even the lowly demons would not miss any opportunity to improve themselves. Moreover, this light and dark crystal that should originate from the Lord of Midnight Sun contained majestic power. It could make a Lucifer Royal Family member like the little loli to directly advance. It was unexpected that the little loli first thought of her sister and not herself.

Seeing Alice’s heartfelt excitement without any pretentiousness, Chen Rui didn’t even explain the “fiancee” matter to the Earth Elemental King. He patted her head lightly. He smiled and said, “Indeed, it’s the best gift.”

Maybe with this power, Shea could wield the Sword of Fallen Angel that was sealed, but she had to get it from Obsidian first…

chapters.title: Chapter 467 - Plants Trade Fair
chapters.body:
Chapter 467 - Plants Trade Fair

Chen Rui left the Earth Realm with Alice.

During this period, Chen Rui and the Earth Elemental King talked about a series of related matters including the Mountain Seckred, Demi-God powerhouse, and the mysterious Flower of Abyss and so on, but Moore did not give him an answer for most of his questions. He just stated that Chen Rui should focus on improving his strength. When he reached the corresponding level, many answers would naturally be revealed.

Chen Rui did not ask anymore. The Earth Elemental King had an inheritance from previous generations. He undoubtedly knew some important inside stories. The reason why he kept it secret must be well-intentioned. He just wanted Chen Rui to focus on training, just like Zola temporarily hid the secret of the silver box.

Chen Rui faintly felt that in the “gap” between the peak stage of the Demon Overlord to Demi-God, there should be some territories or secrets that couldn’t be taught by outsiders, but now his strength was indeed far behind. Therefore, he should accept the kindness of friend and lover to concentrate on improving his strength.

It took 3 months for the earth elemental to absorb the Fertile Yuan Soil and “evolve”. After 3 months, the Earth Elemental King would go to the Dead Sea to meet with the Water Elemental King to obtain what was left behind when the previous Earth Elemental King died. His power would be further enhanced.

The elementals would not interfere with external affairs easily. Chen Rui promised not to involve the earth elementals in the disputes between the empires, but they only had to provide some protection and help when necessary.

After finishing the Fertile Yuan Soil matter, Chen Rui left the Walan Fortress, but he did not return directly to the Dark Moon. Instead, he headed west to the Town Leia because the little loli learned from Tim that Town Leia happened to hold a special plants trade fair which was very lively these days. Therefore, at the little loli’s request, Chen Rui agreed to bring her to stroll around.

After all, he stood her up in the Bloody Vine Flower Estate last time. In this trip, besides the night ambush and pretending to be his fiancée, the little loli’s performance was still fine. He just allowed her to be happy for once.

Seeing Chen Rui agreed to the request, the little loli jumped jubilantly. The 2 did not take the wyvern, but they disguised slightly and headed west through the main road.

Compared to the time when Chen Rui launched a surprise attack on the Town Leia, the road leading to the Dark Shadow Empire to the west had been renovated and the road was greatly widened. There were 3 stages of checkpoints along the way which were guarded by the Moon Shadow Army to protect the business travelers. Initially, there had been incidents of wage cut and embezzlement of public funds. After a few soldiers were killed and executed by Tim, the soldiers at the checkpoint were all disciplined. The good atmosphere formed after this reformation also increased the number of business travelers.

The partnership between the Dark Moon and Dark Shadow Empire was well known. Although the border checkpoints between the 2 empires were very tightly guarded, there were no excessive checks or difficulties for businessmen and travelers. Chen Rui and the little loli were disguised as brothers and sisters. They entered Town Leia smoothly.

Initially, the little loli’s proposal was to pretend to be husband and wife, but Chen Rui did not agree with the idea of this little girl who dared to do great mischief. Their statuses were changed to brother and sister. However, along the way, the “sister” was like a glue, sticking to her “brother”. This caused some passersby to cast strange glances.

The temperature in this area was relatively low, but Chen Rui’s arm was sweating. This showed the skill of the little glue girl. He was a little grateful that he was just acting as a “brother and sister”. If it was “father and daughter”, the little loli koala would probably hang on him all day long, and he would suffer from cervical spondylitis.

The 2 entered Town Leia smoothly. The “plants trade fair” had already started for 2 days. As Tim said, Town Leia was very lively at this time. Half of the Dark Shadow Empire’s territory was forests which were plant-rich. The “plants trade fair” was held every 3 years.

Generally, a large merchant would display the plant samples provided by various origins and merchants in a fixed venue. Buyers could directly purchase or order corresponding finished products or seeds at a cheap “origin price”. The large merchants get a certain commission and provide the risk and credit protection for both the buyers and sellers.

The large merchant also bought some special plants. All in all, it was a special plant event.

The location of the plants trade fair was different from time to time. Town Leia, which was adjacent to the Dark Moon, was chosen this time. It also wanted to take advantage of the business cooperation with the Dark Moon to boost its business. The reality proved that this choice was very successful.

The exhibition venue was a centralized open space temporarily set up in a plaza. The scope was very large. Several entrances and exits were guarded by soldiers. There were also patrols to maintain order in the trade fair.

Chen Rui and the little loli saw all kinds of exotic plants in the trade fair. There were corresponding numbers and brief introductions in front of the exhibits. Those interested in buying could write down the numbers and then go to the transaction hall to negotiate.

There were various plants. Not only the little loli, but Chen Rui was also dazzled.

Some could emit a strong odor to chase away high rank demonic beasts, some could produce melodious music, some had the camouflage effect of a chameleon when held in the hand, and some could make people walk on the mud without sinking. There were also many dangerous carnivorous or blood-sucking plants that were isolated by corresponding magic circles to ensure safety.

Chen Rui was interested in some mutated crops which could provide far more yield and energy supply than the Dark Moon’s existing crops. Although the growth conditions were indicated to be harsher, the Dark Moon’s secret food base had the highest level of refined magic dust of strong “magic soil”. It should be able to be planted smoothly. Not only that, the initial super-high harvest would also double again, greatly increasing the food reserves.

The little loli was interested in 4 things. The first was mutated Lala Potato powder which would make one fart continuously when eaten in food; the second was the golden fruit with a mellow smell but extremely sour taste; the third was honesty flower. It did not have a special fragrance, but the flower’s fragrance would give people a special excitement effect which made it easy for people to tell the truth. This kind of flower was relatively rare and cost 100 black crystal coins. The last one was even rarer. It was a delicate and beautiful flower that roared like demonic beasts and sprayed an itchy liquid. It was called the roaring flower.

Chen Rui was secretly embarrassed. These 4 gadgets are all pranking plants. The attributes of the little loli are not only cute and understanding, but she is also blackhearted. I remember that when I first met her that year, I was pranked by her. It seems that I will suffer again when going back this time.

Despite this, Chen Rui still couldn’t stand the little loli’s eagerly begging eyes. He promised to help her buy it.

In fact, let alone Chen Rui, the little loli herself was now a wealthy boss. The 100 black crystal coins were indeed nothing, but the gifts Chen Rui bought and gave her had a completely different meaning. The excited little loli took advantage of the unprepared “brother” and launched a surprise attack. She kissed him on his face.

Chen Rui was surprised the 4 items of the little loli were bought smoothly in the transaction hall, but he encountered obstacles for the seeds of the mutated crops that he wanted. Those seeds belonged to special restricted products. They must be authorized by the lord of the Dark Shadow Empire to be eligible for mass purchase.

While Chen Rui was frowning, a group of people walked downstairs in the transaction hall. They surrounded a young girl. Even the mayor of Town Leia, Remont, looked respectful and flattering.

This girl was obviously from a prominent background. She wore a luxurious short dress. She looked youthful and beautiful. She did not panic under the attention of so many people, and she looked generous and elegant in her speech and manners.

As soon as the girl appeared, Chen Rui’s gaze was immediately attracted. Alice noticed Chen Rui’s gaze, and she looked at the girl in dissatisfaction.

The young girl was not much older than Alice. The pure and lovely temperament was somewhat similar, but her appearance was a bit inferior. It was just that Alice was “disguised” and looked like an ordinary girl now. However, the little loli’s eyes were fixed on the girl’s towering chest, and her fists clenched subconsciously: Why are they so big!

Indeed, the girl’s plump bust was only slightly inferior to Athena and Kia. With this age, she could definitely be described by the words “young girl with huge breasts”.

The little loli had the resentment of being left out: There are so many big breasts aliens in the world. Why am I not one of them?

Chen Rui’s attention to this girl was because she was an “acquaintance” and their relationship was very unusual.

Spiritual link (master-servant link): Celine; Great Demon (mutated).

Celine was the heir of the Custer Family, the top commercial family of the Dark Shadow Empire. Chen Rui participated in the Dark Shadow Empire mechanic contest as the representative of Celine’s brother, Dior. After he emerged in the preliminary contest, he was assassinated by Celine. After the assassination failed, Celine promised him huge benefits and even used her own beauty to seduce him, but Chen Rui remained unmoved. He defeated the duo-specialized master, Horford, who represented Celine in the final. Then, Celine was instructed by Kia’s sister, Fatilu, to lure Chen Rui into a trap. In the end, Chen Rui killed the Great Demon King-level Tapuli and captured Fatilu. Celine promptly expressed surrender, and she signed the master-servant contract.

Speaking of it, he spent a lot of effort to subdue this girl. However, Celine also received the public support of “Master Arthur”, so she became the first heir of the Custer Family as she wished. Her father, Lopez, had now basically handed over most of the family’s power to Celine, Celine did live up to his father’s expectations. Especially in the decision to trade with the Dark Moon, she showed admirable vision by becoming the first business family to form an alliance with the Dark Moon, and she founded the joint chamber of commerce.

With the rise of the Dark Moon, the joint chamber of commerce had become the largest chamber of commerce which possessed various privileges that other families and chambers of commerce did not have. The huge profits that came with it made the rest of the families jealous. Not only the Dark Moon, but under the management of Celine, the Custer Family’s business was booming. Her influence power in the Dark Shadow Empire was also expanding. Not long ago, she was summoned by Catherine the Great, and she was given the opportunity to host the plants trade fair.

Celine was obviously thinner than before. Her baby’s fat was gone, her mental state was extremely hearty, and her gaze showed strong self-confidence from time to time. Although her face and temperament were still a young girl, she still had the vibe of a business woman.

This lady was quietly listening to the compliment from Remont, the mayor of Town Leia, when a voice suddenly sounded in her ears. Her calm face changed slightly as she walked toward Chen Rui’s side.

Chen Rui didn’t look at Celine anymore. He just pretended to be dissatisfied as he shouted to the salesman in the transaction hall, “I will definitely buy these seeds, so let me pay double the price! No, triple!”

The salesman was the best at observing words and expressions. Seeing that Chen Rui was a wealthy customer, he dared not offend Chen Rui. He seemed apologetic, “Sorry, it’s not a question of price…”

Seeing Chen Rui’s voice getting louder and louder, Town Leia Mayor Remont deliberately showed up in front of Celine, and he walked straight over, “Since you come to the trade fair, you must abide by the rules! Otherwise, you will be blacklisted and expelled from Town Leia!”

“You’re just a mayor, what a mighty prestige!” Chen Rui sneered. Remont was about to refute, but his eyes shivered with the faint deterrent in Chen Rui’s eyes. The rest of the cruel words were choked in his throat.

With Remont’s strength of the Demon King level, he naturally didn’t realize that this was the magical effect of the territory. Remont only knew that this person was extraordinary. His background was definitely not average, so Remont didn’t dare to offend him.

At this time, Celine’s voice came over, “Sir, I’m Celine from the Custer Family, the person in charge of this trade fair. Please give me a chance to explain. It’s not that we don’t want to sell to you, but there are special regulations. This type of crop seeds cannot be sold in batches. If sir cannot provide the lord’s authorization certificate, then I can use a small privilege. As long as sir can take out the rare plants we need in exchange, then you can have these seeds.”

“Exchange?” Chen Rui nodded, “It just so happens that I have a lot of rare plants. I wonder what kind of plants Ms. Celine needs?”

“It’s not convenient to talk here, so let’s go to the VIP room upstairs.”

Chen Rui wanted to hear this sentence. Under the gaze of Remont and the others, he followed Celine upstairs with the little loli.

At the VIP room, Celine ordered the guards beside her to retreat and guard the gate. She looked at Alice who was next to Chen Rui. The little loli subconsciously held Chen Rui’s arm tightly.

“Alice, will you go outside and wait for me?”

When the little loli heard that Chen Rui was about to “talk about business” with this big breasted woman alone, she pouted her mouth unhappily, and she finally nodded sensibly. However, when she left, she kissed him in front of Celine in a showing manner. Celine slightly smiled. She ordered the guard at the door to arrange Alice next door and serve her tea as well as snacks.

After the arrangements were made, Celine activated the soundproof magic circle in the VIP room and saluted to Chen Rui, “Greetings, my master.”

Chen Rui nodded, and his face began to change quickly. He changed to the appearance of the Great Demon “Master Arthur”, “Although I haven’t shown up in this period of time, I know what you did. You did a good job. Especially the collaboration with the Dark Moon, you should now be firmly in control of the Custer Family.”

Celine heard the phrase “I know everything you did,” and she secretly shuddered. She knew her life and death were in the hands of the person in front of her, so she immediately replied carefully, “All this is thanks to master.”

“Don’t be humble, your abilities are evident. I need a lot of seeds now, I wonder if you can provide them?”

“Does master really want those seeds?” Celine originally thought it was just an excuse to meet, and she pondered for a moment, “This matter is a little bit difficult. Originally, the restrictions on these seeds were not so strict. It was only after the land was improved that Her Majesty Empress deliberately restricted it as strategic materials and controlled its sale to outsiders. I have a certain quota on hand which can be given to the master. There are about 300 seeds.”

Land improvement? Chen Rui didn’t expect to be caught in his own trap. It seems that Catherine’s restricted sale to outsiders is mainly for the Dark Moon.

Despite the cooperation, the Dark Moon and the Dark Shadow Empire were still in a contest…

chapters.title: Chapter 468 - Elopement
chapters.body:
Chapter 468 - Elopement

No matter how close the cooperation between the empires was, it was ultimately based on interests. Today, they might be close partners, but tomorrow they might stab each other. This was politics.

Sun Quan in the 3 Kingdoms was a very typical example. Sometimes, he united with Shu to resist Cao Cao, while other times he attacked Shu and surrendered to Cao Cao. This repeated several times, but he was also a hero.

Chen Rui frowned, “300 are too few. By the way, you said that I can get them by exchanging plants just now?”

Celine nodded, “This is instructed by Her Majesty Empress. There are only 2 rare fruits that can be exchanged for the seeds. One is the devil pomeg which is extremely rare in the Demon Realm, and the other is Jiu Tian Xuan aura fruit… I have never heard of this fruit before.”

Chen Rui was startled. These two fruits?

The devil pomeg was indeed rare. It had a special buff effect and greatly reduced the risk especially for the Nirvana talent of the Asmodeus Royal Family. When Empress Catherine heard that the devil pomeg in Town Leia was mature, she did not hesitate to come as Christina.

As for the Jiu Tian Xuan aura fruit, it was simply the aura fruit. This name was even used by Chen Rui to fool Catherine. Compared with the devil pomeg, the aura fruit had a stronger buff for Nirvana, but it did not have the special effect of the devil pomeg that suppressed lust. This was also the main reason why Chen Rui was “reverse pushed down” by Catherine in the Silent Night Wetland.

It was obvious that Catherine specifically ordered Celine to exchange seeds for the devil pomeg or aura fruit for Nirvana. Nirvana was actually the strongest bloodline talent of the Asmodeus Royal Family. For every Nirvana, her strength would greatly increase, but the danger and the probability of failure would also increase exponentially. One carelessness would cause death.

The higher the level of Nirvana, the greater the risk. Even if there was the devil pomeg or aura fruit, it was still quite dangerous. In the history of the Asmodeus Royal Family, only one person had completed Nirvana 5 times. There were only a few geniuses who chose to venture Nirvana for the fifth time after completing Nirvana 4 times. In the end, they were all reduced to ashes under the flames of Nirvana.

Catherine had now completed Nirvana 4 times, and her strength had been catching up to top powerhouse, Raizen. By right, she should not take this risk. It was likely that some geniuses of the royal family needed Nirvana to increase their strength or serve as a reserve.

Speaking of the aura fruit and devil pomeg, Chen Rui had a lot in hand. It was not a problem to exchange seeds, but he has a faint hunch in his heart now. Catherine holds the plants trade fair in Town Leia which is adjacent to the Dark Moon. In addition to the advantages of geographical location and popularity, it seems that there is also the intention to “fish” the devil pomeg, but how does she know that she can “fish” the target here?

Maybe it’s just an illusion, but it’s just a matter of obtaining what she needs. After Chen Rui thought for a while, he took out some devil pomegs and gave them to Celine. Celine did not expect that he really had the devil pomeg. She counted that there were as many as 30. She immediately took out a special magic space box and carefully put it in. The devil pomeg would go bad shortly after being picked. This special space equipment must be used to keep it. She didn’t know what method the “master” used. The devil pomeg that “appeared” out of thin air seemed quite fresh.

The number of these devil pomegs had exceeded the expected task. Not only she could complete the task, but she would also be praised by Catherine the Great. Celine was overjoyed in her heart. After asking for the number of seeds, she replied, “Then there is no problem. The number of seeds that master wants is quite large, so it takes about a day to prepare. Does master have any other instructions?”

“Nothing.”

“By the way, the lady just now… Does master like young girls?” Celine thought of the little loli’s behavior just now, and she said to flatter him, “I can arrange everything for master. If master doesn’t mind, I can even… serve master myself.”

Like young girls? These words actually made Chen Rui quite depressed. I am regarded as a strange uncle out of the blue.

“No need.”

Although Celine was not very old, her looks and figure were very attractive, but her deep scheming was still above those old foxes. She was definitely not the type that would settle down after having sex. It might backfire. Moreover, Chen Rui only used the master-servant contract to control her. He had no sexual interest on her.

Celine bit her lip and said, “Master, I also have an intel here which is related to Monroe, the son of the third general, and Fini, the daughter of the royal mechanic master, Rummenigge.”

Chen Rui’s mind shifted. Shea mentioned that the 1,000-men magician legion promised by the lord of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, General Crawford, was already in place, but Monroe who was going to join Flame Legion never appeared. He immediately signaled Celine to continue.

According to Celine’s intel, some time ago, the First General Broc took his father-in-law and his wife to the Jergal Fortress guarded by the Fire Blade Legion based on the reason that his father-in-law, Frentz, was unwell. Soon afterwards, Catherine the Great proposed to marry Fini. Asmodeus, the daughter of Rummenigge who was a senior master of the Mechanic Association to the First General Broc as a concubine.

Broc claimed to have a deep relationship with his wife, Medilu. He refused the marriage from the empress, but Broc asked Catherine the Great to marry Fini to his commander, Loki, as a main wife.

Catherine the Great agreed to Broc’s request. Loki went to the capital to marry Fini. However, at this time, an accident happened. Fini and Monroe, the son of Third General Crawford, disappeared at the same time. The 2 were initially close childhood friends. They probably eloped because of love. Catherine ordered to seal the news before it was spread out.

Then only Chen Rui knew the real reason why Monroe never came to the Dark Moon to report. Catherine’s restrictions on Broc were getting stronger and stronger. It was mainly for Broc’s influence and power in the army. As long as the roots were completely cut off and Broc became a lone force, then it was not difficult to kill Broc.

Broc was obviously aware of the crisis. The fact that he moved Frentz and his daughter to Jergal Fortress had a special meaning. Since the last time Broc was severely injured by Obsidian, Chen Rui didn’t know about Broc’s situation, but he could be sure that Catherine granting the marriage between Fini and Broc was definitely a test. Broc’s proposal for Loki was also a different strategy to avoid it. No matter what the result was, Fini was a victim.

As a royal family member, sometimes she was even more unable to control her own destiny than ordinary people.

Chen Rui was very clear about Monroe’s feelings for Fini, but he did not expect Monroe to make such a move desperately. The next sentence from Celine really surprised Chen Rui, “Monroe and Fini are in Town Leia!”

“How do you know?”

“I accidentally spotted them when they got into my merchant group on the way. I thought they would go to the Dark Moon when they came to Town Leia, but they never left.” Celine hesitated and added, “Besides Monroe and Fini, it seems that there are 2 other people who are very powerful. I’m not sure whether they noticed me…

“Are you afraid that they will impact you or even kill you if they do not leave?” Chen Rui said lightly, “So you want to make use of my power to help you get rid of the threat?”

Chen Rui still had some understanding of Celine’s character. If Monroe didn’t bring 2 threatening powerhouses, Celine would have sent someone to catch Monroe and Fini to claim her merits from the capital. “I’m just asking master for help.” Celine showed a pitiful look, “I’m willing to pay all the price.”

Chen Rui slightly understood the reason Celine took the initiative to offer her service. It was really giving first with a motive. She did not hesitate to use her body as a bargaining chip.

“I currently need some mechanical materials.” Chen Rui handed over a list, “I don’t care what method you use, I want to see these things appear in front of my eyes within 3 days.”

Celine took a look at the list and found that there were a variety of materials on it. The Custer Family had mechanics background, so she was naturally an expert in this. Some materials were scarce. It might be difficult to get them in 3 days, but Celine was relieved because this meant that the owner had already planned to make a move.

What Chen Rui gave to Celine was the materials that the artifact, Secret Shadow, was lacking except the Fertile Yuan Soil. Mainly because it was not convenient for Master Arthur to show up now, otherwise it was not too difficult to obtain these materials if he went to the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association. Chen Rui always remembered that there was still an unsolved mystery on the fifth level of the ancient magic tower of the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association. It might involve a certain prohibited level of territory, but like the secrets of the silver box and the abyss, it was not time to explore such unknown matters now. He should strengthen his own physical strength as soon as possible.

The characteristic of the level was that the stronger the trainer, the harder it was to advance. At the low level, one could rely on hard training to gain strength. At the middle level, talent became more and more important, and those with high talent could get twice the result with half the effort. At the high level, talent and hard training alone could no longer make it. There was a real qualitative change in strength. The accumulation of training was only the basis for advancement. The most important thing was understanding and realization. Even the progress of a small realm required considerable realization.

Chen Rui was currently in this stage. After comprehending the [Summer Territory], his strength had improved significantly. He faintly broke through the early stage of the Demon Emperor, approaching the intermediate stage, but strangely, Phecda’s Experience Value had not changed. It seemed that he had not grasped the true mystery of “Phecda” yet. He needed further understanding in life and in battle.

The chess piece, Celine, was very important to the Dark Moon. Chen Rui didn’t want any changes to the future matriarch of the Custer Family whom he controlled. Moreover, the magician legion of the Dark Moon was Monroe’s guard. Only Monroe could mobilize them. He really had to intervene in this matter this time.

The most upscale Blackberry Hotel in Town Leia was where the Custer Family was staying. There were no other guests besides these VIPs.

In one room, 4 people were discussing in secret.

“Don’t worry, young general. Feyman and I watched you growing up. We are not only your guards, but also relatives. Even if we fight to death, we will protect you and Ms. Fini from the danger!” The speaker was a tall great demon.

“Thank you, Uncle Calder.” The young general was naturally Monroe. Opposite him was Fini, who eloped with him. He immediately nodded, but he looked worriedly at the Great Demon who was sitting on the side, “Uncle Feyman’s injury…”

The Great Demon named Feyman coughed a few times in a low voice, “It’s alright. Your Uncle Feyman is also an intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor, I won’t die from this. But I didn’t expect that Loki would know our whereabouts, and his strength is at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. It’s a pity that Torres…”

“It’s my fault that Uncle Torres suffered.” Monroe looked sad, “I must avenge this hatred in the future.”

Feyman nodded and sighed, “Young general, although the general promised to let you join the Dark Moon’s Flame Light Legion, but you flee with Ms. Fini at this time, even if this matter is secret, you have become the most wanted person of the empire. With the current cooperative relationship between the Dark Moon and the empire, you will definitely be sent back to the Empire immediately once you show up. Going to the Dark Moon this time, I’m afraid it’s not where we can stay for a long time!”

“But staying here is just waiting to die too.” Calder shook his head and said, “At present, the north of the empire has been completely blocked. We can go through the Dark Moon and then go north from the Fallen Angel Empire to the Bloody Empire. That is the only safest place for general young maser and Ms. Fini to stay. The Custer Family woman seems to have noticed where we are. Just in case, when we leave, why not…”

Monroe shook his head, “Celine can be considered a friend of Fini and I. Furthermore, it’s just a guess now. The Custer Family’s influence in the empire is massive. It’s better not to cause trouble so as not to attract attention.”
