However, when “Aguile” took off the mask in front of him, the true face that had been kept secret was actually…

“Chen Rui!” Aldas’ facial expression was a mixture of shock, utter disbelief, and stunned. They finally turned into a wry smile, “Unexpected! Really unexpected! No wonder Aguile’ helped me and Lisa like that! What should I call you? Demon Emperor powerhouse, Sir Aguile? Or Sir Sheriff Chen Rui?”

“Master, you have a sense of humor. All of this is due to the inheritance from the grand master. No matter what I become and what power I gain, I will always be your friend, Chen Rui.”

Aldas looked at him for a long time and nodded, “I have to say that meeting a friend like you is the greatest luck in my life. Whether it is the reunion with my sister, Lisa, or the progress of pharmaceutics, it’s all thanks to you. Haha, grand master’s inheritance is so wonderful. Even as a friend, I can’t help but be jealous.”

When Chen Rui heard the rare joke at the end, he knew that the dark elf master’s mood had gradually calmed down. He smiled and said, “Don’t be jealous of me, now there is a great opportunity in front of you that can let you get the inheritance from a quasi-grand master potioneer, but it may be life-threatening. Are you willing to…”

“Of course I do!” Aldas’s calm heart suddenly became enthusiastic again. He looked at him with shiny eyes, “Tell me quickly!”

Even if Chen Rui’s strength could easily kill Aldas in seconds, he was still a little spooked by his fanatic eyes, “Actually… not inheritance, but I found a quasi-grand master to be a teacher for both of us…”

“It turns out that there are such secrets about the death of Grand Master Lolo back then.” After listening to the story told by Chen Rui, Aldas appeared in a daze and pulled him, “Then what are we waiting for? Bring me to be his apprentice immediately!”

Damn, everyone is so anxious. It seems that I’m the laziest… Chen Rui quickly grabbed the excited dark elf master, “It’s so late already. That quasi-grand master has already rested. I will bring you to him again tomorrow morning.”

“Okay! Okay!” Aldas rubbed his hands excitedly. Since he was cheated by a potioneer and ran away from home, he never had a real teacher. He self-studied and stole knowledge from the others; he took many detours. He finally became a master with the help of Shea, but his level was just the lower level of masters. If it weren’t for the high-purity potions and black potions provided by Chen Rui, it was likely that he would stop there for his entire life. Having a quasi-grand master as a teacher now was like a glimpse of hope in the dark. How could he not feel euphoric.

Chen Rui looked at the super excited dark elf master and shook his head secretly. This brother is going to be so excited that he will not be able to sleep tonight. He came to Aldas’ laboratory after coming out of the inner courtyard of the palace. He had reported the Tetenis incident to Princess Royal Shea. When Shea heard about this, she was quite surprised. She knew very well what a dual-quasi-grand master meant to the Dark Moon Estate, even if he was just staying here for a year.

Shea had received the gift from the little loli ahead of time. She was currently absorbing the power in that light and dark crystal. If she completely digested the massive power in it, reaching Demon Overlord level was not a dream. Of course, reaching the Demon Overlord level of power was not enough, it was also necessary to realize the real territory, but in any case, this was a very rare opportunity.

ReadNovelFull

In fact, the main contributor of this gift was Chen Rui. If it were not for his help to the earth elementals, the little loli would not have obtained this crystal. Shea understood this very well. Princess Royal Highness was even secretly delighted in Chen Rui’s parting words.

“I will give you an unforgettable gift for your birthday at the beginning of next month.”

After bidding farewell to the excited dark elf master, Chen Rui put on the mask again and walked out of the palace.

Just as he was about to return to the house, he suddenly remembered the threat of the secret intelligence boss at the ball last time. After hesitating for a long time, he finally did not dare to take any risks and walked toward the remote alley in the northeast block.

Turning into the alley and arriving in front of a secluded house, Chen Rui hesitated in front of the door for a while. After mustering the courage to knock on the door, the door suddenly opened with a creak. A slim figure appeared before his eyes.

“Hmph! I have been waiting for you for a long time. Finally, you have made the right choice and did not miss our appointment.”

This sentence made Chen Rui secretly grateful. Is it right to just be here?

While thinking, he had already walked through the door unknowingly.

This house was also full of Dragon Inscriptions and magic circles, which was completed by Ms. Betty for her best friend by forcing the dead duck dragon. The Devil’s Snare Flower had a group of maids in the Fallen Angel Capital, but there was no maid due to the need for her confidential work. Therefore, this place looked… somewhat messy inside and out.

Ms. Yini didn’t wear a veil this time. Her beautiful complexion seemed a bit dim even under the purple moonlight .

Chen Rui forced himself to say, “Madam Isabella…”

“Call me Isabella.” Ms. Yini interrupted him with a dissatisfied tone.

A woman’s heart is really hard to understand. Didn’t she forbid me to call her like this last time? Chen Rui was speechless for a while.

“Why are you just standing there? Help me clean up this place first.”

What? It turns out I’m just here to be a housework cleaner?

Chen Rui heaved a sigh of relief. Under Isabella’s threatening gaze, he began to be a handyman. He had a lot of experience of “working” in the Rainbow Valley, so he quickly cleaned up the yard. Even the 2 dim flame plants also glowed with bright flames again.

“Clean up the room too! And the bedroom!”

“…”

After finally finishing the bedroom, the supervising lady who had been staring at him said, “Sit down.”

Chen Rui glanced at the bedroom. Here? There is only a bed here. I can only… lie down.

But he didn’t dare to say these words, so he had to sit on the side of the bed for a long time which made him look super awkward.

“You very nervous?”

“…”

“Hmph, why don’t you pretend to be honest when you lie to girls?” Looking at Chen Rui’s almost dumb appearance, Isabella’s anger flared out of nowhere.

At that time, “Charles” was so romantic and suave, so elegant, courteous and considerate. Due to the “plot needs”, he had frequent contacts with the flower of the capital, Isabella, and established an intimate relationship. They were described as an ideal couple which made those guys who coveted the beauty of Isabella jealous. Someone even ambushed Chen Rui.

In fact, whether it was “Charles” or Isabella, they were just pretending and scheming. Even when Isabella was somewhat truly invested, she still mercilessly poisoned “Charles”.

It was not until the two teamed up to deal with Broc that Chen Rui’s heart had an unprecedented feeling for the poisonous flower when Isabella took a fatal blow for him. He still clearly remembered that tingling feeling of blood flowing on his body after the dagger passed through her body. If he had been acting previously, then at the last moment, especially after hearing her unfinished confession, he finally couldn’t help being too involved in the play.

Therefore, he used the resurrection potion. He hoped that after she was reborn, she could completely get rid of the grief and hatred.

Even before leaving, he left her a note to give her a little hope.

This should have been a relatively happy ending.

However, man’s plan was inferior to God’s. Isabella came to the Dark Moon by accident and became a member of it. Coincidentally, she also discovered his secret.

The ‘see you again’ promised at that time was now realized.

But what about other promises?

Am I really just a liar?

Thinking of this, the sir liar became more and more guilty. He was afraid to look at Isabella, let alone saying a word.

He didn’t dare to think further from the vague line: Will the altar of the harem use the corpse of the main character to perform a blood sacrifice again ?

Isabella looked at this guy with a cold face, seemingly full of hatred.

Speaking of it, she did not succeed in murdering this man several times, but she later “died” for this man. In the end, he gave her a second life and hope. He gave her the courage and motivation to live again. His words, “Both owe nothing to each other”, was not too over, but if it was just a simple scheming between them, why would she hate him?

This kind of hatred, just like another kind of emotion, was formed involuntarily blue. Perhaps it was the manifestation of another kind of emotion.

It was just that the form of expression was different.

“Hmph! Don’t pretend to be pitiful. I still have an important intel to tell you.”

Chen Rui finally found a topic to divert the attention, “What’s intel?”

“A beautiful girl came to the base in the capital, Walong Hotel. She held the internal contact crystal stone of the Dark Demon and said that she was looking for a guy named Simon, and she wouldn’t leave. This must be a girl that you hook up outside again, right? You must solve this matter as soon as possible, otherwise the base’s resources will be devoured by her!”

A beautiful girl looking for “Simon”? And she can devour all the resources of a base? Chen Rui was taken aback. The only person to fulfil this criteria is… Ms. Black Dragon Olypheus from Mountain Sacred!

The strength of Olypheus is the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. Didn’t she say that she has to wait until becoming the peak stage of the Demon Overlord before leaving? Why did she suddenly appear in the capital’s base? According to her initial strength, I’m afraid it will take years to reach the peak stage.Could it be she had some miraculous encounter and advanced earlier?

In any case, I must definitely hire this cheap super bodyguard.

Chen Rui was no longer an emotional rookie in the past. From Isabella’s tone, he sensed an unpleasant feeling. It seems to be jealousy?

“You have to clean up the mess that you left behind!”

“Got it.” Chen Rui nodded quickly, and he couldn’t help adding, “Things are not what you think!”

He regretted this sentence as soon as he said it. Why did I explain it to her? Isn’t it messy enough?

Isabella’s eyes flashed, and her tone eased slightly, “I’m listening.”

Chen Rui had no choice but to say, “That… matter had to start from the time when I went to the Bloody Empire…”

Isabella listened for a while, then she asked, “When did you go to the Bloody Empire?”

“Just when I was accompanying Princess Royal to the Blue Lava Estate. It was announced to outsiders later that I was conducting experiments with Master Aldas…”

While Chen Rui explained, he was sweating profusely to deal with Isabella’s constant questioning of the loopholes. Almost all his old backgrounds were revealed.

After Isabella asked for a long time, she suddenly said indifferently, “Am I troublesome?”

Chen Rui knew that this question was difficult to answer. If he answered “no”, she would continue to mess with him. If he answered “yes”, perhaps the consequences would be more serious.

Isabella answered herself, “Women are troublesome. Men should be prepared for this when they provoke women. Do you regret it now?”

Chen Rui shook his head quickly. Isabella looked into his eyes, “Maybe you should regret an earlier decision.”

An earlier decision? Was it pretending to be “Charles” to lie to her? Regret for letting her take control of the Dark Demon? Chen Rui gathered his courage, raised his head and looked at her eyes. He suddenly understood that the “decision” she mentioned was the resurrection potion.

Under the soft magic lamp light in the bedroom, those beautiful blue eyes flashed like water with a hint of gentleness. This was not the temptation or intoxication of the Devil’s Snare, but the fragrance of the Snow Dallet.

Those words were echoing in his ears: I wished you were the one I met back then…

If only people could see their partners as their first love.

Chen Rui suddenly felt an inexplicable impulse and shook his head firmly, “I don’t regret it.”

Those blue eyes instantly became very bright. As if to hide some kind of joy, her face quickly became stern, “Hmph, you can go now.”

Chen Rui’s momentum suddenly plummeted, and he dared not look at her as he nodded, “Then I will leave.”

He stood up. Just as he walked to the entrance of the yard, a breeze came from behind, then his body was tightened. The figure that rushed out had hugged him tightly from behind.

“Do not move!”

Her warm body was close to his back, especially the two soft and plump jades, but Chen Rui felt more of the heartbeat of the two, and the faint moisture leaning against his neck.

With a slight tremble, the circle of moisture spread more and more.

Chen Rui stood stiff and did not dare to move. He was not afraid of any threats. He had a feeling that if he turned around and hugged the woman behind him, the subsequent actions would be further escalated. Both of them might go back to the bedroom… so he couldn’t move.

He was different from the playboy who played games. He either refuses it or truly accepts it by taking up the responsibility of a man.

This was one of the principles that Chen Rui adhered to in his heart. Before he was ready to take up the responsibility, he couldn’t simply move, even if he would be ridiculed as a coward.

Moreover, he didn’t know what Isabella was thinking now. Is it some kind of emotional sustenance? Or some kind of substitution?

Behind him, the warm body gradually moved away. As the night breeze blew, the wetness on the back of his clothes gave him a refreshing chill.

“You go back. Don’t tell anyone what happened today!”

Isn’t that what I wanted to say? Chen Rui smiled bitterly and walked out the door slowly.

The voice behind became cold again, “Next time, come earlier. Don’t try your luck.”

After the door closed automatically, Chen Rui glanced back. He felt that his mood was more complicated than ever.

When the beautiful woman hugged him tightly behind him, he let her tears drop silently. Although his body did not move, his heart finally moved a little.

Next time… should I come earlier?

Outside the gate, the man suddenly hit his head severely, “You’re playing with fire!”

In the courtyard, the woman’s beautiful blue eyes stared at a few moths flying toward the reignited flame plants at all costs. She was actually in a daze for a while.

He was toasted long ago… How could the bring back the ‘bodyguard’ without causing suspicion from the Governance Association?

chapters.title: Chapter 481 - The Whereabouts Of Ms. Black Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 481 - The Whereabouts Of Ms. Black Dragon

Early the next morning, when Chen Rui went to look for Aldas, he found that the dark elf master had been waiting at the gate of the palace for a long time. From his bloodshot eyes, he could tell that Aldas had stayed up all night.

However, Chen Rui was not much better than Aldas. After returning from Isabella’s place last night… he indeed had some trouble sleeping.

The dark elf master didn’t notice so many details. He pulled Chen Rui to the Cloak Gang’s lair in a hurry. With the referral of “Aguile”, Aldas succeeded in becoming Tetenis’ student without any problems.

As time was short, the old man Tetenis rushed to give lectures immediately. The first thing he taught was the basics of pharmaceutics. Chen Rui used the Super System to memorize a lot of pharmaceutics materials by rote before, but that was it. Tetenis had a very strong presenting skill and teaching standard. If he was in another world, he would definitely be a famous professor in the Lecture Room. This basic knowledge was very useful for Chen Rui to digest the materials that he memorized forcefully. Even Aldas could learn new things from Tetenis when reviewing these basics.

After the two-hour basic course, Tetenis also had a general understanding of the level of his two students. Aldas was undoubtedly a satisfactory top student. Although his foundation was not particularly solid, he had rich practical experience and a very focused attitude, lest he miss a word. His occasional questions were also on point. After understanding it, he benefited a lot. On the other hand, “Aguile” was simply an absolute rookie. Apart from his surprising memory, he was simply good for nothing. Even Aldas frowned when he raised those “naive” questions.

Tetenis knew that this rookie was strongest in mechanics, so he didn’t care. In the next mechanics lecture, Aldas did not participate. Instead, he went back to the laboratory to eagerly digest and experiment with the precious experience that he just had.

Tetenis did not start with the basics of mechanics’ lectures. Instead, he let Chen Rui ask difficult questions. This time, Chen Rui did not let the old man down. He truly showed the strength of a trio-specialized “genius master”. Whether in theory or practice, he was experienced and had a strong ability to understand. The questions raised seemed as though he had immersed in this field for hundreds of years. Moreover, he could understand many things with just a simple pointer. Tetenis was amazed in his heart, and he put more effort into teaching Chen Rui.

The inherited knowledge obtained from countless predecessors was really extraordinary. Many doubts were solved. Chen Rui thought for a while, and he decided to start learning from the basics. Despite the guidance of [Deep Analysis], Master Rummenigge and the basic books, relatively speaking, his foundation was not very solid after all. Since there was a quasi-grand master here now, it was just perfect to make up for his shortcomings.

Once he made this request, Tetenis was even more satisfied. The old man had already seen from some of the previous questions that the foundation of this apprentice was not very solid, and Chen Rui actually recognized this clearly. Since he can see his shortcomings clearly, his aptitude is really extraordinary.

The course continued until noon before Tetenis, who was still unfulfilled, let Chen Rui leave. Before leaving, Tetanus repeatedly advised him to go back and concentrate on the experience. He asked him to continue to attend the class tomorrow morning, and never waste his time on the “troublesome things” such as military and government affairs which would make him gain less in mechanics. Chen Rui could only nod and say yes.

After leaving the Cloak Gang, Chen Rui came to the secret headquarters of the Dark Demon. He had to contact a lady at the capital’s base, Walong Hotel, through the magic circle of the Dark Demon’s headquarters- It’s just a trivial matter if she gobbled up all the base’s funds, but it would be disastrous if the base of the Dark Demon is exposed due to the lady being too eye-catching.

I wonder if the leader madam is in the Dark Demon’s headquarters?

Chen Rui’s heart suddenly beat a little fast, and he touched his neck subconsciously. The scene last night was still vivid to him.

ReadNovelFull.com

If the dead duck dragon or the rogue nephew knew about the events of last night, they would definitely denounce him that he was not a man who was weak by nature and had a certain functional disorder… He didn’t even want to take up the chance that was presented to him.

It was just that Chen Rui knew what he really wanted. Due to this, he dared not act rashly to take responsibility.

Thinking of the wicked traitor who betrayed him… Uh, demon traitor, Chen Rui’s teeth tickled with hatred. That guy probably divulged all my background for Inheritance Rock! Although the key was the flaws in the last accidental incident where Isabella had almost guessed everything already with her wisdom, he is still a demon traitor! Since I can’t do anything to the aunty, uh… I’ll redirect my anger to that bastard nephew!

By the way, at this moment, she should be having her lunch or taking a break, right…

With a fluke mentality, Chen Rui came to the Dark Demon’s headquarters. He successfully passed the investigations and traps along the way and entered the core underground base.

The headquarters of the Dark Demon was just a building on the surface, the real confidential departments were deep underground. Chen Rui came all the way to the commander office lobby and saw Delia. It seemed that Isabella was not there, and his heart relaxed a lot. For some reason, there was a little disappointment.

“Leader,” Delia had received the report since Chen Rui stepped into the headquarters. There was no one else in the office lobby, so her words were also very casual, “What are you doing here?”

“I need to contact the person-in-charge of the Dark Demon’s Walong Hotel in the capital immediately.”

“Okay, I will arrange it right away. The secret communication tower will probably take 15 to 30 minutes to connect to the capital’s base.” When Delia pressed the call button, a female dark elf walked in and retreated immediately after accepting the order.

“Then I will just wait here.” Chen Rui sat down and looked at the late night wave flower in a pot that was not far away. This kind of flower was very common in underground bases. It could purify the air and calm the mind.

“Is everything alright with you here?”

At this time, another person opened the door and came in to deliver a document. Delia took a glance, nodded and said, “It’s very good here. I kind of like it. The institution and facilities are basically complete. There are also some gadgets for the Dark Demons to use. I have to admire the clever ideas of leader.”

This underground fortification originated from Chen Rui’s original design proposal. It was inspired by spy war movies in his past life. Aren’t those Intelligence Department and even the Pentagon located underground? “Gadgets” were the spy tools that were unique to the Demon Realm. Based on Chen Rui’s inspiration and the current level of mechanics, they were naturally not difficult to design.

Chen Rui smiled, “By the way, when can that guy finish training?”

Of course that guy was the shameless traitor nephew. Delia’s eyes were warm at the mention of Roman, “It’s only been a few days. It probably will take a while.”

“I miss him very much.” Chen Rui looked at Delia who was a little surprised, and he added, “My fist misses him. Would you mind if I beat him up for 1 round after he comes out?”

“Of course I mind,” Delia smiled and stood up while holding the file, “Because 1 round is too little. There should at least be 3 rounds as the punishment for him trying to hook up with 3 women this month. Okay, I still need to head out to settle some matters. Tara will take you there after they get in touch.”

Watching Delia leave. Chen Rui was a little sweaty. It seems that every move the bastard is under the watch of his madam wife who is the second boss of the secret intelligence. That guy still thinks that he is smart, but Delia does not seem to be as calculative as she appears to be. In her heart, she is more tolerant toward Roman. Not only Delia, but I guess Athena and the others are the same as well.

Tolerance is also a kind of deep love, right?

Chen Rui suddenly felt guilty. At this time, a voice sounded, “According to Delia’s words, shouldn’t a greedy, unfaithful person be chopped to pieces?”

Chen Rui shuddered as he saw a moving figure coming out of the inner office. It was Ms. Yini that he was most afraid of seeing. It turns out that the secret intelligence boss was in the inner office inside, and she even heard our conversation just now!

I admit to being “greedy”, but “unfaithful”… Haih, I guess I’ll admit it too.

“Isabella…” Chen Rui stood up.

“It’s Madam Isabella!” Isabella said coldly, “Finally, you still remember to come here. If the base of Walong Hotel suffers any changes, you will be fully responsible!”

“I understand.” Chen Rui knew he was wrong, so he quickly responded.

In the awkward moment, the female dark elf, Tara, came to report that she had connected to the capital’s base. Chen Rui followed Tara to the communication magic circle, then Tara bowed and left.

The magic circle was a suspended mirror that could project a real person’s image. After a few words with the capital hotel’s contact person, he disguised as Simon’s appearance. Soon, the Mountain Seckred’s Ms. Black. Dragon Olypheus appeared in front of Chen Rui.

Ms. Black Dragon was still youthful and beautiful. She was dressed in a slim black robe, but her action made people stay away from her. She held a drumstick in his left hand while holding a few kebabs in her right hand. She was talking while chewing without grace, “Who are you? If you delay my eating time, I will kill your entire family!”

You just came out for a short time and you already learn to kill the entire family? Chen Rui was drenched in sweat as he said, “Olypheus! I’m Simon! Do you remember? Your employer!”

“Simon?” Ms. Black Dragon was taken aback and took a closer look. “Wow, it’s really you! Your place is really good. There are delicious foods and drinks. I can force myself to live here for hundreds of years… Okay, don’t bother me if there’s nothing else.”

This girl actually wants to stay at Walong Hotel and not leave? She even says hundreds of years? Even if this base did not suffer setbacks, it will collapse from being eaten up! Chen Rui couldn’t help but to shudder as he thought of the sharp eyes of the secret intelligence boss just now.

Chen Rui hurriedly shouted, “You swore by your mother’s name, how can you break your promise?”

That “mother’s name” seemed to have some restraining effect. Olypheus was dazed and looked pitiful, “Um, Simon, let’s discuss it, okay? I will only live here for 100 years… no, 50 years! After 50 years, I will come and protect you!”

“I will be killed by others in 50 years!” Chen Rui felt mad.

“For 40 years then. There is free and good food here. I have never enjoyed it so much. I really don’t want to leave this wonderful life… Sobs…” Ms. Black Dragon actually cried emotionally. She wiped a handful of tears from her face with the back of her hand, then she turned the grief into appetite and bit the drumstick together with the bone in one bite. She chewed it hard and swallowed it.

Chen Rui also wiped the sweat from his face: I already felt Olypheus was the extraordinary previously, but how did I not realize she’s so extraordinary?

“Um… Olypheus, why do you think that protecting me means leaving a wonderful life?” Chen Rui’s eyes rolled, “The life here is better than there. There is more food and more fun things. Have you tried the legendary hot pot? Have you tasted the legendary purple berry wine…”

Ms. Black Dragon eyes were beaming while listening to the food. She shook her head desperately.

“By the way, I also paid your deposit! If you fail to come, not only will you violate the oath to your mother, but I also have the right to deduct the balance. I will deduct 100 black crystal coins for each day you are late. If you live there for 20 days, all the remaining money is gone! If you live for a year, you have to pay me millions of black crystal coins. Are you really planning to live there for 40 years?”

“No, no, no!” Ms. Black Dragon was completely dumbfounded by this threat and temptation, then she burst into tears, “Don’t deduct the money! I’ll come right away! Where are you? Please don’t deduct my black crystal coins!”

That miserable appearance was as if Chen Rui was an old wealthy landlord who demanded for debt payments at the end of the year.

“I’m in the Dark Moon City of the Dark Moon Estate. You immediately ask the owner of the hotel for a magic map, then bring some food and fly over to me at the fastest speed! I will give you a week. If you can arrive at the east gate of the Dark Moon a day in advance, I will award you 100 black crystal coins! 2 days is 200! If you are late…”

“I won’t be late! Don’t deduct money!” Olypheus efficiently wiped out the food in her hands with tears in her eyes. She said indistinctly, “I’m going now…” After the call, the magic circle closed, and Chen Rui let out a sigh of relief. He finally solved the big problem, Ms. Black Dragon.

“She is really a black dragon?” Isabella’s suspicious voice came from the back. It turned out that Ms. Secret Intelligence had been using some kind of surveillance system to stay invisible at the side.

“She is at least a black dragon at the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord.” Chen Rui replied with shame. She is a black dragon indeed, but she is just a little weird…

“Intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord?”

“Yes.”

“Are you sure she will leave the capital’s base immediately and come over?”

“Yes.”

“That’s how you lied to girls…”

“…” (Fortunately, he had been tested by Student Zola usually, so he didn’t dwell into it.)

When Chen Rui felt 2 sharp-edged gazes fixed on his face, he immediately reacted and restored “Simon”‘s face to his original appearance. Isabella stared at his face tightly as her red lips squirmed slightly. She seemed like she was about to say something, but she endured it and threw something over.

Once Chen Rui caught it, he took a look and broke into cold sweat again. This was a recording stone. It was not only the dancing and kissing at the ball that day, but the hug from last night was also recorded in it. Now there was more “evidence”. He couldn’t prove his innocence even if he jumped into the Dead Sea.

There must be countless copies of this.

“Tonight, remember to go to the palace.”

Isabella uttered this sentence and turned away.

The palace? What about after the palace? Chen Rui smiled bitterly as he watched her back leaving. He glanced at the late night wave flower blooming in the corner, and he suddenly remembered a question in his heart.

Do you like flowers?

Do you?

Hmmmm, I wonder how would the Ms. Black Dragon change after she met other dragons🤔… ‘Kill your entire family’ 🤣

chapters.title: Chapter 482 - Arrival
chapters.body:
Chapter 482 - Arrival

During these 5 days, Chen Rui was very tired. He learned alchemy and dealt with government affairs during the day; at night, he accompanied his girlfriends, female boss and… a presently considerably “pure” female friend that was suspected to be a mistress.

However, after the first 2 kisses and hugs, Isabella’s next move did not go further. Instead, she had “toned down” a lot.

He went to “report” to her 4 times in 5 days just to discuss matters or to play a game of chess. Sometimes, she closed her eyes before leaving, leaning lightly on his shoulder for a moment. When she opened her eyes, she immediately turned hostile and chased him away.

This made Chen Rui’s heart eased a lot. Her previous tension and rejection gradually disappeared. In this state of mind, he felt Isabella’s loneliness more and more clearly.

Just as she said in the capital when she leaned in his embrace, “I am very tired. I’m a very strong woman, but after all, I’m just a woman.”

At that time, she was the highly admired flower of the capital, but she was lonely as well.

Chen Rui didn’t know if it was her strategy to get along with feeling more and more natural and relaxed. Maybe she really just wanted to use him to escape from her loneliness. Anyway, he had no choice but to continue to be “coerced” for the time being.

Maybe Chen Rui didn’t realize it himself. If another person “threatened” him like that, would the person be so successful?

Isabella joined the Dark Moon because of her friendship with Krobelus and also because she could get help to avenge Broc’s murder of his brother. Now there was Roman, the main member of the family enmity, and with the help of people like Paglio, it was only a matter of time before Broc was resolved. Her close friend, Krobelus, also found her most important partner. Krobelus lived in that “exclusive” house and did not have too much time to accompany her.

Isabella did not have much hatred for the capital, and Regent Obsidian was also regarded as her old master. Although she usually spent most of her energy on the Dark Demon organization, it was difficult for her to avoid the loneliness of “an outsider who had lost a certain life goal”. It was not until the accidental discovery that she seemed to have found a little “joy” or “goal”?

What was it? Maybe even she herself didn’t know. She didn’t know if there would be any result. She just felt that there was a strong desire that drove her to do so, so she did it. It was like a moth flying toward the flame plants, even if it would become ashes the next moment.

In addition to the “affair” with Isabella, there was another incident that had attracted Chen Rui’s attention.

It was the change of the blue planet in the Super System.

The population on the blue planet had skyrocketed dozens of times. From the original tribe, it had developed into countries, but this planet was much larger than the earth where Chen Rui was originally located. The current population coverage was not even 1%.

On the planet, there were various Pillars of Faith which provided power for the lives of various believers. These lives also gave back faith power. Some also had several faiths that were not conflicting with each other.

It was in response to that sentence: Where there are people, there will be underworlds. Since the emergence of private ownership, inequality between people was unavoidable. This was also the inevitable result of the continuous development of human self-improvement ability. The emergence of various interests and gaps had caused various forms of opposition and contradictions to continue until it was impossible to reconcile. Just like the civilization history of all intelligent creatures, war was inevitable.

Although these lives were “produced” by the system, they gave Chen Rui a feeling of real life. Although in this [Galaxy Territory], Chen Rui had absolute control and control over everything, he also needed these lives to provide faith power. However, life was life. It had independent will and choice with true flexibility. Therefore, he did not interfere with life’s independent behavior including war.

Civilization developed and progressed rapidly under this alternating demand of active and passive.

The number of faith power and faith crystals was also growing rapidly. Now, the number of faith crystals had reached 36,000, and the growth rate was still increasing. [Royal Star Transformation] consumed 1,000 faith crystals. It would not be a problem for now.

There was another very important use of the faith crystals which was the enhancement of spiritual link. Chen Rui had experienced the effect of [Link Enhancement]. Each time it cost 100 faith crystals, but there was a time limit; there was another [Star-level Enhancement] which was permanent. It was worth looking forward to, but one-star enhancement required 100,000 faith crystals, so it could only be accumulated slowly at present.

One thing that worried Chen Rui was that he could feel that Shura’s power had increased a lot under the influence of some faith power, and he seemed to have reached a certain critical point. Once he exceeds this critical point, what will happen? Even he could not predict.

In any case, Shura is always a serious concern. If there is a chance, I must completely eliminate him.

Compared with these troublesome matters, Chen Rui’s progress in learning alchemy was very smooth. This surprised Master Tetenis who temporarily lived in the Cloak Gang. As this apprentice said at the beginning, his qualifications and abilities are beyond my expectation. Not only mechanical skills, but also pharmaceutics!

In less than a week, this absolute rookie, who was originally equivalent to a pharmaceutics apprentice, has actually progressed by leaps and bounds. If this continues, he will become a potioneer in just one month! It is not by forceful memorization, but by real understanding instead!

The potioneer in Tetenis’ mind was not those who barely passed the assessment, but the real potioneer who had mastered all the knowledge and skills of the potioneer category!

If he hadn’t witnessed it a few days ago, he would have thought this guy was pretending to be dumb to take advantage of others. This was thanked to the training ground and refinery functions of the Super System. Every time Tetenis taught a fragment of knowledge, in addition to the exceptional effect of the [Deep Analysis], Chen Rui could also use 1:100 time settings to experiment and integrate them. Even if he spent 2 hours at the training ground in a day, it was equivalent to 1 week.

Tetenis, who couldn’t understand it, could only attribute it to Chen Rui’s op talent as well as his diligent comprehension and practice at all times.

In terms of mechanic skills, there had not been a significant increase. At Chen Rui’s current level, it was difficult to make a big breakthrough. The key was to accumulate the experience little by little.

On this day, Chen Rui did not ask questions as usual after the class, but he left immediately. This time the old man did not reprimand him for being distracted because it was impossible for him to have such an effect if he was distracted.

It was a pity that the old man still underestimated Chen Rui. This guy was really distracted- Some bodyguard girl who almost broke the capital’s Dark Demon’s base with her stomach should be approaching the Dark Moon in these 2 days. Although he had already sent people to wait there, Ms. Olypheus was not an ordinary dragon. It is best to personally bring her for the first time, otherwise there may be some troubles. Anyway, I’m free now. I will just go and see first.

After coming out of the Cloak Gang and just changing to his original face, he met Paglio. These days, Zola was pulling Krobelus to train magic behind closed doors. They seemed to be making something. The poison dragon, whom Krobelus controlled tightly usually, was suddenly carefree and unrestrained like a wild horse breaking free of its rein.

“Hey hey, sir financial officer, it seems that you have been working hard recently.” Paglio patted his shoulder carefreely. He was obviously in a good mood.

It is really hard indeed… Chen Rui nodded in agreement.

“Then, I will take you to a place with many beautiful women!” Paglio winked his eyes.

Many more beauties again? Chen Rui was afraid of the word “many”. He shook his head quickly.

The poison dragon said disapprovingly, “What are you afraid of? Aren’t you very good at coaxing women? Putting aside Athena and Kia, even the terrifying madwoman like Zola has become a docile little lamb. If other dragons in the past knew this, every dragon’s eyes would be blinded. You are just having a cheat day occasionally now. Even if they discovered it, it will be fine.”

Chen Rui could not help but feel a little guilty when he heard the word “cheat day”, “Little lamb? Have you ever seen a little lamb’s teeth that can kill a dragon? Don’t drag me in. Go by yourself if you want to.”

“It’s boring to be alone. If the guy, Roman, is here, he would have pulled me eagerly. Don’t be a wet blanket. It’s rare that Little Betty is not there.” Paglio’s eyes rolled, “Don’t worry, with our power, as long as we change our face, the lackeys of the Governance Association will definitely not recognize us.”

Chen Rui changed his mind, “Then let’s go to the east gate.”

“Okay, I’ll accompany you to the east gate and see the beautiful women coming and going! I’m so accommodating, right?!” The dead duck dragon said without blushing. It was as if Chen Rui was the one “pursuing freedom”.

Chen Rui turned into Simon’s face and followed the dead duck dragon who disguised into a handsome man to walk toward the city gate.

“If there are any beauties later, let’s go strike up a conversation and see who can get her.” Paglio grinned, “Don’t forget the great harem plan that I said. I want to bring a group of female dragons to fly around in the sky at your door. Now, I will add one more sentence. There will be a demon beauty riding on top of every female dragon! Let that damn Government Association go to hell!”

Chen Rui looked at this guy speechlessly as he shook his head and said, “Go ahead if you want to strike up a conversation or something, I will help you to keep guard. My current harem is already deadly enough.”

“A few of them are considered harem? Don’t show off if there are not dozens of hundreds of them, otherwise it’s embarrassing!” Paglio replied contemptuously.

Amidst their nonsense, they had already reached the east gate. One had to admit that the changing appearance of the dead dragon was a bit charming indeed. He attracted the attention of many women. Relatively speaking, no one paid attention to the ordinary-looking “Simon”. However, Master Poison Dragon naturally was not attracted to the common fans; he was just looking triumphant in front of Chen Rui.

After staying outside the city gate for a while, Paglio felt a little bored, “There’s nothing to see here, let’s go to the pub.”

“Have a look again. I don’t want to go to the pub.”

At this moment, Paglio raised his brows and suddenly looked toward the sky. Chen Rui followed his gaze and saw a black dot from the sky rushing toward their side. It seemed to be a black cloud. When approaching this area, the speed of the black cloud gradually slowed down, and its area was shrinking. With the eyesight of the two of them, they could see clearly that it was a girl in black clothing.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up suddenly. This trip is not in vain. She is finally here!

Hmmm, another harem member arrived…

chapters.title: Chapter 483 - Contract
chapters.body:
Chapter 483 - Contract

Chapter 483: Contract

The black-clothed girl flew for a while, seeming to lack strength, and landed unstably. Many people didn’t see the scene in the air, but they felt that there was a girl suddenly appearing in front of them.

This girl had long black hair with a pure and cute appearance. She was dressed in a black robe and had a slender figure, especially her long legs that were completely perfect. If one really wanted to pick out any shortcoming, it was that her chest was a little small, but it had a special charm.

Paglio felt the faint dragon breath on the girl’s body, and his eyes lit up, “Did you see that beauty? She turns out to be a dragon! I finally see my cup of tea.”

“Wait! Don’t you like those with sharp teeth, tall and plump…”

“Do you understand what it means by good in many things but specialize in one? You know what’s a wide range of hobbies? Little Betty is also not a tall and plump type… Ok! Now I am the protagonist, don’t bother me from pursuing my happiness. You as the supporting actor should just watch out for me here!”

As soon as the girl appeared, she immediately attracted the attention of many people. Some people had already started to strike up a conversation. However, the expression of the girl looked a little uncomfortable. She even covered her belly as if she was unwell.

The girl ignored these people, but looked around as if she was looking for someone. Suddenly, she looked toward Chen Rui’s side with a surprised look, then she walked over.

Paglio was going to walk over, but unexpectedly, the girl actually walked toward him. He looked back and said with a proud feeling, “Hey, did you see it? This is called charm!”

Paglio quickly adjusted his clothes. His gaze suddenly was full of vicissitudes of life. Together with the handsome face, he had quite the temperament of a lady-killer for women of all walks of life. He walked unhurriedly toward the girl.

The girl’s eyes brightened, and soon, the beautiful woman and the handsome man met.

“Little girl…” The handsome man just said 2 words in a deep and sexy voice, then he was stopped because the beauty did not stop. Instead, she passed by him with a surprised expression and continued to walk forward.

Obviously, he was ignored.

“So here you are!” The girl came to Chen Rui. She said pitifully while rubbing her belly, “I have already come early, so you can’t deduct money!”

The handsome actor in front was immediately dumbfounded. He turned his head back and looked at the “tea” in his heart who was having a close conversation with the supporting actor. By the way, her face even looks spoiled?

Damn Dragon God!

At this moment, the dragon suddenly understood the feelings of that poor Demon God’s left eye.

The appearance of Miss Olypheus made Chen Rui frown, “Why do you look like this? Are you injured?”

“No, uh… I ate all the food the next day. I flew over with an empty stomach for the past 3 days and almost died on the way. Remember to give me a bonus of 200 black crystal coins.”

“Why don’t you find a town on the way to buy food and eat?”

“That requires money! I’ve seen it in the capital, even a thin cake requires 3 white crystal coins!” Ms. Black Dragon looked dignified,”My mom said that a good dragon’s vault can only have income and no expenditure!”

“So you flew with an empty stomach for 3 days?” Chen Rui was already speechless against her. I’ve seen those who choose money over life, but I haven’t seen one who risks her life for 3 white crystal coins, and she is even a dragon!

“I’m about to starve to death. Quickly bring me to eat the legendary hot pot, the legendary purple berry wine and so on.” Ms. Black Dragon said while swallowing her saliva. Her stomach also made a growling sound correspondingly.

Before Chen Rui spoke, Paglio had already walked over while gritting his teeth. It took him a long time to utter a sentence, “Are you planning to bring a group of female dragons to fly around above my head?”

After half an hour.

In a room of the Cloak Gang’s hot pot restaurant, a super-large hot pot soup was almost empty. There was a towering stack of empty side dishes next to it.

Miss Olypheus touched her bulging belly and leaned on the chair with bliss, surprise and enjoyment.

——Life is so wonderful. Not only there are free delicious foods, but also an early arrival bonus of 200 black crystal coins. It is worthwhile to fly with an empty stomach for 3 days. Mom is right, there is a reward when you put effort into it.

“Miss Olypheus,” Chen Rui had recovered from the shock of Ms. Black Dragon’s appetite. “Didn’t you say that you have to reach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord to get out of the Mountain Seckred? How come you get out of the mountain earlier?”

In Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes], Olypheus’s strength was really only the initial intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. She had not reached the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Could it be she sneaked out?

“This is the case. After you left last time, I missed the smell of the barbecue, so I wanted to try to make a little bit by myself,” Olypheus said embarrassedly, “I tried many times without success…”

“Then you sneaked out to find me for the barbecue?”

“No,” Ms. Black Dragon looked even more embarrassed, “Because I accidentally killed some demonic beasts while cooking barbecue and burned a few forests…”

“A few?” Chen Rui was dumbfounded. How big is this fire?

“So I was chased out by Sir Satan.” Ms. Black Dragon looked pitifully homeless, “Simon, you must take me in. We already have an agreement which is to protect you for 1,000 years.”

“It’s 300 years, right?” Chen Rui had figured out the girl’s thought to eat and drink for free for a longer time. He deliberately added, “Do you think I can live that long?”

“Even if you die, there will still be your offspring.” The lady bodyguard was a little shrewd, “I can always protect them. You can just double or triple the price. Others can’t get a Demon Overlord bodyguard like me even if they wish to.”

“It’s you who wishes to have a master like me… that lets you eat and drink for free and even pays you, right?! Don’t you know how much you can eat? I’m afraid it won’t be long before I will be poor because of your appetite!” Chen Rui wanted Olypheus to board the Dark Moon’s black ship, so he said directly, “Moreover, is the Demon Overlord very rare? The follower beside me just now is at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Moreover, his price is cheaper and he eats less than you, and it’s an extremely long contract of tens of thousands of years.”

Chen Rui shamelessly called the dead duck dragon, who was running away in tears because of extreme psychological imbalance, as his follower. He was also labeled as “cheap labor”. Olypheus didn’t know so much. Before this, I did realize that the guy who left is much stronger than me. He also seems to be a dragon?

Thinking of this, Ms. Black Dragon was immediately stunned. She quickly explained, “The peak stage of the Demon Overlord… I will get there soon too! Sir Satan has already given me a trace of source energy which is purer than the one given to you last time. As long as I can completely absorb this power, I can reach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord!”

Chen Rui was really taken aback this time. He knew exactly what the source energy of the Demi-God’s spiritual imprint represented. If Olypheus completely absorbs the power, she may become a puppet that is controlled by Satan. No wonder Satan would “chase” Olypheus out. He is most probably deliberately letting her come to me to monitor me or to complete some kind of task.

Then Olypheus is like a time bomb.

However, Ms. Black Dragon herself is innocent. It will be a bit unreasonable to directly kill her, and it may also cause Satan to be more suspicious or to act.

Olypheus obviously didn’t know this, and she still said pitifully, “In fact, I can also go on a diet, but my mom said that girls should eat nutritious things during puberty…”

Chen Rui thought about it and said, “Olypheus, although we are in an employer-employee relationship, we are still friends. You have been eating and drinking for free for so long at the capital, but I never asked you for a black crystal coin.”

Olypheus nodded quickly, “Of course, we are friends; best friends!”

“Since we are friends, it hurts our relationship to talk about money. How about this? I can provide you with board and lodging for free so that you can eat as much as you want every day. I will also pay you the commission as well as give you some rare treasures and even legendary grade equipment as long as you promise me one condition…”

“What is the condition?” Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes lit up, then she suddenly showed a vigilant look, “Don’t tell me you are trying to do something special to me?”

Chen Rui was almost choked: What are you thinking?

Ms. Black Dragon said righteously, “Mom said that girls should learn to love themselves and never let men take advantage of them before getting married; unless you want to marry me!”

Then, she asked curiously, “By the way, what is taking advantage and getting married? Is it edible?”

“Cough…” Chen Rui really choked up now: In your dictionary, is there only eating beside money?

After finally calming down, Chen Rui also put on a righteous appearance, “Stop thinking nonsense! My condition is that we sign a contract!”

The contract content proposed by Chen Rui included that Olypheus should not harm the employer in any way. She must do her best to protect the employer during her lifetime, keep all the secrets of the employer, protect the target designated by the employer, and fight the enemy for the employer… The whole contract was simply a harsh indentured labor contract.

In terms of treatment, due to Olypheus’s insistent pestering, it had been increased to 500 black crystal coins per year. In addition to free board and lodging, there were some fixed benefits.

If this contract were given to any Demon Overlord, the so-called employer will be beaten, let alone the dragons with superb “financial management” ability. However, Ms. Black Dragon believed that she had taken a big advantage and her original salary had skyrocketed by 5 times. She could even eat and drink for free, reimburse travel expenses on official trips, holidays and some small benefits. They were much better than being nestled in the poor Blackwood Cliff.

By the way, the next time I go on an official trip, I can work harder and fly there by myself, then I can claim the fare of the carriage. I can also eat low-quality food, then claim a high price reimbursement when I come back… Ms. Olypheus quickly calculated. She was rejoiced.

Chen Rui didn’t know that this little girl had the innate ability to take rebates and report false accounts. He wondered if he was too blackhearted. Only 500 black crystal coins to hire a black dragon who was about to be the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Lest Olypheus changed her mind, he offered some benefits first.

“I have a water pearl that can shine in the water. It can also help in the training of the spirit power. It is a rare treasure. There is also a set of quasi-legendary grade equipment. As long as you sign the contract, I will give them to you as a gift.”

The legendary water pearl! And the legendary quasi-legendary grade equipment! They are even the legendary free gifts!

It seems that I finally found the legendary dumb rich man!

Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes flashed with dazzling stars, and her voice was shaky. Her words were incoherent with excitement, “Hurry up and hand over the contract! Otherwise, I will kill your entire family!”

Chen Rui, “…”

This mc🙄…. is getting more and more shameless…

chapters.title: Chapter 484 - Unpredictable Change! Retaliating With One’S Own Skill
chapters.body:
Chapter 484 - Unpredictable Change! Retaliating With One’S Own Skill

Chapter 484: Unpredictable Change! Retaliating with One’s Own Skill

This was undoubtedly a very successful equality contract. Not only both parties were willing, but they also felt that they had taken a huge advantage.

“Okay, now that we are in the relationship of the equality contract, I can tell you some secrets, but remember not to tell anyone. My name is not Simon, but Chen Rui. I’m a financial officer from the Dark Moon City…” Chen Rui and Ms. Black Dragon had confidentiality clauses in the equality contract, so he was not afraid of her leaking his secrets.

Olypheus’ focus was not on his secrets or conditions, but on the treatment; especially the water pearl that was immediately honored. After successfully signing the contract, Ms. Black Dragon finally got the treasure she coveted. It was another moment of being moved to tears.

Leaving the hot pot restaurant, Chen Rui recovered to his original appearance and walked toward his house with the bodyguard whom he successfully abducted.

Along the way, there were constant demons pointing at him: This playboy sheriff has deceived another stunning beauty with his honey words again. Old Demon God is really blind. There are so many bachelor demons, but he doesn’t take care of them. Instead, he actually takes care of a married human!

These whispers couldn’t be missed by Olypheus’ ears. She kept asking him questions curiously along the way that made him almost exhausted.

Olypheus, “Are these people your enemies? Why do I feel that their resentment is deep?”

Olypheus, “Do you still have a name called ‘lecher’?”

Olypheus, “Someone cursed your little dick to forever point to the ground, what does it mean? Is it some special magic? Do you want me to kill him?”

Chen Rui, “…”

When they finally returned to the house, he saw that there were 4 people in the yard who seemed to have been waiting for a long time. 3 were sitting and 1 was standing in a posture of a trial by the three judges.

Those sitting were 3 women led by the fairy dragon Zola who went for closed doors training with Ms. Betty these days. Krobelus and Delia were on the left and right, while the one standing was Paglio with a gloating smirk.

As soon as Chen Rui came in with Olypheus, he was targeted by Zola’s murderous gaze. Ms. Betty and the second boss of the secret intelligence were also in a “mighty” posture.

Ms. Betty said, “Chen Rui, you sure are capable. In just a few days, you deceived another woman back! Zola, you can’t tolerate it this time!

Zola didn’t say anything, but she stared at Chen Rui. Chen Rui could feel that Ms. Fairy Dragon was really angry. In fact, just in case, he had told Athena and Kia in advance that Ms. Black Dragon would be a bodyguard. Since Zola went behind closed doors with Krobelus, he couldn’t tell her at that moment. Who knew that he happened to meet Zola who just ended the training when he came back.

Wait, these people seemed to have put up this interrogation posture in advance. Someone must have informed them earlier. Chen Rui reacted immediately and glared at Paglio: You are too despicable!

Paglio was taken aback, then he immediately reacted and waved his hand quickly, “It’s not me! It’s her!”

The poison dragon was pointing at Delia: Although I suffered a setback previously, I am by no means the kind of despicable villain who would snitch for revenge, but it is true that I am gloating.

Ms. Second Boss of the secret intelligence had much more momentum than Chen Rui as she confidently said, “Leader, I couldn’t control your business, but this time you have gone overboard! We joked that we received so many gifts from you without giving anything in return a few days ago. Zola was serious after listening to it, and she wanted to make a gift for you. That’s why she asked Betty to help her out behind closed doors in the Rainbow Valley for several days. Unexpectedly, you brought an unfamiliar woman back!”

A gift? Chen Rui was startled. His gaze toward Ms. Fairy Dragon became extremely tender, and his heart was full of warmth. Just as he was about to speak, Ms. Black Dragon asked ignorantly at the wrong timing, “The woman in the middle looks annoying? Do you want me to kill her for you?”

As soon as this sentence came out, it was like hitting the trigger point. The overwhelming murderous vibe rushed toward Olypheus.

Chen Rui broke out in a cold sweat, “Don’t make things worse! She is my…”

“Be careful!” Facing Zola’s murderous vibe, the bodyguard instinctively felt the huge danger, and she professionally pulled Chen Rui behind her in a protective manner.

This action added fuel to the fire. Zola’s suppressed anger suddenly erupted. As her spectacles flashed, a purple arc appeared in front of Olypheus, surrounding her like a living snake.

Originally, Olypheus was in a defensive stance initially, but when she saw this magic attack, she seemed a lot more relaxed. Instead of avoiding it, she took the initiative to go over and let the purple lightning strike her.

After a burst of raging thunderous sound, the protective inscription on the ground was all twisted and deformed, but Olypheus just shook off the residual arc on her long black hair. She was actually completely unharmed.

Putting aside Delia, Paglio and Krobelus knew the power of the purple arc most clearly. Even Paglio couldn’t put up such a nonchalant appearance. The girl in black was actually able to endure this compound magic power without any effort!

Olypheus showed strong confidence, “Woman with glasses, you are very strong, but so what if you are the peak stage of the Demon Overlord? If you can only attack with magic, no matter how much it is, you are not my opponent!”

“Crystal dragon?” Paglio was rapidly strengthening the protection of the surrounding Dragon Inscription. He was taken aback when he saw this scene, then he reacted, “No, she’s a black dragon!”

The black dragon was immune to all low-level magic. The damage of high-level magic was reduced by at least 90% to 99%. The stronger the talent, the higher the immunity. They could be regarded as the nemesis of the magic element.

Facing an magic-element opponent whom Olypheus could restrain with her talent, she gained confidence and rose into the air. Her right index finger pointed at Zola while her left hand held her right wrist. The surroundings were suddenly filled with terrifying darkness breath, and the space seemed chaotic and distorted. Chen Rui’s anxious shouts were isolated.

“Have a taste of my [Black Dragon Cannon]!”

A huge black ball wrapped in dark blue destructive energy appeared at Olypheus’ fingertips. It charged toward Zola who was in front below like a missile ejected from a launcher.

“Damn you, are you going to demolish the house!?” Paglio’s facial expression changed slightly as he blocked in front of Krobelus and Delia. His both hands kept casting spells to fully protect the house with the surrounding Dragon Inscription. Otherwise, if these 2 women burst into full power, not only this house, but the entire block would become ruins.

In the eyes of Master Poison Dragon, these 2 chicks were both Chen Rui’s women, so it was not good to help either side. It was better to watch the changes silently. To put it bluntly, he just continued to watch the fun.

Zola actually held back her power when she launched the lightning just now. At most, it would just knock out this nasty woman at the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. She didn’t expect that she was a black dragon with [Anti-Magic] talent.

Because of the enemy like the crystal dragon, Zola had been studying the method of magic defense weakening, so she was not afraid of this kind of opponent. Although the magic just now was almost ineffective against Olypheus, she did not take Olypheus’ attack of this level seriously. With her ability, she could either defend or dodge it easily.

However, Zola hated this woman who seduced Chen Rui and even threatened to kill her. She already had a magic wand in her hand. It was the artifact, Secret Shadow, that Chen Rui gave her. She wanted to crush the [Black Dragon Cannon] directly. I will let that nasty woman, who doesn’t know who she is dealing with, know what are the rules! What is politeness! What is senior and junior!

At the critical moment, a familiar figure suddenly appeared in front of the [Black Dragon Cannon]. It is the bastard man whom I have been thinking about all day long!

Zola and Olypheus were taken aback at the same time. Not to mention the terrifying destructive power of the [Black Dragon Cannon] itself, there was a considerable risk in just teleporting in front of Olypheus’ dark power that distorted the space.

Chen Rui just had the strength of the Demon Emperor. If he was hit, he would undoubtedly die. Olypheus wanted to withdraw her power in panic, but it was too late.

No matter what Chen Rui’s relationship with the black dragon woman was, his action of blocking in front of her could explain everything. The resentment in Zola’s heart suddenly vanished, but it was still a step too late to rescue him. The [Black Dragon Cannon] had hit Chen Rui firmly.

The power of this blow was quite amazing. Even with the Dragon Inscription protection, the surrounding ground also became distorted in an instant. Tables, chairs, and plants shattered and flew away in the terrifying airflow.

However, Chen Rui’s figure was not swallowed by the terrifying power of destruction. He had a large dark golden round shield in his hand. The surface of the shield was covered with primitive patterns. The stunning [Black Dragon Cannon] actually couldn’t break through this round shield’s defense.

Leviathan Royal Family’s artifact: Demon Shield!

Demon Shield was one of the 2 major components of the 7 artifacts, Illusive Demon Shield. Back then, Chen Rui, Delia and Roman found the Illusive Shield in the treasures of the Silent Night Wetland. The Demon Shield was schemed from Broc when Chen Rui used the identity of “Master Arthur”. At that time,he even planted the seeds of self-explosion on Broc’s [Blood River] sword.

However, after the Demon Shield was cracked by the Super System, it was unable to leave Chen Rui like the God-Eating Mask. He probably had to wait until he reached a certain level or fully grasp the magical effect of the Super System before it could be separated.

Delia didn’t mind about this. Not only was she getting the IIlusive Shield, Chen Rui saved both her and Roman. If Chen Rui requested, Delia would not be stingy even if it was the IIlusive Shield.

Due to the importance of Demon Shield, Chen Rui rarely used it normally in order to avoid revealing Delia’s whereabouts. The special characteristic of the Demon Shield was not only its strong defensive power, but also its ability to absorb the attacking power and turn it into its own use. However, the attack of Olypheus, who was at the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord, was too powerful. Chen Rui’s body was still pushed back by the massive force and his hands which were holding the shield trembled a little. Two deep trenches were dragged out on the hard ground protected by the Dragon Inscription.

In the face of this kind of terrifying pressure, the person who couldn’t withstand it might collapse. Fortunately, Chen Rui was well prepared earlier. His body suddenly lit up with a dazzling light.

[Royal Star Transformation]!

However, at this moment, Chen Rui felt that time suddenly slowed down. Everything around him also slowed down. It became slower and slower until it stopped.

He could clearly see the stagnant dark blue terrifying energy cluster in front of him. He could also sense Zola’s anxious expression on the side, but he couldn’t move. The only thing “moving” was his breathing. His slow and deep breathing sound seemed to be the only sound in the world. It was like covering his ears and listening to his own breathing in a quiet environment. It seemed strange and awe-inspiring.

At the same time, a strange force filled his body uncontrollably. Chen Rui tried his best to constrain the spread of this force but to no avail.

In the eyes of Zola and others, Chen Rui seemed different. His body was suddenly full of a strange breath of destruction. They were not sure if it was due to the impact from the destructive power of the [Black Dragon Cannon].

Immediately afterwards, the dazzling starlight on Chen Rui’s body suddenly dimmed and turned into a dark color. His momentum and strength began to rise sharply. He seemed to be shrouded in a dark cloud with a dark red light inside. The black cloud quickly entered his body.

Chen Rui’s body was already donned with full body armor. This dark red armor was jet-black with a hideous style. It was flashing with a strange luster like a black gem bred by the abyss volcano in hell. Not only that, Chen Rui’s pupils slowly turned red. The waves of breath of destruction exuded from his body were not as powerful as the [Black Dragon Cannon] in terms of “quantity”, but the “quality” was way stronger.

The change just now was completed in an instant. Facing the terrifying [Black Dragon Cannon], Chen Rui suddenly made a shocking move. The Demon Shield in his hand suddenly disappeared, and he directly resisted the enormous energy ball with his hands.

When Chen Rui touched the light ball, his body trembled and his eyes became even redder. His feet continued to move backward, but instead of being pushed like earlier, he retreated step by step, sinking into the soil with every step.

The power of the [Black Dragon Cannon] seemed to have been swallowed in a certain way. It weakened rapidly. Finally, Chen Rui’s footsteps stopped, and the huge [Black Dragon Cannon] had disappeared without a trace.

All the people present were taken aback. Olypheus was the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord, and Chen Rui did not rely on the defense of the Demon Shield, but he resisted the huge move forcefully!

At this moment, Chen Rui suddenly struck a pose. The three fingers on his right hand were clenched tightly with his thumb straightened and his index finger stretched out. His left hand grasped his right wrist as he aimed at Olypheus in the air. The breath of destruction in his body was very intense; it had risen to a terrifying level instantly. A giant black ball which was wrapped in a dark blue destructive power appeared at his fingertips. The surrounding ground began to crack in the tremble as it could not bear the strong force.

In the process of condensing the black ball, Chen Rui seemed strenuous. Blood was flowing out from his ears, nose and mouth.

Olypheus was initially surprised at the powerful strength of this “employer”, but she was even more surprised to see this action: This posture! This power…

As soon as the thought came out, the huge black ball had been ejected from Chen Rui’s fingertips. The speed and momentum were amazing. Olypheus did not have the time to be surprised, and she crossed her arms to block in front of her.

The black ball that arrived in an instant hit Olypheus with a “boom“, swallowing Ms. Black Dragon’s body in the blink of an eye. The black ball wrapped in the dark blue energy violently twisted and wriggled for a while in the air. The movement gradually decreased. It suddenly tore apart when it was about to calm down, and the slender figure appeared from within.

There was smoke on Olypheus’ arm, and her face looked very solemn: That’s right! It is the [Black Dragon Cannon]! Although the power is slightly inferior, the special characteristics of the power are exactly the same!

This was simply the phrase in the Demon Realm’s old saying: Retaliating with one’s own skill!

Was this Shura or Chen Rui himself?

chapters.title: Chapter 485 - The Mystery Of Phecda
chapters.body:
Chapter 485 - The Mystery Of Phecda

All those present had keen eyes. Not only Olypheus herself, but even Zola and others’ understood that Chen Rui just swallowed Olypheus’s [Black Dragon Cannon] in a strange way, then he launched it back unbelievably!

Everyone looked at Chen Rui who was wearing dark red armor and exuding a terrifying dark breath. Zola was the most worried one. She appeared in front of Chen Rui in a flash, and she was immediately targeted by the red eyes which exuded a strange breath.

“Chen Rui!”

When Chen Rui heard Zola’s voice, he shook and the blood red in his eyes quickly faded and returned to black. The dark red armor also transformed into a bright light while changing its shape.

“Zola.” Chen Rui opened his visor and barely smiled before saying that. Then his body collapsed forward, and Zola hugged him quickly.

“He, he, he… won’t die, right?!” Ms. Black Dragon landed on the ground and stuttered as she looked at Chen Rui whose breath was greatly reduced in Zola’s arms. She thumped her chest in regret, “It’s over; I found this employer that provided free food and drink with great difficulty!”

“Employer?” Now Krobelus and Delia heard it clearly.

Chen Rui had no strength to explain anymore. The armor on his body was gradually disappearing. He felt that he exhausted tremendous spirit power and physical strength; even more than the [Royal Star Transformation] under normal conditions. The change just now was definitely related to Shura. The [Black Dragon Cannon] was just an “incentive”.

A while ago, he felt that Shura’s strength had increased greatly to a certain “critical point”. Could it be…

The Olypheus’ misunderstanding had been basically clarified. Even if there was no clarification, Zola couldn’t care so much. She hurriedly helped Chen Rui into the room to rest.

“Sorry, Zola.”

“I should be the one apologizing.” Ms. Fairy Dragon shook her head, “I shouldn’t doubt you.”

Chen Rui thought he had heard it wrongly. Even if Ms. Fairy Dragon made a mistake normally, she would use the fake daze’s attributes to act dumb. Today, she actually takes the initiative to apologize?

“This… is a gift I personally made for you these days.” Zola took out a necklace; the small pendant looked a little peculiar.

Chen Rui took the necklace and praised, “This eagle is very beautiful.”

Saying that it was an eagle was a bit distorting the fact. To be precise, it was more like a turkey, but no matter what it was, Chen Rui felt warm in his heart.

Zola’s face flushed suddenly, “That… is a dragon.”

In fact, she was quite weak in craftsmanship, so she specially asked the expert guidance of Krobelus in return for teaching magic. Unfortunately, Ms. Emerald Dragon was also a below-par expert, and finally, she turned a dragon into a turkey.

Chen Rui was taken aback, then he smiled, “I saw it wrongly. I like it very much, Zola. I like it very much.”

Zola’s purple eyes brightened, “This necklace can activate protection when you are in danger. It can withstand up to 2 attacks of the peak stage of the Demon Overlords. Unfortunately, it will lose its function after using twice due to the limit of materials.”

Chen Rui didn’t expect the necklace to have this ability. He asked quickly, “What material is it?”

“It’s my 7-color scale which can activate defense talent in times of crisis, but unfortunately, I have only one”

“It’s the only self-protection scale of the fairy dragon?” Chen Rui was taken aback, “No way!” What if you are in danger?”

“I have the artifact tulle and Secret Shadow that you gave me. I will be fine.” Zola shook her head. “What’s more, the scales will slowly regenerate in 100 years.”

“This is really an extremely precious gift.” Chen Rui was moved in his heart and held Zola’s hand. “No, with you by my side, it is already the most precious gift.”

“Oh.” Zola replied in daze. Her face was red, but the joy flowing from the corners of her eyes was unconcealable.

When Chen Rui was about to speak, he suddenly felt dizzy. It seemed to be a symptom of overusing spirit power. Zola quickly helped him to lie down on the bed once she noticed it.

“I’m fine. I just need a quiet rest.”

Zola nodded, and she suddenly leaned down to kiss his face, then she turned around and walked out of the room. Chen Rui felt warm as he slowly closed his eyes.

He did not fall asleep as usual after the [Royal Star Transformation], but he entered the Super System. If he used the [Royal Star Transformation] as usual, there would be no strange and weird changes just now, nor would the symptoms of exhausting spirit power and physical strength appear so quickly.

What abnormality has happened?

Chen Rui’s thoughts entered the Galaxy Divinity Temple. He sat on the throne while watching each piece of light screen carefully. Finally, his gaze was fixed on the status bar.

Title: Star Lord

Evolution Level: Five-star

Experience Value:1%

Aura Value: 454.8 million

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A-

This discovery made Chen Rui both surprised and delighted. Since he successfully broke through to the Star Lord, his strength had been steadily improving. He had faintly approached the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor. Furthermore, he had realized the [Summer Territory]. He also had the strength to compete with the early stage of the Demon Overlord with the extraordinary skill of [Royal Star Transformation]. However, his Experience Value had not changed. The Super System was somewhat different from the training in this world. Even if Chen Rui could now continue to improve his combat power and physical qualities to A+, as long as his Experience Value remained unchanged, he couldn’t break through Phecda and reach the next six-star evolution.

I didn’t expect this weird change today would actually increase my Experience Value.

Is this the mystery of Phecda?

“Don’t you want to say something?” Chen Rui asked lightly.

A wisp of black gas suddenly appeared in the Galaxy Divinity Temple. It gradually condensed into another “Chen Rui” appearance except that the pupils of his eyes were red.

Shura.

“You should have noticed my changes a long time ago.” Shura said with a confident face. “Olypheus’s [Black Dragon Cannon] just now was just an inducement. Currently, I have already grasped the power that you don’t have. ”

“So what?” Chen Rui was unmoved, “If you could really swallow my consciousness or completely take control of my body, would you still just be talking here?”

“I know that your will is firm, and you have an extremely persistent heart to pursue strength. I have experienced it from that damn Megrez’s [Refined Mind]. I know everything about you, including the past of the crossover, because I am equal to the other you.” Shura looked serious, “Then you should know that you can only defeat me at best, but you can never truly destroy me because I myself represent destruction. Creation and destruction are eternal truths of the universe. They are opposites yet interdependent on each other just like the two of us.”

“Are you trying to tell a cliché story like the destiny of the Gemini Man.” Chen Rui shook his head, “You can simply say that you are the illegitimate child of destiny, then maybe I’ll be a little more interested. If you want to keep going around the bushes like this, I don’t mind chatting with you before falling asleep. By the way, you don’t need to talk about lies like accepting your consciousness so that I can kill Demon Overlord and even the Demi-God powerhouses. Hearing this too much only increases the hypnotic effect.”

“That’s not a lie, but since you won’t choose that path, I won’t force it on you. What I want to say is what you really care about.” Shura stared into his eyes, and he suddenly showed a strange smile, “Don’t you want to know why that Experience Value has changed? Don’t you want to know the true mystery of Phecda?”

Chen Rui narrowed his eyes slightly, “Oh? You know?”

“The so-called Phecda is the embodiment of a certain mood. [Royal Star Transformation] is not only a combat skill, but also a medium of comprehension.” Shura raised a finger, “Remember the feeling when you faced [Black Dragon Cannon] just now? At that time, I activated my own power to let you experience the feeling of Phecda. If you didn’t try to fight me with your will, how could your physical strength and spirit power be so exhausted? Have you seen anyone distracted to fight with his own people while fighting the enemy?”

“You’re not my people.” Chen Rui shrugged, “But… please go on.”

“I don’t know what the Phecda originally defined by the Super System is, but I can tell you for sure that both the Megrez you experienced previously and the Phecda you are going to experience now are of shorter time than the system originally estimated; even if there is a special time rule place like the training ground.” Shura’s raised index finger turned into a thumb, and he pointed at himself, “These are all because of me. My presence makes your progress faster and also much easier.

The same is true for Phecda. The power I have can be called destruction which is the origin of destruction. As long as you can embody destruction and comprehend my origin power, then you can comprehend Phecda and break through the current level. ”

“[Royal Star Transformation] is not only a combat skill, but also a medium for understanding Phecda?” Chen Rui seemed to understand something.

Shura nodded, “Yes, let go of the resistance and shackles of the soul, and feel my power. You can get my power, just like the previous… ‘retaliating with one’s own skill’. Not only that, the higher the understanding, the greater the power of the [Royal Star Transformation], the longer the time limit, and the shorter the exhaustion period afterwards. You may even fight with the opponent of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord.”

Seeing Chen Rui’s smiling expression, Shura frowned, “Why, you don’t believe it? The change in your Experience Value is the best proof.”

“I don’t know if others believed it or not, but I believed it anyway.” Chen Rui spread his hands. This attitude made Shura unable to say many tempting words as if he was punching in the air.

“Hmph, it’s up to you to believe it or not. It’s your own choice whether to stagnate or move toward stronger power!” Shura let out a confident laugh as he turned into a light smoke and disappeared in the blink of an eye.
