When Crown Prince Grimm was alive, Shea had met Sarandi several times. According to the seniority, she should really call him uncle.

“I can’t afford the title uncle.” Sarandi’s eyes became fierce, “Madam lord, please tell me your full name!”

Chen Rui saw Sarandi yelling at Shea, so he interjected, “Sir Sarandi is so majestic. It seems that you still don’t realize that you are a prisoner. You’re not qualified to question any of us.”

Sarandi ignored Chen Rui and just stared at Shea.

“Shea. Lucifer.” Shea answered calmly.

“Really? I thought it was Shea. Asmodeus.” Sarandi showed sarcasm.

Shea’s expression did not change, “Some things will never change, just like Shea. Lucifer. It’s just that when did the secret apprentice of the Lord of Midnight Sun change his side to Obsidian.”

This sharp counterattack caused Chen Rui to dispel the thought of speaking. Sarandi sneered, “You don’t understand at all. Who is Obsidian? Is he qualified to be my teacher? I have only one teacher from beginning to end. Even if Obsidian stole the power which originally belonged to your father, this Fallen Angel Empire is ultimately controlled by the Lucifer Royal Family! What about you, madam lord? Earlier, your father and you were suppressed by Obsidian’s means. It was just an internal struggle of our Lucifer Royal Family after all. Now, in order to deal with the capital, you actually did not hesitate to sell the Fallen Angel Empire to the Asmodeus Royal Family!”

Shea didn’t explain too much about this issue, “Chen Rui was right. You’re just a prisoner. I don’t need to explain anything to you, but you can go on.”

“You should not be a foolish person since you can persist under the oppression of the capital until now. Don’t you know that politics is all about interests? Why would Catherine the Great from the Dark Shadow Empire help the Dark Moon? Even if you defeated Obsidian and ascended to the throne with Catherine’s support, it is nothing more than becoming a puppet of the Dark Shadow Empire!”

“Politics is indeed about the interests. However, the Dark Moon did not sell the interests of the Fallen Angel Empire. We only exchanged some interests with the Bloody Vine Flower Estate of the Dark Shadow Empire.”

Sarandi showed strong disdain, “Do you think I’m a three-year-old child? With just a magic land improvement and battle ball, the Fallen Angel Empire will help you eliminate the Blue Lava Estate and the Red Spirit Estate Army? They will secretly place the peak stage Demon Overlord dragon by your side? They will secretly help the Dark Moon’s rapid economic and military development? I can’t imagine the Demon Realm’s top sage will make such a stupid decision, let alone how can you get rid of the control of the Dark Shadow Empire!”

Sarandi’s emotions suddenly became agitated. He clenched his fists and roared, “Once the Fallen Angel Empire really falls into the hands of others, you will be the most unforgivable sinner! I’m also a sinner! I shouldn’t have been protecting you and your father in secret!”

Shea’s eyes showed a surprised expression. It turned out that Sarandi actually was one of the people who had been secretly protecting the Dark Moon. It was precisely because of the support of George and Sarandi that Obsidian did not dare to blatantly get rid of the Dark Moon.

“Uncle Sarandi… Shea’s firm voice sounded, “I swear in the name of Shea. Lucifer, I will never betray the Fallen Angel Empire and Lucifer Royal Family. If any of my words are false, my soul will fall into the abyss forever; be burned by the hellfire with no liberation. “

Sarandi trembled slightly as he stared at Shea for a moment. His clenched fist slowly loosened. He was speechless. An oath based on the surname was not taken casually in the Demon Realm, especially this kind of vow.

Chen Rui looked at the timing and said, “Sir Sarandi really misunderstood. The army of the Red Spirit Estate and the Blue Lava Estate was completely wiped out by the Dark Moon with its own power. Princess Shea took advantage of the opportunity to rebuild the Red Blood Flame Army of the Lord of Midnight Sun. As for the rapid economic development, although we used the business family of the Dark Shadow Empire initially to open the trade route to the west, now the initiative and core of the economic development are in the hands of the Dark Moon. As for dragon powerhouse, the Dark Shadow Empire has nothing to do with it. I don’t know if Sir Sarandi still remembers, when the Lord of Midnight Sun put down the Beelzebub Royal Family rebellion, he sealed a sleeping dragon?”

Sarandi suddenly thought about it, “The Blue Lake’s poison dragon!”

“Yes, the poison dragon encountered some trouble after waking up. It was Princess Royal who provided great help. So, now the poison dragon is the guest of the Dark Moon.” Chen Rui saw Sarandi’s attitude was moved, so he took the opportunity to add, “Vanim, the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord, the assassin sent by capital last time, has surrendered. Since Sir Sarandi is the apprentice of the Lord of Midnight Sun who has secretly helped and protected the Dark Moon for many years, why not…”

Sarandi knew what Chen Rui wanted to say. He shook his head before Chen Rui finished speaking, “I’m different from the elder family patriarch. I will not submit to the Dark Moon. Secretly supporting the Crown Prince Grimm’s descendants is just a personal matter. My true allegiance is not to one person but to the Fallen Angel Empire. Although Obsidian is not a great talent and is far inferior to the Lord of Midnight Sun, there is no more suitable person in the entire royal family to rule the empire. After the fall of the Lord of Midnight Sun, the Fallen Angel Empire has been able to maintain a stable relationship with the other two empires, and Regent Obsidian has contributed a lot to this.”

Chen Rui fell into contemplation for a moment, then he said, “You are wrong. It is Catherine the Great that makes the 3 empires peaceful. Catherine the Great is also doing it for the benefit of the Dark Shadow Empire. In order to avoid being conquered by the Bloody Empire, she uses the Fallen The Angel Empire as a buffer. Let’s not mention that the Fallen Angel Empire has to “aid” a large number of materials to the two empires every year as a price. At present, the Bloody Empire is eyeing closely at the Fallen Angel Empire and the conflicts at the border are ongoing. Meanwhile, Obsidian is trapped in the fundraising issue which is questioned by the major lords and families. If this continues, the Fallen Angel Empire will only become weaker with the internal and external problems. How can it compete with the two empires? If sir still blindly follows Obsidian, that’s the true sinner who causes the Fallen Angel Empire collapse forever.”

“Human, your eloquence is as outstanding as your talents, but unfortunately it is useless. Whether it is personal strength or strength at hand, Princess Shea is incomparable to Obsidian now.” Sarandi’s title of Shea has changed from “lord” to “princess”. He seemed to have believed Shea’s oath, but his unwillingness to submit was still very firm.

“I believe there are many people in the entire Fallen Angel Empire who have the same idea as sir. These people are not really working for Obsidian, but for the so-called ‘big picture’.” Chen Rui’s eyes rolled, and he took an extreme measure. “What if, at most 10 years, the Dark Moon can beat Obsidian in all aspects?”

“10 years?” Sarandi glanced at Shea in surprise, and he took a deep breath, “If Your Highness can do this in 10 years, I, Sarandi. Lucifer is willing to serve under Your Highness to behead all enemies on the way for the new empress of the empire, but if Your Highness can’t do it, then please consider the highest interests of the royal family as the top priority and truly obey the capital.”

“It’s a deal!” Shea agreed without hesitation.

Sarandi was moved by the strong confidence in Shea’s eyes. He felt that what he had always believed in seemed to be shaken, and he finally nodded.

Sarandi didn’t know that Shea agreed so without thinking, not because she had faith in herself, but in that human.

Some time later, in a house.

Chen Rui looked at Isabella who was making tea for him. He smiled bitterly, “This time you are really famous. Now the small and big families know that there is a murderous demon leader in the secret intelligence department, but your methods seem to be a little harsh. “

Isabella didn’t answer Chen Rui’s question, but she just poured a cup of tea for him instead, “Try it.”

“But that’s okay, at least those guys will be cautious in the future. Even if they have some motives, they will be a little more dettered.” Chen Rui took a sip from the cup and said, “Unfortunately, because of the spy, the 3 contact points of the Dark Demon in the Fallen Angel Capital’s, including Walong Hotel, were all uprooted. Fortunately, 1 contact point survived. However, since the secret magic communication station was destroyed, it will probably be quite difficult to get an accurate intel from the capital as soon as possible.”

“How is my tea-making art?” Isabella asked with a hint of charm in her eyes.

Chen Rui keenly noticed a bit of annoyance in the charm, so he shrugged, stopped talking about “official matters”, and took a sip of tea, “It’s not bad this time, the brewing time should be a little shorter…”

“En, I see.” Isabella blinked her charming eyes and nodded earnestly. She was really learning tea-making art very carefully. The scene where the two of them were sitting on the ground with tea sets in the middle was quite atmospheric.

“Is the Quqin that I gave you still there?”

With a thought, Chen Rui opened his palm. It was the instrument that was forcibly given away that day.

“Have you practiced it?”

“Uh… you know, my time is tight…”

“So, did you make time to practice?”

“I have to study alchemy in the morning, work in the afternoon, and run around in the evening…”

“I want to hear you play a tune.”

“…”

Chen Rui gave up and played the Quqin. When he was the otaku on Earth, although he liked listening to music, he was clueless about music theory. He could have mistaken the musical notation as the ancient tadpole script.

After coming to the Demon Realm, especially after getting the red piccolo, he deliberately studied music theory for a while. With the help of the [Deep Analysis], he had achieved a little success. He would also practice the Quqin given by Isabella for a while when he had the free time in between training in the training ground. According to the time rule of the training ground, it could be considered as immersion for quite a while.

When the elegant music sounded in the courtyard, a surprise flashed in Isabella’s eyes. She came over and sat down. She gently leaned against Chen Rui’s back, closed her eyes, and listened quietly to the song.

After the Nero incident, the two did not further escalate their intimacy, but they gained a tacit understanding that they didn’t have before.

“What tune is this? It sounds good.”

“I think it’s called “The End of the World”.”

“The End of the World…” Isabella’s fascinating eyes showed a trace of confusion. Her red lips moved, but she didn’t ask anything.

Suddenly, Chen Rui sensed the question that she didn’t ask, and he said 2 words to himself, “I will.”

An odd expression flashed in Isabella’s green eyes, and the corners of her mouth were slightly curved. She closed her eyes comfortably, “Can you play it again?”

“En…”

In the melodious music, the moonlight reflected the back-to-back shadows like two merged hearts.

After a long time.

“Any other tunes?”

“No, I can only get this one right.”

“Then, play it 20 times.”

Harem member +1; Isabella seemed to have settled down a lot. At least, the sarcasm in her tone was gone.

chapters.title: Chapter 492 - Gift
chapters.body:
Chapter 492 - Gift

Chapter 492: Gift

Today was Princess Royal Shea’s birthday. Although there was no official celebration, the entire Dark Moon was still lively with a festive atmosphere.

All the shops were on sale today. The crowds in the streets and lanes were constantly flowing. The traffic was busy, and the street vendors could be heard everywhere.

“Beautiful madam, this is the latest ruby lipstick from the Dark Shadow Empire. It costs only 1 purple crystal coin. Come and get one.”

Like many street vendors, a dark goblin was trying his best to sell goods to a man and woman. The tall, black-haired woman had an extremely attractive body, but her appearance could only be regarded as ordinary. Nevertheless, the dark goblin still spared no effort to compliment her, only hoping that the middle-aged man at the side who looked like her partner could be generous.

“This is a green rose fragrant leaf. As long as you wear it, you can exude an intoxicating fragrance. I can give madam the best price, 70 white crystal coins will do.”

“Madam, please wait a minute. There is also a magical music windmill here. It’s 30 white crystal coins only. You can buy one for the children of the family…”

The man smiled slightly, “This windmill is fine, but 30 white crystal coins are too expensive. I can consider buying it with 2 white crystal coins.”

“Sir’s bargain is too much. If you buy my windmill from the next shop, it will cost at least 80 white crystal coins, and the price is not negotiable. How about this? Strangers the first time, friends the second. 29 white crystal coins, I can’t reduce it anymore.”

“There are some problems with the magic circle of your windmill. If I’m not mistaken, the music will be interrupted after about 10 minutes of rotation. Such a defective product still cost such a high price. If you don’t sell it for 3 white crystal coins, forget it. “

“…”

The tall woman was a little surprised as she watched the man and the street vendor bargain fiercely. Finally, the windmill was sold for 4 white crystal coins. The man fiddled with the windmill for a while, handed it to the woman, and held her hand.

The woman’s face turned red as she tried to break free, but she was held tightly.

The man chuckled, “What are you afraid of? You are Ashe now, right, my madam?”

The woman’s face turned redder, and she whispered, “Bastard who takes advantage of the situation.” Seeing that the people around didn’t pay attention to them, she stopped struggling at the moment and let the man hold her in public. After walking for a while, it became natural.

The woman looked at the colorful windmill turning with the wind and said, “Alice will probably like this windmill.”

“No, this is for you. Today is your birthday.” The man laughed and said, “I have adjusted the magic circle. The music has been changed to your favorite serenade.”

A strange expression flashed in the woman’s purple eyes. She shook the windmill, and the windmill really produced a familiar music, but she could only hear it by listening carefully in such a busy market.

“Today is a good day, can you smile for me, pretty girl? Anyway, I just bought you a gift for a high price. Otherwise, give me the windmill!”

“Don’t even think about it!” The woman held the windmill in her hand tightly, but her face habitually became stern, “You deceived me to come out just to take advantage of me? I still have many documents…”

The man shook his finger, “Let those damn documents go to hell. Today you are not Princess Shea, but my Madam Ashe. Laugh when you want to laugh, cry when you want to cry; don’t give me face.”

“You have fully demonstrated your honey-tongued talent, Sir Simon. I don’t know if I’m the first woman treated like this? Am I the tenth or even more?”

Sir Simon was a little embarrassed. Ms. Ashe pinched the back of his hand hard, “Is it countable with both hands?”

“Yes! Yes!” Sir Simon was in pain, but he didn’t dare to resist. He quickly added, “I can count with just one hand!”

Ms. Ashe snorted in dissatisfaction, and she finally did not exert any more strength. Unknowingly, there was a bit more vitality on her face that she did not normally have. There was a commotion ahead. Chen Rui pulled the madam Royal Highness with the pseudonym Ashe as they squeezed in to take a look. It turned out that a battle ball competition was about to be held. Both teams of the game were private teams that played in conjunction of the Princess Royal birthday. There were also prizes.

However, the 2 main forwards of the red team were unable to participate in the game due to a leg injury from a small clash with the people in the tavern before the game. The read team had only one forward substitute and was currently worrying about candidates. Chen Rui recognized that the coach of the red team was his blacksmith shop friend, Zach, whom he had known previously. Suddenly he had an idea in his mind. He walked forward and claimed to be a friend of a human, whispered a few words, and stuffed a small pouch of money into his pocket. After a while, he finally nodded.

This way, Chen Rui succeeded in becoming the forward of the red team while Shea stood in the simple and crowded stands. As the starting whistle sounded, Chen Rui, who was dressed in red, began to perform. Although his skill was not very good and his strength was suppressed at the Intermediate Demon level, his eyesight and judgment were dozens of times better than others, let alone that simple gravity magic circle. When he saw the opportunity, he received a pass from his teammate and kicked in the air, but unfortunately it hit the goal post.

There was a moment of regret from the surrounding audience. Shea was able to remain calm at first, then she thought of Chen Rui’s phrase “Today you are Ashe.” Finally, she tried to let go of the closure of her heart and began to accept the atmosphere of the audience. She started to clap and cheer softly. This feeling was completely different from watching the game from the VIP seat of the arena. At that time, she was just watching the players of both sides chase back and forth while waiting for the end of the game. Now, she became a spectator who cared about the game. She had immersed into the stadium because the man was running on the field. Running for her!

Especially when Chen Rui kissed the “Dark Will” ring and pointed to the stand she was in after he scored a goal, Shea felt an unprecedented excitement and pride.

At the end of the game, the red team won by 5-2. Chen Rui, who scored a hat-trick, became the red team’s biggest contributor to the victory. This was even due to the result of restraining his strength. Seeing him running to her, Shea no longer had the habitual indifference on her face. She took out a handkerchief and wiped his sweat with an admiring gaze. Chen Rui laughed and fled the stadium while hugging Shea. The people were whistling and applauding behind him.

If they didn’t run, Zach, the coach with bright eyes, would probably do everything possible to invite this super shooter to join the team.

After the intense ball game, Shea seemed to relax a little. She held hands with Chen Rui while walking freely down the street. They were shopping, eating snacks, and watching the excitement.

Shea suddenly had an illusion as if she had returned to her carefree childhood when she didn’t have to wear a mask, face tedious affairs, and shoulder the heavy pressure every day.

She had not had this precious feeling for a long time…

When Shea looked at the man who was talking and laughing, her purple eyes showed unconcealed tenderness. She held his arm tightly, and the expression on her face finally became richer. When she was happy, she smiled. When she was not happy, she would be a bit temperamental. No one would recognize her anyway.

In front of the tavern, Chen Rui pulled Shea sideways and turned around. It turned out that there was a beautiful girl in a black dress in front of her. She had a beautiful face, long legs, and her chest… Uh, a little flat.

The girl’s lovely nose suddenly twitched as if she smelled a familiar smell. She walked toward Chen Rui. Chen Rui felt this from the [Analytical Eyes], and he had a bad omen. This chick’s sense of smell is very sensitive. It seems to be a special talent that is able to see through the transformation technique and [Camouflage]. Paglio, who was being stalked, is often busted by her talent.

If this chick noticed something abnormal today, it would be troublesome if she goes back and files a complaint. Chen Rui had an idea. His hand shook, and a black crystal coin was thrown on the ground in front of him. He deliberately said, “Who dropped the money? “

As soon as he said so, Ms. Black Dragon’s feet instantly stepped on the black crystal coin accurately, then the chick bent down calmly to tie her shoes. When she stood up, the black crystal coin was gone.

Her expression and movements were smooth and natural. She obviously… had practiced this before. Chen Rui’s forehead was sweating while watching her.

Ms. Black Dragon didn’t seem to give up after picking up the money. She continued to walk toward Chen Rui’s side. Chen Rui did not dare to stay any longer. He pulled Shea and walked forward quickly, then they just happened to bump into a familiar figure holding a wine bottle in the distance. He was flirting with 2 dark elf beauties.

“Ah, look, someone dropped another bag of money in front of that store.” Chen Rui pointed to Paglio and said.

Betraying friends is the way to go.

Ms. Black Dragon was already very close to Chen Rui. Hearing this voice, she immediately took a look in the direction someone was pointing. When she coincidentally saw the unlucky master in hanky-panky, her eyes suddenly lit up. A master keenly noticed the gaze in his direction. When he saw this chick, he was taken aback. As he was about to turn around and sneak away, Ms. Black Dragon had appeared in front of him and looked at the 2 dark elf beauties suspiciously.

Chen Rui took the opportunity to flee with Shea to the opposite direction. When he focused on listening, he heard Ms. Black Dragon’s questioning voice, “Where is the money bag?” It seemed that he was safe for a short time.

(Dead duck brother, you just sacrifice a bit. I will burn more for you during every festival…)

“What’s wrong? She seems to be the person you mentioned last time…” Shea asked curiously.

Chen Rui shrugged, “I’ll tell you when we are out of town later; it’s too dangerous here.”

After a while, there was a pair of man and woman flying in the air above the mountains in the outer suburbs, but it was a man flying with a woman on his back.

“Hey, my Madam Ashe, what are you doing?”

“Alice said that this flying posture called the Titanic; I’m just trying it.”

“The last time Alice struck this pose was on a wyvern’s back. Did you, you, you, actually regard me as a demonic beast?”

In fact, Master Simon was enjoying it. He was having a wonderful feeling being pressed against by the two plumps.

“It’s your honor, Master Simon.” Shea smiled and said. Her straight arms maintained the flying posture at the shoulder height as she felt the wind. It really felt like flying freely. It was completely different from flying by herself.

If someone familiar saw her jubilant smile now, the person must think it was an illusion. Was this the Princess Royal Highness who was always cold like an iceberg?

“Keep me honored if you can!” Chen Rui laughed mischievously as his hand which was holding her grabbed on the elastic buttocks. Before Shea could resist, [Sonic Boom] suddenly sounded, and they flew forward at high speed like a meteor.

Shea was caught off guard, and she quickly grabbed his neck. There was a small lake in front. Chen Rui plunged his head toward the lake. Shea was taken aback, but she did not let go.

Chen Rui did not plunge into the lake. He just took a turn and flew above the water like a bird. The air current drew circles of ripples on the calm lake. Chen Rui slowed down. He was almost flying on the surface of the water.

Shea leaned behind him and looked at the picturesque scenery around her. She felt that her state of mind was peaceful, extraordinarily comfortable, unrestrained, and without pressure. Her state of mind that had always been locked was completely released.

“I placed a magic circle around this area the day before yesterday. The outsiders can’t get in, so we can remove the disguise magic.”

“You prepared this the day before yesterday?” Shea smiled slightly. As the bracelet gleamed faintly, she turned back to that beautiful face, but the usual coldness had long disappeared.

“Can you swim?”

“A little bit, why?”

“Hehe…” Chen Rui suddenly lost the power to support and fell into the water. Shea was caught off guard and fell into the water together. She was about to swim away, only to find that the water was only at waist-level.

Chen Rui laughed out loud. He let go of her and fled to the shore. When Shea was chasing him, he turned back and hit the surface of the water. Numerous drops of water splashed on her face, and she immediately got wet.

Shea wiped her eyes and started to counterattack without showing any weakness. From time to time, the sound of the man and woman chasing and frolicking sounded from the lake. Sparkling waves were drawn by the stirred lake.

After a long time, the frolicking sound gradually lowered because the two chasing figures had overlapped.

Chen Rui was a little surprised because he was actually the passive one this time. Princess Royal Highness actually took the initiative to kiss him! Is this real?!

Shea slowly loosened her arms around his neck, and her face was rosy. The crystal drops of water still hung on her damp golden hair. What was more zealous was that her soaked long skirt was tightly attached to her body. It could no longer cover the perfect curve inside. She was like a goddess under the lavender moonlight near dusk.

This wet body effect is too strong visually…

“Do I look good?” Shea asked at this moment, seemingly on purpose.

Chen Rui stuttered, “Good… you look good! The beauty of Princess Royal Highness can’t be described in sweet words…”

“Hmph! This is still sweet talk!” Shea’s face blushed, but she didn’t deliberately cover up her curvy body. “You brought me here just for some of your crooked thoughts, right? No wonder you started preparing 2 days in advance.”

“I’m innocent! I really just want you to have a happy day” Chen Rui lowered his head, and he took the advantage to peek at the Princess Royal Highness’s chest. The seductive gully was exposed. “Uh, some things are just accidents…”

“Fool.” Shea fell gently in his arms, “This is the best gift I have ever received. I’m really very happy. It has been a long, long time since I was so happy.”

Chen Rui hugged her and sighed softly, “Unfortunately, happiness is short-lived. Tomorrow the happy Madam Ashe will become Princess Shea wearing a mask again.”

“Happiness is more precious because it is short-lived, isn’t it?” Shea closed her eyes, “At least, I have the moment to take off the mask. I’m already satisfied; really satisfied, thank you.”

Chen Rui kissed her forehead and hugged her quietly.

“Can you not go back tonight?” Shea bit her lip and said softly.

Chen Rui was startled. Did I hear it correctly?

Feeling that the body in his arms started to get a little hot, someone was immediately burning with passion.

“As u say, my Princess Royal Highness…”

He didn’t finish his sentence. The reason was very simple. His mouth was not free. He was kissed by Princess Royal Highness again.

Today the Princess Royal Highness is really proactive… No! How can a man be so passive!

Under the purple moonlight, there seemed to be a wolf howling into the sky.

Hmmm, the progress of harem seems to be a little fast these day🧐…

chapters.title: Chapter 493 - Shock! Emergency Intel From The Capital
chapters.body:
Chapter 493 - Shock! Emergency Intel From The Capital

Chapter 493: Shock! Emergency Intel from the Capital

By the lake, in a small tent.

The unguarded Princess Royal Highness was already naked. The white jade-like skin and perfect body shape almost dazzled a wolf’s eyes.

In fact, it was not the first time Chen Rui had seen the naked Princess Royal Highness. When he came to the palace for the God-Eating Mask fragments, he had “accidentally” peeped at Shea bathing. However, the far view and the closer view were totally different… By the way, he was not just looking closely…

As an experienced and patient wolf, Chen Rui naturally wanted to leave a perfect memory for her first time. He didn’t rush it, but he slowly used kisses and touches to dissolve the Princess Royal Highness’ defense and tension.

Gradually, the Princess Royal Highness’ eyes became blurred, and her heated body twisted slightly. She stroked the man’s hair and back from time to time.

As the critical moment was about to come, a soft ringing sound suddenly came from the pile of clothes on the side. This was a signal device made by Chen Rui after the Dark Demon accident. This kind of signal device could send and receive signals within the effective range to notify some emergencies. It was distributed to Isabella, Athena and the others.

This signal was obviously sent by Isabella, but Ms. Secret Intelligence seemed to use it as a summoning device. Yesterday, she used this method to “summon” him to go to her yard to drink tea. So misused, don’t you know that the story of “The Boy Who Cried Wolf“?

It’s okay if it’s a normal day, the problem is now… I really can’t get away.

We can drink tea next time. For now, let’s “eat” Princess Royal Highness first…

Shea had not recovered from the hazy state yet, but she faintly heard a sound. She asked vaguely, “What’s wrong…”

“It’s nothing.” Chen Rui replied, and he kissed her lips again. As he secretly flicked in the air, the signal device suddenly stopped ringing.

“Beep beep beep…”

It was another crucial moment to blend in, and the unpleasant ringing sounded again. This time, it was from Shea’s bracelet.

“Wait!” Shea woke up suddenly. The bracelet glowed with a turbulent purple light which was actually the most urgent signal.

Today was her birthday, and it was night time, yet this kind of emergency signal was still sent out. In addition to Chen Rui’s previous call, something serious must have happened!

“I think we should go.” Shea gently pushed Chen Rui away and sat up. She felt a little sore and soft, and her thigh was actually wet. As she recalled the scene, there was another uncontrollable hotness on her face: What’s the matter with me today. I am actually so impulsive that I almost gave myself to this guy.

Chen Rui looked depressed as he watched Shea hurriedly dressed up. The damn signal didn’t come earlier or later, but it just popped out at the most terrible moment. Did Madam Yini guess that I took Princess Royal Highness out for a date during her birthday, so when she was unsuccessful in summoning me, she deliberately used this method to alert the enemy?

Seeing someone’s bitter expression, Shea’s eyes flashed a trace of smile, and she took the initiative to kiss his face.

“Can you kiss me again?” Chen Rui pointed to the other face.

Princess Royal Highness had already put on her clothes. Her complexion became serious when she saw the signal flashing continuously on her wrist, “Let’s go quickly!”

Seeing that cold and solemn mask returned to Shea’s face, Chen Rui knew that there was no hope.

Once I lose this opportunity, is there another one?

Based on his understanding of the Princess Royal Highness, it was usually impossible to let her let her guards down like today. Is it that… I need to wait until her next birthday?

When the two hurried back to the palace, Isabella had been waiting in the council hall for a long time. Ms. Yini knew that today was Princess Royal Highness’s birthday. Seeing the two appearing at the same time, she didn’t show any special gaze, but she reported an urgent intel with a serious face.

This was really a very urgent intel.

——Regent Obsidian. Lucifer of the Fallen Angel Capital publicly announced this afternoon to propose to the Dark Moon’s Lord Shea!

The news was so shocking that Shea and Chen Rui almost couldn’t react for a while.

“Damn!” Chen Rui’s temper suddenly fired. The damn Regent Obsidian actually proposed to his nephew’s daughter openly!

Does he know what shame is? He even wants to grab my woman!

It is simply intolerable!

Isabella glanced at Chen Rui, who was full of murderous intent, and she said lightly, “Although Obsidian is two generations higher than Princess Shea, this kind of thing is not uncommon among the upper-class nobles, and some even take it as a pleasure. It’s just that most of them are kept secret. As the controller of an empire, openly proposing to a grandniece is quite rare in the history of the Demon Realm. But Obsidian’s excuse is quite high-sounding- the Sword of Fallen Angel. As long as Princess Shea married him, she can own the Sword of Fallen Angel as a queen. As the Lucifer Royal Family of the Midnight Sun, Princess Shea has a high probability of being recognized by the Sword of Fallen Angel. Even if she does not get it, the prince or princess whom she gives birth to in the future can definitely become the true successor of the Sword of Fallen Angel. More importantly, Obsidian can use this to get rid of the title of regent without any dispute and ascend to the emperor throne justifiably.”

Also, give birth to the prince and princess? Chen Rui had the urge to go to the capital to castrate Obsidian first and then kill him, but with the capital’s defense and Obsidian’s own peak stage of the Demon Overlord strength, let alone him, even Paglio would not be successful. This idea was obviously just a fantasy.

“If this strategy succeeds, there will be several major benefits. Firstly, he can use the Dark Moon’s huge wealth to resolve the predicament of arrears in the fundraising. Secondly, he can eliminate the threat of the Dark Moon’s rise without bloodshed as well as annex all the resources and strengths of the Dark Moon. Thirdly, he can use this method to further integrate the Fallen Angel Empire and formally ascend the emperor position, thereby eliminating the dissatisfaction leads by General George. I have to say that this is a good move given Obsidian’s current situation.” Isabella calmly analyzed the concerns. Shea listened carefully, and the anger in her purple pupils gradually faded, revealing a thoughtful expression.

Isabella’s tone changed suddenly, “The Dark Moon is originally the big estate under the capital. It is a great honor for the Royal Highness Regent to propose to a female lord. Moreover, as a royal family member, Princess Royal Highness should put the overall situation of the empire first and accept the regent’s proposal. If she can be recognized by the Sword of Fallen Angel, then the Fallen Angel Empire will become more united and powerful.”

Chen Rui didn’t expect Isabella to actually agree to the marriage proposal. He was about to speak in a hurry, but Shea nodded calmly, “You are right, Isabella. Thank you for your comprehensive analysis. I already understand it.”

Isabella’s gaze had a trace of admiration. She bowed slightly to Shea and did not speak any more.

The calmness shown by the two women gradually made Chen Rui calm down. He was discomposed when it was about a person he cared about. Just now, he was hot-headed and almost lost his temper just now. As a counselor, this kind of behavior was obviously unqualified.

At present, anger was useless, the key was countermeasures.

Shea considered for a moment and said, “Obsidian’s method is really beyond our expectations. If we don’t agree, we can only use rejection or avoidance methods. In order to avoid, unless I’m married or have an engagement. Moreover, the engagement must be formed with forces that make Obsidian fearful, such as the Dark Shadow Empire or the Bloody Empire, but in this way, I may lose the support of General George and the others. As Sarandi said, it is equivalent to betraying the Dark Moon. If I reject…”

“If you reject, the capital can justifiably launch a justified war against the Dark Moon.” Chen Rui intercepted, “It seems that Obsidian is going all out this time. He wants to kill the Dark Moon during the early stage of rising at all costs. “

Shea paced back and forth while pondering. After a while, she finally made a decision, “This matter is quite urgent. We must immediately discuss it with the 3 legion commanders and the 3 patriarchs of Saiful Family, Terry Family, and Viva Family. Tim at the Mountain Xilang cannot come in time. He can use the remote magic communication to participate in the conference. I urgently need information. This includes the overall military intel of the capital and the estate that may join force with them; the details of all the available forces of the Dark Moon; the detailed storage of various materials of the Dark Moon. You two work together to sort it out in the shortest time.”

Chen Rui and Isabella glanced at each other. They knew that it was a critical juncture and this matter should not be delayed, so they retreated and left the council hall together.

Walking out of the palace, Isabella suddenly turned around, and her blue eyes rolled, “Today… is our Princess Royal Highness happy?”

Chen Rui knew that he couldn’t hide it from her, and he smiled bitterly, “At least she was happy before hearing some bad news.”

“Really?” Isabella deliberately showed a look of surprise, then she asked, “So, are you happy now?”

The good matter of being in perfect harmony with each other is stopped at a critical moment, what is there to be happy about?

“As if you don’t know!” Chen Rui said irritatedly, “If a robber said he would take you to be his wife, would I be happy?”

Seeing him making such an example, Isabella faintly smiled like a flower behind the hazy veil, and her eyes were very charming, “Of course you will be happy because there is no annoying woman who threatens you… Besides, how can a commoner like me compare to the natural beauty of the Princess Royal Highness?”

“Men are insatiable. For me, a normal man, whether it is a commoner or natural beauty, as long as she is hooked up, I must have her. Even if it’s the ‘annoying’ woman who threatens me.” Chen Rui deliberately emphasized the word “annoying”. After experiencing the Nero incident, Isabella seemed to have reverted to the charming Devil’s Snare Flower of the capital as before. Her whole person was an enhanced version of a little demon.

However, this flirty style was only shown in front of him.

“As expected, men are creatures who will never be content.” Isabella blinked her alluring eyes and said quietly, “I initially wanted to listen to “The End of the World” dozens of times tonight, but it doesn’t seem possible now. It’s probably hard to have leisure time during this period. But I will accumulate it and listen to my heart’s content at one go.”

Then, wouldn’t it be hundreds and thousands of times?

So many times, can I replace with sex instead? Chen Rui said cruelly in his heart, but he didn’t dare to say it. He just grinned and said, “Since we are so close, how about giving me a way to survive? Don’t knock me to death at one go, slow and steady is the right way.”

“That depends on my mood…” Ms. Yini winked seductively, and someone suddenly felt unable to resist and he surrendered.

After a few jokes, Chen Rui felt that his depressed mood was relieved a lot, and his tense nerves gradually relaxed. He knew that Isabella did it on purpose. Ms. Secret Intelligence was actually a very understanding woman.

With the current tense situation, anxiety and anger would only lead to more mistakes. He must maintain clear-headed.

Chen Rui also urgently needed the report on the military and material resources because from Shea’s attitude and orders just now, she had made a decision.

Then the Dark Moon was about to really face an unprecedented test.

Chen Rui needed to carefully calculate all the forces he could use in his hand. According to the original plan, with the development speed of the Dark Moon, it was only a matter of time before the all out war with the capital. He had also considered how to overthrow Obsidian’s control over the capital and the entire empire step by step, and finally defeat the opponent completely in an all out war in 10 years. That was the reason for the gambling agreement with Sarandi.

However, after all, natural changes would overrule human’s estimation. This day came faster than expected, and much faster!

On the second day of her birthday, Princess Royal Shea was dressed up and attended the Red Blood Flame Army battle ball celebrity game in the arena. Facing the crowded audience, Shea announced the good news before the game kicked off.

Shea would take the Red Blood Legion deputy legion commander, imperial guards deputy commander, and the Cloak Gang leader, Aguile, as her husband.

This good news shocked the audience. The mysterious hero, Aguile, who defeated the Red Spirit Estate will become the husband of Princess Royal Highness!

Keep note that it was not the princess who married him, but it was matrilocal marriage! This meant that this was a marriage centering around Shea, and Aguile would just be a dependency at all times, even if Princess Royal became an empress in the future.

The people couldn’t help but think of the rumors that “Aguile is from the Beelzebub Royal Family” that was popular some time ago. In this way, even if Aguile was really a descendant of the Beelzebub Royal Family or even the rumored heir, then joining the Dark Moon now represented the surrender of the Beelzebub Royal Family to Princess Royal Highness. He was surrendering to Princess Royal for the Dark Moon, not the regent of the capital.

This was a heavyweight to enhance the reputation of Shea and even the Dark Moon as a whole.

Afterwards, Shea gave an exciting speech to inform the Dark Moon Army present about the current ideal situation of the Dark Moon and the grand blueprint for its future development. In conjunction with the “good news”, she announced that a series of favorable policies would be implemented soon. These policies were quite beneficial. If everything went smoothly, the people of the Dark Moon would be richer, and the families would benefit more. The audiences were all cheering.

Countless people’s eyes turned to the “lucky guy” who was still wearing a mask and a cloak. No matter what, it is an enviable matter to have a wife like Royal Highness, the top beauty of the Dark Moon.

However, according to etiquette, if Princess Shea doesn’t like him, it seems that the husband can’t even get in the bed…

I think he can’t flirt around too…

It seems a bit miserable…

This announced decision also surprised Chen Rui because Shea did not discuss with him in advance. This “matrilocal marriage” contained the selfish motives of Princess Royal Highness. Instead of calling it selfishness, it should be considered a “public” confession of their relationship.

Looking at the indifferent princess under the eyes of the public, Chen Rui’s mind had the gentle and beautiful face that was under her mask.

——At least I had a moment with her with her mask off, I am already satisfied…

His right hand gently stroked the “Dark Will” ring on the ring finger of his left hand.

I will guard by her side forever then.

Just like the original promise.

I really thought Shea would consider marrying Regent Obsidian. If she didn’t meet the human, she would do so for the sake of the empire. But now…

chapters.title: Chapter 494 - Home
chapters.body:
Chapter 494 - Home

Chapter 494: Home

While the entire Dark Moon was discussing the marriage of Princess Royal Highness, a guy who was fortunate enough to be the princess’ husband was undergoing severe interrogation.

“Very proud, right?” The first person who jumped out was Roman who had just finished his closed doors training.

Relying on the effect of the Inheritance Rock, Roman comprehended the pseudo-territory, successfully broke through the realm of the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor. The Inheritance Rock was left by Isabella’s father, Roman’s grandfather, Tarus who had Demon Overlord-level strength. This Inheritance Rock was created by his lifelong strength before his death. It could have allowed Roman to reach the quasi Demon Overlord directly, but due to the shared power of the lifelong companion beast evil eye tyrant in his body, he had only reached the intermediate stage.

Roman at the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor and the evil eye tyrant possessing the terrifying spirit talent were enough to contend against any opponent of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor.

Chen Rui looked at the traitor, who “betrayed” his sir leader, jumped out to make matters worse. He wanted to bury Roman’s mouth in the mud, but now facing the full house of jury, he naturally dared not act rashly.

In fact, with the current urgent situation, Shea did not have the time to be distracted by personal affairs. After the announcement of the marriage, she had been avoiding him except for official business. The sir husband was purely nominal.

“He is going to get married, of course, he is proud!” The supporter was the unloyal dead duck dragon. It was obviously plain jealousy. This made Chen Rui feel that the method of framing this guy with the money bag was too gentle last time.

“Can I eat a marriage?” The person who added to the chaos was obviously Ms. Miser who was truly dazed.

“Enough! Stop gloating,” Delia spoke up, but she frowned and looked at Chen Rui, “Leader, everyone here are all our people, so I will also say it clearly. We all know that you have an unusual relationship with Princess Royal. Her public annunciation of the marriage this time was obviously intended to kill two birds with one stone. Your wedding date may not come until the capital trouble is resolved, but now everyone knows that ‘Aguile’ is Shea’s fiancé. Then I only ask leader, what about Athena, Kia, and Zola?”

Chen Rui added another sentence in his heart. Plus a majesty in the distance and the aunty of someone…

Catherine was the number one beauty and his first woman. In his subconscious mind, Chen Rui actually had a strong desire to possess this emperor. More importantly, Catherine did have affection for him. It was just that she had more obsession for the empire in her heart.

As for Isabella, a woman who was willing to sacrifice her life twice for him, no more explanation was needed as a man.

Chen Rui looked at the female general who looked at him with wide-open eyes, then he glanced at the little charming girl with a grieving face, and he looked at the fake daze female scientist who seemed to understand nothing. These 3 were his most cherished women. It was also his partners whom he had sworn to protect with his life. Perhaps he didn’t need to make any more promise with them, but as a responsible man, this promise must be given to them.

Thanks to the evil crossover, the evil polygamous of the Demon Realm environment, CCTV, MTV, and all other V, which enabled him, a loser otaku, to have several super goddesses who loved each other. If it was in another world, this was simply a myth.

A warm smile appeared on Chen Rui’s face, “After the Dark Moon’s troubles are resolved, I think it’s time to formally start a family.”

Yes, a formal and recognized family.

As he said, he walked up to the 3 women and bowed, “I just don’t know if the 3 young ladies are willing to marry a human, have children with me, and stay together forever and never leave?”

In fact, Athena had accepted Chen Rui’s ring and expressed her feelings a long time ago. Now when she heard him say this in public, she still felt extremely happy. She was blushing and staring at his affectionate gaze before nodding. Although Catherine was Chen Rui’s first woman, Athena was his first lover. Up until now, she was still the most important and irreplaceable woman.

The little charming girl, Kia, showed a look of loyally following the main wife till death, even if she had to marry a bad man. She took Athena’s arm, and her eyes were a little red: Mom, have you seen it? Kia will live happily in the care of this man. You will be happy right?

Ms. Fairy Dragon still had a dazed expression. Behind the glasses of fake daze, her purple eyes were filled with unprecedented joy and excitement. For dragons, marriage was sacred and solemn. After the Rainbow Valley accidental sex incident, Chen Rui took out the ancient runes slab that she could not refuse in the dragons’ courtship ritual. It was equivalent to a marriage proposal, but in fact, Ms. Fairy Dragon knew that it was more of the man’s act of contingency or he was even forced to do so.

Destiny was quite wonderful. Judging from the long life of dragons, the time from then to now was actually only the blink of an eye. However, in this “blink” of an eye, too many incidents that Ms. Fairy Dragon would never forget in a lifetime had happened. There was laughter, pain and tears… At some point of time, that wonderful feeling was deeply ingrained in her heart. Perhaps it was not clear, but she was sure that she hoped to be with this man in this life.

“Oh.”

Although she only responded a word habitually, Chen Rui could clearly feel her intention to never leave and be dependent on each other. He felt warm in his heart, and he nodded to Zola.

“Wait a minute! Zola!” Krobelus said. Her meditation training did not end until yesterday. She had a lot of progress in magic. Although she did break through the small realm, she was quite close to it. It would only take a chance to be able to smoothly break through that thin obstacle.

Ms. Emerald Dragon and Ms. Fairy Dragon, both dragons, had become close friends from the hostility at the beginning a long time ago. Apart from Isabella, Ms. Betty’s best friend was Zola. Seeing that she agreed so quickly, she was so worried that she blurted out, “You didn’t even say about the distribution of property after marriage, and you just agreed to marry him? After all, there should be a heap of wealth as a dowry.

“Oh.” Obviously, she didn’t care.

In Zola’s view, knowledge was the most important wealth. This man had helped her collect all the stone slabs of ancient runes, plus the given artifacts, black potions, and devil fruits, all of which were priceless. The most important thing was not the value of these things, but the man’s true affection for her. For a woman who had fallen in love, nothing was more precious.

Speaking of which, Ms. Fairy Dragon, who had been immersed in magic and research all her life, was much simpler compared with many realistic dragons.

“A heap of wealth?” The innocent Ms. Miser, who was also extremely sensitive to wealth, heard it suddenly, “So this is marriage!”

Ms. Miser was not a fool. After coming to the Dark Moon for so long, she already knew that this employer’s wealth was far higher than she thought. I heard Paglio accidentally revealed that he is even the richest man in the Demon Realm!

So he has 1million black crystal coins? Or… 10 million?

Thinking of this, Ms. Miser’s two big eyes suddenly turned into shiny black crystal coins, and she leaned forward, “I want to eat too! No, I want to marry you too!”

As soon as this sentence came out, all the women’s eyes suddenly showed a vigilant expression. It was more of a warning to someone.

Roman stepped back 3 steps exaggeratedly, and he pointed to Chen Rui with a pale face, “Leader, you, you… you are such a beast, another one!”

But to this guy’s surprise, the old man Paglio did not second him. Instead, he looked at Chen Rui with a gloating look. These days, Master Poison Dragon seemed to be the biggest victim of Ms. Black Dragon, so he hoped that Olypheus would shift her target.

Chen Rui ignored Ms. Miss who was obsessed with money. He turned around and said, “Delia, what I said in the Dark Demon’s headquarters last time still counts right?”

Delia was taken aback. She had a good memory, so she immediately remembered, “What the leader said is to beat a bastard who went out to hook up with women all around on behalf of me? Of course it’s still effective.”

“Really? Where is this bastard? I will help you too!” Roman immediately said with guilt, but his voice became quieter.

“Your biggest help is to stand still, bastard!” Chen Rui walked toward Roman with a hideous grin.

Roman suddenly exuded the breath of the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor, “Leader, if you don’t use the transformation technique, you are not my opponent…”

Before the breath was fully released, Roman felt his body tightened as if he was imprisoned by some kind of spirit power. With the power of the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor, he was actually unable to move. He was taken aback. His left eye glowed with golden light. It had already integrated the spirit power of the lifelong companion beast, evil eye tyrant, yet he still couldn’t break free. Sir Nephew finally reacted and called out, “Zola!”

“What?”

Facing the fake daze response of Ms. Fairy Dragon, Roman had the urge to cry. With his actual strength that was at the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor plus the combat power that was comparable to the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, he could do anything as he wished at any estate. However, there were Zola, Paglio, Krobelus, sir leader who could transform, plus the new black dragon girl here. He could not afford to provoke any one of them. By the way, the remaining 3 weak ones also couldn’t be provoked. One was his madam wife, the other 2 were the best friends of his madam wife… Even if he broke through to the Demon Overlord, his social status was still the lowest…

It was too difficult to find someone under him. For example, the Incubus Beast in the backyard was a “pet” loved by all women. If he wanted to bully that horse, he would not only put shame on himself, but also stirring up a hornet’s nest.

Facing the sir uncle who approached him with a grinning smile, Roman was unable to move and had a bitter face. He suddenly missed Dodo who had gone to the Red Spirit Estate very much…

In the following days, the entire Dark Moon Estate was immersed in a festive atmosphere. The people lived a leisurely life in the bustling hustle and bustle, and they talked about the gossip between Princess Royal Highness and Aguile from time to time. They did not notice the turbulent undercurrent lurking behind.

Only a few days later, a messenger from the capital came to the Dark Moon and brought even more shocking news.

The capital’s Regent Obsidian proposed to the Dark Moon’s Princess Royal Shea!

This news was slightly altered. When the Dark Moon people heard it, it became- Obsidian, who had seized the Crown Prince Grimm’s throne, had been coveting the beauty of his nephew’s daughter, Shea. Now that he heard about Princess Royal taking Aguile as her husband, he threatened Shea to marry him, the usurper!

Shea’s prestige in the Dark Moon had always been extremely high, even when it was previously sanctioned and controlled by the capital, but with the development and growth of the Dark Moon, the authority of the lord was unbreakable. Not only the people of the Dark Moon, many other leaders of the Fallen Angel Empire also regarded Princess Royal Highness as the future ruler of the empire.

Obsidian actually uses such a despicable method in disregard of shame. Moreover, it is after Shea had publicly announced that she and Aguile will get married. It is simply unbearable!

Facing this shameless request, Shea’s answer was only 2 words: Get lost!

This answer was indeed very pleasant, but now everyone in the Dark Moon understood that a huge test was coming.

Btw, I seemed to forget what happened to Dodo. Could he advance to a level that was even higher than Roman? Poor Roman…

chapters.title: Chapter 495 - Personal Expedition! Obsidian’S Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 495 - Personal Expedition! Obsidian’S Decision

As many people expected, after Regent Obsidian’s “proposal” was rejected, he was furious. He listed a series of crimes such as the Dark Moon colluding with the Dark Shadow Empire and attacking the Blue Lava Estate, then summoned the various estates of the Fallen Angel Empire to crusade against the traitor. Those who made meritorious deeds would be conferred a title.

But everyone knew that no estate in the empire was the opponent of the Dark Moon. Even when the Red Spirit Estate and the Blue Lava Estate teamed up back then, they had a disastrous end. Only the White Feather Estate of the 4 major estates still retained their strength.

Not to mention that White Feather Estate and the Dark Moon seemed to have some kind of agreement. There was no possibility of winning just by comparing the strength of both sides.

If all the remaining estates unite and go all out, even if they could defeat the Dark Moon, they would pay a heavy price. But this kind of situation was impossible to happen, so no one wanted to be the cannon fodder. Especially because of the problem of the fundraising money, many estates were now living in poverty. How could they stand the loss of war?

In spite of the temptation of a title, one must have the ability and fate to obtain it.

Once Obsidian’s summon was issued, before it was echoed by the various estates in the empire, the Dark Moon had immediately refuted and condemned the “crimes” listed by Obsidian. They also sent countless “pamphlets” to the capital and each estate which made the issue known by everyone in the empire.

The Dark Shadow Empire had an alliance relationship with the Fallen Angel Empire. On this basis, the Dark Moon formed a twin town with the Bloody Vine Flower Estate of the Dark Shadow Empire based on the principle of friendship and mutual benefit. Moreover, the agreement signed publicly by both parties did not betray the interests of the empire. The so-called collusion was groundless and purely nonsense.

As for the attack on the Blue Lava Estate, it was a distortion of the truth. It was precisely because Obsidian owed the fundraising money that caused the Blue Lava Estate to be in chaos, so the Dark Moon went to help the Blue Lava Estate regardless of past feud for the sake of the empire’s stability by settling the rebels and assisting the ascendance of the new lord. The Dark Moon also assisted the Blue Lava Estate to develop land and stabilize the economy. The people of the Blue Lava Estate now had a stable life and the economy was growing day by day. This was the best explanation.

After refuting the “crimes” listed by the capital one by one, the Dark Moon unabashedly countered the various crimes of Regent Obsidian.

1. Ingratitude. Seized the throne passed by the elder brother, Lord of Midnight Sun, to Crown Prince Grimm. Self-appointed as the regent; imprisoned and suppressed the royal family member of Midnight Sun. The funny thing was that he still hadn’t been recognized by the Sword of Fallen Angel. Even the royal artifact denied this usurper.

2. Habitually greedy. Did not hesitate to use the despicable means of fundraising to defraud the wealth of various estates and families. To this day, most of the fundraising money was still in arrears and had not been repaid, making the lives of various lords difficult and the people miserable.

3. Shameless. Openly forcing his nephew’s daughter to be his wife, shaming the entire Lucifer Royal Family.

4. Eliminate non-conformist. Secretly harm members of the elder family which triggered various internal strife.

These crimes were more legit than the vague gimmicks listed by the capital. Each crime was a hit to Obsidian’s vulnerable points. The first and second crimes alone made him unable to refute.

The Sword of Fallen Angel was Obsidian’s main headache for many years, and it was also the biggest obstacle preventing him from officially becoming an emperor. Meanwhile, the fundraising money was the source of his current distress. Except for the third point, the following crimes were hardly linked to the Dark Moon alone, but all of them were true. It was enough to arouse the indignation of all the estates and families in the empire.

Many elder families had begun to question some well-known old cases related to their own interests. The capital’s voice had begun to become uncoordinated before they started to touch the Dark Moon.

In fact, it was common for the upper level of an empire to be involved in nasty means and darkness. Wiping out families in order to consolidate the ruling was not a new matter. However, keeping it in the dark was different from being in the light. This was due to the fact that Isabella had previously controlled the capital’s secret intelligence department, so she had a large amount of unknown insider information at hand. Now everything was divulged, catching Obsidian off guard.

The southern estate, represented by the Blue Lava Estate, stood up first and expressed its firm support for the Dark Moon. The Dark Moon supported the ascendance of Sumen, the real power holder of the Blue Lava Estate. As for the little lord, aside from being fake, he was basically a puppet.

The “opposition” led by General George took the opportunity to strongly criticize Obsidian’s actions. However, at this time, the White Feather Estate Lord Sicali where the Warlock Fortress was located had a conflict with General George. Obviously, Sicali did not respond to the capital’s crusade on the surface, but he used practical actions to restrain General George, Shea’s biggest supporter. The capital sent a large number of troops to the White Feather Estate to prevent changes. At present, the Bloody Empire was still harassing them at the border. With his back against the enemy, George couldn’t lead the army to the south, but the White Feather Estate did not dare to advance either. The two sides were in a stalemate for now.

The verbal fight was just to make the attack justifiable. After Obsidian was defeated in this regard, he finally revealed his true colors. In the name of the regent of the empire, he announced that he would conquer the Dark Moon personally. He ordered the estates to send troops to form the coalition army to wipe out the rebel.

This kind of order was unlike the previous summon. Those who refused to send troops would be regarded as an accomplice of the Dark Moon.

As soon as Obsidian announced that he would personally lead the troops, Josh, who was maintaining a low profile while rehabilitating in the Red Spirit Estate, was the first to respond. He expressed his willingness to follow the regent to crusade the Dark Moon. Subsequently, all the estates expressed their determination to send troops, even the smallest estate was no exception. As for whether they would dispatch the elites, it would depend on each estate’s calculation.

The assembly of the army was not so simple. Obsidian also considered the Dark Shadow Empire behind the Dark Moon, so he sent an envoy to declare that the cause of this incident was an rejected marriage proposal, which was a family matter of the Lucifer Royal Family. He requested the Dark Shadow Empire to comply with the alliance agreement between the two empires so as not to interfere in the internal affairs of the Fallen Angel Empire. After some negotiations, a preliminary consensus was reached. As for the amount of benefits and the price paid, only the higher levels of the Dark Shadow Empire and Obsidian knew.

In fact, the Dark Shadow Empire did not sign an agreement with the Dark Moon for mutual assistance such as war. Obsidian was purely offering benefits for free. Catherine the Great would naturally not refuse it.

After getting the promise of the Dark Shadow Empire, Obsidian was determined. He followed the advice of the Red Spirit Estate’s Lord Josh and used various means to severely suppress some of the elder family who were tempted by the “crimes” listed by the Dark Moon in order to avoid trouble from within during the war.

Although these actions won the Dark Moon valuable preparation time, they still caused quite a huge panic. A large number of foreign businesses evacuated, and many residents relocated. This time, it was more than the war of lords. An empire use all its power to deal with an estate. It was a war with an almost predictable outcome. The capital also reached an agreement with the Dark Shadow Empire who “backed” the Dark Moon.

The turbulent situation was also within the expectation of the Dark Moon upper levels. As things had progressed to this point now, it would be a battle anyway, so the people who stayed basically held a certain belief.

The Dark Moon’s ally, General Crawford, the lord of the Bloody Vine Flower Estate, urgently sent a secret messenger to the Dark Moon, explaining the decision of the Dark Shadow Empire not to interfere in the Dark Moon dispute. However, Crawford kept in mind his personal friendship with Shea’s and the grace of helping his only son, Monroe, so he sent a group of elite goblin warriors to the Dark Moon to support them.

The combat power of the goblin was extremely low. Those who could be called warriors or even elite warriors were definitely not ordinary goblins. In addition to crafting talents such as manufacturing and assembling parts, their most outstanding talent was to operate machinery. For example, the same magic crystal cannon would be 30% more accurate and powerful when operated by the elite goblin warriors. This 30% was quite amazing for a heavy magic weapon with great lethality.

This was precisely the precious “resource” that the Dark Moon lacked. Just like the 1,000-men magician legion, Crawford’s timely help was certainly due to personal friendship, but the bigger reason was that his only son, Monroe, insisted on staying in the Dark Moon Army.

Monroe, who was currently being “wanted” by the Dark Shadow Empire, changed his name and officially joined the Flame Legion of the Dark Moon as the commander of the magician legion.

Feyman, the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor guard, who had recovered, accompanied him to protect him. Fini was hired as a female officer of the Dark Moon palace, and she learned mechanic skills from Master Xingxing. The young couple was finally together, and they were very grateful to Shea.

With the arrival of the elite goblin warriors, the first thing that came to Chen Rui’s mind was not the magic crystal cannon, but the production of the goldman. Originally, the production of the goldman was already in steady progress, but after the capital’s proposal happened, the demand for the goldman during the upcoming war surged, and the speed seemed unsatisfactory. With this batch of goblin warriors, the production speed would be greatly accelerated.

This time, the all out war with the capital would be a huge test which was related to the future fate of the Dark Moon and Chen Rui. Therefore, he must calculate each power that could be used. As the earth elementals in the Earth Realm were upgrading with the help of Fertile Yuan Soil, they could not provide any help. Furthermore, the principle of elementals was not to intervene in the ordinary disputes of the Demon Realm.

Guradam at Town Yankou used the undead of the ancient battlefield to restore his power and build a large number of troops. The 100,000 Blue Lava Army that were devoured later, plus the weapons and equipment provided by Chen Rui, was definitely a very terrifying combat power. More importantly, no one knew about the power of this force.

The 3 legions, Red Blood, Flame Light, and Moon Shadow, were the strongest main forces of the Dark Moon on the surface. Among them, Medusa and wyvern had been exposed, but the magician legion and elite goblin warriors funded by the Bloody Vine Flower Estate were still hidden in the dark. On the surface, the Dark Moon just had a small team of magicians with less than 100 people.

Taurens were the main force of equipment manufacturing. At the same time, they were also a strong combat team, but Chen Rui did not intend to use them until the last minute.

The Dark Moon’s military reformation began as early as the war of lords. There were people like “political commissars” in groups of all sizes. They maintained the absolute loyalty and obedience of the army to Shea which was crucial to the stability of the morale of the military.

The devil fruit stocked in the Super System Galaxy Garden had all been emptied, and the Aura Value had only 4 digits left due to the redemption. After screening and elimination, the necessary strengthening of individuals or elite units had been completed. They would be in the strongest state to face the great test that was coming.

After a period of time, the disorder of the Dark Moon had gradually calmed down. Most of the people who were left behind were the Dark Moon people who were born and raised in the Dark Moon and were unwilling to escape from their homeland. The people were looking forward to the word repeatedly emphasized in Shea’s speech, “Miracle”.

Now that they had withstood the tremendous pressure, it all boiled down to whether they could truly create a miracle.

Hmmm, it would be a ‘miracle’ for Regen Obsidian to win.

chapters.title: Chapter 496 - Black Potions And Modification Blueprints
chapters.body:
Chapter 496 - Black Potions And Modification Blueprints

Facing the oncoming storm, Chen Rui was busy with all kinds of affairs all day. He almost had no time to go to bed. He completely forgot to go to the Cloak Gang with Aldas to learn about alchemy from Tetenis.

As a result, the old man was annoyed. He pestered Aldas to get “Aguile” to come. Aldas had no choice but to find Chen Rui to tell his sir teacher’s request.

After thinking for a while, Chen Rui changed into Aguile’s outfit and headed to the Cloak Gang.

Chen Rui walked to the No. 4 street in the southeast block and happened to run into Alian and the other girls. The little loli Alice was one of them.

Eve’s eyes were sharp. She saw the leader “Aguile” at a glance. She blushed and was about to say hello when Alian already called out, “Sir Aguile!”

“Alian, are you going out of town to have fun again?”

“No, I heard that it is not safe outside the city, so we will accompany Princess Alice to the market to buy something.”

“Sir Aguile, you… you are getting married?” Eve plucked up the courage to ask.

“Yes.” Chen Rui saw the dim look in the dark elf girl’s eyes, and he frowned slightly, “But the wedding will be held at least after the Dark Moon has passed this difficult time. The situation is really tense this time. Will you leave the Dark Moon?”

“No.” Alian answered while clenching her fist, “We will stay and fight with Sir Aguile!”

Chen Rui patted the head of the dark elf girl and keenly sensed the strong hostility on the side which actually came from Alice.

“My sister won’t marry you!” The little loli said. There was no longer a bit of cuteness and innocence on her face like when she was normally with the “human brother”.

“Little Princess Royal Highness, it’s not your sister who is going to marry me, but I’m being taken in. It means I ‘marry’ to her.” Chen Rui shook his head helplessly. This is actually a live-in son-in-law.

“I don’t care what it is. You’re not allowed to get married to her anyway!” The little loli stared at Chen Rui’s mask fiercely, “If it weren’t for the capital’s proposal, my sister would definitely not make such a decision! She didn’t like you at all!”

“Since it’s a political marriage, it’s not about personal feelings, so certain sacrifices are inevitable.” Right now, Chen Rui was just the ‘Aguile’ identity, so he couldn’t explain in front of so many people. He just sighed, “Princess Alice, you will understand later.”

“I won’t let my sister make this sacrifice!” The little loli’s eyes suddenly turned red when she said the word “sacrifice”. She even exuded some murderous vibe. “You better put away those unrealistic delusions! Otherwise, I will definitely not let you go!”

It was the first time Chen Rui saw this type of expression of the little loli. Alian on the side spoke, “Alice…”

“Sorry, I suddenly don’t feel like going.” Alice turned her head and left. She ran forward quickly like she was venting her anger. After turning a block, she disappeared from everyone’s sight.

Chen Rui’s eyes softened: Alice’s feelings for her sister are very sincere. Shea will be relieved to see this scene.

Why not, I’ll tell her the truth another day, but if the little loli knows that her sister is actually getting married to someone first, I’m afraid she would be throwing a tantrum too…

Chen Rui comforted Alian and the others who were a little speechless, then he walked toward the ancient house.

As he went to the backyard, he saw his teacher, Tetenis.

The old man was lying lazily on the chair. When he saw Chen Rui coming, he jumped up and scolded Chen Rui right on his face, “Kid, you still remember to come? I will give you one day to prepare. Call Aldas and follow me to leave the Dark Moon together!”

Chen Rui was startled, “Leave?”

“You don’t leave, are you planning to wait for death here?” The old man seemed resentful toward him for failing to meet the expectations, “Do you think this estate can really compete with the Fallen Angel Capital?”

“That’s not for sure…” Chen Rui shrugged disapprovingly, “The world is unpredictable. When the Red Spirit Estate and the Blue Lava Estate launched the war of lords against the Dark Moon previously, no one thought that the Dark Moon would win. The Red Spirit Estate was defeated miserably and the Blue Lava Estate was wiped out. I feel that although the enemy is powerful, it may not be impossible to create miracles.”

The old man was so anxious that his voice suddenly became louder, “I think your brain has been intoxicated by that princess! Don’t you know why people take you in? It’s nothing more than value! I guess that woman knew about the capital’s intention long ago, so she announced the marriage in advance to use you, an idiot, as a shield!”

He actually guessed it right. Chen Rui regarded the old man with special respect. Seeing that he was silent, the old man thought he had been persuaded, “Your talent is quite good, far better than Aldas. If you study for a period of time, you can reach the master level in pharmaceutics alone, let alone close to the quasi-grand master in mechanics. Don’t waste your talents. Beauties are everywhere. Staying here will only cost your life! I don’t need you to accept the inheritance to participate in the competition with Saman. You two just need to leave this dangerous place with me. If you refuse, don’t blame the old man for using forceful means!”

Chen Rui knew that the old man was really sincerely looking out for him. He did not explain, but shook his head instead, “Teacher, if you want to go, you can take Aldas with you. No matter what method you use, I will not leave the Dark Moon.”

The old man said coldly, “He is as foolish as you. He said he received great grace from her, so he will never leave. I admire the Princess Royal Highness very much now. Since you two are so determined, I want to stay and have a look at how deadly foolish you two are!”

Chen Rui knew that the old man wanted to stay here to protect him and Aldas. He was secretly moved and said, “Teacher, rest assured, we will be fine. I came today with a gift for you. I hope teacher can take this gift and leave the Dark Moon to find a safer place to study it. Maybe it will be helpful to the competition a year later.”

“I don’t want any lousy gifts…” Before he finished speaking, the old man’s eyes suddenly widened when he saw a bottle of black potion appeared in Chen Rui’s hand.

“This is…” The old man’s voice trembled a little.

“This is one of the gifts I am giving to teacher.” Chen Rui took out a space ring, kept the black potions in it, and handed it to the old man. “There are a full set of black potions including the True series potions, Eternal series potions, resurrection potion and longevity potion.”

The old man was shocked again: Resurrection potion! Longevity potion! This is a symbol of the highest level of achievement of the pharmaceutical grand master! Even Saman, the evil genius, can only create Eternal Potions!

The old man looked at the ring handed to him as he took a few breaths. He didn’t even take the black potions that were within reach, “Where did this come from? Tell me quickly! I know you are hiding a lot of things from me, but you definitely need to tell the truth about this!”

“This is a story about the inheritance of the grand master. Please forgive me for revealing it to the teacher only until now…”

Ok. This is still a lie, but it is more like the truth than the profoundly mysterious Super System.

“The consciousness of the grand master commanded you to create this kind of potion?” The old man seemed to be in disbelief, “You create it for me now!”

Chen Rui knew that the old man was a quasi-grand master, and some lies might be exposed. He shook his head, “I still can’t control this kind of consciousness. They are created when I am unconscious. I don’t remember the formula and steps. I can only see the finished product when I’m awakened. If teacher does not believe it, you can take a look at this…”

He took out some common medicines from the exchange center, “When consciousness starts to ‘take over’, many medicines will usually be created. There are white medicines and normal medicines. The black potions are the least. Sometimes there are, sometimes not.

Tetenis picked up a bottle of healing potion, unplugged the cork and smelled it. He suddenly showed a surprised look, “This kind of purity… Dear Demon God! There are really 100% pure potions! Even Saman can’t create it! No doubt! This must be a masterpiece of a super grand master!”

No matter how ridiculous Chen Rui’s reasons were, the facts were in front of them.

Tetenis was emotional, amazed, excited… He was busy working for a while. Finally, his eyes turned to Chen Rui, “How many secrets do you actually have? Tell me honestly, if I forcibly bring you away with the peak stage of the Demon Emperor strength, can I do it or not?”

Chen Rui smiled behind the mask and replied, “Not at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, but peak stage of the Demon Overlord.”

The old man glanced at him profoundly, “Hmph! Since I can’t take you away, I will just stay here! Give me all the potions! Here are 2 modification blueprints of the magic crystal cannon. Take it as an exchange!”

Modified magic crystal cannon! Chen Rui didn’t expect this kind of unexpected gain. His eyes suddenly brightened. He was an expert in mechanics. Although he had not designed heavy magic weapons such as the magic crystal cannon, he could see at a glance that the blueprints given by Tetenis were not simple. The modified magic crystal cannon had a more terrifying range and power. Even the high-level powerhouse would be slightly intimidated. This kind of weapon should belong to the forbidden level, but the old man threw it over without bothering explaining it. He waved to signal Chen Rui to go as he hurriedly returned to the house to study with the black potions.

If he were to manufacture a new magic crystal cannon, then it was definitely too late. However, this modified magic crystal cannon was modified based on the original version. Although it was still not an ordinary job, there was a team of elite goblin warriors who were good at this. It should be possible to complete the modification and testing in the shortest time.

Time passed day by day. Finally, the news came from the capital. Obsidian assembled the 2 major legions, Red Demon and Mystic Feather, with 800,000 soldiers. The coalition army from various estates comprised 400,000 soldiers; a total of more than 1.2 million. He mobilized the third general, Gerant.
