This red rope did not have any special magic attribute, but it was tied to him by Athena. He patted the griffin without hesitation, and the griffin flapped its wing and rushed toward the west.

As time went by, 1 day had passed, and night silently came.

The tranquil purple moonlight shone on the broken walls of the Moonlight Fortress, and the blood-soaked Flame Legion flag fluttered slightly against the night wind, showing an inexplicable desolation and solitude.

The thick smoke of the fortress had been extinguished, and the corpses on the battlefield had been cleaned up with the tacit cooperation of both sides. The deadly atmosphere was in sharp contrast with the fierce battle of blood and fire in the day.

This was the second attack by the capital coalition army on the Moonlight Fortress. Since the Dark Moon’s secret weapons such as the Dark Moon’s Demon Overlord powerhouses, magic crystal cannons and Guardian Vines had been exposed in the first battle, the capital’s attack this time was much more cautious. They also specifically dispatched powerhouses to fight against the 2 Demon Overlord dragons of the Dark Moon.

However, Obsidian still underestimated Paglio’s power. The 3 powerhouses of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord joined forces and actually lost to Paglio and Olypheus. Not only that, the Dark Moon defending soldiers were also more powerful than Obsidian imagined. With the fortress’ geographical advantage, it withstood the waves of onslaught of the coalition army.

After failing to break through the fortress’ defense despite paying a heavy price, Obsidian finally ordered the attack to stop. Dark Moon’s casualties in this battle were also shocking. With the strength and facilities of the fortress, it wasn’t easy for them to persevere until now. The so-called zero casualties were just an ideal myth in the battlefield.

The real war was not the nobility described in the poems. The essence was the mutual slaughter and trampling of lives driven by interests and desires.

Obsidian’s retreat was not because of his realization of life, but because he listened to Josh’s opinion and planned to launch a raid at night. Since the visibility was low at night, the fortress’ magic crystal cannons and archers’ attack power would be greatly reduced. Relatively speaking, the fortress was much more obvious. Furthermore, after these 2 fierce battles, the Moonlight Fortress had revealed everything. Obsidian just needed to change a group of fresh troops to go and conquer the fortress in one fell swoop.

A large amount of black mist began to appear in front of the fortress, and it was impossible to see the situation inside. This was the [Dark Sky] cast by the magician legion. It could confuse the opponent’s vision and cover up the sound in the black mist.

The defenders of the fortress didn’t seem to notice the [Dark Sky], and did not respond until the black mist gradually dispersed. This time, it was actually just a test. When the second [Dark Sky] activated, 3 elite legions, led by the new deputy commander Pallor, had already sneaked past under the cover of the mist.

The Demon Realm did not have 36 Stratagems, but many things were interlinked. This trick did have the essence of the underhand way. Pallor patiently ordered the army to move slowly with the dark mist. Until they approached the fortress, they shouted loudly and attacked the fortress. At the same time, the 2 legions in the air also quickly dispatched.

Strangely, the Moonlight Fortress still did not respond as if it was an empty city.

That was right, it was really an empty city.

“The Dark Moon defending soldiers have all evacuated from the fortress?” Obsidian frowned. A heavy blow that he planned carefully seemed to be futile, but no matter what, the fortress was finally taken down.

Josh was the first to say, “Your Highness’s raid strategy is indeed wise, but the enemy is quite cunning. Knowing that they can no longer resist the power of our army, they chose to escape.”

The lords also expressed their compliments one after another, saying that at least 1 victory had been achieved and the Moonlight Fortress had been taken.

The front scout reported, “Your Highness, the enemy is currently fleeing in a hurry. General Pallor requested to pursue them and conquer Town Dico in one fell swoop!”

Obsidian’s eyes lit up and the lords all agreed. Only Gerant, who had been relieved of his position as deputy commander, spoke up, “Your Highness, the Dark Moon is tricky. I’m afraid there might be traps if we chase rashly. We must be cautious.”

“Your Highness, what General Gerant said makes sense,” Josh said, “However, the terrain of Town Dico is different from the Moonlight Fortress. The front is mainly mountainous. As long as there is cooperation from the air legion, we can see through the enemy even if there is an ambush along the way. There is an open field behind Town Dico, which connects straight to Town Leith. The field is the most ideal terrain for our army to unleash their ability. If we occupy Town Dico, then Town Leith is at our fingertips. This is just my personal opinion. The decision lies in Your Highness.”

Josh’s analysis strengthened Obsidian’s confidence, and he nodded, “Order Pallor to pursue the retreating army and take down Town Dico, the Dragon Rider Legion to return, and the Flying Cloud Legion to assist in the pursuit. In addition to the 2 dragons during the day, the Dark Moon’s Demon Overlords should also include the traitors, Krobelus and Vanim. Lagraross, Stiller, both of you help out Pallor. Even if the opponent’s sent out all Demon Overlords, we can still match them. With our military strength, it is not difficult to settle the defeated army of the Dark Moon and the defending soldiers of Town Dico.”

Everyone praised the regent’s wisdom. Gerant was about to persuade him again, but Obsidian glared at him coldly. Gerant sighed and stopped speaking.

What kind of traps were waiting for the coalition army? What was Chen Rui plan to deal with the Wheel of Hera?

chapters.title: Chapter 513 - Conquer Town Dico
chapters.body:
Chapter 513 - Conquer Town Dico

The Flying Cloud Legion of the capital led by Rometty crossed the conquered Moonlight Fortress and flew in the direction of Town Dico. Pallor led the 3 legions to maintain a certain speed and formation to follow behind.

The main task of the aerial legion was to search for ambushes along the way to prevent ambushes. However, out of fear of the Dark Moon 2 giant dragons, they did not dare to rush toward Town Dico unscrupulously. Instead, they spread out the formation to search carefully and throw down the illumination light balls from time to time.

Illumination light ball was a simple magic item. The light could prolong for a period of time, so it was often used in night battles. However, it could not break magic like [Dark Sky].

Although the illumination light balls could detect the hiding places of the ambushes and defeated soldiers, this large-scale spread would definitely alert Town Dico of the approach of the capital army, but Pallor was not planning a sneak attack on Town Dico this time, but a frontal attack, so he didn’t care about these at all. The 3 elite legions he led were not the disorganized soldiers brought by those lords, but a well-equipped elite with real combat force.

Not only that, there were also 4 Demon Overlord powerhouses in the legion, so Pallor was confident enough to lead the 3 elite legions to conquer Town Dico, then he would directly invade Town Leith and make great contributions to the coalition army. This would prove to the regent and all the lords that Royal Highness Obsidian’s decision to remove Gerant and appoint him, Pallor. Tustan, as the deputy commander of the coalition army, was the best decision!

If the Dark Moon Estate could be taken down in one fell swoop, it would not be impossible to even eliminate Gerant and be the third general based on this battle contribution!

“General, General Rometty sent a message. No enemy ambush or defeated soldiers were found until Town Dico. The Flying Cloud Legion is currently on standby in Mountain Tu which is not far from the town.”

Hearing that there was no ambush, Pallor secretly thought that it was as he expected, and he nodded, “These cowards of the Dark Moon run fast. It seems that they have evacuated the Moonlight Fortress long ago. They should be waiting to fight in Town Dico by now. However, this time we are not doing a sneak attack, but a frontal attack instead. I can’t wait for these guys to take the battle! Pass my military order, speed up the march, and get to Mountain Tu as fast as possible!”

Soon after, the army arrived at Mountain Tu. Looking at the brightly lit Town Dico in the distance, Pallor’s long sword pointed, “Soldiers, the enemy army from the Moonlight Fortress is in the town ahead! I only have a sentence. When the sun is up, I want to be in the center of Town Dico with fellow officers, drinking wine with the enemy’s skulls!”

“Kill! Kill! Kill!” The soldiers raised their hands and weapons together and shouted. The elite legion was well equipped, and the armor had a special luminous imprint, so as not to accidentally hurt their own people in the low visibility environment.

Seeing that the army morale escalated, Pallor immediately ordered them to attack. The first legion and the Flying Cloud Legion quickly rushed to Town Dico.

The soldiers in the front row threw grenade-like objects to destroy and induce the protective magic circle in front. Even so, there were still many interlocking and hidden protective arrays that were activated. Amidst the sound of explosions, the waves of fire and electric sparks reflected the figures of the fallen soldiers. Nevertheless, these did not stop these elites’ firm pace at all. They quickly invaded the town.

There was a commotion in the town. The lights of many houses went out. The sky full of arrow rained down, but Town Dico was not the Moonlight Fortress. If there was no ambush along the way, the terrain of this town alone did not have much defensive advantage.

The capital’s elite soldiers who were wearing high-quality equipment were not the cannon fodder army of those lords. Although the arrows were dense, they couldn’t cause the corresponding damage when facing the defense of a strong shield and armor.

The guard soldiers of Town Dico resisted desperately, but the capital elite army had an extremely powerful impact. Together with the Flying Cloud Legion in the air, the Dark Moon defending soldiers were forced to retreat eventually. Soon, the front line of defense was destroyed, and the capital army flooded into Town Dico.

At this time, a dragon roar sounded, and the few griffins that rushed in front instantly turned into flying ash. The nearby griffins were frightened and fled away in all directions. Obviously, the 2 giant dragons of the Dark Moon had been dispatched.

The foremost was the terrifying poison dragon. After scaring away the nearby griffin cavalry, a dragon breath sprayed toward the group of capital soldiers below. However, a burst of cold chill came at this moment. The flight speed of the dragon breath suddenly became slow. Itactually solidified into ice. Then, it fell to the ground and shattered. Only a dozen soldiers who were splashed by the debris were killed by the poison.

A white-haired woman with an old face appeared in the air instantly. She held a magic wand with a faint silver light in her hand and pointed to the dragon in front. A small hurricane appeared and flew toward Paglio.

This woman was none other than Stiller, the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. She was one of the strongest Demon Overlords in the elder familier. She was once the number one magician under the Lord of Midnight Sun and also the most powerful trump card in Obsidian’s hand. Stiller had observed the poison dragon’s battles during the day and casted targeted magic right away.

The hurricane was deliberately controlled to be very “pocket-sized”, but Paglio could clearly feel the powerful magic contained in it. Before the hurricane approached, the nearby airflow had been twisted and chaotic, making it difficult to fly.

If it was a blue dragon who was good at the wind element, this hurricane was nothing. It could be dissipated in one breath, but Paglio was a poison dragon. He was proficient at physical attacks and poisoning, but he was still a bit disadvantaged in the face of magic. This was also the reason he was restrained by the fairy dragon.

Paglio knew that the dragon’s body was too huge, and it was easy to become a living target in front of opponents of the magic element. With a shake of his body, he immediately transformed into a human body. He waved his fists like lightning, and the terrifying wind pressure formed by the fist force actually smashed the hurricane into half.

This method of breaking the magic with sheer power made Stiller secretly frightened, but as a veteran Demon Overlord, she did not panic. With a wand in her hand, countless crisscrossed translucent magic crystals appeared around Paglio. Judging from the twisted and refracted light around the poison dragon, it seemed to be a cage of ice layers.

Paglio still directly attacked with the same method. The terrifying power had turned the cage into powder. However, Stiller constantly replenished and strengthened the cage with the cost of her spirit power. It was impossible to eliminate Paglio this way. Stiller’s goal was obvious that was to hold the enemy’s most powerful combat power.

Both the black dragon and the crystal dragon were absolute nemesis of the magic. Unfortunately, Olypheus was facing a huge test. She was facing 2 enemies who were good at physical attacks. One was Baroco of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, and the other was Stebil of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. Baroco and Olypheus had fought each other during the day. Although Ms. Black Dragon was slightly inferior in terms of her realm, they were equally matched for some time due to the natural strength of dragons. Now that Stebil was added into the equation, Ms. Black Dragon could only run away.

However, Ms. Black Dragon was very clever. Knowing that she could fly faster than her opponents, she did not engage in the head-on fight, but she fled in circles instead. Her direction was Paglio’s side. They supported each other from time to time, and the situation became a tug of war.

The Dark Moon’s powerhouses were unable to exert their strength due to the restrain. The defenders below were even more unable to stop the momentum of the capital army. They were forced to release a large number of [Dark Sky] and began to evacuate. A small part of them still used the buildings and [Dark Sky] as a cover to resist persistently.

Seeing that victory was in sight, Pallor didn’t hesitate to lead an army to charge into Town Dico.

The Dark Moon defending soldiers were defeated utterly. They started to fall back; the 2 dragons in the sky also began to retreat while fighting.

“Don’t put your guards down! The Flying Cloud Legion and the first legion, attack the [Dark Sky] and continue to pursue the enemy! Intercept and kill as much as possible before the enemy escapes to Town Leith! The Flying Cloud Legion, pay attention to detect any ambush!”

“The second legion, divide into 10 teams with 500 people and a captain in one team. Search and eliminate the enemy army’s remnants that may be hidden in the town!”

“Durui, lead a team to look for the mayor of Town Dico. If the mayor is not there, the other officials will do as well. Then, quickly settle the civilians. If there are violators, kill them without pardon!”

Pallor gave one after another order. He was secretly proud of himself. This time, I conquered Town Dico and redeemed the reputation of the regent. My great contribution will definitely not be overlooked. The position of the deputy commander will be within my grasp.

Soon, a soldier reported, “General Pallor! General Durui was ordered to find the mayor, but he searched all the nearby houses, and he couldn’t find even an ordinary civilian!”

“Can’t find anyone?” Pallor frowned, “This town is not small. From the previous intel, the population is quite large. It’s impossible to have all civilians evacuated as it will only become a burden. Could it be… these civilians are hiding somewhere?”

“General Durui is currently sending soldiers to search separately…”

As soon as he finished talking, a house exploded violently. The soldiers who were caught off guard nearby were either killed or seriously wounded. This explosion seemed to have triggered a chain reaction. All the houses in this area exploded one after another. As the ground was shaking, broken limbs were flying around. The explosion light illuminated the horrified faces of the capital soldiers.

“All the soldiers leave the house!” Pallor roared. Even the sound condensed from the power of a Demon Emperor was still weak in the deafening explosion.

Finally, the sound of the explosion subsided. After the smoke and dust dissipated, all the buildings within a radius of several hundred meters were razed to the ground. This kind of explosion power was not what ordinary magic items could do. At least 3,000 soldiers were killed in this massive explosion and even more were injured.

“These Dark Moon lunatics!”

Pallor gritted his teeth and cursed. He gathered the army while arranging the treatment for the wounded.

“General! Bad news!” Durui hurriedly rushed in breathlessly, “A large number of enemy troops appeared in the [Dark Sky] around the town! We…we are surrounded!”

“Surrounded? Are you sure?” Pallor was so shocked that he almost thought that he had heard it wrongly. Excluding the first legion and the Flying Cloud Legion that are pursuing the enemy, the existing second legion and third legion has 150,000 people. In this kind of terrain, at least 3 times the troops are needed to surround us.

Nearly half a million troops? How did the Dark Moon come up with so many troops?

“Undead! An army of undead!”

Not just undead, they were equipped with excellent equipment as well 😏. Deputy commander in your dream 😇

chapters.title: Chapter 514 - The Town Of The Undead
chapters.body:
Chapter 514 - The Town Of The Undead

Chapter 514: The Town of the Undead

Under the gloomy moonlight, the [Dark Sky] that shrouded Town Dico’s surroundings gradually drifted away, and the hidden threats gradually became clear in the thin black mist.

In all directions, all the undead were densely moving like an endless ocean. The capital army was mortified as they saw this. The number of people was initially one of the advantages of the capital army, but now it had become a disadvantage.

Pallor understood a little. The reason for the house explosion just now was not only to kill his soldiers but also to clear a large area of uncovered open space for an encirclement. He suddenly thought of the report of the previous soldiers. All the houses were empty. Could it be that… all the civilians are turned into undead?

Even Pallor, who was usually ruthless, shivered involuntarily.

“Don’t panic! It’s just a bunch of junk bones! Their fragile skeletons can’t withstand the sharpest blades in our hands, and their pitiful and rusty knives can’t even leave a trace on our solid armor!” Pallor calmed his mind and started to boost the army’s morale loudly, “We are the strongest elite in the capital. How can we fear these trash who are only worthy of being the cannon fodders on the battlefield? Soldiers, the enemies of the Dark Moon have already fled cowardly. We are just worried about not having the opportunity to earn more credit. Use your strongest strength to smash these bones!”

One must admit that these capital generals all were skilled in boosting the military’s morale. The fighting spirit of the soldiers suddenly rose. Although most people had no experience in fighting the undead, everyone knew that the undead most commonly used the Skeleton Sea tactic which used the number of the skeletal army as cannon fodder to exhaust the enemy. Skeletons were the most low-level undead. Their combat power was not worth mentioning. With the combat power of the capital army, defense or even counterattacks should not be a problem.

Under Pallor’s command, the capital army formed a huge phalanx, confronting a large number of slowly moving enemy forces.

The [Dark Sky] had completely disappeared. Although the moonlight was not very bright, the soldiers could see the appearance of the undead army clearly through the fire of the house and the illumination light ball. Many people subconsciously gasped.

It was indeed a sea of skeletons, but these skeletons… were beyond their expectation.

Cannon fodders on the battlefield, fragile skeleton, pitiful and rusty knife?

The helmets and iron armors on the skeletons are called the tortoise shells which could only be equipped by heavy infantry. They are uniformly equipped with thick bucklers and bright scimitars. Damn! The equipment of the regular infantry legion isn’t even better than this!

Pallor was also stunned. Is this still the weakest skeletal army? All the skeletons are equipped with unified weapons and armor. How much does it cost?

Now is not the time to laugh at or lament that the Dark Moon Estate is so rich and stupid. With so many well-equipped undead soldiers, I’m afraid it will become the biggest nightmare tonight!

“Hahahaha!” A spooky laughter echoed in Town Dico. The laughter seemed to come from dozens of people from all directions, but the voice and tone were from one person. The laughter revealed a ghastly and horrifying vibe, “So many special materials to make dead souls. Awesome! Slaves, help your future companions get rid of the extra flesh and blood on their body!”

The speed of the skeletons gradually increased as they rushed from all directions toward the capital army’s phalanx like a tide.

Suddenly, there was an endless sound of weapons clashing mixed with the furious roars and screams of the soldiers. Upon contact, the outermost edge of the phalanx had been removed by a layer. The pressure brought by the skeleton sea far exceeded the imagination of the soldiers. Not only was the equipment powerful, but also the strength was not weak. What was more terrifying was the attribute of the undead. They felt neither fatigue nor fear, let alone pain. Unless one crushed the core of the head, otherwise the damage to the other parts would not have much effect. Even if their hands or feet were broken, as long as the scimitar in the hand was still there, they could still slash people to death.

These elite soldiers of the capital were well-trained. Although facing the threatening momentum of the undead army, they still maintained a high level of mental state and combat effectiveness. When casualties occur, they would be immediately substituted. Although the losses were not light, they still maintained the defense formation.

In the center of the phalanx, Deputy Commander Durui constantly mobilized the soldiers. He gradually turned the offensive and defensive phalanx into a purely defensive round formation. Pallor had a solemn expression as he paid close attention to the battle situation in all directions.

“General Pallor, do I need to take action now?” The Demon Overlord powerhouse, Pegasus, who had been protecting Pallor’s side, asked.

“Not for the time being.” Pallor was not a mediocre talent. He pondered for a moment, and shook his head, “The Dark Moon is indeed hiding their real forces. It is much harder to deal with them than I expected. There are not only 2 powerful Demon Overlord dragons, but there are actually such a terrifying number of undead army. I made a mistake this time. Obviously, the enemy has been planning it for a long time. Currently, Sir Stebil and the others have been distracted elsewhere. Sir Pegasus is the only Demon Overlord powerhouse here. I know sir is one of the strongest powerhouses in the royal family who is capable of both martial arts and magic. You can challenge the peak stage of the Demon Overlord with the strength of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. However, the current situation is unknown and we don’t know if the enemy has other means, so sir should not act rashly. If you use your power in vain or are restrained by the enemy, it will only make our army’s situation more dangerous. These undead must be controlled by the magician who just made the sound. Undead magician is generally very cunning; he will surely hide somewhere. Sir, please bear with me for now. Try to observe and find out where the magician is hiding, then please do your best to eliminate the enemy leader in one fell swoop. As long as the magician dies, this undead army will automatically collapse.”

Pegasus seemed to agree with it, “General is right. A magician that can control so many skeletons; this person’s strength is at least close to the Demon Overlord level. I will gradually extend my territory power and try to sense and search for the opponent’s controller. Because there are too many enemies, this requires considerable mental power and time. Therefore, I will not be able to help the general in a short while.”

“Sir can activate your power freely, don’t worry about interruption. Our army can still withstand it now.”

Pegasus nodded, sat down cross-legged, and closed his eyes.

The formation of hundreds of thousands of people was not so easy to change, especially during an ongoing battle. Fortunately, with Durui’s excellent command, the formation adapted to the situation in the shortest time. However, the circle had shrunk a little under the onslaught of undead. Although the army in the circle shot arrows, it did not have an ideal effect on the undead.

There was an 80-magicians team among the capital legion. The magic attack posed a greater threat to the undead than bows and arrows, but for the large number of skeletal army, it was only a drop in the bucket. After casting several magics in a row, the magicians were unable to cast magic again in a short time because their magic power was exhausted.

As soon as the magicians stopped, the sound of bow strings came from the direction of the undead army. Flying arrows launched all over the sky, causing a lot of casualties, including a few magicians who were caught off guard. Durui, who commanded the battle, was shocked. There are even archers in the undead army?

These undead archers used powerful and high-quality arrows, which made up for the lack of accuracy. Speaking of accuracy… the undead were not afraid of accidental injury at all. It didn’t matter if those arrows hit their own people because they were still alive and kicking.

A soldier’s spear accurately penetrated the skeleton soldier’s chest. However, this typically deadly attack was useless to the skeleton. The skeleton soldier let the long spear crush its skeleton while rushing forward with the same speed and slashing on the soldier’s shoulder.

The sharp blade cut through the leather armor and slashed on the shoulder bone of the soldier. The blood immediately soaked through the clothes. Before it retracted the scimitar, a soldier by the side strenuously cut the skeleton’s arm in half. The skeleton that lost his scimitar was still fierce. It attacked the head of the soldier whose shoulder was wounded with a shield. Before the soldier recovered from the dizziness, another skeleton with a scimitar arrived and cut off the soldier’s head by half, causing blood and brain to splattered on the face of the soldier beside. As the soldier’s vision was obstructed, he hurriedly protected his body with a shield. However, under his feet, a skeleton with only half of his body cut off his right knee. He screamed tragically and collapsed to the ground. He was cut into several segments in the blink of an eye. When the soldiers in the back row came to assist, they were shot to the ground by a rain of arrows. Meanwhile, the skeleton soldiers shot by the arrows from their own people behind them were unaffected. They continued to rush forward vigorously.

This scene was just a miniature of the battle. These skeletons did not have independent consciousness. The movements in their hands were very monotonous with only 2 kinds of movement: slashing and shield bash. They couldn’t even defend, but it was this simple attack movement and their immortality had caused the capital army to suffer huge setbacks. If the battle went on like this, the capital army would surely be the first to be destroyed.

At this time, groups of figures appeared in the team of skeletons. The appearance of these figures was similar to that of ordinary people with thin bodies. The parts below the knees seemed to be intangible. They were floating forward, which looked very creepy.

“What is that?”

“Why didn’t the sword hurt them at all?”

“Bows and arrows are useless too! Are they immortal?”

“Be careful! These are phantoms! They can greatly reduce physical damage!”

“Damn, so many phantoms!”

A phantom was an undead that was transformed from a deceased with a powerful spirit power during his lifetime. It had a strong immunity to physical damage and could sometimes be completely immune. For ordinary troops, it was definitely an undead nightmare. The best way to deal with a phantom was magicians’, but now the leftover dozens of magicians were nearly exhausted. After a magician barely cast a thunderstorm, he passed out because of the overuse of spirit power.

There were many arrows stuck in the armor of the Demon King leader who specialized in magic and martial arts in the front row. Seeing that all the soldiers under his command were exhausted, he shouted in anger. The weapon in his hand glowed with dazzling light, and he rushed into the middle of the enemies. With a big move, the phantoms and skeletons within a dozen meters shattered and disappeared. However, the “space” cleared out in this circle was refilled in the blink of an eye by the undead who came afterward. The generals, who had no time to retreat, killed several enemies with all their energy before they were quickly overwhelmed in a tide of undead ocean.

In a battlefield of this scale, even with Great Demon King-level strength, it was difficult to defeat the overwhelming enemy. Only those with the high-level strength of territory power could truly make a difference.

Toros, the Demon Emperor general on the outer edge of the circle, was the legion commander of the second legion. He was brave and good at fighting. He was currently leading the front row soldiers to resist the tide of the undead. The strength of the high-level powerhouse was indeed strong. Toros was riding a mutated land pseudo-dragon. The scythe in his hand drew arcs in the air. Each hit could clear off a large area of the undead. Even the phantoms that could reduce the physical damage could not resist this absolute power which contained the territory power. They gradually turned into ashes.

Toros rushed from left to right in the undead army on his mount. He was invincible. After killing a large round and returning to the circle formation, the soldiers of the second legion all shouted for his magnificence. In the midst of their high-spirits, they defeated many undead.

Seeing that the morale of the soldiers was high, Toros raised his scythe high and charged toward the enemy line again. In fact, this kind of charge consumed a lot of strenght, but only in this way could boost the morale that had begun to decline. The soldiers of the capital were all elites who had undergone rigorous training, but over time, emotional fluctuations would inevitably occur, and such fluctuations directly reflected their combat effectiveness. In contrast, the undead themselves did not have the element of morale. Even if many of them were wiped out by Toros, they would continue charging forward. Their combat effectiveness would always remain unchanged.

Just as Toros was waving his scythe and riding the land dragon to tear the formation of the undead again, the undead team in front suddenly cleared a passage, and a black figure appeared in front of him. This was a knight covered in black armor, riding a black ghost war horse. That war horse was covered with armor, and its eyes were faintly shining which looked strange under the moonlight.

Terror knight! Toros’s pupils shrank slightly. If the skeletons were the soldiers, then terror knights were kings. They were the highest rank of undead. They were made of special dead souls and corpses. They were powerful knights when they were alive. Due to some kind of will or curse, their souls could not be dissipated. Reborned in the form of undead, they used resentment and massacre as their source of strength. Terror knights were not those unconscious skeletons. Not only they retained their independent consciousness except obeying the master, they also possessed powerful strength and combat skills during their lifetimes.

The terror knight’s black visor revealed an odd bright red light which locked at Toros. A huge cavalry spear appeared in his hand. With a flick of the horse’s rein, the spirit war horse spread out its four hooves and charged at Toros like a black lightning.

Toros did not show any weakness. He urged the land dragon to greet the terror knight, and the two rides rushed past each other in the blink of an eye with a clear clashing sound that overwhelmed the deafening shouts from the battlefield. The soldiers at the rear only vaguely saw a glimpse of sparks, and the 2 rides had separated. They turned their mounts together, facing each other from a distance again.

The black armor behind the terror knight split open, and black smoke leaked from it, but soon the smoke was absorbed back into its body. Toros’ silver shoulder armor shattered, and there was a terrifying wound on his shoulder. The fragments of the armor were even squeezed into Toros’ flesh, but he did not show the slightest pain on his face. Instead, he looked solemnly at the black knight opposite him.

In just one hit exchange, Toros understood several matters in his mind.

Firstly, this terror knight was not inferior to him in terms of strength, combat skills and riding skills; Secondly, the equipment on the opponent’s body, including the vest, was not inferior to him. It was at least quasi-legendary grade; Thirdly, the terror knight seemed to have a spirit power interference similar to [Terror], which made the land dragon under him feel terrified. It hesitated during the sprint just now, causing him to be more severely injured than the opponent.

This is a strong opponent! A red flame ignited on Toros’ body. His human face became the strongest fighting form of the great demon. The flame enveloped the land dragon, and it immediately removed the [Terror] that was covering the land dragon. The ride with dazzling flame once again charged toward the black lightning.

Would Pegasus find Guradam? Even then, would it be good to force Guradam out? Even Chen Rui himself almost died in the hands of Guradam previously…

chapters.title: Chapter 515 - The Real Spirit Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 515 - The Real Spirit Dragon

Chapter 515: The Real Spirit Dragon

“Boom!”

The collision of flames and lightning produced a powerful force field spread at the location where both of them clashed. The ground was shaking violently, and the rubble and debris scattered around in the air like it was blown by a whirlwind. Some undead who were not able to avoid in time in the distance were shattered by the shockwave.

Next, there were several evenly matched fierce counterattacks. Neither side used the territory, but each attack contained the strongest territory power. If one was careless, he might be slashed down from the ride.

Toros had several scars on his body, and his power consumption was huge, but the fighting spirit in his eyes was more intense. The scythe in his hand rotated at an astonishing speed to form a fuzzy circle. Under the terrifying wind pressure, the cracked stone slab on the ground nearby turned into powder.

When his charged power reached the limit, Toros shouted, and his scythe waved along with the force of rotation toward the terror knight. 7 undulating flame ripples spread forward violently as though a fire dragon was diving under the ground.

The terror knight was also charging a powerful blow. The spear in his hand was wrapped in a large amount of black energy. The black energy quickly swallowed a certain force in the surrounding air, and even the space fluctuated because of it. At the same time, when Toros launched the big move, the spear engulfed by black energy shot out at Toros like ligthning.

The 2 powerful attacks did not cancel each other, but they passed through each other.

The 7 ripples suddenly shot out from the ground at the moment they touched the terror knight, and the flames soaring up into the sky erupted into a terrifying sharp qi that contained territory power. The terror knight was unable to dodge as he just used up all his power to launch the long spear. He collapsed with his horse and shattered apart in pieces.

When the spear arrived, Toros was also exhausted due to the big move just now, but the great demon’s talent for teleportation was still there. Facing the knight’s spear that exuded the soul-piercing breath of death, Toros burnt his last remaining strength to launch a teleport, moving far away from the mount at a close call.

The moment Toros finished his teleportation and stabilized his figure, he suddenly felt that his soul was locked by the breath of death again. A spear appeared in front of his eyes in an instant. Just as he came to his senses, the cold death had already penetrated his heart and came out from his back.

The spear with black energy gradually condensed into a substantial figure. The person holding the handle of the spear was the terror knight just now. His body was intact, but his armor was broken. A large amount of black energy overflowed from his body from time to time due to the slash wiybds.

Toros’s pupils contracted and finally understood why he was defeated. However, he was already unable to fight back. The breath of death spread by the spear quickly spread across his internal organs and his whole body, devouring his last vitality at a terrifying speed.

Immediately after that, the terror knight withdrew his spear, and Toros’s body seemed to be emptied. He collapsed and lost his breath.

The second legion’s Commander Toros, killed in action.

When the black knight appeared in the sight of the second legion soldiers and raised the scythe that originally belonged to the legion commander, Toros, the fighting spirit of the soldiers plummeted almost instantly. On the other hand, the undead ignored all this and still surged like a tide.

Toros was not the first Demon Emperor powerhouse to fall in this battle. Not long ago, the deputy legion commander of the third legion to the south of the circle formation, Lonjee of the early stage of the Demon Emperor, was killed in the battle. Unlike Toros’s dignified duel, Lonjee died of a sneak attack. The sneak attack was done by a strange undead with a pale hideous face. He was wearing a long brown robe and was extremely fast. It seemed to be a rumored bloodsucking creature. Lonjee died after all his blood was being sucked up. It was too late to activate the territory.

This undead army actually has more than one Demon Emperor-level leader! One after another bad news shocked Pallor’s heart even more. Now the military morale was shaken severely, and the circle formation was shrinking. It was at the brink of collapse.

If he chose to break through without considering the loss, even if he could succeed, he would also not be able to face Regent Obsidian with the result of this fiasco. Only killing the controlling magician and destroying the undead army was the only hope.

Pegasus had been closing his eyes to sense the controlling magician who manipulated the undead army. Even if the terror knights or the vampires appeared, there was no special reaction.

Seeing more and more casualties among the soldiers, Pallor gritted his teeth and was about to order the entire army to break through from the north. He saw Pegasus suddenly opened his eyes and stood up. When Pallor looked at him again, his figure had disappeared.

Knowing that Pegasus must have discovered something, Pallor immediately lifted his spirits and personally came to the forefront to command the battle. He encouraged the soldiers to hold the line of defense.

Pegasus’ figure appeared in the air instantly. Ignoring the tide of undead army below, he looked at the [Dark Sky] behind the army. His figure flickered a few times, and he had rushed into the black mist.

Even the eyesight of the Demon Overlord could not penetrate the [Dark Sky], but the Demon Overlord level powerhouse did not need to “see” with his eyes. Relying on Pegasus’ perception of territory power, he had already sensed a special spirit fluctuation faintly transmitted from this area when he was at the center of the circle formation. This fluctuation affected the attack frequency of the entire undead army. Now that he was closer to the black mist, the feeling was clearer. The undead magician must be here!

The opponent seemed to sense Pegasus’ approach and began to move quickly backward. Pegasus was even more sure that this moving guy was the magician behind the undead army, so he did not hesitate to chase after him.

The magician’s means were very superb and indistinct. He seemed to be divided into countless clones that fled in all directions. However, these couldn’t confuse Pegasus’ spirit power. After locking the magician’s true body, he surpassed the other party and blocked in front.

At this time, both of them had passed through the layers of [Dark Sky] and came in front of a hillside outside Town Dico.

This was a tall and thin man wearing a black cloak. He was faintly wrapped in black energy. His true face could not be seen. His body faintly exuded dark elements fluctuations.

“Impossible! You actually saw through my [Mirror Image]!” The magician in a black cloak sounded horrified.

Pegasus sneered, “It’s just a simple trick. How can you escape the senses of the Demon Overlord’s territory? You are a magician at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. However, you can actually control so many undead armies, and there are even the same level Demon Emperor terror knight and vampire. This surprised me. I don’t know what benefit made you stand on the Dark Moon’s side. Now you have only 2 paths. The first is destruction, and the second is surrender. I will give you 1 minute to choose… Or maybe you can try to resist.”

How could the magician in a black cloak surrender willingly. Several spears made of bones appeared around him, and they shot away from all directions toward Pegasus.

However, before they touched Pegasus, the bone spears came to a halt. They were trembling and buzzing, but they couldn’t move forward an inch. Pegasus waved his hand, and a bone spear involuntarily flew to his front. He gently grasped it, and it recovered into a bone that was less than 1 meter, “A very interesting magic. With bones as the core, extending and condensing the power of death into one point. The power is indeed commendable. Unfortunately, I’m training in both magic and physical strength. I don’t even need to evade an attack of this level.”

As soon as he finished speaking, all the bone spears around him exploded and scattered into powder.

When the magician in a black cloak was chanting a spell in a low voice, a huge blood-red long handle scythe appeared out of thin air. It instantly flashed in front of Pegasus. It turned into countless sharp qi that could rip apart the air and surrounded him. It was the strongest single-unit dark magic, [Dark Blood Scythe]!

Pegasus sneered as his body instantly surged with unparalleled momentum. He punched directly without avoiding it. If it was the [Dark Blood Scythe] released by a Demon Overlord opponent, he would definitely not dare to do it like this. However, the magician in front of him was only the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. Although it was only one step away from Demon Overlord, it was still a world’s difference from the real Demon Overlord.

Under the terrifying pressure of this fist, every inch of the [Dark Blood Scythe] shattered and disappeared without a trace along with those sharp qi.

Pegasus wanted to deliberately deter the other party, but unfortunately this intent was in vain. The magician had already used the opportunity to turn to a puff of black smoke and fled toward the rear when Pegasus was smashing the [Dark Blood Scythe].

“The time is up. Your action shows that you have chosen the road of death.” Pegasus’ figure appeared in front of the black smoke instantly, and he was about to kill the magician. Suddenly, an extremely dangerous warning came in his mind. His figure in pursuit was incredibly upturned as he flew backwards in a movement that violated the rules of mechanics.

Almost at the same time, something huge broke out of the ground. Although Pegasus braked in time, he was half a beat slow. He was hit by the giant shadow. He flew out several tens of meters before he barely stabilized in the air. His face was a little pale as a trace of blood slowly overflowed from the corner of his mouth, but his gaze became extraordinarily serious.

What greeted him was a terrifyingly huge body.

Giant dragon! To be more precise, it was the skeleton of a giant dragon. Except for a pair of giant wings that seemed to be condensed into a wing membrane with some kind of energy, the rest were all bones. The ghastly white bones were wrapped in a strange luster. The red light representing life began to ignite at the 2 holes in its eye sockets. Its whole body exuded a terrifying and spooky breath.

There was horror in Pegasus’ eyes. He had never seen dragons in this form. Could it be that it is also a creature transformed by this undead magician? A mere Demon Emperor-level magician can actually transform a Demon Overlord-level dragon. This is simply unbelievable!

This weird dragon not only possessed the dragon demeanor of the giant dragon, but it also exuded a breath comparable to his. From the horrible impact that broke his ribs just now, it could be seen that this was a real intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord monster!

Not only that, the blow also carried a strange power which seemed to greatly deplete his vitality and weaken his power.

Fortunately, the bloodline talent [Heart of Light and Dark] of the Lucifer Royal Family could absorb various powers of light and dark elements. His weakness only lasted for a while before it began to fade quickly.

“Let me introduce my most powerful partner, spirit dragon.” The magician in a black cloak laughed creepily. The red light in the eyes of the “spirit dragon” flashed, and a cold murderous intent locked on Pegasus tightly.

This was not a copied version of the slime in Mountain Xilang, but the highest “career” achievement of the most famous undead magician after countless experiments!

A real spirit dragon!

Dodo🤧: Who is talking about me? Was this Demon Emperor magician Guradam himself? Or it was just a substitution?

chapters.title: Chapter 516 - : Fatal Judgment
chapters.body:
Chapter 516 - : Fatal Judgment

Chapter 516: Fatal Judgment

Facing the terrifying giant undead dragon, Pegasus did not have the time to tend to his wound. With a shake of his body, he rushed straight toward the magician in a black cloak.

The magician was the key to controlling the spirit dragon. As long as he was killed, the soul of this terrifying monster and the entire undead army would rest completely.

The magician in a black cloak had anticipated this move long ago. The spirit dragon intercepted Pegasus quickly. The swift movement did not look like a skeleton at all, but a real dragon.

3 pairs of light wings appeared behind Pegasus, and his speed suddenly increased. He soared into the sky to avoid the attack of the spirit dragon. He turned his right hand into a knife and slashed downward in the air. This move was somewhat similar to Chen Rui’s [Aura Blade] posture, but the effect was completely different. [Aura Blade] was an invincible sharp qi, but this cut was a great torrential force. The surging and powerful force was like a sky-shaking giant palm that hit right on the head of the spirit dragon. The giant body fell from mid-air, leaving a huge hole on the ground with cracks spreading nearly 100 meters.

Pegasus didn’t chase the spirit dragon, but he punched the air and hit the magician in a black cloak directly. This punch was as powerful as the previous blow. The magician in a black cloak screamed. The surrounding temperature suddenly dropped, and the space seemed to have a weird twist in an instant.

In the blink of an eye, this punch had hit the magician’s body and tore his body apart. However, as the space twisted, the broken body fragments were strangely reintegrated into their original shape.

After his body recovered, the magician gasped in a panic.

Pegasus frowned slightly. The opponent probably escaped this blow luckily by combining the power of territory and dark magic. Although this move is extremely mysterious, it shows the subtle and ingenious control of magic power. However, at the same time, it consumes a lot of spirit power. It is impossible to avoid the second blow with the same tricks.

The great realm difference between Demon Emperor level and Demon Overlord level cannot be made up for by the mystery of skills.

“Spirit dragon! Protect me!” The magician in a black cloak exclaimed, knowing he was in a critical situation.

The spirit dragon burst out again and attacked Pegasus. When Pegasus’ [Holy Wings] flapped, his body retreated rapidly in the air. It was even faster than when he was moving forward. While he was retreating, his hands had charged a great power.

“[Dark Flame Meteor]!” Pegasus’ figure suddenly paused. As he shouted, countless black huge fireballs shot out from his pair of hands. Each of the fireballs had the magnificent power that could tear the air. The fireballs flew toward the spirit dragon like a series of dark meteors piercing the night sky. This was the big move where Pegasus combined the talent of Lucifer Royal Family [Dark Flame]. It had amazing power.

These fireballs were approaching quickly. The spirit dragon couldn’t dodge them. There was an explosion sound when it was hit. If it was a real giant dragon, it would probably be screaming tragically now.

After Pegasus got the hit, he turned to other direction without hesitation. Under the acceleration of [Holy Wings], he flew toward the magician in a black cloak with all his strength- With the spirit dragon, activating territory will waste more time. The top priority must be to kill the magician with one blow which is the fastest and most effective means to completely solve the scourge of this spirit dragon and the undead army!

A destructive [Dark Flame] burned on Pegasus’ 5 fingers. This time, the magician in a black cloak will not have any luck!

The magician was shocked. He knew he could not dodge, so he controlled the spirit dragon to rush toward Pegasus while resisting the power of the [Dark Flame Meteor]. Pegasus was determined to solve the root cause of this disaster and ignored the spirit dragon’s aggressive attacks. He fully unleashed the power of [Holy Wings] with all his strength and rushed straight to the magician in a black cloak.

Anyway, as long as I kill the magician, I can stop all the undead!

In the blink of an eye, Pegasus had already appeared in front of the magician. The opponent was obviously not familiar with melee combat. Moreover, the strength gap between both sides was too far apart. Pegasus grabbed the magician’s head. Amidst the screams, the terrifying black flame burned the magician’s entire body into ashes.

However, Pegasus’s complexion changed drastically in the next second as the spirit dragon did not stop because of the death of the core controller as he expected. Instead, it accelerated and bit. Its sharp teeth penetrated his body.

As it happened suddenly, Pegasus had no time to react. It was not until the tearing pain came that he seemed to realize what was happening and screamed. The spirit dragon bit Pegasus’ body and shook him fiercely, smashing all the strength of his resistance, then it slammed him to the side.

Pegasus was thrown out by a terrifying force, and a terrifying human-shaped pit was smashed out on the hard rock. Under the massive force, the rock slowly cracked and fell apart. Pegasus’s body fell straight down to the ground.

The fall almost shattered his bones, but the most severe injury was the few piercing teeth marks on his body. His left leg, shoulders and internal organs were all seriously injured. The bitten big hole continued to bleed profusely. Part of his broken organs also flowed out of the body.

Pegasus burned his last strength desperately. As he was about to stand up, a huge body slammed down. The ghastly white feet stomped heavily on his back, and the sound of bone shattering sounded. He was entirely plunged into the ground. The power of dragons was too terrifying. Even the body of a Demon Overlord couldn’t withstand an attack of this intensity. This blow also defeated Pegasus’ last hope.

“There is an old saying in the Demon Realm, it’s a bit of a difference, yet it’s a world’s difference.” The familiar voice sounded, and it was the magician in a black cloak that should have been burned to ashes.

Pegasus’s neck bone was broken, so he was unable to turn his head, but the terror in his heart reached its climax. My [Dark Flame] obviously annihilated this magician!

“Actually, your idea is not wrong. As long as I die, the undead under my control, including this spirit dragon, will be destroyed. Unfortunately… Although you haven’t been confused by my [Mirror Image] projectors and found my true body, you don’t know what my real body is. Lucifer Royal Family’s [Dark Flame] is indeed very powerful, but for a magician who has transformed himself into a dead person, ‘destruction’ is far less terrifying than ‘vitality’. Compared with [Dark Flame], someone’s Nirvana fire is the power that makes me truly terrified.”

Transformed into a dead person? Pegasus finally understood. Corpse necromancer! This magician is a corpse necromancer!

The corpse necromancer only had a skeleton body without flesh and blood. They stored their soul essence in some kind of container. As long as the soul essence was not dead, the corpse necromancer could use corpses to resurrect indefinitely. The soul container was also called the life box.

The body burned by the [Dark Flame] was a temporary body used by the corpse necromancer. Even if Pegasus destroyed the soul state in front of him, he still could not truly destroy the necromancer.

The magician’s eerie laughter sounded again, “Speaking of which I really want to thank someone for the giant dragon bone, but from this battle, this most accomplished work still needs further improvement. I am hesitant about one thing now. Should I take the challenge to transform a Demon Overlord-level into an undead or should I hand over a living Demon Overlord to my generous master?”

Pegasus’ ears could no longer hear the magician’s eerie laughter. He couldn’t even feel the terrifying pressure behind him.

It is indeed a fatal mistake of judgment…

The previous actions of this magician were deliberately creating illusions…

If I wasn’t being eager for success because the army was surrounded…

If I patiently prepare for the tough battle from the beginning…

As a result, Pallor’s army is truly trapped in a desperate situation…

How many hidden terrifying powers are there in the Dark Moon…

As the blood kept flowing out, Pegasus’ consciousness began to blur.

Just when Pallor’s army was in desperation, Chen Rui on the other side in the White Feather Estate also arrived at the destination, Cold Mist Swamp.

As the name suggested, Cold Mist Swamp was shrouded with white mist, and the temperature was extremely low. Frozen ice pits could be seen on the ground at any time.

Chen Rui had been trained in various scenarios such as icebergs, volcanoes, and seabeds. Naturally, he could easily adapt to this harsh environment, but there seemed to be some kind of powerful creatures in the misty swamp. The griffin refused to fly forward when it just reached the edge. Chen Rui knew that he could not force it, so after getting off, he let the griffin leave freely.

With the [Star Gate], returning to the White Feather City would only take an instant once the mission was completed,.

“Woah!” The moment Chen Rui was distracted, his feet sank into the mud again at knee-level. Although he was familiar with the environment of misty swamp, it was the first time he came to Cold Mist Swamp after all. The mud water seeping into the boots was not a comfortable feeling. Especially when he kept walking like this, the sticky feeling was pretty awful. Nevertheless, Chen Rui didn’t care about it. He moved fast according to the magic map in his hand. According to the map, after passing through the mangrove forest, he could see Mountain Loeb Mine.

Chen Rui stopped suddenly; his figure almost disappeared in the blink of an eye.

“Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh…” Several arrows shot through his initial position.

Chen Rui’s figure appeared in front of the trees. He saw a meandering figure retreating quickly. It was an almost naked female upper body with a snake lower body. She was holding a bow in her hand—Medusa!

Unexpectedly, there is Medusa in this misty swamp! Chen Rui was the master of the underground Medusa tribe in Mountain Xilang. He did not have any repulsive feeling to this kind of “demonic beasts” that the outsiders fear, but a kind of cordial feeling instead.

Along the way, in order to avoid some reckless demonic beasts, Chen Rui deliberately released the breath of the Demon Emperor. These Medusas were only at the Demon King level, but they dared to attack with initiative. It was obvious that he was regarded as an invader.

“Please don’t get me wrong! I have no ill intentions.” Chen Rui tried to communicate with the nearest Medusa through his [Analytical Eyes].

The Medusa figure paused and glanced at Chen Rui. The golden snake pupils in her eyes suddenly radiated a strange light. Chen Rui felt a little numb, but he was not affected.

He was no longer a rookie in the underground world of Mountain Xilang. Otherwise, this stare full of Medusa’s talent power could instantly turn his whole body into stone. Now, with just a slight movement of his spirit power, the other party’s petrifying gaze lost its effect.

Seeing that the petrifying was ineffective, this Medusa quickly backed away. The Medusa behind her kept firing arrows to stop him. Chen Rui thought about it and did not pursue her. He continued to move toward Mountain Loeb Mine in the direction shown on the map.

After walking through the woods for a while, the Medusa reappeared in front of him. This time the number was far more than the last time, and they all launched attacks without any explanation.

It seemed that the mangrove forest was likely to be Medusa’s land, but it was also the fastest way to reach the mining area. Chen Rui chose this route because he wanted to save time. Now it seemed that this was more time-consuming than he thought.

The arrows and scimitar of Medusas were all made of metal, but the equipment was much worse than that of the Mountain Xilang’s Medusa tribe. However, their strength was generally higher than the Medusa tribe of Mountain Xilang. The weakest was only at the Higher Demon. There were few of the Demon King level, and there were even 2 Great Demon King which seemed to be a very powerful tribe.

It was not that the Medusa tribe in the underground world of Mountain Xilang was weak, but because they have lost a large number of elites in the 400 years of fighting against the earth elementals controlled by Glorfin. Even Tim’s mother-in-law, Madam Queen Medusa, died.

Since the communication of the [Analytical Eyes] was unsuccessful, Chen Rui did not want to waste time and energy anymore. He chose the most effective communication method; fist.

There was a big gap between the strength of these Medusas and his. Furthermore, Chen Rui was very familiar with Medusa’s fighting styles. His body movement was like a ghost. With every move, a Medusa would be defeated. After a while, except for the intermediate stage Great Demon King Medusa in front of him, the rest all were all down. Chen Rui controlled his strength well so as not to kill them. He just knocked down or stunned them.

Chen Rui grabbed the scimitar slashed by the Medusa, ignoring the petrifying gaze of the Medusa’s eyes. When he shook his wrist, the Medusa who could not hold the scimitar in her hand was thrown upside down. She finally managed to maintain her balance with her snake’s body.

“I’m not Medusa’s enemy. I want to see your queen. Please past this message to her; I’ll wait for her here.” Chen Rui’s hand exerted a force, and the scimitar was suddenly into a ball. The threat was self-evident.

Medusas were highly intelligent creatures. She looked at her knocked off companions including a Great Demon King whose strength was equal to her, then she looked at the distorted scimitar in Chen Rui’s hand. Finally, she nodded and turned back to leave.

Soon, a group of Medusas appeared in sight. Chen Rui’s gaze fell on the Medusa at the front. This one had a much more refined appearance and skin than the others, wearing a tight-fitting leather armor. The scale armor of her lower snake body was colorful and vibrant. She had 2 silver scimitars in her hands which were of much better quality than the one twisted by Chen Rui.

What Chen Rui noticed was not her appearance, but her strength.

Race: Medusa (mutated)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A.

Generally speaking, the upper limit of the Medusa tribe was the Great Demon King. The Queen Medusa in the underground world of Mountain Xilang stayed at the peak stage of the Great Demon King for many years and could not break through. Meanwhile, the strength of this Queen Medusa with mutated bloodline had actually reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor. She could be regarded as the genius of the Medusa tribe.

The Queen Medusa was also looking at Chen Rui as she moved forward and said, “I’m the queen of the Cold Mist Medusa tribe, can you understand our language?”

Chen Rui nodded and replied through his [Analytical Eyes], “Yes, Queen Royal Highness.”

Queen Medusa’s snake eyes coldly glanced at the Medusas who were lying on the ground. When she realized that they were not in danger of life, she looked more at ease as she nodded and said, “As long as you let my people go, I can give you some snake blood fruits.”

Snake blood fruit? Chen Rui faintly understood the reason for the misunderstanding.

He could almost run a plant shop if he wasn’t the MC😂 He almost gathered all the rare plants and fruits. This Medusa tribe was different from the one at the underground of Mountain Xilang. It was almost unlikely that he could convince them to join his side, right?

chapters.title: Chapter 517 - Mysterious Alchemy Being
chapters.body:
Chapter 517 - Mysterious Alchemy Being

Chapter 517: Mysterious Alchemy Being

“Honorable Queen Medusa Royal Highness, I think you have misunderstood. My name is Chen Rui and I’m not here for the snake blood fruit. The reason for the conflict with the medusas is because they attacked me first. Despite this, I still did not really hurt them. If there is any offense, please forgive me, Queen Royal Highness.” Chen Rui left the controlled Great Demon King medusa and walked to Queen Medusa. He put his right hand on his chest, slightly bowed, and performed the medusa’s etiquette.

This etiquette made Queen Medusa stunned. She stared at Chen Rui for a moment, then she looked at the tribe members who started to get up one after another. Finally, she returned the etiquette. The tense atmosphere of both sides finally eased.

Rather than saying that this etiquette played a role, it was more accurate to say that Chen Rui was not inferior to the strength of Queen Medusa. If he was only a weak person, perhaps he had already been turned into a stone statue.

“Queen Royal Highness, I’m not medusa’s enemy. On the contrary, many medusas and I are even closest friends. This is the biggest reason why I’m friendly to your tribe.” Chen Rui tried his best to show kindness in his words, “As far as I know, the snake blood fruit can help the medusa tribe to multiply its offspring, but the effect is not very ideal. It is far inferior to the Fountain of Vitality.”

Chen Rui was not a rookie who just came to the Demon Realm. He now controlled the Mountain Xilang’s Medusa tribe and had a good understanding of the habits of the Medusa tribe.

“Fountain of Vitality!” Queen Medusa was a little surprised, “That is an extremely rare holy relic of proliferation. Let alone our tribe, even the entire misty swamp does not have the existence of the Fountain of Vitality.”

Chen Rui was already planning something when he mentioned the Fountain of Vitality. He couldn’t help but be intrigued when he heard this answer, but he didn’t reveal that he owned a Fountain of Vitality. He nodded and said, “I see. No wonder I have such a misunderstanding with the medusa warriors of your tribe. Please forgive me for asking, is there any enemy who will snatch the snake blood fruit?”

Queen Medusa did not answer. Chen Rui knew that the other party was still quite wary, and he smiled slightly, “My destination this time is Mountain Loeb Mine. As long as Queen Royal Highness trusts me, I will try my best to help the medusa tribe.”

As he was talking, he took out a few items, “There are still a few pieces of equipment here. Consider these as my gifts to Queen Royal Highness.”

A handful of navel golden scimitar inlaid with cyan gemstones.

A buckler with the medusa image.

A set of exquisite golden-red armor.

A silver curved bow filled with magic.

A pot of all-metal magic arrows.

Queen Medusa and the medusa warriors were surprised to see these exquisite and powerful weapons and armors- These are simply the best equipment tailored for the medusa tribe.

“These 5 items are for Queen Royal Highness. There are still some that are of poor quality… Let me see, there are about 10 sets, which can be given to the heroic warriors of the queen.” Chen Rui took out a lot of brand new equipment from the storage warehouse again, “As I said, I’m Medusa’s best friend. These equipment were made when I helped a medusa tribe. Unfortunately, there is not much left, so I will give them all to you.”

The quality of the so-called “poor” equipment was far superior to that of the queen’s current set. This set was already the best in the Medusa tribe at present.

Queen Medusa did not shy away from taking off the armor on her body, revealing her plump chest to the outsider, She changed to the top-quality equipment and distributed the rest of the high-quality equipment according to the medusa’s strength.

Including the queen, all medusas who got the equipment seemed to love it. Their hostility toward Chen Rui had gradually disappeared.

Queen Medusa bowed to Chen Rui, “Lanliza, on behalf of the Cold Mist tribe, thank you, Chen Rui, medusa’s friend.

“Royal Highness Lanliza is too polite.” Chen Rui was secretly delighted after finally winning the trust of the other party, “It is the most delightful thing to be able to solve the misunderstanding between us. If you need help, please speak up. As a friend, I will not be stingy with my strength.”

Queen Medusa nodded, “My friend Chen Rui, just call me Lanliza. There are indeed some difficult enemies who want to take our snake blood fruits, and these enemies should be related to the mine you are going to…”

It is related to the Mountain Loeb Mine? Chen Rui was all ears when he heard this.

“These enemies were supposed to live in the depths of the mine, and they were occasionally seen outside. Currently, they all ran out for some reason, and they also eyed on the snake blood fruits. We fought with these enemies several times. There are victories and losses, and many snake blood fruits have also been taken away.”

“What enemies are them?” Chen Rui frowned. These enemies can defeat medusa and snatch the snake blood fruits, so their combat power is definitely extraordinary. They also came out of the mine. I must have a clear understanding of them.

Lanliza shook her head, “Although I have a lot of memory and knowledge in my bloodline heritage, I don’t know what demons or demonic beasts are they. They are all females and their skin is blue. They are weaker than medusa in terms of combat power alone. Even if 2 Demon Emperor-level female leaders join forces, they are not my opponents. But the magic power of these enemies is extremely powerful, they can instantly activate various debuff and buff magic, and they are not affected by medusa’s petrifying talent. In the fights, our combat effectiveness is often greatly reduced due to the opponent’s debuff magic.”

Chen Rui had some doubts while listening. Generally speaking, the underground creatures that are living in the mines may be troll, tauren, medusa, evil eye, etc., but I have never heard of this kind of blue-skinned magic race that is all female. They don’t even belong to any of the Demon Realm creatures that I know. There are only succubus and medusa that are all-female races, and the latter is also classified as demonic beasts because of their language and snake body.

Never heard of it doesn’t mean it doesn’t exist. The Demon Realm has a huge area and has all kinds of weird species. Let alone Chen Rui, a human who came to the Demon Realm for a short time, even Queen Medusa who had inherited the knowledge had no idea.

At this moment, the medusa warriors hurriedly reported, “Queen! Those blue enemies have appeared again! They have broken through our defense line and approached the snake blood fruit tree!”

The snake pupils in Queen Medusa’s eyes were full of murderous intent. She waved her newly acquired quasi-legendary grade scimitar, and her double-forked tongue made an angry hiss, “Go to the snake blood fruit tree immediately to face the enemy!”

Chen Rui wanted to see the strange creatures coming out of the mine, so he said, “I will go with you, my friend Lanliza!”

“Okay!” Queen Medusa nodded politely and resolutely. Her body wriggled forward quickly; she was actually faster than a mount such as a magic horse.

Chen Rui tapped his feet and followed closely behind Queen Medusa.

Soon, the team rushed to the depths of the mangrove forest. From a distance, they saw 7 or 8 fruit trees in front of them, bearing hundreds of purple-red fruits. This should be the snake blood fruit tree that the medusa tribe depended on for proliferation. A fierce fight was happening not far from the fruit tree.

The enemies were a group of about 20 strange creatures. They were slender and were all female. Their feet seemed to be floating, and the way they travel was similar to flying.

These females had silver-white hair, beautiful faces, and sky-blue skin. They were naked without any clothes, but many parts were covered with strange patterns that emitted golden white light.

As Queen Lanliza said, the speed and power of the blue females’ magic were amazing, but it was not attacking magic. Instead, it was all debuff or buff magics.

Buff magics were naturally for their companions while the debuff magics were for the medusas. Chen Rui noticed that the magics of these females were actually aoe. That meant with one acceleration spell, all the companions in the range could become faster. Similarly, one deceleration could slow down the speed of a group of medusa.

When a blue female’s hand stretched out in the front of the row of medusa warriors, they staggered like they were drunk. The females did not kill the dizzy medusas, but she flew directly toward the snake blood fruit tree with a very fast speed.

When approaching the fruit tree, this female suddenly trembled. Her towering chest was nailed swiftly by a silver arrow. Then another 2 arrows hit her abdomen and shoulders. The female’s body leaned back. There was a painful expression on her face. Strangely, the wound did not bleed, but the golden light patterns on her body seemed much dimmer.

It was Queen Medusa who shot the arrow. She felt that the newly acquired weapon was really powerful. The bow and arrow alone were more than 10 times more powerful than before. With a loud cry, the medusas all charged toward the enemies.

As medusa’s friend, Chen Rui naturally wanted to perform. When Queen Medusa shot her arrow, his body tapped and rushed toward the blue female first. He chopped down with his [Aura Blade].

The female had already pulled out the silver arrow on her body. With a wave of her hand, Chen Rui felt his speed slowed down. This slowed [Aura Blade] was avoided by the woman’s swift movement, leaving a deep mark on the ground.

The woman sensed the powerful strength of this enemy, and she waved her hands consecutively. For a while, various debuffs such as weakening, dizziness, and deceleration were coming from a distance, and they were overlapping without conflict. Although these magics’ level was not very high, the effect had definitely reached the highest level of magic.

Even Chen Rui, who had the [Anti-Magic] physique which could reduce half of the magic damage and debuff effects, also felt quite uncomfortable. He was obviously powerful, but he was unable to exert normal combat effectiveness due to various factors restrictions. He was very aggrieved, and he finally understood how the medusas felt fighting against these females.

At this time, the relevant information of this strange female had already appeared in his [Analytical Eyes].

Race: Lamp Spirit (Alchemy being)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: A-

Physique: B+, Strength: B, Spirit: A-, Speed: A-

[Analysis]: Immortal attribute, magic body.

This information surprised Chen Rui. What is an alchemy being? And there are powerful attributes like immortal?

By the way, the name of “lamp spirit” and that kind of magic means seem to be somewhat similar to the army of a certain classic game in my memory. It seems that there are still many “coincidences” between both worlds.

However, it was obviously not the time to think about this kind of thing now. The fast speed and powerful magics of the lamp spirits had affected the medusas, even Queen Medusa, who surrounded them.

When the lamp spirits were about to pick the snake blood fruits, 10 strange human figures suddenly appeared around the fruit trees. These human figures were about 2 meters tall, and their bodies were made of metal that glowed with dark golden light.

The bodies of metal people were strong and powerful. What surprised the lamp spirits the most was that when the endless debuff magics were cast on the goldmen, the goldmen were actually unaffected.

Lamp spirit? From the Aladdin? Any idea what the author was referring to?

chapters.title: Chapter 518 - Subdue
chapters.body:
Chapter 518 - Subdue

Chapter 518: Subdue

Goldman was the latest research result of a fake daze female scientist. It was powerful. It could halve magic damage and ignore debuff magic. The only drawback was that its movement was quite slow.

The goldmen were not living beings, but a puppet-like existence, so Chen Rui could put them in the storage warehouse and carry them along.

These 10 goldmen were newly produced by Zola personally, and their strength reached the Demon King level. With their speed, they definitely could not do anything to the lamp spirits, but if they just defended in a fixed position. The debuff magic immunity became the lamp spirits’ biggest obstacle. It was undeniable that the appearance of Chen Rui and the goldmen turned the whole battle around. After the 2 Demon Emperor-level lamp spirits were caught up by Chen Rui and Lanliza, the medusas had surrounded the rest of the lamp spirits.

Despite having the upper hand, Chen Rui was still frustrated by the continuous debuff magic. He waved to Lanliza and held the 2 Demon Emperor-level lamp spirits by himself.

Lanliza had a better impression of this new friend as she freed up her hands to deal with the weaker lamp spirits. The lamp spirits had special attributes of “immortality”, but they were still afraid of injuries. Facing the attacks beyond their defense, the light patterns on the lamp spirits would also become dimmer. When their power was exhausted, their entire body would disappear.

The 2 Demon Emperor-level lamp spirits saw the other party’s intentions. As they were about to get rid of Chen Rui to protect their people, the surrounding scenes were changing rapidly. Everything around them began to decay and wane. Their bodies involuntarily felt weak and exhausted.

This was the power of the [Autumn Territory] which was Chen Rui’s self-realized territory power outside of the Super System. Compared with the difficulty of realizing it at the beginning, it was now handy to use. This retaliation with one’s own skill caused the 2 Great Demon Emperor lamp spirits to be shocked. The light patterns on their bodies began to flicker. Their magic bodies were very special. As long as they provided corresponding magical powers, they could eliminate the debuff effect on their bodies. However, this special physique was actually useless in the face of Chen Rui’s territory power.

What shocked them even more was that the snake blood trees and their fruits also began to wither.

Stars vaguely loomed in the [Autumn Territory]. Under this dual territory power combined with the [Galaxy Territory]’s skill, the lamp spirits felt that their power was suppressed to the lowest point. They were on the brink of defeat. The strange thing was that the Demon Emperor-level lamp spirits didn’t seem to have the territory power. Just when Chen Rui wanted to capture the enemy to ask about the situation in the mine, a lamp spirit suddenly came up with a strange language that was not the common language of the Demon Realm. “Genie! The situation is critical now. The energy fruit may actually be withered by the enemy’s power. I’m going to self-explode and die with this enemy. You have to lead everyone to escape!”

“Understood!” Another lamp spirit named Genie responded, and its body immediately drifted away. The golden patterns on the talking lamp spirit began to glow dazzlingly.

Demon Emperor-level self-explosion? Die together? Chen Rui shuddered and hurriedly shouted through the [Analytical Eyes], “Wait a minute!”

The 2 lamp spirits were stunned. Even the light patterns on the lamp spirit that was about to explode stopped shining. It asked, “You understand our language?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui stopped his attack, but he did not cancel his territory power. “Is the energy fruit you said is actually the snake blood fruit guarded by the medusa tribe?”

“Yes, that is the only energy substance discovered so far that can sustain our existence.” The lamp spirit, who intended to self-explode, had a strong killing intent in its eyes, and its power began to skyrocket again. “I don’t know if you really wanted to destroy them, but with you around, we can no longer get the energy fruit. It is even very difficult to escape. Once our energy is exhausted, the lamp spirit will only fall asleep forever. This is no different from death!”
