On the surface, the crystal dragon had successfully resisted the power of the Scorching Dragon’ both sides were evenly matched on the same level. However, Jacob now knew that this Scorching Dragon was more terrifying than he imagined. The innate-like pressure was actually not an illusion. Not only that, his power of the [Crystal Territory] was also restrained to its lowest point under the destructive chill of soul pressure.

His body and territory were both subject to innate restraint similar to the rank nature. This was the first time in tens of thousands of years of life. Although Jacob was incredibly angry, the situation was quite bad now. His body was pushed upward by the Scorching Dragon. There were more and more crystal pillars collapsed. The [Crystal Territory] was on the verge of collapse.

“Crack!” Numerous tiny cracks appeared on the body of the crystal dragon. The injuries suffered during the battle for the silver box had not yet healed. Then, he was severely injured by Catherine and Paglio. Now facing the huge pressure of the Scorching Dragon, his body was no longer able to resist the load anymore.

Suddenly, only a huge sound was heard.

The sky, the frozen seashore, the towering crystal pillars… all shattered in an instant.

In mid-air, a huge crystal-clear dragon body howled miserably and flew away. Shattered scales and crystals continued to fall along the way while the flame-shrouded Scorching Dragon rose wildly into the sky, seeming to smirk at the escaping opponent.

The biggest thing in Jacob’s heart at the moment was not hatred, but fear.

This enemy is simply my nemesis! More “nemesis” than the poison dragon, Paglio!

The first time I met this “Arthur”, my ancient rune slabs were stolen and I was seriously injured by that woman.

When I met this guy for the second time, I was damaged severely by Paglio and the wealth I had accumulated painstakingly was also taken away.

The third time I met this enemy, he was neither with the No. 1 womanin the Demon Realm, nor the old enemy 2,000 years ago. He is alone. It stood to reason that it is my best opportunity for revenge for the previous humiliation. However, I never knew before the fight that this nemesis has already had the strength to almost kill me. — If I didn’t explode my territory to divert the Scorching Dragon, perhaps I would have been torn apart by the Scorching Dragon. Now that I’m full of wounds, I would definitely be dead if don’t escape.

Looking at the crystal dragon disappearing into the sky, Chen Rui lost his strength and sat down slowly on the ground. It was not that he didn’t want to take advantage of the victory to kill Jacob, but the [Scorching Dragon Kill] just now had successfully burst out most of his indigestible power. All the remaining soul power happened to be canceled when the crystal dragon exploded the territory power with serious injuries.

In other words, the soul power that wanted to possess his body was finally consumed by the [Star Devouring]+ [Star Conversion] + power exhaustion in the battle. If Jacob did not escape or return now, then Chen Rui would be the one running away. This was a battle where each party was fearful of the other.

Now that the crystal dragon fled in fear, Chen Rui just relaxed and slowly adjusted the newly acquired power in his body.

The “inheritance” this time could be regarded as a narrow escape. To be precise, the harvest was equally tremendous.

Obviously, the so-called inheritance was just a scheme. The previous “volcanic cave trial” should be a scenario to test the host. If he failed, he might be eliminated and dead. After completing the cave mission, his eligibility of accepting the inheritance (In fact, it was possession of the body) was determined. The latter gentle treatment was actually the beginning of body possession. In the process of indulging in it, the consciousness would be undefended and easily taken away. It was a pity that the soul of Demi-God did not expect that there was something imbalance like the Super System. As a result, it became Chen Rui’s “nutrient.” It was also fortunate that Chen Rui used the battle with Jacob to vent the excessive power. Otherwise, with his Demon Emperor-level physique, he would definitely be unable to “digest” the Demi-God-level soul. Even if he didn’t explode, he would be swallowed by Shura’s consciousness.

In the Super System status bar, the comprehensive strength value had become A+, peak stage of the Demon Emperor!

This bitterness was not in vain. Chen Rui was delighted. When his consciousness noticed the “A+”, it showed specific values, Physique: A+, strength: A+, Spirit: S+, and Speed : A+.

Spirit S+?

What’s going on? Chen Rui was almost stunned by the sudden excitement. He did feel that his soul had expanded countless times. This growth was manifested in the spirit power. Unfortunately, he was not a magician, otherwise his attack power would directly grow. Even so, the benefits of the qualitative change of spirit power were considerably good. In fact, he could predict Jacob’s attacks just now because of this spirit power.

Chen Rui sensed something different in his body, and he suddenly realized it. It turned out that in addition to the powers vented in the battle, the Demi-God soul of the alchemy civilization actually caused a qualitative change in his spirit power. Meanwhile, what really improved his physical power and made him climb to the Demon Emperor later stage was that trace of Demi-God power that Satan once implanted in his body. Under the influence of the same Demi-God level and much greater soul, Satan’s trace of power had been completely absorbed.

In this way, a hidden danger of his body was also removed. What should I do in the future for [Dual Training]? Not to worry, there is still a vast soul power in [Star Devouring] that hasn’t been converted by [Star Conversion]. I can also do it by mating to benefit my own women.

In addition to the enhancement of strength, another big gain was undoubtedly the comprehension of the fourth territory [Winter Territory]. Completing [Winter Territory] was Chen Rui’s long-cherished wish, but unfortunately, he had never been able to find a proper approach previously. This trial was a struggle without using the Super System, which gave him the best opportunity to practice. Especially in the end, facing the life and death moment going against the greatsword monster, he accurately grasped the wonderful realization. This realization was further practiced in the subsequent battle with Jacob.

[Winter Territory] was inspired by Shura’s destructive power. The ice seal and termination were the essence of this territory.

The most important reason he could cast it to supress the [Crystal Territory] was that he used the pressure of the [Crystal Territory] and the explosion of the Demi-God level soul power. In some kind of accidental collision, the [Winter Territory] perfectly integrated with the trace of Demi-God level soul law. So, the 4 territories were finally completed.

With the absorption of Demi-God’s soul, some remaining fragments of consciousness were also absorbed. It was impossible for him to ponder on it in the previous battle, but now he could slowly look into it.

In these fragments of consciousness, Chen Rui gained many precious memories. The so-called “trial” illusion was actually a territory kingdom, but it was incomplete. It was left by the master of the soul before his death.

Everything in the territory kingdom could be said to be real scenes of the dream. The gains of realization and strength could be retained. It was similar to the training ground of the Super System. The difference was that once the mission failed, he would be truly killed under the power of the rule.

Although the offense and defense sides seen in the trial were simulated by the power of the territory kingdom, they were not fictitious. The name of the crystal demonic beast was crystal leopard, and the name of the giant crystal beast was crystal dragon (Coincidence?). The name of mega mecha was assembled puppets, plus the lamp spirits, which were all products of the ancient alchemy civilization.

As for the enemy in the cave… The little monster was called gap demon, the long horned demon monster was called berserk demon, the flame woman was called blazing flame witch, the greatsword monster was called abyss lord, and the maternal body that produced the monsters was called brood. These terrifying monsters were collectively called the Abyss Family.

Among the memory fragments, there was also a scene where countless abyss monsters were frantically attacking an alchemy civilization castle. Defenders such as attack weapons which were similar to magic crystal cannon, assembled puppets, crystal dragons and others could not stop the enemies that were all over the place. The originally impenetrable castles were gradually swarmed by the tide of abyss monsters.

This was just a fragment of the world of alchemy civilization which was destroyed by the abyss monsters. The master of the soul absorbed by Chen Rui used his last power to control the damaged castle sinking into the ground before the destruction of the civilization. The body that was already in danger was annihilated while the soul fell into a long sleep.

For some years, the broken castle that could automatically absorb energy finally recovered a little energy. Some of the lamp spirits were resurrected. They used a kind of underground yuan mineral to start accumulating energy, and they followed the order of the soul before it fell asleep to find a suitable “inheritor”.

It was a sad case that the soul found a freak like Chen Rui. As a result, he was swallowed instead of possessing Chen Rui. Although Little Chen took an arrow in the knee, he was finally blessed after he survived the catastrophe. Not only did he gain unexpected strength, but he also completed Sicali’s mission.

What was more surprising was that the obtained memory fragments also contained a lot of knowledge and experience of the ancient alchemy civilization including pharmaceutics and mechanics. Although it was not very complete, most of them were now lost knowledge. For alchemists, it was more precious than any wealth.

When he was excited, he saw a group of the lamp spirits cautiously approaching. Under the leader of Gensha, they folded their hands on their chests and knelt down on one knee, “Master.”

To be recognized by the lamp spirits, it seems that this “inheritance” is a real success. Chen Rui’s eyes accidentally noticed the lamp spirits’ bosoms, and inexplicably thought of some absurd situation in the illusion. His heart was hot, and he shook his head vigorously to get rid of the distracting thoughts.

“Let’s go to the ruins. I promised Genie to resurrect her.”

According to the memory fragment, the Abyss Family still lurked somewhere in the Demon Realm 🤔. But what does the Abyss Family have to do with Satan🤨? Were they the same forces? Or Satan and the alchemy civilization were in an alliance against the Abyss Family? Also, could the current crystal dragon be the mutated descendant of the old crystal dragon🤔🤔🤔? Hmmm, too many mysteries in this chapter…

chapters.title: Chapter 524 - Putting A Nail
chapters.body:
Chapter 524 - Putting A Nail

Chapter 524: Putting a Nail

Dark Moon Estate, the Moonlight Fortress.

The capital army’s base camp.

Looking at Regent Obsidian with a gloomy face on the seat, neither the generals nor the lords dared to speak.

Last night, after the undefended Moonlight Fortress was captured, the coalition army’s new deputy commander, Pallor, led the capital’s 3 elite legions and the Flying Cloud Legion to chase the defeated army and assault the Town Dico.

However, the result of this raid was completely unexpected. Pallor was besieged by more than half a million undead army in Town Dico. The first legion and the Flying Cloud Legion that were chasing the enemy were pincered by the “defeated army” and the undead. The whole army was wiped out. At dawn, Commander Pallor led the second legion and the third legion with less than 30,000 remnants to break through the siege.

The deputy commander of the coalition army and the commander of this raid, Pallor, was seriously injured and unconscious.

The whereabouts of the first legion commander, Yefa, and the deputy legion commander, Kerry, were unknown.

The whereabouts of the Flying Cloud Legion commander, Rometty, was unknown.

The second legion commander, Franz, was killed, and the deputy legion commander, Toros, was killed.

The third legion commander, Newkel, was slightly injured, and the deputy legion commander, Lonjee, was killed in action.

The 3 Demon Overlords, Stiller, Baroco, and Stebil, retreated in defeat and suffered minor injuries.

The whereabouts of the Demon Overlord powerhouse, Pegasus, was unknown.

The situation of those with “unknown whereabouts” was normally unfavorable. Such a heavy loss! These were not the cannon fodders of the lords, but the real elite legion of the capital! Not only the generals of the Demon Emperor, but even Pegasus of the Demon Overlord are sacrificed!

If the previous battle of the Moonlight Fortress gave Obsidian a loud slap, then the battle of Town Dico was a tooth breaking punch🤕. It was an unjustified fiasco.

Initially, based on the distance between Town Dico and the Moonlight Fortress, it was possible to directly reinforce the situation when the situation was not right. However, the enemy obviously took this into consideration and deliberately cut off the connection between the 2 places. The soldiers who scouted or asked for help were intercepted without exception. Until Pallor came out of the siege to realize that sending reinforcement troops at this time was useless.

“Your Highness! The scout reported that the undead army has withdrawn from Town Dico. It’s just…”

“Just what?” Obsidian’s face was terrifyingly gloomy.

“The armor and weapons left by the corpses were taken away by the enemy, and quite a considerable amount of corpses were missing.”

“Hmph!” Obsidian slammed the table, and the table suddenly turned into powder. Everyone was silent.

“Your Highness, the undead army took away the weapons and corpses, indicating that they also suffered a lot from the ambush, so they need to use the corpses to replenish their troops. Even a Demon Overlord magician with the help of a special altar will take a considerable amount of time to transform a large number of corpses into the undead. The opportunity is indispensable. I think it should be possible to send out a large army to chase down the undead. Even if they cannot be wiped out, it can regain our military morale.” It was Gerant who spoke. Although he knew that it was not ideal to be the first to speak up as Obsidian was currently in anger, the battle situation was everchanging and the opportunity was fleeting. Therefore, he did not bother too much.

“Everyone understands the intention of the undead army to take away the weapons and corpses; you don’t need to emphasize it.” Obsidian said coldly, “The Dark Moon Army is very cunning. If we pursue them now, who can guarantee that Pallor’s mistakes will not be repeated?”

Gerant argued for reasons, “Your Highness, after Town Dico is Leith Wilderness. The terrain is not suitable for ambushes. You can send an army to check it out first, then the army behind prepares to attack.”

Josh voiced out, “In the current situation, rash advance is not advisable. The morale of our army can no longer be hit, even if it is only a small loss. The reason for Pallor’s failure is that he underestimated the enemy and got ambushed by the Dark Moon. According to the disparity in forces, even if the opponent has the undead army, our troops and combat power still have the upper hand. I propose to play safe. Firstly, occupy the Town Dico, then slowly restore our energy and morale. In addition, send scouts to investigate and determine the movement of the enemy’s army before deciding the next specific action.”

Obsidian nodded slightly. Josh’s proposal is more secure, especially the phrase “our army still has the upper hand” won my heart.

“But……”

“Enough! Gerant!” Gerant was interrupted before he finished speaking. Obsidian’s slightly narrowed eyes flashed a glimmer of cold light. “At the moment, Pallor is seriously injured and is not awake, you will be the deputy commander again. The current task is to occupy Town Dico and try to stabilize the army morale, understand?”

Gerant didn’t say any more, and he gave a military salute, “Yes, Your Highness.”

After the meeting, Gerant was ordered to treat the soldiers and stabilize their morale. When he came to the military supply department, he happened to meet Josh who was in charge of logistics.

“General, please wait a moment, the supplies will be ready in about an hour.”

Gerant nodded slightly, and he suddenly said, “Sir Josh, I really don’t agree with the suggestion you made today. At this time, continuously seeking stability will only give the Dark Moon more time. Shall we persuade Royal Highness Obsidian together?”

Josh was taken aback and ordered the surrounding people to retreat. He said, “General, some words may not be appropriate, but I still want to say it anyway. When Samoer’s Nether Hydra Legion was dispatched at the Red Spirit Estate, general clearly had an opposite opinion with the regent. In the end, the Nether Hydra Legion sent by the Regent was annihilated. When we subsequently attacked the Moonlight Fortress, our army encountered a stubborn resistance, and the setback was huge. It was not a one-off success as the Regent ordered. The real reason was that Dark Moon showed strength far beyond our expectations. Even when the regent sent 2 major air legions, he still did not take down the fortress. It’s not that general’s command was wrong. However, the regent felt that his reputation was damaged, so he just removed general’s deputy commander post with the reason of inadequate command. Then, Pallor conquered the undefended Moonlight Fortress. When the regent ordered to pursue the Dark Moon’s defeated army, general made a statement to stop him. The regent refused to listen, resulting in a disastrous defeat. Now the regent obviously wanted the army to recuperate, but general objected again and proposed to pursue the enemy… If general’s judgment fails and the military morale is even lower, it’s fine. On the contrary, if general’s strategy succeeds and wins a victory, then it is equivalent to slapping the regent in front of everyone. General… do you understand what I mean?”

Gerant stared at Josh for a moment, and he finally sighed, “I understand what sir means.”

“General is not a foolish person. You should guess the reason that the Royal Highness Regent reappointed you as deputy commander despite holding a grudge against you.”

This lost and recovered deputy commander was not a nice task. The next battle with the Dark Moon would be even more difficult. If it was victory, Royal Highness Obsidian had a good judgement for people. If it was a loss, he would be the scapegoat.

Gerant smiled bitterly as he shook his head and said, “I’m just a soldier who knows military matters. I just want to win the war’s final victory, nothing more.”

“There is no independent military or politics…” Josh also sighed, “Forget it, I spoke too much… I sincerely advise general to think thoroughly about everything. Try your best to protect this useful body. The empire needs a pillar like general.”

Gerant nodded solemnly, “Understood, I will remember these words in my heart. Thank you Sir Josh for your guidance and friendship.”

“I didn’t say any nonsense today. I was just discussing the military supplies with the general.” As they said, Josh and Gerant smiled at each other.

Watching Gerant leave the camp, a strange smile appeared on Josh’s face.

Although these words were not enough to have the effect of separating them, they had effectively planted a nail in Gerant’s heart, making him worry more. In any case, the capital army was temporarily suspended for reorganization. The goal of delaying time for the Dark Moon was achieved.

Under the control of the master-servant contract and poison, Josh had now been firmly tied to the ship of the Dark Moon. For the sake of his life and power, he had to take the old master Obsidian off his horse at all costs. At present, he only incited a small flame secretly. When the time comes, as the most important spy, he would become the key figure in determining the entire war.

Chen Rui, who was far away in the White Feather Estate, didn’t know Josh’s small movements. As he swallowed the power of the Demi-God’s soul and integrated a trace of soul breath in the [Winter Territory], he was successfully recognized by the ruins. He entered the ruins with a group of lamp spirits.

The ruin was actually a broken alchemy civilization castle. Due to the severe damages in the war, coupled with the old age and lack of energy, most things were no longer usable.

In a secret vault, Chen Rui found the heart lamps of the lamp spirits. There were thousands of them, but many of them had broken and lost their effectiveness.

According to the power level of the lamp spirits, the heart lamps were divided into gold, silver, and iron in descending order. The first word of the name was also gold, white, and black. Genie’s heart lamp was golden, there were nearly 100 of the same golden heart lamp, and there were about 30 intact ones. It would be a powerful boost. (Note: The first word of Genie and Gensha’s name in Chinese consist of gold, it’s just that the names are a direct translation of pinyin. Gold’s pinyin is jin which sounds similar to Gen.)

Although the [Immortal Body] of the lamp spirits was powerful, the resurrection was not endless. Gold lamps could be resurrected 4 times, silver lamps could be resurrected 3 times, and iron lamps could be resurrected twice. The heart lamp that exceeded the number of resurrections would break and lose its function unless it was repaired at a very high price.

Chen Rui learned from the acquired memory that the heart lamp could not only be repaired. Moreover, it could be reforged and rank up through special materials and energy transformation. Each rank up was quite difficult; the higher the grade, the more so. If the rank up process failed, then the level of the heart lamp would drop by one ranj. The gold lamp would drop to the silver lamp, and the silver lamp would drop to the iron lamp. If the rank up failed on the iron lamp, it would directly shatter and fail.

Generally speaking, the rank of the golden heart lamp was already at the limit. In the alchemy civilization, an alchemist used a secret recipe to transform a maroon heart lamp that was beyond the limit. Unfortunately, the success rate was extremely low. If it failed, it would be directly scrapped.

Chen Rui had experienced the illusion of the territory kingdom and understood that these lamp spirits were slave girls who completely obeyed their master. They were not only powerful troops on the battlefield, but they were also stunners in the bed. However, the illusion was the illusion after all. In reality, he did not dare to have a crooked mind. Even if he had the [Dual Training] and the stamina of the dragons, facing the massive number of the lamp spirits beauties, it was inevitable that the oil lamp would run out [1]. Besides, if he really brought back so many women, even Athena, who had always been generous, would probably kill him.

Anyway, Chen Rui was also their master now, so there was no need to keep hiding. He scooped out a lot of aura fruit in front of the lamp spirits. So many good things like top-level energy essence almost dazzled those beautiful eyes. The lamp spirits cheered in surprise.

The higher the heart lamp level, the resurrection required more time and energy. With the help of Gensha, Chen Rui found Genie’s golden heart lamp and gave it to Gensha together with aura fruits.

After the excitement, the lamp spirits began to get busy in batches. Some made energy cubes, some cleaned up the items in the ruins, some set out to revive their partners, and some repaired the equipment.

Although these aura fruits are far from enough to repair the entire castle, didn’t master say that after a period of time, he can get the fruit of this top-level energy essence? Sooner or later, all our partners will be resurrected. The brand new castle will return to the ground!

There were many things that interest Chen Rui in the ruins, especially the tall assemble puppets. He had seen the combat effectiveness of this thing in the trial. It was simply a big massacre machine in the war. It was a pity that they were basically damaged. The lamp spirits could barely repair it, but it would take a long time.

Compared with the assemble puppets, the lamp spirits were at a loss for the damaged giant rystal beasts and crystal demonic beasts, but Chen Rui did not fret because he had a capable scientist wife. With Zola’s knowledge and standard in producing the goldman, as long as she understood the principle, repairing these things should not be a problem.

There were many weird things in the ruins including some potions and black potions. It was a pity that the potion’s validity period was not long. Even black potions could only last for 100 years, so these were no longer useful. It was better to reuse the thrash to let his wife research it. When Chen Rui first came to the Demon Realm, he carried the name of an inheritor of the ancient alchemy grand master. He never expected his words to become a reality; he was now worthy of the name.

In addition to the huge gains, Chen Rui realized an important problem. The Super System was generally omnipotent, but there were occasional exceptions. Aside from this trial, the Super System was also unusable when facing the Demi-God territory in the Rainbow Valley. In Chen Rui’s situation, if it were not for the 4 territories that were newly comprehended, the failure of the Super System would mean that he was inferior to ordinary powerhouses of the same level even with full combat power.

Now Chen Rui had S-level spirit power and could sense more things more clearly. He recalled sensing the Super System during the trial, but he couldn’t use the skill. Then, when he woke up from the illusion, he could use the Super System again. It should not be the problem of the Super System itself, but his own problem.

Chen Rui faintly had a kind of realization. For a long time, his understanding of the Super System seemed to have entered a certain misunderstanding. This realization meant that he would change to a new perspective and learn more about the mystery of the Super System.

Unfortunately, the Dark Moon battle was urgent and every second counts. He didn’t have enough time to study slowly. He must continue the plan on the White Feather Estate right away.

Although the battle caused the many of the caves in the Loeb Mine to collapse, the main cave was still intact under the support of Dragon Inscription. Many of the miners who survived had escaped. The mission commissioned by Sicali this time was considered to be completed successfully. He needed to return to the White Feather City immediately.

Chen Rui thought for a while. He ordered some of the lamp spirits to stay in the ruins to revive those intact heart lamps while the rest of the lamp spirits disguised themselves, left the misty swamp, and went to the nearby Town Ronnie. There were Dark Demon spies there who would lead the lamp spirits to a certain base of the Dark Demon in the White Feather City to stand by.

As for the medusa tribe, after witnessing the battle between Chen Rui and Jacob, they had completely surrendered to this powerful master. Chen Rui gave them an order to be ready to dispatch at any time.

After arranging all these, Chen Rui opened the [Star Gate] and returned to the White Feather City in an instant. At the beginning, Sicali gave him 10 days. Now, he had completed the task ahead of schedule. Sicali should be revealing his last card soon.

[1] Meaning exhausted, heart failure or near-death.

Hmm, when he returns, he will bring more forces back to the Dark Moon. What is the Super System? Is it similar to the Kingdom of God?

chapters.title: Chapter 525 - Two Sicali(S)
chapters.body:
Chapter 525 - Two Sicali(S)

Chapter 525: Two Sicali(s)

Chen Rui came to the White Feather City’s arena battle ball merchandise store and found the owner, Tracy.

Generally speaking, the lichs were skinny and sinister, but the lich in front of him was very different. She looked chubby and had a genuine smile on her face which gave a good impression.

Chen Rui didn’t think this lich was a simple and honest character, otherwise Sicali would not entrust her with heavy responsibility. When Chen Rui handed the ring given by Sicali to Tracy, the lich’s eyes flashed and her chubby face smiled even more flatteringly. She asked Chen Rui to go to the VIP room, claiming to discuss a major business of bulk ordering.

Chen Rui followed the lich to the VIP room, then only Tracy showed a look of respect. She opened a secret door and asked him to enter the secret room to wait.

About an hour later, Sicali, who was in disguise, appeared in the secret room.

“Sir Fako, my friend, you are amazing.” Sicali’s expression looked quite surprised, “I just received a magic message from Town Ronnie. You solved that big problem so quickly.”

Sicali was indeed surprised. After receiving Tracy’s report, he immediately sent someone to contact Town Ronnie’s mining office, and he got the corresponding news. According to witnesses who were the surviving miners, an unknown powerhouse suddenly appeared underground and fought a fierce battle with the terrifying powerhouse occupying the mine. In the end, the latter lost and fled. The mining office was currently rearranging the related work to resume mining.

Other people didn’t know the degree of danger in the Loeb Mine, but Sicali clearly knew. This mining area was one of the important resources of the White Feather Estate. After hearing that something went wrong, he once led a team to explore in person in order to show importance, but he was horrified by a terrifying breath and left. According to Sicali’s judgment, this breath was extremely powerful. It was definitely at the level of the Demon Overlord, and it might not even be an average Demon Overlord. He was far from being able to resist the enemy.

He deliberately let “Fako” solve it this time to see the power behind this person. He didn’t expect Fake to actually solve the problem in such a short period of time.

In an instant, Sicali began to take this mysterious “Fako” seriously.

For him who was already at stake, this might be a real life-saving straw. If he couldn’t grasp it, then the tragic ending would be unchangeable.

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I think sir should have the proof you want now.”

Sicali knew that the other party was referring to the previous “proven ability.” He immediately nodded and said, “Of course, not only that, the proof of sir far exceeds my expectations. I admire you!”

“You have over-praised. Naturally, the greater the strength of a cooperation partner, the better it is.”

Sicali nodded appreciatively. He seemed determined and said, “If this is the case, I won’t go around in circles. I have one most important matter to ask sir to do- I want a person, and I want him alive as well as something on this person.”

Chen Rui did not feel dissatisfied with the “simplicity” of this request, but he showed solemnity, “Being considered by sir lord to be the ‘most important’ thing, I believe this person and that thing must be unusual. This is different from the mining area proof. This is already an official deal between us. I want to remind sir of the relationship between pay and return. If the person you want is the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse, Raizen the Great, then even if I can achieve it, sir can’t afford the price.”

Chen Rui’s “serious” attitude made Sicali more satisfied, “Don’t worry, the person I want is definitely something I can pay for. There is an additional condition. I can provide intel for this person and that thing, but sir can’t ask the inside story of my matter. You just need to complete the task.”

“Of course.” Chen Rui smiled, “What I care most about is, what compensation can sir pay?”

Sicali’s expression was extremely resolute, “As long as it’s within the power of the lord of the White Feather Estate, anything is fine, even if it is my only sister, Palando!”

“Very good!” Chen Rui’s eyes narrowed. His smile was more intense.

Sicali noticed it and secretly felt that his plan succeeded. Little did he know that this person had already understood the secret between him and Palando. The deliberate determination on the last sentence actually played a self-defeating effect.

“My conditions are definitely within sir’s ability. As for the specific conditions, let’s wait until the person and thing are available.” Chen Rui said lightly, “Now I need to understand all the intel of the target. No matter who this person is, I will always satisfy sir. I must say in advance that my force is very strong, and the power is often equated with the needs. Sir must be psychologically prepared by then.”

Need? It is nothing more than wealth, refuge in power, coups and so on. As long as I can remain alive and eradicate the worst enemy, the rest can be taken care of in the long term! Sicali firmly agreed and took out the space ring that Chen Rui had given Tracy earlier, “Old rules, the information is in this ring.”

Chen Rui took the ring and put it in the close-fitting pocket in his arms, He stood up, “This will be a good start for my long-term cooperation with sir. I have already proved to sir my ability to solve the problem previously, so there is no need to brag about it. Just one sentence, I will never let sir down.”

A strange look flashed in Sicali’s eyes, “Very good! Then I will be the same as last time, waiting for the good news from sir.”

After leaving the secret room of the battle ball merchandise store, Chen Rui returned to the White Armor Hotel. He re-arranged the magic circle to monitor Sicali, then he opened the space ring.

There was a piece of information in the space ring, saying that the person to be dealt with was proficient at transformation technique. He once impersonated the lord, and he also had a legendary grade item called the Wheel of Hull. This time, the commission was not only to capture this person, but also to get the Wheel of Hull.

A sneer appeared on Chen Rui’s face. An enemy that “impersonates” the lord? The “legendary grade” Wheel of “Hull”?

If he didn’t know what was going on, it would make senese. However, Chen Rui had a clear picture of the relationship between the Wheel of Hera and Sicali, including this “sir lord,” who could only be regarded as a substitute. It was clearly the substitute wanting to replace the genuine one.

But what Chen Rui cared about was not this, but the “genuine” related intel. According to the information in the ring, the original Sicali was training in a secret place of Town Massimo. This person’s strength had surpassed the Demon Emperor level, and the “Wheel of Hull” was actually a huge detachable item. The original Sicali had been using this item to absorb power.

At this time, in the surveillance magic, Sicali could be seen walking into the lord’s mansion room briskly. His depressed mood seemed to relax a lot. He grabbed the maid on the side and put his hand into the dress. The rough action made the maid show an expression of pain, but she did not dare to resist. Sicali grabbed the maid by the hair. Just as he was about to abuse her sexually, suddenly there was the sound of footsteps outside. He saw Palando walking into the room.

The scene before Palando made her eyes more gloomy. Sicali slowly let go of the maid. The maid hurriedly covered her torn clothes. She was slapped to the ground by Palando, and she hurried out with her face covered.

Palando ignored the maid as she walked over to reach out to Sicali’s face, but she was pushed on the table by Sicali. He lifted up her skirt and slapped her snow white buttocks ruthlessly. He tightened the t-back that wasn’t enough to cover her body, then… and then… it became a SM x-rated movie.

Chen Rui was not interested in watching any more, and he turned off the surveillance magic circle. This Sicali clone is lewd, violent and cunning. His strength is a weakness. If there’s no choice, I can sacrifice a God-Eating Mask quota to control him.

It’s just that it’s useless to control this clone now. No matter what the final decision is, the genuine Sicali must be resolved first.

While thinking about it, Chen Rui heard the sound of footsteps approaching toward this room in the distance. They seemed to be 2 people. His spirit power now had reached the level of Demon Overlord, and his perception ability was far from comparable to before. He could sense the strength of one of these 2 approaching people was quite extraordinary. Just in case, Chen Rui immediately removed the traces of the magic circle.

Soon, there was a knock on the door. When Chen Rui opened the door calmly, he saw the hotel waiter with a stranger outside the door. The waiter saluted, “Sir Fako, this is a messenger sent by sir lord.”

Chen Rui glanced at the messenger. He was slightly startled, then he showed a profound smile, “Please come in.”

After the messenger walked in, the waiter closed the door and left. After sensing that the waiter had gone far, the messenger saluted, “My pleasure to meet Sir Fako.”

Chen Rui didn’t reply to him, but he watched the messenger quietly. He slowly released the soul power, waiting for the spirit pressure of Demon Overlord to shroud the messenger.

The messenger seemed to be unable to withstand this pressure. His body began to tremble violently as he exclaimed, “Sir, don’t get me wrong! I’m the person sent by sir lord!”

Chen Rui’s grim voice sounded, “Before we start our conversation, let me give you a piece of advice. Don’t take the fluke of any rash actions. Otherwise, even the strength of the peak stage Demon Emperor will be annihilated in an instant.”

The messenger’s facial expression changed as he seemed to be thinking quickly. The trembling of his body gradually stopped, and he calmly said, “Pardon me for being presumptuous, Sir Fako.”

Just after he finished speaking, the mental pressure suddenly disappeared. Chen Rui was already sitting on the sofa as he reached out his hand to signal, “Please sit down.”

The messenger bowed slightly and sat down in front of him.

“How should I call you?” Chen Rui’s tone seemed intriguing, “Sir lord? Or… another sir lord?”

The messenger’s complexion changed drastically as if he was about to stand up, but he held back the thought. When his strength was seen through, his surprise was still somewhat pretentious, but now he was truly shocked.

In the [Analytical Eyes], the race of the messenger was Lucifer Royal Family, and his true strength was A+. The value was exactly the same as the peak stage of the Demon Emperor Sicali who visited the Dark Moon. Together with the familiar feeling, Chen Rui determined that it was another “lord” in front of him. The fact that this person would come to look for “Fako” personally aroused his interest.

“Sir Fako, these internal affairs… Did that person tell you in the battle ball merchandise store?”

Chen Rui heard the words “battle ball merchandise store”, and he felt slightly stunned. He shook his head and said, “That person just entrusted me with a task to solve an enemy who knows the transformation technique and obtain a legendary grade item called the Wheel of Hull. He didn’t say anything else.”

Hearing “transformation technique” and “Wheel of Hull”, a trace of ridicule flashed past the messenger’s eyes. Chen Rui said again, “In fact, I have known the so-called internal affairs a long time ago. As a powerful force, if I don’t have some confidential intel, it would be strange, isn’t it? Sir lord?”

The messenger’s face did not change, but he sighed, “I was really abrupt for this visit. Sir, please forgive me. Since sir is a sensible person, I won’t play around with cleverness. In fact, I have long been in contact with the sir’s force. It’s just… not from sir’s faction.”

Chen Rui’s heart moved. Since the meeting, he had been suppressing Sicali, the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. No matter it was spirit pressure or exposing the internal affairs, he always had the upper hand, causing the other party to be constantly restrained. Now that Sicali said these words, there was an intention to ease the passive situation, but Chen Rui had heard additional clues.

He is connected to the force of “Fako”?

What is the force behind “Fako”? The Dark Moon? No! Then the force that Sicali thinks…

“Oh?” Chen Rui said with a pretentious smile, “I’m in a very large force, divided into several factions, including royal nobles, giant dragons, and even some ruined royal families and so on. I’m a little confused. I don’t know which line sir lord is talking about?”

When Sicali heard this, he had no doubt in his heart. He said with a wry smile, “A straightforward person does not resort to insinuations. Now the Loeb Mine has returned to normal state, and the line I contacted was also cut off by sir. I’m really ashamed.”

Chen Rui’s heart was bright. Sicali of the peak stage Demon Emperor really colluded with the Bloodfall, and he even engaged with Jacob! No wonder, he looks much calmer compared with Sicali of the early stage Demon Emperor. It turns out that he has a plan B and wants to use the power of the Bloodfall against the real Sicali.

Now that Jacob has escaped, he will certainly not be able to reach Jacob in a short time. Sicali naturally doesn’t know who defeated the crystal dragon, so I have to use this to quickly solve the White Feather Estate problem.

“Sir came to the White Feather Estate, I initially knew it, but I didn’t know the identity of sir at that time, and I didn’t know the strength of sir at hand…” Sicali said tactfully, “I don’t know if sir wants a real collaborator?”

“A real collaborator?” Chen Rui had understood the other party’s intention. Once the clone used “Fako” to destroy the real Sicali, the next thing to deal with must be the clone of the peak stage Demon Emperor. Therefore, he must make a move first to get the most critical help from Fako.

“I came with the utmost sincerity, unlike that person who has another plot.” Sicali stood up and bowed solemnly, “I can accept all the conditions of sir!”

After understanding the other party’s psychology, Chen Rui seemed even more unhurried, “I want to ask a question first, if I kill the real Sicali somewhere or destroy the Wheel of Hera, will it affect your life?”

Even if Sicali was cunning, he couldn’t help being shocked.

Wheel of Hera! Not the “Wheel of Hull”! The real Sicali!

This is by no means something that the clone will reveal. I didn’t expect that “Fako” actually mastered the biggest secret of the White Feather Estate!

Who will Chen Rui choose to collaborate with?

chapters.title: Chapter 526 - The Real Sicali
chapters.body:
Chapter 526 - The Real Sicali

Chapter 526: The Real Sicali

The expression on Sicali’s face changed rapidly, and it finally recovered. Now that the other party had insight into the biggest secret, telling the truth would be the best choice, “If you destroy the Wheel of Hera, all the accumulated faith power will dissipate. The real body and the clone will be severely damaged at the same time, but they will not die. But if you kill the real body directly, we, the clones, will die together unless the clone can swallow the soul of the real body and become the real body.”

The Wheel of Hera was an ancient artifact, and what Tetenis knew was limited. Now, after listening to Sicali’s explanation, Chen Rui only knew that this was the case.

“The clone can swallow the soul of the real body?”

“The premise is that he loses the ability to resist,” Sicali smiled bitterly, “His strength is far better than us. He has a group of powerful and fearless warriors and the Wheel of Hera in hand. How can we have this opportunity?”

Chen Rui understood the commission of Sicali, the early stage of the Demon Emperor. That guy’s wild ambition is not only to get freedom and save his life, but he also wants to obtain the Wheel of Hera and become the second Sicali.

Chen Rui’s thought quickly and asked, “So, tell me, what do you want?”

“Live! Also, the exclusive control over this estate!” Sicali also thought quickly in his heart, “If I can get more, I will certainly not refuse.”

Chen Rui nodded slightly. This guy is also ambitious, but he is much more cautious. Facing the current situation, he does not hesitate to be frank about his bottom line.

“You’re more sincere than that guy.” Chen Rui’s tone became more cautious, “So I can help you. We need a lord who can control the White Feather Estate. Under normal circumstances, we will not interfere with your affairs, but when necessary, you must obey the orders and contribute your greatest strength. Therefore, this lord must be 100% loyal to us, understand?”

Sicali’s eyes flashed. 100% loyalty? Completely surrender? I can provide all the resources of the estate to the Bloodfall, even the strength of the troops, but it is a bit beyond my expected price if he wants me to completely hand over my personal fate to others.

Seeing Sicali’s hesitation, Chen Rui added faintly, “the Demon Realm has an old saying, there is no such thing as reaping without sowing. The return and the price are often equal. Don’t forget, in the current situation, my choices are more than yours.”

Sicali was shocked. The last sentence was the key point. If I refuse now, then after the other party has dealt with the real body, he can also support another person, who surrenders to him, to the upper position. It may be the licentious clone or another stranger. It may even be the real body. No matter who it is, I would definitely have no way to survive by then.

Besides me, “Fako” can choose others, and he has plenty of choices… Sicali was silent.

Chen Rui didn’t force him anymore.

He was just leaning on the sofa comfortably and calmly playing with the space ring in his hands. In fact, it was actually an intangible pressure. Although he was very worried about the Dark Moon war, in this scene, Sicali was the anxious one, not “Fako”.

“I’m now restricted by the Wheel of Hera and cannot sign the master-servant contract. If you can capture the real body and let me swallow his soul, I’m willing to surrender.” Sicali hesitated for a while, “As for the Wheel of Hera, my bottom line is to destroy it.”

“You are really a smart person and very content. At least in my opinion, you are more sincere than the guy who is playing abusive games with Palando now.” Chen Rui knew that the other party was cunning and changeable, so it was impossible for him to bow down in a few words. He must speak with facts. As the saying goes, refuse to give up until all hope is gone. As long as the real body of Sicali was controlled by then, everything was easy to handle. As he said, there was more than 1 object that he could choose.

When Sicali heard the words “Palando” and “abusive game”, he was secretly horrified. He felt that all the secrets were seen through by the other party. Since entering this room, I have always felt suppressed everywhere. This Fako in front of me far exceeds my expectations in terms of strength and mentality. It seems that it is not impossible to achieve my greatest wish.

“Okay, now tell me everything you know about that real Sicali…”

3 days later, Chen Rui’s figure appeared in the Oldtown Massimo at the east of the White Feather Estate.

Town Massimo used to be a very prosperous big town. 5 years ago, a group of ferocious bandits wearing hideous masks appeared. Relying on the powerful demonic beast mounts, they came and went swiftly. They often massacred and looted in Town Massimo, causing many deaths and injuries among the townsfolk. The suffering was unspeakable and miserable. When Lord Sicali heard the news, he was furious and personally led his army to eliminate all the 3,000 mounted bandits.

However, the mounted bandits had already caused serious damage to the living environment of Town Massimo, and the situation was not as good as before. Sicali managed to build a new town to the west of Town Massimo and let the residents move to the new town and start a stable life again. The new town was called Newtown Massimo while the deserted site was called Oldtown Massimo.

According to Sicali of the peak stage Demon Emperor, the tragedy of Town Massimo’s mounted bandits that year was actually directed by Sicali. The cause was that several hunters in the town discovered a secret in the nearby barren mountains by chance. In order to kill them, Sicali sent guards to pretend to be mounted bandits to kill all the hunters and all related family and friends who might have leaked the secret. He also sent people to sneak into the town to ask around everywhere until it was confirmed that the secret was not leaked.

As for those who were beheaded were also innocent. It had nothing to do with the real “mounted bandits”. Anyway, with Sicali’s reputation, as long as he dropped a few masks of the mounted bandits near the heads, the public would have no doubt.

After solving Town Massimo’s troubles, Sicali moved his “office location” from the White Feather City to the Oldtown Massimo. He only gave some instructions behind the scenes. Then, only the clones who had been used as substitutes had a chance to come to the main scene.

The truth of Town Massimo strengthened Chen Rui’s determination to deal with Sicali. Such a tyrannical lord with such a reputation throughout the White Feather Estate, he must have used many despicable means similar to the Town Massimo incident to deceive the public. In fact, Sicali’s real purpose of vigorously developing estates and serving the people hypocritically was only for the faith power of the Wheel of Hera.

Whether it was the peak stage Demon Emperor or the Sicali clone of the early stage Demon Emperor, they knew little about the true secrets of the Oldtown Massimo. Judging from the fact that the real Sicali abandoned the White Feather City and moved here, perhaps it was not as simple as using the Wheel of Hera for training.

The Oldtown Massimo leaned on the barren mountains. There were many terrifying legends. Since its abandonment, there was basically no figure in sight. Chen Rui wore a gray cloak to hide his true face. Chen Rui casually wandered around the abandoned site for a long time, but he found no clues. Then, he walked toward the barren mountains.

The barren mountains were the collective name of the vast unexplored barren mountains in the extreme east of the White Feather Estate. It had a very wide area where the mountains were dangerous, barren and inaccessible. There were terrifying demonic beasts in the deep forest.

Based on the intel provided by the 2 clones, Chen Rui searched in a rocky mountain range deep in the barren mountains and finally found a cave surrounded by a protective magic circle. This should be the entrance to Sicali’s “base”.

It was a pity that the intel was nothing more than that. Even if there were 2 clones, there was no further intel. No one knew what was hidden in this “base”.

For Chen Rui, the magic circle around the cave was not difficult to decipher, but it took a lot of effort not to alert the people inside.

After passing through the magic circle of the cave, Chen Rui entered the cave smoothly. With the powerful spirit power of Demon Overlord, he carefully avoided countless traps along the way. This cave was somewhat similar to the Dark Demon’s headquarters in the Dark Moon City where the mysteries were all underground. The more he went down, the more open the space, and there were magic lamps along the way. The guards on patrol had begun to appear in front, and the light of the magic lamp was getting brighter and brighter. There were fewer and fewer hiding places.

Fortunately, these guards were not very strong which was the Higher Demon level. Chen Rui carefully avoided them and continued to sneak forward.

With the skills of [Camouflage] and [Breath Holding], Chen Rui kept changing his body shape while looking for the whereabouts of Sicali’s real body. This underground world was very large. It seemed that the entire mountain range was hollowed out. The scale of the project was far better than the headquarters of the Dark Demon.

Finally, Chen Rui discovered a heavily guarded and brightly lit hall. With his perception, he could sense the unusual fluctuations of power surging from it.

Chen Rui observed patiently for a while. He finally chose a corner to make a move. He killed the last of a group of patrolling guards. While keeping the corpse into the storage warehouse, he quickly turned into the appearance of the guard. After turning a corner, the team continued to move forward, unaware that the last dark elf was another person.

Finally, the team of guards passed the hall. Chen Rui glanced quickly. From a distance, he saw that the space in the hall was extremely huge. It was almost equivalent to an area of 1.5 ground track field. Inside, giant pillars were arranged according to a special order. There was a man sitting on the ground motionless. With his eyesight, he could tell that this man was exactly what Sicali looked like. He was closing his eyes and resting.

Unfortunately, due to the distance, [Analytical Eyes] could not find out the specific strength of this person, but he vaguely sensed through the soul perception that this Sicali’s was much stronger than the 2 that he encountered previously. It was likely to be the real Sicali!

Chen Rui did not rush to do anything. He followed the team for a few laps and finally chose an opportunity. When passing by the entrance of the hall, he sneaked in silently. He had already used the [Breath Holding] to suppress his breath to the lowest point. With the S+ level spirit power, even if Sicali had reached the Demon Overlord level, he would not be aware of his existence.

At this moment, Chen Rui suddenly felt an ominous omen. He felt that there were many stronger breaths slowly surrounding the hall.

Chen Rui thought about it quickly, and he walked back cautiously toward the hall. Sicali’s eyes slowly opened, and he said, “Since you have come here, why do you want to leave again?”

At this time, more and more breath came from outside, enveloping the entire hall.

Chen Rui knew that he fell into a trap, but he didn’t panic. He simply walked out and said in a deep voice, “I can’t leave anyway. Before I die, can you satisfy my curiosity? Sir lord?”

Sicali smiled proudly. Although he was just sitting, he gave people a feeling of having to look upward, “I know what you want to ask. Your stealth and transformation techniques are very good. Unfortunately, this hall is not an ordinary place. I have noticed you since you came in. Those pillars are actually part of the Wheel of Hera. By the way, a guy told you that the name was the Wheel of Hull.”

The last sentence caused Chen Rui’s pupils to shrink suddenly. It turns out that Sicali knew everything about the clones! He knows even such small details!

So, this place is clearly a trap set long ago to “welcome” me!

Facing the bad situation, Chen Rui thought quickly. The Sicali’s clone of the early stage Demon Emperor is about to be swallowed by the real body. He is at the death’s door, so he should not betray me, the last straw of life. We are closely interdependent. Before dealing with the real body, the clone of the peak stage Demon Emperor would not do the same, so who leaked the news?

“Very confused, right?” Sicali smiled gently, “Actually, the answer is very simple. I have a good sister. That idiot thought he took control of her body and mind. I gained a lot of unknown information from her. Actually, that idiot is just a toy for her. Tell you a secret, me as her brother, is her real master.”

Master? The word made Chen Rui think of another person, a hateful enemy. In an instant, the coldness in his eyes surged, and Sicali’s smiling face became even more abominable.

“Since you have already known so much, you should understand what is your ending.” Sicali showed some regrets, “I wanted to catch a big fish, but I didn’t expect that it was just a small Demon Emperor, but you can barely be a sacrifice.”

At this time, a large group of people from outside the hall had already swarmed in. They were led by 2 Demon Emperor-level leaders. The strength of those guards were also quite extraordinary. They were all wearing sturdy armors and shields. Their faces were wearing a hideous mask.

The most eye-catching was a team of magicians with about 200 people. Although the number of these magicians was not very large, the lowest strength had reached the Demon King level. The combat power of this level was no less than an empire-level magician legion. .

Sicali smiled more confidently, “I know that you are the hitman of the Bloodfall, so I won’t accept any tricks like surrender. You have only one dead end. If you don’t resist, I can grant you a quick death.”

Chen Rui’s whole body suddenly cooled down. The chill in his eyes had turned into a sudden ghastly murderous intent.

“These are the real mounted bandits that did evil in Town Massimo back then, right? I believe they have played similar roles in many other places.”

This sentiment made Sicali slightly surprised, “So what? By this time, do you still have the leisure to ask these boring questions? It’s useless to delay time. Just accept your death obediently.”

Chen Rui smiled. A furious smile. The murderous intent burst out from his body, “Yes, accept death obediently… but! You are the one who will die!”

Why is Chen Rui so triggered about the word “master”🤔?

chapters.title: Chapter 527 - Faith Territory
chapters.body:
Chapter 527 - Faith Territory

Chapter 527: Faith Territory

As soon as Chen Rui said this, although the surrounding people didn’t say anything as they were well-trained, their eyes showed mockery in unison.

This person is already a meat on the chopping board, yet he still dares to brag shamelessly!

Those who were present here were Sicali’s most elite fearless warriors with special magic patterns. They were good at offense and defense. They could even hold or even restrain a Demon Overlord, let alone this guy in front of them was just a Demon Emperor. As the master, Sicali, said, originally he wanted to catch a big fish, but a small shrimp came. Moreover, it was a reckless and ignorant shrimp.

If it was a dense forest or wilderness, this shrimp might escape by chance, but in this kind of almost sealed hall, there was only a dead end. Perhaps even the master didn’t have to do it himself!

In this hall with no escape route, Chen Rui was facing at least thousands of fierce enemies alone. They were not average people, but the true strength accumulated by Sicali over the years. Not only that, there was a mysterious enemy behind them who was glaring at him with hostility.

Although the situation was not favorable, Chen Rui’s surging fighting will and killing intent had not diminished. Instead, it had become more turbulent. His breath quickly soared.

“Dead or alive,” Sicali said flatly, still sitting cross-legged. He didn’t intend to act personally.

The heavy shield warriors erected the huge shield in their hands, and the magic mark on the shield began to flash with a pale yellow light as if united into an indestructible whole. The fearless warriors had strong self-confidence. Even if the Demon Emperor in front of them was a powerhouse in the peak stage realm, he couldn’t defeat this defensive formation even with a full blow.

What about Demon Overlord? Could Demon Overlord do it?

Waves of strong magic were undulating in the magician team. The flames of various colors began to shine.

However, these flames were covered by a kind of light. The star-like brilliance did not seem to belong to the originally ugly and dark underground, but since it appeared, the darkness in every corner would vanish in a split second.

Chen Rui used the [Royal Star Transformation] immediately, not only because of his attention to the enemy, but also because of his murderous intentions. The mounted bandits impersonated by these fearless warriors committed innumerable crimes in Town Massimo back then. They set fire, killed, raped and committed all kinds of evil. They used extremely cruel methods. Neither the elderly nor the children were spared. The fact that every mounted bandits had a wine vessel made of a child’s head shocked the entire White Feather Estate.

The disaster of mounted bandits abruptly reduced the population of hundreds of thousands of a large and prosperous town by two-thirds. Even though the survivors moved to the new town, they still suffered a huge setback. Town Massimo would not be able to regain its prosperity within 100 years.

All this was just Sicali’s “suspicion” in order to conceal a certain secret. It was not known how many innocent people had died. Just now Sicali also personally admitted that such a tragedy was not limited to Town Massimo in the White Feather Estate!

This glorious lord who was dedicated to the residents in the hearts of all the residents actually had a true face that was even more hideous and ugly than the most ferocious demon!

Facing the demon and minions in front, Chen Rui had only 1 word in his heart: Kill!

Hundreds of powerful magic rushed toward the dazzling light cluster in the center. The magician was the strongest damage output unit in the war. The lowest strength of these magicians was the Demon King, and the highest was the Great Demon King. Generally speaking, there was no threat to the Demon Emperor powerhouse individually, but if it was 20 Great Demon King magicians, even the Demon Emperor powerhouse couldn’t ignore it. Currently, there were 200 magicians with strength above the Demon King level in front of him. 80 of them were at the Great Demon King level, and all of them were well-trained, cooperative, and protected by the super defensive formation of the great shield warriors. Their combat power could only be described as terrifying.

When such a powerful magic combination landed on the bright starlight, it actually only made the light cluster tremble slightly; it was unable to penetrate through. The light cluster suddenly expanded, and all the magic bombardment was bounced away. The figure of a man in a strange armor appeared in the center.

There was a faint star light flowing on the noble and elegant armor. There seemed to be a flash of splendid dazzling under the serene starlight. Although the man was standing there without moving, there was a pride of looking down on the starry sky.

Compared with this kind of inborn pride, Sicali’s previous expression was like a shameless Dong Shi [1].

Sicali was shocked. He stood up abruptly and blurted out, “[Armor of Faith]!”

The fearless warriors were well-trained. Their shock only lasted for a moment. The armored men still held their huge shields, and the magicians quickly began to prepare for the second round of magic bombardment. Suddenly, everyone felt their bodies sank a little. Their weight had increased several times, and the internal organs and blood increased their load several times out of thin air. The magic power charged by the magicians disappeared immediately. They quickly changed the magic power and spirit power to protect themselves. The worst was the armored men. In this gravity field, the armors and shields with super defensive power had become fatal burdens. Every one of them were stumbling and couldn’t move. Some were even seriously injured by the shields and armors.

[Gravity]!

Chen Rui’s [Gravity] was blessed by the elements of Earth Elemental King Moore which was equivalent to a kind of talent power. Unfortunately, he was not familiar with magic, and the activated [Gravity] was not as powerful as the Demon Emperor powerhouse. The S+ level spirit power could be described as a pearl covered with dust. If it was Zola activating it, then even if the level of these people in front of him was high, there would be a lot of deaths and injuries.

The hall suddenly lit up brightly, and the space seemed to have increased several times. Those pillars began to become transparent, and a strange force poured out. The effect of [Gravity] was quickly offset by this force. The source of power was Sicali. The breath that emerged from his body made Chen Rui feel familiar. It is faith power!

It turns out that the “Wheel of Hera” is not the pillars, but the entire hall!

Although the disordered soldiers were unable to regain their defensive formation immediately, the 2 Demon Emperor leaders who were the least affected by the gravity had jointly activated their territory power to block in front of the magician team to form a powerful protective barrier. The magician behind began to charge an attack again.

If it was before the [Royal Star Transformation], the 2 Demon Emperors would have already rushed up, but the aura that Chen Rui radiated after the [Royal Star Transformation] had already made the 2 Demon Emperors instinctively felt deterred. Therefore, their first reaction was to protect the magicians. As long as these magicians used their mystic arts to launch the strongest combo attack, even if the opponent had reached Demon Overlord, he would not dare to underestimate it. As long as magic restrained this enemy, they could take advantage of the situation to launch an effective attack. At least, they could divert the opponent’s attention to create opportunities for the master.

When Chen Rui saw this situation, he knew how to react. A mask suddenly appeared on his face. This mask was very thin, almost equivalent to skin, and it could not be seen outside under the cover of the visor.

“Devour!”

In an instant, all the magic power and spirit power near the hall surged to Chen Rui like a tide. To be precise, they surged to the mask. They were almost completely emptied in the blink of an eye. The attack charged by the magicians seemed like an inflated balloon that collapsed in an instant. 1 of the 2 Demon Emperor leaders was proficient in magic. The originally joint territory protection was perfect, but under the impact of this terrifying devouring power, it was instantly disintegrated.

Sicali, who had been waiting for an opportunity to take action, was shocked again. This devour is equivalent to the nemesis of the magic. Is it the talent of the nemesis of the Lucifer Royal Family?

No! I’m afraid the devour of this intensity cannot be achieved by ordinary talents!

While he was distracted, Chen Rui’s figure instantly crossed the collapsed defensive territory and appeared in the position where the fearless warriors had gathered the most. The fearless warriors immediately felt the surrounding environment changed as if they were in the stars. Besides, their own strength began to deteriorate and decay rapidly.

Then came a loud shout, “[True Destructive Aura Blow]!”

In a large circle of fearless warriors nearby, a fast-changing half-moon light appeared in the same place. This fast-moving half-moon was like the dance of the Death. Under this dance, the life and soul were cut and split. Even the warriors who were wearing heavy armor could not block such destructive sword qi that penetrated deep into the soul. On the surface, the armor was only twisted and shattered, and there was no fatal injury in the body. In fact, their souls had been completely wiped out by this blow. The magicians who had lost their magic powers turned into countless pieces without any resistance.

In an instant, there were at least hundreds of dead men killed within a range of 60 meters nearby. The Demon Emperor, who was proficient in magic, was severely injured and dying while another Demon Emperor was also seriously injured. The fearless warriors were all shocked. They originally thought that with this lineup, it would at least obstruct the opponent. They didn’t expect that it was actually so vulnerable.

Sicali was shocked and furious. From the actual combat’s [Gravity] to territory to this terrifying trump card, this enemy whom I underestimated at the beginning wiped out the more than half of the elite fearless warriors whom I have painstakingly trained in just a short time.

Chen Rui’s murderous intent hadn’t diminished in the slightest. These people were all blood-stained and unforgivable criminals. He doesn’t mind turning into Shura to kill them all.

Sicali’s figure suddenly appeared behind Chen Rui. He punched with the black flames in his hands. Chen Rui had been prepared long ago. He suddenly turned around and launched a punch too.

When the 2 fists containing immense power collided, the fearless warriors nearby were all blown away by the terrifying air wave. The 2 figures in the center of the force field stood still. They were evenly matched.

At the moment the power was cancelled out, Chen Rui and Sicali moved at the same time. The sound of beating continued for a while. The fearless warriors could only hear the sound of offense and defense with the occasional image of the 2. Even the leader of the Demon Emperor level with minor injuries only saw both figures moving quickly, but he could not see the specific actions clearly.

Chen Rui’s body was full of a huge wave-like surging force, and he launched an overlapping force. Sicali had suffered from this kind of force before. With a back flip, he avoided the overlapping punch force. As soon as he landed, he saw a huge dazzling light ball rushing toward him.

Sicali didn’t evade as he parried with both hands. When he touched the [Aurora Shot], his body trembled. He couldn’t help but withdraw 1 step, then 2 steps, 3 steps…

Chen Rui frowned as he could feel the power of [Aurora Shot] rapidly decay under a certain mysterious power. Sicali had already stepped back 6 or 7 steps. He unleashed his power of both hands amidst the loud shout, tearing apart the weakening [Aurora Shot].

“Very good power. It’s almost equal to the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. Especially the spirit power which is even stronger. You really are a big fish. I made a mistake in my judgment.” Sicali let out a sigh. The slightly cracked red armor on his body began to heal quickly and automatically at a speed visible to the naked eye, and it returned to its original state in the blink of an eye. “You should notice that my true strength is only the early stage of the Demon Overlord, but unfortunately, you still can’t beat me, and you will die in my hands.”

Chen Rui did feel the difference. Sicali’s overall strength was S-. Chen Rui used the [Royal Star Transformation] to kill Nero in the early stage of the Demon Overlord before his power reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. Now that his strength had reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, he should be able to compete with the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord, but he could only be in a stalemate with Sicali in the previous confrontation.

“Because… Wheel of Hera?” Chen Rui asked tentatively.

“Yes! My territory has been integrated with the Wheel of Hera.” Sicali gave a strange smile. “The armor on my body is also the [Armor of Faith]. Unless you can cut off the source of faith, kill all the White Feather Estate residents who have faith in me, otherwise, under the protection of faith power, my power and life will be endless. From the moment you step into this hall which is the [Wheel of Hera Territory], you are already destined to be defeated. Even if you want to escape, you can’t do it.”

Chen Rui felt that what Sicali said was not an exaggeration. The [Wheel of Hera Territory] was a bit similar to the Super System. Generally speaking, Sicali was almost invincible here unless there was a decisive force that overwhelmed the entire territory.

“A Demon Overlord with [Armor of Faith]. An ideal sacrifice item! I believe the master will be very happy!” Sicali’s stern voice echoed in the hall, “My fearless warriors, give me your vitality power!”

The bodies of all the fearless warriors in the [Wheel of Hera Territory] quickly began to shrivel and wither, becoming lifeless corpses.

“Activate! [Shackles of Sacrifice]!”

Just as Chen Rui was suspicious of the “master” that Sicali mentioned, his body suddenly felt stagnant like he was bound by countless chains. He actually couldn’t get rid of it.

This kind of chain contained a strange force. It was actually quickly draining Chen Rui’s soul and vitality. Chen Rui’s body trembled.

“I had already set the shackles when I was fighting with you just now. Plus the sacrifice of the lives of the fearless warriors, there is no way to break free with your strength! Tremble! Fear!” Sicali laughed smugly.

At this time, Chen Rui’s armor began to change from a dazzling luster to a black color that exuded destructive breath. The style also looked hideous.

“You’re wrong! This guy’s trembling is not because of fear, but because he can’t suppress my will.” A gloomy laugh came out, “Very good! So much faith power! It’s worth the cost of burning a lot of will! With these powers, I can truly…”

Before Chen Rui finished speaking, he, who was bound by the [Shackles of Sacrifice], suddenly disappeared. A huge black hole faintly glowing with maroon appeared in the [Wheel of Hera Territory].

Sicali was horrified to find that not only was he unable to drain the enemy’s power, but all his power, including his faith power, rushed toward the black hole uncontrollably.

[1] Dong Shi is a historical ugly woman in contrast to Xi Shi, one of the renowned Four Beauties of ancient China

Master again? Is this Sicali still not the real ‘Sicali’? Or there is a Demi-God behind Sicali? If Shura continued to absorb more power, then….

chapters.title: Chapter 528 - Altar
chapters.body:
Chapter 528 - Altar

Chapter 528: Altar

In the [Wheel of Hera Territory], the terrifying black hole frantically devoured everything around it. Some guards or fearless warriors who entered the hall later were devoured by the black hole, leaving no corpse.

Sicali had continuously launched more than a dozen methods of attack or defense, and none of them could stop this terrifying devouring power. The black hole was not devouring ordinary power, but the faith power he had accumulated over the years!

The faith power allowed Sicali to advance from the ordinary Demon Emperor level to the Demon Overlord level by leaps and bounds, then he had stabilized the early stage in less than 5 years. Recently, he seemed to be able to break through to the intermediate stage. It was not an exaggeration to say that he was a talented genius to be able to reach this stage in 5 years. With the special function of Wheel of Hera and the gift of a certain “master”, it was only a matter of time to reach the peak stage of Demon Overlord. Perhaps he even had a chance to become the legendary Demi-God.

Sicali had always been laying low and a fence sitter to confuse the capital because he wanted to be well-prepared until he could soar in the future and shock the entire Demon Realm! Once a certain plan was successful, whether the Dark Moon or Obsidian, they must surrender to Sicali. Not only the Fallen Angel Empire, but even the Demon Realm would be below him!

What Sicali did not expect was that he encountered such an enemy today, and the faith power that he accumulated through hard work had actually become the opponent’s “food”!

The light in the hall flickered, and the upright pillars became curved under the horrifying swallowing force of the black hole. The image was very strange, and the entire territory began to tremble constantly.

Sicali’s heart trembled even harder. The Wheel of Hera was his greatest reliance, and it was also an important source of power for a great secret. Now that he was about to lose even the Wheel of Hera, how could he not be heartbroken?

The black hole seemed to devour everything. The power of the [Wheel of Hera Territory] was already diminishing to an extreme point. Sicali could do nothing about it. The only thing he could do was to try his best to protect himself from being devoured by the black hole for the time being.

“Boom!“

After the violent shaking, the huge space of the hall returned to its original state. The pillars and many facilities on the ground disappeared. The black hole finally gradually shrank, and the devouring power quickly weakened.

“No!” Sicali let out a heartbreaking scream as his orifices were bleeding. His territory and part of the soul power was integrated with the Wheel of Hera. Now the Wheel of Hera had been completely swallowed, not only his faith power disappeared, even his body and soul had also been seriously injured. Compared with trauma, what was even more evident was his inner fear and regret- The hope of ascending the summit of power and position, and the mysterious master’s order… It was all over!

After the black hole disappeared, the terrifying enemy in black armor appeared in front of him. When Sicali looked at the 2 strange eyes behind the visor, his soul almost had the illusion of annihilation. While he was in panic, the black armor began to change again, returning to its original star-like color and style. The destructive breath contained in his eyes had disappeared and turned into sword-like anger.

Chen Rui was enraged at the moment mainly because of Shura. Every time he activated the [Royal Star Transformation], Shura’s willpower would be greatly enhanced and it was difficult to suppress. This time he was also mentally prepared initially, but he didn’t expect Shura actually came out unexpectedly at the huge price of burning will.

Burning will was similar to the exhaustion technique of burning vitality. As a result, Shura used this desperate method to temporarily dominate the body in order to devour the Wheel of Hera containing the faith power in one breath.

Chen Rui could sense that Shura, who had devoured the Wheel of Hera, had a great setback of consciousness and seemed to fall into a long sleep. It seemed that he would not pop out and create troubles for quite some time. However, he felt more and more uneasy in his heart. Shura was not a fool. He must be planning for something after paying such a large price to devour the Wheel of Hera.

Chen Rui suddenly recalled that when he was fighting Nero, Shura devoured Nero’s flesh and power, but the Demon Overlord power absorbed from Nero was not used by the [Star Conversion] or his body, but disappeared. It’s the same for the Demi-God soul power devoured previously. I’m afraid it is a big hidden danger.

These thoughts were only fleeting in Chen Rui’s mind. There was no time to think because there was still an important enemy to deal with.

When Chen Rui’s mind shifted, countless translucent stars appeared around Sicali’s body, and his strength dropped sharply. Sicali had previously seen Chen Rui activating this strange territory when he dealt with the fearless warriors, but he did not expect it to have such a strong weakening effect. His severely injured body could hardly gather resistance. Without waiting for him to respond, Chen Rui’s attack had arrived, and the overlapping power burst out like a huge wave. Sicali had no choice but to activate [Dark Flame] and parried with his arms. Because of the loss of faith power and [Wheel of Hera Territory], his strength was greatly reduced.
