His whole body was shocked by the punch. There were light sounds of continuous explosions in his body. His red armor showed a lot of cracks. This time there was no way to heal automatically as before.

Sicali knew that his current state was definitely not the enemy’s opponent. When he gritted his teeth, a red transparent crystal bead appeared in his palm which instantly blossomed into a blood-red flower shape.

That flower! Chen Rui’s pupils contracted. For him who had experienced the trial of alchemy civilization inheritance, this flower was simply too familiar, and he had had such a “flower” before. Judging from the strange breath that the flower exudes, it is actually the Flower of Abyss!

The scene of the final battle in the trial emerged in Chen Rui’s mind. The endless ocean of monsters, brood, blazing flame demon women, abyss lord… He could not help but shudder. At this time, the strange red flower in Sicali’s hand had split apart. A red mist covered his body. His body began to twist and swell rapidly. He roared like a beast.

In the blink of an eye, a half-demon half-beast monster appeared in front of his eyes. This monster was about 2 meters high with red eyes and faint traces of Sicali. His arms with sharp bone spurs soared to the length of touching the ground, and a flame-like red light emanated from his pale black skin. A berserk breath exuded all over his body.

The monster roared wildly and rushed toward Chen Rui with terrifying flames from his arms. Chen Rui did not panic. The surging overlapping force changed, and the wave-like power turned into lake-like softness which calmly greeted him.

After Sicali mutated by using the Flower of Abyss, his strength should have surpassed the opponent, especially his attack power was extremely strong. Even if the opponent’s methods were strange, he could still win for sure. However, the opponent’s defense methods were extremely mysterious. That berserk attack seemed to have fallen into an endless quagmire. His power was being restrained, making him feel extremely aggrieved.

For non-Abyss Family, although the Flower of Abyss could trigger powerful forces, the side effects afterward were also very large. Both the body and soul would suffer injuries that were difficult to repair in a short period of time, and their strength would be greatly reduced.

Sicali wanted to use the Flower of Abyss desperately to capture the enemy who devoured the Wheel of Hera as an explanation to his master, but unexpectedly he was in a more passive situation. How would he expect that although the Abyss Family had disappeared for tens of thousands of years, the enemy in front of him had extremely rich combat experience with the Abyss Family. He even inherited the soul of the ancient civilization which let him be well versed in the weaknesses of the Abyss monsters.

The soft power used by Chen Rui was an imitation of Catherine’s subtle means of leveraging and unloading in the battle at the Crystal Valley back then. In terms of attack power, it was not as strong as the surging overlapping power, but it was a good method for defending and restraining the enemy. Sicali’s attack method and vibe were very similar to the berserk demons. Similar mutations should have occurred. In the trial space, Chen Rui once used this kind of soft power and overlapping power to kill dozens of berserk demons. Therefore, he was familiar and handy when using it against Sicali now.

Sicali became more anxious as he fought, knowing that unless he had an overwhelming absolute power, his own “power” would definitely be unable to break through the opponent’s “skills.” What was terrible was that if this continued, the Flower of Abyss’ time limit was about to end. By then, his power would be greatly reduced, and he could only wait to be slaughtered.

Thinking of this, Sicali felt timid. Hesuddenly had an intention to retreat. When he was distracted, Chen Rui’s keen spirit power caught the flaw. After removing the force, he changed the defense stance into the offense stance. . The [Aura Blade] cut into Sicali’s shoulders. Even though the hardness of Sicali’s arm had increased several times after the mutation, he couldn’t resist the blow when his power was weak. His whole arm was only dangling by a layer of epidermis, and it was almost cut off by the root. He covered his arms and ran out of the hall with all his strength.

Naturally, Chen Rui would not let the culprit go. He pursued Sicali closely. Both their speed was very fast, and the guards along the way had no time to stop him. Sicali fled in any path he could in panic. He didn’t run to the exit of the cave outside, but he kept running toward the depths of the base.

While pursuing and fleeing, Sicali was more shocked when felt that the effect of the Flower of Abyss was rapidly diminishing. He ran rampantly all the way.

Chen Rui kept pursuing Sicali into a huge cave. To his surprise, this cave was actually a dead end. The light of the whole cave was dim. There was a platform in the center which seemed to be some kind of altar structure. The whole cave was full of strong bloody smell.

Sicali fled toward the altar desperately. Unexpectedly, his speed suddenly slowed down, and his mutated body had returned to his original state. The original effect of the Flower of Abyss had completely faded. Sicali wanted to cry but there were no tears. Before he had time to react, Chen Rui’s figure appeared behind him instantly, striking his neck with a hand knife.

Sicali’s strength was greatly reduced. He fainted without even making a sound. His shoulder injury could not be suppressed, and the blood spread quickly on the ground. Chen Rui instinctively felt the strangeness of this cave. As he was about to grab Sical to leave, the light in the cave gradually brightened. The scene changed abnormally, and there was rolling blood evaporating all around like a terrifying blood river.

Illusion? Chen Rui quickly focused his mind, but instead of disappearing, the blood river changed again. The transpired blood river turned into blood-red molten magma, and the surrounding air was filled with suffocating suppression. Even his line of sight became distorted in the high temperature.

Seeing these familiar scenes, Chen Rui’s expression finally changed when he thought of the previous situation of Sicali.

A terrifying destructive breath surged in the distance as if it had discovered the intruder.

The identity of the master is going to reveal soon?

chapters.title: Chapter 529 - Abyss Lord And Satan
chapters.body:
Chapter 529 - Abyss Lord And Satan

Chapter 529: Abyss Lord and Satan

The terrifying destructive breath surged over. With Chen Rui’s current spirit power level, he could clearly feel the hatred contained in the breath that made one’s soul tremble.

When a horrifying image that was full of flames holding a greatsword appeared in Chen Rui’s memory, he subconsciously shuddered.

That’s a terrifying existence that can instantly kill a Demon Overlord!

Although the trial of ancient alchemy civilization was a dream created by the territory kingdom, it was the simulation of the real war between the alchemy civilization and the Abyss Family in the past. In reality, the power of the Abyss Family was only stronger than in the illusion. As the top powerhouse of the Abyss hierarchy, the terrifying figure holding the greatsword definitely had the ability to instantly kill a Demon Overlord!

What appeared in front of Chen Rui’s eyes now was also not an illusion. Strictly speaking, it was not a cave in the great barren mountain, but a real abyss similar to the one he encountered in the bottom of the Crystal Valley. It was surrounded by blood-red lava, and there was no exit.

Chen Rui’s only way out now was the [Star Gate], just like how he escaped from the abyss of the Crystal Valley, but the nearest star point of the [Star Gate] was in the White Feather City. Once he returned to the White Feather City, today action was tantamount to a complete failure. As long as Sicali woke up, he would definitely abandon this base and it would be difficult to find him next time. This way, the entire planning of the White Feather Estate would also be in vain. It would directly affect the Dark Moon’s life and death.

The destructive breath ahead was still far away moments ago, but the distance was already close in an instant. Chen Rui gritted his teeth and he did not activate the [Star Gate]. There was an item in his hand; a red badge engraved with a strange snake-like pattern. It was given by Satan when he was at the Mountain Seckred.

Chen Rui knew that Satan’s gifted badge and the trace of Demi-God’s power was not out of real kindness, but for now, summoning Satan was the best solution.

A figure appeared in the front of his line of sight which was about 200 meters away. It should be possible to see clearly with Chen Rui’s eyesight, but this figure looked vague. It vaguely had a back bone wing and was holding a greatsword. image. The only clear feeling was the kind of hatred that was enough to destroy the soul.

It’s really an abyss lord!

If it’s a gap demon or berserk demon, it’s fine. Even if I run into blazing flame witch, I still have the power to fight, but this one in front of me can kill dozens of Demon Overlord giant crystal beasts in an instant!

Even if the abyss lord was not in the range of [Analytical Eyes], he could guess that the [Analytical Eyes]’s Analysis would undoubtedly be “extremely dangerous with the kind of hatred breath alone that spanned across space and distance!”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. He immediately concentrated his power on the snake head of the badge in his hand. The center of the badge suddenly glowed with a dark red light. When he lightly applied force, the whole badge broke apart.

The destructive breath surrounding the figure did not approach nearer and just looked at the intruder from a distance. Despite the distance, the intangible murderous aura and oppression still made Chen Rui’s mind tremble.

Facing such a terrifying enemy, it would be a lie to say there was no fear in his heart. However, he would die faster if he was only fearful. Chen Rui calmed his heart completely. His S+ level spirit power was fully activated, and all his energy was concentrated on the figure that represented death.

A feeling of extreme danger suddenly surged in his heart, then the highly concentrated spirit power seemed to sense a terrifying greatsword wave coming toward this side. His vision suddenly became extremely distorted as he felt a terrifying sharp qi braving a strong death breath rushing toward him. A huge crack appeared on the solid ground. The magma along the way splashed like a fountain under the pressure of the terrifying wind.

If Chen Rui was slashed by this sword, then even if he had the ability of [Regeneration] and [Astral Form], his body and soul would be completely annihilated under this terrifying sword qi.

When Chen Rui had a warning sign in his heart, his hands suddenly bloomed with a faint light that had been charging for a long time. He used it to block in front of him without hesitation. It turned out that this action made in advance saved his life. The sharp qi hit his hand faster than he expected, and an unstoppable tremendous pressure spread onto him instantly. Chen Rui felt an unprecedented crisis and concentrated his mind power on his hands. The terrifying sharp qi, which was enough to cut off the mountains, was constantly being dissolved and diverted under the mysterious skills of [Star Diversion]. The nearby rock walls and ground were cracked and deformed due to the terrifying power.

The abyss lord’s simple wave of sword not only had a terrifying power, but the aftereffect was beyond imagination too as it was continuous. Chen Rui’s nerves became more and more tense, because the 10-second time limit of [Star Diversion] was about to end, and the power of this sword had no tendency to weaken at all!

The light in Chen Rui’s hand finally disappeared, and the indestructible sharp qi instantly slashed his body in half without any hindrance. No, it was countless pieces. More precisely, it was countless flies flying.

God-Eating Mask’s [Demonic Flies Transformation]!

The demonic flies flew, avoiding the terrifying range of the sword aura, then they regrouped into Chen Rui’s body. At this time, the terrifying sword aura gradually disappeared.

This is just a random slash from 100 meters away!

Chen Rui’s complexion became more dignified. The power of the abyss lord far exceeded my imagination. Even the powerhouses of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord such as Catherine, Paglio, and the Dark Elemental King did not give me such terrifying pressure. Could it be that the abyss lord’s power has reached…

Mountain Seckred was almost tens of thousands of miles away. Chen Rui didn’t know when and how Satan would come. Now that he had made a decision, the only thing he could do now was to wait! Facing this terrifying abyss lord!

Now that the 2 life-saving skills of [Demonic Flies Transformation] and [Star Diversion] had been used up, if such a slash came again, Chen Rui was not sure if he could dodge or resist it!

Therefore, he was about to do a bold thing – Take the initiative to attack!

There were countless stars around Chen Rui’s body, and various physical qualities were immediately strengthened. [Galaxy Territory] could be repeatedly activated within the effective time. At the same time, the blazing heat around was replaced by a kind of chill. The boiling molten lava gradually subsided due to the sword qi. It was actually frozen into ice incredibly, and the ice quickly spread toward the abyss lord.

The abyss lord, who was still indistinct, didn’t attack or defend. It just stared at the extending ice, seeming to be thinking about something.

With a blow, Chen Rui’s body was already burning with black flames, and it turned into a manic red color in the blink of an eye. A huge Scorching Dragon roared out of the red light and pounced toward the abyss lord ferociously. Its momentum was amazing.

The abyss lord still didn’t move. Just as Scorching Dragon was about to get close to his body. Chen Rui’s consciousness sensed the abyss lord moved, then the greatsword stuck on the ground disappeared for a moment and returned to the same position.

The Scorching Dragon rushing momentum suddenly paused, and time seemed to freeze. Almost in the next blink of an eye, the huge Scorching Dragon’s head split. The whole winding body was like an opened zipper, neatly splitting by an irregular curve. The ice that was initially frozen because of [Winter Territory] also quickly began to crack and dissolve according to the split. They were replaced by blood-red boiling magma.

In the state of [Royal Star Transformation], the strongest attack [Scorching Dragon Kill] launched with [Galaxy Territory] in conjunction with [Winter Territory] was completely defeated. After the terrifying sharp qi destroyed the Scorching Dragon, it still rushed toward Chen Rui unabatedly.

The power of this sword was far above the previous one!

Chen Rui fought fiercely with Sicali for a long time, and this [Scorching Dragon Kill] cost a huge amount of power. The state of [Royal Star Transformation] had begun to be in an emergency state. Facing this terrifying second sword, [Demonic Flies Transformation] and [Star Diversion] could not be used again. The situation was extremely critical. Fortunately, he still had a shield which was the “half” Demon Shield of Illusive Demon Shield, one of the Demon Realm’s 7 artifacts.

With a shift of mind, a dark gold shield with simple patterns on one side had appeared in Chen Rui’s hand. At the same time, a translucent blue shield appeared around his body. As the protective shield had just been activated, the swift sharp qi had completely defeated the Scorching Dragon. Then, it shredded the protective shield without stopping, and it firmly slashed the side of the dark golden shield.

“Clang!“

The intangible sharp qi in the air and the vibration sound of the shield caused the nearby magma to show layers of ripples. Chen Rui felt like his body was dragged away by someone involuntarily.

Although the Demon Shield could absorb damage and replenish physical strength, the pressure of this blow was too great. The star-like armor cracked for the first time. The fragments were scattered in the air and disappeared along the way. Chen Rui’s body was pushed through countless magma by the huge force. Wherever it passed, the magma separated under pressure until stopped at a rock wall.

The armor on Chen Rui’s body was already shattered, and blood continued to overflow from his 7 orifices, covering the blood stains that had dried up under the high temperature. There was no trace on the Demon Shield, but his violently trembling hands could hardly hold the shield.

The power of a sword is actually so powerful!

If there was a third slash, the Demon Shield could stop it, but Chen Rui definitely couldn’t resist it. Is it really necessary to use the [Star Gate]?

When the abyss lord saw that the second slash was still blocked, it seemed even more surprised. Just as he was about to launch the third slash, the space suddenly became distorted. A strange wave of power rippled through the air, and Chen Rui’s heart moved as he put away the state of [Royal Star Transformation]. The Demon Shield also disappeared.

At this time, the space in the air seemed to be torn apart by someone, and an irregular opening appeared. A somewhat familiar figure of a man appeared in front of his eyes.

Race: Unable to determine!

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to determine!

[Analysis]: Extremely dangerous!

As a matter of fact, the [Analytical Eyes] already showed the display data when the space just cracked, then only Chen Rui saw the figure. This indicated that the real appearance of the figure was even before the vision was formed.

A very young man, who was just like an ordinary person, had handsome features and no terrifying breath like the abyss lord. This “ordinary” person integrated with the sky and the earth as one. No matter where he was, it gave people a kind of looking up feeling.

The Mountain Seckred Demi-God powerhouse, Satan!

Satan didn’t look at Chen Rui. At first glance, he targeted the abyss lord in the distance just like the way the blood red eyes of the abyss lord stared at him.

Chen Rui felt that the abyss lord seemed to move. The greatsword that was inserted on the ground was pointed to Satan, then he only saw the tip of the sword trembled slightly. Then, there were countless traces of fracture in the surrounding space. It made hundreds of slashes at a speed and power which couldn’t be seen by the eyes.

Chen Rui couldn’t help closing his eyes because his vision could no longer keep up with the opponent’s movements. He could only rely on the senses of spirit power to barely capture a few traces of trajectory.

The 2 obviously faced each other in this scene, but he felt that the space close at hand was separated into countless independent spaces.

Although the sword of the abyss lord was terrifying, Satan was more terrifying. Standing in the void, he had not moved, but he somehow caused the abyss lord to attack frantically at an unconventional speed.

Chen Rui felt that the abyss lord’s offense was more like a defense, and Satan, who hadn’t moved, was offensive.

The hatred breath of the abyss lord was fading. Finally, the breath burst out, and there was a violent shock in the entire space. Chen Rui opened his eyes and found that the abyss lord had disappeared. It was just blood red magma within a few hundred meters had been incredibly solidified into solid green crystals. There were many traces of cracks. In the center was an exaggeratingly huge crater spreading out which was also covered with green crystals. It seemed to be the trace of the abyss lord being killed.

When Satan lifted both hands gently, Chen Rui felt dizzy. The surrounding scene suddenly changed to full of verdant jungle. It seems a bit familiar- Mountain Seckred!

Chen Rui was very shocked: Satan “moved” the Mountain Seckred here? No, it should be a kind of phantasm, or it should be called the territory kingdom!

The phantasm of the Mountain Seckred seemed to be constantly devouring the solidified abyss blood sea, and the image of the blood sea gradually became thinner.

Satan had landed on the ground, and he glanced at Chen Rui faintly, “Simon… Let’s just call you so. You surprised me.”

“Greetings to Sir Satan!” Chen Rui bowed respectfully, showing a flattered look, “Sir Satan is overpraising. Thanks to your timely appearance to kill the terrifying monster, otherwise I will be dead.”

Judging from the battle between the abyss lord and Satan, the previous 2 slashes were not of full strength. Satan was able to completely obliterate Abyss Lord, so his strength was conceivable. Even though Chen Rui knew this Demi-God powerhouse had hidden motives, he still did not dare to neglect him. Satan only needed to move his fingers to destroy him, and he couldn’t even escape into the [Star Gate] in time.

“I didn’t kill that enemy. It is just a projection. If this projection becomes a real body, even I can’t destroy it so quickly.” Satan’s words made Chen Rui secretly startled. It has such a terrifying power despite being just a projection. Then the real abyss lord should be able to compete with a Demi-God. Even if it is not comparable to a Demi-God, it is far better than the Demon Overlord level.

Chen Rui felt that he had some new understanding of the strength levels above Demon Overlord. He heard Satan continue to say, “There are 3 things that surprised me. Firstly, your growth rate has exceeded my imagination. You absorbed the trace of my power essence so quickly. Your power actually reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, and your spirit power seems to have some kind of change. Secondly, you actually met the Abyss Family again. If it’s pure luck, it’s really astonishing. Thirdly, you can actually withstand the two slashes of the abyss lord which is difficult even for the peak stage of the Demon Overlord.”

Satan smiled slightly, “I won’t force you to explain, but this abyss projection land is a very delicious prey for my territory kingdom. Just tell me what you want. I can satisfy 1 condition.”

Condition? Chen Rui’s mind suddenly became active.

Turns out Satan’s motive is just to absorb more power from the Abyss Family, or is it that simple? What condition will Chen Rui ask for?

chapters.title: Chapter 530 - Gerant’S Winning Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 530 - Gerant’S Winning Plan

Chapter 530: Gerant’s Winning Plan

Although Chen Rui had reached the spirit power of S+ which could effectively extend the duration of the [Royal Star Transformation], the fatigue period after the end could not be avoided. At this time, Chen Rui was extremely tired mentally and physically. What he wanted to do most was sleep, but he still couldn’t sleep not only because of Sicali outside of the abyss and also because of Satan’s promise.

A Demi-God’s promise.

Satan’s mind is very deep, and he always has hidden intentions to me, the uninvited guest who broke into the Mountain Seckred, but no matter what, the power held by the Demi-God-level powerhouse is absolutely powerful. It is enough to affect the result of a war or even an entire empire, then…

Chen Rui took a deep breath and forcibly used his spirit power to suppress his fatigue, “I’ll explain to sir first. The reason why I absorb the power bestowed by sir so quickly is just a coincidence. It’s related to something called the Wheel of Hera…”

He briefly talked about Sicali using the Wheel of Hera to defraud the faith power and the bloody altar, but he attributed his power growth to accidentally swallowing the power of the Wheel of Hera. As for avoiding the 2 attacks of Abyss Lord… it was also related to the faith power swallowed in his body. Unfortunately, defending the 2 slashes had used up the absorbed power, and he was seriously injured. If it hadn’t been for Satan to arrive in time, he would have been killed.

This was only half true. Satan listened quietly without expressing any opinion. After he finished speaking, he said, “It’s actually the Wheel of Hera! It turns out that the Abyss Family spent all their efforts to find such a servant. They want to use the stolen faith power to weaken the seal of the channel step by step. At least, they are able to gradually project the real body here, but unfortunately, they met you, a lucky guy…”

Satan only talked about the Abyss Family and Wheel of Hera. He didn’t mention the truth or falsehood of Chen Rui’s “explanation” just now. Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “Is this still lucky? I almost died. By the way, sir, what is the Abyss Family…”

“They are the real demons.” Satan gave Chen Rui a deep look, “Once they return, everything will be destroyed… including the world above the ground.”

The real demon? Destroy everything? Judging from the inherited memory, the alchemy civilization was indeed destroyed by the Abyss Family. This should not be an alarmist. Chen Rui noticed that Satan used the word “return” and frowned slightly.

“However, it is almost impossible to open the channel seal at this stage. Generally speaking, the Abyss Family will desperately release some kind of projected space entrance through the seal and induce some suitable people to become enslaved servants. The abyss in front of you is a projection space formed by the painstaking management of the Abyss Family which has existed for at least tens of thousands of years…”

Satan didn’t continue to explain. Chen Rui felt that there was something in his hand. It was the snake-pattern badge that summoned Satan, “Your luck is beyond my expectation. I hope that the next summoning will bring more surprises. Okay, now state your wish.”

Chen Rui inexplicably thought of a story about trading the soul with the demons, especially the one in front of him with the name of a devil. He hesitated and said, “Sir Satan, if I want to ask sir to take action to change the situation of a battle… “

With the help of a Demi-God powerhouse, there was no suspense to obliterate Obsidian or help the Dark Moon defeat the capital army. Satan didn’t reply to him. He just looked at him indifferently and asked, “Do you think I will do it?”

Satan once said that he would not pay attention to any affairs of the Demon Realm empire or even the rise and fall. Chen Rui asked questions tentatively. When he saw Satan’s attitude, although he expected it, he would inevitably be a little disappointed.

What conditions should I mention?

Give me another trace of the essence power of the sinister motive? Bah! The name is disgusting!

Chen Rui was extremely exhausted physically and mentally. His brain was getting heavier and he was about to fall into a deep sleep. There was no energy left to think about it, “Can this condition be saved for later fulfillment?”

“No.” There was a chill in Satan’s eyes, “I don’t like owing favors. You must say it now.”

The meaning was obvious. Today, one condition must be stated, otherwise it will make me upset.

At this time, the abyss space had been swallowed by the phantasm of the Mountain Seckred. Chen Rui returned to the bloody altar cave. Sicali, who almost broke his arm, was still unconscious in the ground.

“Then sir, please take me and this captive to the top of the white mountain in the southernmost part of Town Massimo.”

After Chen Rui said this sentence, his mind began to blur, then he felt the shaking of the ground and the change of space. After a few blinks, he was on the white mountain with the unconscious Sicali, and Satan had disappeared.

After controlling Sicali with Zola’s special shackles, Chen Rui sent out a summoning signal with his last strength before he fell to the ground and fell asleep.

Dark Moon Estate, Town Dico.

The victory today was spreading everywhere in the army camp.

“General Gerant personally led an army to defeat an army of 300,000 undead in the wilderness!”

“General Gerant is great! He finally got the revenge!”

“We must completely defeat the Dark Moon Army in the next battle!”

“…”

The command camp of the capital coalition army.

Hearing the exhilarating cheers of the soldiers outside, the gloom on Obsidian’s face was finally dispelled a lot, and the generals and lords also smiled.

Obsidian said admiringly, “Gerant, you won a much-needed victory for us. It is a veritable top contribution! As long as you can lead the army to the final victory of this war, the empire will have the youngest Duke in history. “

Title was a symbol of status and rights. Different titles had corresponding rights, such as the size of the fief, the organization of the army in the fief, and so on. The titles of the Demon Realm empire were divided into Prince/Princess (limited to the royal family), Duke, Marquis, Earl, Viscount, and Baron in descending order. Among the 4 lords, Shea was the lineage of the Lord of Midnight Sun and had the title of Princess. Josh and Sicali were just Marquis. Only a few elder families’ members and the first general of the empire, George, had the title of Duke.

Now, Obsidian had clearly made a promise of Duke to Gerant, and it also revealed a faint meaning: If Gerant gives up his military power, he can get an estate that exceeds Josh and Sicali. There is only 1 estate that met this requirement, the Dark Moon.

When Obsidian said this, many envious and jealous eyes were cast on Gerant. The Dark Moon was now the most prosperous commercial center of the Fallen Angel Empire. Even if it was completely looted in the war this time, it was still a much-coveted estate, They didn’t expect Gerant to actually have this opportunity to become the new lord of the Dark Moon.

Gerant, as the subject matter, showed extraordinary calmness, “Thank you Your Highness for your appreciation! The main reason for today’s victory is grasping the weaknesses of the undead army. The Dark Moon’s undead army has unexpectedly large numbers and sophisticated equipment, but their shortcomings are also obvious. The undead soldiers themselves do not have the corresponding wisdom, and they only know some instinctive and simple actions. Therefore, in face-to-face combat in this wilderness, as long as the formation and types of troops are used well, a large number of the undead can be effectively eliminated. This time is only a small victory. According to the intel, the 3 legions of the Dark Moon have already assembled in Town Leith. It seems that they are going to face a decisive battle with us in the wilderness, so we must not slacken our efforts now.”

Gerant took advantage of this weakness and led the cavalries to disrupt the undead army’s formation, then he crushed them with heavy infantry, effectively repelling Guradam. But most of the casualties were cannon fodder skeletons. Under Athena’s signal, even if they retreat in defeat, Guradam did not use the real trump cards such as the skeleton magician.

Obsidian nodded and said, “Good! It seems that the enemy understands that the details have been seen through by us, so those tricks will not work anymore. Besides, face-to face combat is our strength. Even if the Dark Moon has the assistance of the undead army, our chance of winning is also much higher than the other party.”

Gerant pondered a little, “Your Highness, I have a battle plan that I want to report individually. Oh, Sir Josh, please stay as well. This plan needs your help.

Hearing this distrustful tone, the jealous gazes around him became even worse. Even Josh became the target of jealousy.

Obsidian noticed the dissatisfaction of the lords and generals in his eyes, and he nodded, “Gerant and Josh stay, and the rest go to rest first.”

After all the others retreated, Josh smiled bitterly at Gerant, “General, how great, I’m ‘benefited’ from you.”

Gerant smiled slightly, “I’m sorry, Sir Josh.”

Obsidian said, “You can tell us now, Gerant. What is the battle plan?”

“Your Highness, from Nesta’s ambush on the Moonlight Fortress to Pallor being ambushed in Town Dico, we have always been in a passive state as if we are being led.” Gerant said solemnly, “I suspect that there are Dark Moon spies in the high-level of the coalition army!”

Josh’s heart skipped a beat abruptly, but he was also an old cunning man. He suddenly thought that if Gerant found out that he was a spy, Gerant would set him up to expose him instead of exposing in this situation and tone.

“Yes! There must be a problem!” Josh gritted his teeth, “Otherwise, how could Kanita die unjustly in our own man’s hands!”

Josh’s eldest son, Joseph, was “killed by the Dark Moon.” Later, he attacked the Dark Moon and lost his troops. He returned in a disastrous defeat. Even his heir, Kanita, died under the Dark Moon’s scheme. He was truly the biggest “victim”. The indignation displayed under this haste did not arouse Gerant and Josh’s suspicion.

“Because of this, I need to report this plan to Your Highness Regent individually to avoid divulging the news,” Gerant said, “Your Highness, my idea is to surprise the western part of the Dark Moon from the Red Spirit Estate through the Dark Shadow Empire’s Town Leia, then charge straight into Dark Moon City!”

Obsidian’s eyes lit up, and Josh’s eyes flashed with an odd expression.

“At present, the Dark Moon Army has been concentrated on confronting us in the face-to-face battlefield. The Moon Shadow Legion, which originally defended the west, must have deployed all the elites, so the defense must be weak. Our strength is better than the Dark Moon, and we can completely separate a squad to launch an ambush from the west of the Red Spirit Estate through the Town Leia to attack the Walan Fortress from behind the Dark Moon City in one fell swoop!”

Obsidian thought about it for a while and said, “We have an agreement with the Dark Shadow Empire. It is not easy for this squad to pass Town Leia, and it is impossible to determine the true strength of the Walan Fortress.”

Josh spoke up, “Since the last Red Devils incident, in order to repair the relationship with Town Leia, I have given generous gifts to the Mayor Remont many times, so I have a friendship with him. This time, I can pay another hefty bribe and break the squad into smaller groups. Then, they should be able to pass through Town Leia, but they cannot be too many soldiers.”

Gerant nodded. Josh was the Red Spirit Lord. He was very familiar with the environment of the estate and the relationship between the characters. The ambush plan would definitely adopt the suggestion of this “local lord”. This was the real reason Gerant asked Josh to stay.

“We can advance in 2 ways. There is no extra barrier to the west of the Dark Moon from Walan Fortress. If Shea’s forces are concentrated on the front, then as long as the squad on the west can break through the Walan Fortress, then they can conquer the Dark Moon City from the back in one fell swoop. In case the elites of the Moon Shadow Legion have not been transferred, then as long as this force is delayed, how can they contend our face-to face attack with the 2 legions and the undead army, plus the poor force of the Blue Lava Estate?”

Obsidian was overjoyed, “Yes! This plan is absolutely feasible! Who do you think is the most suitable commander for this squad?”

Gerant looked at Josh, who had an enthusiastic gaze, and he said, “This squad is likely to be the key to defeating the Dark Moon. I want to lead the elites. Please allow me, Your Highness.”

Obsidian pondered for a moment, then he nodded, “Okay.”

Josh had an idea and said, “In order to cooperate with the general’s plan, our face-to-face attack has to be slightly slowed down. However, General Gerant is the deputy commander of the coalition army. If he suddenly disappears, I’m afraid it will cause the spies to be suspicious and alert the Dark Moon.”

“What do you propose?”

“There is 1 way, but I have to wrong General Gerant.” Josh smiled confidently, “At the same time, we can also take this opportunity to unearth the Dark Moon’s internal spy…”

“Josh, you will be responsible for the investigation of the spies. I will give you the greatest authority.”

“Yes! Your Highness, I will definitely live up to your expectations and remove all the spies that the Dark Moon placed in the coalition army!” Obsidian was very satisfied with Josh’s resolute attitude. He didn’t know that this was the typical thief calling out to catch a thief.

In the next few days, the coalition army was all talking about shocking news. The coalition army’s Deputy Commander Gerant proposed to stop the war and compromise with the Dark Moon. This angered the Royal Highness Regent and he was revoked from the post of deputy commander. Immediately afterward, those lords who were originally jealous took the opportunity to make the situation worse. Under the connivance of some ill-intentioned people, they exposed Gerant’s misdeeds such as greed of military supplies, taking credit, and even fornicating with the enemy’s generals.

The furious Obsidian imprisoned Gerant, and he was escorted to the Red Spirit Estate. The Red Spirit Lord Josh was appointed as the inspector to strictly investigate Gerant’s accomplices with the enemy. At the same time, Obsidian ordered the coalition army to train hard and be prepared for a decisive battle with the Dark Moon.

A few insiders knew that Gerant took advantage of this opportunity to return to the Red Spirit Estate with the elites under him, preparing to start the ambush plan on the west road. The decisive battle was about to begin.

He wasted the wish just like that? Can’t he ask for a rare artifact or crafting material?

chapters.title: Chapter 531 - Winner
chapters.body:
Chapter 531 - Winner

Chapter 531: Winner

In the dimness, Chen Rui’s eyes finally opened.

What he saw was a tidy room. The most attractive thing was the lovely woman sitting by the bed. She had light blue skin, golden eyes, sexy body, and her face was covered with a veil, revealing a mysterious charm.

“Master, you have woken up.”

Chen Rui rubbed his sleepy eyes, “Gensha, where is the captive?”

“In the cellar, Baina and Bailin are watching him.”

“How long did I sleep?”

“Master, you have slept for 2 whole days.”

Chen Rui stretched out comfortably. He sat up and found that he was naked. All his clothes that were damaged during the battle had been taken off, and he quickly got back into the quilt.

“Master, do you need Gensha to serve you?” Gensha smiled charmingly behind her veil while she asked very naturally. In the lamp spirits consciousness, it was natural to use the body to serve the master.

A certain absurd scene in the illusion appeared in Chen Rui’s mind, and a part of his body had a natural reaction abruptly. He hurriedly shook his head and said, “No need.”

He didn’t come to Town Massimo alone this time. He also brought the lamp spirits and the Dark Demon people with him. After receiving the signal, the lamp spirits quickly found Chen Rui who was sleeping. They moved him and his captive to a temporary residence in the new town.

Chen Rui got dressed and just ate something when he saw the Dark Demon boss, Bennett, hurriedly walking in.

“Sir is awake? I happen to have something that requires sir’s decision. Since yesterday, many strangers have appeared in the town to ask about the explosion of the barren mountains 2 days ago. According to investigations, the leader was an unfamiliar man with a woman who seems to be Lord Sicali’s younger sister, Palando, in disguise. We are probably being targeted by the other party right after we arrived in this town. Should we move now?”

The so-called barren mountains explosion was actually the destruction of the underground base by Satan. Sicali’s peak stage of the Demon Emperor clone once said that once the Wheel of Hera was destroyed, although the real body and clone would not die, they would be severely injured at the same time. Therefore, the 2 clones of Sicali must have known the destruction of the Wheel of Hera, and they guessed that the base had undergone a huge change. Then, the strange man who brought Palando to Town Massimo was probably the clone who liked to play SM.

Chen Rui pondered for a moment, and he already had a decision in his mind. He instructed a few matters to Bennett.

Soon after, a group of people appeared in the hall of the house.

Chen Rui sat on the chair, looking very weak, with unrecovered scars faintly visible on his face and hands. Next to him were several tall women in cloaks.

“Sir lord, please sit down.”

The strange man was indeed Sicali’s clone of the early stage of the Demon Emperor. He was inquiring about relevant news, but he didn’t expect to meet a contact person sent by Bennett and came here all the way.

“Sir Fako!” Sicali’s face returned to his original appearance, and his face was a little pale. “I’m looking for you.”

“I’m ashamed as I only completed half of your commission.” Chen Rui’s voice seemed weak, “That Wheel of Hull actually exploded by itself.”

Sicali shook slightly, but his eyes lit up, Completed half?

“How about that person?”

“He is in my hands, but…” Chen Rui smiled bitterly and pointed to the scar on his face, “As you can see, the difficulty this time is much greater than I thought. It will take at least half a year of recuperation to recover.”

Hearing that he had succeeded, Sicali’s heart that had been tense was finally relaxed, and ecstasy flashed across his eyes, “Where is he?”

“Don’t worry, sir lord.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Should we first talk about some matters related to cooperation?”

“No problem. Although Sir Fako didn’t complete the task perfectly, the big problem is considered resolved.” Sicali took a deep breath to suppress his excited emotion, but that kind of great relief fluctuations could not hide from Chen Rui’s spirit power.

Initially, this clone, who was about to be swallowed by the real body, met Chen Rui in a desperate situation. He was completely holding a gambling attitude, but he didn’t expect that the situation would be reversed miraculously. How could he not be ecstatic?

Chen Rui was about to speak when the woman standing behind Sicali said, “Wait a minute! Let’s not talk about the task that is only half-completed. At least you have to prove that he has been caught. Otherwise, what qualifications do you have to negotiate?”

Chen Rui frowned, and Sicali quickly explained, “This is my sister, Palando. She is young and ignorant. Pardon her if she has offended you, sir.”

“It turns out to be Ms. Palando. What the lady said makes sense, then…” Chen Rui made a gesture at the lamp spirits on the side. The lamp spirits understood and walked down. Soon, Sicali appeared in the hall. His appearance was miserable, and his hands and feet were locked by the magic shackles. He was unconscious.

Sicali’s clone was excited again. There was a special soul connection between him and his real body. He could conclude that the unconscious person in front of him was the “real” Sicali!

Palando was also a little emotional with an odd expression flashing in his purple eyes.

“Sir lord, it is this person, right?” Chen Rui smiled and said, “I don’t care what identity this person is and what special transformation ability he has. I only know that my collaborator is you, sir lord. This is enough to represent my sincerity, right?”

Sicali’s clone knew that the other party must have noticed some insider story. Although the Wheel of Hera’s destruction was a pity, as long as he swallowed the soul power of the real body, it would be equivalent to getting rid of the fate of a clone and becoming the real Sicali. At that time, he could use the power of “Fako” to destroy another clone once and for all.

“Please forgive me. To be on the safe side, I think it’s better to check it out.” Palando stepped forward. The lamp spirits got a signal from Chen Rui, so they did not stop her. Palando carefully observed in front of the real body, touched it with her hand, even pulled out his hair, lit it with fire and sniffed it, and she finally nodded after a long time.

Sicali’s clone didn’t think anything wrong about this, but he knew that he could not act too impatiently. Palando’s pretense was actually a reminder which served as a buffer. He calmed down and said, “Sir Fako, it seems that our cooperation has already made a good start. Since you helped me solve the difficult problem, I will not be stingy with the price that should be paid. Tell me, what do you want?”

“Sir Sicali is really a straightforward man!” Chen Rui nodded and said, “My condition is to sign a contract with sir lord, so that sir can help the forces behind me to complete an important matter which requires the use of the entire White Feather Estate’s power……”

Sicali’s clone identified Chen Rui as the person of the Bloodfall early on, and he only said that it was an equality contract. The so-called important matter that “requires the use of the entire estate’s power” must be related to the Bloodfall’s wild ambitions, but it was inconvenient to explain in front of Palando and the guards. He nodded immediately, “This is negotiable, we can talk about the specific content privately.”

Chen Rui saved a lot of words as he was so “cooperative.” Just as he was about to speak, Palando said sternly, “Really? Both of you better discuss it now so that I can listen to it.”

Sicali’s clone was taken aback. Seeing Palando’s weird expression, his heart moved. He shouted to the guard, “Miss is a little tired, take her back to rest first!”

Several guards responded, but they did not touch Palando. Instead, they rushed to Sicali’s clone, and a few went straight to the unconscious real body.

Sicali’s clone had never relaxed his guard against Chen Rui, but he did not expect the problem to be on his side.

The clone was about to stop them, but there was a sudden pain in his back. A bloody sharp blade protruded from his abdomen, and he turned his head in disbelief. He saw Palando leaping back quickly with a blood-stained blue dagger in her hand. On the other side, Chen Rui and the lamp spirits seemed to be affected by a strange state. They could only watch the real body being snatched away by the guards.

Sicali’s clone staggered a few steps while covering his bleeding abdomen. He exclaimed furiously, “Why do you do this!”

“Why not?” Palando’s pretty face was full of disdain. “Do you think the reason why I told you so many secrets is really because I submit to you? In a certain game, you may be able to barely play a role that gives me pleasure, but unfortunately, you are not the real one. I initially wanted to give him some sacrifices this time, but I didn’t expect him to fall into such a danger… You all have to pay the price! Now that there are fearless warriors outside, this place has been completely controlled. Don’t try to struggle, and maybe I will let you die a little easier. “

“You…” Sicali’s clone was infuriated. For a long time, he thought he had controlled this masochistic woman, but now he knew that he was being manipulated by the other party.

There was more resentment in Palando’s sneer, “You’re just a fake toy, I’m tired of you. It’s time to throw you away… Let me tell you, when i was ‘checking’ just now, I have already released poison. Your power will be suppressed to its lowest point within 2 hours. As for you, poor toy, I have given you a chronic poison long ago by me during the game. The knife just now completely triggered the poison. If there is no antidote, your whole body will rot and die!”

The guards pounced on Sicali’s clone and Chen Rui. These guards were actually real body’s fearless warriors. They had strong combat power and were quite difficult to deal with. Sicali’s clone was unable to exert his strength as he was severely poisoned. It was difficult to get out of the fearless warriors’ encirclement. Chen Rui, who was “heavily injured”, had no combat power at all. He could only rely on the protection of a few the lamp spirits to barely defend the attack. However, the lamp spirits were also poisoned. Over time, the disadvantages became more and more obvious. Chen Rui had several new wounds on his body.

Palando came to the unconscious real body and wanted to help him lose the shackles, but the shackles were made by Zola. Without a special technique, even the peak stage of the Demon Overlord couldn’t break free. After Palando fiddled for a long time, she was still unsuccessful.

At this moment, the roof suddenly broke open, and another person appeared beside the unconscious real body: Another Sicali.

Sicali’s clone of the peak stage Demon Emperor finally appeared.

Palando was taken aback. Just as she was about to apply the poison, her neck was strangled with the iron-tongs-like hands. At the same time, there was a sound of fighting outside as if they were surrounded by other people.

The clone looked at the unconscious real body. His eyes scanned across the room, and he nodded, “Very well, everyone is here.”

Palando didn’t expect a greater predator to be behind her. As she was twisting and struggling desperately, the clone said faintly, “Your fearless warriors are almost gone. You are also no longer useful.”

There was a horror expression in Palando’s eyes. Her body was wrapped in black flames, and a hoarse scream came from her throat. Soon, her whole person was reduced to ashes.

The fearless warriors rushed over together. The figure of the peak stage Demon Emperor was swift. Wherever he went, there were corpses annihilated by the [Dark Flame]. In the blink of an eye, all the fearless warriors in the room had been slaughtered.

The early stage of the Demon Emperor clone’s poison had already been triggered. He was swaying and standing unsteadily. As he watched another clone slowly walking over, his eyes showed a begging expression. The peak stage of the Demon Emperor clone glanced at him and did not stop. He walked toward Chen Rui. Just when the early stage of the Demon Emperor clone looked a little relieved, he suddenly turned around and the whole room shook drastically.

The early stage of the Demon Emperor clone stared blankly at the big hole in his chest. He fell to the ground with a thump. There was no sign of life. Behind him was a collapsed wall and a large piece of debris destroyed by a powerful shock wave.

“Useless people don’t have the value of existence, isn’t it? Sir Fako?” The peak stage of the Demon Emperor clone gave Chen Rui a determined smile which was friendly like an old friend. “I should explain that I followed these people using a legendary grade item that hides my breath. Even if sir is not injured, it is difficult to detect me. I observed for a long time and only dared to appear when I was sure that sir has lost your combat power. It’s really hard work for sir to deal with that real body.”

“I didn’t expect you would be the final winner…” Chen Rui shook his head regretfully, and he asked, “So, in sir lord’s eyes, do I have value?”

“Then it depends on the performance of sir.” The peak stage of the Demon Emperor clone smiled and said, “I’m still very optimistic about our cooperation prospects, but the relationship may change. If sir agrees, I hope to sign a contract that is more suitable for our current situation.

“Current situation?” Chen Rui looked at the scars on his body caused by the fearless warriors, then he looked at the staggering lamp spirits and said nothing.

There was a faint murderous intent in this clone’s eyes, “In the current situation, sir seems to have another choice. I don’t want to see regrettable things happen, but I will not allow certain threats even more.”

“Choice…” Chen Rui Wei sighed and shook his head before disappearing suddenly.

The peak stage of the Demon Emperor clone was startled. When he raised his head in response, he saw that there seemed to be stars shining outside the huge hole in the roof. An ominous feeling suddenly surged in his heart.

He hurriedly came to Sicali’s real body. As he was about to flee with the real body, he felt that his speed suddenly slowed down. He saw a woman with golden eyes among the cloaked maids beside “Fako” waving at him repeatedly. As the light flashed, all kinds of debuffs such as slow, weakness, confusion, and so on surged at him. This woman cast and switched magic very quickly, and the effect was very strong. Even a Demon Overlord-level magician might not be able to match it.

Before the peak stage of the Demon Emperor clone could respond, the stars in the room were flourishing. In the countless star images, a bright figure appeared on the side, holding a terrifying sharp qi blade against his neck at lightning speed. Judging from the overwhelming breath, his head would fall off with just one swipe.

At this moment, the clone already understood a lot of matters. It turned out that “Fako” was the most patient person. In order to lure him out, he even deliberately let a fearless warrior with weak strength wound him. In other words, from the very beginning, his whereabouts had been noticed by the other party.

“It’s still a matter of choice.” “Fako’s voice sounded, “The White Feather Estate has only one real lord. Is it you? Or is it him?”

The peak stage of the Demon Emperor clone sighed dejectedly. Do I still have a choice?

Hmmm, if I were Chen Rui, I would teach him a ‘lesson’ before giving him the choice☠️

chapters.title: Chapter 532 - Goals
chapters.body:
Chapter 532 - Goals

Chapter 532: Goals

A few days later, a large number of merchants and some large merchant groups appeared in Town Leia of the Dark Shadow Empire.

Although there was a war in the northern part of Dark Moon Estate, the western part and Dark Moon City were still safe for the time being, so the business system was basically maintained as usual. However, the number of merchants was greatly reduced due to the war. A large-scale merchant group like this was rare, especially from Red Spirit Estate. Remont, the mayor of Town Leia, just turned a blind eye. The Fallen Angel Empire was now in the internal strife period, and Her Majesty Empress, who was rumored to support the Dark Moon in secret, had an unclear attitude; she didn’t issue relevant strict orders. Besides, he had recently accepted a heavy bribe from Red Spirit Estate, so he was simply pretending to not know about it.

Gerant was mixed in one of the “merchant groups”. There were already more than 2,000 people in Town Leia’s group, but it was still not enough. For the time being, he could only stay in the hotel in the town and wait.

Josh told Gerant that the maximum number of people was 5,000. If there were too many people, they might not pass Town Leia.

The 5,000 soldiers selected by Gerant were all elites from Tekula Fortress. They were well-equipped and had high combat power. The quality of the soldiers were more important than the quantity. Gerant was confident enough to complete this ambush to catch Princess Royal Shea off guard.

In fact, Gerant left Town Dico on the front line and moved to the west with the intention of temporarily avoiding the limelight. Josh is right, Royal Highness Regent knows how to use the right people, but he has no tolerance. I shouldn’t be eager to win and bluntly advised which violated the regent. Although I won a small victory later, the promise of the regent’s Duke (indiscreetly referring to the lord of the Dark Moon Estate) actually pushed me, the deputy commander, to the forefront, making me envied and crowded out by most lords and generals. If I finally lead the army and defeat the Dark Moon, I’m afraid it will cause more suspicion. Even if I can get the title of Duke, I cannot become the lord of the Dark Moon. To say the least, if I fail in military command, I will undoubtedly become a scapegoat, and the consequences will be even more inconceivable.

Gerant considered himself a pure soldier. In his heart, he would rather face the Dark Moon Army than staying with those political “comrades”. At least, he knew who was the enemy on the battlefield.

As Gerant arrived at the hotel in front, he didn’t think about any more matters. He immediately arranged the soldiers in disguise to stay, and sent people to pick up the companions who came later.

The Moon Shadow Legion to the west of the Dark Moon had most likely left the Walan Fortress, but the defense would definitely be more stringent, so they must gather their strength and do their best in one move. Even if they exhausted too much force to advance eastward into Dark Moon City, they could also put a huge pressure on the Dark Moon and greatly impact the morale of the Dark Moon Army that were currently assembled in Town Leith. Therefore, the goal of this battle was to do whatever it takes to take down Walan Fortress!

In Town Dico, the inspector, Josh, appointed by Obsidian had the same clear goal: To eradicate the spies!

The capital coalition army was currently sharpening their sword to greet the eve of the war. Meanwhile, Josh, who was holding a certain kind of knife, slashed at “his people” for the first time.

Several people at the top of the coalition army had been sacked. This included General Tren who was closely related to the “rebel” Gerant, and 3 lords who secretly communicated with the Dark Moon. The furious Regent Obsidian imprisoned all of them indiscriminately. Suddenly, everyone was worried. After eliminating the “internal spies”, Obsidian immediately used speeches and material distribution to appease the military, and he shifted the responsibility of the previous defeat to these spies. For a while, the soldiers who did not know the truth became high-spirited.

After a small defeat of the undead army, the Dark Moon Army at Town Leith was also urgently gathering and reorganizing. Princess Royal Shea had already visited Town Leith in person. The face-to face decisive battle between both sides was about to start.

Compared with Gerant and Josh, Chen Rui looked aimless at this time. He was wandering leisurely and visiting shops on the capital street. He shopped at the stalls and flirted with the succubus at the entrance of the tavern, seemingly very relaxed.

The White Feather Estate issue had been resolved. Sicali’s clone of the peak stage Demon Emperor had become Chen Rui’s servant. After devouring the soul of the real body, his strength greatly increased from the peak stage of the Demon Emperor to the early stage of the Demon Overlord. He had become the real and only White Feather Estate’s Lord Sicali.

The current Sicali’s deep scheme, ambition and means were far better than the Red Spirit’s Lord Josh. However, in his opinion, Chen Rui went deep into the underground base, destroyed the Wheel of Hera that was under the protection of many powerful fearless warriors, captured the real body of the Demon Overlord, destroyed the base thoroughly, set a trap to attract both clones and Palando to the bait, and finally caught all of them together – No matter how powerful or scheming he was, he was far weaker.

The rule of the Demon Realm was the powerful ones would rule. Therefore, Sicali, who chose to surrender, was not completely unwilling. Coupled with the restrictions of the master-servant contract, he dared not have extra thoughts at least at this stage.

Chen Rui understood this very well. To truly deter and control characters including Josh and Guradam, it was not enough to rely on the master-servant contract. Power and wisdom were needed. As long as his power became stronger and stronger, these people could only bow down their head honestly regardless of how unruly and rebellious they were.

After signing the master-servant contract, Chen Rui’s first order to the new servant was to immediately withdraw all the troops from the 3 northern towns of Town Iztar, then transfer these elite military forces to the south. The gathering place was Town Kedonno in the south which was closest to the capital. At the same time, he would fully support all the logistics materials needed by the Warlock Fortress and select the best craftsmen to make ordnance according to certain blueprints and provide them to the Warlock Fortress.

Sicali finally realized: It turns out that I have been wrong all along. Behind “Fako” is not the Bloodfall, but the Dark Moon!

What a Dark Moon!

What a big game of chess!

Chen Rui’s wandering around the capital seemed to be leisurely and sloppy. In fact, he had a panoramic view of the capital’s defense and other situations while comparing it with the intel provided by the Dark Demon. He was constantly adjusting and revising a plan that was about to be launched.

Just as Gerant wanted to ambush the Dark Moon City from the west, Chen Rui’s plan was to ambush Obsidian’s nest- The capital!

When Chen Rui came out of the Dark Moon, he did not have a single soldier on hand, but now, he already had the entire army of the White Feather Estate plus the elite legion dispatched by General George. He only waited for an order to ambush the capital with the fastest speed from Town Kedonno.

Although most of the capital’s military had been transferred to the Dark Moon battlefield, the second general Doren. Rus and the Red Devil Legion under his command shouldn’t be underestimated. The capital also had the power of the elder families and major families, plus the strong walls and defenses. Even if they took the capital by attacking forcefully, the loss of the troops and time would also be huge.

The best way to deal with a stronghold was to attack from the inside. At present, the Dark Demon of the capital was fully prepared. They could see their enemies clearly, but the enemies could not see them. It was the greatest advantage of destroying from within.

However, on the eve of the launch, Chen Rui had a very important goal.

At night.

Inner city, palace’s secret vault.

“Sir Temo.” The guard in front of the secret vault bowed his head to a grim-faced great demon.

The great demon nodded, didn’t speak, and went straight in.

The guards didn’t question the slightest because everyone knew the temperament of Sir Commander Temo. However, what they didn’t know was that after the sir commander walked into the door with a cold face, his facial expression was stiff, but his eyes started to turn flexibly as he quickly observed the surrounding environment while comparing with the information obtained in his mind.

“Temo” was naturally Chen Rui. It was not the first time Chen Rui came to the palace’s secret vault of the Fallen Angel Empire. Obsidian once took him all the way to the secret vault. Today, he was going to sneak into the secret vault alone.

The secret vault of the palace had many traps and extremely tight defenses. It was almost impossible to get in with transformation techniques like [Camouflage]. However, Chen Rui had planned this moment for a long time. As early as when he entered the secret vault for the first time, he started a plan. In the following time, the Dark Moon’s secret intelligence had made relevant preparations. Especially after Isabella took over the Dark Demon, the secret vault had become the main research goal. Finally, the key breakthrough was set on this sir commander.

Scheming a defenseless person, Chen Rui successfully “replaced” Temo and entered the secret vault smoothly.

What appeared in front of Chen Rui’s eyes was a passage which was equivalent to a pass. After the pass was the most secret inner vault which belonged to the top secret existence. Even Temo, who was the highest commander of the guard, had no authority to cross this pass. Similarly, the Dark Demon had very little intel of the inner vault. They only knew that there might be more powerful guards or traps.

Since Chen Rui had come here, he naturally had a corresponding mental preparation. After carefully sensing the situation of the passage for a while, “Temo” decisively walked in.

The inner vault was empty without any guards, but the magic circles all over it were several times more complicated and powerful than the outside. However, it was a relatively easy thing for Chen Rui.

Chen Rui was already a great expert in magic circles. Coupled with the memory knowledge acquired by the alchemy civilization inheritance and the help of [Deep Analysis] skill, his attainments in certain aspects had reached an incredible level. He didn’t even need to crack some magic circles, but he used a special method to screen himself so that he could pass quickly without triggering the magic circles. This was the method he used to sneak into the Town Massimo’s underground base last time.

Chen Rui walked all the way according to his memory and finally came to the front of a secret vault. Yes, it should be this red secret vault. After patiently unlocking the magic circles of the secret vault door, he smoothly opened the door.

There was no magic trap and no extra treasures behind the door. There was only a stone platform on which a sword was suspending.

The tail of the delicate hilt was inlaid with a magnificent amethyst. The quillons were 2 back to back dark golden angels. The white sword body was engraved with 2 strange marks, exuding an ancient and mysterious breath.

1 of the 7 artifacts of the Demon Realm, the highest artifact of the Lucifer Royal Family- Sword of Fallen Angel!

That was Chen Rui’s goal of sneaking into a secret vault this time!

Chen Rui observed carefully for a while. Just as he was about to step forward, a glimmer of light flashed in his eyes. He changed his mind, took a deep breath, and said faintly, “It’s a pity. What a good sword!”

“Isn’t it?”

His voice seemed to be asking someone.

“What’s the pity?”

Finally, an old voice sounded in the room, and the voice seemed to echo everywhere. The specific source was unknown.

“A good sword is most afraid of not meeting the real owner.” Chen Rui turned his head very slowly. This process was like a sword hidden in a sheath, always maintaining the greatest degree of calmness. “An empire is also so. Both sirs, isn’t it?”

The same 2 questions made the space behind distorted for a while, and the 2 transparent phantasms gradually became clear.

Race: Great Demon (Mutated). Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+. [Analysis]: Fire attribute. (Very dangerous)

Race: Pride Royal Family. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+. [Analysis]: Dark attribute. (Very dangerous)

Chen Rui’s face still remained calm, but his heart beating violently: The peak stage of the Demon Overlord, and there are even 2! Damn! Today is an auspicious day. What good luck!

No wonder I haven’t encountered any guards all the way since I entered the inner vault. It turns out that there are such powerhouses guarding!

It was very likely that he was noticed by the opponent from the first step when he entered the inner vault as Temo.

The background of an empire was quite strong. Even if the Fallen Angel Empire was currently the last of the 3 empires, it was by no means a fluke to hold on until now since the 7 royal families separated. On the surface, there were not many high-level powerhouses in various empires, and the 3 generals were basically of the Demon Emperor level. Although the empire’s generals’ top priority was the commanding abilities rather than individual combat power, what was really daunting in the empire was those powerhouses that were not disclosed to the public. For instance, the elders in the elder families, the hidden powerhouses in the royal family, and so on. For example, the 2 peak stage of the Demon Overlord in front of him.

It was precisely because of the existence of these forces that even an ambitious and huge organization like the Bloodfall, with several powerful Demon Overlords, could still only operate in the dark and unable to act openly.

When Chen Rui was reborn in the Demon Realm, an Intermediate Demon could easily crush him. Later, his horizons gradually broadened, Higher Demon, Demon King, Great Demon King…

Due to the 400 years of decline of the Dark Moon Estate at that time, Chen Rui hardly saw even the Demon Emperor powerhouse, but as his power and experience grew, he had not only encountered more and more Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord when he was travelling to the 3 empires, he even had intersections with the legendary Demi-God.

The Demon Emperor, who could only be looked up at the beginning, had now become a stepping stone for Chen Rui. Chen Rui was also confident to defeat even the powerhouses of the Demon Overlord early stage and intermediate stage in a battle by relying on the power and various methods like the [Royal Star Transformation]. Nevertheless, he still couldn’t match the peak stage of the Demon Overlord.

The peak stage of the Demon Overlord referred to the general category. If he met those with super combat power like Raizen, Catherine, and Zola, excluding [Demonic Flies Transformation] and [Star Diversion] skills, he would basically be killed in the blink of an eye.

Chen Rui couldn’t even beat even 1 of the 2 guardians of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. With an extra one, he basically had no hope about the outcome. Even with the escape ability like [Star Gate], it was not guaranteed that he could definitely escape.

When he came to steal the Sword of Fallen Angel this time, he was already mentally prepared to fight a tough battle, but he didn’t expect that the difficulty was beyond imagination!

Does he really think Obsidian would leave the most precious artifact unguard while leading the coalition army? Can he ‘use’ the sword and put up a good fight?

chapters.title: Chapter 533 - The True Master Of The Artifact?
chapters.body:
Chapter 533 - The True Master Of The Artifact?

Chapter 533: The True Master of the Artifact?

Both peak stage of the Demon Overlord did not take action, but 2 terrifying breaths had completely locked on Chen Rui. Chen Rui had no doubt that as long as he made a move, he would inevitably be killed at a thunderous speed.

“Are you from the Bloodfall? Or from the Dark Moon?”

The first to speak was the Demon Overlord from the great demon family on the left. His face was old, his hair and beard were all white, and he seemed weak, but his hands looked very white; these did not match his age. Chen Rui was most vigilant of this opponent, even more than the Demon Overlord of the royal family who was only middle-aged in appearance.

Due to limited talents, it was difficult for ordinary demons to break through their own bottleneck. The higher the level, the greater the proportion of the royal family. It was Chen Rui’s first time to see a non-royal powerhouse at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. This type of powerhouse did not have the talents and strengths of the royal family, but they were the generation of great perseverance and great wisdom. Their combat skills and experience were definitely quite terrifying.

Sure enough, the old man hit the key point when he spoke.

“The Dark Moon Red Blood Legion deputy legion commander, Aguile.” Chen Rui had completely calmed down as he bowed slightly to both of them in neither lowly nor arrogant manner.

“It turns out to be someone from the Dark Moon.” The old man nodded, and a bloody light flashed across his red eyes. His middle finger suddenly flicked, and a strong sharp qi was launched toward Chen Rui. The sharp qi’s speed was terrifying. A sharp sound of whistling through the sky sounded just before reaching him.

The old man at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord actually took advantage of Chen Rui’s salute to make a killing move stealthily!

Chen Rui’s attention had always been highly concentrated. When the old man’s power was concentrated on his fingers, his spirit power had already captured the possible trajectory of the shot, so he moved in an instant to avoid this sneak attack.

“Sir’s strength is far better than me. What are you worrying about in such a hurry to attack?”

The royal family’s Demon Overlord replied, “It is enough to know that you are from the Dark Moon. Do we need to talk nonsense with a dying ant?”

When Chen Rui just finished teleporting, the old man’s fingerflick was launched again at high speed; Chen Rui was prepared long ago. While speaking, his hands glowed with a faint light and drew soft ripples to defend it.

The high-speed sharp qi seemed to be stuck in a quagmire as it suddenly slowed down.

The old man and the royal family’s Demon Overlord were both surprised because the enemy who had only the Demon Emperor breath not only resisted the fingerflick power of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, but he also “reflected” the sharp qi back to the royal family Demon Overlord in a mysterious way.

If it was before leaving the Dark Moon, it would be difficult to keep up with this level of high-speed attack with Chen Rui’s reaction speed even with the skills of [Royal Star Transformation] and [Star Diversion]. However, during this period of time, he not only obtained the Demi-God-level soul power and transformed his spirit power to S-level, but he also had valuable experience in fighting the abyss lord- Although it was only 2 slashes, after that kind of near-death experience, Chen Rui showed unprecedented calmness and steadiness physically and mentally when facing the enemy of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord again.

The current [Star Diversion] incorporated the soft water power that he learned from Catherine. It had greater power and more precise control.

Seeing that sharp qi was about to slash the throat of the royal family Demon Overlord, a palm with a faint black light blocked it. When the sharp qi slashed the palm, it actually made a metallic sound. The royal family Demon Overlord felt a pain in his palm. He frowned slightly, flipped his palm, and a giant palm phantom appeared in the air, pressing like a mountain toward Chen Rui.

However, just like the sharp qi, the giant palm flew back to the old man strangely as it just touched the enemy. The old man felt the strong pressure from the giant palm. He flicked his fingers continuously, launching countless sharp qi to split the giant palm into pieces.

In the split second, the 3 had exchanged hits countless times. The dazzling flames in the secret vault flickered quickly, mixing with endless sharp sounds and shocks. Fortunately, the room where the artifact was placed was extremely sturdy. Even the power of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord could only cause a small crack.

The evenly matched situation surprised the royal family Demon Overlord and the old man, but Chen Rui knew that [Star Diversion] had only 10 seconds effect and was about to end, then the paper tiger would appear in its original form, so he immediately spoke.

“Wait a minute! I’m not afraid of fighting or death. I just hope to say a few words before that because it is related to the destiny of this artifact… and even the destiny of the entire empire!”

If it were a few seconds ago, both the peak stage Demon Overlords would not even bother to talk nonsense with such a weak person, just like the old man suddenly took action just now. However, Chen Rui’s strength was far beyond their expectations now- With this power, this kind of calmness, and the ability to perceive the existence of both of us previously, how could he be merely at the Demon Emperor?

Both of them decided that the enemy in front of them was definitely a powerhouse pretending to be weak to take advantage of them. After exchanging a glance at each other, they finally stopped.

“1 minute,” the old man said.

At this time, [Star Diversion] happened to end. Chen Rui secretly felt relieved. He shook his head, “1 minute is too little, I can’t finish it. Let’s do 5 minutes, okay?”

The 2 Demon Overlords had faintly regarded him as a powerful enemy. Upon hearing this lowly bargaining, they couldn’t help showing a strange look, but there was no objection in the end.

“The Dark Moon Red Blood Legion deputy legion commander, Aguile.”

With the same self-introduction, the 2 Demon Overlords did not act rashly this time, and they said their names which was regarded as a certain respect for this opponent.

“Royal elder, Oliver. Lucifer.”

“The elder family, Cowen. Toro.”

Chen Rui knew that this white-haired old man was actually one of the strongest elders in the elder family, Old Cowen of the Toro Family.

Another intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord from the Toro Family, Vanim, once assassinated the Dark Shadow Empire’s Third General Crawford who visited the Dark Moon at the auction. Later, after being captured by Zola’s magic, he switched sides to the Dark Moon. It could be said to be a great humiliation to the Toro Family. Therefore, after hearing that Chen Rui came from the Dark Moon, the old man did not hesitate to kill him.

Obsidian took away a lot of powerful elders this time. Oliver and Cowen were the main force in the elder family behind the capital.

“Both sirs, I came to the secret vault this time for the Sword of Fallen Angel.”

It was almost nonsense, but the following words surprised Oliver and Cowen.

“I’m entrusted by the owner of the Sword of Fallen Angel to take away the artifact that should belong to her.”

The surprise of Oliver and Cowen was only fleeting, then it changed to disdain- What is the Sword of Fallen Angel? Lucifer Royal Family’s supreme artifact, one of the Demon Realm’s 7 artifacts! Since the death of the Lord of Midnight Sun 300 years ago, no royal family members, including Regent Obsidian, has been recognized by the artifact. “Aguile” actually said that he is entrusted by the owner of Sword of Fallen Angel now. This kind of lie is so stupid that even children will not believe it!

“This is indeed an unbelievable thing. I myself had this doubt when I first received the mission, but the answer will be revealed soon.” Chen Rui slowly took out something from the “space ring”. When this item appeared, the Sword of Fallen Angel which had been floating in the air without responding, began to emit a faint light!

Oliver and Cowen were simultaneously shocked. They had guarded the secret vault for many years. Naturally, they knew how many attempts Regent Obsidian had made in the hope of being recognized by the Sword of Fallen Angel. However, the Sword of Fallen Angel was still asleep and did not move at all, even repelling anyone approaching. However, today a miracle suddenly appeared, and they witnessed it personally!

Both their eyes focused on the item in Chen Rui’s hand, a small bottle with some red liquid in it. It seemed to be blood.

When Chen Rui approached the Sword of Fallen Angel further with the small bottle, the Sword of Fallen Angel not only flashed, but it also made a buzzing sound. The sword body began to shake; it seemed very “excited”.

The Sword of Fallen Angel could not be kept in the storage warehouse. Although Chen Rui wanted to take the sword and run away, he also understood that everything had a limit. If he got closer, it was difficult to guarantee that the 2 guardians would not take action desperately. So, he stopped and plugged the bottle.

The buzz of Sword of Fallen Angel really stopped, and the previous silence was restored.

Oliver and Cowen stared at the small bottle full of blood, and their breathing became heavy. After a while, Old Cowen finally spoke, “This bottle…”

Chen Rui said unhurriedly, “This is obviously a magic bottle which can keep the blood fresh…”

Who’s asking about the bottle! Even the royal family elder, Oliver, who had always been able to calm down, couldn’t help but shouted, “Whose blood is in this bottle?!”

Chen Rui’s face suddenly became solemn as he said the answer, “Lord of Midnight Sun’s granddaughter, Princess Royal of the Empire, Lord of the Dark Moon Estate, and also my fiancee- Shea. Lucifer! “
