Naturally, those who could cast this magic were only Guradam’s clone projections. These 5 magicians were all projections of Guradam. Although their level of strength was only the Great Demon King, the improved [Poison Explosion] power was quite considerable. The only disadvantage was that it cost too much spirit power to cast continuously. Even so, with the magicians in the position, the capital army still dare not get too close.

Despite this, the capital army still relied on the advantage in terms of number to gain the upper hand. More importantly, the Obsidian, the central core, had not yet made a move.

The battle between both central armies was in a state of stalemate, and there were 1 dominant and 1 passive from the 2 wings of both sides. Over time, except for the position of the central army, the angle of the 2 wings had rotated. The number of soldiers had also been declining sharply in the bloody battle. This was not only a contest between individual and overall combat power, but it was also a contest of endurance and will. Whoever collapsed first would be the loser.

Despite the Dark Moon Army’s bravery, when the overall combat power was slightly inferior to the opponent, the disadvantages in number gradually manifested. Especially the central army, the number of goldmen was now less than 100, and 3 out of 5 Guradam clones were destroyed. The magician legion under Monroe had begun to take turns to rest, the wyverns in the air were reduced by nearly half, all the magic bombs were consumed, and even medusas and the archers began to suffer casualties. The situation was precarious.

Shea knew that once the central army was defeated, the entire Dark Moon Army would collapse without any suspense. At the moment, regardless of danger, she personally came to the front to command the battle. Encouraged by her lead, the morale of the Dark Moon Army was greatly boosted.

For some reason, the momentum of the capital army gradually weakened over time.

Many soldiers in the central army, left wing and right wing had begun to experience unexpected fatigue, and their weapon-wielding hands have also slowed down. Naturally, the Dark Moon Army would not let go of the weaknesses exposed by the enemy. They stepped up their attack and turned the tide of the previous crisis.

Obsidian, who had been observing the war situation at the core of the capital’s central army, finally moved. He instantly appeared on the front line, looking at Shea’s figure not far away with murderous eyes. He completely ignored the swarming Dark Moon Army.

Obsidian lifted his black cloak and slowly blocked it in front of him. When he flicked it, there was a rain of blood. The soldiers in front had turned into pieces of flesh and bones scattered all over the place in the blink of an eye. Even the sturdy goldmen were broken into pieces. This move cleared out a blood-colored fan area of about 30 meters.

His ghastly voice sounded through the entire battlefield, “Shea. Lucifer! Traitor who dares to commit a rebellion!

Do you dare to fight with me?! “

The battle between the highest commanders, will Shea, who has consumed the light and dark crystal, have a chance to win?

chapters.title: Chapter 545 - The Change Of Light And Darkness
chapters.body:
Chapter 545 - The Change Of Light And Darkness

Chapter 545: The Change of Light and Darkness

The confrontation between the chief commanders of the 2 armies was not uncommon, but as known, Obsidian was the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, and Shea was only the early stage of the Demon Emperor when she was in the war of lords. They were not at the same level at all. This seemingly disgraceful “challenge” was simply showing off to damage the military morale of the Dark Moon.

But Obsidian was really not bragging this time. He had been patiently observing the situation on Shea’s side previously and rushed over without fear when he was sure that there was no hidden powerhouse beside Shea.

As long as I kill or capture Princess Royal who is against me, the Dark Moon Army will be defeated without a fight.

The Dark Moon Army all around knew that their commander was in danger, so they rushed over fearlessly. Obsidian didn’t get entangled with these people. He rushed toward Shea in a light stream, and blood splashed around along the way.

As he got closer to the target, the space in front suddenly became chaotic and distorted. A girl wearing black armor instantly stopped in front of the light steam, “[Black Dragon Cannon]!”

A huge black ball wrapped in dark blue destructive energy shot from the girl’s fingertips and flew to the light stream quickly. Within such a short distance, the light stream could no longer evade, and it collided with the black energy ball.

The surrounding ground shook violently as the light stream was pushed back slowly by the black ball. A deep valley-like huge crack appeared on the ground along the way. Within 100 meters, the weaker soldiers were evaporated into light smoke by the terrifying energy. The light stream suddenly stopped the retreating momentum, then the people nearby felt the light stream dimmed. The [Black Dragon Cannon] actually disappeared with a bang.

The figure of Obsidian revealed out of the light stream. There was still a light smoke on the glove of his right hand, and a sneer appeared at the corner of his mouth. As expected, only this black dragon was left beside Shea. This black dragon was the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord which was one step away from the peak stage, but she had no chance of winning at all in front of him, a veteran peak stage of the Demon Overlord.

Olypheus was taken aback. [Black Dragon Cannon] was crushed forcefully by the enemy with 1 hand! In terms of strength alone, Obsidian is already catching up with Paglio!

Olypheus only hesitated for a moment, then she flew forward to launch a fierce attack. Obsidian always responded with only 1 hand.

In this world, martial fighting movements with bare hands were mostly simple and practical. There were not too many patterns. The fists were used the most while the legs were used less. The attack method like the finger snap attack of the elder family’s Demon Overlord Old Cowen was even rarer. Olypheus’s leg method was very fancy in comparison, and the speed was extremely fast. The pair of long legs were like a whirlwind. With a carelessness, Obsidian’s cheekbones were scraped by the pressure of that leg, and he felt a blazing pain. His arm quickly caught one of Olypheus’s legs, and he burst with a terrifying momentum. Olypheus’ entire body was knocked back. She did a backflip in the air to barely divert the power.

Obsidian’s cloak swung a semicircle backward, and the terrifying wind pressure turned nearly 100 sneak attackers, including a projection of Guradam, into debris. He said to Olypheus sternly, “If you dare to stop me again, I will kill you with no mercy!”

It was not that Obsidian was merciful, but because giant dragons were not reasonable guys. There happened to be someone from the Dragon Island today. That Julia is also from the black dragon family. Judging from her previous attitude toward the giant dragon’s bones, if I killed this black dragon, I’m afraid I will cause more trouble. Therefore, Obsidian wanted to deter her to let her retreat.

Olypheus looked at the bloody scene behind Obsidian, and there was a hint of hatred in her heart.

“Mom said that being a dragon requires professional ethics.” Thinking of the countless rewards promised by the human employer, Ms. Black Dragon’s courage soared in her heart and continued to cheer herself up, “It’ll be fine as long as I hang on until Zola or Paglio comes!”

Thinking of this, Olypheus regained her courage, and her fingers began to shake quickly. She was not afraid, but she was charging a new attack quickly. This technique that was taught by Paglio gathered the attack power at the tips of the 5 fingers to shoot the strongest blow at one point.

Obsidian saw a veiled woman guarding Shea while retreating, so he did not want to keep fighting with Olypheus. He flew toward Shea with a hastened speed.

The veiled woman glanced at Obsidian with a faint glow in her left eye. Obsidian felt a slight pain in her brain. He quickly used spirit power to resist it and had recovered his mind with just a second. However, at this moment, Olypheus’s figure appeared behind him and launched a kick at Obsidian’s back.

Obsidian instinctively reached out his hand to the back, but he did not grasp anything. It turned out to be a fake move. With the inertia of this foot, Ms. Black Dragon had come to the left of Obsidian. Her 5 fingers formed into a claw releasing faint black silks and clawed at Obsidian’s heart in a split second.

Obsidian had just used his spirit power to resolve the bizarre spiritual impact of the veiled woman, so he hurriedly crossed his hand, and he felt a tingling pain from his wrist. It turned out that Olypheus’ claw almost penetrated his glove at the wrist. Obsidian roared and knocked Olypheus away.

Obsidian was really furious with this blow. Olypheus was vomiting blood as she fell unsteadily. She staggered a few steps and sat down on the ground, but her 5 fingers hooked a glove which was just torn off just now. Ms. Miser quickly kept the precious piece of equipment into her own storage equipment.

As Obsidian looked at the faint red marks on his wrist, his face was full of murderousness. Black flames glowed from his fists, and a strong destructive breath radiated from him as the center.

Olypheus was taken aback. Her body flickered, turned into the body of a black dragon, and flew up to spray a dragon breath to Obsidian. Obsidian dodged the dragon breath, and the fist engulfed with [Dark Flame] severely hit the black dragon. Others could only see a black shadow flashing around the black dragon quickly, and the “boom boom” high-speed hitting sounded. The black dragon screamed from time to time, and many of the scales on her body were melted by the terrifying [Dark Flame].

The black dragon knew that large body size would only make her suffer more attacks. As she changed back into a human form and was about to flee, Obsidian punched her back. She fell to the ground and couldn’t get up again.

Obsidian’s figure slowly landed. As he was about to make a killing move, the previous spiritual impact suddenly came to his mind. This time Obsidian was prepared for it, so he was not affected. He turned back and grabbed the dagger shot in the air from the veiled woman. He scoffed, “You have some guts, you actually dare to…”

Before he finished speaking, the short sword in his hand suddenly burst open, and a green smoke filled the space quickly. Obsidian sensed the danger contained in the smoke, and he hurriedly launched the protective force and flew back.

“Run quickly!”

The woman shouted, and Shea had already picked up Olypheus.

Olypheus’ consciousness was blurred due to the serious injury. This voice made her seem to return to a certain scene in the depths of her memory which had the same phrase- “Run quickly”

She had been having this kind of nightmare for some time recently.

“Damn woman!” Obsidian’s left hand that grasped the dagger began to tremble. There were countless small wounds on it that had begun to corrode. This should be the poison of the poison dragon!

If a few minutes ago, even if the dagger burst, it would not be able to injure Obsidian. However, the protective and buff glove happened to be taken off by Olypheus, so he was unjustly hurt.

Obsidian tried his best to suppress the poison from spreading in his left hand. He hated the veiled woman who tricked him. He punched in the air toward the veiled woman. The woman was escaping toward the main formation. This late punch quickly caught up with her. Although the effect of [Dark Flame] couldn’t be exerted from a long distance, the power of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord contained in it was still terrifying. When the woman’s back was hit, she spurted blood immediately, dyeing her veil in red, but she used the strength of the punch to flee at an astonishing speed.

Obsidian didn’t chase the woman, but instead, he set his gaze on Shea who was running away while holding Olypheus. His figure flickered, and he flew toward the crowd where Shea was.

A large round translucent shield appeared, protecting the area. It turned out that Shea was near the magician legion under Monroe. The remaining 900 magicians jointly cast this magic shield. Even if Obsidian was eager, he could not break it in a short time.

Obsidian hated the black dragon that hindered him. If it was not for Olypheus, I would have captured or killed Shea immediately. How would there be so many twists and turns?!

By now, I must kill Shea as soon as possible. Otherwise, when the poison dragon or the more terrifying woman appears, I’m afraid I will have no chance. With a sullen face, 3 pairs of [Holy Wings] appeared behind Obsidian, and he launched punch after punch in the air toward the shield.

With every punch, the shield shook, and there were more cracks in the surrounding ground. Roman who was in the air, discovered the crisis, and he immediately led the Wyvern Legion to rescue. However, the power of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord was too strong. One after another wyvern fell. Roman sent out spiritual impact and rays with the power of the evil eye tyrant, Obsidian who activated the [Holy Wings] was not affected at all. On the other hand, the power of the evil eye was recoiled in double by the [Heart of Light and Dark]. Roman and Wyvern King were stunned to the ground.

The circle of protection magic was getting smaller and smaller. The Dark Moon’s 1,000-soldiers magician legion was originally the elites under the Dark Shadow Empire’s Third General Crawford. Under the optimum state, the protection that was jointly cast with the secret method would not break for a while even if Obsidian had [Holy Wings] and [Dark Flame]. However, the spirit power of the magicians had almost exhausted, and the effect of supplement and buff potion had weakened by now. The protective shield became unprecedentedly shaky.

“Boom!” The entire protective shield was finally destroyed under Obsidian’s strong attack. The magicians who exhausted their spirit power collapsed to the ground, and dozens of magicians on the edge were blasted into pieces by the aftermath of the punch.

If Zola was with Shea now, it would definitely be another situation. It was a pity that the appearance of the 2 giant dragons of the Dragon Island were unforeseen, especially the black dragon that was almost completely immune to magic. Zola, which was originally a trump card, could only be “canceled out” for the time being. The changes on the battlefield were indeed difficult to fully control with plans.

Obsidian stared closely at Shea who was supporting Olypheus in the center. An intangible pressure containing territory power enveloped everyone around him that made them unable to move for a while.

“I give you the last chance to be my woman and slave. I can still consider giving you the position of the queen.”

“I belong to only one man in this life!” Shea put down Olypheus with a sneer on her face, “Today, there will only be Shea who dies in the battle, and there is no queen who lives shamelessly!”

A black flame began to burn on her body, her purple pupils turned into 1 black and 1 white, and 2 pairs of light wings appeared behind her.

Obsidian shook his head, “[Dark Flame], [Heart of Light and Dark], and [Holy Wings]. Although you have realized the 3 major talents, they are still normal talents. You are not even a mutated bloodline. You only inherit the power of Grimm. It’s a bit beyond my expectation that you can reach the peak stage of the Demon Emperor after the war of lords, but with this strength, what can you do even if you burn your life?”

As Obsidian talked, the pressure emitted from him had soared to the extreme in an instant, “Kneel down! Lead your army to surrender to me!”

The power of the Dark Moon was obvious to all. If Shea surrendered, the entire wealth of the Dark Moon and the remaining military power would all be in his bag. Moreover, keeping Shea alive might earn the recognition of the Sword of Fallen Angel.

If there was really no way, it would be easy to kill her with the current situation.

Under this powerful pressure of a different realm, Shea’s knees began to tremble as she insisted stubbornly while desperately supporting herself with the sword on the ground.

The [Dark Flame] that burned her life became more and more scorching. As her blonde hair fluttered, the black and white colors in her eyes began to emit an odd light. With a “whoosh” the [Dark Flame] turned into a ball that wrapped Shea. The burning rhythm became more and more bizarre, making the surrounding space permeated with a mysterious rhythm that was in harmony with the nature of the world.

Obsidian’s face changed, “Damn it, you are actually breaking through!”

Thanks to his “help”, Shea was actually going to make a breakthrough?

“Bang!” Obsidian punched the [Dark Flame]’s ball, but the fireball did not move. His fist was recoiled by a huge force, and his whole person involuntarily backed up a few steps. The ball suddenly turned black and white, revealing an ancient and vast breath.

This breath launched a heavy punch in Obsidian’s heart. As if he saw the thing he feared the most, his whole body was trembling.

This unique breath of [Heart of Light and Dark] is so familiar.. Lord of Midnight Sun!

The brother whom I fear most; the top powerhouse who has no rivals in the Demon Realm!

How could Shea’s body have the Midnight Sun’s unique [Heart of Light and Dark] breath? This is definitely not Grimm’s inheritance! Could it be that… the Midnight Sun is not dead?

Obsidian shivered instantly: No! Although I did not witness the fall of the Midnight Sun at the scene, I saw the corpse with my own eyes. It was absolutely true. According to the old patriarch, Melolis of the Samael Royal Family, who was the only surviving witness at the time, Lord of Midnight Sun was killed by a human powerhouse. Almost everyone on the scene died. Melolis himself also died of serious injury shortly after returning to the Demon Realm.

The death of the Lord of Midnight Sun should be a fact. Otherwise, how could the Demon Realm Army be defeated? It’s just that the Midnight Sun has been dead for so long, and his power of light and darkness appeared on Shea’s body a few hundred years later. How can this be explained?

Obsidian didn’t know that the power of light and darkness that Shea now emitted was crystallized with Fertile Yuan Soil by Earth Elemental King from Glorfin’s power when he was possessed. Back then, Glorfin was severely injured hard by the power of [Heart of Light and Dark]. The source was indeed the Lord of Midnight Sun.

The [Dark Flame] gradually dissipated, revealing the figure of Shea in the center. The [Holy Wings] behind her had become 3 pairs, the ancient and vast breath of the black and white pupils disappeared. There was a mysterious change in the power around her body. Judging from the breath on the surface, there had been a qualitative leap as compared to before.

“Demon Overlord!” Obsidian was brimming with murderous intent. Shea has become a Demon Overlord in her 20s. Her individual potential is almost limitless, plus the power breath that is suspected to be from the Lord of Midnight Sun, the sense of crisis that this woman gave me is too much. In any case, I must not keep her alive!

If in another universe, knowing that a brother could still be alive, one will usually tear; Obsidian? He will probably “tears” too 😏. This Ms. Miser, if this was an RPG game, her job will definitely be Thief💰🗡️. Although Shea just breaks through, she still won’t be able to rival Obsidian right?

chapters.title: Chapter 546 - The Super [Black Dragon Cannon]
chapters.body:
Chapter 546 - The Super [Black Dragon Cannon]

Chapter 546: The Super [Black Dragon Cannon]

The light and dark crystal effect that contained the Fertile Yuan Soil’s peculiar power was very magical. Faced with the strong pressure of Obsidian, Shea finally burst out of her potential and broke through her current realm. Her [Heart of Light and Dark] was mutated, and she directly advanced to the Demon Overlord level. However, her current strength was still quite unstable. Not only did she urgently need a period of focused training, but she also had to master a brand new territory power again in order to be regarded as a real Demon Overlord.

Unfortunately, Shea didn’t have this time at all in the current situation.

A rookie who had just realized the realm of Demon Overlord still had no chance of winning against the veteran of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord.

There was a long purple sword in Obsidian’s hand which pierced toward Shea’s heart. Shea was barely able to grasp the opponent’s attack trajectory. When she blocked with her sword, the long sword was shaken off.

Seeing that she was about to be stabbed by this sword, Shea’s figure had appeared in the distance in an instant. This was unlike the average teleportation talent of the great demon clan. This was the supplementary skill, [Lightweight], of Magic Feather Tulle on her. When she received a fatal attack, she would automatically teleport out of danger, but it was limited to twice per hour.

Obsidian was slightly surprised, but he reacted very quickly. In the blink of an eye, he appeared in front of Shea and slashed again. The [Lightweight] was triggered again, and she dodged it. However, she had reached the 2 limits and could no longer dodge Obsidian’s third blow. Right after Shea barely dodged a sword, she was blown away by a punch. She fell right next to the veiled woman- The sober Olypheus just drank the potion given by the woman. The woman lifted up Shea, whose internal organs were severely injured, then she handed Shea to Olypheus before walking slowly toward Obsidian.

Obsidian hated the woman who caused him a huge setback. As he was about to kill her, the woman said, “Your Highness, it’s been a long time.”

The familiar voice stopped Obsidian, “You…”

The woman’s veil was dyed red with blood. However, she walked toward Obsidian step by step elegantly like this was a ball instead of a battlefield, “Your Highness, do you still remember 30 years ago when we first met, I gave you a multiple choice question? Do you want me or my ability?”

“It’s really you!” Obsidian was utterly shocked, “Impossible! You are actually not dead!”

At the Leisure Moon Inn on the outskirts of the city, he saw this woman and “Charles” disappeared into ashes with his own eyes!

If this woman is not dead, then “Charles”…

The news was really shocking. Obsidian felt that his heart was beating more violently than ever before. Some things that he had initially confirmed began to undergo earth-shaking change.

The woman had come to Obsidian’s side, and she whispered, “That man has something for me to bring to Your Highness.”

That man… is really not dead? Obsidian’s attention had completely shifted from Shea’s side. While listening attentively, the woman’s volume suddenly rose, “Olypheus! Run!”

The item that the woman held behind her suddenly lit up. It contained terrifying destructive fluctuations.

The mountain in the distance of the wilderness was another battlefield where fierce tremors and clamor were constantly occurring.

Smoke and dust flew everywhere, several figures intersected at an unimaginable high speed. The ground nearby seemed to be cut by several layers. There were exaggerated cracks and signs of damage everywhere.

“Asshole!” The elder family Demon Overlord Barroco got up from the huge hole in the ground with a grim face. If it were for Stiller activating a magic shield in time for him, his heart would have been dug out by the poison dragon.

In the battle of Demon Overlords between both sides, the capital should have taken an absolute advantage. There were 3 peak stage Demon Overlords, Baroco, Stiller, and Disjaro. The intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord were Salgar, Stebil, and Faravit. There was only 1 early stage of the Demon Overlord, Lunters; The Dark Moon only had 1 peak stage of the Demon Overlord, Paglio, the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord included Ms. Emerald Dragon Krobelus who had recently advanced, Vanim. Toro, who surrendered to the Dark Moon, plus Pegasus and the spirit dragon who were converted into the undead.

Taking into account the situation of Pegasus and spirit dragon, especially the current state whereby the spirit dragon couldn’t be separated from the controller, the actual combat intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord power could only be regarded as 1.5 or even less. 7 vs 5 was actually 7 vs 4. It was only a matter of time before the capital side won.

However, the plan would never keep up with the changes. The real situation was quite the opposite. There were weird traps and magic circles that terrified the peak stage of the Demon Overlord everywhere in this mountainous area. The 7 Demon Overlords of the capital had been suppressed by the other side until now.

There is no doubt that these traps are set long ago! No wonder the sinister poison dragon deliberately led everyone to this place!

This it too cunning! Too shameless!

The long sword in Disjaro’s right hand released countless sword lights at Paglio. Paglio flashed slightly, and he had already dodged far away. Before the sword lights could catch up, they were disintegrated up by some intangible resistance. Then, the poison dragon appeared ghostly behind Disjaro.

The [Holy Wings] appeared behind Disjaro, and he struck behind his back with his left hand wrapped in [Dark Flame]. Paglio’s body burst open as he was hit. Disjaro felt that the [Dark Flame] was recoiled back into his body by a strange force, making him feel very uncomfortable. The emerald dragon’s punch across the distance had arrived from the front. Half of Disjaro’s armor was frozen by this blow containing the power of the water element. He was about to melt it with [Dark Flame], but Paglio’s real body and fist appeared in front of him at the same time.

Due to the freezing, Disjaro was already unable to dodge. His defense was greatly reduced by the [Overlord Armor Reduction]. The poison dragon hit his chest with a fierce blow, and ice flakes burst apart. The armor suddenly had a fist dent of flesh and blood; there was even a faint green smoke.

Disjaro let out a muffled sound, and he took 8 steps back. Ignoring the severe pain, the chest injury quickly burned with [Dark Flame] which barely suppressed the terrifying poison. Just as the poison dragon was about to pursue him, the [Thunderstrike] reinforced by Stiller had arrived. Paglio screamed, and he appeared behind Vanim out of thin air to let him block Stebil’s blow.

“Shameless dragons!” Stiller yelled angrily. She was the only person in the capital who had not been injured so far. It was not that Paglio treated women preferentially, but that Stiller’s magic power was powerful, and she was good in defense. Even so, she still couldn’t crack the deep magic traps. She couldn’t even find a way out of this damn place.

“It’s called using the brain, idiots!” Paglio grinned. This was the “home field” that he set up with Zola the other day. It was set mainly by the Dragon Inscription, and there were some magic circles with ancient runes which also had a considerable interference effect on the territory power. Due to time and material issues, this formation could only last for 1 day which was enough for now.

In the current situation, the poison dragon and Krobelus who were familiar with the Dragon Inscriptions were mainly attacking. The 2 undead and Vanim were in a fixed defense position, and they actually had the upper hand. The original plan was to let the poison dragon, emerald dragon and black dragon lure those Demon Overlords to a duel here while Zola lurked beside Shea to prepare for a sneak attack on Obsidian. However, the appearance of 2 giant dragons of the Dragon Island disrupted this plan. Paglio knew that Olypheus could not stop Obsidian. He just hoped that she could try her best to delay Obsidian, then wait until he or Zola solved the enemy, they could converge their attacks at Obsidian.

Although the poison dragon had the upper hand, the opponent’s strength was not trivial after all, so it was quite difficult to win in a short time.

In the middle of the battlefield in the wilderness, the expected explosion did not appear. The veiled woman fell to the ground, and her wrist was pinned into the ground by a long purple sword. Obsidian, whose eyes turned black and white, had a destructive item floating in his hands. Under the mysterious power of [Heart of Light and Dark], the destructive light quickly dimmed.

“Want to trick me? You damn traitor!” Obsidian’s face was full of hideous expression, and his hands glowed with a rope-like purple light stream which bound Isabella- This traitor involved the huge secret of the human “Charles”. She can’t die before I get the answer.

There was no fear in Isabella’s eyes. Instead, there was a kind of relief that saw through life and death. Perhaps this kind of relief had already existed in her heart, so she was so disregarding her life and death. As the head of an intel department, she had more than one way to turn herself into a corpse even in such a confined situation.

What made her anxious was that Olypheus, who was supporting Shea in the distance, did not take Shea to the Paglio’s battlefield according to her previous instructions. Instead, she stood there blankly as though she was stupefied.

“Olypheus, run away!” Isabella held back the sharp pain in her wrist and shouted again.

Facing the approaching Obsidian, Olypheus still dazedly stood still. She didn’t even notice that Shea had broken free.

It was not out of fear, but her mind was buzzing at the moment; it was all that voice.

“Run quickly!”

“Olypheus, run quickly!”

“Olypheus, run away!”

The scene seemed to overlap with a nightmare in her deep memory, and the voice became familiar and close.

“Olypheus, run away!”

In the nightmare, she just trembled all over and utterly frightened. She didn’t dare to move as she watched the heart of the figure standing in front of her pierced by a claw.

Facing Shea who rushed over with great difficulty, Obsidian’s face showed a cold murderous intent. At this moment, a sense of danger suddenly appeared in his heart. Not only Obsidian, but Shea and Isabella also felt it. The source was the utterly frightened black dragon girl.

In Olypheus’s hollow eyes, big tears suddenly dropped, and her trembling lips murmured a word, “Mom…”

The sound suddenly became louder, and the terrifying sound wave spread around with Olypheus as the center. Shea, who had rushed toward Obsidian, was blown away by the air current; the wyverns in the air nearby were shocked to the ground; the soldiers of both sides covered their ears in pain.

In the high-pitched scream, Olypheus’ pupils gradually turned white. A mark gradually emerged on her forehead. It was 3 small diamonds. The center was slightly larger and the sides were slightly smaller. At the same time, her black hair with blood began to flutter, and her nails quickly extended to half a foot long.

Obsidian felt the dramatic change in Olypheus’ breath. This change was not a level up, but it seemed to be the activation of some kind of bloodline power. Not only that, she also had a breath similar to Shea’s [Heart of Light and Dark] previously, Obsidian had a hunch that this level of breath seemed to be greater than the one that seemed to be the Midnight Sun previously…

“Swoosh!” Olypheus’ figure appeared in front of Obsidian in a split second. Her claws made a terrifying sound in the air. Obsidian parried with his purple sword. When the claws hit on the sword, there were actually sparks splashing around. Obsidian’s body trembled slightly, seemingly startled at the power that Olypheus burst out at this time.

Tremors and cracks continued to appear on the ground, and Isabella, who fell on the ground, could no longer see Olypheus’ figure with lightning speed. Even Shea, who had just advanced to Demon Overlord, felt extremely difficult to catch up with the speed.

There were already a few thin blood marks on Obsidian’s face, but he was not angry or impatient. Instead, he calmly responded to Olypheus’s frenzy attack. From his experience, although this black dragon girl had undergone a strong mutation, it was not her own power, but she was venting a certain energy that could not be suppressed.

As soon as this energy disappeared, her body and spirit would definitely lose the combat power due to exhaustion, so he only needed to hold on for this period of time.

Olypheus’s figure was knocked off by Obsidian and fell into the crowd. She jumped up, and everywhere she passed, whether it was the capital army or the Dark Moon Army, the soldiers were torn apart under the terrifying power.

“Olypheus!”

Isabella, who was tied to the ground in front, called out with all her strength. She had noticed something wrong with Olypheus. She seemed to have lost her mind. Olypheus shook. This voice seems to be the one previously…

Olypheus’ figure flashed in front of Isabella in an instant, and the sharp claws in her hand flashed with cold light. Isabella was closing her eyes and waiting to die, but the rope was cut off by Olypheus

Olypheus set Isabella free, then she raised her hands. She pointed her right index finger at Obsidian while holding her right wrist with her left hand. The long nails looked particularly hideous. This was exactly the pose of launching [Black Dragon Cannon].

Before the [Black Dragon Cannon] was released, there were countless spreading cracks on the ground around Olypheus. Isabella behind her was unable to move due to the pressure.

“Swoosh!” A cluster of black ball flickering with faint white light whistled toward Obsidian. This [Black Dragon Cannon] was much smaller than the previous one, but Obsidian’s face showed a solemn expression – This blow contains a power that is far greater than before. It should be the release of the uncontrollable power of the higher realm in her body.

Obsidian did not resist it forcefully. With a flap of [Holy Wings], he appeared in the sky, but this black ball tracked him at a very fast speed like it had a spirit. Obsidian couldn’t dodge, his black and white eyes were shining. He resisted this super [Black Dragon Cannon] with his hands emitting [Dark Flame].

The sky on the battlefield seemed to darken at this moment. The cluster of [Black Dragon Cannon] surrounding Obsidian was constantly twisted and deformed in the air, and white electric currents were sparking. After a few minutes, its speed finally slowed down. It disappeared completely with an explosion sound.

Obsidian’s figure appeared in the sky. The cloak behind him had completely disappeared, and a large number of cracks appeared on his black armor. Especially the left hand without gloves was covered with green color.

“Mom…” Olypheus’ pupils returned to jet black, and tears overflowed from her eyes. Her body that had lost strength swayed and collapsed. She was caught by Isabella from behind. The sharp nails were retracted, but the diamond mark on her forehead still hadn’t faded away.

Obsidian’s heart was fuming with rage. This power of [Black Dragon Cannon] is not only terrifying, but it also has the weird attribute of destroying equipment. The most troublesome thing is that the poison on my left hand seems to be activated. My whole arm is numb. It is even spreading throughout my body. This poison must be suppressed first, then I will kill the enemies below!

Everyone must die!

At this moment, a horse neigh sounded. Horse neighing on the battlefield was extremely common, but this neighing sound overwhelmed almost all the sounds.

In an instant, the seriously injured Isabella and Shea were pumped up, and their eyes lit up at the same time. Even Olypheus, whose mind had begun to blur, seemed to regain a sense of sobriety.

A fiery red figure rushed in from behind the capital army’s right wing.

Chen Rui finally made it? Maybe the weird attribute of [Black Dragon Cannon] can be improved to even steal equipment😏.

chapters.title: Chapter 547 - Artifact’S Choice
chapters.body:
Chapter 547 - Artifact’S Choice

C hapter 547: Artifact’s Choice

The fiery red figure was a “horse” with a black body and a single horn on its head. The mane and tail of the horse were like flames, and its 4 hooves were burning with real flames. The soldiers along the way seemed to be traumatized; one after another soldiers moved away from its path.

“Incubus Beast!” Many people exclaimed. Obsidian who was detoxifying could not help but raise his brows, and his eyes fell on the cloaked rider on the back of the Incubus Beast.

Incubus Beast was the horse demonic beasts unique to the Demon Realm. The speed and power were comparable to the unicorns of the human world. They were immune to all mind control. Individuals with a mutated bloodline could also manipulate the Incubus Beast to use [Lightning]. Its greatest talent was [Terror], which could weaken the opponent’s combat power and fighting spirit. It was known as the Demon Realm’s most powerful ground mount.

Incubus Beast was extremely rare, and it was tameless by nature. It would rather die than surrender under normal circumstances. It was unexpected that this person had such a mount. Judging from the situation of the nearby electrocuted soldiers, it was even an Incubus Beast with a mutated bloodline!

The cloak of the rider flashed with a strange bright light. As he waved his hands, a large area of the capital soldiers within a range of tens of meters began to collapse into a state of weakness and chaos; some even killed each other. At the same time, countless huge vines appeared in the capital army which frantically attacked the nearby soldiers. The entire capital right wing fell into chaos. When the rider rode past the Dark Moon Army, that strange power became another feeling. The Dark Moon Army in the area felt that their injury was recovering quickly, and their energy became vigorous again as though they were reborn.

“Aguile!”

The soldiers recognized the rider riding the Incubus Beast, and their morale was greatly boosted. Initially, the capital army had a sharp drop in combat power due to some special reasons, now they were completely suppressed by the Dark Moon.

The Incubus Beast soared into the air. The cloaked rider seemed to be looking for something, and he soon discovered the situation in the central army. Seeing the collapsed Shea, the blood-stained Isabella and the almost unconscious Olypheus, the eyes behind the visor suddenly burned. He urged the Incubus Beast to fly toward the central army quickly.

Chen Rui didn’t know what happened previously. Judging from the current scene, Shea and the others must have experienced unimaginable dangers. In the past few days, he rode the little black horse day and night to rush toward this place, but unfortunately, he still failed to catch up with the war. Fortunately, Shea and the others were still alive, and he finally made it.

Obsidian had a cruel smile on his face when he thought of Shea’s resolute phrase “I only belong to a man in this life”. Aguile? Shea’s fiance? He defeated the Red Spirit Estate and the Blue Lava Estate in the war of lords? He should be the Demon Emperor-level strength at most. It’s just right that I can eliminate these threatening guys all together!

At this time, the poison in Obsidian’s body was finally suppressed, and the green color on his left hand became a lot paler. With a wave of his hand, the purple sword on the ground had returned to his hand. The sword burst with [Dark Flame], turning into dozens of huge beasts that charged toward Shea quickly. If this blow was successful, even if Shea was now at the Demon Overlord level, she would be eliminated.

The sound of a sonic boom in the distance sounded at the same time. In the blink of an eye, there was already a figure in front of Shea. A soft water-like power was fluctuating in his hand which glowed with a faint light, and he waved it toward the huge beasts.

The huge beasts madly slammed the figure blocking at the front, but under some mysterious power, they actually turned around unbelievably and rushed toward Obsidian who was in the air.

Obsidian was taken aback. He blocked with his purple sword, and black flames scattered around. After the violent concussion, all the huge beasts disappeared. It was obviously uncomfortable to be counter-attacked by his own ultimate move. Obsidian’s helmet and 2 shoulder armors were already completely shattered. Murderous intent had filled his eyes.

At this time, the little black horse, Incubus Beast, that rushed over had already carried Isabella and Olypheus behind it, and it ran far away at the command of Chen Rui. Obsidian did not stop it because his gaze was fixed on Shea. Shea rose into the air under the protection of Chen Rui, holding a longsword high in her hand.

The tail of this sword was a purple gem, and the quillons were 2 back-to-back angels. The body of the sword was white and engraved with 2 strange marks. The simplicity was full of mysterious breath.

Obsidian could tell the name and characteristics of this sword even with his eyes closed. This sword had been with him for 300 years, but he, the legal owner, had never been recognized by it.

However, in Shea’s hands, this unapproachable artifact, which had always been repelling everyone, actually shone a strong light that he had never seen before when it was in his hands.

In an instant, the entire battlefield felt a strong and unstoppable aura.

Shea’s clear voice sounded through the battlefield, “Rebellious Obsidian, the Sword of Fallen Angel is here!”

For a moment, almost everyone stopped. Countless gazes focused on the sword that exuded the powerful breath in the hands of Shea in midair.

The highest artifact in the empire!

The Sword of Fallen Angel!

“Impossible!” Obsidian shouted hysterically, “Why?! Why?!”

Even if Obsidian was usually gloomy, he finally couldn’t help but lose his composure at this time. For 300 years, he exhausted all the methods and he was rejected by the Sword of Fallen Angel every time. Why, this woman who is only 20 years old, can be recognized by the artifact by just being the granddaughter of the Midnight Sun?

The lords, generals and soldiers were all shocked at this moment. The artifact that represents an empire has been passed down for hundreds of thousands of years. Almost everyone knows its appearance and characteristics. Judging from Obsidian’s attitude, this sword is the genuine one!

Only the true ruler of the empire can be recognized by the supreme artifact! So… this is the artifact’s choice!

Shea held up the Sword of Fallen Angel, “Our sharp swords should not be aimed at our own people! Our blood should not flow under our own swords!”

As soon as this sentence came out, most of the soldiers, including the capital army, lost their fighting spirit.

Obsidian felt the soldiers’ psychological changes, and he involuntarily had a huge fear as if what he had been worried about had become a reality. He roared wildly, “Damn artifact! Damn woman! You all shall die!”

The flames suddenly burned in the air, and a sea of fire engulfed Shea and Chen Rui.

Obsidian, who was almost in madness, had activated his territory desperately.

This was a world of flames. The land was burning, the sky was burning; everything was burning. The only liquid was the black molten lava that could be seen everywhere. The world was full of destructive suffocation and high temperature. Shea and Chen Rui simultaneously felt that the power in their body was continuously disintegrated and disappeared under the burning as if they themselves were the fuel of the flame.

Obsidian stood in the distance, and the [Holy Wings] behind him had turned into black flame wings. There were 6 pairs, like the true wings of the Fallen Angel Empire in the legend. His purple eyes were full of scary blood veins.

“I’m the true owner of the Sword of Fallen Angel! You rebels are going to die! I want to suck all your blood and use your flesh and blood as a sacrifice!”

After something that had been suppressed in his heart for 300 years completely collapsed, Obsidian showed his lunatic side. The flames between the sky and the ground began to rise and fall rapidly with the emotions of the controller. Giants emerged from the lava one after another. It was 5 meters tall, and it exuded the terrifying heat that swarmed toward the 2 of them.

Chen Rui’s mind shifted, and the flame world in his eyes began to change rapidly. After he re-realized the Super System, many functions were unprecedentedly strengthened. In other words, Chen Rui had truly mastered these functions. For example, the original [Analysis] ability of [Analytical Eyes] could only show simple attributes and some kind of danger prompt. The present [Analytical Eyes] already had the “function” of analysis. The power fluctuations in the territory, the attributes of the structure, and even the strengths and weaknesses were all at a glance.

“Shea, protect yourself. Don’t use the Sword of Fallen Angel.”

Shea nodded, and she did not ask why she couldn’t use the Sword of Fallen Angel. Another long sword from the storage ring appeared in her hand. In fact, she had previously felt that the light and biting aura of this sword were not so simple, it seemed… out of her control. All she could do was to trust him without reservation which was a kind of tacit understanding and trust.

10 Demon King-level goldmen suddenly appeared around Shea in a circle. At the same time, Chen Rui’s figure left Shea’s side and appeared not far from Obsidian. The lava giants had already pounced on Shea, but the surrounding goldmen were prepared for it. The goldmen were knocked down almost in the blink of an eye, but they stood up stubbornly and continued to fight. Those lava giants were extremely hot, and the goldmen had already begun to melt. Shea’s eyes lit up in black and white. With a stroke of the long sword in her hand, a halo appeared around her body, stopping the lava giants from approaching.

Chen Rui didn’t turn his head to look at Shea’s side. The light on his body continuously lit up as he activated the [Hot Blood Halo] of Mystic Jade Armor and the [Battle Enhancement] of [Link Enhancement].

There were 2 types of [Link Enhancement]: Permanent [Star-level Enhancement] and the temporary [Battle Enhancement]. [Star-level Enhancement] was very expensive and required 100,000 faith crystals. Because [Royal Star Transformation] was frequently used. It consumed a lot of faith crystals. Since Shura swallowed the Wheel of Hera, the growth of faith crystals had been slower and slower for some reasons, so he couldn’t get the required number of faith crystals yet.

There was a mask at Chen Rui’s visor. In the next second, the flame power between the sky and the ground surged toward him uncontrollably. The terrifying temperature suddenly dropped a lot, and the strength of the giants was also declining.

“Swallowing talent? Beelzebub?” Obsidian felt the rapid loss of spirit power in the territory, and he suddenly thought of a certain rumor about Aguile and sneered. This swallowing almost emptied the spirit power of this territory, but the Demon Emperor’s territory power was not a match for the Demon Overlord level which gradually began to replenish and recover as if it was a real world that was inexhaustible.

When he was in the Crystal Valley, Chen Rui used this trick to absorb Manu’s territory, but Manu’s territory was basically based on magic and spirit power, so he was greatly suppressed by the God-Eating Mask. The most important thing was that Catherine seized this opportunity to activate her own territory and injure Manu badly.

Without Catherine, Manu’s territory would automatically recover within a period of time.

When Obsidian’s territory power weakened, many more balls appeared all around. They spun in a strange rhythm. From a distance, they turned out to be stars that intertwined with the flame world.

The stars were filled with scorching heat and burning power that were different from the attributes of the flame world. The flames seemed to be continuously assimilated and absorbed by the stars.

Obsidian felt that his strength had been weakened tremendously, and he was secretly shocked. He had a brand new evaluation of Chen Rui’s power. How could a Demon Emperor reflect my fire beasts? How can he activate his territory freely in my [Fallen Flame World Territory]? Judging from the momentum, he is close to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. (In fact, it was the result of [Royal Star Transformation] plus [Galaxy Territory] plus Mystic Jade Armor plus [Battle Enhancement]). “Aguile” must be the one who gave the Sword of Fallen Angel to Shea, so “Aguile” should be one of the culprits of the capital chaos.

Thinking of this, Obsidian’s hatred skyrocketed again. His figure appeared in front of Chen Rui, and he slashed with a sword. The 12 wings behind him were not decorations, but a transformation that was a combination of physical strength, vigor, and spirit power. It was already a bit close to the [Armor of Faith] of the territory kingdom which buff one’s own ability to the maximum. He had the confidence to fight even if the woman with horrifying magic power was in front of him.

But Obsidian did not know that the enemy who was “close to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord” in front of him had the real [Armor of Faith]. The Northsea in Chen Rui’s hand was rippling with ripples-like light patterns as it parried Obsidian’s flame sword. Under the bizarre effect of the light patterns, the flames on Obsidian’s purple sword were continuously being disintegrated. What was even more bizarre was that the swords on both sides had not collided once. Chen Rui parried the sword by diverting the force, making Obsidian unable to exert force.

This was obviously the result of Chen Rui’s control. This swordsmanship was realized from [Star Diversion] which incorporated some principles of “Tai Chi ” of another world, but Chen Rui was just an otaku before the crossover. He didn’t know anything about martial arts. Perhaps because of this, he could comprehend his own water swordsmanship with only a little “intention”. Although Chen Rui’s strength was inferior to Obsidian, he relied on the superior spirit power, coupled with Northsea Sword’s characteristics of attack acceleration and swordsmanship proficiency buff, he was in a stalemate with Obsidian for some time. He also became more familiar with the water swordsmanship in this actual combat.

Obsidian became more and more frustrated as he fought. The enemy’s power level is clearly similar to that of the black dragon girl which is far inferior to me, but he has plenty of experiences and strange means, which makes him difficult to deal with compared to the black dragon. It will not be advantageous for me if we continue this close combat.

Thinking of this, Obsidian’s 6 pairs of flame wings spread out, and he pulled the distance away. He pointed the purple sword with his black and white eyes flickering, the flames turned into countless light streams that flew toward Chen Rui one after another like meteors. This kind of pure energy attack could no longer be resolved with the water swordsmanship. Chen Rui attached Stridebug under his feet, and he flexibly dodged the flame meteors by relying on the trajectory of the [Analytical Eyes]’s analysis. Obsidian caught a glimpse of Shea surrounded by the flame giants. With a murderous intent, the sky full of meteors immediately turned to Shea’s direction.

Will this assault succeed? Or will Chen Rui save the beauty once again? Can they activate the Sword of Fallen Angel in this battle with Obsidian?

chapters.title: Chapter 548 - The End! The Sword Of Fallen Angel’S Brilliance
chapters.body:
Chapter 548 - The End! The Sword Of Fallen Angel’S Brilliance

The goldmen around her had melted, and she was wielding a longsword to hold on. If she was hit by the meteors, she would definitely be annihilated.

Chen Rui discovered Obsidian’s intentions and cursed secretly. The [Sonic Boom] suddenly sounded. He had activated the flying skill to block in front of Shea. With a point of Northsea, a huge black hole appeared in front of him.

This black hole carried a terrifying gravitational force which swallowed the flame giants and the meteors. However, the warning sound in Chen Rui’s Super System soon sounded because the power of Demi-God absorbed by the [Star Devouring] was already full. Although it was absorbed by the Star Conversion these days, only a small part of it was decomposed and absorbed. Coupled with these turbulent peak stage Demon Overlord power now, the speed of absorption couldn’t keep up with the devouring. It was almost overflowing after a short while.

As soon as the black hole disappeared, the fire meteors behind had already flown toward him quickly.

“Boom boom boom… “

When the smoke and dust dispersed, a large number of cracks and a drag mark appeared on the ground. But they had gradually returned to their original state under the effect of the territory.

At the end of the drag mark, the figure that had been protecting Shea still stood tall. The cloak on his body had been destroyed by the impact force, revealing the dazzling armor. There was a shield in his hand which was a large dark golden buckler with simple patterns, giving people an indestructible feeling. This round of turbulent fireballs left no trace of damage on this shield.

Obsidian felt the shield looked a little familiar. His mind moved and thought of something, but he quickly rejected it- “Aguile” should be of the Beelzebub Royal Family. If there is one, it should be a “mask”, not a “shield”. Besides, the legendary “shield” still looks a little different in appearance compared to the one in front of me.

Obsidian didn’t know that this was actually half of that “shield”. Before he could figure this out, Chen Rui had launched a counterattack. Despite the protection of the Demon Shield which blocked all the attacks from Shea, Chen Rui still suffered a lot of internal injuries under this violent shock and impact. He now relied on the [Royal Star Transformation] plus all buffs to barely compete with Obsidian, but these states had time limits. If he remained passive, he would surely be defeated, so he must fight back.

Northsea’s light purple sword burst into countless meteor-like rays that spread forward in a fan shape. Some newly formed flame giants were pierced and annihilated. The spreading meteors drew a beautiful arc, converging into a greatsword shape at one point. With a “swoosh” sound, the greatsword flew toward Obsidian with terrifying speed and might.

Obsidian felt a strong sense of crisis. When he thrusted the purple sword into the ground, several red halos appeared and spun continuously, covering his whole body.

The greatsword was fleeting in the [Fallen Fire World Territory], and the territory power within its range was cleared.

During the shake, Obsidian’s figure reappeared, but his position had been moved tens of meters away. The protective halos disappeared without a trace and the armor on his body was almost fragmented. There was a terrifying crack in the armor where blood was constantly overflowing. The black flame wings behind him also became dim. His face was full of incredible horror, “This…this is the attack of the light element power! Such a powerful and pure light element power… Who are you!”

The light element and the dark element naturally restrained each other, and the light element power was exactly the nemesis of the [Fallen Flame World Territory]. If it was any kind of attack of the same level, it was impossible to cause this kind of damage to Obsidian.

The Demon Realm was the world of dark elements. The basis of demons’ training was not limited to the dark elements. It could be any element of earth, water, fire and wind. The only impossibility was the light element. Those with the power of the light element, especially the power of this level only be a visitor from the human world.

Could it be that Aguile, whom I initially thought was of the Beelzebub Royal Family…

In fact, this blow was the effect of the supplementary skill [Flow Back to Origin] of the quasi-artifact Northsea. It had the sword qi damage of both the water element and light element attributes. However, Obsidian’s guess was accidentally correct. “Aguile” was really not from the Beelzebub Royal Family!

Chen Rui’s mind turned sharply as he flew slowly in front of Obsidian. He changed into another voice, “Your Highness Regent, my friend, you haven’t recognized me?”

Obsidian just resummoned the purple sword, and he was shocked when he heard this sentence. He was even more moved than the moment he heard Isabella’s voice previously, “You are… Charles!”

Chen Rui slowly moved his hand to the visor on his face, and a familiar face appeared in front of Obsidian. Obsidian had already had a hunch when he saw Isabella who was resurrected. I did not expect to see this face here! And as the fiancé of the Dark Moon’s Princess Royal!

Fundraising! Black potions! “Crack” the artifact! Fake death…

Even if Obsidian knew that he couldn’t be distracted at this time, his attention was still drawn by this shocking “truth”. At this moment, he suddenly had the illusion of the stars breaking.

No! It’s not an illusion. A sky full of stars in the [Fallen Flame World Territory] burst open, sending out the brilliance like a supernova. Behind the magnificence was the dust and smoke. The flame giants that had been reborn were decimated into powder.

[Star Explosion] was the strongest aoe skill of the [Royal Star Transformation]. Under the double buff of Chen Rui’s deepened comprehension and [Dual Training], his power had a qualitative increase. This blow made the power of the entire [Fallen Flame World Territory] shattered, and Obsidian himself received an extremely violent impact. Although the territory did not collapse, its power was greatly weakened. It could not be restored to its strongest state in a short period of time. Even the power of the flame giants that surrounded Shea, which were reborn in an extremely fast speed, also greatly reduced.

“Your Highness Regent, let your old friend give you the last gift!” The voice of “Charles” sounded, and the Northsea pierced toward Obsidian’s throat.

The [Star Explosion] did not cause Obsidian to be severely injured. It only weakened his territory power, but it caused the wounds caused by [Flow Back to Origin] to burst. The most terrible thing was that the poison on his left hand could no longer be suppressed and started spreading around. He immediately roared and went forward with the purple sword without hesitation.

Chen Rui launched the remaining teleportation and appeared behind Obsidian. Obsidian quickly caught this sneak attack, and his purple sword that was launched forward with all his strength was inconceivably retracted. He turned around with a sword strike.

This sword stabbed the target firmly. The bright armor could not stop the sharpness of the purple sword and was penetrated. However, there seemed to be a stronger protection in the armor. Before that slash was able to penetrate that layer of protection, a change that surprised Obsidian happened.

“Charles” suddenly “exploded”!

His body exploded into countless flying “flies”, and the sword suddenly missed.

“[Demonic Flies Transformation]! God-Eating Mask!” As the biggest enemy of the Beelzebub Royal Family, Obsidian, who belonged to the Lucifer Royal Family, recognized the secret technique of the mortal enemy of the royal family at a glance. His pupils suddenly shrank- According to the previous understanding, the fact that Aguile. Beelzebub has a God-Eating Mask makes sense, but now… isn’t Charles a human?

The light element power just now is the best illustration. Nero also said that his [Body of Light Blessing] is the elite royal bloodline of the 2 empires of humans.

How can a human possess and launch the secret skills of the 7 artifacts, God-Eating Mask? This has completely surpassed the entire common understanding of the Demon Realm!

The changes happened too fast, the demonic flies that scattered did not flee to the distance, but they quickly wrapped around Obsidian. Before Obsidian could gather his strength, the flies had returned to the human form and held Obsidian from behind.

Obsidian caught a glimpse of the God-Eating Mask on Chen Rui. When he was about to instinctively act whilst in horror, he sensed a danger in front of him. However, he was unable to dodge due to his body being held and the poison’s numbness. The lightning-like slash pierced through his heart.

The speed and power of this sword were very strong. Not only Obsidian, even the body of Chen Rui, who was holding him from behind, was also penetrated.

Obsidian looked at the hilt in his heart with an incredible face. This hilt was covered with delicate and fine patterns. The tail was a purple gemstone. The quillons outside were 2 back-to-back angel shapes. The sword completely pierced through his heart.

“Sword of Fallen Angel!” Obsidian roared wildly, and the distant Shea also had a look of horror. When Chen Rui launched [Star Explosion], the Sword of Fallen Angel was already out of the control of her will. In the split second when Chen Rui sneak attacked, turned into demonic flies, and restrained Obsidian,the Sword of Fallen Angel pierced through both of them.

Obsidian felt that his soul was splitting and disintegrating rapidly. The power of the whole body declined sharply as if the power in his flesh and blood was absorbed by this terrifying sword. He could not help being frightened– [Soul Searing]! The special power of the Sword of Fallen Angel!

“Chen Rui!” Shea screamed heartbreakingly as she furiously rushed toward this side, the newly-born flame giants who were blocking the front were chopped into several segments by her burst of power.

“Don’t come here!” Chen Rui shouted loudly. The huge vines appeared on the ground, tightly holding the 2 people who were penetrated.

“Chen Rui? That… human financial officer!” Obsidian’s soul power was quickly disintegrated by [Soul Searing]. He was trying his best to resist the power of the Sword of Fallen Angel. When he heard this sentence, his nerves that had almost been numb from the shock raged again, “Who are you?!”

“It doesn’t matter who I am, Obsidian. You have already lost.”

“I’m the master of the Fallen Angel Empire, how could I lose to you rebels!” Obsidian gritted his teeth and burst into power. The vines outside shattered one after another. Chen Rui’s facial features were bleeding, and there were also cracks on the armor of [Royal Star Transformation], but he still restrained Obsidian tenaciously.

“The winner becomes the ruler, and the loser surrenders. Do you even have the courage to admit this?”

“Thanks to the fundraising money you have raised so hard, most of the funds for the development of the Dark Moon, including the current weapons and equipment, come from this huge sum of money.”

“Josh is my people, and so is Sicali… The 4 largest estates are out of your control long ago.”

“…”

These words were like a series of heavy punches, almost making Obsidian’s mind collapse. He had understood a lot in an instant.

This man should be the most critical person for what the Dark Moon is today.

Since the human “Chen Rui” appeared in the Dark Moon, it has not been more than 3 years; just a short time of 3 years!

This was an enormous plan that had experienced countless twists and turns. It made him, the regent king, step by step walked into a well-designed trap. Now, whether he was a human, Beelzebub, or rebel, these were not important anymore.

“With your wisdom and ability, why did you choose the Dark Moon? No matter what, she can’t compare with me!” Obsidian yelled hysterically, “Why do you work so hard for the Dark Moon?! I can give you 10 times and 100 times better than what Shea can give you! Whether it is beauty, power or wealth!”

Chen Rui burst all his power to control the frantically struggling Obsidian. His ears and nose were already bleeding from the violent force, and he shouted angrily, “Foolish woman! If you don’t want me to die now, just stand there and don’t move!”

This sentence was for Shea who was rushing over. Her hand holding the hilt was bleeding due to her own turbulent power, but she obediently didn’t get closer.

Princess Royal Highness’s usual cold and icy face was full of tears as she tried to control her trembling body. There was a kind of pain that couldn’t be expressed in words in her purple eyes.

This kind of gaze and emotion was definitely not something that a political marriage could have.

Obsidian suddenly understood something, and there was an unprecedented strong unwillingness in his heart- Just for this absurd reason? Just for this damn woman, for the unnecessary and ridiculous feelings, this amazingly talented man can help her at all costs to subvert an empire!

It’s too ridiculous!

In fact, there were many hidden stories in it. The story was not like this at the beginning, but as many plots slowly developed and changed slowly until now, this was really the case.

No matter how ridiculous, it had happened, and it was nearing the end.

“Don’t be happy too early! You will die before me!” Obsidian gritted his teeth and said. Shea dares not come close now. Chen Rui must be afraid that I have the strength to perish together, so he is afraid of hurting his own woman. But this human seems to have forgotten one thing, which is strength. This human is inferior to me, and he will definitely be the first to be unable to withstand the effect of [Soul Searing] and be annihilated. At that time, I will break free, and then try my best to kill Shea which is currently the only hope to claim victory.

Whether in terms of physique, strength or endurance, this human is not my opponent!

The final victory belongs to me, Obsidian. Lucifer!

Chen Rui didn’t talk nonsense. He just confined Obsidian’s body with all his strength.

Over time, Obsidian found that something was wrong. Instead of weakening due to the [Soul Searing], the opponent’s restraining force became stronger and stronger, but Obsidian couldn’t stand it anymore. Most of his soul power was lost, and the poison also began to spread all over his body. He couldn’t help being shocked.

“Impossible! You are not affected by the [Soul Searing] at all?! Not to mention the [Body of Light Blessing] of the human royal family, even Demi-God, it’s impossible to be immuned…”

Obsidian suddenly thought of an impossible possibility, and a cold sweat suddenly broke out.

Before this battle, he would never have such absurd assumptions. However, there were too many unimaginable “accidents” happening today. The most impossible thing had the highest possibility!

Only 1 kind of person will not be affected by the [Soul Searing]!

The owner who is recognized by the Sword of Fallen Angel!

Did Chen Rui finally finish cracking the Sword of Fallen Angel? Is this the end of Obsidian?

chapters.title: Chapter 549 - Victory
chapters.body:
Chapter 549 - Victory

Chapter 549: Victory

In an instant, Obsidian suddenly had a realization: If this hypothesis is true, then this seemingly lose-lose situation is actually a trap! Chen Rui just suffered an ordinary sword wound, and the power lost in my body will continue to supplement and strengthen the Sword of Fallen of Angel’s owner, so Chen Rui’s strength not only has not weakened, but he is getting stronger and stronger. I even wanted to use the prolonged battle in exchange for the last hope, but it is tantamount to taking the initiative to plunge into the other party’s trick!

Isn’t the Sword of Fallen Angel in Shea’s hands all the time? Judging from Shea’s distance and reaction just now, she should not be the one controlling this slash of “perishing together”!

This must be [Sword Control]! Another feature of the Sword of Fallen Angel!

A deep powerlessness surged in Obsidian’s heart. His soul was on the verge of dissipating, and his mind began to blur, “Are you really the Sword of Fallen Angel…”

Not only the Sword of Fallen Angel, but also the God-Eating Mask, and the shield… What kind of enemy is he?

A dilapidated Dark Moon Estate can actually become an existence that can compete with the entire empire…

I used the power of the entire empire to crusade, and I ended up like this. The empire that originally belonged to me is about to change hands… This battle will be recorded in the history of the Demon Realm, and the name Obsidian. Lucifer will become a shameful failure.

Not willing!

“Let’s die together!” Obsidian roared wildly. The originally extremely thin territory suddenly disappeared, and a strong light burst out of his dim eyes.

Chen Rui was taken aback. A transparent protective shield appeared around him and Obsidian.

The soldiers in the battlefield below saw that all the flames in the sky disappeared. Obsidian, Shea and “Aguile” appeared again. The Sword of Fallen Angel was inserted into Obsidian’s chest and penetrated “Aguile” who was behind him. Obviously, Princess Royal made the most deadly blow with the artifact.

In the next blink of an eye, Regent Obsidian’s body suddenly exploded, and Princess Royal Shea was shocked by the force of the explosion and fell to the ground.

Despite the isolation of the protective shield, the power of the explosion was too strong. Shea suffered more severe wounds in addition to the original ones, but she didn’t seem to realize the pain at all. She flew into the air frantically and saw that the 2 figures had disappeared; only the Sword of Fallen Angel flickering with a faint light was floating in the air.

Shea felt that her heart was falling into an abyss, and there was no joy of winning anymore. She couldn’t even hear any extra sounds as if everything had lost its meaning.

At the same time, her biggest enemy was annihilated. After this enemy dissipated, she had become the biggest winner, but if all this could be replayed, she would rather become the loser.

In the choice between empire and “him”, Shea, who had always made fulfilling his father’s last wish as the only goal in her life, chose the latter for the first time without hesitation. Isabella, who had her arms around Olypheus at the back of the little black horse, was equally stunned. Her gaze behind the blood-stained veil was fixed at the sky, and a faint dead gray appeared in her blue eyes.

The direction of the explosion suddenly showed colorful lights that recondensed into that dazzling figure, but the broken armor had become translucent, and there was a faint sign of disappearance.

Shea’s and Isabella’s eyes lit up at the same time. Shea didn’t care about everyone’s gaze, and she hugged the “resurrected” man tightly. She felt that everything in the world had been resurrected and life was full of vitality again- Except for the villain who had truly been annihilated.

“I’m fine… now raise the sword…” A tired voice whispered in Shea’s ear.

Although Chen Rui wanted to lie in her arms longer, he knew that it was not the time.

The Sword of Fallen Angel flew into Shea’s hands automatically. Shea didn’t ask any further. She held Chen Rui in 1 hand and raised the sword high in the other. The artifact glowed brightly, covering the entire battlefield.

There was no need for extra language or threats. It started with the sound of the first weapon falling to the ground. Immediately afterward, it seemed to be contagious. The sound of dropping weapons quickly sounded in the battlefield, even Obsidian’s royal legion of the central army was no exception.

In the mountain faraway.

A huge vortex suddenly appeared out of thin air, and several figures flew out.

The leader was Stiller. His initial old face looked even more haggard. He was surrounded by Disjaro, Baroco and others. These Demon Overlords of the capital army were all seriously injured, especially the Dragon Rider Legion Commander Salgar who was almost dying. Fortunately, there were no deaths.

Just now, Stiller activated the life-burning power to make an opening by gathering everyone’s power, and they escaped from that strange battlefield.

This battle was too frustrating. Fortunately, Salgar fought all-out and worked with Baroco to destroy the undead Pegasus. Then, while the rest of the people entangled Paglio and others, Stiller made a crack and led everyone to escape.

Although the opponent lost 1 person, the price paid by Stiller was also quite high. Almost everyone’s combat power had plunged to the minimum. They were unable to defeat the enemy poison dragon and emerald dragon in this state. The poison dragon must have caught up, and now there was only one way to escape.

“Wait! What is that?” Disjaro exclaimed.

Stiller and others also saw the light in the middle of the field in the distance. With everyone’s eyesight, they could naturally see what the Princess Royal was raising something. On the ground below, almost everyone bowed their heads and knelt on one knee.

There was no Regent Obsidian, no resistance: The overall situation was set.

There were sudden strong fluctuations behind them. Stiller turned his head and saw Paglio and Krobelus appearing in the air. Then, the poison dragon’s grinning voice sounded, “Little girl, don’t be nervous. It’s obvious that our battle is over.”

The Demon Overlords looked at each other. Stiller, who was called the little girl, smiled bitterly. Finally, she retrieved her power and slowly flew toward the battlefield.

At this time, the space in the center of the battlefield began to distort with ripples. A slit opened, and 2 haggard figures flew out slantingly.

One was a burly bald man who was wearing a nearly naked beggar costume with purple and green electric sparks on his body. He was shivering from time to time. There was another female whose clothing was more intact. Her initially delicate face was swollen and pale. In particular, her hands hung softly like they were dislocated. There were 3 strange diamond marks on the woman’s forehead which were exactly the same as Olypheus’.

As soon as she came out of the space, she seemed to sense something. Regardless of the haggardness, she looked in surprise in the direction of the little black horse where Isabella was holding the sleeping Olypheus in her arms.

“That girl…”

Before the woman had finished speaking, a cold snort came in the air, and a beautiful woman with glasses suddenly appeared.

At the same time, a huge figure appeared above the woman. It was a translucent giant. It knocked down the woman in the air with a punch. After landing, it stomped down fiercely, 1 stomp, 2 stomps… The ground was shaking constantly. Soon, a huge human-shaped pit appeared. Just as the bald man wanted to stop the giant, the beautiful woman in glasses pointed the magic wand in his hand, and the electric sparks on the bald man began to turn into an electric arc. “Buzz buzz…” A smell of burnt flesh spread out. The few Demon Overlords who were flying over were frightened.

Too violent! Too terrifying! Simply domineering!

Everyone understood why the giant dragon called this beautiful woman with glasses as “madwoman” previously, but no one dared to say anything.

The giant dragon and black dragon of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord were stomped flat like cookies. The blue dragon who was born to control wind elements, was actually baked into coke by the [Thunder] technique. This is out of the normal scope of magic and “normal people”… Uh, It is also out of the scope of normal dragons! Who still dares to provoke her?

The one who had the deepest feeling was Master Poison Dragon. The self-satisfaction of “1 vs 7” (self-assumption) had long since disappeared. He struggled to swallow the next sentence in his mind- If it weren’t for a human who sacrificed himself to get this madwoman, I’m afraid that my ending will be 100 times more miserable than the 2 dragons. Fortunately, fortunately!

After a while, the giant and the arc disappeared. The cold voice of the beauty with glasses sounded, “If you dare to talk, don’t even think about leaving. I just happen to be looking for 2 experiment subjects.”

The blue dragon Daniel nodded desperately like a chicken pecking at rice. He barely came to the human-shaped pit below to get the black dragon Julia out. Julia, who was almost stepped on into a human cookie, originally struggled to say something, but Daniel covered her mouth. The blue dragon didn’t dare to turn his head and flew away.

The 7 Demon Overlords of the capital coalition army looked at each other and finally bowed in the brilliance of the Sword of Fallen Angel. The artifact that had always refused to recognize Obsidian had chosen Shea. Then the empire’s empress was about to be born. They not only surrendered to the artifact owner and the empire’s system, but they also surrendered to the power that Shea had on hand.

Shea’s firm voice echoed on the battlefield, “The usurper has been eliminated under the will of the artifact, and the empire is about to usher in a new life. I, Shea. Lucifer, swears in the name of the artifact to forgive all Obsidian followers who have been deceived. I will lead you and the entire Fallen Angel Empire toward true prosperity and strength!”

The soldiers stood up cheering. Shea’s oath of letting go of the past made these people feel relieved. The power and splendor of the Dark Moon that was evident to everyone made the lords and soldiers believe that the entire Fallen Angel Empire would embark on the road to prosperity under Shea’s ruling.

Driven by Josh and some intentional people, the slogan “Long live the Empress” was chanted. Although there was no official coronation, Shea was already the undisputed ruler of the Fallen Angel Empire in the hearts of the soldiers.

The light of the Sword of Fallen Angel gradually disappeared. Shea held Chen Rui and landed to the ground, then the Sword of Fallen Angel disappeared suddenly as Shea put it away by some secret method. Chen Rui who removed the [Royal Star Transformation] had no time and energy to explain. Holding his heavy eyelids, he glanced at Shea, and Shea nodded slightly. The tacit understanding needed no word.

The little black horse ran over and touched Chen Rui affectionately with its face. Chen Rui touched its head. Isabella, who was holding Olypheus, stood not far away and watched quietly, but she did not approach him. Chen Rui felt the faint gentle gaze, and he seemed to want to approach her, but the fairy dragon Zola had appeared next to Chen Rui. She held his arm, and both of them disappeared with a space fluctuation.

At this time, a vague voice nearby sounded, “Damn! Which bastard stabbed my ass while I was asleep? If I find out…”

“Smack!” There was already a severe knock on his head, and a master was about to turn around and yell. Seeing that it was his madam aunty with a fierce expression, he quickly shut his mouth obediently.

If I find out, he will get another stab 🤣. I can bet Zola can 1v all of the capital army + Obsidian, she is just too op. Is Olypheus someone important of the Dragon Island? Why is Julia so surprised to see Olypheus?

chapters.title: Chapter 550 - Wake Up
chapters.body:
Chapter 550 - Wake Up

Chapter 550: Wake Up

Chen Rui opened his eyes in a daze, and he seemed to have a sweet dream just now.

A long and wonderful dream.
