In the dream, as a male protagonist, he was surrounded by women and kept having sex. He kept exchanged into different sex positions which were pleasurable experiences.

At first, it was the female general, then the little maid, then another was Ms. Fake Daze. From time to time, it was replaced by someone’s madam aunty and the future Her Majesty Empress, and even the noble lady Her Majesty Empress.

This kind of crystal harem of happiness and sexual blessing was simply the biggest dream of every otaku. Even if he became a Demon God, he would not give up on it.

The scene in the room gradually became clearer, then he felt soreness in his limbs. He saw a beautiful body lying on his left and right sides. Athena with short red hair lying on his chest on the left side. He could imagine that beautiful and peaceful face through her even breathing, and her slightly tanned skin exuded seductive elasticity and heat.

On the right was a purple-haired Zola. Her regular equipment glasses had been removed. Her exquisite and perfect face was blushed. Her lying position made her cleavage look even deeper. Chen Rui swallowed seeing this. It was difficult to associate this beautiful woman who made all men’s heartbeats accelerate with the violent person who ravaged the giant dragon.

Chen Rui recognized that this place was the Rainbow Valley’s Zola’s bedroom. The scent of lust in the bedroom had not completely dissipated fully explained the passionate lingering that occurred previously.

It turns out that the hugging on both sides in the dream is real! At least, Athena and Zola are real. Kia may also have a share, but the madam empress and Ms. Secret Intelligence are really a dream.

Wait! Zola and Athena? This can be regarded as a welfare day when the Mid-Autumn Festival and the National Day come at the same time. Ms. Fairy Dragon is generally used to enjoying alone and rarely accompanies me with other people like this. It’s the little maid who likes to join in for a threesome.

In terms of relationship, Zola and Athena are the closest, followed by Yini and Betty. When Zola first came to the Dark Moon, Zola almost left aggrieved. It was Athena who persuaded her to come back. The 2 are close sisters, Um… They do look alike. Both sisters have a very plump chest…

Chen Rui put his arms around his 2 beloved women. There was a strong sense of accomplishment in his heart, and this accomplishment far exceeded even the feeling of overthrowing Obsidian. He was suddenly very grateful for the crossover arranged by the Space-Time Administration. If he hadn’t come to this world, he would still be an ineffective and unaccomplished otaku on Earth. How could there be such a wonderful life? At the same time, he would like to thank the Demon Realm custom of sexual blessings, which made otaku’s crystal harem dream come true.

It’s just that the crystal harem is not so easy to build, and it is in danger of being shattered easily at any time. It is the blessing of Demon God and Demon God’s sister that I am able to achieve the scale in the dream. As for the dozens and hundreds of legions in novels or ACG, I dare not even think about it.

In another world, it is said that Yellow Emperor’s had 3,000 concubines, which is simply being worshipped as a god. Even if the legend is true, it varies from person to person. Peng Zu enjoyed sex until 800 years old, Yellow Emperor was ascended to god for having 3,000 concubines. But why did the NBA’s Chamberlain who had sex with 20,000 people died before 70? Some people say that it was the difference between a god and a womanizer, while some people say that their faith was different…

It would be a sin to be thinking of such a “serious” thing when hugging 2 stunning and naked beauties in my arms, right? Chen Rui’s hand that was originally placed on Athena’s waist gradually moved down. The round and elastic buttocks were so fascinating to touch. Athena was habitually in deep sleep beside him. She moved her body and didn’t wake up. Instead, Zola opened her eyes.

Chen Rui hugged Zola close and kissed her delicate cheek. Zola blushed and frowned slightly. It seemed that she was slightly hurt after being pricked by the newly-grown beard, so she gently touched his mouth and lower jaw. A delicate magical power flashed past like a stream of water. The beard had disappeared. It was cleaner than the XXX brand razor. This was the supreme treatment that only Chen Rui could have.

“Now I have become a young pretty boy again,” Chen Rui felt the comfort on his face, and he sighed deliberately when he had received the benefit. “I wanted to look mature.”

Zola stared at him dazedly with a mischievous glance. All of a sudden, a small strange rune popped out of her fingertips. Chen Rui recognized that it was the “aging mark” of the ancient runes. Then Ms. Fairy Dragon sinisterly looked at the man’s erected body part. Chen Rui immediately shuddered and shook his head quickly, “It’s better to be young!”

Ms. Fairy Dragon dissipated the magic and showed a triumphant smile. Chen Rui’s heart was moved with this expression. He gently put down Athena’s body, leaned over, pressed against Zola’s petite body, and kissed her lips heavily.

Zola gasped lightly, responding to his kiss. Her legs clamped his mischievous hand, “Don’t simply move! Is your body fine now?”

“Hehe, of course not. Right now, I’m burning with passion. If my Darling Zola refuses to dedicate her life to rescue me, I will be poisoned to death.” Chen Rui said with a cheeky smile on his face, then he took off his pants to fully reveal his manliness

Zola’s face became more blushed. She took a bite on his lips and pushed him down, “Asshole, I’m serious! Check it out quickly, is there a drop in power? We are all worried about you .”

Athena was awakened by this movement, and she leaned over, “Chen Rui, are you okay?”

“Why would I not be okay?! Now that I spent a few hours rolling on the sheets with you sisters, I still feel refreshed.” Chen Rui held the 2 women on each side. In fact, the biggest wound of his fight with Obsidian was the chest slash, but the [Soul Searing] of the Sword of Fallen Angel couldn’t harm its owner, so it was just an external wound. After Zola’s treatment and the characteristics of [Regeneration], there was no major problem now.

“You slept for 5 whole days. The power fluctuations in your body were very strange yesterday. While taking care of you, Kia and you suddenly…” Athena’s face was red. “Later she couldn’t hold it anymore and called me for help. At the end, when both Zola and I… then only you stopped.”

“Huh?” Chen Rui was a little surprised. Could it be that I was poisoned by some legendary lust poison? I remember that the little maid seduced me first in the dream…

“In fact, Kia saw that your naughty thing was not honest when you were asleep, so she was just a little curious,” Athena tapped on the still dishonest naughty thing, then it became more dishonest. “But for some reasons, you went wild. You are actually so vigorous when you are unconscious…”

“Kia is just curious?” Chen Rui showed suspicion. He knew the temperament of the little maid very well. I’m afraid it was not as simple as “curiosity”. She most probably tried to enjoy by herself secretly, but she goes for wool and comes back shorn. As a result, she awkwardly asked her allies for help.

Chen Rui was also surprised by his own “power”. Could it be that the stronger my comprehension of the Super System, the stronger the ability to have sex? I can even conquer the little charming girl in my dreams?

“That’s not the point,” Zola saw this guy’s wretched look and knew he was not thinking the right things, so he pinched him angrily. “The reason why Kia really called us here is that when you were bullying her, a lot of power flowed into her body. She was worried there would be something wrong with you. Later, Athena and I… are the same. We are all worried about you. Feel it right away, has your power been lost?”

Chen Rui realized this was the case, but his power did not weaken in the slightest, so he thought about it a little. He found out that the energy that was swallowed up to fullness in [Star Devouring] had been reduced by a small amount. Now that his compatibility with the Super System was very high, he immediately understood the reason.

The energy consumed by [Star Devouring] would be automatically absorbed and converted by Star Conversion to strengthen him, but his current level of power had reached a bottleneck. He was in a saturated state and he could no longer absorb the power of Star Conversion, so it overflowed through the channel of [Dual Training] and input it to the person he had sex with.

[Star Devouring] had a lot of great power from the Demi-God, so Chen Rui asked worriedly, “You don’t feel any discomfort, right?”

“No, it is a great benefit instead. Kia is likely to be able to reach the Great Demon King level in a while. Athena can at least break through a small realm. As for me, although my strength cannot be improved temporarily, the benefits are even greater.” Zola shook her head, “Because of this, we worry about whether you have suffered any serious damage that caused the loss of power.”

“I’m okay, really.” Chen Rui looked at the 2 women’s caring look, and he felt warm in his heart, “The power you get is the extra power overflowing from the grand master’s inheritance. It doesn’t have any effect on me. Don’t worry.”

“Don’t worry? You almost blew yourself up with the Obsidian this time,” Zola pouted her lips unhappily, “The amulet that I gave you only has 1 time left.”

“Hehe, speaking of it, thanks to your eagle amulet.” Chen Rui also felt a little scared. He tried his best to use the power of the Sword of Fallen Angel to kill Obsidian, but in the end, Obsidian still had the ability to explode. If it weren’t for Zola’s amulet gift, he might have been destroyed. Even if he didn’t die by fluke, he would definitely need [Regeneration]’s intensive care unit now. How could there be such a wonderful sex life?

The amulet made by Zola was a carefully crafted item using the only self-protection scale on the fairy dragon. It could stimulate protection when his life was at the greatest threat, and it could withstand 2 peak stage Demon Overlords’ attacks at most. After Zola lost this 7-color scale, it would take 100 years to regenerate one.

“It’s a flying dragon amulet!” Zola debated, but to be honest, the “eagle” described by Chen Rui was already beautified. The shape of the amulet was a turkey, but it was full of fairy dragon’s affection. Chen Rui understood this in his heart.

Chen Rui said this deliberately while stroking the smooth jade-like naked back of Ms. Fairy Dragon with a smile, “I can only repay Darling Zola’s kindness with my body. I will use love to transmit the power of inheritance as a return for you.”

“Hmph!” Ms. Fairy Dragon was full of disdain on the surface, but her flushing face betrayed the true thoughts in her heart. The touching shyness made a man’s thoughts go wild.

In fact, every small step in Zola’s current realm was extremely difficult, but Chen Rui’s “transmitted” energy contained a pure power that could only be understood and fully absorbed only at her level which benefited her a lot. It even made it easier for her to reach a certain legendary realm.

(Since this guy has said that there are no side effects, I will reluctantly suffer a loss.)

(Anyway, if I don’t agree, this guy will benefit Athena and the others…)

(Can’t let them just enjoy…)

“What’s the matter with the capital and the Sword of Fallen Angel?” Athena saw Chen Rui affectionately staring at Zola’s beauty. Even though she and Zola were already the best sisters, she couldn’t help being a little jealous, so she immediately asked a question to distract his attention.

Chen Rui was actually very aware of Athena’s mischievous thoughts. Although she is generous, when the close sisters have small conflicts in the crystal harem, it can develop into a very bad situation of harming each other if I don’t handle it properly. Therefore, he immediately tightened the hug of his most beloved madam legion commander to balance the situation, and he replied, “I went to the White Feather Estate at the time and defeated Sicali. After combining with the forces of your father General George, I controlled the capital and brought the Sword of Fallen Angel back. Speaking of the Sword of Fallen Angel, I’m having a headache on how I can explain to Princess Royal?”

“Explain?” Athena bit her lip lightly, “Do you still need to explain to Princess Royal? According to Zola, she hugged you tightly in front of everyone. That scene stunned everyone on the Dark Moon side. This is the Princess Royal Highness of our estate who will not entertain any man. Soon, we will need to call her as Her Majesty Empress.”

“Such a sour tone is not like my Athena. It seems that the little charming girl, Kia has brought a bad influence to you.” Chen Rui slapped her hips, Then, when he pointed in the air, the sword suddenly appeared in the air.

Athena was stunned, “This is… the Sword of Fallen Angel! How could it be…”

“Lucifer Royal Family’s artifact has the surname Chen, just like Demon Shield and God-Eating Mask,” Chen Rui looked a little embarrassed.

Athena was stunned, “In that case, Princess Shea… is not recognized by the artifact at all. Instead you…”

“I didn’t mean it, it was actually a misunderstanding.” Chen Rui scratched his head.

Zola was all right. Isn’t it just the 7 artifacts? My own man can create an artifact… Now it’s just a pseudo-artifact. It will not be surprising if it is a real artifact in the future. Who needs it?!

However, in Athena’s perspective, this was a big deal. Even if the Princess Royal Highness, which was the future Her Majesty Empress, got laid, it was far less serious from stealing an artifact.

The Sword of Fallen Angel was a symbol of the empire. It had to be passed on from generation to generation. The problem was that when the artifact was in Chen Rui’s hands, it was tantamount to be bound. There was no way to return the property to the original owner. If someone knew that Shea’s “inheritance” was actually a scheme, the consequences would be unimaginable.

Athena didn’t care much, and she sat up all of a sudden, “What should we do?”

“Things will work out eventually. Don’t worry about it for now. There are more urgent matters,” Chen Rui was dizzy when Athena’s plump balls swayed left and right after sitting up. He immediately clutched the ball and even reasoned in a high-sounding voice, “I will work harder during this period to promote your strength to the Demon Emperor!”

Athena was pushed down by him while her chest was being assaulted. She immediately struggled. Zola on the side looked a little jealous, but she heard Chen Rui shouted, “Zola, come on, help me hold her!”

Ms. Fairy Dragon inexplicably had the excitement of “participating”. She immediately held Athena down without using magic power. 2 naked beauties entangled together. The lustful scene immediately woke up the beast inside someone.

At this moment, the voice of the little maid who had been eavesdropping outside the door for a long time sounded, “Do you want more help?”

I guess he can only marry Shea with Aguile identity to settle the matter about the Sword of Fallen Angel? He still has more women to comfort…

chapters.title: Chapter 551 - Accepting Surrenderers
chapters.body:
Chapter 551 - Accepting Surrenderers

Chapter 551: Accepting Surrenderers

A ridiculous and intense night passed. Early the next morning, Chen Rui appeared in front of the Dark Moon’s palace.

After Chen Rui left the Dark Moon, Dodo, who returned from the Red Spirit Estate’s war, started to work as his master’s face with ease. Under the command of Delia, he completed some simple tasks of the financial officer. The main reason no flaws were revealed was because everyone’s attention was focused on the battle between the Dark Moon Army and the capital army on the front line the other day, so a large number of merchants were evacuated. There was not much work to do.

The victory of the Dark Moon inspired everyone. Everyone knew that after the former Regent Obsidian was beheaded by the Sword of Fallen Angel, Princess Royal Shea was already the master of the Fallen Angel Empire. Moving from the Dark Moon to the capital to be enthroned as an empress was only a matter of time. The Dark Moon, as the foundation of Empress Shea’s rise, would definitely receive a lot of care and preferential treatment.

The issue of the estate’s successor also attracted equal attention. The Dark Moon was now the richest estate in the empire. If one could become the lord, the benefits were needless to say. Some promising successors were eyeing this position and making a move in front of Shea from time to time in the hope to be trusted by Her Majesty Empress in the future; the Dark Moon noble families were also paying close attention. A change of ruler would bring a change of ministers. No one wanted to lose their power and status. Meanwhile, the residents were concerned about their own livelihood. Shea’s prestige in the Dark Moon was extremely high. The Dark Moon had also gone through difficulties under her rule and ushered in the current prosperity and strength. The residents hoped that the new lord could continue the prosperity of the Dark Moon.

But for now, Shea did not go to the capital to be enthroned. She was still the lord of the Dark Moon, so this attention and moves were all done in secret. As Shea’s most trusted human financial officer, the famous internal minister of the Demon Realm would also probably be the future financial minister of the empire. During Chen Rui’s sleep, Dodo, who was acting as a substitute, received many invitations and friendly gestures. He had obviously become a popular person by virtue of Shea’s success.

The guards of the Dark Moon palace undergo major changes. In addition to the original Red Blood Legion, there were also some imperial guards brought by Obsidian from the capital. This was more of an attitude that Shea had shown to the capital army that had already surrendered.

Chen Rui did not see Shea immediately as before. Instead, he waited for about an hour in the council hall before he saw the future ruler of the empire.

Shea’s face was a little tired, but her eyes were faintly dazzling. Behind her was the magician Stiller who was at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Chen Rui could tell that Shea had now recovered from her injuries. Her Demon Overlord power was very stable now; the faintly exuded territory power was also quite solid. By right, it would take at least a few months to reach this level. Shea did not have the training ground function provided by the Super System. It was a miracle that she was able to stabilize the newly acquire realm so quickly.

In fact, these days, several Demon Overlords of the capital such as Stiller had been using their power to help her heal and realize the realm. Her Majesty Empress’ treatment was far from what the Princess Royal Highness could compare to before. In addition to enhancing the strength of the empress, the capital’s Demon Overlords did this to express their loyalty on behalf of the elder families and royal families.

“Your Highness.” Chen Rui still had to act in front of Stiller.

“Chen Rui, come and meet Madam Stiller. Dans, the top magician of the capital’s elder families.” After all, Shea hadn’t ascended the throne yet, so she used a respectful name for Stiller.

“Madam Stiller.” Chen Rui bowed to Stiller.

Stiller was also a little curious about this human who was known in the Demon Realm for his internal affairs. She nodded in return.

Shea said, “Madam Stiller, you have been working hard these days. Take a rest first.”

“Okay, Your Highness’ Demon Overlord realm is almost completely stabilized, and it will be much smoother to break through to the intermediate stage in the future. Please don’t forget to seize the moment to realize it.” Stiller knew that Chen Rui was the initial core member of the Dark Moon team, so Shea must have something to discuss with him. Therefore, she bowed slightly and left.

After Stiller left, Chen Rui was about to explain about the Sword of Fallen Angel. Shea turned her back against him and walked out, “Follow me.”

Both of them kept walking into the depths of the palace. However, it was not to go to the bedroom as someone’s wretched wish, but it was the secret prison. This time, it was not having an affair in the secret prison, but for the important prisoners inside.

There were 3 prisoners in the secret prison, Sarandi, Gerant, and Rometty.

Sarandi was a member of the Lucifer Royal Family, the peak stage of the Demon Overlord and the Lord of Midnight Sun’s only descendant apprentice. He once ambushed the Dark Moon’s Dark Demon and almost destroyed the entire intel department. He even attempted to capture Chen Rui, the human financial officer, but he was later captured by the poison dragon Paglio.

Gerant was the third general of the empire, the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor and an excellent commander with outstanding ability promoted by Obsidian personally. It was just that Obsidian did not have the magnanimity to use him despite knowing he was talented. Gerant had been a victim of jealousy. Then, he proposed an ambush on the western part of the Dark Moon. Unfortunately, the biggest spy, Josh, divulged the news, and Gerant encountered Athena, Loki, and the taurens’ ambush which resulted in his capture.

Rometty was the legion commander of the Flying Cloud Legion at the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. He was excellent at archery and air combat. When he was following Pallor to ambush Town Dico, he chased down the Dark Moon with the First Coalition Legion. In the end, he was ambushed and captured by Krobelus.

Although Shea had the unquestionable right of succession to the empire, even if she became the empress, she would definitely encounter all kinds of resistance and difficulties. This was especially true for the issues of loyalty and the right to speak. She must establish her own team as soon as possible. These 3 people were very remarkable talents. Whether in strength, ability, or influence in the empire and the army, they were quite outstanding. If they truly surrender, they would definitely become the arms of Shea to rule the Fallen Angel Empire.

“Uncle Sarandi.” Shea came to Sarandi’s cell, “I think we can honor the gambling agreement in advance.”

Sarandi had been secretly taking care of the Dark Moon and protecting Grimm and his daughter. It was only out of the overall situation of the empire that he attacked the Dark Moon. At the beginning, he had a gambling agreement with Shea. If Shea defeated Obsidian within 10 years, Sarandi would surrender unconditionally. Otherwise, Shea would put the capital’s interests first and surrender to the capital.

“Princess Shea!” Sarandi stood up. These days, he had learned from Rometty and Gerant about the Obsidian’s crusade against the Dark Moon. Of course, he only heard about the defeats in several battles including the battle of the Moonlight Fortress, the battle of Town Dico, and Gerant’s ambush on the Walan Fortress. He did not know about the decisive battle of Leith Wilderness.

Just at this time, there was an immense chill in the secret prison.

Sarandi, Gerant and Rometty were all shocked as they looked at the sword floating in front of Shea. They blurted out in unison, “The Sword of Fallen Angel!”

All 3 of them knew that Obsidian had not been recognized by this highest artifact for 300 years. He had to try it out at the secret vault every once in a while. Now this sword that rejected Obsidian had appeared next to Shea, and it looked like it had actually recognized this granddaughter of Lord of Midnight Sun already!

Gerant reacted first and asked, “Princess Royal Highness, I want to know if Royal Highness Obsidian has lost?”

Shea nodded and said, “He has died under the sanctions of the artifact, and the capital army has surrendered.”

Gerant was shocked. As he thought of many things, stormy waves surged in his heart. If Obsidian died under the artifact, then the artifact must have reached Shea’s hands first. Then the capital is also…

Sarandi’s eyes showed a strong expression. He finally understood the meaning of Shea’s words when she came in. His face was surprised and emotional.

With relief and various expressions crossed over his face. He slowly knelt down on one knee, “I, Sarandi. Lucifer swears before the artifact, I wish to be the long sword in the hands of Her Majesty Empress and kill all enemies on the road ahead regardless of honor or disgrace! Life or death!”

Sarandi did not use the title of “Your Highness”, but “Your Majesty”. He had already shown his attitude and determination apparently. Chen Rui hurriedly stepped forward to unlock the secret prison. Sarandi still didn’t get up and maintained his kneeling position.

“Sarandi. Lucifer, your bravery and loyalty will be the most important pillar of the prosperity of the empire.” Shea gently put the Sword of Fallen Angel on Sarandi’s shoulders, only then Sarandi stood up.

It was an official vow just now. Shea added, “Uncle Sarandi, please give me your support help from now on.”

Chen Rui smiled and saluted Sarandi. Sarandi nodded in return and bowed to Shea.

Although the title had changed back to Your Highness, everyone had a tacit understanding. In addition to General George, Shea now had another important subordinate. He was not a simple supporter, but a loyalist.

Sarandi said to Gerant and Rometty, “Princess Shea has defeated Obsidian and became the true master of the empire. You are both sensible people. We have discussed enough these days. There is no need to say more, right?”

Rometty took the lead in allegiance. Gerant thought for a moment, and he said, “I wish to clear 2 doubts that I have.”

“Please speak.” Shea nodded and motioned Chen Rui to release Rometty.

“The first question is what method did Your Highness use to control the capital before the decisive battle? The second question, why did Josh become Your Highness’ spy?”

Shea glanced at Chen Rui, and Chen Rui immediately said, “General Gerant is quick-minded and admirable. The capital was indeed conquered before the decisive battle. It was the deputy legion commander of the Red Blood Legion, the fiance of Her Highness, General Aguile, who went to the White Feather Estate and persuaded Lord Sicali to join forces with General George. After receiving the support of the elder families and the guarding royal families, they took control of the capital.”

“Aguile? I didn’t expect that there is such a character in the Dark Moon.” Gerant naturally knew Sicali’s personality that would not be easily persuaded, but he didn’t ask too much. He just sighed, “It’s a pity that I didn’t meet him on the battlefield.”

Chen Rui smiled slightly and continued to answer, “As for the Red Spirit Estate’s Lord Josh, after the last defeat of the war of lords, he had secretly surrendered to the Princess Royal Highness. We are considered serving our respective masters this time. I hope general doesn’t put this into your mind.”

In fact, Chen Rui still retained a lot of details. Josh did a great job this time. In addition to promptly delivering the intel to make the Dark Moon take advantage everywhere, he also influenced Obsidian in making some crucial decisions as well as using Obsidian’s suspicion to get rid of several important figures in the coalition army. Otherwise, the Dark Moon would face even greater pressure in the decisive battle. Not only that, Josh also used his identity as a military supplies officer to apply some potion on the food before the decisive battle. This kind of potion was not poisonous. It would only be triggered under an intense exercise to increase the body load and accelerate fatigue. It was also the real reason why the capital coalition army was the first to weaken in the fierce battle. Due to the strict inspection and supervision of poisoning in the army, only Josh’s identity and only this kind of potion could be used on the coalition army without revealing a trace.

Gerant smiled bitterly, “It turns out that after the war of lords, the Blue Lava Estate and Red Spirit Estate were both controlled by Princess Royal Highness. The cooperation with the spies deceived everyone. I willingly admit my defeat.”

“General can rest assured that Princess Shea and Prince Obsidian are different types of leaders. Even a powerless human like me can be valued and become a financial officer. General can surely unleash your talents under Princess Royal as long as you pledge loyalty. Don’t worry about the rest.”

Gerant thought of what happened to him under Obsidian in the past, and he slowly nodded. He realized that Chen Rui was giving him the opportunity to extricate himself from the awkward situation, but he did not agree. He asked, “Princess Shea, my Saber-toothed Tiger Legion still has 2,300 captives in the hands of General Athena, and the Flying Cloud Legion should have nearly 3,000 riders in captives. I would like to ask Your Majesty to release these soldiers back to me. Then, I will rush back to my Tekula Fortress with General Rometty. I wonder if it is possible for Your Highness to promise this?”

Gerant’s request was a bit too much. He wanted his most loyal 5,000 troops and Rometty, the surrendered general, back to his old base, Tekula Fortress. Even Sarandi frowned when he heard it.

Shea did not immediately refuse, but instead, she asked, “You are worried about the invasion of the Dark Shadow Empire?”

Gerant showed a hint of admiration and simply replied, “Prevention is better than cure. The closest allies are probably the most ferocious enemies.”

Shea immediately made a decision, “You and Rometty can freely recruit suitable soldiers or generals from soldiers of the capital crusade. There is no limit to the number of soldiers. The sooner you can set off, the better.”

Gerant’s gaze moved slightly, “Freely recruit? Your Highness will not appoint an assistant general to go with me?”

The so-called assistant was actually a military supervisor who monitor the army. Chen Rui smiled and shook his head at this time, “General Gerant, I think you underestimated Princess Shea’s courage and magnanimity.”

Gerant glanced at Shea with an unwavering gaze, and he nodded slightly, “Sir Chen Rui, you are right, Princess Shea and Royal Highness Obsidian are indeed different. Then, Princess Shea, I suggest you settle the Dark Moon’s matters immediately and rush to the capital as soon as possible in order to let General George return to the Warlock Fortress as soon as possible. The same is true for the Walan Fortress at the west of the Dark Moon. The Walan Fortress must reinforce their barriers and defenses.”

“I understand. I have been making such arrangements these days. As for the issue of defense, you will write a detailed proposal to me later.” Shea paused and said, “In the battle inside the capital city, General Doren and the Red Devil Legion were completely annihilated. General Gerant, I hope you can shoulder the honor and responsibility of the second general.”

Gerant took a deep breath and gave a standard military salute, “Gerant. Brian is willing to do his best for Your Majesty Shea!”

Sarandi took a deep look at Gerant, and he said to Shea, “Your Highness, you seem to trust people too easily. Haven’t you been betrayed before?”

He did not hide this sentence from Gerant and Rometty. Shea lowered her gaze slightly, “Yes.”

“But there are more people who really serve with their lives.” Chen Rui added in time. Shea didn’t look at Chen Rui, but warmth and firmness appeared in her gaze when she looked up.

“It’s just like the Lord of Midnight Sun.” Gerant added a sentence that made Sarandi and others’ eyes light up.

Now is the weakest moment of the Fallen Angel Empire, will the other empire or organization like Bloodfall seize this opportunity to cause chaos?

chapters.title: Chapter 552 - Explanation
chapters.body:
Chapter 552 - Explanation

Chapter 552: Explanation

After properly arranging the Sarandi and the rest, Chen Rui followed Shea all the way to the bath in the depths of the palace, and they entered the underground secret room that only belonged to the 2 of them.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, everything in the secret room had been cleared. There were no wind chimes, mirrors, and so on.

It was only a matter of time before Shea moved to the capital. In order to prevent anyone from discovering the secrets here, it must be cleaned up, but it seemed to be a bit early.

Shea turned around and looked at him quietly, “Don’t you have something to tell me?”

“First, I must explain about the Sword of Fallen Angel to you.” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “This was an accident. I’m really sorry.”

When Chen Rui was in the capital, he only used some unique runes to stimulate the reaction of the ancient runes, creating the illusion that the Sword of Fallen Angel was responding, but in fact, the seal of the ancient runes on the Sword of Fallen Angel still strongly rejected Chen Rui. If it was Shea, she would be rejected like Obsidian. This sword was the most important item to destroy the morale of the capital coalition army, so Chen Rui had been using [Deep Analysis] to crack the ancient runes. When he was riding the little black horse to rush toward the war in the wilderness, he was training in the training ground of the Super System while using [Deep Analysis] to crack the seal of ancient runes on the Sword of Fallen Angel.

However, things went wrong. The seal of ancient runes was stronger than expected, so the [Deep Analysis] automatically acted on the Sword of Fallen Angel itself. Before the seal of ancient runes was unlocked, the Sword of Fallen Angel had already carried the surname of Chen. (Meaning belonging to Chen Rui)

This mistake made Chen Rui want to cry without tears. Fortunately, after becoming the master of the Sword of Fallen Angel, using its own [Soul Searing ] attribute, he finally broke the seal from the inside out.

There were 3 attributes of the Sword of Fallen Angel.

[Sword Control] – Double the damage. The sword can be controlled within the effective range away from the body to launch various attacks.

[Soul Searing] – After stabbing an enemy, it will directly kill and disintegrate the enemy’s soul power. It will turn the devoured flesh and blood into the user’s power.

[Blazing Wing]- Fully immune to light element and dark element attacks within the effective time. Limited to one activation per hour.

Compared with the God-Eating Mask, the Sword of Fallen Angel’s attack characteristics were more powerful. [Sword Control] was somewhat similar to the methods of Xianxia in Chen Rui’s memory. It also had the effect of doubling the damage; [Sould Searing] could not only annihilate the soul, and it also had the “lifesteal” function; As for [Blazing Wing], in some specific battles, it would exert unexpected miraculous effects.

According to Tetenis, the Sword of Fallen Angel or God-Eating Mask alone was only a pseudo-artifact. Chen Rui already had 2.5 quasi-artifacts, but when equipped at the same time, there was no suit buff like when he was playing games previously. It seemed to be like what the old man said, they would only become real artifacts when the 7 pieces were together.

Chen Rui had no special desire to collect artifacts. Getting the Sword of Fallen Angel accidentally already caused him a headache. The analyzed 7 artifacts could not be used without him. Furthermore, the Sword of Fallen Angel was different from the God-Eating Mask or Illusive Demon Shield as it was related to Shea’s ruling of the Fallen Angel Empire!

“That’s what happened…” Chen Rui forcibly explained for a while, “After I fully obtain the inheritance of the grand master, I will definitely be able to solve this matter.”

[Deep Analysis] was the function of the Super System. As long as he could thoroughly master the Super System one day, then he should be able to “unbind” these things.

The insights along the way had been quite rewarding. In the process of fusion of the mind and the Super System, Chen Rui’s Phecda’s Experience Value had continued to rise, and now it had reached 100%. As long as there was an opportunity, he would be able to break through to the next level of “Merak”.

Perhaps due to the precedent of the God-Eating Mask, Shea’s reaction was very calm. She was not surprised or blaming him, but she asked indifferently, “Do you want power?”

Chen Rui trembled slightly. Seeing the ice-like calmness in Shea’s purple eyes, he couldn’t help feeling very uncomfortable for some reason.

Shea only said this sentence, but Chen Rui knew what she meant. The economic scale of the Dark Moon was actually founded by Chen Rui. The Cloak Gang controlled by him had completely controlled the order of the Dark Moon. The wyvern legion, taurens, and medusas actually obeyed only Chen Rui’s orders, not including the powerful earth elementals and several dragons. Now Chen Rui had become the master of the Sword of Fallen Angel. Except for the Blue Lava Estate, the lords of the White Feather Estate and Red Spirit Estate were his servants. If he had the desire for power, it was not difficult to subvert the empire again or use that magical [Transformation] to justifiably pull Shea from the throne and use the identity of a Lucifer Royal Family to control the empire. Anyway, he was recognized by the artifact which was the most undoubted “identity card”.

As a person in power, the greatest taboo was the subordinates being more powerful than the master. In particular, Chen Rui now controlled the 3 estates, grasping the “lifeblood” of the empire. From the perspective of “Shea the Great”, he was one of the biggest threats.

Casting someone aside after the person had served her purpose was common in the history of this world or the human world. Now that the Dark Moon had developed and Obsidian had been eliminated, it was time for Chen Rui to cast her aside.

Is it so?

A faint chilling intent appeared in Chen Rui’s eyes as he walked toward Shea who looked at him motionlessly.

Chen Rui stretched out his claw-shaped hands and he reached toward Shea’s throat.

Shea didn’t move.

Chen Rui lifted his hand, grabbed both sides of Shea’s face, and squeezed hard. The cold beauty’s face suddenly changed, and it looked funny.

Then, he kneaded, squeezed… making that beautiful face constantly deformed.

Shea couldn’t bear it. She bit the back of his hand with one bite, leaving 2 crescent moons behind.

Chen Rui started to fight back, biting… and kissing her neck. He sucked hard, trying to leave his own bruised red lip mark on the white jade skin.

Without using the territory or skills of the Demon Overlord and Demon Emperor, it was a very strange “battle”.

…

In the end, both of them fell to the ground while gasping for breath. Of course, the man’s shoulders were obligated to serve as the pillow for the woman.

“Foolish woman, you have so many Demon Overlords now, why don’t you set up an ambush in the palace and kill me?”

“Next time, I will consider it.” Shea bit her lip and said forcefully.

“Don’t be silly, the same move is useless for crossovers… Uh, grand master inheritor.” Chen Rui stroked her hair lightly, “I won’t make the same mistake again.”

Last time…

“I order you in the name of Shea. Lucifer, you must survive.”

In a person’s life, there were some people and some words that would never be forgotten.

“Actually, this was hinted by Old Gauss and the others. Old Gauss doesn’t know your other identity and secrets, so it was mainly directed at ‘Aguile’, but as an empress, I have to ask this.” Shea’s eyes were a little red. She curled up in his arms like a cat, trembling slightly.

Just as Chen Rui wanted to say something, Shea’s low voice sounded, “Listen to me first, okay?”

“From the moment my father decided that I would take over as the lord, my only goal in life was to revitalize the Dark Moon and to recapture the Fallen Angel Empire from Obsidian. I abandoned my original self. I abandoned everything. I became a cold sister and lord. That day in the wilderness, when this goal was achieved, I was not happy or satisfied in my heart; I only felt dazed and fearful.” Shea’s body trembled more and more violently. The scene where you disappeared with Obsidian on the battlefield was like a nightmare… I’m afraid of this feeling. I’m also afraid that one day I will change and I won’t be afraid anymore…”

These ending words were very puzzling, but Chen Rui understood what Shea meant. He had never thought that his place in her heart would override those deep-rooted responsibilities and fate.

Chen Rui closed his eyes and held her carefully like a precious artwork. At this moment, he was not holding a lord, princess, or empress in his arms, but his beloved woman; a weak woman who had taken off her cold mask and needed care.

When the wet marks on his shirt gradually stopped spreading, Chen Rui gently placed the hand stroking her hair on her back. He said warmly, “There are some things that we will always persist in no matter the changes. Both you and I have this kind of persistence. In fact, what you are facing now is not the end, but a new beginning. The road ahead may be full of thorns and difficulties, but you don’t have to be afraid because I will always be by your side just like before. That is the only ‘power’ that I want.”

“In the name of Shea. Lucifer, you will be the only man with this power before the flame of my life goes out.” Shea lifted her head slowly. Her gentle eyes were filled with resoluteness.

“Our future has just begun, Your Majesty.” Chen Rui smiled slightly and kissed her on the forehead. The 2 cuddled together with their fingers intertwined. There was no gap between both hearts.

In the secret room, the man and woman who loved each other poured their hearts out and discussed the future in whispers. It was a cozy and lovely scene.

Shea didn’t ask anything about the artifact just because she believed him.

“Future Your Majesty Empress, you have almost conquered the entire empire now, and I’m a lazy and cunning person. As long as I conquer Your Majesty, it is equivalent to conquering the empire.”

Shea had already relieved the depression in her heart, and she looked a lot more relaxed with a slight smile on her face, “I think you need to correct a problem of principle. Whether it is a prince consort or a princess’ fiance, you are always just a supplement. It’s equivalent to my… concubine. Don’t make a mistake about this superior and inferior relationship.”

Concubine? Chen Rui was speechless about this “title”, and he simply acted like a hooligan, “Superior and inferior relationship? Can I understand this relationship as a certain posture?”

Shea was astounded. She knew she was definitely inferior to this guy in terms of being shameless. She couldn’t help but roll her eyes. This look was very charming, especially when it appeared on the face of Princess Royal Highness who was usually stern. Chen Rui’s heart was swayed for a while.

“Put away your crooked thoughts, at least before a certain ceremony is conducted.” Shea slowly stood up, looking radiant. “Speaking of the future ceremony, I believe the entire empire will pay attention to it, especially your beautiful female companions, what do you think? My only sir fiance?”

“Only” was a sensitive word in the harem. It seemed that the struggle of the crystal harem was everywhere. The male protagonist must be prepared for blood sacrifice at any time. Facing the confident future Majesty Empress, Chen Rui secretly wiped his sweat and he dared not reply.

Shea finally stays true to her heart and chooses what is important to her. Now, it’s just the beginning of another “war” 😂.

chapters.title: Chapter 553 - Important Matter Of Ms. Black Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 553 - Important Matter Of Ms. Black Dragon

Chapter 553: Important Matter of Ms. Black Dragon

“Okay, dear sir financial officer, I’m going to continue training. Training during this period is very important to me. When the realm is completely stable, it is time to go to the capital. You must be ready to set off at any time,” Shea gently flicked her blonde hair, “If you have time, please send my greetings to Isabella. This time, thanks to her on the battlefield. Otherwise, I will definitely not be able to hold on until you arrive.”

Chen Rui heard Shea talk about Isabella’s performance on the battlefield before. He nodded.

When Shea was about to leave the secret room, she suddenly added a sentence that made Chen Rui sweaty, “When you are free, play The End of the World to me 20 to 30 times.”

After speaking, Princess Royal Highness ignored some guy who felt guilty and walked away.

Chen Rui was still a little nervous when he left the inner courtyard of the palace. I played “The End of the World” to Isabella alone, but Shea actually knows about it. Seems like before the base of the crystal harem is stable, the roof has started to leak.

By the way, there seems to be another tempting perk from Madam Aunt?

I seem to remember that the original sentence is “Whatever you want to do by then”? This sentence inevitably makes any man with a normal orientation feel excited upon hearing it. Anyway, Ms. Secret Intelligence is already the default member of my harem…

As he was thinking about it, he had already left the palace. When he walked to an alley, Chen Rui suddenly felt something abnormal. He had a vigilant expression, then his brows stretched out again, “Olypheus?”

“I knew that you have a good sense of smell.” Ms. Black Dragon’s sneaky figure appeared in front, then she added, “It’s better than the hellhound transformed by Dodo.”

Chen Rui was speechless. Which nose do you use to sniff out that I used my sense of smell?

Olypheus once went wild on the battlefield which made Obsidian suffer a huge setback. She could also be considered a key hero. In the beginning, her injury was more serious. Fortunately, the black dragons were not like crystal dragons who had no reaction to potions. Isabella happened to have the high-purity healing potion that Chen Rui gave her previously. Under the care of Isabella, Ms. Black Dragon, who had strong vitality, recovered very quickly from her injury. Obviously, she was now alive and kicking.

However, Olypheus had never returned to the Sheriff’s house for some reasons since she recovered from her injuries in Isabella’s house. It seemed that she was just staying there. Chen Rui saw her for the first time after he woke up.

“What’s the matter? Why are you acting so mysterious?”

“Very very important matter! Wait a minute!”

Olypheus looked around anxiously like a competent bodyguard. When she was sure of the safety of the neighborhood, she ran over enthusiastically and carefully took out a small notebook from the space ring.

“Boss, this is the total number of enemies I killed this time. Athena said the price of aerial soldiers has doubled, and aerial demonic beasts plus the riders are multiplied by 2 which is 4 times…”

As Ms. Black Dragon said delightedly, her 2 eyeballs had turned into the shape of a black crystal coin.

Chen Rui was stunned for a while. It turns out to be a reimbursement, no wonder she is so enthusiastic. He glanced curiously at the 3 small diamonds on Ms. Black Dragon’s forehead. When he opened the account book and looked at it, he was speechless after only a few glances.

“…The Moonlight Fortress: killed 300,000 enemies, 100,000 aerial legions. 10 black crystal coins for each which is equivalent to 5 million black crystal coins.”

Putting aside the unit of measurement, the question is, how did she end up with the number of 400,000?

“Olypheus, the capital coalition army came to the Dark Moon with only 2 aerial legions this time, the Dragon Rider Legion and the Flying Cloud Legion with a total of less than 10,000 riders. Our army only wiped out around 100,000 enemies in the Moonlight Fortress. Where did you get the number of 400,000?”

Ms. Black Dragon opened her mouth for a long time, then she replied, “Ah… that. Maybe it’s probably… I made a mistake. You can give me a discount based on your conscience.”

Even “conscience” is used? Chen Rui was speechless. He pointed to another one, “Help Krobelus intercept and witness her killing Demon Overlord Anspu, which counts as 100,000 black crystal coins. You even charge for what you ‘witnessed’? Do you kill the enemy with your eyes? I must ask Betty about this. If you lie, I will definitely deduct the money.”

“Wait! Don’t ask Betty! I don’t have a good memory…” Ms. Black Dragon scratched her head, “You just take a look at it roughly first.”

Chen Rui rolled his eyes, and he pointed to the next one, “The battle of Town Dico: killed 300 riders of the Flying Cloud Legion, which is equivalent to 60,000 black crystal coins? 300 times 10 and then doubled is equal to… Are you sure it is 60,000?”

“I’ve been bad at math since I was a kid,” Ms. Black Dragon was already brimming with tears, “My mum passed away before she could teach more.”

“What did you do? You made Olypheus cry.” Isabella’s voice came from the front, and a graceful veiled figure appeared in front. Chen Rui had already discovered her long ago, he just didn’t want to expose her.

When Olypheus saw Isabella, it was as if she had seen a distant relative. She threw herself into her arms and started crying.

“Sister, he bullied me!”

Sister? When did this miser girl become so close with Isabella? Madam Aunt doesn’t look like a rich lord right?

Chen Rui looked enviously at Ms. Miser who buried her head in the breast. He deliberately snorted and said, “It’s useless to call sister. Isabella, do you know that Olypheus actually wants to report false accounts and blackmail me, his employer. “

On the surface, it is possible for others to report false accounts, but this chick girl is too much. Experience is one aspect. The most important thing is the greed of dragons. The total amount is actually hundreds of millions!

“Really? Olypheus?” Isabella stroked Ms. Black Dragon’s hair.

Ms. Black Dragon cried with tears and said, “I’m just bad at mathematics.”

“Olypheus, have you forgotten our contract regulations? On behalf of the Audit Bureau… Uh, I have the right to deduct all the benefits. Also, as a bodyguard, you were almost killed by the enemy on the battlefield. Later, it was me, your employer, who saved your life. How should this be counted? Speaking of which, how much do you have to pay me back!

Ms. Black Dragon was speechless. When thinking that the shining black crystal coins would reduce to nothing, she couldn’t help crying. Isabella glared at Chen Rui angrily, “Don’t tease Olypheus, she is really brave on the battlefield this time.”

Chen Rui enjoyed it very much. He sighed on the surface, “Alright, Olypheus, I’ll consider that you killed 10,000… Um, 12,000 enemies. I will add another 50% to you, 15 black crystal coins for each soldier is equivalent to 160,000 black crystal coins. “

The sobbing voice of Ms. Black Dragon stopped immediately, and she said with a serious face, “No! 12,000 times 15 equals 180,000!”

This kind of fast and accurate calculation made Chen Rui quite speechless. He asked, “Aren’t you bad at math since you were young?”

“Ah, I was wrong just now! It should be 200,000, right?” She asked tentatively with the black crystal coins shining in her eyes.

You really are ‘bad’ in mathematics! Greedy dragons…

Chen Rui had completely lost his temper and took out a crystal, “This is a 100% pure super cold crystal. The market price is at least 200,000 black crystal coins. Do you want this or 180,000 black crystal coins in cash? “

The unwilling Ms. Miser asked further, “Can’t I have both?”

After getting an affirmative answer, Olypheus decisively chose the cold crystal with a tearful expression on her face😭, “A super cold crystal worth 200,000 black crystal coins! I’m rich this time!”

Cold crystal was a kind of magic material which was extremely difficult to purify. The price of low purity was ordinary. The high purity, especially the 100% purity, was really valuable, but for Chen Rui who had the “refining” skill, the cost was less than 2,000 black crystal coins.

Chen Rui didn’t look at Ms. Black Dragon again. He winked at Isabella, “Uh… Isabella, are you free tonight? Can we discuss… life?”

“My sister is not free!” Olypheus answered impolitely while holding Isabella’s hand intimately just like real sisters.

Isabella smiled behind the veil. She did not say “yes” or “no.” It was not so much of a consent to Olypheus’ statement. It was more of seeing through what some guy had in mind.

Chen Rui’s eyes rolled, “Olypheus, I may consider giving you a raise next month?”

“I already have 200,000 cold crystals, enough to be worthy of 4,000 years of your non-equality contract.” Olypheus now had more real-life experience. How could she still not understand that she was tricked by this unscrupulous employee at the beginning. She proudly said, “I don’t even care for your little money! I have noble morals and treat money like…”

Before she finished speaking, Chen Rui suddenly pointed to the front in surprise, “Ah! Who dropped that white crystal coin?”

With a “Swoosh!” sound, Ms. Black Dragon’s figure had appeared at the location that he pointed to, and her eyes were scanning the ground, “Where? Where?”

Chen Rui and Isabella glanced at each other, and their faces coincidentally showed the expression of “as expected”. This is the miser girl who refuses to let go of even the white crystal coin, does she still have noble morals?

A smile appeared in Isabella’s eyes, “Stop making trouble, I’m going to the palace to look for Princess Royal right now for some important matters. Chen Rui, come with me.”

If in normal times, Chen Rui would have agreed without hesitation, the problem was… “The End of the World” that Shea said before leaving made him feel guilty- The “adultery” has obviously been exposed, and the 2 “female protagonists” are about to meet. If the male protagonist is present foolishly, he deserves to be dead; a foolish death.

In fact, Chen Rui didn’t know that “The End of the World” was actually deliberately divulged by Madam Aunt to Princess Royal Highness. Although there were some elements of encouragement which were effective, it was also some % of demonstration and show off. Only Madam Aunt knew how much the % was.

Chen Rui immediately changed the topic, “Why are you looking for Princess Royal? I just came out of the palace, and she seems to be stabilizing her power.”

“2 very urgent news.” When it came to this, Isabella became serious, “This is not a place to talk. Let’s go to the palace. Olypheus, your injury has not fully recovered. Go back first.”

Ms. Black Dragon nodded obediently. Chen Rui didn’t think Isabella had any other intentions since she looked so stern, so he followed her to the palace.

Olypheus can always surprise me 🤣🤣. I thought she was going to look for her mom or something, turns out it was a reimbursement. Is Isabella really going to the palace though😏?

chapters.title: Chapter 554 - The Really Urgent Matter
chapters.body:
Chapter 554 - The Really Urgent Matter

Chapter 554: The Really Urgent Matter

Shea was a little surprised when she saw Chen Rui who had left and returned, but Isabella’s report immediately made her focus.

Isabella reported 2 matters. The first matter was from the Bloody Empire. Some time ago, the Bloody Empire Lord Raizen had some realization and went for closed doors training. He handed over the affairs of the empire to Great Prince Aleus, assisted by Second Prince Edmund. Obsidian’s crusade against the Dark Moon also deliberately chose this opportunity, but it was a pity that his army was defeated and he died in the war.

The 2 ruling princes of the Bloody Empire had fought openly and secretly for the position of the first heir. Now the contradictions were even worse. It had gradually evolved to an uncontrollable degree. A few days ago, Edmund, who was suppressed by Aleus, finally used the most extreme method to launch a mutiny while Aleus went out to patrol. However, he was ambushed by Aleus and was forced to lead the remnants to escape the capital. He was currently fighting against Aleus in the north of the Iron Fist Estate.

As the great prince of the empire, Aleus publicly declared Edmund as a traitor while Edmund claimed that Aleus persecuted his brothers, deceived his father Raizen, and conspired to overthrow the Bloody Empire. Now, the 2 forces were at a stalemate.

Chen Rui’s spirits lifted up, “The Bloody Empire has always been eyeing us. I was initially worried that the Bloody Empire would take advantage of this civil war in the Fallen Angel Empire. I didn’t expect them to actually start fighting on their own. It seems that Raizen chose the ‘right’ time to go for closed doors training. Without this worry, Princess Royal can quickly rush to the capital, immediately ascend the throne as the empress, and stabilize the entire empire.”

“No, Princess Royal Highness can’t go to the capital yet,” Isabella shook her head, “Because of the second news. The envoy sent by the Dark Shadow Empire to the Dark Moon is already on the way. When we received the news of the official visit, the envoy had passed Town Walan. Moreover, according to the latest intel, the Dark Shadow Empire is actively mobilizing its military forces.”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “The military mobilization of the Dark Shadow Empire?”

“From the current intel, it is to the east and south. The predicted target may be Town Leia in the west of the Dark Moon and the Tekula Fortress stationed by General Gerant. The Jergal Fortress, which is adjacent to the Bloody Empire, seems to be quiet. They are obviously targeting the Fallen Angel Empire.”

Shea looked solemn, “It seems that Gerant has guessed it correctly. The closest allies are probably the most ferocious enemies. Our greatest enemy now is not the Bloody Empire, but the Dark Shadow Empire.”

“Yes, there are some signs that the Dark Shadow Empire seems to have sold a lot of equipment and strategic materials to Aleus or Edmund. The purpose is obvious. And during our war with Obsidian, the Dark Shadow Empire’s economic restrictions have been loosened and many favorable conditions have been provided. It has attracted many merchants from the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Moon Estate.”

Isabella earnestly analyzed, “I have a guess that the Dark Moon’s gift of the magician legion and goblin team from the Bloody Vine Flower Estate’s General Crawford was probably instructed by Catherine the Great. Because the stronger we are, the more intense the war with Obsidian. In other words, the Fallen Angel Empire’s internal friction will be more intense. This Her Majesty Empress not only can wait patiently, but she also has a far vision. She can damage the enemy and strengthen her empire without a bloody war. She is indeed the first sage of the Demon Realm.”

Shea looked thoughtful and nodded. The Bloody Vine Flower Estate’s Lord Crawford has a good personal relationship with me, but Crawford is also the third general and an estate lord who is loyal to the Dark Shadow Empire. Putting aside some of the supplies that support the Dark Moon, the magician legion and goblin warriors are true elites which are also precious army resources. This kind of gift is too “valuable.” It now appears that the purpose is to increase the Dark Moon’s bargaining chip against the capital. The Dark Shadow Empire has been on the sidelines since the civil war of the Fallen Angel Empire began. The fact that the army led by Gerant to ambush the Dark Moon passed Town Leia smoothly may also be some kind of consent from the top.

Chen Rui was silent for a while. He knew Catherine better than Shea and Isabella. She is a wise and stubborn woman, a truly mature and powerful master of an empire. As long as she can create true peace, she will never spare war and force. The Bloody Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire had successive civil strife which gave Catherine a god-given opportunity. Although the Bloody Empire is in chaos, Raizen the Great is still there. With Raizen, the Bloody Empire will not fall. What Catherine could do is to further intensify the conflict between the 2 princes and try to make the Bloody Empire hurt its vitality this time. The Fallen Angel Empire is different. The war to crusade against the Dark Moon caused serious internal exhaustion. Several Demon Overlords, a dozen of Demon Emperors, the regent of the empire and the second general had died. The military strength has casualties of more than 500,000. In this weakest state, if Catherine is still indifferent, she is not Catherine.

There is no real friendship between countries. Even on the surface of peaceful coexistence, there are still countless meticulous games underneath. Chen Rui had a hunch that with Shea’s official ascension, he would inevitably become an enemy who stood opposite of Empress Catherine.

“Gerant and Rometty should have been preparing for the selection of soldiers. Immediately order him and Rometty’s Flying Cloud Legion to set off first using aerial demonic beasts to reach Tekula Fortress as quickly as possible. Tim’s Moon Shadow Legion has returned to Walan Fortress, but the military force is not enough.” Shea pondered, “The Dark Moon’s 3 legions lost nearly half of their forces in the war this time. The original capital coalition army suffered more than half of the casualties. It can be described as a huge setback in military strength. Although the recruitment of new recruits is smooth, it is impossible to form a legion in a short time. This is really nerve-racking.

“What about the undead legion?” Isabella squinted, “The casualties should be a good supplement to the undead legion.”

Shea shook his head, “If we haven’t eliminated Obsidian, we can do that, but now Obsidian is dead and the capital coalition army has all surrendered. If we transform their dead comrades into undead, then I will lose far more than I gain. Besides, in the battle with Obsidian, the Dark Moon’s trump cards have been completely exposed, and there is no secret in terms of military strength. With Catherine’s wisdom, if a war is really to be launched, there will definitely be targeted deployment.”

Isabella shrugged like Chen Rui’s habitual movements, but Shea faintly guessed that Isabella should be able to guess the problem of the undead, and the purpose of making this opinion was more to remind her.

Chen Rui finally spoke, “There is no need to worry about the materials of the undead. Guradam once said that there are at least 300,000 soldiers on the ancient battlefield of Town Yankou. If he assists in guarding the Walan Fortress, we should be able to block possible attacks. I guess the envoy of the Dark Shadow Empire will be here in a couple of days. Now we can only react to the situation and see what news this envoy brings. At the same time, Princess Royal Highness must be ready to go to the capital.”

Shea nodded. In fact, in the past few days, she had finished the settlement matters of the Dark Moon and was ready to leave, but Chen Rui had not been awake. The most important matter was that the Sword of Fallen Angel was missing, so she had been using the excuse of stabilizing her realm to wait.

The 3 discussed related matters for some time. Shea summoned Old Gauss, Sarandi, Gerant, and others to discuss. Chen Rui and Isabella left the palace to work separately.

When Chen Rui walked to the outer courtyard, he spoke up, “If you have confirmed the details of the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy, let me know immediately.”

Isabella nodded. Her voice suddenly became charming as she asked, “Why don’t you ask me if I’m free tonight? Is it because of a Royal Highness matter that you are not in the mood?”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Mood is actually nothing. So… beautiful and attractive lady, do you remember a promise? Can you leave a door open for me tonight?”

“I’ve always had a good memory. It’s okay to leave a door open,” Isabella’s blue eyes rolled. “It’s just that you have to solve the little black dragon sister who is guarding the door first.”

Olypheus was now lingering in Isabella’s house every day, which meant that Chen Rui must first get rid of the troublesome Ms. Black Dragon if he wanted to gain certain benefits.

“Why did Olypheus stick to you all of a sudden? She even called you sister?”

Isabella stretched out her hands helplessly: Calling me as sister is better than calling me as her mother… The first thing the black dragon girl did after waking up from her drowsiness was to call her mother, almost making Ms. Secret Intelligence, who had always been calm, flustered.

When taking care of Olypheus to recover from her injuries these days, she didn’t deliberately express anything, but for some reason, the little girl liked her and clung to her.

Isabella sighed, “It’s quite nice to have Olypheus there, lest I have always been alone and deserted in my place. I can only eagerly look forward to the 1 or 2 hours that someone occasionally allocates to me.”

“I’m sorry.” Chen Rui lowered his head guiltily, “I’m very selfish, why don’t you just move to…”

“Don’t think I’m easy to trick like your women.” Isabella sulked, but there was a faint tenderness in her gaze toward the man, “Since you feel guilty, then a certain promise is canceled. We don’t owe each other. If you are free, welcome to hang out at my deserted little place. I think Olypheus will be happy to see her rich employer.”

It’s over. Now even the benefits are gone.

Princess Royal Highness is like that, and Madam Aunt is the same. Princess Royal Highness at least deferred payment, but Madam Aunt simply canceled the account.

“You cast me aside after getting the benefit. Are women so irresponsible?” Chen Rui turned his head angrily and left. Seeing that there was no patrol guard nearby, he suddenly appeared in front of Isabella, and they teleported to a corner. He then lifted the veil and smooched to the purplish red lips.

[Double Teleportations] was used to do this kind of thing. It could be regarded as a pearl covered with dust. (Meaning valuable skills used for the trivial matter)

Isabella was caught off guard and tried to struggle, but now Chen Rui’s basic power had reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, and his spirit power had reached S+. Isabella’s power was not strong, so she was unable to break free. She bit the man’s lips, but Chen Rui still did not let go. Slowly, the resistance turned into active entanglement. It took a long time before both sides slowly separated.

Isabella looked at his swollen lips, then she gently stroked with her fingers distressingly, “It’s not that I broke my promise, but… the difficulty hasn’t been completely overcome, has it?”

The so-called “overcoming difficulties” was the condition of the previous benefit.

“I don’t care what the difficulties are and how deep the scar in your heart is. I don’t even mind about being a substitute. You only need to know one thing.” Chen Rui hugged her domineeringly, “You owe me a few lives. Without my permission, you can never let yourself die again! Understand?”

Isabella trembled, “What do you mean?”

Chen Rui didn’t speak, but he looked directly into her eyes. Isabella looked away, gently broke free of his embrace, and put on the veil.

“Don’t act smart,” Isabella’s eyes were a little red. She turned her back and walked out slowly. “I want to go back to base and work on the envoy’s intel.”

“Yini…” Chen Rui sighed, “I only say this 1 sentence. You have already died once. Even life can start over again. What else can’t start over again?”

Isabella’s body paused and her voice was a little low, “Give me some time.”

It’s hard to step from emotional injury… Curious if Chirstina will really kill Chen Rui herself, hmmm

chapters.title: Chapter 555 - Guradam’S Hope Of Advancement
chapters.body:
Chapter 555 - Guradam’S Hope Of Advancement

Chapter 555: Guradam’s Hope of Advancement

Chen Rui watched Isabella get out of his sight in a complicated mood. In fact, since he really started to feel Isabella with his heart, he felt something abnormal.

This cold and charming woman was far superior to man in terms of mental means, and she could even easily manipulate people’s minds. She was a veritable Devil’s Snare. She smiled on the surface as if she didn’t care about anything and could give up everything, but in fact, her heart had been tightly closed. It was herself who really gave up.

Chen Rui didn’t know whether the past of the Breeze Shadow Boots left some indelible imprint, but he could feel the heavy shackles in Isabella’s heart. If Kia used a cheerful smile to evaporate the tears behind, then Isabella had become a pool of ashes that was about to burn out. Whether the next moment was a new lease of life or complete annihilation, it depended on her own.

There was no doubt that Isabella liked him. In the beginning, he might be just a substitute for some kind of illusory character in her mind. Step by step, she had a real fascination for him. Perhaps this kind of feeling could become the key to healing her soul, unlocking that heavy shackles step by step.

If life was just the first sight, Chen Rui had seen a tear that couldn’t be evaporated by the flames. That scene would be unforgettable for a lifetime. He would not let tragedy happen to his own woman again.

Anyway, in his heart, he had already decided to be the Sir Uncle of a guy.

Leaving the palace, Chen Rui put on a cloak and walked all the way out of the city gate. He found Guradam in the specially divided undead area in the southern suburbs.

Guradam became famous in this decisive battle. The entire Demon Realm knew that the undead magic master, who disappeared 2 years ago, was back, and he also brought powerful undead soldiers that were never seen before. Although the undead also exposed many shortcomings in the battle, they revealed more strength. They could compete with any regular elite army including the aerial legion and cavalry.

Facing this master who signed a master-subordinate contract with him, Guradam’s mentality was completely different from that of the past. At first, the 2 were hostile. Chen Rui was not his opponent. However, he used the water from the Fountain of Resurrection to severely wound Guradam and escaped. Then, Guradam was subdued by Paglio in Town Yankou, and he was forced to sign a master-subordinate contract with Chen Rui under coercion and lure.

To a certain extent, Guradam, like Zola, was an avid scientific research talent. In order to gain a long life to study the undead magic, this undead magic master did not hesitate to take the risk of transforming himself into an immortal corpse necromancer. This was also the reason why he succumbed to Chen Rui at that time. The master-subordinate contract was not like the master-servant contract. Although it was also impossible to betray, the death of the master would not lead to the death of the subordinate, and the master could not use the contract to prematurely end the life of the subordinate.

What Guradam did not expect was that it was precisely because of this “submission” that he was inspired by a qualitative change. Undead magician, undead cavalry, [Poison Explosion]… In addition, there were huge amounts of funding including massive standard army equipment, skeleton magician magic items, and even the complete giant dragon corpse. His great success today was absolutely inseparable from this master.

The power shown by Chen Rui also impressed Guradam. In Silent Night Wetland, he was only a Demon King-level power, and later his strength leaped at an unimaginable speed. Great Demon King, Demon Emperor… By the time of the decisive battle of Leith Wilderness, he was already able to fight against the peak stage of the Demon Overlord Obsidian!

“Master, rest assured, even if you are not there, I will completely obey madam’s dispatch.” Guradam said respectfully after learning Chen Rui’s intention of visiting.

Let alone Guradam’s best impression of Athena, just the beautiful lady with glasses was enough to make Guradam lower his head fearfully. He witnessed the scene where Ms. Zola crushed the 2 dragons of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord in full view. There were also several Demon Overlords present, and none of them dared to breathe.

Chen Rui nodded with satisfaction, “Try to complete the transformation of the undead in the ancient battlefield of Town Yankou. Don’t worry about the equipment, this time it is more than enough.”

“Master, there is 1 more thing. I reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor 2,000 years ago, but I have been stagnant after being transformed into a corpse necromancer. The body of the undead is unlike other creatures. For instance my current state, it is almost impossible to directly advance the level. Even if master you have black potions, they have no effect on me. Even longevity potion and resurrection potion are equivalent to severe poisons. According to ancient records, plus my research findings, if I want to advance to the next realm, it requires quite complicated rituals and considerable risks. All these are fine, the key is that it needs a lot of precious materials…”

Guradam didn’t feel at ease as the materials needed for the ceremony were extremely rare, and the types were extremely diverse. A lot of money was already spent to arm the undead previously. In fact, the value of the materials needed this time was even more than the huge sums of money for the undead. It was hard to get them all with his own strength, so he mentioned it nervously. What Chen Rui needs is my power to create undead. There is no shortage of Demon Overlords around him. There are even 3 dragons, plus the most terrifying madam (corpse necromancer did not know that Zola was also a dragon). I also heard that the Earth Elemental King recognizes master as his only best friend.

“Tell me, how can I help you?” Chen Rui agreed without any hesitation. Guradam was his people. There was only benefit for him if Guradam became stronger. He was never stingy with his own people.

Hearing such a pleasant answer, Guradam suddenly had a strange feeling of “a true gentleman will sacrifice his life for a friend who understands him”. The 2 red lights in his eye sockets brightened, “The body of the corpse necromancer is a tool that can be discarded at any time, so the key lies in the soul fire. If I can get all the materials, I may undergo qualitative changes under special rituals. This kind of ritual requires very strict requirements and a lot of precious materials. Back then, some of them were in Master Paglio’s treasures, and I collected some after I came out… “

Paglio’s treasures ended up in Chen Rui’s hands back then, and the poor corpse necromancer, who was drenched in “sulfur acid”, barely took away his life box. Chen Rui understood what he meant. After asking about the required materials, he took them out 1 by 1 from the storage warehouse.

Some materials were used or not in the poison dragon’s treasure, but Chen Rui later got many good stuff including the crystal dragon’s treasures and the various materials gifted by the Custer Family. Guradam got more complete materials than he expected, so he couldn’t help but be overjoyed.

“The remaining materials are in short supply, but it shouldn’t be a big problem. I will commission the Custer Family, the top commercial family of the Dark Shadow Empire to collect them. But… What are these Dragon Power Essence and Siren’s Heart?” Guradam requested many rare materials, but Chen Rui knew their origin and purpose after he absorbed a lot of relevant knowledge in the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire’s Mechanical Association. Nonetheless, he had never heard of these 2 materials.

“I am not too clear as well. Dragon Power Essence should be related to giant dragon and siren is a kind of sea creature of the Dead Sea. I don’t know if the Siren’s Heart is their heart?”

Siren of the Dead Sea? Chen Rui thought of Earth Elemental King who was heading to the Dead Sea soon, and his heart moved, but it was better to understand the specific details of these 2 materials. If he got it wrong, then Guradam’s ritual was not an advancement but suicide instead.

“Leave the materials issue to me. You can handle the matter in hand at ease. My suggestion is just for reference. The bone magic and spirit dragon transformation should be executed based on your undead magic basic theory.”

Guradam nodded. He personally sent Chen Rui out of the southern suburbs.

Back in the Dark Moon City, Chen Rui did not return to his residence. Instead, he went to the southeast block. Dragon Power Essence and Siren’s Heart were very important to Guradam and must be figured out. He happened to have a teacher who received the inheritance of thousands of years. Therefore, he should be able to get a satisfactory answer. Besides, there were some important items from the ancient alchemy civilization that he wanted to give to Tetenis.

The backyard of the Cloak Gang was very lively and filled with the aroma of food. Tetenis, Skye and his wife, Eve, Alian, the old goblin and his daughters, Ms. Sasa, were all there. They were barbecuing in a circle. Master Xingxing was not present due to some affairs of the mechanics association.

The arrival of “Aguile” immediately attracted everyone’s attention. Especially the 2 girls, Alian and Eve, whose quick-witted eyes were shining with joy. The one who reacted most quickly was the old goblin, Didi, who immediately greeted him and bowed deeply, “Master.”

Chen Rui nodded and motioned the old goblin to continue to sit down without the need to be too polite.

“Teacher.” Chen Rui bowed to Tetenis and he greeted Skye and others. This time in the Dark Moon battle, the improved magic crystal cannon provided by Tetenis played a big role. As long as there was plenty of time to create more and better magic crystal cannons, then the military power of the Fallen Angel Empire would be greatly enhanced.

Skye spoke up, “The Dark Moon battle can be described as shocking to the Demon Realm. The incredible Regent Obsidian was killed by you and Princess Royal. The weak defeated the strong in this battle. It is unbelievable. You and Princess Shea will be recorded into the Demon Realm’s history to be extolled by future generations. Soon, you will be called Royal Highness Prince Consort.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Master Skye has overstated it. This is the credit of Princess Royal Highness and all the soldiers. As for the title… No matter what I look like, I’m just the master’s friend, Aguile.”

Skye smiled delightedly and nodded, “Since I’m a friend, don’t hesitate if you need my help. Although Xingxing is not here, I know that he also has this attitude.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. The Dark Moon’s estate is incomparable to the entire empire. For Shea, the capital is the core of her power, but it is also an unfamiliar environment that must be supported by all parties like the Mechanic Association. The Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association lacks top masters such as Nate and Anderson with the title of “top”, so its influence is far inferior to the other 2 empires. If Skye, who was the number 1 master of leather armor in the past, is willing to come out and join the association under the name of Fonsaq, and with the influence of Master Xingxing, it can definitely compete with the other 2 empires. It was a considerable help for Shea.
