TL: With the Toro Family serving her, Shea can consolidate her strength in the capital more…

chapters.title: Chapter 562 - My Past Self
chapters.body:
Chapter 562 - My Past Self

Chapter 562: My Past Self

After leaving the palace, Old Cowen said earnestly to Redotan, “I know you still have some worries in your heart, but now that you have decided to be loyal to Her Majesty, don’t be hesitant. If you please both sides, you will be unable to make either side happy. When Her Majesty once served as the lord of the Dark Moon, the Dark Moon had 2 big families. The Saiful Family, who always followed her, is now in full swing. They are the top family of the Dark Moon. The Mellon Family, who opposed her, first surrendered and then became unstable. As a result, they were finally being suppressed until they disappeared. Now Her Majesty is obviously restricted. In this case, the sooner we stand in line, the better. Even if we become hostile to all elder families, as long as Her Majesty can fully control the capital, then our Toro Family status will be more and more consolidated, and our benefits will also increase. Otherwise, we will have a danger of destruction.”

Redotan frowned, “Father, do you think Her Majesty can fully control the capital? Even Prince Obsidian can’t…”

“So, now Obsidian is dead while Her Majesty Shea is still alive, and she has been recognized by the Sword of Fallen Angel.” Old Cowen said solemnly, “From the rise of the Dark Moon, it can be seen that Her Majesty is young, but her courage and means are far greater than Obsidian. I don’t know why but I have a hunch that maybe Her Majesty Shea can really realize the glory of the Lord of Midnight Sun and make the Fallen Angel Empire the number one empire.”

Redotan nodded. His father, Cowen’s vision, had always been very accurate. This was the case when he became Obsidian’s in-law, and now he looked highly of the new Empress Shea. He also attended the meeting during the day. Shea’s first proposal was met with a huge setback, but then she calmly transferred several representatives who opposed the most to the front line to deal with the foreign enemies. This was a dignified method with an ulterior motive.

Today, after the allegiance, Shea personally confirmed that the power of the capital must be reshuffled at this critical time. Then, the Blood and Iron Policy and conspiracy would be behind the overt plot.

From this perspective, the timing of the Toro Family’s allegiance was quite good. Timely help and extra support were 2 different concepts. Not to mention the fate of his wife and children was still in the hands of Her Majesty Empress. Whether it was for official or private reasons, he must vote for Shea’s side.

“Understood, father. From now on, the Toro Family will loyally follow Her Majesty Shea. This one is worth the bet.” Redotan nodded.

The palace hall.

“The Toro Family will be a starting point. Our next plan will unfold quickly.” Chen Rui saw Shea’s purple eyes were a little lost. Thinking of her previous emotional changes, his heart moved, “What are you thinking about? That little girl? “

Shea looked up and looked at the mask. A hint of gentleness was brimming in her purple eyes, “I’m thinking if it is a good thing to keep a guy who read my mind by my side.”

“If you don’t have this person by your side, it would be a pity.” Chen Rui said brazenly, “Does that little girl remind you of your past self?”

Shea was silent for a moment, “In fact, I once had a younger brother. In order to protect him, father had concealed his birth, but he still did not survive. Not long after Alice was born, mother and younger brother died in an accident. Even Alice didn’t know this secret. Subsequently, father died of grief and indignation.”

Chen Rui now only knew that there was such a secret past. It turned out that Shea’s father, Crown Prince Grimm, had been using Shea as a guise to conceal and nurture his son to be the true heir of the Dark Moon Estate in order to regain the empire, but he was still discovered. Obsidian should be the culprit behind the so-called man-made “accident”.

Obsidian was unable to directly attack Crown Prince Grimm and Shea under the pressure of General George and others. He could only control and suppress them. However, the son who was born in secret was different- Since he is a secret, then I will destroy him secretly. Then you can only swallow a bitter pill.

In a sense, the eldest daughter, Shea, was a “victim” that attracted the enemy’s attention. Hence, when Old Cowen and Redotan thought of sacrificing the little girl, Ling, in order to protect the baby boy, Shea’s always hidden emotions showed strange fluctuations. Murderous intent was born from this.

“I don’t know if I will really kill this pair of children. In fact, I’m weaker than I thought.” Shea sighed, “Sometimes kindness will only bring more troubles; the ruler must be ruthless.”

“People have their own bottom line and perseverance. Because of this perseverance, some people once said that I am foolish. To those who say meaningless things like kindness will make one weaker and weaker, they will never become a real powerhouse. My answer is that I can become stronger and fearless because of certain weaknesses. I’m not only saying that I did the same. I have persisted to this day, and I will keep on persisting in the future. “

Shea’s eyes were a little more teary, “Fearless persistence…”

Chen Rui scratched his head, “I’m talking about myself. As for the ruler… I have heard of the technique of a ruler and the way of a ruler, but I don’t quite understand it. The technique of a ruler should be a means of control and balance that manipulates people’s hearts and power. One continues to consolidate imperial power when the subordinates are fighting with each other. The way of a ruler means that a ruler must judge the time and the situation, make the best use of the material and talents, have a broad mind, and be open to all. It is not necessary to personally take care of every single aspect but a ruler must ‘act incapable as a capability’.”

Shea’s eyes flashed when she heard it. Although she didn’t understand some vocabulary, she basically understood the general meaning. It was the first time she heard such a detailed theory about a ruler. After thinking about it for a long time, she spoke up, “You mean, take the way of a ruler as the foundation and the technique of a ruler as a supplement; don’t just focus on small details and neglect the overall situation? As long as I make the entire empire stronger that is supported by the people, served by the army, heeded by the officials and nobles surrender, then those ill-intentioned people will naturally be deterred and dare not move rashly, and the ruler will truly have the will and supreme authority of the entire empire?

“I didn’t say that… but you are right.” Chen Rui lamented in his heart. This is the principle of “Where we stand depends on where we sit“. Don’t meddle in affairs that are not part of your position. The technique of a ruler and the way of a ruler are just some copied theories from my memory, but listening to Shea talking about the true ruler, she can relate this to her own personal experience and understanding.

“The grand master shouldn’t be a ruler right?” Shea’s face showed a gentle smile. The beauty of the iceberg melting was alluring, “I start to doubt you a bit now.”

Chen Rui replied with a serious face, “Actually, I’m a crossover from a place called the Earth. What I tell you is the knowledge I got in another world. This secret has been hidden in my heart for a long time. I feel so much better after saying it out now.”

A strange look flashed past Shea, “Is the Earth another name for the human world? Or should I call you Royal Highness Arthur or His Majesty?”

Chen Rui shrugged, “It’s not Arthur, it’s Chen Rui. Chen Rui’s Chen. Chen Rui’s Rui. In addition, just call me Royal Highness, Royal Highness Prince Consort.”

“Then, Royal Highness Prince Consort.” Shea smiled and said, “Can you answer a question? Who is the one who once said you were ‘extremely foolish’ and asked you to answer that way? Is it a beautiful lady? Do I know her? Or not?”

A drop of sweat slipped off Chen Rui’s face behind the mask. Woman’s intuition is sometimes more terrifying than wisdom.

“I want to know too.” Another voice in the hall also sounded. Chen Rui even started to sweat behind his back. A certain Ms. Fake Daze, whom he had asked to come deterred Old Cowen with her magic power, was keeping silent. She joined in enthusiastically as soon as she heard this topic.

Shea nodded thoughtfully, “So… can both Zola and I be excluded?”

“Judging from that tone, it doesn’t sound like Athena and Kia.” Next to Shea, Zola’s beautiful figure gradually became clear. Although Ms. Fairy Dragon and the new Her Majesty Empress had less contact in the Dark Moon and their relationship was average, when it came to situations that might be related to the “external enemy,” a feeling of resentment toward the same hatred arose at the same time.

Ms. Fairy Dragon added, “I remember Athena said that a foolish man had a woman in the Dark Shadow Empire long ago.”

Chen Rui burst into tears. Can’t your memory be worse?

Shea looked suspicious, “The Dark Shadow Empire? This is interesting news. Could it be the important person of the Dark Shadow Empire?”

Chen Rui broke out in a cold sweat. Feeling the 4 scrutinizing gazes, he wanted to learn from Ms. Fairy Dragon and pretend to say, “What?”

“After this, I will surely tell you the full story.” Chen Rui immediately shifted their attention, “What we need now is to buy time. Zola, you protect Shea. I will return to the Dark Moon immediately and bring a group of people over.”

“Hmph!” Zola replied with the sound from her nose.

Shea nodded and said, “Zola, we need to communicate more to see how many secrets this guy keeps. Especially about some women we don’t know. For example, I’ve heard the song “The End of “The World”. Have you heard it before?”

“”The End of the World”?” Zola glanced furiously at someone who was already drenched in sweat, and she shook her head, “I haven’t heard of it, but I’ve heard of a kind of top magic called ‘Doomsday Judgment’. “

When Ms. Fairy Dragon deliberately emphasized the word judgement, he sweated even more.

“Let’s go and find a more pleasing conversation place.” Shea ignored him as she took Zola’s hand and walked inside.

Chen Rui was stunned as he watched the 2 women walking away intimately holding hands. His first reaction was: I’m really self-defeating. Her Majesty Shea applied the technique of a ruler which she has just learned to my harem battlefield, attacking the distant…

I’m afraid that it will be difficult for the future crystal harem to be at peace. The male protagonist must always prepare for the worst blood sacrifice.

This palace is too dangerous, let’s go back to… the Dark Moon.

Shea is too vulnerable in the capital now. Even the guards are temporarily arranged by General George, so the royal guards must be changed. Currently, the capital’s intel organization urgently needs to be controlled by the Dark Moon’s people. Isabella is the most suitable candidate. Skye and Tetenis had promised to come and help, so they should leave as soon as possible. However, Zola’s Rainbow Valley space teleportation is not unlimited. The number of people who can pass through at 1 time is restricted.

If Catherine does not act beyond expectation, the Dark Shadow Empire will send a new envoy for peace talks as soon as possible. There will certainly be conditions, but it will never be as outrageous as mentioned by Liliz and Terdila. Once the enemies retreat, then Baroco and other people who go out as reinforcement would also return to the capital. Therefore, Shea doesn’t have much time left. I must hurry.

TL: He finally reveals the truth! They can never guess it’s Catherine 😏. Well, if they do… 🔪. Wonder what is Catherine’s decision 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 563 - The Little Loli And Olypheus
chapters.body:
Chapter 563 - The Little Loli And Olypheus

Chapter 563: The Little Loli and Olypheus

Chen Rui did not take the Rainbow Valley’s path. It would take at least 6 hours from the capital to the Rainbow Valley then to the Dark Moon. He set a teleportation star point in the Dark Moon and used the [Star Gate]. In the blink of an eye, he returned to the Dark Moon’s house.

Back at the house, he happened to see Dodo, in his appearance, teased the black horse with an apple in the yard. Although the time they spent together was not short, the little dark horse was still ignoring the slime in total disregard.

When Chen Rui first appeared, the little black horse suddenly smelled its master. It rushed over cheerfully and nudged him affectionately. Chen Rui touched the head of the little black horse. With a flick of his fingers, 2 devil pomegs were thrown into the air. The little black horse cheered and tapped its hoofs to jump up. It quickly caught the 2 devil pomegs and started chewing.

Dodo on the side looked jealous. He imitated Chen Rui’s flicking the apple into the air, but the little black horse turned its butt at it with extreme contempt. Dodo tossed for a few times to no avail, and jumped up furiously. He instantly transformed into the appearance of the little dark horse, imitating that posture to catch the apple in 1 bite and ate it with a big bite. Before chewing a few mouthfuls, the little black horse whose portrait right was violated gave the slime a lightning strike.

As a result, Dodo reverted to a translucent green onion under the buzzing electric spark. He was trembling and unable to move while screaming “Ouch!”

Chen Rui touched the mane of the little black horse as he shook his head at the slime on the ground. When he walked outward, Dodo said, “Master! Wait a minute! Now the little princess is blocking the door!”

“Alice?” Chen Rui frowned, “What is going on?”

“I don’t know why. Occasionally, I appeared in the Dark Moon with master’s appearance, but I was exposed by the little princess at a glance. She forcibly probed me about the whereabouts of master. I had to run back here, but I was chased and blocked by the little princess at the door.”

“Did anyone see you when you were exposed?” Chen Rui was surprised. The identity of the human financial officer was a good cover. It would be troublesome if it was exposed because of Dodo.

“I was dragged by the little princess to a secluded place before getting interrogated. Then, I became a hellhound and escaped, but the little princess is very powerful. She kept chasing me until the door. If it weren’t for the magic circle at the door, she would have barged in.”

Chen Rui secretly breathed a sigh of relief. The protector beside Alice was Loki, the servant of the God-Eating Mask. The puppets of God-Eating Mask retained consciousness and wisdom. In case something happened, Loki should know how to deal with it.

This incident was a wake-up call for him. How the identity of “Chen Rui” and “Aguile” can exist at the same time is a problem. In fact, the little loli’s sensing ability is indeed very powerful. I must also be careful when I disguise as Aguile in front of her. Furthermore, Alice once took Dodo to the Blue Lake Mountain Range for “adventure”, so she and the slime can be regarded as “acquaintances.” Being seen through by her is not necessarily due to Dodo’s carelessness.

“Okay. Leave the little princess to me. During this time you try to show up as little as possible. If you want to go out as my appearance, you must be accompanied by Delia, understand?”

“Understood, master.” The slime nodded quickly and wriggled over with a flattery face. Chen Rui knew what Dodo wanted when he saw this guy’s fawning face. He threw a few devil fruits. Dodo no longer dared to turn into the little black horse horse. His body immediately stretched out 2 hands of several meters long to reach out to the fruit in the air effortlessly. He took out a wine bottle like a magic show, and he happily went to the back to taste them.

If someone knew that Chen Rui actually gave the precious devil fruits to a slime to eat with wine, it would surely arouse countless envy, jealousy and hatred.

Chen Rui walked out of the house, and he saw the little loli blocking at the gate.

Seeing “Dodo” finally come out, the little loli rushed over aggressively, but she suddenly paused midway as her little nose twitched. There was an odd light in her big eyes. With an exaggerated jump, she leaped toward Chen Rui excitedly.

As a result… a koala successfully hung behind Chen Rui.

“Brother! You finally came out!” the little loli was extremely excited, “I haven’t seen the real you for a long time!”

This area of the house was very remote. There were no other people except Loki who was hidden in the dark. So, Chen Rui didn’t do anything. He just explained, “In fact, I have been with Princess Shea… Uh, it should be Her Majesty Shea now, to make military suggestions, so Dodo sometimes replaces me…”

Before he finished, the little loli leaned into his ear and whispered, “I know, I won’t tell others. This is a little secret between both of us, right?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui gently patted the little hand hanging in front of his neck, and he touched the blond hair biting his ear. This somewhat doting gesture made the little loli closed her eyes comfortably like a petted cat.

The little loli was 14 years old, and every movement was full of purity and vigour. She was a supremely delicious meal for people who had some kind of weird taste, but for Chen Rui, Alice was just a very cute sister although she was very mischievous.

“After my sister defeated the big villain, Obsidian, she was in the Dark Moon palace yesterday, but she suddenly enthroned in the capital this morning. This caused a sensation in the empire and the entire Demon Realm. The Dark Moon is celebrating wildly today. Athena has also become the representative lord, then many many things happened!” Alice said excitedly, “Did you follow my sister to the capital, then rush back today? I couldn’t find Teacher Zola yesterday or today. Did she use some kind of magic to help you all get there?”

Chen Rui was shocked again. He didn’t expect the little loli to actually be so clever. Her guesses were almost on point. When he was about to speak, the little loli mysteriously added, “I know, it’s a secret. This will also be added to the little secrets between the 2 of us. Alice won’t tell others.”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly and nodded. Then, Alice blurted another surprising sentence, “Brother, I know that my sister needs help in the capital alone. Your return this time must be to bring some people to the capital. Bring me along, ok?”

“Absolutely not now! Let’s wait for a while.” Chen Rui shook his head quickly. At this time, Shea had just settled down and the capital situation was not stable. If Alice went, it would only add chaos and make Shea even more distracted.

The little loli’s mouth suddenly pouted, “If you don’t take me, I will divulge your secrets!”

Great! She is a blackhearted little loli indeed. She immediately turns her face and threatens me once she is unsatisfied.

“Isn’t that just a little secret that belongs to us?” Chen Rui deliberately emphasized the word “us”. Facing the little loli who quickly turned hostile, he had no choice but to use honey trap.

This sentence made the little loli blush, but she didn’t give in, “Women have a strong urge to pour their hearts out. Especially a sad woman, she definitely can’t keep a secret.”

Sad woman? Chen Rui was dumbfounded. With his eyes closed, he could guess that this was another line from an unwholesome book.

“Look, what did I see? There is an Alice hanging around the boss’ neck?” The only person who called Chen Rui as “boss” was the Ms. Miser Bodyguard.

“Olypheus!” The little loli excitedly waved to Ms. Miser. Judging from this familiarity, it was not the first time both of them met, and their relationship was good. Except for Athena, most of the little loli’s good friends have 1 thing in common, flat-chested, which might be the standard of the little loli’s friend selection.

The little loli immediately showed confusion and asked Chen Rui, “Are you the boss of Olypheus?”

Olypheus once complained in front of Alice about how her “boss” was not benevolent, how insidious and cunning he was as well as tricked her into signing an extremely unequal contract. He even did not pay her arrears, deducted her hundreds of millions of black crystal coins and a series of heinous crimes.

At that time, the little loli followed Ms. Miser and furiously criticized the boss who never mentioned his name, but she did not expect that it was actually Chen Rui.

Chen Rui glanced at Olypheus and put the little loli down, “You know, I’m a financial officer who manages money. She is hired…”

“It must be that Olypheus is too greedy for money, so you exploit her, right?” Although the little loli was not satisfied with being let go, she immediately established a positive image of Chen Rui in her heart while her new friend, Olypheus, became an old lady who was greedy in the story told by her brother, “The Tale of the Fisherman and the Fish.”

Isabella’s figure appeared behind Olypheus. She must have received the news that Alice was blocking the door and wanted to get rid of the troublesome little loli. Now that Shea was far away in the capital, the little loli had become “lawless” without a sister who could hold the empire’s little princess.

Olypheus didn’t realize that she had become a negative image, and she came to Chen Rui with a grin, “Boss, are you going to take me to the capital as a helper? But I have been spending too much these days, and I have spent all the money on entertaining friends. Can you give me the salary and benefits of a few months in advance?”

Ms. Miser actually learned to loot a burning house and raise the conditions. I don’t know if she is influenced by Isabella.

“Hmph!” Alice relentlessly debunked Olypheus’s lie, “I have been paying for it these days; you have not spent anything.”

Olypheus calculated it seriously, “At 2 o’clock in the afternoon the day before yesterday, didn’t I treat you to eating cotton candy?

Alice also calculated seriously, “You snatched it from someone else and didn’t spend any money. That guy wanted to molest you, but you robbed all of his money and clothes, then you bought me cotton candy. After that, I didn’t eat it but you ate it yourself. I have treated you to eat hot pot, barbecue, steamed dumplings, cakes, pudding and fruit wine these days…”

“Mom says before that thrift is a virtue.” Olypheus said while sobbing, “But most of the people here know me, so it’s hard to succeed. Why don’t we go to the capital and rob a few guys together? Let’s find those ignorant guys and we split the money that we robbed. You get 1%? No, 0.01%? It’s 1 in a 10,000 ah, so much!”

There were already sweat on Chen Rui’s forehead: Ms. Black Dragon actively and enthusiastically wants to go to the capital for this purpose? And the proportion of the spoils… “So much” is the denominator, ok? Why don’t you give 1 in a billion?

Olypheus, who was frugal, still looks pitiful. When Alice heard the keyword the capital, she immediately ignored other things and nodded desperately, “Okay, okay!”

Chen Rui, “…”

Isabella, “…”

TL: 😑, the little loli is here to get what she wants; Nice math Ms. Miser 😏, 1 in a 10,000 is so much for her, so she is right; Dodo you got to feed something the little horse likes…

chapters.title: Chapter 564 - The Little Loli Goes To The Capital
chapters.body:
Chapter 564 - The Little Loli Goes To The Capital

Chapter 564: The Little Loli Goes to the Capital

“Alice, stop messing around.” Chen Rui could only shake his head helplessly. “Your sister is not firmly established in the capital now. You don’t want to distract her. When the situation settles down, I will pick you up by then.”

“I know that Eve and Alian will also go to the capital with Uncle Skye’s family. After Athena becomes the lord, she will be busy all day just like my sister… It’s really boring,” Alice said aggrievedly, “Moreover, I’m not going to make trouble. I really want to help my sister. Doesn’t the capital have a branch of the Princess Retail Store? I can…”

“No! At most, I will let Olypheus stay with you!” Chen Rui could not give in with this question. He said with a stern face.

Alice rarely saw his stern face, and her eyes were a little teary. When Olypheus heard that she couldn’t go to the capital to do a few “big business”, her face also looked bitter.

“Actually… it’s not impossible for Alice to go to the capital now.” It was actually Isabella who said that.

The little loli’s eyes lit up, “Sister Isabella!”

“Sister? Isn’t it the old woman or Grandma Isabella?” Isabella smiled. It was obvious that the little loli and the mature woman had not only met before, but they also had a sharp confrontation.

The cause of Alice’s dislike for Isabella dated back to Isabella’s visit to the Dark Moon as an envoy. Of course, there was no lack of the little loli’s envy and hatred for the size of the mature woman’s breasts.

Later, after Isabella “disappeared” as the leader of the Dark Moon’s Dark Demon, the little loli rarely heard about her. Until recently, Shea told the little loli about Isabella to get Alice to cooperate with the protection of Isabella and the Dark Demon.

The little loli’s eyes rolled, “Sister Isabella has a broad mind, so don’t stoop down to little girls like me. Olypheus and I are good friends, and her sister is my sister. Sister, please take me to the capital!”

“Little girl?” Isabella was a little surprised at the little loli’s humble claim of herself, knowing that the word “little” was taboo to little loli.

“I’m still young.” The little loli was not sloppy in principle. She also held Olypheus, who was also a “little” girl, “I will grow up. Please take care of me in the future, sister.”

“You’re the little princess indeed.” Isabella smiled slightly and turned her gaze to Ms. Black Dragon, “Olypheus, you also want to go to the capital?”

Compared with Ms. Zola’s fake daze, some aspects of Ms. Black Dragon were closer to the real daze (except financially). She was completely puzzled by Alice and Isabella’s conversation. When she heard that sentence, she nodded quickly.

Olypheus once visited the capital last time, and she almost exhausted all the resources of the Dark Demon base. In the impression of Ms. Black Dragon, the Fallen Angel Capital was a good place with foolish rich people where she could get rich if she went there quickly.

“Alright, little princess, I can take you to the capital. But if you really want to help instead of messing up, then you have to listen to me!” As Isabella smiled charmingly, her big chest trembled slightly which made the little loli’s eyes full of envy.

When Alice heard it, she jumped up happily, “Sister Isabella, I will listen to you!”

Chen Rui kept hinting Isabella, but she turned a deaf ear and smiled, “Okay. Olypheus, you help the little princess prepare first. Particularly the Princess Retail Store needs to be arranged well. I will come to the palace to pick up both of you later.”

“Understood, sister.” Olypheus and the little loli responded in unison. They cheerfully held hands and ran out.

“Isabella!” Chen Rui finally couldn’t help but screamed. When Olypheus and the little loli heard this scream, they suddenly accelerated their pace without looking back for fear of a change. They disappeared in the blink of an eye.

Isabella smiled indifferently, “Why? Distressed? The man that both big and little princess loves?”

“Don’t change the topic! What are you planning?” Chen Rui frowned, “Isn’t it troublesome if Alice goes to the capital now?”

“What do you and Shea think of Alice? A vase? A flower in the greenhouse? A sister who will never grow up and always have to be cared for?” Isabella scoffed, “She is not an ordinary family’s daughter. She is the princess of an empire, and the only sister of the empress! The “protection” that you deem will only turn into indulgence, doting, making her more capricious, arrogant, and strongly dependent. Then, without your protection by her side and when you cannot control her rebellious mentality, she will make mistakes that you and herself will regret!”

The sudden aggressiveness in Isabella’s eyes made Chen Rui startled slightly. He shook his head, “She is only 14 years old after all…”

Isabella asked indifferently, “Do you know what I was doing when I was 14? What were you doing when you were 14?”

Chen Rui wanted to say that he himself was in junior high school when he was 14, and he had a crush on the charismatic music committee member in the class, but this glorious history could not be used to refute her. Isabella’s calm voice sounded again, “Don’t underestimate Alice. The 2 years she is in the Princess Retail Store is not in vain. Her role in the capital will be much greater than you think. It is not only beneficial for experience, but also for her growth. As for the safety issue, I can use my life to guarantee, so don’t worry. If you don’t let her go to the capital, then I won’t go either.”

Chen Rui was silent for a while. Isabella’s reaction was beyond his expectations, but he could not refute it. The young eagle would have to grow up 1 day, and the eagle would eventually fly in the sky. Alice had her own personality and future; she wasn’t a pet raised in captivity. Although he disagreed with Isabella’s overly radical view, he also hoped that Alice could be stronger and have her own independent ability. Perhaps under the premise of protection, he could let go gradually.

A few hours later, the “teleportation” started. Chen Rui didn’t have Zola’s space ability, so he could only set up a one-time teleportation magic circle to connect with the teleportation portal at the financial officer’s residence. This magic circle took Chen Rui a long time to set up. It was already dusk when he finished it, and all the people who were going to the capital had already gathered.

There were 220 people going to the capital this time which was already the limit of the Rainbow Valley’s transmission. At Isabella’s insistence, Alice was finally brought along, and Loki who was protecting her also followed. In addition, there were Olypheus, Tetenis, and Skye’s family.

The palace defense at the Fallen Angel Empire was very strong. The magic circles alone could prevent the simultaneous attacks of several peak stage Demon Overlords, but Shea currently lacked reliable guards, so this time he brought more than 200 imperial guards led by Kaguli.

In terms of the personnel of the Dark Moon, Athena served as the representative lord, Kaguron still served as the legion commander of the Red Blood Legion, and Nesta still served as the legion commander of the Flame Legion. The original Magic Shadow Cavalry was merged into the Flame Legion. Nesta was originally the capital army commander, but now he had become a puppet of the God-Eating Mask. He was still staying in the Dark Moon just in case. Tim was still the legion commander of the Moon Shadow Legion. Roman served as the sheriff. “Chen Rui” still served as the financial officer, but due to the human’s illness, the main affairs were handled by the assistant, Saiful Family’s patriarch Old Ford.

Under the lead of several generals, some soldiers of the capital army that were stranded in the Dark Moon were allocated to the Red Spirit Estate. The rest went north to return to the capital. 100,000 undead army led by Guradam went to the Walan Fortress. The Red Blood Flame Army urgently recruited and trained new recruits while strengthening the defense and detection in the estate. Although Catherine might not really attack, the Dark Moon still could not put their guards down. They must put up a full defensive stance.

Athena, Kia and Chen Rui only met in a hurry before they separated, but both women understood that now the capital’s affairs were extremely critical, and Chen Rui’s task was not light. Besides, with the [Star Gate] and the Rainbow Valley’s passage, it was still very fast to come back.

Chen Rui led a group of people through the misty Rainbow Valley and teleported to the capital.

“Go straight to the north, and you can reach the capital in about 6 hours. You all will be led by Madam Dark Demon. Pay attention to hide your trails along the way. Protect the little princess, and Sir Aguile will pick you up over there.” The “Madam Dark Demon” that Chen Rui mentioned was the veiled Isabella. There were many outsiders here, so he naturally wanted to keep her identity secret.

The little loli had already learned before the departure that “Chen Rui ” would not go with them for the time being. He would come for a secret meeting a few days later. Therefore, she obediently followed Isabella and the others without saying much.

After everyone walked away, Chen Rui immediately opened the [Star Gate], returned to the capital’s palace, and reported the incident to Shea. Shea was surprised when she heard that Alice was following, and she asked him to get some men to greet them immediately.

A few hours later, a group of people appeared in the palace.

After seeing Her Majesty Empress, the imperial guards led by Kaguli immediately began the patrol. However, due to the limited number of people, they mainly guarded the hall and the bedroom.

Although Shea had only been away from the Dark Moon for 1 day, she still had a warm feeling in her heart when she saw these familiar and loyal guards. However, she didn’t show a good face to the little loli. She gave Alice a “deal with you later” gaze. The little loli knew her sister’s temperament. She smiled as she followed Kaguli to rest in the bedroom.

“Master Tetenis, Master Fonsaq.” Shea lowered her head slightly.

Tetenis bowed slightly, “I have no choice. Both of my apprentices are so loyal toward Your Majesty, especially this guy named Aguile or Your Majesty’s fiancé. I have to move my old bones, but I can only stay here for 1 year.”

Fonsaq, who had always been using the name Skye, also bowed and spoke up, “Your Majesty does not need to be so polite. Aguile’s matter is my matter. I will join the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association as soon as possible. As Master Tetenis’s identity is a bit special, he wants to change his name to join the Potioneer Association. Hope Your Majesty can send someone to arrange the specific registration.”

“No problem, thank you masters! I have arranged a house for both of you, please go to rest first.”

Fonsaq was the Demon Realm’s top leather mechanic master for many years. With his reputation and Shea’s support, it was not difficult to become the president of the Fallen Angel Empire Mechanic Association. The news of his resurrection would also surely shock the Demon Realm; Tetenis was even more impressive. On the surface, he was the top mechanic master proficient in accessories, but in fact, he was a dual quasi-grand master of potion and alchemy. It was equivalent to the Demon Realm’s top alchemist which was far better than Nate’s kind of deceitful role. It was easy for him to use pharmaceutics knowledge to enter the Potioneer Association and create a huge influence power.

After Tetenis and his family left, Isabella took the lead in speaking, “Your Majesty, there is an old saying called, ‘Haste makes waste.” According to my understanding of the Mechanic Association and Potioneer Association, Master Fonsaq can appear first, and that Master Tetenis… Uh, it’s actually a quasi-grand master, he should hide for a period of time and choose a suitable time to join the Potioneer Association. Also, I advise Princess Alice not to live in the palace, but to temporarily live in a house purchased by the Dark Demon with Olypheus and Master Tetenis. In addition to Loki, Olypheus can also protect the little princess. With the 2 dark elf friends of the little princess, Princess Alice should not feel lonely there.”

“Your suggestion is good, I will seriously consider it” Shea nodded, “You are much more familiar with the capital than me. Now I have an urgent task. Are you confident to control the secret intelligence department in the hands of Obsidian in the shortest time possible?”

Isabella said calmly, “I can take over the secret intelligence department, but there is a condition. I require independent decision-making power and can choose not to be controlled by Your Majesty when necessary.”

Shea’s gaze showed a sharp expression as she looked at Isabella. Unexpectedly, a hint of warmth flashed past her eyes, “Okay, I just want the results, and I won’t limit your methods.”

“Your Majesty really has the courage!” Isabella felt Shea’s gaze and smiled slightly, “Then let me ask first, has Your Majesty got the allegiance of the Toro Family?”

Shea glanced at Chen Rui and nodded, “Yes.”

“That’s easy then. I was originally the highest controller of the capital secret intelligence department. After I disappeared, my assistant, Solin, the niece of Toro Family’s Old Cowen, took over the secret intelligence department. As long as there is Toro Family’s full cooperation to get rid of a few hindrances, it shouldn’t be a problem to regain control of the secret intelligence department. We can also add the people from the Dark Demon into it.”

Shea’s eyes lit up, “This matter will be fully entrusted to you. If there is a need for manpower, I will do my best to satisfy you even though I don’t have many people available.”

Isabella took a look at Chen Rui with interest, “Does this include the future Prince Consort Royal Highness?”

“What do you mean?” Shea asked with a deep meaning.

Isabella pondered for a moment, then she smiled and said, “I won’t be able to use him for the time being, but maybe I might not be able to do without this Royal Highness in the future.”

“You can act accordingly.”

The last few sentences seemed to be a bit awkward. While Chen Rui on the side listened, for some reason, he thought of a song inexplicably, and sweat suddenly appeared on his forehead.

TL: Hmmm, bloody massacre in the harem soon?

chapters.title: Chapter 565 - The Meeting Of Elder Families
chapters.body:
Chapter 565 - The Meeting Of Elder Families

Chapter 565: The Meeting of Elder Families

2 days later, astonishing news circulated in the streets. The Demon Realm’s top veteran mechanic master Fonsaq, who had been missing for many years, suddenly appeared in the Fallen Angel Capital and joined the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association!

Fonsaq was the top leather master of the Demon Realm. He was once the top person of the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association. He won the admiration of the entire mechanics industry. Later, he gave up his long position to the newly joined duo-specialized mechanic master, Nate. Nate was known as the top mechanic master of the Demon Realm, but the reason for this title was that he was duo-specialized in metal and leather, so he won the first place with the rule of masters contest. In terms of crafting leather alone, he was inferior to Fonsaq.

After Fonsaq gave up his position as the chairman, he devoted himself to researching, but he died suddenly more than 10 years ago. Countless mechanics felt that it was a pity. However, in the past 2 years, a major event in the Bloody Empire’s mechanics world had caused a sensation in the Demon Realm.

A teenager named Richard with a talent of mutated magic eyes joined the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association and became Nate’s apprentice. However, this Richard was Fonsaq’s apprentice, and he sacrificed himself to expose Nate’s true face to everyone.

Fonsaq was actually persecuted by Nate and fled the Bloody Empire because Nate wanted to devour his skills with evil sorcery! After Fonsaq’s “death”, some geniuses died or disappeared inexplicably, all of them were harmed by Nate!

This aroused the anger of all the mechanics of the Demon Realm. Nate, whose reputation was ruined, was nearly killed by a group beating in the Bloody Empire’s Mechanic Association. The Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen ordered the removal of Nate from all positions and imprisoned him. Fonsaq was finally vindicated.

This incident showed that Fonsaq did not die. The people originally thought he would return to the Bloody Empire, but they did not expect him to actually join the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association!

The Mechanic Association of the Fallen Angel Empire was weaker than the other 2 empires. Firstly, there was no such background as the ancient magic tower and the Book Collection Hall which caused a large loss of talent. Secondly, there were no top masters such as Anderson and Nate. Thirdly, the old president Riconk was once a teacher of Crown Prince Grimm. Not only did he not get the strong support of the ruler, but he also suffered from Obsidian’s suspicion and suppression from time to time.

Now that Obsidian was dethroned, Crown Prince Grimm’s daughter, Shea, became empress. With the addition of top-notch masters like Fonsaq at this time, it was a boost of confidence for the mechanics of the Fallen Angel Empire. Even the mechanics at the bottom level were inexplicably excited.

Fonsaq did not come alone, but he also brought a mysterious friend with him. This mysterious man wore a cloak which faintly showed his old face. He was a master of metal proficiency, named Simon, whose realm was not below Fonsaq. He also had considerable attainments in accessories proficiency. The 2 top masters were leather master and metal master respectively, and they only took 1 day to convince all the masters with absolute strength. If the mechanics world of the Dark Shadow Empire or the Bloody Empire hadn’t had this effect, it was because the mechanics world of the Fallen Angel Empire had gradually declined over the years. The participation of the top masters was nothing short of a timely help.

Although the Alchemist Association was a public organization of the 3 major empires, the president of this empire was determined by the royal family. Riconk had previously requested to resign as the president several times because of his old age. However, because he was highly respected and was the pillar of the Mechanic Association, Obsidian was also afraid that the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association, which was originally sluggish, would plummet, so he had not been approved. With the arrival of Fonsaq, Riconk once again asked for resignation from the new Empress Shea, and he finally got the permission. Master Fonsaq, who was recommended by Riconk, naturally became the new president of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association.

In fact, the process was not as simple as the result. There were still some obstacles in the middle. However, with the help of Shea, Riconk, and others, the obstacles were resolved 1 by 1. Fonsaq succeeded in becoming the president and the high rank consultant of the palace at the same time. The former president, Riconk’s high rank consultant of the palace’s position remained unchanged. With Fonsaq’s reputation and Riconk’s prestige, coupled with Shea’s large amount of material support to fund the association, the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association quickly settled down, After the “change of personnel”, it became 1 of the strong supporters of the new Empress Shea.

Fonsaq’s rapid succession to the chairman of the Mechanic Association was clear to the people with ulterior motives. This was a good move for Shea. With Fonsaq, the worth of the Mechanic Association would be increased gradually. There might not be any special effects in a short period of time, but it was a very important boost in the long run.

Fonsaq’s re-emergence in the Fallen Angel Empire caused a sensation in the mechanics world. There were different opinions for a while. The most reasonable one was that Fonsaq hid in the Dark Moon after being persecuted by Nate, and he got the help from Crown Prince Grimm and Shea.

The Mechanic Association was just a small action, but it was enough to show that the newly enthroned Her Majesty Empress had already begun to act. For a time, eyes from all directions were fixed on the palace. Some were vigilant, defensive and frightened. Most of them were fence sitters observing the situation.

The Fallen Angel Capital, elder families, Boll Family.

The heads of the elder families and elders were gathering together for a meeting.

“Don’t you want to say something, Patriarch Redotan?” The Leif Family’s elder, who was in the early stage of the Demon Overlord, Lunters asked with a sneer.

Redotan, the patriarch of the Toro Family, slightly smiled and did not answer.

“Patriarch Redotan has nothing to say, right?” Mishan Family’s patriarch, Angley, also showed hostility. Mishan Family’s elder, peak stage of the Demon Overlord, Barroco, was transferred from the capital to Tekula Fortress by Shea. The recent acts of the new empress made the usually sensitive Angley feel anxious instinctively. He didn’t know when the Dark Shadow Empire would end the damn military operation so that Baroco could rush back to the capital as soon as possible.

Lunters said without giving face, “When Obsidian was in power, the Toro Family married the regent’s daughter and had all the power they wanted. Now that Obsidian was dethroned and Empress Shea took over, the Toro Family immediately handed over the secret intelligence department to the Dark Demon which is under the command of the empress. You become the first person in the elder family to support Her Majesty Shea. Redotan, did you sacrifice the benefit of the entire family for your children? Or do you think you can get all the power again by supporting the empress? I think it is necessary for the Toro Family to re-elect a new patriarch who is truly competent.”

The Toro Family elder, Vanim, who was at the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord spoke, “Redotan’s decision is the decision of the entire Toro Family.”

This sentence expressed the Toro Family’s position. Everyone was secretly calculating.

“I just want to remind all of you that the capital and the entire empire belong to Her Majesty Empress.” Old Cowen, who had been silent for a long time, said, “Furthermore, Her Majesty Shea is not Obsidian.”

“The capital is not the Dark Moon either.” Angely replied coldly, “It is the responsibility of the elder families to guard the empire, but Her Majesty Shea is young after all. Some decisions may not be well thought out or backfired. As the elder families, we have the right and responsibility to remind Her Majesty to reduce mistakes and make the empire operate better…”

“Just a polite remark!” Redotan interrupted Angley rudely, “Your responsibility and power are focused on the interests of the small group! Including the so-called loyalty! You only want to protect or maximize your interests! You only want to have the power to control the ruler! Have you ever thought about it? When the stubborn pursuit of interest becomes a stumbling block to the ruler’s ruling, you will be uprooted without mercy! Then you will affect all the elder families!

Angley showed a fierce look in his eyes and shouted, “Uproot? Do you think Her Majesty Shea is Raizen the Great? Or Catherine the Great? Aren’t you protecting the interest of your family as well? Don’t forget, even if you try to please the empress and the royal families, you are a member of the elder family after all! If you don’t want to be kicked away after the end of your value, you should unite with us and advance as well as retreat together! Since this is an internal meeting, I’m not afraid to put it out there. The external enemies are eyeing us now. With the foundation of Her Majesty Empress, she will not touch the elder families at this time. If we don’t take advantage of the current situation to consolidate our power to form a scale that will deter Her Majesty, once the threat of external enemies is resolved, there will be a real danger when the foundation of the empress gradually becomes firmer!”

There is already a real danger. Maybe you will know how powerful Her Majesty really is only when you finally fail. Redotan said it in his heart and did not say anything more.

Merlotta, the patriarch of the Leif Family, spoke up, “I received news that several stores were acquired at the same time, including the Leisure Moon Inn in the southern suburbs, which had been idle due to the explosion. It is now undergoing reconstruction. This buyer is the person in charge of the capital Princess Retail Store branch, Lilu. There is likely to be some action.”

The capital market was large and abundant, but no matter how large it was, it had been divided among families. The Princess Retail Store wanted a portion too now. Unless a new market was created, otherwise it was bound to seize the share of the original market. This was where the conflict of interest lied.

Angley sneered, “Everyone, it seems that it is necessary to let that Ms. Lilu retract those wild ideas. Those stores will receive special ‘entertainment’.”

Lunters pondered, “There is no need to make a fuss. The capital is not the Dark Moon. The economic structure is already very fixed. Whether it is the Princess Retail Store or the hot pot restaurant, it is just a slightly famous store. Those novelties are not difficult to imitate. After reaching a certain level, the popularity will drop. The capital has its own rules. With the people below, a mere Princess Retail Store can’t stir up a wave.”

“Okay! That’s all for today’s meeting.” The highest elder, Stiller of the Boll Family, stood up. “I had contact with Her Majesty in the Dark Moon. Her Majesty is a bold ruler who is unwilling to be restricted by others. The Dark Moon’s military affairs are completely controlled by her, but we have also seen the prosperity and power of the Dark Moon. The defeat of Prince Obsidian is the best example. At present, the strength of the secret intelligence department is completely in the hands of Her Majesty, and the Mechanic Association is also a long-term strategy. No matter what interests or purposes it is for, I suggest that we should be more cautious in our actions and not be too aggressive.”

The elder families currently had 3 kinds of forces. The radicals led by Angelie were deeply rooted in their self-reliance. They advocated restricting Shea in every aspect, forcing the empress to adopt a compromising attitude toward the elder families like Obsidian. The second type was neutral like Stiller which also had a considerable portion. The third type was the Toro Family which supported the empress, and there was only 1 family at present.

At the end of the meeting, Stiller watched everyone leave and stopped her old friend Cowen who had left last. The 2 were called the 2 big elders. Both were the veteran Demon Overlords who fought in battles together. They had a close relationship.

Stiller didn’t beat around the bushes. She just sighed, “I didn’t expect you to make a decision so quickly.”

Old Cowen was silent for a moment, and he replied, “I have no choice.”

“Is it because of Loray’s son?” Stiller frowned, “I can understand, but if it’s just that, the Toro Family still has a choice.”

“No, there is no other choice.” Old Cowen shook his head meaningfully as he turned and left, leaving Stiller standing still with shock in her eyes.

TL: Will Stiller who had fought in the capital crusade be the 2nd to support Shea?

chapters.title: Chapter 566 - Showing Weakness And Ruins
chapters.body:
Chapter 566 - Showing Weakness And Ruins

Chapter 566: Showing Weakness and Ruins

A few days later, the palace summoned a second meeting.

This time, Shea’s proposal was about the lord’s arrangement. The Dark Moon crusade killed a total of 12 lords. Apart from 4 people who were hereditary and confirmed heirs, the remaining 8 estates had no ownership and candidates needed to be arranged immediately.

Shea proposed to merge the 2 small estates close to the Red Spirit Estate and White Feather Estate into the 2 big estates respectively. As a reward, a medium-sized estate would be rewarded to Royce, the hero behind the scenes, for lurking around Joseph for many years and making great contributions to the Dark Moon. The elder families and the royal families would discuss and select the lords for the remaining 2 medium-sized estates and 4 small-sized estates.

Unsurprisingly, the elder families such as Angley expressed their opposition to this proposal. The 4 major estates were originally very large and their power was too huge. For the long-term interests of the empire, it was necessary to control them as much as possible instead of letting them grow. Rewarding property or treasure could be considered, but the estate was absolutely not rewardable.

This opinion was quite valid. It was indeed from the perspective of the great interests of the empire. However, the “4 major estates” proposed by Angley included the Dark Moon and the Blue Lava Estate. In fact, they were secretly opposing the rewards that Shea proposed for these 2 estates last time. Moreover, with the empire treasury left by Obsidian, it was very likely that Shea would have to pay for it if the so-called material rewards were to be honored.

Angley’s methods were quite experienced, using the high-resounding reason of taking care of the overall situation. He made full use of the rule to quietly weaken the ruler’s discretionary authority. Shea was now the empress of the empire who should focus on the broad interests of the empire. If she insisted on doing things her own way, some elder families and members of the royal families who were waiting and watching would re-evaluate her in their hearts. There would be more opponents, and her prestige would be further reduced.

Shea’s foundation was not stable as she was a new express. Even with the support of the Toro Family, she was still weak. In this case, there were not many choices. Finally, the rewards of the 2 estates were changed to material rewards, and the lord of the 7 estates would be divided among the royal families and the elder families. Royce became one of the candidates for the smallest estate under Shea’s persistence. It was a “concession” to Her Majesty Empress by the elder families.

Many people could see that Shea’s eyes were unhappy, but more of it was helplessness.

After the meeting, Old Cowen of the Toro Family stayed and reported to Shea some of the situations in the last elder meeting.

“Although the Sword of Fallen Angel made Your Majesty’s accession to the throne received everyone’s support, many members of the royal families and elder families have expressed doubts about Your Majesty’s ability. Many people are still in the observation stage. Master Fonsaq joining the Mechanic Association is a good long-term move. It’s just that there will probably be great difficulties if Your Majesty wants to use the Princess Retail Store to change the current situation. The capital’s business structure is relatively fixed. Those families will unite to boycott the Princess Retail Store in order to prevent the sharing of interests, then I’m afraid…”

Shea shook her head, “I know what you mean. What I can tell you is that Master Fonsaq and Princess Retail Store have another role. It doesn’t matter if those branches are suppressed, crowded out, or even closed down. At the next meeting, I will raise the issue of the establishment of the financial minister, minister of military affairs, as well as the right and left prime ministers again. I can be certain that the elder family members will strongly oppose and reject the proposal of giving up a position. At that time, the Toro Family’s opposition can be a bit more fierce to make my failure seem more real.”

Old Cowen was taken aback, and he quickly reacted, “Your Majesty is deliberately showing weakness? But in doing so, Your Majesty must carefully weigh the gains and losses. If this continues, I’m afraid that Your Majesty’s prestige will…”

“Toro Family is the first elder family to support me. In the days to come, your experience and the power of the Toro Family will become one of my trusted arms. I hope I can listen more to your suggestions.” Shea’s eyes gleamed, “But in this current environment, there are some key things that I can’t disclose for the time being. You just need to do it, understand?”

Old Cowen looked at Shea’s determined eyes and felt a lot more at ease in his heart. He bowed deeply, “Understood.”

As expected, Shea suffered another setback in the next 2 meetings, and the intensity of decision-making began to become more tactful. The interests of the elder families were considered in many aspects. For Angley and others, this was a good signal. Shea was an empress after all. The original intention of Angley was not to spur Shea to step down, but to maintain the power and influence of the elder families, so he also showed proper obedience and concessions. Royce’s appointment was approved, and he became the lord of that small estate.

The estate Royce obtained was called Green Shade, which was a relatively small area with dangerous terrain and barren soil. It was located north of the Red Spirit Estate. In addition to the Red Spirit Estate, it also bordered several small and medium estates. To put it nicely, it was an important buffer zone for each estate, but to put it bluntly, its development space was restricted. However, this did not affect the joy and gratitude of Royce. The glory of the Kunda Family shone again at this moment rather than just restoring a surname. Royce knew very well what was the real reason for becoming a lord. He was very grateful for the decision to surrender in the Blue Lake. This was the most correct choice he made in his life. In the beginning, Royce and Arux were important pawns against Joseph for Chen Rui, but with the growth of Chen Rui’s power and the increase of the Dark Moon’s talents, his and Arux’s role was diminishing. However, after Shea ascended the throne, Chen Rui did not forget his servant who no longer had any usage value. The Kunda Family not only restored its honor in his hands, but it also became more shining. Royce secretly made up his mind to make some achievements to repay the master’s kindness.

With the permission of Madam Athena, Royce returned to the Dark Moon from the Red Spirit Estate, then he left the Dark Moon with his wife, Vasasha, his close friend, Arux, and some confidants toward the Green Shade Estate.

At the capital, apart from the original Leisure Moon Inn in the southern suburbs which was still being renovated and reorganized, 4 new Princess Retail Store branches were opened in the city. However, many shops nearby immediately began to sell products that were similar to the Princess Retail Store at lower prices and they used all kinds of means to grab the customers. The Princess Retail Stores were in an extremely difficult situation for a while, and it was unable to make ends meet.

When the Dark Moon’s Princess Retail Store first opened, there was a craze for novel products, then it quickly cooled down under the control of other merchants. Nowadays, the Princess Royal had become an empress, and the Princess Retail Store also represented Her Majesty Empress to a certain extent, but there were business circles and rules in business. The rule in this circle was also honoring strength. If you lost your competitiveness and just relied on the power of empress to gain a foothold, even if you could get a temporary benefit, it would not last for long. Shea would lose more people’s support. The gain was not worth the loss.

General George’s army withdrew from the capital and returned to the Warlock Fortress to guard. Sicali also withdrew a part of the army. The expression of this move made Angley and others more assured. There was a good feeling that the situation was under control.

During the confrontation between Shea and the elder families, Chen Rui did not stay in the capital, but he found a guard with a similar figure and wore a mask and a cloak to appear next to Shea from time to time. This was the benefit of the masked man. Anyway, no one knew the true face of “Aguile”.

Chen Rui went to the White Feather Estate. There were still many good things here that he did not have sufficient time to take away last time. He was finally able to free up his time. The medusa tribe was on standby in the White Feather City, and the lamp spirits who accompanied him to deal with “Sicali” had returned to the underground ruins of the Loeb Mine.

Chen Rui rode the wyvern and flew directly to Loeb Mine. Last time at his instruction, Sicali ordered the suspension of Loeb Mine mining under the pretext of demonic beasts issues. He closed the mining area for the lamp spirits to act. Chen Rui did not encounter any obstacles on his way, and he went straight to the underground ruins of Loeb Mine.

The ruins of the ancient alchemy civilization were actually a mobile mechanical castle. Unlike before he left, many damaged parts of the castle were repaired to a certain extent with glittering lights shining everywhere like countless brilliant gems.

“Master!” Genie and Gensha led the lamp spirits to salute Chen Rui. Genie once gave her life as the key to unlock the ruins. Chen Rui left behind a large number of aura fruits before he left, which were transformed into top-level energy essence that resurrected Genie and others. Not only that, there were more than 2,000 resurrected lamp spirits. There were 72 Demon Emperor golden-eyed lamp spirits including Genie and Gensha, 830 Demon King and Great Demon King silver-eyed lamp spirits, and 1,300 black-eyed lamp spirits of the Higher Demon level.

The lamp spirits of the Demon Emperor level did not have territory power, but they had a long-range energy attack and a special force field similar to territory. This force field could also be used in combination. The more people there were, the greater the power. Chen Rui had seen it in the illusion.

Due to the scarcity of energy, when Genie and others competed with medusas for the snake blood fruit, they could only use hand-to-hand combat and magic talents, and they could not use these energy-consuming special attacks. With the top-level energy essence provided by Chen Rui now, it was as if a poor person who lacked food and clothing became a wealthy rich man in one fell swoop, they could naturally exert their strongest power.

Such a large number of lamp spirits were a very powerful force. 70-plus Demon Emperor level lamp spirits could be dispatched at the right time to kill the ordinary Demon Overlord powerhouse. What’s more, there were terrifying war machines like the crystal beasts, assemble puppets and giant crystal beasts in the ruins.

However, they were all seriously damaged. The crystal beasts and giant crystal beasts were basically unusable. There were several complete assemble puppets which could be used as usual after replenishing energy. It was just that the attribute of the lamp spirits conflicted with the assemble puppets, so they could not act as a pilot.

Chen Rui frowned and asked Genie next to him, “Can you repair these crystal beasts or assemble puppets?”

Genie shook her head, “Lamp spirits do not have this ability. Even if our heart lamp is damaged and dying, we can’t downgrade to repair ourselves.”

Chen Rui showed a look of regret. It seems that only Tetenis can research this. Perhaps a large number of senior goblin warriors are needed as assistants.

“Master, why don’t you make gremlin servants? The giant crystal beasts may be more troublesome, but it shouldn’t be a problem for them to repair the crystal beast and assemble puppets.

Genie’s subsequent words ignited hope in Chen Rui’s eyes. Gremlin servants?

“Master is the inheritor of civilization. You don’t know about gremlin servants?” Genie showed curiosity.

Due to the devour, Chen Rui’s memory was very incomplete. He really hadn’t heard of it before. His mind shifted and he replied, “You should have heard from Gensha that after I accepted the inheritance, I fought against the strong enemy underground. Although I eventually defeated him, the inheritance memory was also affected because of this. Some of it is vague, and I can’t remember many things. Now you tell me about the gremlin servants.”

Genie did not doubt anything, and she replied respectfully, “In the alchemy civilization, the giant crystal beast is the guardian who defends the entire castle. The assemble puppet is equal to the war weapon. People can control it to exert power beyond themselves. The stronger the spirit power of the pilot, the greater the power of the war puppet. The crystal beast is equivalent to a guard who protects the safety of the master. We, the lamp spirits, are magicians on the battlefield; in life, we are the maids who dedicate everything to the master. The gremlin servants are the lowest servants with no combat power and they cannot leave the limited range of the castle, but they have the special ability to repair and manufacture. If we can create a large number of gremlin servants, plus the top-level energy essence provided by master, not only the crystal beasts, but the entire castle can be restored to operation.”

Chen Rui was overjoyed, then he was confused again, “So how do we make the gremlin servants?”

“There is now a large amount of top-level energy essence which is enough to activate the city’s central life crystal and control the entire territory castle, then a large number of gremlin servants can be created by just providing energy.”

Chen Rui noticed Genie’s words, “Territory castle?”

“The entire mobile castle is a territory kingdom. I only know this knowledge with my authority, and the rest is the inheritance memory of master.”

Territory kingdom? It was not the first time Chen Rui heard this term. He had heard it several times from Satan. It should be a territory mystery beyond the realm of Demon Overlord, and it was probably the prototype of [Kingdom of God].

According to Genie, this mobile castle is actually a territory kingdom? Chen Rui thought of Satan’s Mountain Seckred, and he faintly understood it. It was just that the so-called “inheritance memory” was just a guise for possession of the body, and the lamp spirits didn’t seem to know this. The Demi-God soul that was unsuccessful in possessing was eventually devoured by Chen Rui. Most of the power still remained undigested in [Star Conversion]. After all, Chen Rui was not worthy of the inheritor title. He could even be considered the enemy of the entire castle. It was uncertain if he could truly control the entire castle. Maybe there would even be a danger.

Gremlin servants, crystal beasts, assemble puppets, giant crystal beasts… and this huge and powerful territory kingdom. I have to give it a try no matter how.

“Genie, you take me to the central life crystal now.”

“Yes, master.”

Genie led Chen Rui all the way through to a large palace. It was very similar to the main city palace that Chen Rui had seen in the illusion. After walking into the palace and passing through the spiral stairs, Genie stopped in front of a huge underground room, “Master, before you activate the central life crystal, I can only lead you until here. The control center of the main city is inside.”

“You go down first then.” Chen Rui nodded, and Genie bowed and stepped down.

This huge room had no main door, but the dim light faintly shone from the inside which was mysterious. Chen Rui took a deep breath and walked in.

As soon as he approached the entrance of the room, he felt a strong spirit fluctuation which seemed to have a terrifying offensive effect. Once there was a change, he would be annihilated instantly. Chen Rui hesitated and continued to move forward.

The spirit fluctuations became more and more terrifying, and it increased with each step forward. Even Chen Rui who had the spirit power level of S+ now felt trembling in his heart as if he was taking step after step toward the abyss of death.

Chen Rui’s consciousness became blurry under the pressure, and his 5 senses gradually lost their effect, but his body still moved forward firmly with the support of his will and almost instinctive movements.

He couldn’t see or hear clearly what danger was ahead; he was just kept moving forward.

In the process of this advancement, Chen Rui felt the inexhaustible thoughts enveloping him and infiltrating into his soul. The Super System continuously converted it into aura, but the speed and intensity of infiltration was extremely strong. The speed of conversion almost couldn’t keep up with the speed of infiltration. If this continued, perhaps his entire soul would be in danger of collapse.

Could it be another damn possession? Chen Rui felt deceived and was trying to escape. At this moment, the soul power stored in [Star Conversion] began to fluctuate. By right, the power in [Star Conversion] would not convert automatically unless Chen Rui absorbed it or passed it to his chosen target through [Dual Training]. Now this situation should be drawn by foreign consciousness.

The soul power in [Star Conversion] fluctuated more and more intensely, resonating with the foreign consciousness. Chen Rui’s mind shifted. He infiltrated his own spirit power into these soul powers. If it was during the “inheritance”, he would definitely be unable to do it, but it was not a problem since these soul powers had already belonged to him now. It was equivalent to the food in the refrigerator that could be eaten at any time.

The Demi-God’s soul power wrapped in Chen Rui’s spirit power finally couldn’t be restrained. It was constantly surging out under the attraction of powerful consciousness from the outside. Although the soul power stored in [Star Conversion] was huge, the surge speed still made Chen Rui secretly surprised. Fortunately, the attraction quickly weakened, and the soul power that surged out miraculously returned to his body. There was also an extra thing which seemed to be a kind of spiritual imprint, blending with his own spirit.

Before Chen Rui could react, the whole room was dazzlingly bright which looked completely different.

The entire huge room looked boundless and seemed to be an independent space. The ground material was an unknown metal, and there were strange facilities everywhere. In the center, a huge crystal was floating in between 2 golden round platforms that attached to the ceiling and the ground. It seemed to be connecting the sky and the ground with all kinds of strange symbols flashing around.

The crystal emitted a soft purple light, and a tender female voice sounded, “The soul power fits 100%. The spiritual imprint has been added. Welcome, my master.”

Why is it so like a computer ai system? Chen Rui was taken aback, thinking that he had crossovered again and came to a world of science fiction.

TL: He gets a territory kingdom like that? Will it hinder him from realizing his own territory kingdom?

chapters.title: Chapter 567 - Crystal Phoenix
chapters.body:
Chapter 567 - Crystal Phoenix

Chapter 567: Crystal Phoenix

Chen Rui felt a lot of strange things were added to his brain. His senses were suddenly sharpened by 100 times. His mind was extended from all directions; everything and every movement from the room to the entire palace were under his control.

This feeling did not consume his own spirit power, but it was an effect extended by the “network” of the central life crystal. It probably would disappear if he left this place.

This room was equivalent to the central control room of the entire castle. Judging from the surrounding conditions, it should also be an independent space. As Chen Rui tried to control with his mind, countless square shapes suddenly arched from the metal ground with strange luster, and they quickly transformed into a smooth chair.

Chen Rui felt very comfortable as he sat on it. This is not an illusion. He couldn’t help being overjoyed. He tried again one by one and found that the things in this room could indeed change freely with his mind. This meant that he had successfully activated the central life crystal and became the master.

His spontaneous idea just now to risk wrapping the soul power with his spirit power was correct.

Chen Rui tentatively asked, “What’s your name?”

The female voice replied, “My name is Crystal Phoenix, do I need to change it?”

Chen Rui had determined that this was a living entity that could interact, and he shook his head, “No. I ask a question. If my soul power can’t match, what will happen?”

“If the soul power fails to match, the intruder will be wiped out on the way into the control center; if it cannot be wiped out, the control center will self-explode. Now this control center has been printed with the spiritual imprint of the master which becomes an independent space. Master can enter the control center at any corner of the castle with just a thought. Without the permission of master, it is impossible to break in even if the entire Shike Castle is destroyed.”

Chen Rui secretly wiped a cold sweat when he realized that he had a near-death experience, “Shike Castle?”

“The castle was originally called Shike. Do you want to rename the castle?”

Chen Rui felt weird in his heart. Why does it seem to be a prompt to enter a game? Anyway, the name “Shike” is too hard to pronounce. He said, “Let’s call it City of Stars.”

“The renaming is complete! Please note that the City of Stars currently has a lot of damage and defects, and most of its functions are unavailable. It is estimated that 3,000 gremlin servants and 145 units of top-level energy essence will be required to complete the repair.”

When Chen Rui heard Crystal Phoenix mentioned “gremlin servants” which was just what he wanted to know. He asked, “How can we make gremlin servants?”

“After master provides enough energy, Crystal Phoenix will activate the Gremlin Factory. Through energy consumption, it will automatically manufacture gremlin souls and transform them into body materials to become gremlin servants. Each unit of top-level energy essence can produce 100 gremlin servants. For every 100 gremlin servants, a mutated gremlin supervisor who can control the gremlin servants to improve work efficiency has a chance to be born. It can manufacture and repair higher-grade equipment. Every 100 gremlin servants would consume 1 unit of top-level energy essence as food per month.”

Oh, I see! Chen Rui suppressed the surprise in his heart, “The energy is not a problem. What are the maximum amount of gremlin and other types of troops that can be produced?”

“The current castle is Level 2. With sufficient materials and energy, there can be up to 20,000 gremlin servants, 10,000 crystal beasts, 5,000 lamp spirits, 1,000 assemble puppets and 100 giant crystal beasts. The castle can be further upgraded to increase the upper limit of each category and enhance its functions, but it requires a lot of rare materials.”

The castle can even be upgraded? Chen Rui’s weird “game” feeling became more intense, then he got the answer from Crystal Phoenix. The life created by the castle was alchemy beings, and the soul core of the alchemy beings was the central life crystal, Crystal Phoenix. Because of this, every alchemy being produced will fully obey the ruler of the castle. The life crystal’s soul control had a certain limit. If it exceeded the number, it would be uncontrollable and the production would automatically stop.

In the alchemy civilization, life crystal was the core that determined all alchemy beings. Perhaps it could be called the maternal body of life creation. The upgrade was to improve the texture and strength of the central life crystal, so that the crystal could control more and more powerful life entities. In addition to the alchemy beings produced by the life crystal, there were a large number of human-like “aborigines” in alchemy civilization who gave birth to the next generation bloodline through the traditional mating method.

These aborigines could control the assemble puppets to unleash powerful combat power, and the ruler was also born from the competition. It was just that such “aborigines” in the current ruins had disappeared long ago. Otherwise, the “outsiders” like Chen Rui would not be able to benefit from it.

Chen Rui took a look at the materials required to upgrade the castle. Most of them are unheard of, and the quantity requirements are astonishing. The top priority is to repair the castle first, “Then create 3,000 gremlin servants to repair the castle.”

“Yes. The castle has already stocked 2,470 units of top-level energy essence. It will cost 50 units to activate the Gremlin Factory, and 30 units for 3,000 gremlin servants. It will take about 5 days if we start manufacturing now. After the gremlin servants are created, the repair will start automatically. We need to find the corresponding materials with high consistency for the repair. If the materials are complete, it will probably take 2 months to completely repair the castle. If a gremlin supervisor is born, the time can be further shortened.”

2 months was actually not a long time. In terms of energy, it was not a problem for Chen Rui who owned the Star Garden. Once the castle was repaired, then he could repair all the crystal beasts and giant beasts. By then it was equivalent to having a powerful army that was enough to build a small empire in the Demon Realm.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of something. An alchemy castle is just equivalent to a small force in the alchemy civilization, but it has such a powerful combat power. One can imagine the power of the entire ancient alchemy civilization. Then, isn’t the Abyss Family who destroyed the alchemy civilization more…

Whether in the illusion at the inheritance test or in the underground altar of Town Massimo, the terror of the Abyss Family was still vivid in Chen Rui’s memory. What he experienced should be just a fraction of the Abyss Family. Judging from the Demi-God powerhouse, Satan’s tone of voice, the Abyss Family seemed to be sealed or isolated in a certain space. For countless years, they had tried their best to break free from the seal.

It was just that these things were still far away from his current level. It was useless even if he was worried, so he didn’t think about it anymore. He asked, “What’s the matter with the territory kingdom?”

“This City of Stars is a territory kingdom, and the spiritual imprint has been transmitted to master. At present, master’s strength is too weak to fully integrate the imprint and control the territory kingdom.”

Chen Rui thought of the spiritual imprint he obtained previously, and his heart surged with ecstasy. The territory kingdom should be the power possessed by the Demi-God-level powerhouse. I can’t imagine that I can obtain it so easily. As long as I have enough strength, I can master this higher level power above the Demon Overlord realm!

Crystal Phoenix then sounded again, “Master can use the alchemy secret method to absorb the power of the lamp spirits to continuously strengthen yourself, then thoroughly integrate the spiritual imprint of the territory kingdom step by step. When master’s power is restored, master will be able to regain control of the entire kingdom.”

This sentence dampened Chen Rui’s ecstasy. The alchemy secret method that absorbs the power of the lamp spirits? I don’t seem to know it.

After consulting Crystal Phoenix repeatedly, Chen Rui determined 3 matters.

First, Crystal Phoenix was not the intelligent being that he thought of. The answers or solutions given couldn’t leave the scope of the life crystals “database”. She couldn’t solve anything beyond this scope. More precisely, Crystal Phoenix was just a smart tool. The real “brain” was still Chen Rui.
