“Is this the show you are talking about?” In the VIP building room, Diak frowned and looked at Charles.

Charles stared at Lilu’s project with interest, “I didn’t expect this succubus to be so capable. She actually has the talent to charm a crowd? Her strength is at least Demon King level. However, the more she is such a woman, the more interesting to play with, isn’t it, Diak?”

Diak nodded when he saw his proud look, “The good show is not over yet, I’ll wait and see.”

After the troublemakers were cleared out. The hall was lively again. Soon afterward, there was a noise at the entrance. A group of soldiers armed with weapons broke in. It was the capital’s garrison guards that were responsible for the capital’s security work. They were led by Captain Basroya. Leif.

Lilu raised her brows slightly, and she greeted him with a smile, “It turns out to be Sir Basroya, welcome!”

Basroya gave Lilu a cold look, “Are you the person in charge of Princess Villa?”

“Yes, sir. Sir also visited the head office of the Princess Retail Store a few days ago…”

Basroya interrupted Lilu’s attempt to bond with him, “Give me a glass of aromatic millet wine first.”

Lilu immediately ordered someone to deliver a small glass, but Basroya did not drink it. Instead, he handed it to a person behind him. Someone recognized that person as Damond from the Mishan Family’s wine merchant. Damond took a sip and nodded immediately, “Yes. It is this kind of wine; it is brewed with the stolen recipe of our Mishan Family.”

Lilu’s complexion changed as Basroya said coldly, “A few months ago, Mishan Family’s secret wine recipe was stolen. The wine cellar of the eastern suburbs exploded last night. I now have good reason to suspect that you are related to these 2 major cases. Take this woman away!”

Lilu has calmed down, “These 2 matters have nothing to do with me. Now there is no evidence and just a word from this person. How can you take me away?”

Many guests in the wine building also booed and supported Lilu, but Basroya’s expression remained unchanged, “If someone proves that you are suspicious, you must return to the garrison guard department to assist in the investigation. This is the responsibility of the garrison guard team! Once it is found that it has nothing to do with you, you can return safely. If you resist or run away now, at least you will be charged with resisting arrest!”

Lilu took a deep look at Damond, “I will go with you, but if I am proven to be innocent, I must investigate this person and the forces behind the false accusation!”

Basroya did not answer as he waved, “Take her away!”

When the garrison guard team took Lilu away, the hall suddenly burst into discussions. Many people felt that Damond made a false accusation. This was the first time this kind of aromatic millet wine was seen in the Demon Realm. The quality of wine was far better than the fruit wine and rice wine. If the Mishan Family really had such a fine wine recipe, they would have made a lot of money long ago.

“Is it really okay to do this?” Diak in the VIP room asked after thinking for a while.

“Last night, the wine cellar of the eastern suburb was really set on fire and exploded. The Mishan Family suffered heavy losses. Lilu’s suspicion is indeed very big. With a little means, the charges can almost be decided. Now is the critical moment of negotiation with the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoys. Angley, the patriarch of the Mishan Family, is an important member of the negotiation team. Her Majesty Empress will not affect the big picture for a mere Lilu. In case the empress wants to protect Lilu, I will just sacrifice a Damond at most. However, in that case, you have to wait for the next chance to get Lilu.”

As he was talking, someone in the dining hall suddenly slammed the table and stood up, “How can this glass of wine be enough! What lousy rules are these! I have money. Give me a big bottle right away!”

This sentence immediately resonated with many people. Of course, the waiters could not make the decision to fulfill their requirements. Under the instigation of some ill-intentioned people, the calls to loosen up the purchase restrictions became louder and louder. Some people began to make trouble with the “drunkness”. The waiters who tried to stop them were knocked to the ground.

Due to the lack of Lilu to preside over the overall situation, the scene became more chaotic. Throwing tables, fighting, seizing wine… Later it was advanced to smashing, grabbing, and burning. It was completely out of control.

The few people in the VIP room watched happily. Zall immediately stood up, “Okay! It’s time for action!”

TL: 🤔Weird, such an important day, how could only Lilu be there? Is this a bait?

chapters.title: Chapter 574 - The Beginning Of The Hunt
chapters.body:
Chapter 574 - The Beginning Of The Hunt

Chapter 574: The Beginning of the Hunt

“The task of the family is almost done. Now is the time to satisfy my personal wishes.” Zall looked at Diak and Lawson. “Would you like to accompany me on this harvest trip, my friends?”

Lawson and Diak were not fools. They knew that Zall would not ask them to watch the show for no reason. In fact, both of them were already complicit by just watching the show.

“You know my fetish.” Lawson thought for a while, and his hands turned into a claw shape. His smile was even more wretched, “It doesn’t matter if she is young, it must be big here.”

Zall smiled slightly, “I understand, I’ll give you Helena to play for a few days later.”

Helena was Zall’s concubine; her pair of towering chest was astounding. Lawson had always coveted her. His eyes lit up when he heard this, “Also, help me find the woman I like. Don’t fight with me.”

“Of course, my friend.” Zall’s gaze turned to Diak. Lawson’s Boll Family was a member of the Night Chamber of Commerce, but Diak was a member of the royal family. His father’s generation held important positions, and his uncle was the royal family’s peak stage Demon Overlord, Disjaro, whose name was similar to his. This time, Zall was obviously trying to drag Diak into the matter.

“I want 30% performance shares of your Alluring Flower Tavern.” Diak rolled his eyes and immediately told his condition.

Alluring Flower Tavern was an industry owned by Zall which had a booming business. It was quite excessive that Diak wanted 30% of the shares. However, this big appetite made Zall relieved, and he stretched out a finger, “10%, this is my bottom line. You can also add Lilu or other beauties that suit your taste.”

“Deal!” Diak and Zall shook hands while smiling at the same time.

The 3 hit it off and walked out the door of the VIP room. The guards at the door immediately surrounded them. Diak had only 1 guard which was still Sulfur who was good at undead magic.

Zall asked 1 of the guards, “John. Are you sure Marlene is in the VIP Room No.1?”

“Yes! Ms. Marlene seems to have brought a few friends in the VIP room.” The guard, John, replied respectfully, “Currently, Shet is guarding with 3 people. The waiters nearby have been cleared and no one is around. The people inside should not know the chaos outside.”

“Okay! John, your idea is very good this time, and the intel is also very accurate. You have made a great achievement. Your cousin has been serving me for some time. I will let her go home after this matter is over. I will reward you again.”

A sinister expression flashed in John’s eyes. With a pleasing face, he bowed and thanked Zall again and again. Then, he walked upstairs with Zall and others toward Moon Room No. 1.

The guard guarding Room No. 1 knocked on the door when he received Zall’s hint. Soon, the door opened. A woman who looked like a guard looked at the strangers outside warily, “Who are you guys?”

Zall signaled John, and John rushed forward with several guards. However, the strength of this woman was very strong. She actually defeated several guards in a row by herself.

Diak’s guard, Sulfur, finally took action. A cage of withered bones appeared on the ground, imprisoning the woman, then a strong spiritual impact caused the woman in bone prison to collapse.

The door of the VIP Moon Room No. 1 was knocked open. This room was very spacious with luxurious facilities and an elegant environment. It was also equipped with a soundproof magic circle. It was the best VIP room. In addition to Marlene, whom Zall was familiar with, there were also several women inside. Among them, 2 girls were particularly outstanding.

A young girl was about 13 or 14 years old with curly golden long hair. She had delicate features, smooth jade-like skin, and deep gem-like blue eyes exuding an extremely pure and lovely temperament. Zall took only 1 glance, and he was completely attracted. He didn’t take another look at Marlene who was the original target of the trip. In front of this perfect fresh flower, Marlene was like a weed on the roadside in comparison. Zall only felt that his heart raced. He was initially into young girls, but he didn’t expect to meet such a beautiful girl. An uncontrollable strong desire suddenly was ignited in his lower abdomen.

Another girl was about 18 years old. She was sweet and cute, and her appearance was inferior to that of the blonde girl, but her temperament was equally extraordinary. The most conspicuous was the 2 towering plumps. Even a mature woman would be ashamed by it.

The intrusion of Zall and others shocked the blonde girl. Several female guards immediately stood in front. The sweet girl with a pair of huge breasts obviously had some experiences in such a situation. She calmly yelled, “Who are you all?! How dare you barge in rudely!”

“He, he… he is the son of the Mishan Family patriarch, Zall.” The Princess Villa was remodeled from the original Leisure Moon Inn. The area was very large. The VIP building was far away from the dining hall. Marlene didn’t know that his sister, Lilu, had been taken away by the garrison guards, and she didn’t know the terrifying chaos that happened outside, but she knew that Zall always had an ill intention to her. When she saw him barging in with some people, her voice was a little trembling.

“Mishan Family? The elder family?” The blonde girl seemed to be bolder again, “How bold! Do you know who I am?”

“Little beauty, your voice is as moving as your face. I don’t need to know who you are; I just need to know how to treat you in bed later!” Zall had never seen this girl in the upper noble families of the capital. Her blue eyes was not of the Lucifer Royal Family. Besides, those who were friends with Marlene would definitely not have a great background, so he immediately laughed unscrupulously.

“Bold!” The girl with a towering chest had already stood up sternly as if she had a kind of superior temperament.

“This girl belongs to me. I don’t want Helena anymore.” Lawson gazed greedily at the girl’s plump breasts.

Zall only had the beautiful and lovely blonde girl in his eyes. He liked this green apple the most, and he casually replied, “Okay!”

“Asshole! Fallen Angel Capital actually has such unbearable elder families! Guards, take them down immediately!” The girl with a towering chest was furious. The female guards on both sides immediately blocked in front.

Zall’s guard secretly released the magic smoke that was prepared long ago. This smoke had a poison that had no color or smell. It could only be seen faintly which was difficult to beware without taking the antidote in advance. These people were obviously veterans in using this method. The female guards did not expect that the other party would use such a despicable method. It was too late when they realized it, they were all fainting. With their combat power dropped drastically, they were knocked to the ground soon.

The blonde girl, the girl with a towering chest, and Marlene who did not move were not fighting types. They were dizzy under the influence of the poisonous mist, and they fell to the ground one after another.

“I am a princess…” The blonde girl only managed to utter 4 words before she fainted. The girl with a towering chest and Marlene also fainted one after another.

“Is she from the Princess Retail Store?” Diak glanced at Zall.

This sentence obviously misled Zall’s thinking. He hesitated and sneered, “Probably someone new to the Princess Retail Store… Now Princess Villa is in chaos. It is very common for a few people to disappear or die. It will be fine as long as we ask the few troublemakers to disappear later. Just in case Lilu makes a comeback to investigate it, Damond still knows what to do. He is the person in charge of the wine cellar, so he can hardly push the blame for the explosion last night. If he can’t use this opportunity to make atonement, he can only shoulder everything and commit suicide. At least, this will allow his wife and son to live well…”

Lawson and Diak looked at each other and nodded approvingly.

Zall spoke up, “Okay! We have made too much noise here. We can’t stay for long. Soon, the garrison guard team will come. Take all these women away without leaving any traces. We will take advantage of the chaos to leave later!”

Diak echoed, “Yes! Leave right away, but we can’t separate now… Lawson, don’t you have a quiet courtyard in the eastern suburb? Let’s take a carriage and hide there first while observing the situation?”

“Okay!” Lawson thought for a while with a wicked smile on his face, “There are a lot of rooms there. Even if we have any fun, we won’t disturb each other.”

Under the cover of chaos, the group took their prey and hurriedly left the Princess Villa which was already on fire. They boarded a carriage and left calmly.

However, things were impermanent. It was hard to tell who was the hunter and who was the prey.

When the Princess Villa was smashed and looted, Shea was in the palace to meet the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy, General Crawford.

General Crawford bowed and said, “May I know the reason for Your Majesty’s summon?”

Shea’s purple eyes glanced over the veiled female guards wearing robes at the entrance of the main hall. She paused for a while when looking at 1 of the guards, then she looked at Disjaro, Stiller and others. She spoke up, “Envoy has come to the capital for 6 days, please forgive me for the lack of hospitality. I think now is the time for both parties to formally discuss the cooperation matters.”

Crawford was socializing a lot these days and almost had no free time. Knowing that it was the strategy of the other party’s testing and procrastination, he dealt with it calmly. He initially wanted to have a surprise attack tomorrow, which was the last day, to reveal the deadline of Empress Catherine so that it would catch Shea by surprise. However, he didn’t expect the other party to initiate the negotiation in advance.

Crawford was a little surprised, but he quickly regained his composure and replied, “As Your Majesty wishes, but Deputy Envoy Celine was invited by an old friend to dinner at the newly opened Princess Villa. Your Majesty, to start the formal negotiation, please wait a moment. I will immediately send someone to ask Celine to come to the palace.”

Shea nodded, and Crawford immediately ordered the servants outside the hall to go to the southern suburbs and ask Celine to come to the palace. However, soon after Crawford’s man left, someone hurriedly reported, “Your Majesty, there has been a commotion in the Princess Villa in the southern suburbs. It is currently set on fire and we are trying to put it out!”

“What?!” Shea and Crawford exclaimed almost at the same time. The Mishan Family Patriarch Angley, who was standing next to Stiller, suddenly thought of something, and his facial expression suddenly changed.

Many people knew that the Princess Villa should be the “chain industry” of the Princess Retail Store. The founding place of the Princess Retail Store was in the Dark Moon, but the first owner was the Little Princess Alice who had always been heard of but not seen. She was the only sister of Her Majesty Empress, so the Princess Retail Store and Princess Villa should be regarded as royal industries. To be precise, they were Shea’s fund sources.

A vicious incident happened as soon as the Princess Villa is open for business! This isn’t important. What is more serious is that the Envoy Celine of the Dark Shadow Empire is having dinner at the chaotic Princess Villa!

Shea’s face suddenly became gloomy. Her voice sounded through the entire hall, “Aguile! You personally lead the guards and go to the Princess Villa immediately! In any case, you must ensure the safety of Envoy Celine! At the same time, pass the order to the secret intelligence department to fully investigate this case!”

“Yes!” The imperial guard deputy commander, ‘Aguile’, saluted outside the hall. He immediately gathered the guards to execute the order.

TL: Little Princess Alice is kidnapped too? So this is what Isabella was planning for. No wonder she couldn’t report to Shea first…

chapters.title: Chapter 575 - Hunting
chapters.body:
Chapter 575 - Hunting

Chapter 575: Hunting

In the eastern suburb, the hunters unloaded their preys out of the carriage and carried them into a grand courtyard.

“My friends, it’s a surprisingly big harvest today!” Diak looked excited.

Lawson licked his lips, “The thought of that plump and beautiful chick made me feel thirsty. I can’t wait to enjoy her.

“You impatient guy!” Diak shook his head, “Let’s have a good drink first. I found this in the VIP room just now.”

Zall saw a few bottles of aromatic millet wine in his hand and smiled, “Yes, we have a drink first, then send someone out to explore the situation outside. The more delicious the prey, the more slowly we must enjoy.

Lawson nodded and instructed his servants to place the women into separate rooms and prepare food. Diak said, “Zall, that blonde girl is much better than Marlene. How about giving Marlene to me?”

Lawson asked curiously, “When did you change your taste?”

Diak grinned, “Although I’m not very interested in little girls, I have a soft spot for sisters. With the younger sister in hand, do I still need to worry about the elder sister being disobedient?”

After seeing the blonde girl, Zall really didn’t have much interest in Marlene anymore. He was happy to do him a favor, so he agreed instantly, “No problem.”

The 3 of them showed smiles that only men could understand at the same time. Diak poured 3 glasses of wine, “Come, cheers to our wonderful preys.”

At this time, the palace hall appeared to be gloomy, and the air seemed to be freezing. Shea’s expression was extremely cold. General Crawford frowned and did not speak. The eyes of Disjaro, Stiller and others were also faintly anxious. Especially the Mishan Family Patriarch Angley whose tension and anxiety couldn’t be concealed from his usual gloomy expression.

The footsteps outside the hall sounded, and a female imperial guard came to report, “Your Majesty, the Princess Villa’s chaos has been quelled by Sir Aguile’s imperial guards and garrison guard team. The fire has been extinguished, and the civilians who caused the trouble have been arrested.”

Shea didn’t care about this. She asked, “How is Envoy Celine’s situation? Is she injured?”

“When Sir Aguile hurried there, most of the Princess Villa had been burned down.” The female guard hesitated slightly, “Envoy Celine is still missing.”

“What? Envoy Celine is missing?” Shea stood up suddenly, and she said angrily, “What is the garrison guard team doing?! They only went to the Princess Villa after it was mostly burned down! Where is Lilu, the person in charge of the villa? What actually happened?”

Everyone was shocked when they heard the news. The Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy disappeared in the Fallen Angel Capital. Especially at this critical juncture, if anything happens to her, the consequences will be disastrous. Angley trembled involuntarily as he clenched his slightly trembling fists. He came forward and bowed, “Your Majesty, there must be something fishy with this matter, please allow me to investigate.”

“No need! The secret intelligence department should be conducting a thorough investigation already…” Shea said to Crawford with a cold gaze. “Please rest assured, general. We will definitely ensure the safety of Ms. Celine. General, please go to the side hall and rest for a while. I believe that Ms. Celine will come soon. Once the culprit behind the scenes is identified, he will be severely punished! From now on, no one will take a step out of the palace to avoid leaking the news which will affect Ms. Celine’s safety.”

Crawford thought for a while, saluted, and left the hall with the guards.

As soon as Crawford left, the ministers immediately started talking in a low voice. Scheming the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy at this crucial time is extremely sinister. This kind of disaster must be eradicated. Only Angley had a cold sweat on his forehead. His heart was uneasy. He just prayed that things would not develop to the worst point.

Soon, an imperial guard came to report, “The secret intelligence department has investigated the whole matter. The first group of people who caused the trouble in the Princess Villa were the rogues instigated by the Night Chamber of Commerce’s Cody. They were expelled after being exposed by Lilu. Later, Mishan Family’s wine industry manager, Damond, brought the garrison guard team leader, Basroya, into the villa. Damond claimed that Lilu stole the Mishan Family’s secret wine recipe and was the mastermind of the burning of the wine cellar in the eastern suburb last night. As a result, Lilu was captured by Basroya.”

“Lilu steals the secret recipe?” Shea frowned.

“When the secret intelligence department rushed to the garrison guard department, they found that Basroya was preparing to torture Lilu to extract a confession. Later, Basroya was taken by the secret intelligence department. Damond confessed that Plinton, a key member of the Mishan Family, instructed him to falsely accuse Lilu in order to create chaos in the Princess Villa.”

“Your Majesty! I didn’t expect that Plinton would actually be so despicable! The wine cellar explosion was originally his negligence. Not only did he not repent, he actually tried to shift the responsibility to the Princess Villa!” Angley immediately stood up with a hateful expression on his face, “I employed the wrong people. Please forgive me, Your Majesty. I’ll go and capture him now and hand it over to Your Majesty for punishment!”

Angley’s words made Shea’s eyes swiftly flashed a sneer. She ignored him and asked the imperial guard, “Put these aside first. What is the situation of the Princess Villa and the envoy?”

“After Lilu left, someone immediately took the lead in making trouble. These people have been caught by the secret intelligence department. After interrogation, the person behind the scenes was Zall, the son of Sir Angley. When the chaos happened, Zall was in the VIP building of the villa and his whereabouts are now unknown. The secret intelligence department is urgently investigating.”

As soon as Zall’s name came out, all the ministers looked at each other. What Angely was most worried about finally happened. His face turned pale in an instant. I didn’t expect Zall, who is always shrewd, is actually so incompetent this time. He left so many traces and even exposed himself!

The previous false accusation could still be blamed on Plinton, but now it was directly related to his son. It was no longer possible to shirk the responsibility. Angley’s thoughts turned quickly and he bowed deeply, “Your Majesty, Zall is young and ignorant. He must be misled by Plinton! Please forgive him, Your Majesty!”

“Misled? At this point, do you still want to quibble?” Shea exuded a ghastly breath, “Where is Envoy Celine?”

Angley gritted his teeth and knelt down on one knee, “Your Majesty, I really don’t know! There must be some misunderstanding. I will personally find the whereabouts of the envoy and behead the rebellious son as an apology to Your Majesty!”

“Before the secret intelligence department has any definite news, don’t even think about going anywhere! I want to see what role the Mishan Family played in this kidnapping incident!”

Angley knelt down on both knees and knocked his head on the floor, “Your Majesty, I can guarantee with my life that the Mishan Family has nothing to do with the disappearance of the envoy!”

“How can you guarantee? How can the mere Mishan Family be comparable to the fate and survival of the entire empire?” Shea shouted furiously, “Order the imperial guards and secret intelligence department to immediately control the Mishan Family and all related industries. Be sure to find out the whereabouts of the envoy! If there are opposers, kill them!”

The imperial guard hurriedly executed the order. Angley knelt on the ground while trembling. No one came out to intercede, including the Leif Family that was the closest to Angley. Basroya, who was previously suspected of co-framing Lilu with Damond, was a member of the Leif Family. Now the Leif Family was too busy to take care of themselves, how would they dare to intercede?

This matter was too serious; it had far exceeded the scope of the interests of the elder families as it endangered the entire emperor empire. Once something really happened to Celine, the consequences were simply unimaginable.

In the eastern suburb courtyard, Zall didn’t even know that he had become a “famous person.” He was still enthusiastically and happily drinking with Diak and Lawson.

This time, he made a great contribution to the family by successfully smashing the Princess Villa. He also harvested top-notch prey. It was a huge harvest. When Zall thought of the beautiful appearance of the blonde girl, his mouth was dry.

“Enough of wine, it’s time to do the official business. Lawson, have the rooms been arranged?”

“Of course.” Lawson grinned, “1 person per room. It’s well-distanced with soundproofing facilities. We can have all the fun. I have turned on the protective magic circle of the courtyard and ordered not to see any foreign guests. Even if the sky falls, they will have to wait for us to finish enjoying.”

Diak’s eyes flickered. He thought slightly, then smiled deeply, “Yes, it’s about time for the hunting game to start.”

At this moment, the ground shook suddenly like an earthquake. The people in the courtyard couldn’t stand still.

Lawson exclaimed, “What happened?”

A guard screamed, “Bad news! Young Master Lawson, a terrifying enemy broke in. He has killed the guards outside and is attacking the protective magic circle of the courtyard!”

“Who is it?”

“The enemy is quite terrifying. The first layer magic circle is about to collapse!”

“So fast!?” Lawson was taken aback. This magic circle was set up by his grandmother, Stiller, who loved him the most. It had 5 layers. Stiller was the empire’s top magician. Even the Demon Overlord powerhouse could not break in so quickly. It showed that the strength of this person was terrifying.

There was a very ominous premonition in Zall’s heart. Lawson was no longer in a “hunting” mood. He had already been holding a blue bead. It was a life-saving item given to him by his grandmother which could be used to summon her in the most dangerous time.

In the palace, the shocking news came again.

“Someone witnessed Zall of the Mishan Family, Lawson of the Boll Family, and Diak of the royal family taking advantage of the chaos to abduct several women from the Princess Villa.”

The news made the Boll Family’s patriarch, Tolga, Elder Stiller, and the royal family’s Disjaro look shocked at the same time, but the kneeling Angley’s eyes gleamed. For him, the more forces involved, the better. The law will not punish numerous offenders. Now the Boll Family and the royal family are dragged into the trouble, and the Leif Family can barely be spared. By then, Shea must consider carefully even if she wants to punish us heavily.

When Shea was in a rage, the report came again, “The latest emergency report from the secret intelligence department found that the envoy is likely to be detained in the Boll Family’s courtyard in the eastern suburb. Sir Aguile has rushed to the rescue!”

As soon as the report ended, Stiller’s body suddenly lit up with a bright blue light. Old Cowen stepped forward and blocked in front of Shea as he said sharply, “Stiller, what are you trying to do?”

Stiller was surprised too. She hurriedly used her magic power to suppress the light and bowed to Shea, “Your Majesty, please forgive me. This is… Lawson’s emergency summon for help.”

“Very well, Stiller, you don’t have to suppress the power of the summon.” Shea said coldly, “Not only you, everyone in the hall, follow me to the Boll Family’s courtyard in the eastern suburb now! Take a look at what happened there!”

TL: What will happen to the 3 families involved? Will the family masters be executed? Or only the 3 sons? How will this incident affect the decision of the Dark Shadow Empire?

chapters.title: Chapter 576 - The Capital’S Top Magician Vs The Demon Realm’S Top Magician
chapters.body:
Chapter 576 - The Capital’S Top Magician Vs The Demon Realm’S Top Magician

Chapter 576: The Capital’s Top Magician vs the Demon Realm’s Top Magician

“Boom!“

The last magic circle of the eastern suburb courtyard finally collapsed. The shake on the ground gradually subsided.

A man wearing a cloak and a mask appeared in the sight of Zall and others. He exuded a strange breath. Wherever he passed, the walls and the ground cracked and decayed. The guards who stepped forward to stop him fell to the ground far away before they approached him. Their face and body seemed to be rapidly aging.

Zall’s power was the strongest among the 3. He had reached the realm of the early stage Great Demon King, but he couldn’t pluck up the slightest courage to resist. He suddenly thought of the superior aura exuded by the big-breasted girl previously. He had a faint premonition that he had made a big mistake.

Diak stepped back step by step. The guard Sulfur beside him had already escaped. Only Lawson’s gaze was fixed on the woman behind the cloaked man.

This was a slender and stunning woman who was wearing a light blue long dress with a curvy figure. She had a plump chest, long purple hair tied behind her, delicate facial features, and a pair of exquisite glasses which showed her special temperament full of intelligence. She was perfect regardless of her appearance, figure or temperament.

“It’s her!” Lawson’s breathing became rapid. This was the woman he once caught a glimpse of. Afterward, he frantically searched for her, but it was unsuccessful. He didn’t expect her to appear next to this enemy today!

The man in the mask was naturally Chen Rui. When he keenly felt Lawson’s eyes looking at the beauty with glasses, his first instinctive reaction was to kill, then he was taken aback as Lawson’s gaze became odd. He can be so lustful that he is not afraid of death, this guy is also a weirdo.

Lawson stared at Zola behind Chen Rui and screamed, “Who are you? How dare you break into my mansion! Do you know who I am?”

Chen Rui shook his head secretly. What 4 capital geniuses? Most of them are touted and boasted under the luxury conditions of family power. They are nothing short of idiots. He sneered and said, “I was looking for all of you exactly!”

“This is the courtyard of the Boll Family! My grandmother is the Fallen Angel Empire’s top magician, Stiller! She will be here soon!”

“Hmph! So what if Stiller comes? I even have the Demon Realm’s top magician here!” Chen Rui was the most disdainful of the second generation who kept saying “My father, my grandfather, and my grandmother are so-and-so”. He sneered, “You have committed a heavy crime, immediately raise your hands and free madam envoy. Otherwise, I will kill you without mercy!”

“What madam envoy!” Lawson didn’t manage to react for a moment. He saw a large number of courtyard guards coming from behind and shouted, “Quickly, catch him!”

Zall’s brain reacted very quickly when he heard the word “envoy”. His whole body shook when he suddenly thought of something. All of a sudden, cold sweat poured down his forehead.

Chen Rui didn’t even look at the guards rushing from all directions. Zola blinked gently, and all the guards who rushed up stopped their movements simultaneously as if they were solidified like a clay sculpture and wood sculpture. The sound of the entire courtyard suddenly became quiet and was filled with an abnormal atmosphere.

Lawson and Zall shivered together. At the same time, there was the thought of running away in their minds, but they lost the power to take even a step. At this moment, Zola looked at the blue light flashing beside Lawson; a figure appeared.

When Lawson saw this figure, he suddenly showed ecstasy, “Grandma! You came just at the right time! This guy broke into our courtyard and killed many of our people! If you come 1 step late, I’ve already been killed by him! Quickly smash him to pieces! And I want that woman! Even if she’s dead!”

In Lawson’s eyes, his grandmother, Stiller, who loved him the most, could solve any great difficulties. Not to mention this man in cloak, even getting that beauty was not a problem. Lawson specially added the last sentence. With his experience of the past 2 decades, as long as he swore with his life like this, Stiller would softly agree to even his most difficult request.

What Young Master Lawson didn’t notice was that these words made the face of his most dependent madam grandmother suddenly show an expression – shock.

When Chen Rui heard the last sentence, his murderous intent surged. Zola was faster than him, she appeared in front of Lawson in an instant.

(The man is still jealous, I like it!)

(As for this ant, you should really die!)

It was the first time Lawson saw Zola at such a close distance. His eyes suddenly flashed with a reckless evil light. Stiller’s complexion changed drastically, and it was too late to reprimand Lawson. There was a magic wand in her hand, and aqua blue ripples appeared and circled out instantly, “Madam! Please be merciful!”

“What?” Zola didn’t seem to hear clearly. There was a sudden strong twist of the aqua blue protective ripple in front of Stiller. It actually burned with a “puff“. The red flame did not emit heat, but icy air.

Stiller looked anxious, and there were layers of green electric grids in the aqua blue ripples. She wanted to block the flames, but the electric grids had been solidified into ice debris and scattered all over the ground as soon as they emerged. Stiller’s eyes glowed red as she had transformed into the great demon’s battle form. The burning blue ripples disappeared, and a black shield appeared to block the flames.

When Zola’s purple eyes blinked, the flames penetrated directly into the shield. The shield was twisted into a huge palm that grabbed toward Stiller bit by bit. Sweat beads appeared on Stiller’s forehead. The gem at the tip of the wand lit up, and the crisscrossing flames merged in the hurricane-like airflow which also turned into a palm grabbing toward the huge black and red palm.

At the moment the 2 “palms” came into contact, Stiller’s body trembled slightly as if she experienced an unbearable pressure.

As Zola stretched out a finger and tapped lightly in the air, the 2 palms exploded lightly, turning into countless crystal water droplets which had evaporated in the process of explosion. It seemed that the evenly matched powers canceled each other out, but Stiller spat a mouthful of blood suddenly. Her red skin of the battle form showed a dead gray color.

It was just a quick exchange of less than 1 minute, but it was actually several rounds. Behind the gorgeous effects were the top magical mysteries today.

The people present either had insufficient strength or were not specialized in magic, so they didn’t notice much mysteries, but they understood 1 thing: This stunning beauty with glasses just used a finger to let the Fallen Angel Empire’s top magician, peak stage of the Demon Overlord, Stiller vomited blood! Can the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse Lord Raizen of the Bloody Empire do it? How about the Dark Shadow Empire’s Catherine?

Lawson looked at Zola dumbfoundedly. The greed and evil thoughts in his eyes had long been shrouded by the boundless fear. He finally understood that “the Demon Realmtop magician” mentioned by Chen Rui previously was not the “man in cloak” but this woman instead!

“You actually have this level of control of the elements!” Stiller’s face was full of shock. She coughed twice with blood flowing out of her mouth, but she didn’t realize it, “Madam has reached… the Supremo level?”

As soon as this sentence came out, almost everyone was astounded. Supremo level? Demon Supremo?

The powerhouse of the Demon Realm was divided into 3 levels: low, middle and high. Higher Demon and below belonged to the low level; Demon King and Great Demon King were the middle level; Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord were the high level. This was the most popular concept in the Demon Realm, but there is a higher level of realm above the peak stage of Demon Overlord. There was a saying that it was Demi-God, and some people call it Demon Supremo, but the specific situation was unknown. They were collectively referred to as super powerhouses. It was said that if the super powerhouse advanced again, it was the realm of god.

No one expected that this beautiful woman was actually the legendary Demon Supremo!

Zola thought for a while and shook her head, “Almost, just a little more.”

“Puff!” Lawson didn’t even have the strength to stand, and he fell to the ground while shaking involuntarily. Dear Demon God, I actually have a crooked idea about a powerhouse who is almost equivalent to Demon Supremo?

This sound reminded Zola and she looked at Lawson. Stiller was taken aback, “Lawson is ignorant. He offended madam, but he is just an ant. Madam, please spare him and wait for Her Majesty Empress…”

Zola ignored and pointed at Lawson. Stiller instinctively felt a strong danger. As she raised the wand in her hand, an intangible shield instantly appeared around her and Lawson. At almost the same time, countless cracks appeared on the ground near the shield. The entire courtyard seemed to be dented by 1 level lower because of these cracks, but Zall and others were not affected at all. What a precise control of power!

“Boom!” The shield lasted for less than 3 seconds before it was blown away like a broken kite. When it fell to the ground, the power of protection had completely collapsed. This time, blood overflowed from Stiller’s orifices. She had more white hair, and she looked lethargic.

Zola cast her gaze to the side and did not look back. There were already many more people in the yard led by Shea. Demon Overlords such as Old Cowen and Disjaro were also among them.

When everyone came, they happened to see the scene of Stiller being seriously injured after being blown away. They were all shocked and inexplicably deterred.

Stiller reached a few minutes earlier than the others due to the summoning magic. In such a short period of time, she actually suffered such a heavy blow!

People such as Disjaro, Lunters and others had experienced the Town Leith’s decisive battle. They personally witnessed the power of the beautiful magician with glasses who trampled the 2 dragons of the peak stage Demon Overlord like little lizards. 1 of them was a giant dragon and the other was a black dragon who was immune to magic!

Stiller was a magician of the peak stage Demon Overlord who was a capable general under the Lord of Midnight Sun back then. She was known as the Fallen Angel Empire’s top magician. Even the veteran Demon Overlord, Old Cowen, of the same era considered himself inferior. Generally speaking, the battle between magicians would generally be a protracted battle that consumed each other’s spirit power and magic power if the difference in strength was not particularly evident.

What was in front of them now was the fact that such an empire top magician was defeated by the other party with just a finger within a few minutes. Everyone had a feeling simultaneously. The power of this beauty with glasses is far more terrifying than we imagined! Could she have been reached… Zola did not stop because of the arrival of Shea and others. Her finger still pointed at Lawson whose face was already pale.

“Zola, please wait a moment.” Shea’s voice sounded. Zola looked back at Shea and then at Chen Rui before putting down her finger.

Stiller bowed to Shea with a sense of gratitude, then she bowed to Zola again. She grabbed Lawson and walked to Shea.

At this time, the main ministers and the patriarchs of the families including Angley, who was controlled by the guards, also rushed to the courtyard. Now, everyone was there.

TL: Isn’t there a saying that it’s worth dying in the hand of your loved one? Will the young masters be sentenced to death?

chapters.title: Chapter 577 - Ms. Envoy And Royal Highness Little Princess
chapters.body:
Chapter 577 - Ms. Envoy And Royal Highness Little Princess

Chapter 577: Ms. Envoy and Royal Highness Little Princess

In the Boll Family’s courtyard in the eastern suburb, almost all the upper class people of the Fallen Angel Empire including the empress were present. When Zall saw the huge crowd at the palace hall in front of him, his complexion was pale gray just like his father, the patriarch of the Mishan Family.

“Your Majesty, Lawson has been brought here now. Please punish him, Your Majesty.” Stiller grabbed Lawson and came to Shea. After visiting the hell gate for a few rounds, Lawson finally did not pass out. He walked toward Shea tremblingly and saluted.

Shea glanced at Lawson lightly, “Free the envoy immediately.”

“Envoy?” When Lawson heard that the man in cloak also said this word, he seemed to think of something. However, Zola’s appearance caused him to experience the emotional ups and downs of great joy and sadness, so his mind was full of chaos.

Stiller, who had always been calm, was anxious. She slapped his favorite grandson, “Did all of you kidnap the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy, Ms. Celine, to this place?”

Lawson was awakened by this slap in the face. The noble temperament of the girl with a towering chest from the Princess Villa appeared in his mind. He was shocked and sweated suddenly. The girl who was with Marlene… The girl whom I liked… The first-class “prey” is actually… the envoy of the Dark Shadow Empire?

Lawson finally understood why even Her Majesty Empress would come in person. His first feeling after realizing the fact was fear: As everyone knows, the Dark Shadow Empire Army is gathering on the border of the Fallen Angel Empire and they are ready to attack. At this terrible moment, kidnapping the Dark Shadow Empire envoy here in an attempt to… Before Lawson could speak, a voice sounded, “Your Majesty, this time Zall and Lawson did kidnap a few girls from the Princess Villa with bad intentions. Is Envoy Celine among them?”

It was Diak, Lawson and Zall’s “accomplice”, who spoke. A woman with a mask and cloak beside Shea stood up, “Your Majesty, Diak is from the secret intelligence department.”

Secret intelligence department! Zall and Lawson shook at the same time with disbelief gazes in their eyes. “Aguile” said, “If it weren’t for Diak’s secret marking, I wouldn’t be able to get here so quickly.”

The strained heart of the royal family’s Demon Overlord, Disjaro, finally relaxed. Diak was his nephew. He was worried about causing a catastrophic disaster. He didn’t expect that Diak had become a hero in the darkest hour instead.

Many people focused their attention on the woman in cloak who didn’t show her true face. This woman should be the head of “the Dark Demon” who took over the secret intelligence department from the Toro Family.

“Dark Demon” was once the mysterious leader of the Dark Moon which used to spy on the intel and assassination tasks. The methods were extremely clever. Even the capital’s secret intelligence department couldn’t help but send Sarandi and others to the Dark Moon to destroy the Dark Demon. As a result, they were annihilated entirely instead.

Diak respectfully said, “Your Majesty, those girls are being held in the back room. They are poisoned by the smoke with the ecstasy attribute.

My subordinate, Sulfur, had sneaked in long ago. He killed those watchers and protected them secretly.

When everyone heard him, they were all relaxed. No matter what happened, the envoy was not in danger.

Shea calmed down and nodded, “Diak, you did a great job!”

“Her Majesty, when Sir Aguile broke into the courtyard previously, I had received a signal from Sulfur that he was detoxifying the young ladies. They will probably recover in a few minutes.”

“Aguile, take someone to the back now to respond and assist in the treatment, then clear out the irrelevant people.” After receiving the news that the envoy was unharmed, Shea’s expression eased a lot, “Diak, tell us everything that happened in the Princess Villa. Why was the envoy being kidnapped? What’s the inside story of this incident?”

Diak glanced at the 2 “companions” who were full of hatred and fear. He replied, “From the beginning of the unscrupulous troublemaking to the garrison guard team framing Lilu, to the final instigation of wine customers to beat, smash, rob and burn, it was all planned by Mishan Family’s Zall. Lawson and I witnessed this good show on the sidelines and can be regarded as “accomplices.” After the Princess Villa was devastated, Zall invited me to capture Lilu’s sister, Marlene, to play with. He also promised Lawson and me some benefit. Since I was alone and unable to stop it, I had to pretend to agree to join. I followed Zall to Moon VIP Room No. 1 where there were several women. Zall’s men were met with strong resistance. They later knocked the girls off by releasing the poisonous smoke. I initially thought that it was just the Mishan Family’s conspiracy against the Princess Villa. I left the secret intelligence department’s mark all the way, then I tried to delay the time until Sir Aguile broke into the courtyard. That was when I realized that it involves the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy, Ms. Celine.”

Shea slightly lowered her head while Stiller secretly rejoiced. Judging from Diak’s description, Lawson was not the mastermind. She knew that this grandson had a lot of spoiled and arrogant mischief, but he would definitely not be involved in a scheme like “subverting the empire”. However, Lawson’s biggest trouble was that he recklessly offended the super powerhouse, Zola.

At this time, a group of people came out from the back room. Standing at the front was the missing Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy, Celine. When Lawson saw the girl with a towering chest whom he coveted, his heart sank and panicked again. The most worrying matter finally happened.

Celine learned about the situation from “Aguile” in advance. She came to Shea and saluted, “Celine is overwhelmed that Your Majesty came to the rescue in person.”

“Ms. Celine, you have been wronged.” Shea sighed, “What happened is a shame for the capital and also a shame for the Fallen Angel Empire. On behalf of the empire, I would like to express my sincerest apologies to you.”

Your Majesty is too serious.” Celine shook her head and said, “Her Majesty eliminated Obsidian and newly ascended the throne for less than 1 month. It is inevitable that there will be remnants left who want to use a scheme to destroy the peace between the 2 empires. Speaking of which, I neglected the safety protection due to my eagerness to meet with a good friend this time. It is my responsibility. How can I accept Your Majesty’s apology?

Celine’s remarks gave Shea a good reason to be excused. As a diplomatic envoy, there was nothing wrong with it. However, the phrase “the remnant remains left and the scheme to destroy the peace between the 2 empires” suddenly escalated the nature of the matter to the highest level of contradiction.

Shea justifiably became the empress as she was recognized by the artifact. The former regent was identified as an “empire usurper.” Therefore, the remnant party of Obsidian was the traitors recognized by the empire whom everyone condemned.

Angley’s face became even more unsightly. Zall knelt down hastily without a second thought, “Your Majesty, I’m just being used by others to destroy the Princess Villa’s business. I don’t even know the identity of Madam Envoy. I absolutely have no other intention!”

Shea asked coldly, “Used by others?”

“It’s Plinton! He has a very huge responsibility for the explosion of the wine cellar in the eastern suburb last night. He wanted to frame the Princess Villa to cover up his crimes. I was just misled by him!” Zall was quite quick-witted. At this moment, a small potato like Damond was definitely not enough to sacrifice, so he must find a scapegoat and the most suitable one was Plinton.

Angley secretly breathed a sigh of relief. His son’s tone coincided with what he had previously said in the palace hall. Plinton, the pawn, must be discarded. Blame all crimes on Plinton, then we will strive to minimize the consequences of the matter.

“As for Lilu’s younger sister Marlene, I admit that I do have an interest in her. This time I wanted to take her away amidst the chaos, but madam envoy…” Zall really deserved to be the leader of the “4 young masters” as his performance at critical moments was much better than Lawson. He first confessed his smallest sin, then he pointed to Lawson, “It’s Lawson! He intended to be unruly to madam envoy, which madam envoy can testify!”

Lawson was nearly out of breath when he heard Zall blamed it on him, “Zall, you bastard, it’s obviously you…”

“Stop…!” Shea turned her gaze on Celine for consultation, “Ms. Celine, is that true?”

Celine’s eyes flashed sharply when she glanced at Lawson, “This person indeed has ill-intention toward me and uttered foul language, but the specific scheme or inside story behind it is unknown. This is the Fallen Angel Empire. I’m just a guest. Everything is up to Your Majesty.”

Celine’s words were very skillful. She did not deny Lawson’s bad behavior, nor did she put the blame on Lawson alone because of resentment. The last sentence of “the guest follows the host” was actually putting pressure on Shea as an envoy.

“I initially planned to discuss cooperation matters with both envoys today. I didn’t expect such an accident would happen. It seems that the negotiation can only be postponed until tomorrow. Ms. Celine has suffered trauma, please go back to the Royal Hotel to rest first, so as not to affect the official business. As for what happened today… please rest assured, I will definitely give you an explanation.” Shea also utilized the most important matter of the negotiation to offset Celine’s offense. The ministers secretly praised her while listening on the side. This matter was related to the Fallen Angel. Empire’s internal affairs, it was indeed inappropriate to let Celine stay here.

Stiller clenched her fist as another wisp of blood oozed from her mouth. Her eyes were full of haze. If Lawson is involved in the scheme to destroy the Princess Retail Store previously, it’s still fine. If Zola is offended, I can also beg Shea to mediate. However, now he has screwed up completely. This is no longer a matter of Lawson’s personal life and death, it is directly related to the survival of the Boll Family.

Celine finally showed a smile on her tight face as she bowed slightly. Just as she was about to signal the guard to leave, Chen Rui stepped forward and whispered a few words to Shea. Shea’s face suddenly changed, and the people nearby felt a hint of chill.

Shea’s furious gaze stopped for a while on the face of “Ms. Dark Demon”, then she looked at the group of women who were taken out from the back room. She shouted, “Alice! Come out right now!”

Disjaro and others were taken aback. Alice? Royal Highness Little Princess?

Behind a tall female guard, a blonde girl stood up timidly. This girl was beautiful. Her big watery purple eyes made her look lively. The Demon Overlords who came back from the Dark Moon recognized her. The girl was Empress Shea’s younger sister, Alice. Lucifer.

Seeing this young girl, Zall, who was secretly proud of diverting the disaster to Lawson and the Boll family, was stunned as if he was knocked off with a stick: Isn’t she the one I… wanted to enjoy? She is actually the Little Princess!

The empress’ most beloved and only sister?

Zall suddenly recalled that the girl said before she fell into a coma in the Princess Villa, “I am a princess.” At that time, Diak continued the sentence as “Princess Retail Store.” It made him think that this girl was just a new person in the Princess Retail Store. I never thought she is a real princess!

By the way, Princess Alice seems to have… blue eyes, why are they purple now?! In an instant, Zall thought of many things, and his cold sweat broke out uncontrollably.

TL: Now, it’s time for Shea to establish her authority. What will she decide?

chapters.title: Chapter 578 - The Truly Unforgivable Crime
chapters.body:
Chapter 578 - The Truly Unforgivable Crime

Chapter 578: The Truly Unforgivable Crime

“Alice, why are you here?” Shea was really infuriated. She only knew about a certain plan at the last minute, and Alice was not involved in it.

Alice should be living in Tetenis’ yard with Eve and Alian now. Why did she appear in the dangerous Princess Villa?

This must be Isabella’s plan! No wonder she refused to tell me the plan in advance, and she deliberately proposed not to let Alice appear in public during this time!

Seeing Shea’s face full of anger, Alice couldn’t help but shudder as she showed a cautious look, “Sister, I’m sorry… I know that the Princess Villa is open today, so I begged Teacher Zola to bring me here from the Dark Moon long ago. Then… I met my good friend Celine on the way, so I invited her to the Princess Villa to taste the new wine. Lilu spotted me. I threatened her not to tell you because I wanted to surprise you…”

Everyone recalled that General Crawford said that Celine met an “old friend” and went to the Princess Villa for dinner. It turned out that it was Princess Alice.

Celine was the matriarch of the Dark Shadow Empire’s top commercial family, and she was also the first batch of partners who opened a business in the Dark Moon to cooperate with the Princess Retail Store in various aspects, so it was not surprising that Celine and the little princess had a friendship.

“Your Majesty Shea, please don’t blame Princess Alice,” Celine saluted, “We are good friends. We haven’t seen each other for a long time. I proposed to go to the Princess Villa. I also promised Madam Zola to be responsible for the safety of the little princess. I didn’t expect to encounter such a thing. Speaking of it, I also have a great responsibility.”

(Long time? I met you at the plants trade fair last time… I am not good friends with this cunning big-breasted woman! Moreover, this girl actually wants to grab the master from the lady master? Ah, wrong, it should be grabbing Brother Chen Rui from me, the little princess!)

Alice muttered in her mind, but she nodded obediently on the surface.

After Celine pleaded for Alice, she sensibly left with the guard. The audience on the side understood the actual situation. Speaking of it, neither the little princess nor Celine is at fault, but the one who planned the scheme was to be blamed!

For a moment, most of the gaze turned to Angley and his son.

“It’s him!” Alice pointed at Zall and exclaimed angrily, “Sister, this man said a lot of disgusting things like doing things to me on the bed. I said I am a princess, but he still dares…”

(Actually, even if there is no smoke, I will automatically “faint” after saying these 4 words.)

Alice’s words made Shea’s face gloomy. The almost tangible murderous intent in her cold eyes shot at Zall. Zall already freaked out when Alice jumped out. How could he withstand the pressure of the Demon Overlord? He had already knelt on the ground and trembled.

If Lawson’s unruly desire for Celine previously was like kicking the iron board, then his kidnapping the little princess with the intention to infringe was simply to hit the iron wall with his head! No matter what kind of terrifying plan Her Majesty Empress had behind this incident, there was only a dead end in front of him now.

“Your Majesty!” Angley finally said, “All this is a misunderstanding. Zall didn’t know the true identity of the little princess. Otherwise, he would not dare to offend her at all. But by now, he has committed a serious crime and it’s irreversible. It’s my responsibility for not teaching him well, which caused him to be used, then acted unscrupulously. I just ask Your Majesty to leave a complete corpse considering the hard work of the Mishan Family over the years.”

Zall’s last glimmer of hope was lost. His body slumped down like a boneless body. It was obvious that Angley was going to sacrifice his biological son.

Angley put the blame entirely on Zall and Plinton. By attributing the crimes of kidnapping the little princess and envoy to Zall’s personal behavior (which was also true), he only had 2 intentions. The first was to sacrifice the pawn to save the general. The second was to drag the Boll Family into the water. Since it was dealing with the 2 major elder families at the same time, Shea would definitely consider it more carefully, especially in this sensitive period.

Shea’s anger gradually subsided. She looked at Zall and Lawson with a thoughtful look, “This matter is not trivial and must not be tolerated, but in my opinion, this kidnapping event should not be specially directed to the royal princess and the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy…”

This sentence gave this incident a definition. Not only did Angley and Stiller feel slightly relieved, but even the officials knew it well: It seems that the empress is still quite deterred by the elder families. She did not take advantage to exaggerate the situation. Moreover, facing the huge pressure from the foreign enemy of the Dark Shadow Empire, it is really not suitable for internal strife. From the overall point of view, the choice of the empress is very appropriate.

While everyone was waiting for the results of Shea’s handling of the matter, a large group of imperial guards walked into the courtyard. Once they entered the courtyard, they had attracted everyone’s attention.

There are about 300 imperial guards who are all women. Judging from their neat pace, it is obvious that they have tacit understanding and are well-trained. They are wearing uniform cloaks, holding scimitars, and wearing veils to hide their faces. The cloak is a high-quality close-fitting leather armor. The most surprising thing is that the strength of these guards is far beyond imagination. There are around 40 to 50 Demon Emperors! The rest are Great Demon Kings!

Well-trained elite legion can use the mediums such as magic tattoos to connect power and will as a whole to suppress and fight the Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord powerhouses. So, what is the concept of 40 to 50 well-trained Demon Emperors plus more than 200 Great Demon Kings? If the timing is right, even Demon Overlord would be finished off in a single blow.

Now the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire are in a tense situation. These powerful female guards should not be the support from the Dark Shadow Empire nor the White Feather Estate or the Warlock Fortress, but Shea’s own power!

Perhaps, what is revealed now is only part of it…

When everyone was shocked, a Demon Emperor stepped forward to report, “Your Majesty, the imperial guards and secret intelligence department were ordered to go to the Mishan Family to search, but we were met with strong resistance. All those who resist have been killed! Although the whereabouts of the envoy has not been found, we found some other very important items. Please have a look, Your Majesty.”

When Angley heard the phrase “All those who resist have been killed”, it was like a bolt from the blue. The rest of the people, especially those in the elder families, also changed their faces. Whispers sounded all of a sudden.

Just now, Shea’s meaning faintly revealed her intention of not going against the entire family. On the other hand, the guards immediately caused a massacre in the Mishan Family!

Regardless of whether it was due to the time difference between commands and regardless whether it was due to the envoy, this kind of massacre of the elder families was a deplorable act. Angley was filled with righteous indignation as he suddenly became a victim from a sinner. When he was about to unite all the elder families to put pressure on Shea, he saw what the imperial guard presented to Shea.

Some documents and a black box.

Angley’s whole body suddenly felt as if he had been punched head-on. He could hardly believe his eyes. His grief and indignation instantly solidified on his face.

Shea opened the file and took a look. Her pupils shrunk suddenly, then her eyes became colder as she read on. She said sternly, “What a descendant of a man of great merit! What a guardian family of the empire! You took the interests of the empire as the Mishan Family’s!”

The corners of Angley’s eyes twitched as he lowered without looking directly at her. After the ministers on the side heard Shea’s words and Angley’s demeanor, they vaguely guessed the contents of some documents. Many people began to feel anxious. The Mishan Family is not the only one who does transactions under the table and embezzles public funds. As the operator of the big families, whose hands are clean?

For so many years. Almost every family has an account. The Mishan Family is only exposed today because of the envoy incident. Our only hope is that these things will not affect us too much.

“Your Majesty, this box is protected by a powerful magic circle. We couldn’t open it despite trying many ways.”

A fluke surged in Angley’s heart. When it comes to the seriousness of the consequences, the contents of the box are 100 times more severe than the documents outside. Fortunately, this box is enchanted with a special powerful magic circle which is unbreakable. Only I can open it. Once the external force exceeds a certain limit, it will automatically destroy, then there will be no proof.

At this moment, the black box floated up suddenly and slowly flew in front of the stunning beauty with glasses. Zola stretched out her jade-white palm, and her 5 fingers danced quickly in a mysterious rhythm.

The suspended box kept shining with a strange light, then the light disappeared with a “click” sound. The “unbreakable” black box opened unharmed, shattering Angely’s last hope.

“No!” Angley yelled desperately. Flames were ignited all over on his body, and he instantly appeared in front of the black box. He punched in an attempt to destroy the contents inside.

Before the fist touched the black box, it solidified. The flames emerging from Angley’s body also solidified like a frozen ice sculpture. After a muffled sound, the “frozen flame” on the outside turned into dust, and Angley fell straight down. Although he was not dead, he lost even the power to commit suicide.

Dealing with Angley of the early stage of the Demon Emperor power was just a breeze for Zola.

Zola didn’t even look at Angley. The opened black box automatically floated in front of Shea. The sharp-eyed people on the side had already seen that there were several things inside such as a truncheon, medal, magic scroll, and a few booklets.

Shea took out a few booklets and flipped through it. The gloominess on her cold and beautiful face became more and more intense. When she picked up the truncheon and the magic leather scroll, she couldn’t restrain her rage at all.

“What should I call you? Honorable Marquis of the Bloody Empire… Sir Angley. Mishan?” Shea’s furious and cold voice shocked the audience.

Marquis of the Bloody Empire!

Angley?

Many people immediately realized why Angley rushed to the black box desperately and why the imperial guards were desperately resisted by the Mishan Family when they got these items.

Many families of the Demon Realm adhere to the principle of “don’t put all the eggs in 1 basket”. The family bloodline would be moved to the other empires separately. If the 2 empires were fighting with each other, then the 2 bloodlines would completely abandon the past entanglements and become true enemies. Regardless of victory or defeat, there would always be 1 that could be continued. This was a kind of unwritten rule.

The behavior of pedaling 2 boats by Angely, who was the Fallen Angel Empire’s elder family and a “part-time” Marquis of the Bloody Empire, had destroyed this unwritten rule which had a nature of betraying the empire.

If the kidnapping the envoy previously could still be attributed to personal behavior, then the reveal of this shocking secret had completely pushed the entire Mishan Family into the abyss of annihilation.

This way, the nature of kidnapping the envoy was no longer the so-called instigation or misleading. Once something happened to the envoy, it was likely to become the trigger of the war between the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire, then the beneficiary was naturally the Bloody Empire. Angley, who was the “Honorable Marquis” of the Bloody Empire, did so with extremely sinister intentions. There were only 2 words to describe the entire Mishan Family: Unforgivable crime.

“Impossible… Why…” Angley almost collapsed as he was just mumbling to himself.

In fact, Angley was not the undercover agent spy of the Bloody Empire. It was just that when he was sent to the Bloody Empire, he obtained the title of Honorable Marquis with some networking, leaving a way for himself and the Mishan Family.

What made Angley unable to believe it was that this secret was not even known to his closest friends. Besides the Bloody Empire’s Raizen the Great and Prince Aleus, only a woman knew about it. This woman had an extraordinary strategy and was proficient in the trap technique. She was once the controller of the most secret organization of the capital. With her help, Angley successfully arranged the secret rooms to hide these largest secrets. If outsiders wanted to break into it, they would only be destroyed with the items.

In such a short period of time, how could the imperial guards and the secret intelligence department find the black box hidden in that secret room without any problem?

There is only 1 possibility. Either the Bloody Empire or that woman betrayed me. The Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen is in closed doors training. Great Prince Aleus and Second Prince Edmund are fighting inextricably at the north of the Iron Fist Estate. With these 2 people’s identities, it is impossible to divulge this secret when the Mishan Family still has a great usage value. The woman is most suspicious, but there is nothing to be suspicious about because she is dead.

She died in a well-known accident about a year ago, which was witnessed by Regent Obsidian. Afterward, Obsidian, who flew into a rage, even hunted an organization in the entire empire to retaliate.

What is going on? Angley felt the entire sky collapse. From the incident of the Princess Villa, Mishan Family seemed to have entered a trap, then they waited for him to actively dive into it step by step. At this point, the evidence was conclusive, it was useless no matter how he refuted.

“Angley, what else do you have to say?”

“Haha!” Angley suddenly laughed with a hint of insanity. “It is indeed Your Majesty Empress. You actually made this setup. I admit my defeat! But why didn’t Your Majesty publicize the yellow booklet as well? Which families and royal families have done what activities with the Mishan Family in the past few hundred years, and what benefits they obtained, are all recorded in it! The crimes of many people are no less than my crime of”betraying the empire” today!”

Angley became more frantic as he looked at the nearby elder families and royal families, “You, you, you… you all can’t escape! Annihilate together with the Mishan Family!”

Wherever his eyes looked, few actually dared to look directly at him.

Under various complicated gazes, Shea took out the yellow booklet that she had browsed through just now. When she moved her hand slightly, the yellow booklet turned into ashes in the black flame with a “wheeze” and disappeared without a trace.

“Your death is imminent, but you still want to frame others. This is simply unforgivable!” Shea’s blade-like icy voice sounded. It cut into Angley’s heart like a sharp blade, and Angley felt dizzy. His remaining will completely collapsed.

TL: Who is the goat 🐐now?

chapters.title: Chapter 579 - Kindness And Majesty
chapters.body:
Chapter 579 - Kindness And Majesty

Chapter 579: Kindness and Majesty

In stark contrast to the collapsed Angley, the rest of the families were grateful and relieved.

Chen Rui secretly praised Shea’s clever means. After Emperor Guangwu Liu Xiu killed his powerful enemy Wang Lang in the Battle of Julu, he burned thousands of materials on the interaction between officials and Wang Lang which slandered Liu Xiu. People were very grateful for that. In the later period of the 3 Kingdoms, after the Battle of Guandu, Cao Cao seized a large number of secret letters between his subordinates and Yuan Shao, but he burned them down without even looking at them to show that the past was forgotten. This won him the people’s hearts.

Shea didn’t exactly copy Liu Xiu or Cao Cao’s approach this time, but there were similarities. There were too many families involved in this. If she investigated thoroughly, perhaps the entire emperor empire would encounter unimaginable turbulence, giving foreign enemies a chance.

Shea’s practice of “burning after a few glances” showed her clever means. Especially after showing the power of the Lamp Spirits Guard Team under her, besides giving an alarm for the royal families and elder families, she also showed an attitude.

Shea looked at the changes in everyone’s expressions and spoke up, “The Mishan Family surrendered to the enemy and betrayed the empire. Such a crime is unforgivable. I have decided to take back all the glory including the Mishan surname and the elder family status, completely eradicate the traitors of the empire, and eliminate the troubles forever. Any objections from anyone?”

All royals and families agreed unanimously, “No objections. Your Majesty is wise!”

This was the smoothest resolution since Shea took over.

“Very well. Dark Demon, I’ll leave Angley, his son, and the Mishan Family to you. Remember not to leave any troubles. Genie, you lead the guard to fully cooperate with the secret intelligence department. Also, immediately notify Tekula Fortress’ Sarandi and Gerant to kill the Mishan Family’s traitor, Baroco.”

Isabella and Genie bowed together. 2 lamp spirits held Angley and Zall respectively, then they walked out of the courtyard.

The Mishan Family would be facing complete massacre and destruction soon. Those with the surname “Mishan” would be annihilated, even Baroco who led the army out there was no exception. Normally, perhaps some people would still plead mournfully, but in the midst of this intense situation, everyone knew that the Mishan Family couldn’t avoid the fate of being exterminated.

Shea had always shown tolerance and concessions previously. At this moment she finally showed her ferocious fangs. The ruthless Blood and Iron Policy made some fence sitters start to really think about taking sides.

Stiller took a deep breath and took a few steps forward with determination. She bowed to Zola and said, “Madam Zola, I have only seen real magic today, and I sincerely admire madam’s strength. I’m willing to be madam’s apprentice to explore the essence of magic further in my limited life.”

Stiller’s actions surprised everyone. Putting aside the strength of Stiller, with her identity in the Boll Family, and the weight of the Boll Family in the entire elder family, she chose this time to be an apprentice. Her choice of teacher was even a powerhouse on Shea’s side, so she obviously switched sides to Her Majesty Empress.

Stiller was clear that the incident this time was by no means simple. It was probably the careful planning of Her Majesty Empress. Even the wily old fox like Angley fell into her trap and died. The Mishan Family was also exterminated. The empress killed 1 family as a warning toward the others to show prowess. It was also her Iron and Blood Policy to truly control the capital. No one would have imagined that the empress would dare to take such a risk under the tremendous pressure of the Dark Shadow Empire. Perhaps it was this kind of courage that Prince Obsidian did not have that was able to surprise all the elder families.

The Boll Family incident involving the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy this time was serious in nature. If Shea wanted to expand the situation, the Mishan Family was a lesson for the past. So, Stiller made a decision immediately.

Only by surrendering to the empress could the life of the Boll Family and even Lawson be saved.

Shea naturally understood Stiller’s intention. The Boll Family and Toro Family were the 2 largest elder families. If they could surrender to her command, then it was equivalent to grasping half of the elder families’ right to speak. She turned her gaze toward Zola in a consulting manner.

Zola did not respond, but she just glanced at Lawson. Stiller gritted her teeth and waved the wand in her hand. Lawson screamed as his body sounded with continuous bursts. He instantly turned into an unconscious man covered in blood.

“Madam, his spirit power has been shattered and he will not be able to train for the rest of his life. I have only 1 grandson. If he dies, then my direct bloodline will be severed. Madam, please spare his life!”

When Stiller said this, her voice was a little sobbing. Everyone saw it clearly that Stiller didn’t reserve her power. Lawson had completely become a useless person.

Zola’s face was indifferent as she didn’t seem to be moved by it. In her opinion, the overall situation of the Fallen Angel Empire had nothing to do with her. Not to mention accepting apprentice, sparing Stiller’s life was already giving Shea a face.

“Madam!” Stiller knelt down to Zola on one knee while bursting into tears. Shumir, the patriarch of the Boll Family, also knelt down.

“Madam Stiller,” Chen Rui sighed, “You only have 1 grandson, but your grandson caused how many grandmothers lose their favorite grandson or granddaughter? Have you ever thought that Lawson would end up like this today, you, his grandmother who has been indulging and pampering him, should bear the most important responsibility?”

Stiller shuddered and lowered her head. Her hand which was holding the wand trembled slightly, not in anger, but in shame. “Aguile” is right. I am strict with my son, Shumir, but I had pampered this grandson since he was a child. I would give him everything he wanted. If he made a mistake outside, I would go all out to protect him, which resulted in the tragic consequences today.

In fact, her spoiling and connivance were the biggest reasons that caused Lawson to cause disaster and put the Boll Family in desperation. It was only now that Stiller came to her senses. Intertwined in the regret and hatred feelings, she tremblingly raised her wand to Lawson. Her knuckles had turned white as she was about to make a killing blow. Chen Rui’s figure instantly blocked in front of the wand.

“Find a place and let Lawson stay there forever. He can’t go out for a lifetime. When he has another offspring, I believe Madam Stiller will learn your lesson. What do you think, Zola?”

An ant like Lawson was a trivial thing to Zola. Now that her man had spoken up, she could no longer pretend not to hear, “Oh.“

The treatment of life imprisonment was actually more uncomfortable for Lawson than death, but after all, it gave Stiller a chance to continue her bloodline. Stiller understood that this was the greatest magnanimity. She bowed deeply to Zola and Chen Rui, “Thank you Madam Zola! Thank you, Sir. Aguile! Madam Zola, I really want to learn magic from you. Please fulfill my wish, madam!”

Zola frowned while Chen Rui nodded slightly to her. Ms. Fairy Dragon thought for a while. It’s nothing more than another handyman or experiment subject. She finally agreed, “Okay.”

Stiller breathed a sigh of relief, and Shea also nodded. The significance of the apprenticeship was not as simple as seen on the surface. Now the Boll Family truly submitted to the empress.

The bystanders see most clearly. Some thoughtful people were secretly frightened when they saw that Zola’s obedience to “Aguile” was faintly above the empress level. They began to reevaluate the power and influence of “Aguile”.

Stiller’s choice made Elder Lunters of the Leif Family make a decision secretly. He stepped forward and said to Shea, “This time, Basroya was greedy and accepted a bribe from the Mishan Family which indirectly caused the Princess Villa to suffer serious losses. He has already submitted his resignation to the garrison guard department and accepted the most severe punishment within the family. Your Majesty, please reschedule a suitable candidate as the head of the garrison guard team.”

The chief of the garrison guard team was equivalent to the chief of police which was a very important position. This move by Lunters was obviously affected by the Mishan Family and Boll Family incidents. It could also be regarded as Leif Family’s compromise for the empress. After all, Basroya played a disgraceful role in this incident.

Shea nodded, “I agree with Basroya’s resignation. Montola of the Toro Family will be the chief of the garrison guard team.”

Usually, the “opposition” was led by the Mishan Family and Leif Family. Now that the Mishan Family had collapsed, the Leif Family took the initiative to show their favor. In addition to Shea’s previous methods, there was no objection this time.

Toro Family’s Old Cowen and others were secretly delighted, and they hurriedly came out to thank Her Majesty.

“All the Mishan Family properties will be confiscated. The control of the Night Chamber of Commerce will be taken over by the Boll Family, supported by the Leif Family. The specific affairs and benefits will be distributed by both your families. I just want to say that we must learn the lesson this time, don’t repeat the Mishan Family’s mistakes again.”

Since the Mishan Family’s business was confiscated, a big portion of market share was available. Just monopolizing the entire empire’s black grape wine sales would have considerable benefits.

Shea’s generous means made everyone show a strange look. Especially the family members of the Night Chamber of Commerce whose surprised expression was beyond words. If it was the former Royal Highness Regent, he would definitely hold these interests firmly in his hands. Her Majesty Empress’ courage was far beyond what Obsidian could compare.

Stiller and Lunters looked at each other and bowed together.

Alice blinked her big eyes, “Sister, the Princess Villa is now destroyed. I have some difficulties on hand. I want to do fundraising. Can I invite Disjaro, Oliver, Redotan, Shumir and other sirs to participate in the rebuilding of Princess Villa?”

The few people named by Alice were startled at first, then they showed joy. More people were surprised as they began to take the young little princess seriously.
