All of a sudden, Moore raised his brows and saw cracks of light appeared in the dense “dark clouds”.

The cracks grew wider and wider. A dazzling light suddenly burst out in all directions. The brightness even covered the 2 moons of the day. It was not the heat of the sun, but the brilliance of the stars.

The moment the “dark clouds” split, a voice sounded, “[Star Explosion].”

The “clouds” were scattered around. Time seemed to stop. In the next second, the scattered “clouds’ shattered under the dazzling brilliance. Countless feathers, broken bones, flesh and blood fell like rain.

Moore stared at the figure covered in the star-like armor in the sky. A term about this armor came to his mind. An expression of surprise appeared on his face, then he recovered his composure as he became even more certain of the level of the inheritance “grand master”.

At this time, the Devil’s Snare Ship had already begun to sway violently as if something under the water was trying to overturn the ship.

Tetenis’ ship was very ingenious in terms of design and craftsmanship. It was equipped with a magic balancer that ordinary ships did not have. The principle was similar to a roly-poly toy. Under a certain angle, the ship would not overturn no matter how much it swayed.

Meanwhile, the sandmen had their own special ability. Something like suckers spread out under their feet, firmly sticking their bodies to the deck so as not to lose their balance.

When the underwater creatures saw that it couldn’t work, they floated up to the water and attacked by shooting magic powers like icy arrows at the Devil’s Snare Ship. Moore just glanced at the ice arrows all over the sky inadvertently, and all the arrows suddenly stopped in the air, unable to move forward.

Moore was about to channel his power to launch an attack when the fascinating song in front of him gradually approached. He immediately turned his thoughts and did not use the killing move. A golden light was quickly condensed on his body. Those icy arrows that were shone by the light weakly dropped into the sea one after another.

Chen Rui, who was suspended in the air, coldly looked at the harpies who came together again with a blade-like light in his eyes.

His combat power was in peak condition now. A powerful [Star Explosion] in the [Royal Star Transformation] state caused a destructive blow to the harpies. Thousands of the harpies including 2 Demon Emperor level harpies all died under this blow.

If it was a normal enemy, he would have fled in a hurry, but the harpies had a strong vengeance and a fierce nature. They did not run away. Instead, they surrounded him again together with the harpies that were blown away.

They are really relentless.

The mutated siren’s melodious singing voice became clearer and clearer. Under the effect of this singing, the harpies’ eyes were bleeding red, and the ferocious vibe was suddenly strengthened. Obviously, the role of the siren’s singing was no longer to charm the enemy, but it was to buff the harpies.

The singing ability of this siren was far above the average of its kind.

The singing greatly boosted the power of the harpies. The red-haired and red-winged leader harpy screamed sharply, and the harpies made piercing noises simultaneously. Chen Rui could not help but feel annoyed, disoriented and nauseous.

In the whirr of the wind, the harpies pounced on Chen Rui one after another like meteors. The momentum was much more ferocious than last time.

A faint light glowed in Chen Rui’s hand as he waved in the air. The bodies of the 3 harpies a few meters away suddenly split into several segments as if they were cut open by an extremely sharp blade. After this [Aura Blade] attack succeeded, he teleported and instantly appeared in a higher position. With a few more strikes, he killed several harpies. Immediately after that, he teleported away again.

The death of their companions made the harpies more ferocious. Under the influence of the singing, the wind-like speed became more and more swift as they pounced on Chen Rui one after another.

Especially the red Harpy Queen, whose speed was even faster than Chen Rui in the [Royal Star Transformation] state, led several Demon Emperor-level elite harpies in close pursuit. The harpies of the Demon King level were able to spray mucus with the paralysis attribute. The long-range attacks of the Demon Emperor level harpies were mainly whirlwind. The most powerful was naturally the Harpy Queen. Not only could it activate long-range energy bomb attacks, but it could also activate a force field similar to the territory. Harpy Queen’s feathers could shoot out like a flying blade in this force field; every feather was a deadly blade.

It was just that Chen Rui’s whole body was covered by the Star Armor. Even his face was wearing the God-Eating Mask, so the feathers couldn’t penetrate the defense of the armor at all. Although Harpy Queen pursued Chen Rui all the way, it was difficult to make an effective attack.

Chen Rui’s prolonged battle had a strong purpose. After attracting a large number of chasing harpies, the voice of [Sonic Boom] sounded. His entire body suddenly changed the flight path and plunged into the densest group of the harpies.

In the blink of an eye, all the harpies within a range of tens of meters simultaneously shone with countless golden lights with Chen Rui as the center. It was like jumping music notes, but upon close inspection, they were sharp sword qi that was cutting at a high speed.

[True Destructive Aura Blow]——Aoe skill. Within a radius of 30 meters, all hostile creatures will be instantly sliced by the high-speed sword qi. Compared with the aoe skill of [Star Explosion]’s indiscriminate crushing, the features of [True Destructive Aura Blow] was that the stronger the enemy, the stronger the sword qi attack would be. However, the more aoe objects, the more power it consumed. Fortunately, Chen Rui was now in the [Royal Star Transformation] state, so the power loss was completely within the tolerance range.

This kind of aoe skill was extremely sharp. The harpies’ body was minced into countless fragments. They fell into the sea one after another like raining hailstone. The nearby sea water was dyed red with blood. There were countless scattered feathers floating on the sea.

The harpies screamed in sorrow, even overshadowing the siren’s singing. The red-winged leader was covered in blood. The initially decent facial features became distorted and hideous. Sharp fangs appeared in her mouth. Suddenly, she pounced on the body of the Demon Emperor-level companion and bit its neck. The blood spurted into her mouth. The harpy whose blood was sucked screamed, and soon, it turned into a shriveled corpse and fell from the air.

After Harpy Queen sucked the blood of several companions in the same way, her breath suddenly increased by 10 times. Her skin became dark green as her body became taller and bigger. The arms that were connected to the red wings were separated. The nail with a curved shape stretched about 1 meter like a sharp iron hook.

Harpy Queen fire cloud-like wings flapped as she charged toward Chen Rui in a roar. She reached in front of him in the blink of an eye. Her claws with sharp nails grabbed his head like a phantom, then only the shrill in the air sounded. It could be seen that the speed was very fast.

Chen Rui blocked with his arm in time, and he felt a strong impact. Because there was no place to divert the power in the air, his entire body was blown away. A shallow mark appeared on the star armor before it gradually healed automatically.

The power and speed of the Harpy Queen after the mutation were extremely astonishing. She turned into a red light, caught up with Chen Rui, and knocked him away again.

Chen Rui’s highly concentrated spirit power could clearly sense the lightning-like movement trajectory. He focused his mind to deal with it. On the surface, he was in complete passivity, but in fact, he was constantly compressing Star Power in the midst of the crazy attack of the Harpy Queen. He was patiently waiting for the moment to burst out once the opponent revealed a flaw. The ferocious roaring and shrilling air continued to sound in the air.

On the Devil’s Snare Ship, Moore floated to the surface of the sea, ignoring the ice arrows flying around. The golden light on his body flourished. As he pressed down, the sea began to tremble. Rocks and land popped up within a few hundred meters in the sea. The speed was very fast. It unbelievably turned into an island. The Devil’s Snare Ship, countless sea creatures, including those mysterious creatures underwater, were all pushed above the sea on this small island that appeared out of thin air.

“Boom!“

A green figure plunged from mid-air and smashed the hard rock, forming a dent. Just as the figure was about to struggle to get up, a shining figure appeared out of thin air and punched the green figure’s back. Many cracks spread quickly in the ground nearby. A huge pit appeared with the green figure as the center. The ground in the pit seemed to be flattened.

The green figure was the mutated Harpy Queen. Blood shed all over the ground. Most of the blood was sucked from her companion. Chen Rui’s attack completely destroyed her last resistance and caused a strong recoil of the secret technique. Harpy Queen’s transforming power gradually faded, and she returned to her original appearance. She fell to the ground, losing her combat power at the moment.

Chen Rui teleported and came to Moore. He looked at the scene in front of him in surprise.

After Harpy Queen’s transformation, she was just the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord’s power. The harpies were closer to the demonic beast category. Compared with demons or humans, their territory power was not complete. Chen Rui did not feel proud of defeating the Harpy Queen. Instead, he was taken aback by this island that emerged out of nowhere.

“Moore, this…” Chen Rui looked at Earth Elemental King dumbfoundedly- This is not a river, it is a deep ocean! It’s too astonishing to simply create an island.

I remember that in the myth “Great Yu Who Controlled the Waters” in the previous life, there is a kind of soil that grows automatically. Could it be that Brother Moore is also a crossover?

“Remember our conversation on the ship yesterday afternoon? I said that you won’t drown with me around.”

Seeing the indifferent look of Earth Elemental King, Chen Rui was a bit speechless. Indeed, with you around, I won’t drown even if I am stoned to death.

What surprised Chen Rui was not only the emerging island, but also the creatures struggling on the island. These creatures seemed to be females. Their naked upper body was almost the same as a normal female. The lower half of their body below the belly button was in the shape of a fish.

This ‘familiar’ creature surprised Chen Rui. Since he was a child, he had read fairy tales about ‘her’. He couldn’t help but blurt out, “Mermaid?”

“My friend, their names are siren.” Earth Elemental King who was on the side corrected Chen Rui’s “title” error.

chapters.title: Chapter 592 - Princess Siren
chapters.body:
Chapter 592 - Princess Siren

Chapter 592: Princess Siren

Siren! The words of the Earth Elemental King pulled Chen Rui back from the memory of another world. Yes, these are sirens, not “mermaids.”

The beautiful and kind little mermaid in Andersen’s fairy tales should be based on the siren in Greek mythology. However, the siren in Greek mythology is not kind. Its appearance is a bit similar to the harpies in front of me. They often use their beautiful singing voice to seduce the sea ship to hit the rocks in order to eat the sailors. The story of the 3 siren sisters and the hero Odysseus is also very famous, but a myth is still a myth. I miss these stories, but the “mermaid” in front of me is the siren that I am about to face.

The siren did not have the agility and swiftness of the sea on land. They desperately tried to jump back into the sea, but there was a strange suction force on this island, and their body seemed to be heavier several times for no reason. They were almost unable to move while some were even struggling to breathe. On the other hand, Chen Rui didn’t feel the slightest change whether he was flying or walking. It could be seen that Moore had a very precise power control.

“The talented one you are looking for is there.”

Chen Rui looked in the direction that Moore pointed and saw a siren with long curly black wet hair hanging on her chest, blocking the well-proportioned chest. The skin on her body emitted a faint light like a flawless jade. From this angle, he could only see a small side of her face, but she still looked stunning.

This siren was still singing. Her singing had a strange power; the pain of nearby companions obviously alleviated a lot.

Moore waved his hand and brought the siren before him as though the land seemed to have teleporting magic. By only looking at the upper body, the sirens were very beautiful which were not inferior when compared with the Demon Realm’s most beautiful Asmodeus Royal Family. This siren was undoubtedly the most outstanding. She had a beautiful appearance, revealing a pure temperament. Especially her golden eyes were full of natural charm without pretentiousness just like her singing. However, there was a strong hostility in her eyes now.

“It should be the queen or princess of the siren.” Moore reminded Chen Rui when he saw the golden crystal between the eyebrows of this siren; the crystal of the ordinary sirens was usually red.

At this time, the remaining harpies in the sky screamed and dived down when they saw the queen being knocked down by the enemy. When they approached a certain height, they were immediately affected by the island’s gravity and fell to the ground one after another. The others didn’t dare to approach when they saw it. They were just screaming or ejecting mucus from a distance. Nonetheless, it was futile due to the gravity.

The harpies refused to disperse, hovering carefully in the air as they waited for the opportunity to attack while constantly making annoying hiss.

“I’ll leave it to you here. I’ll clean up all the harpies.” As Moore’s body gradually floated, the dense sand and stones around his body began to rotate around. When the Earth Elemental King raised his hands up to the sky, the spinning wind and sand suddenly turned into a berserk hurricane. The entire sky was shrouded in yellow wind and sand, or more accurately, it was like a super sandstorm.

The smoke and dust in the sky obscured almost all the sight. In the dust filled with sand, countless gravel condensed by the power of the purest earth elements moved at a high speed to become the deadliest weapon.

The harpies shrouded in the sandstorm couldn’t maintain their balance at all, let alone attack or escape. Under the terrifying power, they instantly became a sieve. The sirens and Chen Rui below could only hear screams in the whir.

“Don’t kill them!” The most beautiful siren stopped singing, barely struggled to get up under the effect of gravity, and let out a painful cry. It was actually the common language of the Demon Realm.

Her voice was like a plaintive lament, sad and moving. But Chen Rui who was wearing a God-Eating Mask just glanced at her faintly. The strength of this siren is only the early stage of the Demon Emperor, but her singing voice actually affected me who has the S-level spirit power. It is indeed quite amazing even if it is a mutated talent. The siren tribe really has superb talent.

The power of Earth Elemental King opened Chen Rui’s eyes. At the same time, 1 thing came to his mind. At the Town Lupin of the Blue Lava Estate back then, Paglio fought Dark Elemental King Hegel, then he fought the joined forces of the Dark Elemental King, the Water Elemental King, and the first general of the Bloody Empire under the pseudonym Bridget. He was injured and lost in the end. Judging from the strength displayed by Moore, although his power level is only the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, some means and understanding of power have exceeded the category of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord.

From this, it can be inferred that the Dark Elemental King has not recovered his true power. Otherwise, perhaps Paglio will fall short. The other Water Elemental King Lambost has obviously retained his strength and did not use all of them. Otherwise, if he delayed Paglio with all his strength that time, I might have died in Hegel’s hands.

The sand and dust in the air gradually dispersed. The bloody corpses fell to the ground. There were no longer harpies in the air; only feathers were flying all over the sky. Earth Elemental King had always been gentle and courteous like an honest gentleman in front of Chen Ru. Now facing the enemy, he had shown a decisive side. In addition to the dozens of the harpies on the ground, thousands of the harpies were all killed.

Harpy Queen hissed angrily when she saw this scene. Although the harpy was an extremely ferocious creature, it was not low in intellect. Now they were still defeated despite the help of the siren. Knowing that she was not an opponent of the enemy at all, she immediately tried her best to flap her wings to fly up. She rushed to the nearest siren and bit the siren’s neck.

Harpy Queen had a mutated blood-sucking talent. She could suck the blood of ordinary creatures to restore her power. The blood of similar species could also activate the secret method to launch a powerful transformation. The stronger the blood, the greater the transformation effect. Now what she wanted to do was to use the siren’s blood to restore her power to run away. Then, she would try to revenge next time.

The siren struggled desperately in pain, but Harpy Queen didn’t intend to stop at all. When she started to suck the blood, a figure appeared in front of her instantly. With a kick, Harpy Queen was knocked away fiercely. The siren that was nearly killed didn’t care about revealing her bare chest. She covered the 4 bloody holes on her neck with a frightened look, but it was more directed to Chen Rui.

Chen Rui’s murderous intent surged when he saw that Harpy Queen still dared to be ferocious. A faint light glowed in his hands, and he slashed in the air. Harpy Queen felt the danger behind her, but she didn’t manage to dodge, so she was slashed. She screamed sharply as her left wing and arm fell off.

“Wait a minute! Don’t kill her!” The beautiful siren of the Demon Emperor level somehow gathered her strength and desperately jumped to Chen Rui to stop him.

Chen Rui pointed to Harpy Queen who was about to pounce on another siren, “She almost killed your people. You are still begging for her?”

The siren said coldly, “She just killed one of my companions. What you want to kill is all of us.”

Chen Rui did not stop Harpy Queen because the Earth Elemental King had already appeared in front of Harpy Queen. The forwarding movement of Harpy Queen was fixed in the air as her body began to stiffen quickly. Her lower body had gradually turned into a rock.

“No!” The beautiful siren wailed in shock, “Let her go!”

The siren’s poignant and moving plea had no effect on Moore. The characteristic of the earth elementals was that they would not simply provoke their enemies, but they were definitely not easy to be messed with. Once they turned hostile, they would attack ruthlessly without leaving any future troubles.

After a while, Harpy Queen’s hideous expression completely solidified. Not only Harpy Queen, but the harpies on the ground also turned into stone statues. As Earth Elemental King waved his hand, all the stone statues shattered at the same time.

The sirens who witnessed this scene showed furious expressions. Looking at the hatred in the golden eyes of the beautiful siren who was either the queen or the princess, Chen Rui sneered, “Why let them go? They… no, you all. When killing passing travelers and using those bones as a sign of showing off, have you all ever thought of letting them live?”

The beautiful siren did not answer. Looking at the surrounding sirens, many sirens’ fishtails began to gradually change. The shape of human legs gradually appeared in a layer of mist-like membrane. This state was not a good thing for the siren. Generally speaking, the siren could not stay on the land for a long time, especially on the “island” with extremely rich earth elements. Once the sirens reached the time limit, they would dry to death because of losing the power of water elements.

The golden eyes of the beautiful siren showed a resolute expression. Her beautiful singing voice began to sing an unknown tune. The tune was full of sadness and desolation. The rest of the sirens also began to sing in unison. Chen Rui was not affected by any illusions as he was protected by the God-Eating Mask, but the feeling of sadness still entered deep into his heart. He couldn’t help but think of the past when Athena sang the “Song of Essidor” in Town Lupin.

At this moment, the entire island also began to change. The land in the center of the island was slowly sinking. At the same time, a large amount of sea water was sprayed from the ground like a huge bowl full of water. Some sirens who were facing danger were immediately relieved. It was just because of gravity that they couldn’t move freely at that instant.

The Earth Elemental King’s voice sounded, “Sirens are vegetarian. They are not as bloodthirsty and cruel as the harpies, but there is no doubt that sirens are the accomplice of the harpies who attacked the travelers. What makes me feel strange is that the sirens accompanied the harpies mainly to obtain the breath of the harpies to curb the blue spot disease, but there are substitutes. Obviously, we have no intention of annihilating the sirens, otherwise you all would have died a long time ago. Why do you still sing the Song of Broken Soul? Let me remind you that the Song of Broken Soul has no effect on us.”

The Song of Broken Soul was a double-edged song that could self-explode and cast a powerful curse. It was completely ineffective for the pure elemental body of Earth Elemental King. Chen Rui had the pseudo-God powerhouse inheritance (Moore thought so), so his soul power was unfathomable and would not be affected.

Chen Rui said, “The harpies took the initiative to attack us. Therefore, dying in our hands can only be said to be well-deserved. We don’t want to exterminate the sirens. We can forgive you for your guilt as accomplices. We can even provide corresponding help for the blue spot disease.”

“Do not want to exterminate the sirens?” The siren with the beautiful golden crystal siren glanced at Chen Rui contemptuously. “So what do you want? You want to capture the sirens as slaves? Or do you want the Siren’s Heart?”

This sentence made Chen Rui frown. The appearance of the sea alleviated the siren’s drying up crisis, but the Song of Broken Soul did not stop. As the song continued, a tragic spirit of death filled the island. It became more and more intense.

At this moment, a deep and elegant singing voice echoed in the distance. Under the interference of this song, the breath of the Song of Broken Soul gradually disappeared without a trace. The beautiful siren with the golden crystal siren looked odd as another figure appeared in the scene.

This was a very beautiful woman wearing a sexy robe. Her lower body had slender legs instead of a fishtail. The appearance of this woman was similar to that of the siren with the golden crystal. Black hair, golden pupils, and a little golden crystal on her forehead, but her temperament was completely different. She exuded a mature and attractive charm. In contrast, the previous beautiful siren with the golden crystal was more like a green apple.

“Elena greets both powerhouses.” This siren named Elena had reached the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. She performed a strange courtesy to Earth Elemental King and Chen Rui.

Moore and Chen Rui looked at each other and spoke up, “Royal Highness Queen of the siren tribe. Greetings, I’m Moore and this is my friend Chen Rui.”

“I only sensed such a pure element’s breath in Royal Highness Lambost before. Your Highness… Moore, should I call an Elemental King like that?” Elena’s experience and vision were obviously quite extensive, plus this island’s amazing work, so she correctly guessed Moore’s origin.

Moore nodded and said, “I went to the sea area of the water elementals to meet Lambost. I was attacked by the sirens and the harpies along the way. As you can see, the harpies have been completely annihilated, and the sirens are still alive.

Elena confirmed the identity of the other party in front of her was indeed 1 of the 6 Elemental Kings. He is a powerhouse who goes hand in hand with Water Elemental King Lambost. I am definitely unable to defeat him. She was shocked in her heart, and she saluted again, “Thanks to Your Highness for your kindness. Please forgive the sirens for their ignorance and offense… What I want to ask is what price should I pay in order to be forgiven by Your Highness?”

Moore threw the question to Chen Rui, “My friend needs some help from the sirens. If you can meet his requirements, then all the sirens can leave safely.”

Chen Rui was currently a winner, so he naturally did not need to beat around the bushes. He pointed to the beautiful young siren, “I want her.”

Elena’s face suddenly sank, “Helen is my daughter and the successor of the siren tribe, but even if she is just an ordinary siren, I will not accept this threat. With the knowledge of Your Highness, you should know the traditions of the sirens. I admit that I am not your opponent, but the use of force can only allow you and your friends to harvest the corpse of the siren tribe- if this is your original intention.”

Earth Elemental King added indifferently, “I only ask, are you ready to accept the consequences of the extinction of the siren tribe?”

“The siren tribe is already in danger of extinction!” Helen interjected coldly, “It starts when you kill the harpies.”

“If it’s just for the blue spot disease, I don’t think it’s that bad.” Moore frowned, “If there are other reasons, maybe my friend and I can help the siren tribe.”

Before Elena answered, Helen had spoken directly. Her golden pupils looked at Chen Rui directly, “If you can help the sirens completely solve the problem of naga and phantom coral, I will be yours!”

TL: Hmmm, if Dodo was watching this scene somewhere, the crystal harem will become more unstable…

chapters.title: Chapter 593 - Condition
chapters.body:
Chapter 593 - Condition

Chapter 593: Condition

As soon as Helen said this, Elena’s body trembled slightly like she was in a struggle. She finally took a deep breath and did not speak. The other sirens’ faces showed sorrow and anger at the same time.

This scene made Chen Rui feel weird as if he was an evil young man who used coercion and temptation to forcibly seize the girl.

“Don’t get me wrong, I just want to use your…”

As soon as Chen Rui said half of his sentence, Helen glared back and interrupted, “I swear in the name of the Siren’s Heart, as long as you can help the siren tribe solve the problem, I can agree to whatever conditions! Otherwise, all you get is a cold corpse!”

Chen Rui’s head was a little sweaty. I just want to be a fan and listen to you singing? Why do I want a corpse?

Even if the vitality of the Siren’s Heart is exhausted, it will be enough to replenish it with a lot of black potions and devil fruits.

The winner takes it all was the rule of this world. As the defeated, the siren tribe had benefited since they obtained forgiveness and help from the winner in exchange for such a small price. So Earth Elemental King showed a natural expression and did not waste his time to explain the reason Chen Rui needed Helen. He asked, “I want to know about naga and phantom coral first.”

By now, the siren tribe was unable to resist the strength of the 2, so Moore retrieved his power. The island that emerged out of thin air gradually disappeared, and they returned to the original sea area, but the feathers floating around proved the previous bloody battle.

“Phantom coral” was a sensitive word for Chen Rui. If a large amount of this material was available, the giant crystal demonic beast in the ancient alchemy civilization castle could be restored and a huge guard team could be built.

Phantom coral was also 1 of the necessary materials for repairing the strongest guardian, the giant crystal beast.

According to Elena, the phantom coral was originally a relatively common creature in the Dead Sea. Later, the Dead Sea experienced some kind of abnormality. Many sea creature tribes were eroded by a strange power, and their reproduction rate was greatly reduced, so they must rely on phantom coral to resolve this erosion. Otherwise, there was a danger of extinction.

Since then, phantom coral had become the most in-demand resource. There had been frequent battles among the sea creature tribes.

Sirens and harpies originally had a mutually beneficial relationship. Sirens used the breath of the harpies to prevent the blue spot disease. The siren’s singing could be used as the bait for the harpies’ hunting. In this relationship, both parties form an alliance. Their common enemy was the naga tribe which occupied a large amount of the phantom coral resources.

Demons boasted themselves as the highest intelligence tribe. The succubus was the only all-female race, and the rest were collectively called demonic beasts. In fact, the Demon Realm had many pure female creatures which relied on the “unscientific” methods (Chen Rui thought so) to continue their offspring. This was the case for sirens and harpies. Their enemy, naga, was also a female tribe, which was also one of the powerful tribes in the sea.

Naga, also known as Nagi, looked a bit like the medusas. They had a female upper body and snake lower body. The difference was that Naga did not have snake hair like medusas, but they had a few more arms.

The arms were the most important symbol of naga’s rank and strength. The lowest level naga had 2 arms like ordinary people, the more powerful one had 4 arms, and the highest level was a 6-armed naga. Naga did not have the medusas’ [Petrify] talent and long-range arrow shooting skills, but they had a poison talent and terrifying melee combat ability. Even when the sirens joined forces with the harpies, they could only seize a small part of the phantom coral resources which barely guaranteed the survival of their tribes.

Now most of the harpies, including the queen, were eliminated in this battle. The sirens who had lost their allies were not opponents of the naga at all, so they were definitely unable to compete for the phantom coral. This meant that even if there was no foreign enemy, the sirens would gradually extinct.

Chen Rui thus understood the reason. No wonder Helen prevented me from killing the harpies and Queen Harpy. At this time, the fatigue period of the [Royal Star Transformation] came, and he had a feeling of fatigue. He refocused and asked, “Is there a ready-made phantom coral? Can you show it to me?”

Elena hesitated for a while before instructing a siren. The siren dived into the water. Soon, she returned and brought a small reef. There were some ginkgo leaf-like things on the reef with many whisker-like pink “tentacles” at the end. When Chen Rui stretched his hand over, the “ginkgo leaf” curled up into a ball-like stacked fungus. When he got closer, the color quickly changed from pink to black, then it became transparent again, exuding a kind of cold breath as if to intimidate the enemy.

Chen Rui was curious. A faint mist, which was the supernatural force of the Star Garden, appeared in his hand and wrapped around the phantom coral, but the mist retracted after a while.

The failure of the Star Garden made Chen Rui frown. The phantom coral should be an animal. It is obviously not within the cultivation range of the Star Garden. He changed his mind and asked, “If I can provide you with a Fountain of Vitality, can it relieve this corrosive force?”

“Fountain of Vitality?” Elena was stunned. She replied, “Fountain of Vitality is a legendary magical water source. Sirens are water element creatures. They should be able to use the Fountain of Vitality to generate mutations and evolve to gain stronger power, but I don’t know if it can restrain that kind of strange erosion.”

“Try this bottle first. If it works, I can continue to provide the Fountain of Vitality to the siren tribe in the future.”

“So the life and death of the siren tribe is in your hands?” This crude remark was obviously from Helen. In her heart, this “demon” was extremely despicable for openly threatening the lives of her tribe in order to get her. The preconceived concept of the villain made Chen Rui’s image even more unbearable in Helen’s eyes.

Elena showed a hopeful expression as she took the bottle- He actually really took out the legendary Fountain of Vitality. This gives the siren tribe another hope of continuation. I need to try it no matter what.

What Chen Rui wanted to do most now was to take a nap. He yawned and didn’t bother to pay attention to the sharp words of the mermaid. He said to Moore, “I will go back to the ship to rest for a while.”

Moore knew that Chen Rui might have a problem with his body, so he nodded, “Don’t worry, leave it to me.”

Under Helen’s hateful watch, Chen Rui returned to the ship cabin. Dodo, who had been hiding under the bed in the previous battle, greeted him with a smile on his face. The praises of his master’s heroism and invincibility were endless. Chen Rui just uttered a sentence, “Guard the door” before he lied on the bed and fell asleep.

After some time, Chen Rui opened his eyes again. Dodo was not in the room, but the slime’s snoring could be heard from the door. Upon closer inspection, the door was covered with a translucent “curtain” which sealed half of the door. It was obviously Dodo’s disguise.

Chen Rui stretched out and knocked on the “door”. The curtain of the door turned into a soft cloth with sleepy eyes and shrank into a ball; he continued to snore. Chen Rui smiled and shook his head. Without waking Dodo, he walked out of the door.

At this time, it was close to dawn outside. The fishy sea breeze that carried some dampness was blowing on his body. The starry sky was filled with a shiny bright light which formed a sharp contrast with the 2 purple moons. The feeling of seeing the stars on the sea was different from that on the land. It felt so close to the stars like he was drifting with the flow in the arms of the gorgeous galaxy.

“My friend, you are awake.” Moore, who had been standing on the deck to rest, opened his eyes, “You have slept for 1 day and 2 nights. Are there any abnormalities in your body?”

“No, this is a normal situation. I’m fine after a nap…”

“Everyone has his own secret. As a friend, I will not spy on your privacy. But your condition should be caused by the inability of your mind and body to perfectly combine with the [Armor of Faith]’s power. As long as your strength reaches a certain level, this kind of exhaustion state of overload will surely not occur.”

Chen Rui nodded earnestly. In fact, the status of the Super System is similar to what Moore said. For example, skill cooling and fatigue periods are the reasons for the current limited power and insufficient system evolution level. These fixed skills should be the basis. The real Super System does not “dominate” what level the user will reach mechanically or digitally. Instead, it will “guide” the user to master the true power step by step based on the previous “circumstances”. Although the pursuit of power is in different ways, the final destination is the same. Regardless of Demon Overlord, Demi-God, or the Super System, they are all the same.

This was Chen Rui’s new understanding of the Super System when he rushed from the capital to the Dark Moon’s decisive battle.

“What is this?” Chen Rui looked at the corpses of several demonic beasts on the deck in surprise.

“Blue ice-fanged beast. They are a relatively rare type of deep-sea aggressive demonic beasts. I killed them when they attacked the Devil’s Snare Ship along the way. Their bodies are excellent mechanic materials, especially the eyeballs and teeth. According to my inherited memory, many years ago, a potion grand master bought their blood essence at a high price for some kind of potion formula.” Moore threw over a bottle. Chen Rui recognized that it was the magic bottle containing the springwater of Fountain of Vitality given to the sirens. The capacity was much more than it seemed from the outside. However, it was full of purple blood inside now, emitting a little strange light.

This blood essence was the material purchased by the potion grand master at a high price? Chen Rui’s eyes lit up and he didn’t say any courteous words. He immediately took the blood bottle and stored the corpses of the blue ice-fanged beasts, “What happened to the sirens?”

Earth Elemental King shook his head, “Unfortunately, the Fountain of Vitality is not omnipotent. It cannot effectively relieve the erosion of that strange power, but the sirens’ matter is not urgent. We better look for the water elementals first to try to dispel the light element seal of your companion.”

“Yes, this is the most important thing.”

“I got the location of Deep Blue Island, the habitat of the water elementals, from the sirens. According to this itinerary, we will be there in 2 days.” Moore said solemnly, “The Dark Elemental King may also be there by then, so try not to make a move. Leave everything to me.”

Chen Rui took a deep breath and nodded.

TL: I wonder the other 2 Elemental Kings will despise Moore for helping Chen Rui too much🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 594 - 3 Kings Of Darkness
chapters.body:
Chapter 594 - 3 Kings Of Darkness

Chapter 594: 3 Kings Of Darkness

2 days later, the Devil’s Snare Ship sailed into a sea area. Even the magic novice like Chen Rui could sense the rich element breath with his spirit power which was somewhat similar to the Earth Realm in the underground world of Mountain Xilang.

With Chen Rui’s eyesight, he could see the island in front of him exuding a dim blue mist. It really deserves the name “Dark Blue”.

The Devil’s Snare Ship that sailed in full speed initially suddenly slowed down. Obviously, the flow of the water had changed. One after another blue silhouette rose up on the sea in front of them, walking on the magnificent sea like they were walking on flat ground.

The upper body of these figures resembled a human form. Their facial features were more delicate than the earth elementals. They also had no sexual characteristics. The lower body blended in the water as if they were 1. Water-like circulating substances could be vaguely seen in their translucent body.

Water elementals!

The sea around the Devil’s Snare Ship had frozen into ice, so it could not move anymore. It could be resolved with an icebreaker or magic thruster, but Chen Rui did not come to have a conflict with the water elementals this time.

“Intruder!”

[Analytical Eyes] had translated the meaning of the sound of water elementals. These elementals used elemental language instead of the Demon Realm common language, so they should not be elite water elementals.

Moore walked up to the head of the ship slowly while exuding the breath of the king. The water elementals suddenly showed surprised expressions, and they retracted their hostility. They bowed their heads slightly to show respect.

Moore stretched out his palms and closed his eyes, seeming to initiate some kind of fluctuation. After a short while, there was a wave of twisting in the air. There was already another figure with delicate facial features. His crystal clear body showed a magnificent blue color with a faint icy breath. It was the Water Elemental King Lambost that Chen Rui had seen last time in Town Lupin.

“Welcome, Your Highness King Moore. On behalf of all the water elementals of the Deep Blue Island, I would like to extend my sincerest respect to Your Highness.” Lambost gracefully saluted. Chen Rui recognized that it was Zola’s ancient etiquette to Moore back then.

Moore saluted back in the same way, “It’s my honor, Your Highness King Lambost. Please allow me to introduce Aguile, the earth elementals’ best friend. I think you guys have already met.”

At this time Chen Rui had already changed his face, using the pseudonym “Aguile”. He bowed to Lambost.

Lambost’s thought quickly. This Aguile once received the element blessing. His relationship with Earth Elemental King is extraordinary, but now it seems that their friendship is deeper than I imagined.

Moore mentioned this person in the first sentence of the first meeting, and he specifically emphasized that Aguile is the best friend of all the earth elementals. It is by no means an affiliation, but a real reciprocal friendship. My decision to stop Hegel’s killing move last time in Town Lupin was indeed correct.

“Welcome, the close friend of the Earth Elemental King, Sir Aguile.” Lambost discovered that Chen Rui’s strength was the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. He was slightly surprised that he made rapid progress from the previous time. He nodded to Aguile.

“Please come with me.” As Lambost said, the water flow suddenly turned into a conveyor belt-like platform, carrying the Devil’s Snare Ship forward.

There was a gorgeous palace in the center of Deep Blue Island made of some unknown water element crystal. It was luxurious, but more importantly, there was a special power contained in the crystal. The chair where Chen Rui was sitting alone made his body feel like he was wrapped in the gentle breath of the water element. His spirit power seemed to be nurtured. It was very comfortable.The benefits for the magicians who trained water element magic must be more than this.

The Deep Blue Palace was of the highest quality in terms of craftsmanship and facilities. It could be described as priceless; it was much more luxurious than the Earth Realm of the earth elementals.

“Your Highness Moore, if you don’t mind, please call me Lambost directly.” Lambost sat on the upper seat and showed a gentle smile, “It has been many years since the last element war, and it is just the first time we meet after you are reborn, but there was no need for too much politeness between the 3 Kings of Darkness.”

Moore smiled and said, “Then okay… Lambost, please call me Moore.”

“It’s a great honor, my friend.” A brownish-yellow light appeared in Lambost’s hand, “The earth imprint should also return to its original owner. I think you should have prepared for it.”

“Of course.” Moore stood up and received the brownish-yellow light. Although Chen Rui didn’t understand what the earth imprint was, he vaguely understood that the condition for accepting the imprint should be the strength of the peak stage Demon Overlord. That was why Moore waited until he absorbed the power of the Fertile Yuan Soil before coming to the Dead Sea.

After thinking about it, the beating light turned into a strange mark in Moore’s hand and submerged in the center of his forehead.

“Very well, it will only take 3 months from now. With my help, you will be able to completely absorb the imprint and completely merge with the origin.”

“Thank you.” Moore nodded, then he changed the subject, “Will the Dark Elemental King Hegel come here?”

Lambost glanced at Chen Rui with a profound gaze, “Hegel arrived at the Deep Blue Island a month ago, but he is now looking for something in the mysterious sea area. As far as I know, Hegel still has a strong hatred toward your friend which seems difficult to resolve.”

Moore once said to Chen Rui that the water elementals were suspicious and cunning. Apparently, Lambost noticed that Moore brought Chen Rui to the Deep Blue Island this time in order to deliberately make some contact with Hegel.

“Your Highness Lambost, I would also like to thank you for your help in Town Lupin last time.” Chen Rui didn’t mention about his grudge with the Dark Elemental King. He stood up and saluted, “I got a treasure under an occasional opportunity, I would like to let Your Highness take a look.”

As Chen Rui spoke, a round and dark blue bead suddenly appeared in his hand. As soon as the bead was taken out, the surrounding water elementals began to fluctuate strangely. The beads began to tremble gently and echo each other. Chen Rui had studied the blue bead for a long time and had no clue. This was the first time he saw this situation.

“Crown of Wave!” Lambost stood up emotionally, but he calmed down again and glanced at Moore.

Moore smiled confidently, “This is a gift from my friend.”

The bead flew over to him from Chen Rui’s hand. Lambost nodded slightly and took it. As soon as the bead reached the Water Elemental King’s hand, it immediately radiated an unprecedented intensity of light. In an instant, the entire Deep Blue Palace shone in magnificent blue.

Lambost placed his hands on top of his head. After a while, the light gradually disappeared. There was already a crystal clear crown on the Water Elemental King’s head. Lambost still had a gentle smile on his face, but his eyes flashed with an unconcealed light of “excitement”.

Moore looked surprised, “This kind of breath… Is it the origin fragment of the water element? No wonder I can’t even recognize the origin of this treasure.”

Lambost smiled and nodded, “The origin fragment of the water element has been lost for hundreds of thousands of years. It has finally returned to the hands of the water elementals. This time, Hegel went to the mysterious sea area to explore the whereabouts of the origin fragment of dark element. I didn’t expect that I actually got the origin fragment before him. With the power of the fragment, we should have a better chance of winning in Elemental War.”

As the Water Elemental King spoke, his gaze toward Chen Rui also changed: “Regardless of whether you know what the Crown of Wave means to me… this is an unexpected gift. Regarding Hegel, I will assist Moore to mediate. Besides, in order to express my gratitude, I can promise you 1 condition.”

Chen Rui thought for a while, “I want some water source power.”

Lambost frowned slightly, “Water source power? With your strength, you can’t afford to take the power of water source power. Furthermore, you are not a magician…”

“I’m sorry, Your Highness. A friend of mine needs it.”

The Water Elemental King was silent for a moment, and he did not ask any more. There was a little blue light in his hand. It turned into a crystal blue flower and flew toward Chen Rui.

Chen Rui wanted the water source power for Zola. He just didn’t understand how to store this water source power. Moore on the side said, “Just store it directly into your space power.”

Lambost glanced at Moore. As he was about to speak, a water elemental came in and saluted, “Royal Highness Hegel is back.”

Chen Rui just put the water source power into the storage space. After hearing the words, Lambost smiled indifferently, “We need to face it sooner or later. Let’s go and meet Hegel together.”

Chen Rui didn’t say much, but he followed in the footsteps of Lambost and Moore.

Walking out of the Deep Blue Palace, he saw a strange airship floating above the sky.

Yes, it was an airship.

Since Chen Rui was reborn in the Demon Realm, it was the first time he saw the “high-tech” thing like airship. The appearance of the airship was not much different from what he knew in his previous life. It was just that the propulsion system should become a kind of energy like magic crystal, and the control of the flight far exceeded the airship in Chen Rui’s memory.

In the airship, a plume of black smoke plummeted down. In the blink of an eye, it had landed on the Deep Blue Island. A tall figure with hideous bone spurs on the shoulders and elbows appeared; the figure was covered in black mist. A dark red light loomed in his eyes. It was the Dark Elemental King Hegel that Chen Rui had encountered in Town Lupin.

Although the data in [Analytical Eyes] was still S+, Chen Rui could feel that Hegel’s level of strength was far better than when he was at Town Lupin. It seems that his injury has fully recovered. If it is in the current state, I’m afraid Paglio, who had suppressed Hegel in strength back then, is no longer his opponent.

“Earth Elemental King?” Hegel saw Moore at first glance. The red light in his eyes brightened.

“Hegel, this is Moore. As you can see, His Highness Earth Elemental King has successfully accepted the earth imprint.” Lambost’s voice sounded.

Moore bowed to Hegel, and Hegel saluted back cautiously, then he looked at Moore a few times, “Very good!”

When Hegel’s gaze turned to Chen Rui who was behind Moore, his murderous intent suddenly flourished. Chen Rui, who had always maintained a high concentration of spirit power, keenly sensed the danger. Although Chen Rui’s changed appearance was completely different as the cloaked man in Town Lupin, the Dark Elemental King recognized him at first glance because of a certain kind of hatred memory left by the killing of a large number of dark elementals in Town Lupin.

In the blink of an eye, a terrifying breath had locked on Chen Rui tightly. The incomparable killing intent seemed to coagulate his blood. He had goosebumps all over his body.

Immediately afterward, the yellow light and the black mist quickly intertwined, and the ground began to tremble slightly.

In a moment, the black mist and the yellow light suddenly separated, revealing the figures of Moore and Hegel.

Hegel sneered, “This guy behind you killed countless dark elementals including my most powerful elite Demon Emperor! Consider that I owe you a favor as long as you keep your hands off this matter! You should know the importance of this favor in the future game!”

Moore shook his head with an unusually firm tone, “Aguile is the most important friend of all the earth elementals and I. I will not let you hurt him. Hegel, if you can reconcile, I can also promise you a request.”

Hegel said ghastly, “For the sake of a mere ant, you don’t even care about the Elemental Covenant?”

Moore replied calmly, “This is also what I want to say to you. Is your revenge more important than the covenant between the kings?”

Hegel smiled cruelly, “Such a small potato can even affect the Elemental Covenant? Is your earth lump’s elemental heart flooded with water? I want to see if you, who have not integrated the element imprint, are qualified to mention the term Elemental Covenant!”

As soon as Hegel finished speaking, he waved his hands and the entire sky darkened. The entire Deep Blue Island began to be filled with gloomy and strange breath. The great dark power that descended from the sky seemed like it was going to devour everything. Moore showed a solemn expression. He stepped on the ground, and yellow light light spread around. The gloomy breath in the air had a heavy feeling.

As Hegel sneered, his figure had appeared in the air. The black gas in the sky gathered into countless tentacles that rolled toward Moore. Moore crossed his hands on his chest, and the yellow lights in the air connected into intricate layers of shields. As soon as the tentacles touched the shield’s power, a dull noise was heard. One could see with the naked eye that the part of the shield that was touched by the black gas quickly began to decay and dissolve, but the black gas that eroded the shield gradually became more and more yellow. It gradually solidified into a part of the shield. The power of both sides quickly cancelled each other. It was a stalemate for a while.

The earth elementals were the best at defensive. Even if Hegel’s power was above Moore, he couldn’t break through the shield’s defense in a short time. However, this was not a 2-person battle. After seeing that the tentacles were ineffective, they actually left Moore and rolled toward Chen Rui. Moore frowned. Chen Rui’s body was suddenly covered with a light membrane, blocking these tentacles.

While Moore was distracted while protecting Chen Rui, Hegel took advantage to press his hands down; the shield trembled. Moore’s feet fell into the soi,l but his defense became even stronger. However, he had to protect Chen Rui. Moore, who was initially weaker, gradually fell into a disadvantage under the divided attention.

Lambost, who had promised to mediate between both parties, did not intervene. Instead, he watched the 2 kings launch their powers with interest.

At this moment, the light membrane that was tightly wrapped by the tentacles suddenly emitted a strong light. Even the pitch darkness could not overshadow this star-like light.

A red light flashed in Hegel’s eyes. The breath emitted by this light is definitely not the power of the Earth Elemental King. This light made me feel very uncomfortable. Is it the power of the light element? No! Not at all!

The blue eyes of the Water Elemental King who watched the battle showed an odd expression. He gradually retracted a cluster of ice crystal-like power in the palm behind him.

The dazzling starlight gradually went back into the figure with the light membrane, revealing the figure of “Aguile”. At the same time, countless stars appeared in the dark mist. Hegel felt that his power actually weakened rapidly. He couldn’t resolve it even after launching the territory power several times. He was shocked- This kind of debuff effect should be the power of the dark element. Why can it affect me, the origin of dark elements? ? Is it the real power of “Rule”?

By the way, this enemy only had Demon Emperor-level strength when he was in Town Lupin. The breath he is exuding now is actually almost approaching the peak stage of the Demon Overlord! Also, is the armor on his body…

Moore also felt surprised. There was a red light on his body which actually buffed his power to a great extent. Unless one’s magic power had reached the highest level (such as Zola), otherwise the buff or debuff magic was generally ineffective for Elemental Kings. Chen Rui was obviously not cultivating in magic, but he could activate this kind of power. This was really astonishing.

Chen Rui knew that there was still a lot of distance between himself and the 3 Elemental Kings, so he immediately activated his full strength without reservation. Dozens of [Aurora Shot] were launched at Hegel. Hegel waved his hand and the dazzling light ball sank into countless black mists, making a buzzing sound before extinguishing. Moore had already begun to counterattack. His yellow shield turned into sharp thorns out of thin air. Eventually, Hegel couldn’t maintain his previous calmness. He turned into a plume of black smoke and landed on the ground, avoiding the sharp thorns.

The Dark Elemental King finally came face to face with Chen Rui. This small potato whom I initially used to distract Moore actually has the ability to affect the battle!

With the help of Chen Rui, Moore caught up a little from the disadvantage position. At this time, amidst the weird and heavy breath, a tender power suddenly appeared. It turned into layers of ripples which actually enveloped both Hegel and Moore at the same time.

The 2 kings simultaneously felt the immense pressure contained in the seemingly soft ripples. Blade-like long bone spurs appeared in Hegel’s wrists. He retreated while waving at high speed. The ripples split apart before they came close. Before they reintegrated, they were completely corroded by the black mist, but he had taken 7 or 8 steps back.

A sponge-like power pattern appeared in front of Moore’s body. All the ripples were absorbed by these “sponge”. The swollen “sponge” slowly recovered and disappeared in the strange twist, but Moore completely sank into the soil below the knee joints

“What are you doing! Lambost!” Hegel roared.

“My hands are just a bit itchy when watching you guys fighting.” Lambost’s calm voice sounded. “By the way, I have no objection if you said that Moore is an ‘earth lump’, but you said that his elemental heart is flooded in ‘water’.” Therefore, I have valid reasons to regard it as your discrimination and provocation against the water elementals.”

TL: It seems like the Elemental Covenant is nothing for them; they just fight without care🤦♂️… So, the true ‘me’ that Moore mentioned is him after merging with the origin? How will Chen Rui make Hegel help him?

chapters.title: Chapter 595 - Chaos! The Awakening Of The Worst Enemy
chapters.body:
Chapter 595 - Chaos! The Awakening Of The Worst Enemy

Chapter 595: Chaos! The Awakening of the Worst Enemy

On the Deep Blue Island, a large amount of sea water rolled up and soared to the sky, forming a huge “cover” shrouding the entire island.

The water elementals evacuated earlier under the king’s order; they were looking at the wonders of the Deep Blue Island.

Under the huge energy in the cover, it constantly trembled and underwent strange changes. Sometimes, it condensed into thick soil-like earth while other times it turned into boiling black gas. Sometimes, it turned into soft waves or cold crystals; other times it was mixed up in various colors. It was spectacular.

The most aggrieved person in the battle group was Hegel. He originally wanted to demonstrate prowess to the Earth Elemental King so that Moore would not stop him from killing the ant, but unexpectedly, the strength of the ant that could be crushed to death last time had grown to an unexpected level, and he also had special abilities. With the help of this ant, the Earth Elemental King, who had not fully integrated with the element imprint, actually turned the table and changed the previous disadvantage position. They were in a stalemate for a while.

What made the Dark Elemental King even more depressed was that Water Elemental King Lambos actually also made a move. He actually found a ridiculous excuse and indiscriminately made a move on both sides at the same time. Sometimes, he teamed up with Hegel to attack the Earth Elemental King; sometimes, he teamed up with the Earth Elemental King to attack Hegel; sometimes he fought both kings alone. The whole battle turned into a chaotic battle.

Is this still the cunning and suspicious water elemental? He’s more like the hot-tempered and aggressive fire elemental!

The person who felt most pressured in the battle group was not the 3 kings, but Chen Rui. After fully activating the [Royal Star Transformation], Chen Rui was only close to the strength of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. The 3 kings were mysterious beings who had realized their origin power, so their strength was far better than average peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Even the suppression of the [Galaxy Territory] skill couldn’t reach half of the normal effect. If it weren’t for Moore’s strongest defensive ability among the 6 Elemental Kings, perhaps he had already been annihilated by the terrifying power around him.

Chen Rui had not used the 3 life-saving trump cards of [Demonic Flies Transformation], [Star Diversion] and Demon Shield yet. Worse comes to worst, he could activate the first escape skill, [Star Gate]. It was just that the star points were in the Dark Moon and the capital. It was definitely impossible to set star points in this kind of battle now. Once he returned, it would be even harder to come here again without the guidance of the Earth Elemental King. Moreover, Lambost’s intention to participate in the war was a bit strange as he had agreed to help with the mediation earlier. Since Moore was here too, he had to survive this battle first.

In this kind of high-intensity battle, the power of the [Royal Star Transformation] was consumed very quickly.

With a strong determination, a black flame suddenly burned on Chen Rui’s body with a “wheeze“. The flame full of vitality was quickly filled with a violent and manic breath. The color of his pupils began to have an abnormal change.

The water elementals who watched the battle in the distance saw a scorching red light suddenly appearing in the mixed color cover that enveloped the island. There was actually a faint sign of engulfing the black mist.

The eyes of the Dark Elemental King, who was inside the light cover, showed rare seriousness as he was facing the huge Scorching Dragon coming rapidly.

He once saw this big move in Town Lupin that “Aguile” activated when he fought against Hemos, the elite dark elemental under Hegel’s command. It was torn apart by Bridget’s bare hands. However, when this strange “demonic beast” appeared in front of his eyes again, its momentum was completely different from the last time!

If it was in a normal state, Hegel also had complete confidence to resist the Scorching Dragon’s attack even if it had reached the level of threatening the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. However, it was at a critical time when he was restrained by the Earth Elemental King and the Water Elemental King; he could hardly look after himself. This [Scorching Dragon Kill] was likely to be the last straw to defeat him.

As Hegel roared, the red light in his eyes flourished. The bone spurs of his body stood upright in the steaming black gas. He obviously wanted to go all in to take the blow. At this moment, the speed of the Scorching Dragon rushing toward him suddenly slowed down. The surrounding scorching red flame was also covered by a layer of ice blue crystals.

Gradually, the entire winding giant Scorching Dragon solidified and turned into an ice dragon sculpture. It was easily split in half and shattered by Hegel’s blade-like bone spurs.

Chen Rui felt that a terrifying icy air mixed with the destructive power invading his body. Even the passive attributes of [Astral Form] and [Damage Absorption] couldn’t completely resolve it. Amidst the shock of that power, his internal organs suffered serious injuries, and blood had spilled from the corners of his mouth.

Fortunately, he activated the [Star Devouring] and [Star Conversion] in his body immediately, quickly devouring the power of the 2 terrifying elements.

Chen Rui never thought that the Water Elemental King would suddenly “betray” when he went all in. His strongest trump card, Scorching Dragon, was completely frozen!

On the other hand, the Water Elemental King had joined forces with the Dark Elemental King to launch an attack. Hegel was not sure when the weird Lambost would change side again, so taking advantage of the current situation as “allies”, he launched an all-out attack on Moore and Chen Rui.

For a while, the mixed ice-blue and black mist shrouded Moore and Chen Rui. Moore was in a struggle as his pressure suddenly doubled. Chen Rui’s [Royal Star Transformation] armor cracked under this terrifying pressure. It was like a fully stretched bow that might break at any time.

In this environment, the time-limited [Demonic Flies Transformation] or [Star Diversion] could no longer play a big role. Chen Rui gritted his teeth and appeared in the air instantly. The surrounding space was distorted and a black hole gradually formed. In an instant, the power of the 3 Elemental Kings was simultaneously sucked into the black hole uncontrollably.

The 3 kings were shocked at the same time. They actually felt that they could not stop the rapid loss of power. The black hole was like a legendary ancient beast that was capable of devouring all existing substances.

And this kind of power was actually activated by the guy whose strength was obviously inferior to the 3 kings!

In fact, Chen Rui didn’t feel any better. The origin power of the 3 kings was not as easy to digest as ordinary “food”. It was close to the real Demi-God power, so the speed of [Star Conversion] couldn’t keep up with [Star Devouring]. The originally stored soul power of the ancient alchemy civilization’s Demi-God powerhouse was not completely digested yet. With the frantic influx of the 3 major elements’ origin power, it soon almost overflowed.

Chen Rui’s initial intention of activating [Star Devouring] was not an extravagant hope to suppress the battle alone, but it was to stop this chaotic battle before the [Royal Star Transformation] state disappeared. Just as he was about to speak, his soul power suddenly shook, and time seemed to have paused.

The 3 kings suddenly felt a subtle change in the powerful devour power. A dark red color appeared in the black hole.

The changes were getting more intense.

Destruction!

Endless destruction!

“It is actually this kind of destructive breath…” Even the Water Elemental King didn’t have the thought of disrupting the situation. A shocked expression passed through his eyes. Together with the eyes of the other 2 kings, they focused on the figure in the sky.

The original star-like armor had turned jet black with a hideous look. Flashing with a dark gem-like color, his entire person seemed to transform into the darkness of endless destruction. 2 dark red evil eyes were revealed in the helmet which were actually somewhat similar to the Dark Elemental King.

The figure let out a weird laugh. As the figure flickered, he turned into a wisp of black smoke and jumped into the black hole. The 3 kings immediately felt that the power of the black hole had increased by 10 times, and the loss of their origin power to the black hole doubled. At this time, the 3 kings knew that some unexpected change had taken place, so they joined forces in unison to resist the horrifying devour power of the black hole.

When the 3 kings were in the Elemental War, they were comrades who cooperated with each other tacitly. Now, once they really joined forces, their power was naturally extraordinary. The 3 origin powers were combined into 1 to resist the black hole. They were in a stalemate for a while.

The black hole trembled slightly. Finally, it disappeared at the same time with the combined force of the 3 kings with a “boom“. The figure in the dark armor appeared in it. His hands drew a strange rhythm, and the 3 great powers attacked the 3 kings.

Dark Elemental King Hegel faced the softest and most powerful ripples, but it contained ice cold and sharpness that were completely different from softness. This power was extremely powerful. The dark breath on Hegel’s body was unleashed to the extreme. He immediately embraced his arms, and his whole body’s bone spurs quickly extended into a blade shape, flashing a deep and sharp light. Amidst a loud roar, he vigorously shook and shattered the soft power into innumerable ice flakes. It was not easy for Hegel to resist the blow. He was blown away for some distance before he could stabilize himself.

A sky full of black gas was whirring toward the Earth Elemental King Moore. Before it touched Moore, the surrounding solid water element ground had been shaved off by a force of corrosion. Moore raised his hands high, and the ground under his feet lifted him up toward the black gas. The earth-yellow light flashed at high speed, constantly canceling the black gas. Moore’s figure was getting taller and taller. When the black gas disappeared completely, the earth pillar under Moore’s feet was already 20 meters high and the pillar was full of mottled marks corroded by the power of darkness. The ground was also riddled with holes.

Relatively speaking, the Water Elemental King was much more relaxed. When the brilliance of the Crown of Wave on his head flashed, waves rippled away which resolved and eliminated the power of the thick and heavy earth element that charged toward him.

Although the 3 kings resolved the attack of the dark armored figure, the shock in their hearts was even greater because the other party launched the power of the 3 kings’ origin power of elements! He obviously reflected the 3 devoured powers with a certain mysterious technique!

No one thought the fight would escalate to such an extent including the Earth Elemental King. Chen Rui had the inheritance of the Pseudo-God powerhouse. His strength was improving rapidly and his future achievements were limitless. However, he could now compete with the 3 kings on his own which was far beyond Moore’s imagination.

Under the complex gazes of the 3 kings, the black hideous armor changed again and gradually returned to the original star-like brilliance. The terrifying destructive breath disappeared, returning to its original appearance.

Chen Rui didn’t have the high-spirit of fighting the 3 kings alone. On the contrary, his tired eyes revealed incomparable solemnity. The fists in his hands were tightly held- The worst enemy is actually awakened!

“I think we shall make a truce for now, okay?”

If it were before, Chen Rui’s words might not have any weight or effect, but now, even the Dark Elemental King had no objection.

TL: Is it Shura? Or it is something more like the Abyss Family…

chapters.title: Chapter 596 - Exchange Conditions
chapters.body:
Chapter 596 - Exchange Conditions

Chapter 596: Exchange Conditions

Under the effect of the rich water element, the damage on the Deep Blue Island gradually recovered. The entire sea area had also restored its former tranquility and beauty.

In the Deep Blue Palace, Water Elemental King Lambost sat on the top, Earth Elemental King Moore and Chen Rui sat on the left, and Dark Elemental King Hegel on the right.

Hegel’s gaze at Chen Rui was still full of murderous intent and hatred at this time, but compared with before, there was a hint of deterrence. In the battle just now, the power displayed by this enemy is really surprising. Especially, in the end, he is actually fighting the 3 kings alone. He has simply reached an incredible level.

“Hegel.” Lambost said, “I believe you already have a certain understanding of Moore’s strength. His recovery speed after rebirth is much faster than we expected. As long as he can integrate the element imprint, he can completely recover his old appearance.”

Hegel sneered, “Though that’s right, the problem is that our Royal Highness Earth Elemental King seems to have doubts about re-establishing the Elemental Covenant because of this outsider.”

“There are no absolute enemies in the world, Hegel.” Lambost glanced at Moore. “There are no absolute friends either.”

Moore smiled calmly without explaining, but Chen Rui frowned slightly. In this battle, I fully activated the power of the [Royal Star Transformation], so the aftereffect will be far greater than the previous few times. I already feel a kind of intense fatigue now.

He cut a dash in this battle. He activated [Star Devouring] to devour the power of the 3 Elemental Kings, then he retaliated with their own skill which led to the 3 kings each suffered a lot. However, apart from the previous activation of [Star Devouring], the powerful performance at the later part was not controlled by his will, but Shura.

Shura was the inner demon derived from the mysterious silver box. He had been lingering and existing in his consciousness since [Refined Mind] until now. During the battle with Sicali’s real body in the White Feather Estate’s Town Massimo underground back then, Shura did not hesitate to harm himself to forcibly break through Chen Rui’s will to suppress his appearance. After devouring the quasi-artifact Wheel of Hera, he fell asleep. Now, he had finally woken up.

This awakening was by no means accidental. Chen Rui had a hunch that perhaps some kind of biggest test was about to come.

In fact, he seemed to have entered a kind of wonderful state when he activated [Star Devouring] just now under the pressure from the 3 major elements’ origin power, but later, the appearance of Shura had broken the realization of this state.

Lambost smiled at the Dark Elemental King, “Hegel, do you understand what I mean? I think you need to make a more correct choice.”

Hegel’s tone became a little more agitated, “Lambost, it really surprised me that you would be biased toward this guy! Even if he has the [Armor of Faith] and some special ability, he is just a servant or follower of Demi-God. He can’t be compared with us, the Elemental Kings at all!”

“He is not a servant, but an inheritor.” Moore finally spoke, “And it’s not Demi-God, it’s Pseudo-God.”

Hegel and Lambost both showed shocked expressions. The inheritor of Pseudo-God!

That kind of bizarre power that almost reaches the origin of destruction… Even among the Pseudo-Gods, it is still a terrifying existence. Or in other words, it is quite close to a certain peak stage.

Hegel gradually retracted his murderous intent, but his attitude remained arrogant as he said, “Even if it’s a Pseudo-God, he can’t control the life and death of elements at will, not to mention that he is just an inheritor; he hasn’t even reached Pseudo-God now. Lambost, let’s put aside all the reasonings for now. You were also there at Town Lupin at the time. Hemos was killed by him, and countless dark elementals died in his hands. What would you do if it were the water elementals?”

“The life and death of elementals is nothing more than the conversion of energy. Creation comes from elements, and annihilation is returning to elements. If water elementals die, I will choose the most important matter such as the Elemental Covenant and… the origin fragment?”

Hegel was shocked when he mentioned the origin fragment.

Lambost gave a strange smile. The crown on top of his head began to emit a magnificent brilliance, “Have you not noticed yet, Hegel? Or you dare not confirm? In the battle just now, why could I easily overwhelm you? In fact, I still haven’t completely comprehended the power of the origin fragment.”

Hegel’s eyes were blazing red as he stared at the Crown of Wave above Lambost’s head. The flow of breath became intense, “Origin fragment of water element! Where did you get it! I remember you didn’t…”

“Yes, it was not there when you came some time ago.” Lambost smiled and glanced over at Moore and Chen Rui, “To be precise, before Moore and he arrived, I was still desperately searching for it.”

Hegel immediately reacted and looked at Moore. Moore shook his head and looked at Chen Rui. The Dark Elemental King’s bloody eyes suddenly became wider intertwined with surprise and realization. I finally understood why Lambost sided with “Aguile”. “Aguile” actually found the origin fragment of the water element and gave it to Lambost!

Moore’s calm voice sounded, “I encountered a powerful enemy and fought hard for hundreds of years. The earth elementals were almost killed and wounded. 3 years ago, Aguile appeared and helped me kill the strong enemy which saved the entire earth elementals. At that time, my elemental heart shattered. Aguile found Earth Source and requiem fruit and repaired my elemental heart within 1 year. Otherwise, I would have been annihilated and I don’t know when I will be born again. Although the elemental heart was repaired, the power that was damaged for hundreds of years could not be restored in a short time. Aguile found Fertile Yuan Soil which gave the entire earth elementals of the Earth Realm a new lease of life, so I was able to recover to the strength of the peak stage Demon Overlord in such a short period of time. Furthermore, the Fertile Yuan Soil also allowed the creation of Demon Emperor-level elite elementals in the Earth Realm.”

Moore’s words seemed to explain the friendship with Aguile, but Hegel heard the underlying meaning: Besides a strong inheritance, “Aguile” also has another strong thing that is luck.

Don’t underestimate this “attribute”. When one’s strength reached a certain level, luck was a very important factor. Whether it was Earth Source, requiem fruit or Fertile Yuan Soil, they were all extremely rare treasures. Aguile had an outstanding luck to be able to get these wanted items in a short time even if it was accidental.

“By the way, keep in mind that when I saw him 3 years ago, his strength was still at the Higher Demon.” Moore added calmly, shocking the Dark Elemental King and the Water Elemental King again.

Both Hegel and Lambost understood what Moore meant. In just 3 years, he reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor from Higher Demon. To be precise, his combat power is the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. What about another 3 years? He has the Pseudo-God powerhouse’s inheritance and unbelievable luck. What kind of level will this person reach?

Should we choose to be an enemy with such a person?

Hegel finally began to think seriously. After a while, he spoke up, “I can stop pursuing the matter of Hemos and dark elementals, but I have 1 condition.”

“Please speak.” Chen Rui tried to control his extremely exhausted mind and asked.

“Come with me to the Black Sea to find the origin fragment of the dark element.” The Dark Elemental King showed a weird smile, “Don’t you have strong luck? If you can help me find the origin fragment, then I can also promise you 1 condition.”

“Black Sea?” Moore glanced at Lambost consultatively.

Lambost extended his hands, and everyone saw a 3D hologram in front of them. It was a black sea area with islands of different shapes. It seemed to be covered with mist which couldn’t be seen clearly.

“This is the Black Sea. Starting from the Deep Blue Island, it will take about a month to reach at the earliest. The Black Sea is filled with strange power which is extremely dangerous. The surrounding area is the estate of the naga tribe whose combat power is very outstanding, but it’s not the most dangerous. There are even more powerful existences lurking in it. Even water elementals don’t dare to get involved. Hegel, have you found any clues on this trip?”

“Hmph! Why will I come back if I have a clue?” Hegel said quietly, “The power there is strange. My airship can’t enter at all from the air. If you go by water, it’s a maze. The sailors and the dark elementals who I brought along this time disappeared in the sea area.”

Moore frowned, “Since it’s so dangerous…”

“Okay, Dark Elemental King, I promise you.” Chen Rui looked at the familiar islands in Lambost’s simulant magic with an odd light flashing through his eyes.

Moore frowned more tightly, “I’ll go with you.”

“I’m afraid that won’t work, Moore.” The Water Elemental King interjected, “You have just merged with the earth imprint. You must stay in the Deep Blue Palace for 3 months to be fully integrated. You can’t go anywhere before that.”

Moore looked at Chen Rui and shook his head, “This sea area is too dangerous. We can think of another solution for that matter.”

“I’ve decided.” Chen Rui yawned, then he showed a confident smile, “However, if I can find the origin fragment of the dark elements this time, you have to promise me 2 conditions, Your Highness Hegel.”

Hegel sneered, “Although I don’t know where your strange confidence comes from, I can listen to your conditions first.”

“Compared with the origin fragment, these 2 conditions are easy for Your Highness Hegel. First, help me save a friend who is cursed with the [Light Annihilation Seal]. Second, give me a trace of dark source power.”

Hegel thought for a moment and nodded, “Yes.”

“So… just in case, I want to conclude an equality contract with you that does not harm each other.”

Hegel smiled disdainfully, “You want to use this cheap trick to escape my pursuit? I can promise that I will not attack you while you are looking for the origin fragment. As for the contract, you are not qualified yet.”

“Then swear by the elemental heart.”

Moore’s words ignited Hegel’s hostility. Lambost added leisurely, “For some reasons, I suddenly look forward to this trip to find the origin fragment.”
